name: A certain man
quote: Tyrion: Dwarfs are a jape of the gods... but men make eunuchs. Who cut you, Varys? When and why? Who are you, truly? Varys: You are kind to ask, my lord, but my tale is long and sad, and we have treasons to discuss.

name: A certain man
quote: I still dream of that night, my lord. Not of the sorcerer, nor his blade, nor even the way my manhood shriveled as it burned. I dream of the voice. The voice from the flames. Was it a god, a demon, some conjurer's trick? I could not tell you, and I know all the tricks. All I can say for a certainty is that he called it, and it answered, and since that day I have hated magic and all those who practice it. If Lord Stannis_Baratheon is one such, I mean to see him dead.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Harys: How could it happen? Ser Jaime_Lannister taken, the siege broken ... this is a catastrophe! Addam: I am sure we are all grateful to you for pointing out the obvious, Ser Harys.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Two battles do not make a war. We are far from lost. I should welcome the chance to try my own steel against Robb_Stark.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Addam: Storming the walls will be a bloody business. I propose we wait for a moonless night and send a dozen picked men across the river in a boat with muffled oars. They can scale the walls with ropes and grapnels, and open the gates from the inside. I will lead them, if the council wishes. Walder: Folly. Ser Brynden_Tully is no man to be cozened by such tricks.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Weese said he was a great horseman and sword fighter, Lord Tywin_Lannister's most daring commander.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Ser Addam Marbrand was a shrewd choice. Like Jaime_Lannister, he was the sort of man other men liked to follow.

name: Addam Marbrand
quote: Another good man who thinks me a kinslayer.

name: Addam Osgrey
quote: They died good deaths, fighting bravely for Daemon_I_Blackfyre, and I brought them home and buried them among the blackberries.

name: Addam Osgrey
quote: Duncan: Ser Eustace_Osgrey told me Rohanne_Webber was fond of the boy. Sefton: Fond? She loved the boy, and him her. It never went beyond a kiss or two, but... it was Addam she wept for after the Redgrass Field, not the husband she hardly knew. She blames Ser Eustace for his death, and rightly so. The boy was twelve.

name: Addam Osgrey
quote: I scarce remember Addam any longer. It was more than half my life ago. I remember that I loved him, though. I have not loved any of the others.

name: Addam Velaryon
quote: That Addam and Alyn_Velaryon were dragonseed no man who looked upon them could doubt, though Marilda_of_Hull steadfastly refused to name their father.

name: Addam Velaryon
quote: Question him sharply, and we will learn if he is true or false, beyond a doubt.

name: Aegon Blackfyre
quote: The Raven's Teeth had gained the top of Weeping Ridge, and Brynden_Rivers saw his half brother's royal standard three hundred yards away, and Daemon_I_Blackfyre and his sons beneath it. He slew Aegon first, the elder of the twins, for he knew that Daemon would never leave the boy whilst warmth lingered in his body, though white shafts fell like rain.

name: Aegon Blackfyre
quote: Aegon and Aemon_Blackfyre. Wretched witless bullies, just like you. When we were little, they took pleasure in tormenting me and Daemon_II_Blackfyre both.

name: Aegon Blackfyre
quote: I dreamed it. This pale white castle, you, a dragon bursting from an egg, I dreamed it all, just as I once dreamed of my brothers lying dead. They were twelve and I was only seven, so they laughed at me, and died. I am two-and-twenty now, and I trust my dreams.

name: Aegon Frey
quote: Did he always wear a fool's crown, or is that meant as mockery of Robb_Stark?

name: Aegon Frey
quote: Walder: Sire, forgive my Aegon the noise. He has less wits than a crannogman, and he's never met a king before. One of Stevron_Frey boys. We call him Jinglebell. Robb: Ser Stevron mentioned him, my lord. Well met, Aegon. Your father was a brave man.

name: Aegon Frey
quote: Catelyn: On my honor as a Tully, on my honor as a Stark, I will trade your boy's life for Robb_Stark. A son for a son. Walder: A son for a son, heh. But that's a grandson ... and he never was much use.

name: Aegon Frey
quote: Aegon, we called him Jinglebell, a poor lackwit never hurt anyone, Lady Catelyn_Stark cut his throat.

name: Aegon Frey
quote: The Red Wedding was Robb_Stark work. He changed into a beast before our eyes and tore out the throat of my cousin Jinglebell, a harmless simpleton.

name: Aegon I Targaryen
quote: When the sun sets, your line shall end.

name: Aegon I Targaryen
quote: A king should never sit easy.

name: Aegon I Targaryen
quote: On the seventh day, a cloud of ravens burst from the towers of Dragonstone to bring Lord Aegon's word to the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros. To the seven kings they flew, to the Citadel of Oldtown, to lords both great and small. All carried the same message: from this day forth there would be but one king in Westeros. Those who bent the knee to Aegon of House Targaryen would keep their lands and titles. Those who took up arms against him would be thrown down, humbled, and destroyed.

name: Aegon I Targaryen
quote: Aegon the Conqueror brought fire and blood to Westeros, but afterward he gave them peace, prosperity, and justice.

name: Aegon I Targaryen
quote: Aegon once stood here as I do, looking down on this table. Do you think we would name him Aegon the Conqueror today if he had not had dragons?

name: Aegon II Targaryen
quote: Thrones are won with swords, not quills. Spill blood, not ink.

name: Aegon II Targaryen
quote: Rhaenyra: Dear brother. I had hoped you were dead. Aegon: After you. You are the elder. Rhaenyra: I am pleased to know that you remember that. It would seem we are your prisoners ... but do not think that you will hold us long. My leal lords will find me. Aegon: If they search the seven hells, mayhaps.

name: Aegon II Targaryen
quote: Let the ravens fly that the realm may know Rhaenyra_Targaryen is dead, and their true king is coming home to reclaim Viserys_I_Targaryen throne.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Mother, flee!

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Get that wretched creature out of my sight.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Aegon: The vows of the Kingsguard include obedience, I thought. Marston: We are sworn to obey the king, sire, this is so, and when you are a man grown, my brothers and I will gladly fall upon our swords should you command that of us. So long as you remain a child, however, we are required by oath to obey the King's Hand, for the Hand speaks with the king's voice. Aegon: Lord Thaddeus_Rowan is my Hand. Marston: Lord Thaddeus sold your realm to Lys and must answer for it. I will serve as your Hand until such time as his guilt or innocence can be proved. I swear upon my sword in the sight of gods and men that none shall do you harm whilst I stand beside you. Aegon: You stood beside me when the dragon ate Rhaenyra_Targaryen. All you did was watch. I will not have you watch while they kill Viserys_II_Targaryen Larra_Rogare.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: And if I will not [yield], who will you punish, ser? You may beat poor Gaemon_Palehair's bones, but you will get no more blood from him.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Aegon: Lord Manderly, pray tell me how old I am, if you would be so good. Torrhen: You are ten-and-six today, Your Grace. A man grown. It is time for you to take the governance of the Seven Kingdoms into your own hands. Aegon: I shall. You are sitting in my chair.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: There will be no progress. I will not spend a year upon a horse, sleeping in strange beds and trading empty courtesies with drunken lords, half of whom would gladly see me dead if it gained them a groat. If any man requires words with me, he will find me on the Iron Throne.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: I mean to give the smallfolk peace and food and justice. If that will not suffice to win their love, let Mushroom make a progress. Or perhaps we might send a dancing bear. Someone once told me that the commons love nothing half so much as dancing bears. You may call a halt to this feast tonight as well. Send the lords home to their own keeps and give the food to the hungry. Full bellies and dancing bears shall be my policy.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Aegon_II_Targaryen is dead, long live the king.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: This city is a nest of vipers. There are Perkin_the_Flea, Corlys_Velaryon, and Larys_Strong in this court who would murder you as quick as they did Aegon_II_Targaryen to secure their own power.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: These are not normal children. They have no joy in them; they neither laugh nor play.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: Orwyle was wont to call His Grace calm and self-possessed; I say the boy is dead inside. He walks the halls of the Red Keep like a ghost.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: I fear for our king, and for the kingdom.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: I was a fool but never such a fool as to stay with that fool.

name: Aegon III Targaryen
quote: That sullen boy.

name: Aegon IV Targaryen
quote: Aenys_I_Targaryen was weak and Maegor_I_Targaryen was cruel and Aegon_II_Targaryen was grasping, but no king before or after that would practice so much willful misrule.

name: Aegon IV Targaryen
quote: Aegon was not called the Unworthy without cause.

name: Aegon IV Targaryen
quote: That King Aegon, he had any woman he wanted, whether they were married or not.

name: Aegon IV Targaryen
quote: Aegon the Fourth legitimized all his bastards on his deathbed. And how much pain, grief, war, and murder grew from that? ... The Blackfyre pretenders troubled the Targaryens for five generations, until Barristan_Selmy slew the last of them on the Stepstones.

name: Aegon IV Targaryen
quote: 'Fire and Blood' were the words of House Targaryen, but Dunk once heard Ser Arlan_of_Pennytree say that Aegon's should have been, 'Wash Her and Bring Her to My Bed'.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Dunk: I have no need of a squire. Aegon: Every knight needs a squire. You look as though you need one more than most. Dunk: And you look as though you need a clout in the ear, it seems to me.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Duncan: I never heard of a Prince Egg. Aegon: It's short for Aegon. My brother Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) named me Egg.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: I don't want a wife, I want to be a knight of the Kingsguard and live only to serve and defend Aerys_I_Targaryen.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Someday the dragons will return. My brother Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) dreamed of it, and King Aerys_I_Targaryen read it in a prophecy. Maybe it will be my egg that hatches. That would be splendid.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: I will take your son as squire, Your Grace, but not at Summerhall. Not for a year or two. He's seen sufficient of castles, I would judge. I'll have him only if I can take him on the road with me. He'll ride my steed, wear my old cloak, and he'll keep my sword sharp and my mail scoured. We'll sleep in inns and stables, and now and again in the halls of some landed knight or lesser lordling, and maybe under trees when we must.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: This egg had been hatched of dragons, not of chickens.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Brynden: Your squire is insolent, ser. You ought to beat that out of him. Duncan: I've tried, m'lord. He's a prince, though. Brynden: What he is, is a dragon.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: A bloody-handed tyrant intent on depriving us of our gods-given rights and liberties.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Aegon the Unlikely, they called him, born the fourth son of Maekar_I_Targaryen.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: Egg had an innocence to him, a sweetness we all loved. Kill the boy within you, I told him the day I took ship for the Wall. It takes a man to rule. An Aegon, not an Egg. Kill the boy and let the man be born.

name: Aegon V Targaryen
quote: All three of the sons of the fifth Aegon had wed for love in defiance of their father's wishes. And because that unlikely monarch had followed his heart when he chose Betha_Blackwood, he allowed his sons to have their way, making bitter enemies when he might have made fast friends. Treason and turmoil followed, as night follows day, ending at Summerhall in sorcery, fire and grief.

name: Aegon Targaryen
quote: It is tragic that the blood spilled in war may as readily be innocent as it is guilty, and those who ravished and murdered Princess Elia_Martell escaped justice. It is not known who murdered Princess Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar) in her bed, or smashed the infant Prince Aegon's head against a wall. Some whisper it was done at Aerys's own command when he learned Tywin_Lannister had taken up Robert's cause, while others suggest that Elia did it herself for fear of what would happen to her children in the hands of her dead husband's enemies.

name: Aegon Targaryen
quote: Kevan Lannister had been here, in this very hall when Tywin_Lannister had laid the bodies of Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen children at the foot of the Iron Throne, wrapped up in crimson cloaks. The girl had been recognizably the Princess Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar), but the boy ... a faceless horror of bone and brain and gore, a few hanks of fair hair. None of us looked long. Tywin said that it was Prince Aegon, and we took him at his word.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: Bitter his steel may have been, but worse was his tongue. He spilled poison in Daemon_I_Blackfyre's ear, and with him came the clamoring of other knights and lords with grievances.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: The Mother marked Brynden_Rivers on the day that he was born, and Bittersteel marked him once again upon the Redgrass Field.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: Kyle: Myself, I blame Bloodraven. He is the King's Hand, yet he does nothing, whilst the krakens spread flame and terror up and down the sunset sea. Maynard: His eye is fixed on Tyrosh, where Bittersteel sits in exile, plotting with the sons of Daemon_I_Blackfyre. So he keeps Aerys_I_Targaryen's ships close at hand, lest they attempt to cross. Kyle: Aye, that may well be, but many would welcome the return of Bittersteel. Bloodraven is the root of all our woes, the white worm gnawing at the heart of the realm.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: Tommard: ...beggar's feast you've laid before us. Without Bittersteel... Gormon: Bittersteel be buggered. No bastard can be trusted, not even him. A few victories will bring him over the water fast enough.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: I've been too lax, I will allow, but I have never been a traitor. Lord_Frey and I harbored doubts about Gormon_Peake Daemon_II_Blackfyre since the beginning. He does not bear the sword! If he were Daemon_I_Blackfyre son, Bittersteel would have armed him with Blackfyre.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: All the skulls were grinning, even Bittersteel's on the tall pike in the center. What does he have to grin about? He died defeated and alone, a broken man in an alien land.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: Bittersteel and Brynden_Rivers both loved Shiera_Seastar, and the Seven Kingdoms bled.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: When he fled, he swore he would return to place a son of Daemon_I_Blackfyre upon the Iron Throne. He never did. Words are wind, and the wind that blows exiles across the narrow sea seldom blows them back.

name: Aegor Rivers
quote: Bittersteel was half-dragon, and all bastard.

name: Aelor Targaryen
quote: Rhaegel_Targaryen is feeble-minded. Why, I bear him no ill will, but the man is good as dead, and those twins of his as well, though whether they will die of Maekar_I_Targaryen mace or Brynden_Rivers spells…

name: Aelora Targaryen
quote: Kyle: Aerys_I_Targaryen is weak, and when he dies it will be bloody war between Lord Brynden_Rivers and Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen for the crown, the Hand against the heir. Maynard: You have forgotten Prince Rhaegel_Targaryen, my friend. He comes next in line to Aerys, not Maekar, and his children after him.

name: Aelora Targaryen
quote: Kyle: Rhaegel_Targaryen is feeble-minded. Why, I bear him no ill will, but the man is good as dead, and those twins of his as well, though whether they will die of Maekar_I_Targaryen mace or Brynden_Rivers spells… Aegon: Prince Maekar is Prince Rhaegel's brother. He loves him well. He'd never do harm to him or his.

name: Aelora Targaryen
quote: Sadly, Aelora eventually took her own life after being attacked at a masked ball by three men known to history as The_Rat,_the_Hawk,_and_the_Pig.

name: Aemon Blackfyre
quote: Young Aemon took up Blackfyre when the blade slipped from Daemon_I_Blackfyre fingers, so Brynden_Rivers slew him, too, the younger of the twins. Thus perished the black dragon and his sons.

name: Aemon Blackfyre
quote: Aegon_Blackfyre and Aemon. Wretched witless bullies, just like you. When we were little, they took pleasure in tormenting me and Daemon_II_Blackfyre both.

name: Aemon Blackfyre
quote: I dreamed it. This pale white castle, you, a dragon bursting from an egg, I dreamed it all, just as I once dreamed of my brothers lying dead. They were twelve and I was only seven, so they laughed at me, and died. I am two-and-twenty now, and I trust my dreams.

name: Aemon Steelsong
quote: Two kings to wake the dragon. The Mance_Rayder first and then the son, so both die kings.

name: Aemon Steelsong
quote: Stannis_Baratheon can be harsh and unforgiving, aye, but a babe still on the breast? Only a monster would give a living child to the flames.

name: Aemon Steelsong
quote: Gilly: He never broke no oath, m'lord. He sleeps and cries and sucks, is all; he's never done no harm to no one. Don't let Melisandre burn him. Save him, please. Jon: Only you can do that, Gilly.

name: Aemon Steelsong
quote: Fire is a cruel way to die. Dalla died to give this child life, but Gilly have nourished him, cherished him. You saved Monster from the ice. Now save hers from the fire.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: The days when men like Ryam_Redwyne and Prince Aemon the Dragonknight wore the white cloak are gone to dust and song.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Daeron_II_Targaryen named me for Prince Aemon the Dragonknight, who was his uncle, or his father, depending on which tale you believe. Aemon, he called me ...

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Arianne: And the Dragonknight? The noblest knight who ever lived, you said, and he took his queen to bed and got her with child. Arys: I will not believe that. The tale of Prince Aemon's treason with Queen Naerys_Targaryen was only that, a tale, a lie Aegon_IV_Targaryen told when he wished to set Daeron_II_Targaryen aside in favor of Daemon_I_Blackfyre. Aegon was not called the Unworthy without cause.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: When he was born they named him for a hero who had died too young.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Why, every child in Westeros knows how Prince Aemon the Dragonknight championed his sister Queen Naerys against Ser Morgil_Hastwyck accusations.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Not every man has it in him to be Prince Aemon the Dragonknight or Symeon_Star-Eyes...

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: I have been called many things, my lord, but kind is seldom one of them.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: I often spend half the night with ghosts, remembering times fifty years past as if they were yesterday.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Aemon: Jon, did you ever wonder why the men of the Night's Watch take no wives and father no children?Jon: No.Aemon: So they will not love, for love is the bane of honor, the death of duty.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: What is honor compared to a woman's love? What is duty against the feel of a newborn son in your arms ... or the memory of Aegon_V_Targaryen smile? Wind and words. Wind and words. We are only human, and the gods have fashioned us for love. That is our great glory, and our great tragedy.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: It is hard to be so old. And harder still to be so blind. I miss the sun. And books. I miss books most of all.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Samwell: The last dragon died before you were born. How could you remember them?Aemon: I see them in my dreams, Sam. I see a red star bleeding in the sky. I still remember red. I see their shadows on the snow, hear the crack of leathern wings, feel their hot breath. My brothers dreamed of dragons too, and the dreams killed them, every one. Sam, we tremble on the cusp of half-remembered prophecies, of wonders and terrors that no man now living could hope to comprehend ... or ...

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: I should not have left the Wall. Lord Jon_Snow could not have known, but I should have seen it. Fire consumes, but cold preserves. The Wall ... but it is too late to go running back. The Stranger waits outside my door and will not be denied.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Allow me to give my lord one last piece of counsel, the same counsel that I once gave my brother when we parted for the last time. He was three-and-thirty when the Great Council chose him to mount the Iron Throne. A man grown with sons of his own, yet in some ways still a boy. Aegon_V_Targaryen had an innocence to him, a sweetness we all loved. Kill the boy within you, I told him the day I took ship for the Wall. It takes a man to rule. An Aegon_I_Targaryen, not an Egg. Kill the boy and let the man be born. You are half the age that Egg was, and your own burden is a crueler one, I fear. You will have little joy of your command, but I think you have the strength in you to do the things that must be done. Kill the boy, Jon Snow. Winter is almost upon us. Kill the boy and let the man be born.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Knowledge is a weapon, Jon. Arm yourself well before you ride forth to battle.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Blind he may be, but Aemon knows what he's about. I pray the gods let us keep him another twenty years. Do you know that he might have been king?

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Alliser: Aemon's lived too long, my lord. His wits have gone dark as his eyes.Janos: Aye. A blind man with a chain about his neck, who does he think he is?

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: He was a good man... No. He was a great man. A maester of the Citadel, chained and sworn, and Sworn Brother of the Night's Watch, ever faithful. When he was born they named him for a Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) who had died too young, but though he lived a long long time, his own life was no less heroic. No man was wiser, or gentler, or kinder. At the Wall, a dozen lords commander came and went during his years of service, but he was always there to counsel them. He counseled kings as well. He could have been a king himself, but when they offered him the crown he told them they should give it to his Aegon_V_Targaryen. How many men would do that? He was the blood of the dragon, but now his fire has gone out. He was Aemon Targaryen. And now his watch is ended.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: He was more than just the oldest living maester. He was the oldest man in Westeros, and lived through more history than Archmaester Perestan has ever learned. He could have told us much and more about Maekar_I_Targaryen reign, and Aerys_I_Targaryen.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: The world the Citadel is building has no place in it for sorcery or prophecy or glass candles, much less for dragons. Ask yourself why Aemon Targaryen was allowed to waste his life upon the Wall, when by rights he should have been raised to archmaester. His blood was why. He could not be trusted. No more than I can.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Many good men have been bad kings, Maester Aemon used to say, and some bad men have been good kings.

name: Aemon Targaryen
quote: Aemon Targaryen had seen nine kings upon the Iron Throne. He had been Maekar_I_Targaryen, Aegon_V_Targaryen, Jaehaerys_II_Targaryen.

name: Aemond Targaryen
quote: I have never known any one so strong as my sweet nephews, so let us drain our cups to these three strong boys.

name: Aemond Targaryen
quote: Aemond: You were a fool to come alone. Daemon: Were I not alone, you would not have come. Aemond: Yet you are, and here I am. You have lived too long, nuncle. Daemon: On that much we agree.

name: Aemond Targaryen
quote: You only lost one eye, how could you be so blind?

name: Aenys Frey
quote: We trusted the word of Robb_Stark, and he repaid our faith with Jeyne_Westerling.

name: Aenys Frey
quote: Aenys: I do not claim Lord Wyman_Manderly does the deeds himself. He brought three hundred men with him. A hundred knights. Any of them might have—Barbrey: Night work is not knight's work. And Lord Wyman is not the only man who lost kin at your Red Wedding, Frey. Do you imagine Hother_Umber loves you any better? If you did not hold the Greatjon, he would pull out your entrails and make you eat them, as Lady Donella_Hornwood ate her fingers. Flints, Cerwyns, Tallharts, Slates ... they all had men with the Robb_Stark.Roger: House Ryswell too.Barbrey: Even Dustins out of Barrowton. The north remembers, Frey.Aenys: Stark dishonored us. That is what you northmen had best remember.

name: Aenys I Targaryen
quote: The king was easily influenced, swaying this way and that like a reed into the wind, like as not to heed whichever councillor last had his ear.

name: Aenys I Targaryen
quote: How can he rule the Seven Kingdoms when he cannot rule his Maegor_I_Targaryen?

name: Aenys I Targaryen
quote: You are a fool and a weakling, nephew. Do you think any man would ever have dared speak so to your Aegon_I_Targaryen?

name: Aenys I Targaryen
quote: I am descended from Aegon_I_Targaryen and Rhaenys_Targaryen through their son Aenys and their grandson Jaehaerys.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: I want to be with you, I want to sail the seas and have adventures.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: Why should I care if they're all dead? Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I) find new ones; she always does.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I) never gave me an egg, she just gave me away and flew off to Fair Isle.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: Why should Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Jaehaerys_I) be queen? I should be queen, not her.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: Lady Elissa_Farman said that she would take me, but she went away and forgot me. I want to come back to court, with the singers and the fools and all the lords and knights. Please take me with you.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: Please! I never.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: You have everything and I have nothing. Now you would take my daughter too. Well, you shall not have her. You have my throne, content yourself with that.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: It has been three days since the princess perished, and I have not slept. I do not know that I shall ever sleep again. The Mother is merciful, I have always believed, and the Father Above judges each man justly... but there was no mercy and no justice in what befell our poor princess. How could the gods be so blind or so uncaring as to permit such horror? Or is it possible that there are other deities in this universe, monstrous evil gods such as the priests of Red R'hllor preach against, against whose malice the kings of men and the gods of men are naught but flies? I do not know. I do not want to know. If this makes me a faithless septon, so be it.

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: From the very start we have asked, Where did Aerea take Balerion? We should have been asking, Where did Balerion take Aerea?

name: Aerea Targaryen
quote: She hated Dragonstone. She wanted to fly.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Duncan: I am not a stableboy, m'lord. Aerion: Not clever enough? If you cannot manage a horse, fetch me some wine and a pretty wench. Duncan: I ... m'lord, pardons, I'm no serving man either. I have the honor to be a knight. Aerion: Knighthood has fallen on sad days.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Come out, come out, little knight, it's time you faced the dragon.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Why did you throw your life away? For Tanselle? She's scarcely worth it. A traitor. The dragon ought never lose.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Aerion: Impudent little wretch. What happened to your hair? Aegon: I cut it off, brother. I didn't want to look like you.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Raymun: It is no secret that Aerion is a bad piece of work. Thank the gods that he is well down in the order of succession. Duncan: You truly believe he meant to kill the horse? Raymun: Is there any doubt of it? If Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen had been here, it would have gone differently, I promise you. Aerion is all smiles and chivalry so long as his father is watching, if the tales be true, but when he's not ...

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Aerion's quite the monster. He thinks he's a dragon in human form, you know. That's why he was so wroth at that puppet show. A pity he wasn't born a Fossoway, then he'd think himself an apple and we'd all be a deal safer, but there you are.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: Jon: Aerion the Monstrous? Jeor: The very one, though he named himself Aerion Brightflame. One night, in his cups, he drank a jar of wildfire, after telling his friends it would transform him into a dragon, but the gods were kind and it transformed him into a corpse.

name: Aerion Targaryen
quote: I have taught my Margaery_Tyrell what comely is worth, I hope. Somewhat less than a mummer's fart. Aerion Brightfire was comely enough, but a monster all the same. The question is, what is Joffrey?

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: What is dead may never die, but rises again, harder and stronger.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Young I was, and vain, but the sea washed my follies and my vanities away. That man drowned, nephew. His lungs filled with seawater, and the fish ate the scales off his eyes. When I rose again, I saw clearly.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Balon: The lords are gone south with Robb_Stark. Those who remained behind are the cravens, old men, and green boys. They will yield or fall, one by one. Winterfell may defy us for a year, but what of it? The rest shall be ours, forest and field and hall, and we shall make the folk our thralls and salt wives. Aeron: And the waters of wrath will rise high, and the Drowned God will spread his dominion across the green lands! Victarion: What is dead can never die.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Aeron Greyjoy was a prophet. He did not suffer petty lords ordering him about like some thrall.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: The sound of a door opening, the scream of a rusted iron hinge. Euron_Greyjoy has come again.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: The god took me deep beneath the waves and drowned the worthless thing I was. When he cast me forth again he gave me eyes to see, ears to hear, and a voice to spread his word, that I might be his prophet and teach his truth to those who have forgotten. I was not made to sit upon the Seastone Chair ... no more than Euron_Greyjoy. For I have heard the god, who says, No godless man may sit my Seastone Chair!

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: I was reborn from the sea, a harder man and stronger.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: I have my voice, and the god is with me. Mine is the strength of the sea, a strength the Euron_Greyjoy cannot hope to withstand. The waves may break upon the mountain, yet still they come, wave upon wave, and in the end only pebbles remain where once the mountain stood. And soon even the pebbles are swept away, to be ground beneath the sea for all eternity.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: The ironborn shall be waves ... Not the great and lordly, but the simple folk, tillers of the soil and fishers of the sea. The captains and the kings raised Euron_Greyjoy up, but the common folk shall tear him down. I shall go to Great Wyk, to Harlaw, to Orkmont, to Pyke itself. In every town and village shall my words be heard. No godless man may sit the Seastone Chair

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Gods, he has grown grim.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: You ought to have no trouble catching our uncles. One is drunk on seawater, after all, and Victarion_Greyjoy is a great grey bullock so dim he'll probably get lost.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Rodrik: Aeron Damphair has called a kingsmoot. Asha: The Drowned God must have shoved a pricklefish up Uncle Aeron's arse. A kingsmoot? Is this some jape, or does he mean it truly? Rodrik: The Damphair has not japed since he was drowned.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: Balon_Greyjoy was mad, Aeron is madder, and Euron_Greyjoy is maddest of them all.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: I am more devout than even you, Aeron. Perhaps it should be you who kneels to me for blessing.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
quote: I think the Damphair's dead. I think the Euron_Greyjoy slit his throat for him. Erik_Ironmaker search is just to make us believe the priest escaped. Euron is afraid to be seen as a kinslayer.

name: Aerys I Targaryen
quote: His Grace cares more for old scrolls and dusty prophecies than for lords and laws. He will not even bestir himself to sire an heir. Queen Aelinor_Penrose prays daily at the Great Sept, beseeching the Mother Above to bless her with a child, yet she remains a maid. Aerys keeps his own apartments, and it is said he would sooner take a book to bed than any woman.

name: Aerys I Targaryen
quote: In Dagon_Greyjoy's day a weak king sat the Iron Throne, his rheumy eyes fixed across the narrow sea where Aegor_Rivers and exiles plotted rebellion. So forth from Pyke Lord Dagon sailed, to make the Sunset Sea his own.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Let Robert_I_Baratheon be king over charred bones and cooked meat. Let him be the king of ashes.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: I want Tywin_Lannister dead, the traitor. I want his head, you'll bring me his head, or you'll burn with all the rest. All the traitors.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: He'll win no glory here. He's mine now, not Tywin_Lannister. He'll serve as I see fit. I am the king. I rule, and he'll obey.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: You are my most able servant, Tywin_Lannister, but a man does not marry Rhaegar_Targaryen to Cersei_Lannister.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Robert: Seven hells, someone had to kill Aerys! If Jaime_Lannister hadn't done it, it would have been left for you or me. Eddard: We were not Sworn Brothers of the Kingsguard.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Eddard: Robert, I ask you, what did we rise against Aerys Targaryen for, if not to put an end to the murder of children? Robert: To put an end to Targaryens!

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Joffrey: You can't talk to me that way. The king can do as he likes. Tyrion: Aerys Targaryen did as he liked. Has Cersei_Lannister ever told you what happened to him?

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Kingslayer. And such a king he was! To Aerys Targaryen, the Second of His Name, Lord of the Seven Kingdoms and Protector of the Realm. And to the sword that opened his throat. A golden sword, don't you know. Until his blood ran red down the blade. Those are the Lannister colors, red and gold."

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Aerys was mad, the whole realm knew it.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Mummers and monkeys require applause. So did Aerys, for that matter.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Jaime: You are not old enough to have known Aerys Targaryen ... Brienne: Aerys was mad and cruel, no one has ever denied that. He was still king, crowned and anointed. And you had sworn to protect him. Jaime: I know what I swore.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Barristan: Your father always had a little madness in him, I now believe. Yet he was charming and generous as well, so his lapses were forgiven. His reign began with such promise ... but as the years passed, the lapses grew more frequent, until ... Daenerys: Do I want to hear this now? Barristan: Perhaps not. Not now. Daenerys: Not now. One day. One day you must tell me all. The good and the bad. There is some good to be said of my father, surely? Barristan: There is, Your Grace.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: Somehow he had gotten it in his head that Prince Lewyn_Martell must have betrayed Rhaegar_Targaryen on the Trident, but he thought he could keep Dorne loyal so long as he kept Elia_Martell and Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) by his side. The traitors want my city, I heard him tell Rossart, but I'll give them naught but ashes. Let Robert_I_Baratheon be king over charred bones and cooked meat. The Targaryens never bury their dead, they burn them. Aerys meant to have the greatest funeral pyre of them all.

name: Aerys II Targaryen
quote: They said Rhaella_Targaryen looked as if some beast had savaged her, clawing at her thighs and chewing on her breasts. A crowned beast, Jaime knew.

name: Aethelmure
quote: ...all men carry murder in their hearts, yet even so, the poisoner is beneath contempt.

name: Aggo
quote: Daenerys: Aggo. To you I give the dragonbone bow that was my bride gift. I name you ko, and ask your oath, that you should live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm. Aggo: I cannot say these words. Only a man can lead a khalasar or name a ko.

name: Aggo
quote: We are blood of your blood, sworn to live and die as you do.

name: Aggo
quote: Belwas: Belwas has killed many horse boys in the fighting pits. They jingle when they die. Aggo: Never have I killed a fat brown man. Belwas will be the first.

name: Aggo
quote: Aggo and Jhogo fell in to either side of them, walking with the bowlegged swagger all the horselords affected when forced to dismount and stride the earth like common mortals.

name: Aggo
quote: Aggo, Jhogo, and Rakharo were brave warriors, but they were young, and too valuable to risk. They kept her khalasar together, and were her best scouts too.

name: Agnes Blackwood
quote: I have other sons. Raventree shall endure long after you and yours are cast down and destroyed. Your line shall end in blood and fire.

name: Agnes Blackwood
quote: I would sooner have your sword inside me than your cock.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Alannys: Did you bring my baby boy? Asha: Theon_Greyjoy could not come. Balon_Greyjoy sent him reaving along the Stony Shore.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Your mother dwells on Harlaw, with Gwynesse_Harlaw. It is less raw there, and her cough troubles her.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Esgred: The cold winds have worn her away, I hear. Will you not go see her? Harlaw is only a day's sail, and surely Lady Greyjoy yearns for a last sight of her son. Theon: Would that I could. I am kept too busy here. Balon_Greyjoy relies on me, now that I am returned. Come peace, perhaps ...

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Alannys Harlaw never had the sort of beauty the singers cherished, but her daughter had loved her fierce strong face and the laughter in her eyes. On that last visit, though, she had found Lady Alannys in a window seat huddled beneath a pile of furs, staring out across the sea. Is this my mother, or her ghost? she remembered thinking as she'd kissed her cheek.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: And now I must tell her that Theon_Greyjoy is dead, and drive yet another dagger through her heart. There were two knives buried there already. On the blades were writ the words Rodrik_Greyjoy and Maron_Greyjoy, and many a time they twisted cruelly in the night. I will see her on the morrow, Asha vowed to herself. Her journey had been long and wearisome, she could not face her mother now.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Rodrik: You have not asked about your lady mother. Asha: How is she? Rodrik: Stronger. She may yet outlive us all. She will certainly outlive you, if you persist in this folly. She eats more than she did when she first came here, and oft sleeps through the night.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Rodrik: Do not go to Old Wyk, Asha. Stay with your mother. We shall not have her long, I fear. Asha: My mother raised me to be bold. If I do not go, I will spend the rest of my life wondering what might have happened if I had. Rodrik: If you do go, the rest of your life may be too short for wondering.

name: Alannys Harlaw
quote: Euron: How fares your lady mother? Asha: Poorly. Some man made her a widow.

name: Alaric Stark
quote: If you are expecting balls and masques and dances, you have come to the wrong place.

name: Alaric Stark
quote: Walton_Stark_(son_of_Brandon) lies down here in darkness in no small part thanks to you. Stars and Swords, the leavings of your seven gods, what are they to us? And yet you sent them to the Wall in their hundreds and their thousands, so many that the Night's Watch was hard pressed to feed them ... and when the worst of them rose up, the oathbreakers you had sent us, it cost my brother's life to put them down.

name: Alaric Stark
quote: Methinks Lord Alaric has not moved his bowels since he was twelve.

name: Alayaya
quote: You are very beautiful, Alayaya. From head to heels, every part of you is lovely.

name: Alayaya
quote: Alayaya was a whore, true enough, but a sweeter, braver, more innocent girl he had seldom met.

name: Alayaya
quote: They tied her to a post in the yard and scourged her, then shoved her out the gate naked and bloody.

name: Alayaya
quote: At Chataya's I bedded the black-skinned girl. Alayaya, I believe she is called. Exquisite, despite the stripes on her back.

name: Alayne Baelish
quote: Petyr: What should you be called? Sansa: I ... I could call myself after my mother... Petyr: Catelyn? A bit too obvious ... but after my mother, that would serve. Alayne. Do you like it? Sansa: Alayne is pretty.

name: Albar Royce
quote: Nestor_Royce served Lord Jon_Arryn faithfully as High Steward of the Vale. Let me serve Robert_Arryn in this.

name: Albar Royce
quote: A blunt broad-shouldered knight who shaved his chin but cultivated thick black sidewhiskers that framed his homely face like hedgerows, Ser Albar was a younger version of Nestor_Royce.

name: Albin Massey
quote: I do not limp when I read, nor when I write.

name: Albin Massey
quote: There is more to the first night than lust, Alysanne_Targaryen. The practice is an ancient one, older than the Andals, older than the Faith. It goes back to the Dawn Age, I do not doubt. The First Men were a savage race, and like the wildings beyond the Wall, they followed only strength. Their lords and kings were warriors, mighty men and heroes, and they wanted their sons to be the same. If a warlord chose to bestow his seed upon some maid on her wedding night, it was seen as … a sort of blessing. And if a child should come of the coupling, so much the better. The husband could then claim the honor of raising a hero's son as his own.

name: Alchemist
quote: Pate: Who are you? Alchemist: An alchemist. I can change iron into gold.

name: Alchemist
quote: Pate: I do not know you. Alchemist: Nor I you. Pate: Who are you? Alchemist: A stranger. No one. Truly.

name: Alekyne Florent
quote: My own son is safe at Brightwater, but I lost a nephew on the Fury.

name: Alerie Hightower
quote: Alerie: Mother. Olenna: Hush, Alerie, don't take that tone with me. And don't call me Mother. If I'd given birth to you, I'm sure I'd remember. I'm only to blame for Mace_Tyrell, the lord oaf of Highgarden.

name: Alerie Hightower
quote: Joffrey_Baratheon choked, sweetling. He choked on the pie. It was naught to do with you. He choked. We all saw.

name: Alesandor Torrent
quote: The Lyseni. Torrent spied their sails from Littlesister, and before him the Flints from Widow's Watch. Orange sails, and green, and pink. Salladhor_Saan. Where is he?

name: Alester Florent
quote: Alester: You know me for a man of honor— Cortnay: I know you for a man of ambition, a man who changes kings and gods the way I change my boots.

name: Alester Florent
quote: Alester: My chests were lost when the Lannisters overran our camp. I escaped with no more than the mail on my back and the rings on my fingers. No doubt some cook's boy or groom is prancing around King's Landing just now in my slashed velvet doublet and jeweled cloak. But war has its horrors, as all men know. No doubt you suffered your own losses. Davos: My ship. All my men. Four of my sons. Alester: May the ... may the Lord of Light lead them through the darkness to a better world.

name: Alester Florent
quote: Stannis_Baratheon will never sit the Iron Throne. Is it treason to say the truth? A bitter truth, but no less true for that.

name: Alester Florent
quote: Not treason. Never treason. I love Stannis_Baratheon as much as any man. Selyse_Florent is his queen, and I remained loyal to him when wiser men fled. I am his Hand, the Hand of the King, how can I be a traitor? I only meant to save our lives, and ... honor ... yes.

name: Alester Florent
quote: Stannis_Baratheon had left Selyse_Florent on Dragonstone along with her uncle Axell_Florent, but the queen's men were more numerous and powerful than ever, and Alester Florent was the foremost.

name: Alester Florent
quote: Mace_Tyrell demanded the lands and castles of Lord Alester Florent, his own bannerman, who'd had the singular ill judgment to back first Renly_Baratheon and then Stannis_Baratheon.

name: Alester Florent
quote: This man is defeated.

name: Alfyn
quote: Alfyn's member was a wee thing, even smaller than yours, but he was never shy with where he stuck it. Had a son in every village, that one.

name: Alia
quote: Marillion: Who was the finest singer you've ever heard? Rodrik: Alia of Braavos. Marillion: Oh, I'm much better than that old stick.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Ser Criston_Cole protects Rhaenyra_Targaryen from her enemies, but who protects the princess from Ser Criston?

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Do keep trying, soon or late, you may get one who looks like you.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Aegon_II_Targaryen and his brothers are Viserys_I_Targaryen trueborn sons, with a better claim to the throne than Rhaenyra_Targaryen brood of bastards. Daemon_Targaryen will find some pretext to put them all to death. Even Helaena_Targaryen and her little ones. Lucerys_Velaryon put out Aemond_Targaryen eye, never forget. He was a boy, aye, but the boy is the father to the man, and bastards are monstrous by nature.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Mayhaps Rhaenyra_Targaryen will die in childbirth.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Rhaenyra: Your sons might have had places of honor at my court if they had kept faith, but they sought to rob me of my birthright, and the blood of my sweet sons is on their hands. Alicent: Bastard blood, shed at war. Aegon_II_Targaryen's sons were innocent boys, cruelly murdered. How many more must die to slake your thirst for vengeance? Rhaenyra: I will hear no more lies. Speak again of bastardy, and I will have your tongue out.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: All they have sowed, now shall they reap.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: I want to see my sons again, and Helaena_Targaryen, my sweet girl, oh ... and King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. I will read to him, as I did when I was little. He used to say I had a lovely voice.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: [Viserys_I_Targaryen] would marry again, yes… but not to Laena_Velaryon, and not for reasons of state. Another woman had caught his eye. He announced his intention to wed Lady Alicent of House Hightower, the clever and lovely eighteen-year-old daughter of Otto_Hightower, the girl who had read to King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen as he lay dying.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: Queen Alicent had soon proved to be as fertile as she was pretty.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: The Aegon_II_Targaryen is Alicent's own blood. She wants him on the throne.

name: Alicent Hightower
quote: And so each of the conspirators slashed their palms and clasped hands with one another, swearing brotherhood. Queen Alicent alone amongst them was excused from the oath, on account of her womanhood.

name: Alla Tyrell
quote: Alla had a lovely voice, and when coaxed would play the woodharp and sing songs of chivalry and lost loves.

name: Alla Tyrell
quote: Cersei: The shy one? Taena: So she seems, but there is more of sly than shy in her. Leave her to me, my sweet.

name: Alla Tyrell
quote: Alla is gentle and shy, how can they do this to her?

name: Allar
quote: Some problems cannot be solved by hitting them with a stick.

name: Allar Deem
quote: My right arm. Good good man. Loyal.

name: Allar Deem
quote: A hard man for a hard job, is Deem. Does as he's told, and never a word afterward.

name: Allar Deem
quote: Tyrion: Deem. Tell the captain it would not be taken amiss if that one should happen to be swept overboard before they reach Eastwatch. Jacelyn: I'm told those northern waters are very stormy, my lord.

name: Alleras
quote: Roone: You always miss your last shot. See? Alleras: The day you make them all is the day you stop improving.

name: Alleras
quote: Leo: I understand you won your copper link. I'll drink to that. Alleras: I only buy for friends. And I am no lord's son, I've told you that. My mother was a trader. Leo: Your mother was a monkey from the Summer Isles. The Dornish will fuck anything with a hole between its legs. Meaning no offense. You may be brown as a nut, but at least you bathe.

name: Alleras
quote: You shame your House with every word you say. You shame the Citadel by being one of us.

name: Alleras
quote: Samwell: Are you a novice? Alleras: An acolyte. Alleras, by some called Sphinx. Samwell: The sphinx is the riddle, not the riddler. Do you know what that means? Alleras: No. Is it a riddle? Samwell: I wish I knew.

name: Alleras
quote: It had been Leo_Tyrell_(son_of_Moryn) who dubbed Alleras "the Sphinx." A sphinx is a bit of this, a bit of that: a human face, the body of a lion, the wings of a hawk. Alleras was the same: his father was a Dornishman, his mother a black-skinned Summer Islander. His own skin was dark as teak. And like the green marble sphinxes that flanked the Citadel's main gate, Alleras had eyes of onyx.

name: Alleras
quote: The Sphinx was always smiling, as if he knew some secret jape.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Alliser: Lord Snow wants to take my place now. I’d have an easier time teaching a wolf to juggle than you will training Grenn. Jon: I'll take that wager, Ser Alliser. I'd love to see Ghost juggle.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Alliser: Come and make your japes with steel in your hand. Tyrion: Why, I have steel in my hand, Ser Alliser, although it appears to be a crab fork. Shall we duel?

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: They will call you men of Night's Watch now, but you are bigger fools than the Pypar here if you believe that. You are boys still, green and stinking of summer, and when the winter comes you will die like flies.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Alliser: Do you think I sailed all the way from Eastwatch-by-the-Sea to be mocked by the likes of you? This is no jape. I saw it with my own eyes. I tell you, the dead walk. Tyrion: You should try to kill them more thoroughly.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Jon: You are skilled with a blade. You were master-at-arms, here and at Eastwatch. Alliser: Aye. I have squandered a third of my life trying to teach the rudiments of swordplay to churls, muttonheads, and knaves. Small good that will do me in those woods.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: You would like me to refuse. Then you could hack off my head, same as you did for Janos_Slynt. I'll not give you that pleasure, bastard. You'd best pray that it's a wildling blade that kills me, though. The ones the Others kill don't stay dead ... and they remember. I'm coming back, Lord Snow.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Ser Alliser Thorne had a voice with an edge like Valyrian steel.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Jeor: You are a wicked man, to provoke our Ser Alliser so. Tyrion: If a man paints a target on his chest, he should expect that sooner or later someone will loose an arrow at him. I have seen dead men with more humor than your Ser Alliser. Bowen: Not so. You ought to hear the droll names he gives the lads he trains. Tyrion: I'll wager the lads have a few names for him as well. Chip the ice off your eyes, my good lords. Ser Alliser Thorne should be mucking out your stables, not drilling your young warriors.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Jeor: Ser Alliser is an anointed knight, one of the few to take the black since I have been Lord Commander. He fought bravely at King's Landing. Jaremy: On the wrong side. I ought to know, I was there on the battlements beside him. Tywin_Lannister gave us a splendid choice. Take the black, or see our heads on spikes before evenfall.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: Of all the black brothers he'd met on the Wall, Tyrion Lannister had liked Ser Alliser Thorne the least. A bitter, mean-spirited man with too great a sense of his own worth.

name: Alliser Thorne
quote: We'll learn you what you need t' know, ser. Teach you how t' wipe your highborn arse with leaves, just like a proper ranger.

name: Alvyn Sharp
quote: Why sail the world, when the Mander lies before us?.

name: Alyn
quote: Eddard: I want my daughters kept safe. I fear this is only the beginning. Alyn: No harm will come to them, Lord Eddard. I stake my life on that.

name: Alyn
quote: Alyn carried the Stark banner. When she saw him rein in beside Lord Beric_Dondarrion to exchange words, it made Sansa feel ever so proud. Alyn was handsomer than Jory_Cassel had been; he was going to be a knight one day.

name: Sour Alyn
quote: Try a wash yourself, Reek. You smell like horse piss.

name: Sour Alyn
quote: Grunt had no tongue and Sour Alyn had no wits, Lord Ramsay_Snow liked to say. One was brutal, the other mean, but both had spent most of their lives in service at the Dreadfort. They did as they were told.

name: Alyn Ambrose
quote: Alyn said Elinor_Tyrell made him fearless. He says he shouted her name for his battle cry, isn't that ever so gallant? Someday I want some champion to wear my favor, and kill a hundred men.

name: Alyn Cockshaw
quote: Daemon_II_Blackfyre mine.

name: Alyn Cockshaw
quote: I wept when Aegor_Rivers carried Daemon_II_Blackfyre off to exile, and again when Lord Gormon_Peake told me he was coming home. But then he saw you upon the road, and forgot that I existed.

name: Alyn Cockshaw
quote: Duncan: Shouldn't we throw His Lordship down a rope? Maynard: Save him now to execute him later? I think not. Let him eat the meal that he meant to serve to you.

name: Alyn Velaryon
quote: They are my fleets now, and Baela_Targaryen monkey is more suited to command them than Gedmund_Peake.

name: Alyn Velaryon
quote: Lord Corlys_Velaryon had made nine famous voyages on his Sea Snake, it will be recalled. Lord Alyn Oakenfist would make six, upon six different ships. “My ladies,” he would call them.

name: Alyn Velaryon
quote: Lord Alyn was an insolent boy and did not love Aegon_II_Targaryen.

name: Alyn Velaryon
quote: You fool, you thrice-damned fool. If I dared, I would have your bloody head off.

name: Alyn Velaryon
quote: I want sons as brave and strong as you.

name: Alynne Connington
quote: No harm will come to any of you unless Ronnet_Connington proves an utter fool.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: Before the war I was betrothed to Daryn_Hornwood. We were only waiting till I flowered to be wed, but the Jaime_Lannister killed Daryn in the Whispering Wood. Rickard_Karstark wrote that he would find some southron lord to wed me, but he never did. Your brother Robb_Stark cut off his head for killing Lannisters. I thought the whole reason they marched south was to kill some Lannisters.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: You are my only hope, Lord Snow. In Eddard_Stark name, I beg you. Protect me.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: Jon: You're not scared? Alys: Let Sigorn be scared of me. Jon: Winter's lady.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: Melisandre: Alys, do you swear to share your fire with Sigorn, and warm him when the night is dark and full of terrors? Alys: Till his blood is boiling.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: I have seen your sister in my fires, fleeing from this marriage they have made for her. Coming here, to you. A girl in grey on a dying horse, I have seen it plain as day. It has not happened yet, but it will.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: Jon: You were not right. Alys is not Arya_Stark. Melisandre: The vision was a true one. It was my reading that was false. I am as mortal as you, Jon Snow. All mortals err.

name: Alys Karstark
quote: A northern maid and a Sigorn, bound together by the Lord of Light.

name: Alys Rivers
quote: I have Aemond_Targaryen bastard in me. I can feel his fires licking at my womb.

name: Alys Rivers
quote: Alys: Kneel before Alys_Rivers's_son. Regis: I do not kneel to bastards, much less the baseborn whelp of Aemond_Targaryen and a milk cow.

name: Alys Rivers
quote: Was she in truth a witch who lay with demons, bringing forth dead children as payment for the knowledge they gave her? Was she a simpleminded slattern, as Eustace_(Dance_of_the_Dragons) believes? A wanton who used her poisons and potions to bind men to her, body and soul?

name: Alys Rivers
quote: Daemon: Who told you where to find me? Aemond: My lady. She saw you in a storm cloud, in a mountain pool at dusk, in the fire we lit to cook our suppers. She sees much and more, my Alys.

name: Alys Rivers
quote: Don't come again unless you mean to bend your knees, she says. Any man who comes near her walls will die. There's power in them stones, and the widow's woken it. Seven save us all, she has a dragon. I seen it.

name: Alys Rivers's son
quote: I have Aemond_Targaryen bastard in me. I can feel his fires licking at my womb.

name: Alys Rivers's son
quote: Regis: A bastard? Alys: Aemond_Targaryen trueborn son and heir, and the rightful king of Westeros.

name: Alys Rivers's son
quote: I do not kneel to bastards, much less the baseborn whelp of a kinslayer and a milk cow.

name: Alys Turnberry
quote: We never meant to be wicked, we were only playing.

name: Alys Turnberry
quote: Alysanne: All you can do tonight is go to bed. On the morrow we shall send a septa to you, and you can make confession of your sins. The Mother will forgive you. Alys: My mother won't.

name: Alys Turnberry
quote: Alysanne: I have been speaking with your... ladies. Are you aware that Alys Turnberry is with child? Saera: My Sweetberry? Truly? She... oh, what has she done? Oh, my sweet little fool.

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: Asha: You are wed.Alysane: No. My children were fathered by a bear. Mormont women are skinchangers. We turn into bears and find mates in the woods. Everyone knows.Asha: Mormont women are all fighters too.Alysane: What we are is what you made us. On Bear Island every child learns to fear krakens rising from the sea.

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: Alysane: My lady asked you to let her go. You would do well to listen, ser. Lady Asha_Greyjoy is not for burning.Clayton: She will be. We have harbored this demon worshiper amongst us too long.

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: And if you burn Asha_Greyjoy and the snows still fall, what then? Who will you burn next? Me?

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: Stannis_Baratheon seemed to be one of those men to whom women are another race, as strange and unfathomable as giants and grumkins and the children of the forest. The She-Bear made him grind his teeth as well.

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: Her proper name was Alysane of House Mormont, but she wore the other name as easily as she wore her mail.

name: Alysane Mormont
quote: One did not provoke the She-Bear needlessly.

name: Alysanne Blackwood
quote: Grant me this boon, and I shall never ask another. Do this, and I shall know that you are as wise as you are strong, as kind as you are fierce. Give me this, and I shall give you whatever you may choose to ask of me.

name: Alysanne Blackwood
quote: Cregan: What if I ask you for your maidenhead, my lady? Alysanne: I cannot give you what I do not have, my lord. I lost my maidenhead in the saddle when I was three-and-ten. Cregan: Some would say that you squandered on a horse a gift that by rights should have belonged to your future husband. Alysanne: Some are fools, and she was a good horse, better than most husbands I have seen.

name: Alysanne Blackwood
quote: Cregan: Aye, I’ll grant your boon. Alysanne: And in return? Cregan: All I ask is all of you, forever. I claim your hand in marriage. Alysanne: A hand for a head. Done.

name: Alysanne Blackwood
quote: A lean tall creature was this wench, thin as a whip and flat-chested as a boy, but long of leg and strong of arm, with a mane of thick black curls that tumbled down past her waist when loosed.

name: Alysanne Blackwood
quote: She smells of woodsmoke, not flowers.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: A ruler needs a good head and a true heart. A cock is not essential. If your Grace truly believes that women lack the wit to rule, plainly you have no further need of me.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: No mother should ever have to burn her child.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: My uncle Maegor_I_Targaryen was cruel, but age is crueler.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: Benifer: No mother ever loved a child more. Alysanne: He was wrong, I think, for surely the Mother Above loved my children more. She took so many of them away from me.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: You will be a great king, even greater than your father.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys: How is it that I am the Old King now, but you are still the Good Queen? Alysanne: I am old as well, but I am still younger than you.

name: Alysanne Targaryen
quote: She was Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen most trusted counselor and his right hand.

name: Alyssa Arryn
quote: Alyssa had been dead six thousand years now, and still no drop of the torrent had ever reached the valley floor far below. Catelyn wondered how large a waterfall her own tears would make when she died.

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: I mounted him and took him for a ride, and I mean to do the same tonight. I love to ride.

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: Red maidens, the two of us, but now we've both been mounted.

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: Baelon: They call me Baelon the Brave, but you are far braver than me. I would sooner fight a dozen battles than do what you've just done. Alyssa: You were made for battles, and I was made for this. Viserys_I_Targaryen and Daemon_Targaryen and Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Baelon), that's three. As soon as I am well, let's make another. I want to give you twenty sons. An army of your own!

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: Alyssa Targaryen had a warrior’s heart in a woman’s body, and her strength failed her.

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: Though shattered by his loss, Baelon took solace in the two strong sons that she had left him, Viserys_I_Targaryen and Daemon_Targaryen, and never ceased to honor the memory of his sweet lady with the broken nose and mismatched eyes.

name: Alyssa Targaryen
quote: ...George had some new ideas for some of the names and the stories of the children who died young, and corrected some issues that came out of his original birth order (we actually got the names of all the kids quite late in the production of TWoIaF—literally a month before we had to finalize the book—so there was not much time to interrogate it). However, the stories of those who live to adulthood, as published in TWoIaF, do remain the same (just, of course, much more detailed).

name: Amarei Crakehall
quote: My third wife was a Crakehall, all of the Crakehall women are sluts. Well, never mind about that, she died before you were born, what do you care?

name: Amaury Peake
quote: He was clad in white scale armor under his white cloak, but his helm was openface and he had not brought a shield, and sorely did Sandoq_the_Shadow make him answer for these lacks.

name: Ambrose Butterwell
quote: Gormon_Peake. This was all his doing, I swear it by the Seven. May the gods strike me down if I am false. He told me whom I must invite and who must be excluded, and he brought Daemon_II_Blackfyre here. I never wanted to be part of any treason, you must believe me.

name: Ambrose Butterwell
quote: Ambrose: No, no, I want no more part of Lord Gormon_Peake or Daemon_II_Blackfyre. I will not fight. Tommard: Craven.

name: Ambrose Butterwell
quote: Treason is no less vile because the traitor proves a craven. I have heard your bleatings, Lord Ambrose, and I believe one word in ten. On that account I will allow you to retain a tenth part of your fortune. You may keep your wife as well. I wish you joy of her.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: I begged him not to go, but my Pate_of_the_Blue_Fork was oh so very brave, and swore he was the man to slay Gregor_Clegane. He wanted to make a great name for himself.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: Amerei: Outlaws killed him. Merrett_Frey had only gone out to ransom Petyr_Frey. He brought them the gold they asked for, but they hung him anyway. Mariya: Hanged, Ami. Your father was not a tapestry.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: Lyle: You have my word, once Riverrun has fallen I shall return to hunt down the Hound and kill him for you. Dogs do not frighten me. Amerei: You are a true knight, Ser Lyle, to help a lady in distress.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: I married Ami to Ser Pate_of_the_Blue_Fork of Sevenstreams, but the Gregor_Clegane killed the oaf so I got her back.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: When Ami was caught in the stables with no fewer than three grooms, he'd been forced to marry her off to a bloody hedge knight. That situation could not possibly get any worse, he'd thought... until Ser Pate_of_the_Blue_Fork decided he could win renown by defeating Ser Gregor_Clegane. Ami had come running back a widow, to Merrett's dismay and the undoubted delight of every stablehand in the Twins.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: Cersei: And you are to be wed as well. Lancel: A Frey girl, and not of my choosing. She is not even maiden. A widow, of Darry blood. Kevan_Lannister says that will help me with the peasants, but the peasants are all dead.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: Jaime: Darry needs a lion, coz. So does your little Frey. She gets moist between the legs every time someone mentions Harwyn_Plumm. If she hasn't bedded him yet, she will soon. Lancel: If she loves him, I wish them joy of one another. Jaime: A lion shouldn't have horns. You took the girl to wife. Lancel: I said some words and gave her a red cloak, but only to please Kevan_Lannister. Marriage requires consummation.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: Daven: Gatehouse Ami, gods be good. I couldn't believe that Lancel_Lannister picked that one. What's wrong with that boy? Jaime: He's grown pious, but it wasn't him who did the picking. Lady Amerei's Mariya_Darry is a Darry. Kevan_Lannister thought she'd help Lancel win the Darry smallfolk. Daven: How, by fucking them? You know why they call her Gatehouse Ami? She raises her portcullis for every knight who happens by. Lancel had best find an armorer to make him a horned helm.

name: Amerei Frey
quote: At least Kevan_Lannister still has Martyn_Lannister for an heir. He can marry him to Gatehouse Ami in Lancel_Lannister place. Seven save us all.

name: Amory Lorch
quote: Young boys and old men die the same.

name: Amory Lorch
quote: Vargo_Hoat had Ser Amory torn apart by a bear after the fall of Harrenhal. That ought to be sufficiently grisly to appease even Oberyn_Martell.

name: Amory Lorch
quote: I asked him afterward why it had required half a hundred thrusts to kill Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar) of … two? Three? He said she'd kicked him and would not stop screaming. If Lorch had half the wits the gods gave a turnip, he would have calmed her with a few sweet words and used a soft silk pillow. The blood was in him.

name: Amory Lorch
quote: Only a beast would harm Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar).

name: Anders Yronwood
quote: Anders Yronwood is Criston_Cole reborn. He whispers in Quentyn_Martell ear that he should rule after Doran_Martell, that it is not right for men to kneel to women ... that Arianne_Martell especially is unfit to rule, being the willful wanton that she is.

name: Anders Yronwood
quote: The most powerful of the Dornish lords was Anders Yronwood, the Bloodroyal, Lord of Yronwood and Warden of the Stone Way, but Arianne knew better than to look for help from the man who had fostered her brother Quentyn_Martell.

name: Andrik
quote: The singers call Andrik best now. Andrik the Unsmiling, they name him. A giant of a man. He serves Dunstan_Drumm of Old Wyk.

name: Andrik
quote: Andrik the Unsmiling, a giant of a man with arms as thick as trees. It spoke well of Dunstan_Drumm that such a man would stand for him.

name: Andrik
quote: Rise, Andrik the Unsmiling, Lord of Southshield.

name: Androw Farman
quote: You weep for Lianna_Velaryon, but would you weep for me?

name: Androw Farman
quote: You shall be. Lianna_Velaryon was the last of them.

name: Androw Farman
quote: I brought them cups of wine, and they drank. They thanked me, and they drank. Why not? A cupbearer, a serving man, that's how they saw me. Androw the sweet. Androw the jape. What could I do, but fall off the dragon? Well, I could have done a lot of things. I could have been a lord. I could have made laws and been wise and given you counsel. I could have killed your enemies, as easily as I killed your friends. I could have given you children.

name: Androw Farman
quote: Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I) can fly, and so can I.

name: Androw Farman
quote: The wrong Elissa_Farman ran away.

name: Androw Farman
quote: Just as a stone thrown into a pond will send out ripples in all directions, the evil that Androw Farman had wrought would spread across the land, touching and twisting the lives of others long after the dragons were done feasting on his blackened, smoking remains.

name: Androw Farman
quote: I wish you luck if you should try to "see off" the Black Dread. Balerion quite enjoyed your brother, by now he may desire another course.

name: Androw Farman
quote: I fed my last husband to my dragon. If you make me take another, I may eat him myself.

name: Anguy
quote: Arya: You missed. Anguy: More fool you if you think so. They go where I send them.

name: Anguy
quote: Tom: I'd dearly love someone to sing with, that I would. Lem can't carry a tune, and our longbow lad only knows marcher ballads, every one of them a hundred verses long. Anguy: We sing real songs in the marches.

name: Anguy
quote: When I don't fancy a man's eyes, I put an arrow through one.

name: Anguy
quote: Sandor: You didn't leave me enough gold to buy a cup of wine, you whoresons. Anguy: We're outlaws. Outlaws steal. It's in the songs, if you ask nice Tom_of_Sevenstreams may sing you one. Be thankful we didn't kill you. Sandor: Come try it, Archer. I'll take that quiver off you and shove those arrows up your freckly little arse.

name: Anguy
quote: Lem: How'd Sandor_Clegane get all that gold anyhow? Anguy: He won the Hand's tourney. In King's Landing. I won a fair fortune myself, but then I met Dancy, Jayde, and Alayaya. They taught me what roast swan tastes like, and how to bathe in Arbor wine. Harwin: Pissed it all away, did you? Anguy: Not all. I bought these boots, and this excellent dagger.

name: Anguy
quote: That afternoon a boy named Anguy, an unheralded commoner from the Dornish Marches, won the archery competition, outshooting Ser Balon_Swann and Jalabhar_Xho at a hundred paces after all the other bowmen had been eliminated at the shorter distances. Ned sent Alyn to seek him out and offer him a position with the Hand's guard, but the boy was flush with wine and victory and riches undreamed of, and he refused.

name: Anguy
quote: Tom: Boy, put up that sword now, unless you're wanting to be hurt. It's too big for you, lad, and besides, Anguy here could put three shafts through you before you could hope to reach us. Arya: He could not, and I'm a girl.

name: Anguy
quote: The archer's hand moved quicker than Arya would have believed. His shaft went hissing past her head within an inch of her ear and buried itself in the trunk of the willow behind her. By then the bowman had a second arrow notched and drawn. She'd thought she understood what Syrio_Forel meant by quick as a snake and smooth as summer silk, but now she knew she hadn't.

name: Annara Farring
quote: Walder_Frey_(son_of_Ryman) was a man who took what he wanted, even Mylenda_Caron. He'd had Janyce_Hunter too, that was common knowledge, Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Walton) had been known to slip into his bed from time to time, and some even said he'd known the seventh Lady Frey a deal better than he should have.

name: Anya Waynwood
quote: Petyr: Robert_Arryn should have an older boy about him too. A promising young squire, say. Someone he could admire and try to emulate. You have such a boy at Ironoaks, my lady. Perhaps you might agree to send me Harrold_Hardyng. Anya: Lord Petyr, you are as bold a thief as I'd ever care to meet.

name: Anya Waynwood
quote: None of us wants war. Autumn wanes, and we must gird ourselves for winter.

name: Anya Waynwood
quote: Anya Waynwood's hair was greying and she had crow's-feet around her eyes and loose skin beneath her chin, but there was no mistaking the air of nobility about her.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: I am always prepared to fight.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: Daenerys: Greenguts is a queer sort of name. Archibald: A jape, Your Grace. From the ships. I was greensick the whole way from Volantis. Heaving and ... well, I shouldn't say.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: Quentyn: His name was Harghaz. Archibald: Hizdahr_zo_Loraq, Humzum, Hagnag, what does it matter? I call them all Harzoo.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: Gerris: Even if Daenerys_Targaryen returns, she'll still be married. Archibald: Not if I give King Harzoo a little smack with my hammer. Quentyn: Hizdahr_zo_Loraq. His name is Hizdahr. Archibald: One kiss from my hammer and no one will care what his name was.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: Archibald: Fire and water don't mix, and that's a fact. You get a good cookfire lit, blazing away nice, then it starts to piss down rain and next thing your wood is sodden and your flames are dead. Gerris: Dragons are not made of wood, Arch. Archibald: Some are. That old King Aegon_IV_Targaryen, the randy one, he built wooden dragons to conquer us. That ended bad, though.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: I'll do it, just so long as there's no bloody boats involved. Gerris_Drinkwater will do it too. He don't know it yet, but he will.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: The sellswords loved Greenguts, who bet as fearlessly as he fought, but with far less success.

name: Archibald Yronwood
quote: The Dornishmen were knights, at least in name, though only Yronwood impressed him as having the true steel. Gerris_Drinkwater had a pretty face, a glib tongue, and a fine head of hair.

name: Archon's green-haired daughter
quote: Arianne: When I rode Garin_(orphan) no one could defeat us, not even Nymeria_Sand and that green-haired Tyroshi girl. Doran: That green-haired girl was the Archon's daughter. I was to have sent you to Tyrosh in her place. You would have served the Archon as a cupbearer and met with Viserys_Targaryen in secret, but Mellario threatened to harm herself if I stole Quentyn_Martell of her children, and I... I could not do that to her.

name: Archon's green-haired daughter
quote: Is that where Quentyn_Martell gone? To Tyrosh, to court the Archon's green-haired daughter?

name: Ardrian Celtigar
quote: Davos: The letter ... What did your lords make of it, I wonder? Stannis: Celtigar pronounced it admirable. If I showed him the contents of my privy, he would declare that admirable as well.

name: Ardrian Celtigar
quote: Too frightened of His Grace's wrath to come near Dragonstone, no doubt. And wisely so. The man has betrayed his rightful king.

name: Ardrian Celtigar
quote: Claw Isle was but lightly garrisoned, its castle reputedly stuffed with Myrish carpets, Volantene glass, gold and silver plate, jeweled cups, magnificent hawks, an axe of Valyrian steel, a horn that could summon monsters from the deep, chests of rubies, and more wines than a man could drink in a hundred years. Though Celtigar had shown the world a niggardly face, he had never stinted on his own comforts.

name: Ardrian Celtigar
quote: I don't doubt Lord Celtigar bent the knee to the boy Joffrey_Baratheon. He is an old done man, who wants no more than to end his days in his castle, drinking his fine wine out of his jeweled cups. Yet he came when you called, sire. Came, with his ships and swords. He stood by you at Storm's End when Lord Renly_Baratheon came down on us, and his ships sailed up the Blackwater. His men fought for you, killed for you, burned for you.

name: Ardrian Celtigar
quote: When I die impoverished, my wives and concubines will curse you, Onion Lord. Lord Celtigar had many fine wines that now I am not tasting, a sea eagle he had trained to fly from the wrist, and a magic horn to summon krakens from the deep. Very useful such a horn would be, to pull down Tyroshi and other vexing creatures.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Once, long ago, a callow youth had come from Norvos, a big broad-shouldered boy with a mop of dark hair. That hair was white now, and his body bore the scars of many battles ... but his strength remained, and he kept his longaxe sharp, as the bearded priests had taught him.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Hotah had felt a certain sadness whenever he saw the man in the long snowy cloak, the times Doran_Martell had sent him down to Sunspear. One day, he sensed, the two of them would fight; on that day Arys_Oakheart would die, with the captain's longaxe crashing through his skull. He slid his hand along the smooth ashen shaft of his axe and wondered if that day was drawing nigh.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Arianne: How could Doran_Martell know? I was so careful. How could he know?Areo: Someone told. Someone always tells.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Arianne: You know me, captain. You have known me since I was little. You always kept me safe, as you kept Mellario safe when you came with her from Great Norvos to be her shield in a strange land. I need you now. I need your help. I never meant—Areo: What you meant does not matter, little princess. Only what you did. I am sorry. It is for Doran_Martell to command, for Hotah to obey.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Doran: I saw Volantis once, on my way to Norvos, where I first met Mellario. The bells were ringing, and the bears danced down the steps. Areo will recall the day.Areo: I remember. The bears danced and the bells rang, and the prince wore red and gold and orange. My lady asked me who it was who shone so bright.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Serve. Protect. Obey. Simple vows for simple men. That was all he knew.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: The big Norvoshi captain with the scarred face had always made him feel profoundly uneasy. They say he sleeps with that great axe beside him.

name: Areo Hotah
quote: Daemon: Be careful what you pray for, princess. Gerold_Dayne could put an end to Lady Obara_Sand just as easily.Arianne: She has Areo Hotah with her. No man can stand against Hotah.

name: Argella Durrandon
quote: You may take my castle, but you will win only bones and blood and ashes.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Arianne: Are you certain you are not off to some other bed, some other woman? Tell me who she is. I will fight her for you, bare-breasted, knife to knife. Unless she is a Sand Snake. If so, we can share you. I love my cousins well. Arys: You know I have no other woman. Only... duty. Arianne: That poxy bitch? I know her. Dry as dust between the legs, and her kisses leave you bleeding.

name: Arianne Martell
