quote: She leaned her back against a fluted pillar and wondered if her brother was looking at the same stars tonight, wherever he might be. Do you see the white one, Quentyn_Martell? That is Nymeria's star, burning bright, and that milky band behind her, those are ten thousand ships. She burned as bright as any man, and so shall I. You will not rob me of my birthright!

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Anger was better than tears, better than grief, better than guilt. Someone told, someone she had trusted. Arys_Oakheart had died because of that, slain by the traitor's whisper as much as by Areo_Hotah's axe. The blood that had streamed down Myrcella_Baratheon face, that was the betrayer's work as well. Someone told, someone she had loved. That was the cruelest cut of all.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Doran: Why? Tell me that, Arianne. Tell me why. Arianne: For the honor of our House.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Arianne: Tell me, Father, when did you decide to disinherit me? Was it the day that Quentyn_Martell was born, or the day that I was born? What did I ever do to make you hate me so? Doran: I never hated you. Arianne, you do not understand.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Arianne: I have always been fond of swans. No other bird is half so beautiful, this side of the Summer Isles. Balon: Your peacocks might dispute that. Arianne: They might, but peacocks are vain, proud creatures, strutting about in all those gaudy colors. Give me a swan serene in white or beautiful in black.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: I was a foolish willful girl, playing at the game of thrones like a drunkard rolling dice.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Pretty boys had ever been her weakness, particularly the ones who were dark and dangerous as well.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: She had a husky voice, a wide mouth made for whispers, full lips ripe for kissing.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Remember, she is Dornish. In the Reach men said it was the food that made Dornishmen so hot-tempered and their women so wild and wanton. Fiery peppers and strange spices heat the blood, she cannot help herself.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Myrcella_Baratheon is the elder, and better suited to the crown. Who will defend her rights if not her Kingsguard? My sword, my life, my honor, all belong to her ... and to you, my heart's delight. I swear, no man will steal your birthright whilst I still have the strength to lift a sword. I am yours.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: Dorne will be yours. You have my word on that, if my word still has any meaning for you.

name: Arianne Martell
quote: My little princess, Hotah thought, but Arianne was a woman now. The scarlet silks she wore left no doubt of that. Of late she had changed in other ways as well. Her plot to crown Myrcella_Baratheon had been betrayed and smashed, Arys_Oakheart had perished bloodily at Hotah's hand, and she herself had been confined to the Spear Tower, condemned to solitude and silence. All of that had chastened her. There was something else as well, though, some secret Doran_Martell had confided in her before releasing her from her confinement. What that was, the captain did not know.

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: Another day done, and who knows what the morrow will bring us, eh, Dunk?

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: It is not every man who can boast that he broke seven lances against Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) in the Seven Kingdoms. I could never hope to do better, so why should I try?

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: Never refuse a cup of wine or a horn of ale, it may be a year before you see another.

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: I'd leave your sword, but it would rust in the ground. The gods will give you a new one, I guess. I wish you didn't die, ser. You were a true knight, and you never beat me when I didn't deserve it, except that one time in Maidenpool. It was the inn boy who ate the widow woman's pie, not me, I told you. It don't matter now. The gods keep you, ser.

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: Duncan: He always said he meant for me to be a knight, as he was. When he was dying he called for his longsword and bade me kneel. He touched me once on my right shoulder and once on my left, and said some words, and when I got up he said I was a knight. Plummer: Any knight can make a knight, it is true, though it is more customary to stand a vigil and be anointed by a septon before taking your vows. Were there any witnesses to your dubbing? Duncan: Only a robin, up in a thorn tree. I heard it as the old man was saying the words. He charged me to be a good knight and true, to obey the seven gods, defend the weak and innocent, serve my lord faithfully and defend the realm with all my might, and I swore that I would.

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: When you accept a lord's meat and mead, all you do reflects on him, Ser Arlan used to say. Always do more than he expects of you, never less. Never flinch at any task or hardship.

name: Arlan of Pennytree
quote: The old hedge knight had done service at so many different keeps and castles through the years that Dunk could not recall the half of them.

name: Arnell
quote: I'll send Ser Arnell. He's a deal steadier, and his mother was one of the green-apple Fossoways.

name: Arnolf Karstark
quote: Justin: You will not take Winterfell! Arnolf: Aye, we will. We'll take it for Eddard_Stark and for Arya_Stark. Aye, and for the Robb_Stark too, him who was so cruelly slaughtered. Me and mine will show the way, if need be. I've said as much to Stannis_Baratheon the king. March, I said, and before the moon can turn, we'll all be bathing in the blood of Freys and Boltons. Justin: Your courage is admirable, Lord Karstark, but courage will not breach the walls of Winterfell.

name: Arnolf Karstark
quote: Homage is the duty every leal subject owes his king. Yet Eddard_Stark's bannermen all turn their back on me, save the Karstarks. Is Arnolf Karstark the only man of honor in the north?

name: Arnolf Karstark
quote: Arnolf is rushing to Winterfell, 'tis true, but only so he might put his dagger in your king's back. He cast his lot with Roose_Bolton long ago ... for gold, the promise of a pardon, and poor Harrion_Karstark head. Lord Stannis_Baratheon is marching to a slaughter.

name: Arryk Cargyll
quote: Erryk: I love you, brother. Arryk: And I you, brother.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: Our knees do not bend easily.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: Arthur: And now it begins. Eddard: No. Now it ends.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: Brienne: I swore an oath to keep him safe. I swore a holy oath. Arthur: We all swore oaths.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: Smiling Knight: It's that white sword of yours I want. Arthur: Then you shall have it, ser.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: All knights must bleed, Jaime. Blood is the seal of our devotion.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: They whispered of Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, deadliest of the seven knights of Aerys_II_Targaryen's Kingsguard, and of how Eddard_Stark had slain him in single combat.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: The finest knight I ever saw was Ser Arthur Dayne, who fought with a blade called Dawn, forged from the heart of a fallen star. They called him the Sword of the Morning, and he would have killed me but for Howland_Reed.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: Arstan: Myles_Mooton was Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen squire, and Richard_Lonmouth after him. When they won their spurs, he knighted them himself, and they remained his close companions. Young Lord Jon_Connington was dear to the prince as well, but his oldest friend was Arthur Dayne. Daenerys: The Sword of the Morning! Viserys_Targaryen used to talk about his wondrous white blade. He said Ser Arthur was the only knight in the realm who was our brother's peer. Arstan: It is not my place to question the words of Prince Viserys.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: And me, that boy I was ... when did he die, I wonder? When I donned the white cloak? When I opened Aerys_II_Targaryen throat? That boy had wanted to be Ser Arthur Dayne, but someplace along the way he had become the Smiling_Knight instead.

name: Arthur Dayne
quote: I learned from the Gerold_Hightower and Barristan_Selmy. I learned from Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn_Martell and Ser Oswell_Whent and Ser Jonothor_Darry, good men every one.

name: Artos Flint
quote: R'hllor will doom us.

name: Artys I Arryn
quote: My throne is made of saddle leather, and my castle is a tent.

name: Arwyn Oakheart
quote: Catelyn: Jaime_Lannister is held prisoner at Riverrun. Mathis: Still alive? Renly: It would seem the direwolf is gentler than the lion. Arwyn: Gentler than the Lannisters, is drier than the sea.

name: Arya Stark
quote: I'm the ghost in Harrenhal, she thought. And that night, there was one less name to hate.

name: Arya Stark
quote: Yes, it's you who ought to run, you and Lord Tywin_Lannister and Gregor_Clegane and Ser Addam_Marbrand and Ser Amory_Lorch and stupid Ser Lyonel_(knight) whoever he is, all of you better run or Robb_Stark will kill you, he’s a Stark, he’s more wolf than man, and so am I.

name: Arya Stark
quote: A long time ago, she remembered Eddard_Stark saying that when the cold wind blows the lone wolf dies but the pack survives. He had it all backwards. Arya, the lone wolf, still lived, but the wolves of the pack had been taken and slain and skinned.

name: Arya Stark
quote: Ser Gregor_Clegane. Dunsen, Rafford, Ser Ilyn_Payne, Ser Meryn_Trant, Queen Cersei_Lannister. Valar morghulis, valar morghulis, valar morghulis.

name: Arya Stark
quote: He killed the slave? He should have killed the masters!

name: Arya Stark
quote: plague face: Who are you?Arya: No one.plague face: Not so. You are Arya of House Stark, who bites her lip and cannot tell a lie.Arya: I was. I'm not now.

name: Arya Stark
quote: Ah, Arya. You have a wildness in you, child. The 'wolf blood,' Rickard_Stark used to call it. Lyanna_Stark had a touch of it, and my brother Brandon_Stark more than a touch. It brought them both to an early grave. Lyanna might have carried a sword, if my lord father had allowed it. You remind me of her sometimes. You even look like her.

name: Arya Stark
quote: A boy has more courage than sense.

name: Arya Stark
quote: Arya had always been harder to tame.

name: Arya Stark
quote: And Arya, well... Eddard_Stark visitors would oft mistake her for a stableboy if they rode into the yard unannounced. Arya was a trial, it must be said. Half a boy, half a wolf pup. Forbid her anything and it became her heart's desire. She had Ned's long face, and brown hair that always looked as though a bird had been nesting in it. I despaired of ever making a lady of her. She collected scabs as other girls collected dolls, and would say anything that came into her head.

name: Arya Stark
quote: Arya Underfoot, he almost said. Arya Horseface. Robb_Stark's younger sister, brown-haired, long-faced, skinny as a stick. Always dirty.

name: Arya Stark
quote: The girl dipped before Ramsay_Snow. That was wrong as well. The real Arya Stark would have spat in his face.

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: You know I have no other woman. Only... duty.

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: There have always been men who found it easier to speak vows than to keep them.

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: I will not be remembered as Ser Arys the Unworthy. I will not soil my cloak.

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: You will not take Myrcella_Baratheon whilst I still draw breath.

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: Arys, my sweet knight, why did you do it? You should have yielded. I tried to tell you, but the words caught in my mouth. You gallant fool, I never meant for you to die, or for Myrcella_Baratheon...

name: Arys Oakheart
quote: Did he charge at Areo_Hotah in hopes of saving me? Or did he do it to escape me, to wash out his dishonor with his life's blood?

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: There's my lord husband. And here's my sweet suckling babe.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Theon: What sort of unnatural creature are you? Asha: Only a shy maid.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Rodrik: Your fight is hopeless. Asha: No fight is hopeless till it has been fought. I have the best claim. I am the heir of Balon_Greyjoy body.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: If there are rocks to starboard and a storm to port, a wise captain steers a third course.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Tristifer: You and I were meant to be, Asha. I have always known you would be my wife, and the mother of my sons. Asha: Take your hand away or you won't live long enough to breed a son ... I am your queen, not your wife. Remember that.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: The Euron_Greyjoy is a kraken. The Euron_Greyjoy comes before the Victarion_Greyjoy. But I am the child of King Balon_Greyjoy body, so I come before you both.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Asha: Peace. Land. Victory. I'll give you Sea Dragon Point and the Stony Shore, black earth and tall trees and stones enough for every younger son to build a hall. We'll have the northmen too ... as friends, to stand with us against the Iron Throne. Your choice is simple. Crown me, for peace and victory. Or crown Victarion_Greyjoy, for more war and more defeat. What will you have, ironmen?Rodrik: VICTORY! Victory, and Asha!Baelor: ASHA! ASHA QUEEN!

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Asha Greyjoy did not intend to be taken alive. She would die as she had lived, with an axe in her hand and a laugh upon her lips.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Asha: Your Grace's royal brother was renowned for turning fallen foes into friends. Make me your man. Stannis: The gods did not make you a man. How can I?

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Tycho: You are the Lady Asha of House Greyjoy, unless I am mistaken. Asha: I am Asha of House Greyjoy, aye. Opinions differ on whether I'm a lady.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Well, they say Asha's favorite gown is a chainmail hauberk that hangs down past her knees, with boiled leather smallclothes beneath.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Let Asha keep the bloody islands, they're as dreary as she is.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Balon_Greyjoy favored Asha, the child of his body, but a woman cannot rule the ironborn.

name: Asha Greyjoy
quote: Alysane: Lady Asha is not for burning. Clayton: She will be. We have harbored this demon worshiper amongst us too long.

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: How dare you play the noble lord with me! What do you take me for? You've a Jon_Snow, I've seen him. Who was the mother, I wonder? Some Dornish peasant you raped while her holdfast burned? A whore? Or was it the grieving sister, the Lady Ashara? She threw herself into the sea, I'm told. Why was that? For Arthur_Dayne you slew, or the child you stole?

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: If Jon_Snow had been born of Ashara Dayne of Starfall, as some whispered, the lady was long dead; if not, Catelyn had no clue who or where his mother might be.

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: Howland_Reed saw a maid with laughing purple eyes dance with Barristan_Selmy, Oberyn_Martell, and Jon_Connington, and lastly with Eddard_Stark... but only after Brandon_Stark spoke to her on behalf of a brother too shy to leave his bench.

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: Lady Ashara Dayne. It's an old tale, that one. I heard it once at Winterfell, when I was no older than you are now. I doubt there's any truth to it. But if there is, what of it? When Eddard_Stark met this Dornish lady, his brother Brandon_Stark was still alive, and it was him betrothed to Lady Catelyn_Stark, so there's no stain on your father's honor. There's nought like a tourney to make the blood run hot, so maybe some words were whispered in a tent of a night, who can say? Words or kisses, maybe more, but where's the harm in that? Spring had come, or so they thought, and neither one of them was pledged.

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: His choice would have been a young maiden not long at court, one of Elia_Martell companions ... though compared to Ashara Dayne, the Dornish princess was a kitchen drab.

name: Ashara Dayne
quote: She died never knowing that Ser Barristan had loved her. How could she? He was a knight of the Kingsguard, sworn to celibacy. No good could have come from telling her his feelings. No good came from silence either. If I had unhorsed Rhaegar_Targaryen and crowned Ashara queen of love and beauty, might she have looked to me instead of Stark?

name: Lord Ashford
quote: Duncan: My lords, I asked Ser Manfred_Dondarrion to vouch for me so I might enter the lists, but he refuses. He says he knows me not. Ser Arlan_of_Pennytree served him, though, I swear it. I have his sword and shield, I— Ashford: A shield and a sword do not make a knight. Plummer has spoken to me of you. Even if we accept that these arms belonged to this Ser Arlan of Pennytree, it may well be that you found him dead and stole them. Unless you have some better proof of what you say, some writing or— Baelor: I remember Ser Arlan of Pennytree. He never won a tourney that I know, but he never shamed himself either. At King's Landing sixteen years ago, he overthrew Lord_Stokeworth and the Bastard_of_Harrenhal in the melee, and many years before at Lannisport he unhorsed the Damon_Lannister_(lord) himself. The lion was not so grey then, to be sure.

name: Lord Ashford's daughter
quote: Marbrand, Mallister, Cargyll, Westerling, Swann, Mullendore, Hightower, Florent, Frey, Penrose, Stokeworth, Darry, Parren, Wylde; it seemed as though every lordly house of the west and south had sent a knight or three to Ashford to see the fair maid and brave the lists in her honor.

name: Lord Ashford's daughter
quote: She does not seem so fair to me, Dunk thought. Tanselle was prettier.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Harys: He is dead then? Ser Gregor_Clegane? Aurane: I would think so, my lord. I am told that removing the head from the body is often mortal.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Cersei: What we require is our own fleet. Aurane: I propose we build new dromonds. Ten, to start with.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Aurane: If it please Your Grace, I will launch the rest of our new dromonds. The sight of them upon the Blackwater with King Tommen_Baratheon banner flying from their masts will remind the city who rules here, and keep them safe should the mobs decide to run riot again. Cersei: A prudent measure. Until this storm has passed, I want your ships crewed and on the water.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: The first time she had seen him, for half a heartbeat she had almost thought Rhaegar_Targaryen had returned from the ashes. It is his hair, she told herself. He is not half as comely as Rhaegar was. His face is too narrow, and he has that cleft in his chin. The Velaryons came from old Valyrian stock, however, and some had the same silvery hair as the dragonkings of old.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Jaime: There is talk that you mean to make Aurane Waters the master of ships. Cersei: Has someone been informing on me? Waters is well suited to the office. He has spent half his life on ships. Jaime: Half his life? He cannot be more than twenty. Cersei: Two-and-twenty, and what of it? Tywin_Lannister was not even one-and-twenty when Aerys_II_Targaryen named him Hand. It is past time Tommen_Baratheon had some young men about him in place of all these wrinkled greybeards. Aurane is strong and vigorous. Jaime: Paxter_Redwyne would be a better choice. He commands the largest fleet in Westeros. Aurane Waters could command a skiff, but only if you bought him one.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: This is a sly boy, no more. Useful in his way, though.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Aurane had been hinting at his need for a seat; his lordship was only an empty honor without one. He had his eye on Dragonstone, Cersei knew, but there he aimed too high. Rosby would be more suitable to his birth and station.

name: Aurane Waters
quote: Cersei: What of Lord Waters? His ships ... if he brings his crews ashore, he should have enough men to ... Qyburn: As soon as word of Your Grace's present troubles reached the river, Lord Waters raised sail, unshipped his oars, and took his fleet to sea. Ser Harys_Swyft fears he means to join Lord Stannis_Baratheon. Pycelle believes that he is sailing to the Stepstones, to set himself up as a pirate.

name: Axell Florent
quote: R'hllor has blessed me with that gift. Like Lady Melisandre, he shows me the future in the fire. Stannis_Baratheon will sit the Iron Throne. I have seen it. And I know what must be done. His Grace must make me his Hand, in place of Alester_Florent.

name: Axell Florent
quote: If you think to betray me, pray remember that I have been castellan of Dragonstone a good long time. The garrison is mine. Perhaps I cannot burn you without Stannis_Baratheon consent, but who is to say you might not suffer a fall.

name: Axell Florent
quote: Defeat is a disease, and victory is the cure.

name: Axell Florent
quote: To King Stannis_Baratheon and his wife, Queen Selyse_Florent, Light of the North! To R'hllor, the Lord of Light, may he defend us all! One land, one god, one king!

name: Axell Florent
quote: I shall bring justice to Westeros. A thing Ser Axell understands as little as he does war.

name: Axell Florent
quote: If he is not a kinslayer, he is the next best thing. Axell Florent's Alester_Florent had been burned by Melisandre, Maester Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) had informed him, yet Ser Axell had done little and less to stop it. What sort of man can stand by idly and watch his own brother being burned alive?

name: Axell Florent
quote: The letters Jon_Snow'd received from Eastwatch-by-the-Sea had a deal to say of Axell Florent, very little of it good.

name: Axell Florent
quote: Ser Axell, if you are truly the Queen's Hand, I pity Selyse_Florent.

name: Azor Ahai
quote: There will come a day after a long summer when the stars bleed and the cold breath of darkness falls heavy on the world. In this dread hour a warrior shall draw from the fire a burning sword. And that sword shall be Lightbringer, the Red Sword of Heroes, and he who clasps it shall be Azor Ahai come again, and the darkness shall flee before him. Azor Ahai, beloved of R'hllor! The Warrior of Light, the Son of Fire! Come forth, your sword awaits you! Come forth and take it into your hand!

name: Azor Ahai
quote: Nissa Nissa, bare your breast, and know that I love you best of all that is in this world.

name: Azor Ahai
quote: Haldon: The dragons have come to carry her to glory. Tyrion: Her. Daenerys_Targaryen? Haldon: Benerro has sent forth the word from Volantis. Her coming is the fulfillment of an ancient prophecy. From smoke and salt was she born to make the world anew. She is Azor Ahai returned ... and her triumph over darkness will bring a summer that will never end ... death itself will bend its knee, and all those who die fighting in her cause shall be reborn ...

name: Azor Ahai
quote: I pray for a glimpse of Azor Ahai, and R'hllor shows me only Jon_Snow.

name: Azor Ahai
quote: When the red star bleeds and the darkness gathers, Azor Ahai shall be born again amidst smoke and salt to wake dragons out of stone.

name: Bael the Bard
quote: All I ask is a flower, the fairest flower that blooms in the gardens o' Winterfell.

name: Bael the Bard
quote: Ygritte: Well, long before he was king over the free folk, Bael was a great raider. Stonesnake: A murderer, robber, and raper, is what you mean.

name: Bael the Bard
quote: Ygritte: So there it is—you have Bael's blood in you, same as me. Jon: It never happened. Ygritte: Might be it did, might be it didn't. It is a good song, though.

name: Bael the Bard
quote: Jon: Your Bael was a liar. Ygritte: No, but a bard's truth is different than yours or mine.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: Alyn: Name him Corlys, after Corlys_Velaryon. One day he may sit the Iron Throne. Baela: I will name her Laena, after Laena_Velaryon. One day she may ride a dragon.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: Aegon_III_Targaryen can command me. You cannot.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: She is overly fond of boys, and should be married soon, lest she surrender her virtue to someone unworthy of her.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: Even more than boys, however, Lady Baela loved to fly.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: So it came to pass when King Aegon_II_Targaryen flew Sunfyre over Dragonmont's smoking peak and made his descent [...] up to meet him rose Baela Targaryen, Prince Daemon_Targaryen's daughter by the Lady Laena_Velaryon, as fearless as her father.

name: Baela Targaryen
quote: Manfryd: Baela flew a dragon, Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Daemon) has only the hatchling. Roland: Baela's dragon brought down Aegon_II_Targaryen. There are many in the realm who will not have forgotten that. Crown her and we will rip all the old wounds open once again.

name: Baelor Blacktyde
quote: Balon_Greyjoy was mad, Aeron_Greyjoy is madder, and Euron_Greyjoy is maddest of them all.

name: Baelor Blacktyde
quote: Balon_Greyjoy the Widowmaker, I call him. I will gladly trade his freedom for a father. Have you one to give?

name: Baelor Blacktyde
quote: Lord Blacktyde says this kingsmoot is a dangerous folly. He thinks Euron_Greyjoy will descend on them and kill them all, as Urron_Greyiron did.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: The gods are just, yet Blessed Baelor taught us that they are also merciful.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: Tyrion: Baelor starved himself to death, fasting. His uncle served him loyally as Hand, as he had served the Young Dragon before him. Viserys_II_Targaryen might only have reigned a year, but he ruled for fifteen, while Daeron_I_Targaryen warred and Baelor prayed. And if he did remove his nephew, can you blame him? Someone had to save the realm from Baelor's follies. Sansa: But Baelor the Blessed was a great king. He walked the Boneway barefoot to make peace with Dorne, and rescued Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) from a snakepit. The vipers refused to strike him because he was so pure and holy. Oberyn: If you were a viper, my lady, would you want to bite a bloodless stick like Baelor the Blessed?

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: Lancel: Marriage requires consummation. King Baelor was made to wed his sister Daena_Targaryen, but they never lived as man and wife, and he put her aside as soon as he was crowned. Jaime: The realm would have been better served if he had closed his eyes and fucked her. I know enough of history to know that.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: He was a rare spirit, pure and brave and innocent, untouched by the evils of the world.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: Oarsman: Daena_Targaryen was old King Baelor's wife. I rowed on a ship named for her once. The Princess Daena. Riverman: If she was a king's wife, she'd be a queen. Oarsman: Baelor never had a queen. He was holy. Whore: Don't mean he never wed his sister. He just never bedded her, is all. When they made him king, he locked her up in a tower. His other sisters too. There was three.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: No ruler can make a people good. Baelor the Blessed prayed and fasted and built the Seven as splendid a temple as any gods could wish for, yet he could not put an end to war and want.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: Their path took them past the statue of Baelor the Blessed, standing tall and serene upon his plinth, his face a study in benevolence. To look at him, you would never guess what a fool he'd been.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: The Targaryen dynasty had produced kings both bad and good, but none as beloved as Baelor, that pious gentle septon-king who loved the smallfolk and the gods in equal parts, yet imprisoned his own sisters. It was a wonder that his statue did not crumble at the sight of her bare breasts.

name: Baelor I Targaryen
quote: There's sometimes a fine line between madness and greatness. Daeron_I_Targaryen, the boy king who led a war of conquest, and even the saintly Baelor I could also be considered "mad," if seen in a different light.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Duncan Ser Arlan_of_Pennytree, he told me you were the soul of chivalry, and that one day the Seven Kingdoms would be safe in your hands. Baelor: Not for many a year still, I pray.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Maekar: Brother, have you taken leave of your senses? Duncan_the_Tall attacked Aerion_Targaryen. Baelor: This man protected the weak, as every true knight must. Let the gods determine if he was right or wrong.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Duncan: Your Grace, I am your man. Please. Your man. Baelor: My man. I need good men, Ser Duncan. The realm ...

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Few could doubt that Baelor Breakspear would be a great king, for he was the heart of chivalry and the soul of wisdom, and came to serve Daeron_II_Targaryen most ably as Hand. But no man can know the will of the gods. Baelor Breakspear was cut down in his prime by his own brother Maekar_I_Targaryen at the tourney at Ashford in the year 209 AC.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: The world made no sense when a great prince died so a hedge knight might live.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Uncle Baelor said that clemency was best when dealing with an honorable foe. If a defeated man believes he will be pardoned, he may lay down his sword and bend the knee. Elsewise he will fight on to the death, and slay more loyal men and innocents.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Daeron_II_Targaryen bore the same name as the Daeron_I_Targaryen, but when Myriah_Martell gave him a son he named the child Baelor, after Baelor_I_Targaryen who ever sat the Iron Throne.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) was at his books when the eldest of his uncles, the heir apparent, was slain in a tourney mishap. He left two sons, but they followed him to the grave not long after, during the Great Spring Sickness.

name: Baelor Targaryen
quote: As for birth, the dragonkings oft chose Hands from amongst their own blood, with results as various as Baelor Breakspear and Maegor_I_Targaryen.

name: Baldrick
quote: Hedge Knight: Aye, and if I want to fuck my sister too, do I have your leave? Baldrick: Go to Dragonstone and claim a dragon. If you can do that, ser, I will marry you and your sister myself.

name: Ballabar
quote: Do you thirst, my lord? I have your milk, your good milk. You must not fight, no, don't try to move, you need your rest.

name: Ballabar
quote: The maester bade him be very still as he slid the tip of the knife in under his chin, beneath the mask. A slip of the hand here, and Cersei_Lannister will be free of me, he thought. He could feel the blade sawing through the stiffened linen, only inches above his throat. Fortunately this soft pink man was not one of his sister's braver creatures.

name: Ballabar
quote: Tyrion: Ballabar. Bring me. Looking glass. Ballabar: My lord, I would not counsel... that might be, ah, unwise, as it were... your wound... Tyrion: Bring it.

name: Balman Byrch
quote: Cersei: I tell you truly, I have grave doubts about Ser Bronn. Falyse: The man is insolent, Your Grace. Uncouth and foul-mouthed. Balman: He is no true knight. Cersei: No. And you are a man who would know true knighthood.

name: Balman Byrch
quote: As a catspaw he leaves much to be desired, she reflected. Still, he should serve.

name: Balman Byrch
quote: Falyse_Stokeworth cretin of a husband wrote his own death warrant.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: Balon: You may take my head, but you cannot name me traitor. No Greyjoy ever swore an oath to a Baratheon. Robert: Swear one now, or lose that stubborn head of yours.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: Balon: Robb_Stark says nothing about a reward. Only that you speak for him, and I am to listen, and give him my sails and swords, and in return he will give me a crown. He will give me a crown... Theon: A poor choice of words, what is meant is– Balon: What is meant is what is said. The boy will give me a crown. And what is given can be taken away.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: I am the Greyjoy, Lord Reaper of Pyke, King of Salt and Rock, Son of the Sea Wind, and no man gives me a crown. I pay the iron price. I will take my crown, as Urron_Greyiron did five thousand years ago.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: Did Eddard_Stark dress you like that? Was it his pleasure to garb you in velvets and silks and make you his own sweet daughter?

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: No man has ever died from bending his knee. He who kneels may rise again, blade in hand. He who will not kneel stays dead, stiff legs and all.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: He was smaller than Theon remembered him. And so gaunt. Balon Greyjoy had always been thin, but now he looked as though the gods had put him in a cauldron and boiled every spare ounce of flesh from his bones, until nothing remained but hair and skin. Bone thin and bone hard he was, with a face that might have been chipped from flint. His eyes were flinty too, black and sharp, but the years and the salt winds had turned his hair the grey of a winter sea, flecked with whitecaps.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: Cersei: By what right does he call himself king? Tywin: By right of conquest. King Balon has strangler's fingers round the Neck. Robb_Stark's heirs are dead, Winterfell is fallen, and the ironmen hold Moat Cailin, Deepwood Motte, and most of the Stony Shore. King Balon's longships command the sunset sea, and are well placed to menace Lannisport, Fair Isle, and even Highgarden, should we provoke him.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: Captain: The way I heard it in Lordsport, there was a blow coming in from the west, rain and thunder, and old King Balon was crossing one of them bridges when the wind got hold of it and just tore the thing to pieces. He washed up two days later, all bloated and broken. Crabs ate his eyes, I hear. Jon: King crabs, I hope, to sup upon such royal jelly, eh?

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: My brother Balon made us great again, which earned the Storm God's wrath. He feasts now in the Drowned God's watery halls, with mermaids to attend his every want. It shall be for us who remain behind in this dry and dismal vale to finish his great work.

name: Balon Greyjoy
quote: A brave man but a bad lord.

name: Balon Swann
quote: Jaime: It's not Ser Donnel_Swann who concerns me. It's you. What will you do if brave Ser Donnel gives his sword to yet another usurper, and one day comes storming into the throne room? And there you stand all in white, between Tommen_Baratheon and your blood. What will you do? Balon: I... my lord, that will never happen. Jaime: It happened to me. Balon: My lord. On my sword, on my honor, on Gulian_Swann name, I swear... I shall not do as you did.

name: Balon Swann
quote: Nymeria: Ser Gregor_Clegane was a bloody brute, all men agree. If ever a man deserved to suffer, it was him. Balon: That is as it may be, my lady, but Ser Gregor was a knight, and a knight should die with sword in hand. Poison is a foul and filthy way to kill.

name: Balon Swann
quote: He would serve with honor and courage.

name: Balon Swann
quote: His two white shadows were always with him; Balon Swann and Mandon_Moore, beautiful in their pale plate. Surrounded by a circle of Velaryon spearmen, they fought back to back; they made battle as graceful as a dance.

name: Balon Swann
quote: This one is not so easily seduced as was his Sworn Brother, Hotah thought. Ser Arys_Oakheart was a boy, despite his years. This one is a man, and wary.

name: Balon Swann
quote: Nymeria: This is monstrous. I would not have believed it, not of a Kingsguard knight. Doran: They are sworn to obey, just as Areo_Hotah is.

name: Bannen
quote: I'm cold. Please, I'm so cold.

name: Bannen
quote: Sam: Sick. The smell ... Edd: Never knew Bannen could smell so good. I had half a mind to carve a slice off him. If we had some applesauce, I might have done it. Pork's always best with applesauce, I find.

name: Barba Bolton
quote: If you send me home, Your Grace, send me home with food, for the snows are deep and your people are starving.

name: Barba Bracken
quote: Missy's Teats, the Blackwoods call them, but they were Barba's first.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: Barbrey: Who else is there? Theon: You. There is you. The Lady of Barrowton, a Dustin by marriage, a Ryswell by birth. Barbrey: The widow of Barrowton ... and yes, if I so choose, I could be an inconvenience. Of course, Roose_Bolton sees that too, so he takes care to keep me sweet.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: If I were queen, the first thing I would do would be to kill all those grey rats.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: Barbrey: Why do you love the Starks? Theon: I ... I wanted to be one of them ... Barbrey: And never could. We have more in common than you know, my lord.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: I was left with young Willam_Dustin, until Eddard_Stark took him from me.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: Ned Stark returned the horse to me on his way back home to Winterfell. He told me that Willam_Dustin had died an honorable death, that his body had been laid to rest beneath the red mountains of Dorne. He brought Lyanna_Stark bones back north, though, and there she rests… but I promise you, Lord Eddard's bones will never rest beside hers. I mean to feed them to my dogs.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: Barbrey: Night work is not knight's work. And Lord Wyman_Manderly is not the only one who lost kin at your Red Wedding, Frey. Do you imagine Hother_Umber loves you any better? If you did not hold the Greatjon, he would pull out your entrails and make you eat them, as Lady Donella_Hornwood ate her fingers. Flints, Cerwyns, Tallharts, Slates ... they all had men with the Robb_Stark. Roger: House Ryswell too. Barbrey: Even Dustins out of Barrowton. The north remembers, Frey.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: Roose: Lady Barbrey is a woman who knows how to nurse a grievance. Be grateful for that. Barrowton is staunch for Bolton largely because she still holds Eddard_Stark to blame for Willam_Dustin death. Ramsay: Staunch? All she does is spit on me. The day will come when I'll set her precious wooden town afire. Let her spit on that, see if it puts out the flames.

name: Barbrey Dustin
quote: To his left sat Lady Dustin, clad as ever in black wool, severe in cut and unadorned.

name: Barra
quote: Barra. Is that supposed to please me? Damn Barra's_mother. I thought she had more sense.

name: Barra
quote: Varys: There was another bastard, Gendry, older. I took steps to see him removed from harm's way ... but I confess, I never dreamed the babe would be at risk. A baseborn girl, less than a year old, with a whore for Barra's_mother, what threat could she pose?Tyrion: She was Robert_I_Baratheon. That was enough for Cersei_Lannister, it would seem.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Varys: We are not unmindful of your service, good ser. Lord Tywin_Lannister has generously agreed to grant you a handsome tract of land north of Lannisport, beside the sea, with gold and men sufficient to build you a stout keep, and servants to see to your every need. Barristan: A hall to die in, and men to bury me. I thank you, my lords, but I spit on your pity ... I am a knight. I shall die a knight.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Have no fear, sers, your king is safe... no thanks to you. Even now, I could cut through the five of you as easy as a dagger cuts cheese. If you would serve under the Jaime_Lannister, not a one of you is fit to wear the white. Here, boy. Melt it down and add it to the others, if you like. It will do you more good than the swords in the hands of these five. Perhaps Lord Stannis_Baratheon will chance to sit on it when he takes your throne.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: I took Robert_I_Baratheon pardon, aye. I served him in Kingsguard and council. Served with the Kingslayer and others near as bad, who soiled the white cloak I wore. Nothing will excuse that. I might be serving in King's Landing still if the Joffrey_Baratheon upon the Iron Throne had not cast me aside, it shames me to admit. But when he took the cloak the Gerold_Hightower had draped about my shoulders, and sent men to kill me that selfsame day, it was as though he'd ripped a caul off my eyes. That was when I knew I must find my true king, and die in his service...

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Daenerys: Can we win this fight? Barristan: Men can always fight, Your Grace. Ask rather if we can win. Dying is easy, but victory comes hard.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Duskendale had been his finest hour, yet the memory tasted bitter on his tongue. It was his failures that haunted him at night, though. Jaehaerys_II_Targaryen, Aerys_II_Targaryen, Robert_I_Baratheon. Three dead kings. Rhaegar_Targaryen, who would have been a finer king than any of them. Princess Elia_Martell and the children. Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) just a babe, Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar) with her kitten. Dead, every one, yet he still lived, who had sworn to protect them.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: You kill men for the wrongs they have done, not the wrongs that they may do someday.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: I am no Hand, a part of him wanted to cry out. I am only a simple knight, Daenerys_Targaryen protector. I never wanted this. But with the queen gone and Hizdahr_zo_Loraq in chains, someone had to rule, and Ser Barristan did not trust the Skahaz_mo_Kandaq.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: I am an old man, an old knight, and I have seen more battles than most of you have years. Nothing is more terrible upon this earth, nothing more glorious, nothing more absurd. You may retch. You will not be the first. You may drop your sword, your shield, your lance. Others have done the same. Pick it up and go on fighting. You may foul your breeches. I did, in my first battle. No one will care. All battlefields smell of shit. You may cry out for your mother, pray to gods you thought you had forgotten, howl obscenities that you never dreamed could pass your lips. All this has happened too.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Sansa: Even in the far north, the singers praise the deeds of Barristan the Bold.Renly: Barristan the Old, you mean. Don't flatter him too sweetly, child, he thinks overmuch of himself already.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Eddard: Ser Barristan is as valiant and honorable as any man in King's Landing. Petyr: And as tiresome.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Of these seven, only Ser Barristan Selmy is made of the true steel.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: And dismissing Selmy, where was the sense in that? Yes, the man was old, but the name of Barristan the Bold still has meaning in the realm. He lent honor to any man he served. Can anyone say the same of the Sandor_Clegane?

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: The smallfolk talk of him the same way they talk of Serwyn_of_the_Mirror_Shield and Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II).

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: He has a good face, and great strength to him.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: I saw him perhaps a dozen times ... from afar, most often, standing with his brothers or riding in some tourney. But every man in the Seven Kingdoms knows Barristan the Bold ... Khaleesi, before you kneels Ser Barristan Selmy, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard, who betrayed your House to serve the Usurper Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: I learned from the Gerold_Hightower and Barristan the Bold. I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn_Martell and Ser Oswell_Whent and Ser Jonothor_Darry, good men every one.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Ser Barristan is a valiant knight and true; but none, I think, has ever called him cunning.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: We should be heeding Selmy. When Barristan the Bold tells you to run, a wise man laces up his boots.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Queen's Hand. An old woman's hand, I am thinking, wrinkled and feeble.

name: Barristan Selmy
quote: Ser Barristan of House Selmy. Firstborn son of Ser Lyonel_Selmy of Harvest Hall. Served as squire to Ser Manfred_Swann. Named "the Bold" in his 10th year, when he donned borrowed armor to appear as a mystery knight in the tourney of Blackhaven, where he was defeated and unmasked by Duncan_Targaryen. Knighted in his 16th year by King Aegon_V_Targaryen, after performing great feats of prowess as a mystery knight in the winter tourney at King's Landing, defeating Prince Duncan the small and Ser Duncan_the_Tall, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard. Slew Maelys the Monstrous, last of the Blackfyre Pretenders, in single combat during the War of the Ninepenny Kings. Defeated Lormelle_Long_Lance and Cedrik_Storm, the Bastard of Bronzegate. Named to the Kingsguard in his 23rd year, by Lord Commander Ser Gerold_Hightower. Defended the passage against all challengers in the tourney of the Silver Bridge. Victor in the mêlée at Maidenpool. Brought King Aerys_II_Targaryen to safety during the Defiance of Duskendale despite an arrow wound in the chest. Avenged the murder of his Sworn Brother, Ser Gwayne_Gaunt. Rescued Lady Jeyne_Swann and her septa from the Kingswood Brotherhood, defeating Simon_Toyne and the Smiling_Knight, slaying the former. In the Oldtown tourney, defeated and unmasked the mystery knight, Blackshield revealing him to be the Bastard of Uplands. Sole champion of Lord Steffon_Baratheon tourney at Storm's End, whereat he unhorsed Lord Robert_I_Baratheon, Prince Oberyn_Martell, Lord Leyton_Hightower, Lord Jon_Connington, Lord Jason_Mallister, and Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen. Wounded by arrow, spear, and sword at the Battle of the Trident whilst fighting beside his Sworn Brothers and Rhaegar Prince of Dragonstone. Pardoned, and named Lord Commander of the Kingsguard, by King Robert I Baratheon. Served in the honor guard that brought Lady Cersei_Lannister of House Lannister to King's Landing to wed King Robert. Led the attack on Old Wyk during Balon Greyjoy's Rebellion. Champion of the tourney at King's Landing, in his 57th year. Dismissed by King Joffrey_Baratheon in his 61st year, for reasons of advanced age.

name: Barsena Blackhair
quote: Khrazz: Hizdahr_zo_Loraq swears that the winners shall share half of all the coin collected at the gates. Half, he swears it, and Hizdahr is an honorable man. Daenerys: And the losers? What shall they receive? Barsena: Their names shall be graven on the Gates of Fate amongst the other valiant fallen. All men must die, and women too ... but not all will be remembered.

name: Barsena Blackhair
quote: Hizdahr: Barsena is much loved. The bravest woman I have ever seen. Belwas: Fighting girls is not so brave. Fighting Strong Belwas would be brave.

name: Barth
quote: We are as the gods made us, strong and weak, good and bad, cruel and kind, heroic and selfish. Know that if you would rule over the kingdoms of men.

name: Barth
quote: The Father made men curious, some say to test our faith. It is my own abiding sin that whenever I come upon a door I must needs see what lies upon the farther side, but certain doors are best left unopened.

name: Barth
quote: Death comes out of the dragon's mouth, but death does not go in that way.

name: Barth
quote: If his father beat out swords and shod horses, so be it. A knight needs his sword, a horse needs shoes, and I need Barth.

name: Barth
quote: As for birth, the dragonkings oft chose Hands from their own blood, with results as various as Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) and Maegor_I_Targaryen. Against this you have, Septon Barth, the blacksmith's son the Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen plucked from the Red Keep's library, who gave the realm forty years of peace and plenty.

name: Barth
quote: What fools we were, who thought ourselves so wise! The error crept in from the translation. Dragons are neither male nor female, Barth saw the truth of that, but now one and now the other, as changeable as flame. The language misled us all for a thousand years.

name: Bartimos Celtigar
quote: Bastards are treacherous by nature, it is in their blood. Betrayal comes as easily to a bastard as loyalty to trueborn men.

name: Bastard of Harrenhal
quote: At King’s Landing sixteen years ago, Arlan_of_Pennytree overthrew Lord Stokeworth and the Bastard of Harrenhal in the melee.

name: Beans
quote: That dragon queen's got the real item, the kind that don't break and run when you fart in their general direction.

name: Becca
quote: And yet there was that one time … what was her name, that common girl of yours? Becca? No, she was one of mine, gods love her, black hair and these sweet big eyes, you could drown in them.

name: Becca the Baker
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Bedwyck
quote: Jon: I am putting a garrison in Icemark and giving you command of it.Bedwyck: Command? Me? M'lord knows I'm just a crofter's get, on the Wall for poaching?Jon: You've been a ranger for a dozen years. You survived the Fist of the First Men and Craster's Keep, and came back to tell the tale. The younger men look up to you.Bedwyck: Only dwarfs look up to me.

name: Bedwyck
quote: Bedwyck stood no more than five feet tall, but the grey streaks in his hair showed his age. The other rangers called him Giant.

name: Bedwyck
quote: Samwell: They're mocking me, the same way they mock Bedwyck by calling him 'Giant.'Grenn: He's not a giant, though, and Small_Paul was never small.

name: Beldon
quote: His Tytos_Lannister wants only to be loved. So he laughs, and takes no offense, and forgives, and bestows honors and offices and lavish gifts on those who mock him and defy him, thinking thereby to win their loyalty. Yet the more he laughs and gives, the more they despise him.

name: Bella
quote: I'm named Bella. For the battle. I bet I could ring your bell, too. You want to?

name: Bellegere Otherys
quote: The first Black Pearl was a pirate queen. A Aegon_IV_Targaryen took her for a lover and got Bellenora_Otherys on her, who grew up to be a courtesan. Her own daughter followed her, and her daughter after her, until you get to this one.

name: Bellegere Otherys
quote: She's descended from the dragons, that one.

name: Bellegere Otherys
quote: She was so lovely that the lamps seemed to burn brighter when she passed.

name: Bellenora Otherys
quote: The first Black Pearl was a Bellegere_Otherys. A Westerosi Aegon_IV_Targaryen took her for a lover and got a daughter on her, who grew up to be a courtesan. Her own daughter followed her, and her daughter after her, until you get to this one.

name: Belwas
quote: Strong Belwas they name me in the fighting pits of Meereen. Never did I lose. I let each man cut me once, before I kill him. Count the cuts and you will know how many Strong Belwas has slain.

name: Belwas
quote: Jhiqui: We would braid your hair and hang a bell in it, Strong Belwas, but you have no hair to braid. Belwas: Strong Belwas needs no tinkly bells. Strong Belwas needs liver and onions.

name: Belwas
quote: Bad fighting, good dying. Strong Belwas hates it when they scream.

name: Belwas
quote: Strong Belwas could not scheme his way to breakfast.

name: Belwas
quote: He had once crossed the world with Strong Belwas, and he knew he could rely on him, should all this come to swords.

name: Ben Blackthumb
quote: You know old Ben Blackthumb? He came here as a boy. Smithed for Lady Shella_Whent and her father before her and his father before him, and even for Lord Lothston who held Harrenhal before the Whents. Now he smiths for Lord Tywin_Lannister, and you know what he says? A sword's a sword, a helm's a helm, and if you reach in the fire you get burned, no matter who you're serving.

name: Ben Bones
quote: Even if we do escape, Ramsay_Snow will hunt us down, him and Ben Bones and the girls.

name: Ben Bushy
quote: It was only a game to pass the time. We meant no harm. Ben died, you know. Cut down on the Blackwater.

name: Ben Coldwater
quote: Ben: Would you honor me with this dance, my lady? Sansa: You're very kind.

name: Ben Plumm
quote: There are old sellswords and bold sellswords, but no old bold sellswords.

name: Ben Plumm
quote: The Second Sons have gone over to the Yunkai'i ... When next I see his ugly face I will open him from throat to groin and rip out his black heart.

name: Ben Plumm
quote: A warm smile, that. Friendly. But my, those eyes are cold.

name: Ben Plumm
quote: Brown Ben is shrewd, tenacious, not unintelligent … but wary.

name: Ben Plumm
quote: I hear you're twice a turncloak, Plumm. A man after mine own heart.

name: Benedar Belmore
quote: Petyr: How does not matter, so long as no food leaves the Vale. Benedar: These prices, though, these prices are more than fair." Petyr: You say more than fair, my lord. I say less than we would wish. Wait. If need be, buy the food yourself and keep it stored. Winter is coming. Prices must go higher.

name: Benedar Belmore
quote: Six silver bells on purple, that was Belmore, pear-bellied and round of shoulder. His beard was a ginger-grey horror sprouting from a multiplicity of chins.

name: Benedar Belmore
quote: Belmore is corrupt and can be bought.

name: Benerro
quote: Benerro has sent forth the word from Volantis. Daenerys_Targaryen coming is the fulfillment of an ancient prophecy. From smoke and salt was she born to make the world anew. She is Azor_Ahai returned... and her triumph over darkness will bring a summer that will never end... death itself will bend its knee, and all those who die fighting in her cause shall be reborn...

name: Benerro
quote: Give me priests who are fat and corrupt and cynical, the sort who like to sit on soft satin cushions, nibble sweetmeats, and diddle little boys. It's the ones who believe in gods who make the trouble.

name: Benerro
quote: Qavo: Benerro's rantings will only serve to bring a savage wrath down upon his head. Tyrion: What rantings? Qavo: In Volantis, thousands of slaves and freedmen crowd the temple plaza every night to hear Benerro shriek of bleeding stars and a sword of fire that will cleanse the world. He has been preaching that Volantis will surely burn if the triarchs take up arms against Daenerys_Targaryen.

name: Benerro
quote: Flames had been tattooed across his cheeks and chin and shaven head to make a bright red mask that crackled about his eyes and coiled down and around his lipless mouth.

name: Benerro
quote: When his voice rose in a crescendo, flames leapt from his fingers with a sudden whoosh and made the crowd gasp. The priest could trace fiery letters in the air as well. Valyrian glyphs. Tyrion recognized perhaps two in ten; one was Doom, the other Darkness.

name: Benerro
quote: Shouts erupted from the crowd. Women were weeping and men were shaking their fists. I have a bad feeling about this. The dwarf was reminded of the day Myrcella_Baratheon sailed for Dorne and the riot that boiled up as they made their way back to the Red Keep. Haldon Halfmaester had spoken of using the red priest to Young Griff's advantage, Tyrion recalled. Now that he had seen and heard the man himself, that struck him as a very bad idea. He hoped that Jon_Connington had better sense. Some allies are more dangerous than enemies.

name: Benerro
quote: Tyrion: What is he saying? Jorah: That Daenerys_Targaryen stands in peril. The dark eye has fallen upon her, and the minions of night are plotting her destruction, praying to their false gods in temples of deceit... conspiring at betrayal with Grazdan_mo_Eraz...

name: Benerro
quote: Prince Aegon will find no friend here. The red priest spoke of ancient prophecy, a prophecy that foretold the coming of a Azor_Ahai to deliver the world from darkness. One hero. Not two. Daenerys_Targaryen has dragons, Aegon does not. The dwarf did not need to be a prophet himself to foresee how Benerro and his followers might react to a second Targaryen.

name: Benerro
quote: Benerro can see the morrow in his flames. Triarch Malaquo tried to hire the Golden Company, did you know? He meant to clean out the red temple and put Benerro to the sword. He dare not use tiger cloaks. Half of them worship the Lord of Light as well. Oh, these are dire days in Old Volantis, even for wrinkled old widows.

name: Benerro
quote: Lord of Light, bless your slave Moqorro, and light his way in the dark places of the world. And defend your righteous slave Benerro. Grant him courage. Grant him wisdom. Fill his heart with fire.

name: Benfrey Frey
quote: Benfrey, see your Roslin_Frey back to her chambers, she has a wedding to prepare for.

name: Benfrey Frey
quote: Brenett: Lady Bethany_Rosby gave Lord Walder_Frey a child every year. Catelyn: How many lived past infancy? Brenett: Five. Ser Perwyn_Frey. Ser Benfrey. Maester Willamen_Frey, who took his vows last year and now serves Eon_Hunter in the Vale. Olyvar_Frey, who squired for your Robb_Stark. And Lady Roslin_Frey, the youngest.

name: Benifer
quote: Every man and maid and child in the stormlands is my hostage, whilst I ride him, Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen said without saying, and Lord Rogar_Baratheon heard him plain.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Benjen: You don't miss much, do you, Jon? We could use a man like you on the Wall.Jon: Robb_Stark is a stronger lance than I am, but I'm the better sword, and Hullen says I sit a horse as well as anyone in the castle.Benjen: Notable achievements.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Benjen: Until you have known a woman, you cannot understand what you would be giving up.Jon: I don't care about that!Benjen: You might, if you knew what it meant. If you knew what the oath would cost you, you might be less eager to pay the price, son.Jon: I'm not your son!Benjen: More's the pity.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: The Night's Watch is a sworn brotherhood. We have no families. None of us will ever father sons. Our wife is duty. Our mistress is honor.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Benjen: I warn you, Lannister, you'll find no inns at the Wall.Tyrion: No doubt you'll find some place to put me. As you might have noticed, I'm small.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: His uncle was sharp-featured and gaunt as a mountain crag, but there was always a hint of laughter in his blue-grey eyes.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Benjen Stark was a Sworn Brother. Jon_Snow would be a son to him, the child he would never have.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Yoren: Most like he's dead.Robb: My uncle is not dead. Do you hear me? My uncle is not dead!Yoren: Whatever you say, m'lord.Black brother: There's not a man on the Wall knows the haunted forest better than Benjen Stark. He'll find his way back.Yoren: Well, maybe he will and maybe he won't. Good men have gone into those woods before, and never come out.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: His blood ran black. Made him my brother as much as yours.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Jeor: If Ben Stark had come under wildling attack a half day's ride from Castle Black, he would have returned for more men, chased the killers through all seven hells and brought me back their heads.Jaremy: Unless he was slain as well.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Jon: If my uncle found all these villages empty as well—Jeor: —he would have made it his purpose to learn why, and it may well be someone or something did not want that known.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: I've not seen Benjen Stark for three years. And if truth be told, I never once missed him.

name: Benjen Stark
quote: Alliser: You know these Starks, my lord.Janos: I do. I know them too well.Jon: I burned my hand defending Jeor_Mormont from Othor. And my uncle was a man of honor. He would never have betrayed his vows.

name: Bennis
quote: Nasty stuff, water. Drank some once, and it made me sick as a dog. Wine's better.

name: Bennis
quote: Never knew an animal stupid as a sheep. Think they're kin to you, lunk?

name: Bennis
quote: The man is grown mean and false and craven.

name: Bennis
quote: It is Bennis I want, and Bennis I shall have. No one rides onto my lands, does harm to one of mine, and escapes to laugh about it.

name: Bent-backed man
quote: Ferryman: "Six dragons. Three for the passage, and three for the man I lost." Sandor_Clegane: "There. Take ten." Ferryman: "Ten? What's this, now?" Sandor Clegane: "Beric_Dondarrion's note, good for nine thousand dragons or nearabouts. Ten of it is yours. I'll be back for the rest one day, so see you don’t go spending it." Ferryman: "Writing. What good's writing? You promised gold. Knight's honor, you said." Sandor Clegane: "Knights have no bloody honor. Time you learned that, old man."

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Guardsman: Here to fight in the Hand's tourney, my lord?Beric: Here to win the Hand's tourney.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Six score of us set out to bring the king's justice to Gregor_Clegane. Six score brave men and true, led by a fool in a starry cloak.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Even Lem blind themselves sometimes, when they are afraid to see.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Can I dwell on what I scarce remember? I held a castle on the Marches once, and there was Allyria_Dayne I was pledged to marry, but I could not find that castle today, nor tell you the color of that woman's hair. Who knighted me, old friend? What were my favorite foods? It all fades. Sometimes I think I was born on the bloody grass in that grove of ash, with the taste of fire in my mouth and a hole in my chest. Are you my mother, Thoros?

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Beric: Gendry, do you swear before the eyes of gods and men to defend those who cannot defend themselves, to protect all women and children, to obey your captains, your liege lord, and your king, to fight bravely when needed and to such other tasks as are laid upon you, however hard or humble or dangerous they may be? Gendry: I do, m'lord. Beric: Arise Ser Gendry, knight of the hollow hill, and be welcome to our brotherhood.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Beric: Fire consumes. It consumes, and when it is done there is nothing left. Nothing.Thoros: Beric. Sweet friend. What are you saying?Beric: Nothing I have not said before. Six times, Thoros? Six times is too many.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: The lightning lord is everywhere and nowhere, skinny squirrel.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: They say Lord Beric always gives a man a trial, that he won't kill a man unless something's proved against him.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Lyle: Once we're done at Riverrun, I'll be itching for another fight. Not that Beric Dondarrion is like to give me one. I recall the man from tourneys past. A comely lad in a pretty cloak, he was. Slight and callow.Arwood: That was before he died. Death changed him, the smallfolk say. You can kill him, but he won't stay dead. How do you fight a man like that?

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Don't get me started on Lord Beric. He's here, he's there, he's everywhere, but when you send men after him, he melts away like dew.

name: Beric Dondarrion
quote: Brienne: You ride with the Dondarrion. The lightning lord.Thoros: Lightning comes and goes and then is seen no more. So too with men. Lord Beric's fire has gone out of this world, I fear. A grimmer shadow leads us in his place.

name: Bernard
quote: The Lyseni and their queer foreign gods had no place in the Seven Kingdoms. It was always intended that Lady Larra_Rogare should die together with her brothers, so Viserys_II_Targaryen would be free to take a proper Westerosi queen.

name: Bernarr Brune
quote: This Dick_Bean shames us all! Are there no true knights here? No leal men?

name: Bertrand Tyrell
quote: The Tyrells are dolts. I am sorry, Your Grace, they are my liege lords, but ... the Tyrells are dolts, and Lord Bertrand was a sot as well.

name: Bessa
quote: It wasn't the knife I wanted to put in you, he wanted to tell her. I picked you flowers, wild roses and tansy and goldencups, it took me all morning.

name: Beth Cassel
quote: Jeyne: Joffrey_Baratheon likes your sister. He told her she was very beautiful. Beth: He's going to marry her. Then Sansa_Stark will be queen of all the realm. Sansa: Beth, you shouldn't make up stories.

name: Beth Cassel
quote: Rodrik: This is craven. To use a child so... this is despicable. Theon: Oh, I know. It's a dish I tasted myself, or have you forgotten? I was ten when I was taken from Balon_Greyjoy house, to make certain he would raise no more rebellions.

name: Beth Cassel
quote: Rodrik: I offer myself in my daughter's place. Release her, and take me as your hostage. Surely the castellan of Winterfell is worth more than a child. Theon: Not to me.

name: Beth Cassel
quote: The Miller's_sons watched him come from their spikes, their tarred and flayed faces looming larger with every yard; between them stood little Beth Cassel, noosed and crying.

name: Beth Cassel
quote: She had known a Beth once, back at Winterfell when she was Arya_Stark. Maybe that was why she'd picked the name. Or maybe it was just because it went so well with blind.

name: Betha Blackwood
quote: All three of the sons of the fifth Aegon had wed for love in defiance of their father's wishes. And because that unlikely monarch had followed his heart when he chose his queen, he allowed his sons to have their way, making bitter enemies when he might have made fast friends.

name: Bethany Blackwood
quote: A snot-nosed little creature, couldn't be more than seven.

name: Bethany Blackwood
quote: Jaime: Why not let her see King's Landing? Tommen_Baratheon is almost of an age with her. He would be pleased to have another friend. Tytos: One he can hang if the friend's father should displease him?

name: Bethany Bracken
quote: Ser Terrence_Toyne was found abed with his Aegon_IV_Targaryen mistress. 'Twas love, he swore, but it cost his life and hers, and brought about the downfall of his House and the death of the Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) who ever lived.

name: Bethany Bracken
quote: Jaime : And Ser Terrence Toyne? Loras: Bedded the king’s mistress and died screaming.

name: Bethany Bracken
quote: Wasn't there some Kingsguard who lost his head for bedding the Aegon_IV_Targaryen wife?

name: Bethany Rosby
quote: Brenett: Your Edmure_Tully need have no fear, Lady Catelyn_Stark. She's small, I'll grant you, and narrow in the hips, but her mother was the same, and Lady Bethany gave Lord Walder_Frey a child every year.Catelyn: How many lived past infancy?Brenett: Five. Ser Perwyn_Frey. Ser Benfrey. Maester Willamen_Frey, who took his vows last year and now serves Lord Hunter in the Vale. Olyvar_Frey, who squired for your Robb_Stark. And Lady Roslin_Frey, the youngest. Four boys to one girl. Lord Edmure will have more sons than he knows what to do with.

name: Blood (the butcher)
quote: It has to be a boy.

name: Bloodbeard
quote: If it please Your Grace, we want no part of him. Your Grace is too young to remember the Ninepenny Kings, but this Bloodbeard is cut from the same savage cloth. There is no honor in him, only hunger... for gold, for glory, for blood.

name: Bloodbeard
quote: Bloodbeard... that one has no taste for peace.

name: Bloodbeard
quote: Give me half a reason to dance with you, and we will see who is laughing at the end.

name: Bloodbeard
quote: He came to sack a city, and Hizdahr_zo_Loraq peace has cheated him of his plunder. He will do whatever he must to start the bloodshed.

name: Bobono
quote: Mercy, Mercy, come to my room tonight and make a man of me.

name: Bonifer Hasty
quote: Jaime: Can you hold Harrenhal with just your Holy Hundred? Bonifer: I anticipate no difficulty. The Crone will light our way, and the Warrior will give strength to our arms.

name: Bonifer Hasty
quote: Jaime: This castle has an ill repute, and one that's well deserved. It's said that Harren_Hoare and his sons still walk the halls by night, afire. Those who look upon them burst into flame. Bonifer: I fear no shade, ser. It is written in The Seven-Pointed Star that spirits, wights, and revenants cannot harm a pious man, so long as he is armored in his faith. Jaime: Then armor yourself in faith, by all means, but wear a suit of mail and plate as well.

name: Bonifer Hasty
quote: Sins may be forgiven. Crimes require punishment.

name: Bonifer Hasty
quote: Ser Bonifer himself had been a promising knight in his youth, but Rhaella_Targaryen had happened to him, a defeat or a disgrace or a near brush with death, and afterward he had decided that jousting was an empty vanity and put away his lance for good and all.

name: Bonifer Hasty
quote: His passion was impossible of course. A landed knight is no fit consort for Rhaella_Targaryen of royal blood.

name: Boremund Baratheon
quote: Lord Boremund was stone, hard and strong and unmoving. Lord Borros_Baratheon was the wind that rages and howls and blows this way and that.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Sansa: You look very handsome and splendid this morning, Ser Boros. Boros: And you, my lady.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Boros: The Sworn Brothers of the Kingsguard have always been knights. Sandor: Until now.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Tyrion: Is this your notion of chivalry, Ser Boros? What sort of knight beats helpless maids? Boros: The sort who serves Joffrey_Baratheon, Imp.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Jaime: Ser Boros, you look like a man who enjoys his food. Henceforth you'll taste everything Tommen_Baratheon eats or drinks. Boros: I am no food taster! I am a knight of the Kingsguard! Jaime: Sad to say, you are. Cersei_Lannister has told me how readily you yielded my nephew to Tyrion_Lannister sellswords. You will find carrots and pease less threatening, I hope. When your Sworn Brothers are training in the yard with sword and shield, you may train with spoon and trencher. Tommen loves applecakes. Try not to let any sellswords make off with them.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Ser Boros was the worst of the Kingsguard, an ugly man with a foul temper, all scowls and jowls.

name: Boros Blount
quote: That one is nothing to fear, girl. Paint stripes on a toad, he does not become a tiger.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Tyrion: Blount is a blustering coward. Varys: Is he? Oh dear. Still, the knights of the Kingsguard do serve for life, traditionally. Perhaps Ser Boros will prove braver in future. He will no doubt remain very loyal. Tyrion: To Tywin_Lannister.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Tywin_Lannister should never have restored him to the white. The man had proved himself a craven.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Boros the Belly? He's what, forty? Fifty? Half-drunk half the time, fat even when he's sober. If he ever had a taste for battle, he's lost it. Aye, Your Grace, if Ser Boros wants for killing, Osney_Kettleblack could do it easy enough.

name: Boros Blount
quote: Ser Boros tasted every dish that was set before Tommen_Baratheon. A humiliating duty for a knight of the Kingsguard, but perhaps all Blount was capable of these days ... and wise, after the way Joffrey_Baratheon had died.

name: Borroq
quote: Borroq: Brother.Jon: You'd best go on. We are about to close the gate.Borroq: You do that. You close it good and tight. They're coming, crow.

name: Borroq
quote: Jon: But now I find I cannot go to Hardhome. The ranging will be led by Tormund Giantsbane, known to you all. I have promised him as many men as he requires. Borroq: And where will you be, crow? Hiding here in Castle Black with your white dog? Jon: No. I ride south.

name: Borroq
quote: The company of men long dead seemed to suit him better than that of the living, and his boar seemed happy rooting amongst the graves, well away from other animals.

name: Borros Baratheon
quote: Go home, Lucerys_Velaryon, and tell the bitch Rhaenyra_Targaryen that the Lord of Storm's End is not a dog that she can whistle up at need to set against her foes.

name: Borros Baratheon
quote: It is not for me to tell you what to do when you are not beneath my roof.

name: Borros Baratheon
quote: Kermit: Yield, ser, the day is ours.Borros: I'd sooner dance in hell than wear your chains.

name: Borros Baratheon
quote: Lord Boremund_Baratheon was stone, hard and strong and unmoving. Lord Borros was the wind that rages and howls and blows this way and that.

name: Borys Baratheon
quote: Rather name me a kingslayer than Rogar_Baratheon a kinslayer!

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: Brothers and friends, I am asking that my name be withdrawn from this choosing. My wound still troubles me, and the task is too large for me, I fear ... but not for Lord Janos_Slynt here, who commanded the gold cloaks of King's Landing for many years. Let us all give him our support.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: We need to conserve what strength remains us. Every death diminishes us, and we are stretched so thin ... Take the high ground and win the battle, my uncle used to say. No ground is higher than the Wall, Lord Commander.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: The lord commander must pardon my bluntness, but I have no softer way to say this. What you propose is nothing less than treason. For eight thousand years the men of the Night's Watch have stood upon the Wall and fought these wildlings. Now you mean to let them pass, to shelter them in our castles, to feed them and clothe them and teach them how to fight. Lord Snow, must I remind you? You swore an oath.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: For the Watch.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: Mance: Then who commands at Castle Black? Jon: Bowen Marsh. Mance: If so, our war is won. Bowen knows a deal more about counting swords than he's ever known about using them.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: He's the man you want in front when the foes are in the field. He'll count them right up for you. A regular demon for counting, that one.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: Samwell: W-what if there was Jon_Snow? Could you s-support someone else? Cotter: Who? Bowen Marsh? The man counts spoons.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: So long as the Night's Watch remains in good hands, I am content. But Bowen Marsh is not equal to the task, no more than Othell_Yarwyck.

name: Bowen Marsh
quote: Bowen was a good man in his way, but the wound he had taken at the Bridge of Skulls had hardened his attitudes, and the only song he ever sang now was his familiar refrain about sealing the gates.

name: Brandon Norrey
quote: Jon: We cannot pick and choose amongst the free folk, saying this one may pass, this one may not. Peace means peace for all. Brandon: As well make peace with wolves and carrion crows.

name: Brandon the Builder
quote: Names such as Brandon the Builder, Garth_Greenhand, Lann_the_Clever, and Durran Godsgrief are names to conjure with, but it is likely that their legends hold less truth than fancy.

name: Brandon the Builder
quote: Thousands and thousands of years ago, Brandon the Builder had raised Winterfell, and some said the Wall.

name: Brandon the Builder
quote: No one can even say for certain if Brandon the Builder ever lived. He is as remote from the time of the novels as Noah and Gilgamesh are from our own time.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: That's a Brandon, the tall one with the dreamy face, he was Brandon the Shipwright, because he loved the sea. His tomb is empty. He tried to sail west across the Sunset Sea and was never seen again. His son was Brandon_Stark_(Burner), because he put the torch to all his father's ships in grief.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: We have had no strength at sea for hundreds of years, since Brandon the Burner put the torch to Brandon_Stark_(Shipwright) ships. Grant me the gold and within the year I will float you sufficient galleys to take Dragonstone and King's Landing both.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: It'd be an exaggeration to say that Brandon died before he could have children. It's established in the books that he was no virgin. He could very well have left behind some little Snows in the various places he visited. But what's absolutely clear is that he had no legitimate children.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: A bloody sword is a beautiful thing.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Brandon. Yes. Brandon would know what to do. He always did. It was all meant for Brandon. You, Winterfell, everything. He was born to be a King's Hand and father to queens. I never asked for this cup to pass to me.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Robert: What Aerys_II_Targaryen did to your brother Brandon was unspeakable. The way Rickard_Stark died, that was unspeakable. And Rhaegar_Targaryen... how many times do you think he raped Lyanna_Stark? How many hundreds of times?

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Eddard: I understand you knew my brother Brandon as well. Petyr: Rather too well. I still carry a token of his esteem. Did Brandon speak of me too? Eddard: Often, and with some heat.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: She remembered how Hoster_Tully had raged when the news had been brought to Riverrun. The gallant fool, was what he called Brandon.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Jaime: Brandon was different from Eddard_Stark, wasn't he? He had blood in his veins instead of cold water. More like me. Catelyn: Brandon was nothing like you. Jaime: If you say so.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Brandon was never shy about taking what he wanted. I am old now, a dried-up thing, too long a widow, but I still remember the look of my maiden's blood on his cock the night he claimed me. I think Brandon liked the sight as well. A bloody sword is a beautiful thing, yes. It hurt, but it was a sweet pain.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Bran: What are you doing to me?crow: Teaching you to fly.Bran: I can't fly!crow: You're flying right now.Bran: I'm falling!crow: Every flight begins with a fall.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Bran: Do trees dream?Luwin: Trees? No ...Bran: They do. They dream tree dreams. I dream of a tree sometimes. A weirwood, like the one in the godswood. It calls to me. The wolf dreams are better. I smell things, and sometimes I can taste the blood.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: I'd sooner be a wolf. Then I could live in the wood and sleep when I wanted, and I could find Arya_Stark and Sansa_Stark. I'd smell where they were and go save them, and when Robb_Stark went to battle I'd fight beside him like Grey Wind. I'd tear out Jaime_Lannister's throat with my teeth, rip, and then the war would be over and everyone would come back to Winterfell. If I was a wolf... Ooo-ooo-oooooooooooo. AAHOOOOOOO, OOOO-OOOO-OOOO.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: The stone is strong ... The roots of the trees grow deep, and under the ground the Kings of Winter sit their thrones. So long as those remained, Winterfell remained. It was not dead, just broken. Like me ... I'm not dead either.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Old stories are like old friends. You have to visit them from time to time.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: All the tales agreed that the green men had strange magic powers. Maybe they could help him walk again, even turn him into a knight. They turned the Howland_Reed into a knight, even if it was only for a day, he thought. A day would be enough.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Bran: I'm here, only I'm broken. Will you ... will you fix me ... my legs, I mean?crow: No. That is beyond my powers. You will never walk again, Bran, but you will fly.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Eddard: Gared died well, I'll give him that. I was glad for Bran's sake. You would have been proud of him.Catelyn: I am always proud of Bran.

name: Brandon Stark
