quote: He is a sweet boy, quick to laugh, easy to love. Let him grow up with the young princes, let him become their friend as Robert_I_Baratheon became mine.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: I prayed for it. He was my special boy. I went to the sept and prayed seven times to the seven faces of the god that Eddard_Stark would change his mind and leave him here with me.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: I may indeed have shit for honor, I won't deny it, but I have never yet Catspaw to do my killing. Believe what you will, Lady Stark, but if I had wanted your Bran dead I would have slain him myself.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: Innocent? The wretched boy was spying on us.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: He's our prince.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: The strongest trees are rooted in the dark places of the earth. Darkness will be your cloak, your shield, your mother's milk. Darkness will make you strong.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: No one had expected the broken boy to live. The gods could not kill Bran, no more than I could. It was a strange thought, and stranger still to remember that Bran might still be alive.

name: Brandon Stark
quote: They know. The gods know. They saw what I did. And for one strange moment it seemed as if it were Bran's face carved into the pale trunk of the weirwood, staring down at him with eyes red and wise and sad. Bran's ghost, he thought, but that was madness. Why should Bran want to haunt him? He had been fond of the boy, had never done him any harm. It was not Bran we killed. It was not Rickon_Stark. They were only miller's sons, from the mill by the Acorn Water.

name: Braxton Beesbury
quote: Jaehaerys: Any knight accused of wrongdoing has a choice. You can prove your innocence at hazard of your body. Braxton: Then I choose trial by combat. Which of these old men do you mean for me to fight? Jaehaerys: This old man. The one Saera_Targaryen you seduced and despoiled.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Brienne is well over six feet tall, but not close to seven, no. Just off the top of my head, I would say Brienne is taller than Renly_Baratheon and Jaime_Lannister and significantly heavier than either, but nowhere near the size of Gregor_Clegane, who is the true giant in the series. Shorter than Hodor and the Greatjon, maybe a bit shorter than the Sandor_Clegane, maybe roughly the same height as Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Winter will never come for the likes of us. Should we die in battle, they will surely sing of us, and it's always summer in the songs. In the songs all knights are gallant, all maids are beautiful, and the sun is always shining.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Brienne: Fighting is better than this waiting. You don't feel so helpless when you fight. You have a sword and a horse, sometimes an axe. When you're armored it's hard for anyone to hurt you.Catelyn: Knights die in battle.Brienne: As ladies die in childbed. No one sings songs about them.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Sansa_Stark, though ... I will find her, my lady, Brienne swore to Lady Catelyn_Stark restless shade. I will never stop looking. I will give up my life if need be, give up my honor, give up all my dreams, but I will find her.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Young or old, a true knight is sworn to protect those who are weaker than himself, or die in the attempt.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: I have to find Sansa_Stark. There are others looking, all wanting to capture her and sell her to Cersei_Lannister. I have to find her first. I promised Jaime_Lannister. Oathkeeper, he named the sword. I have to try to save her... or die in the attempt.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Seven, Brienne thought again, despairing. She had no chance against seven, she knew. No chance, and no choice.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Brienne the Beauty, they name her ... though not to her face, lest they be called upon to defend those words with their bodies.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Guyard: Hers was the hand that slew the king. Cortnay: A lie. I knew Brienne when she was no more than a girl playing at Selwyn_Tarth’s feet in Evenfall Hall, and I knew her still better when the Evenstar sent her here to Storm's End. She loved Renly_Baratheon from the first moment she laid eyes on him, a blind man could see it.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: There is a sweet innocence about you, child.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: She is stronger than I am. The realization chilled him.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: The light was so dim that Jaime could scarcely see her, though they stood a scant few feet apart. In this light she could almost be a beauty, he thought. In this light she could almost be a knight.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Loras: Draw your sword, woman!Jaime: Best hope she doesn't. Or it's like to be your corpse we carry out. The wench is as strong as Gregor_Clegane, though not so pretty.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Brienne's ugly, and pighead stubborn. But she lacks the wits to be a liar, and she is loyal past the point of sense.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Loras: Renly_Baratheon thought she was absurd. A woman dressed in man's mail, pretending to be a knight.Jaime: If he'd ever seen her in pink satin and Myrish lace, he would not have complained.Loras: I asked him why he kept her close, if he thought her so grotesque. He said that all his other knights wanted things of him, castles or honors or riches, but all that Brienne wanted was to die for him.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: Blue is a good color on you, my lady. It goes well with your eyes.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: You have a man’s strength in your arms, but your heart is as soft as any maid's. It is one thing to train in the yard with a blunted sword in hand, and another to drive a foot of sharpened steel into a man’s gut and see the light go out of his eyes.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: It is said that Selwyn_Tarth is a good man. If so, I pity him. Some men are blessed with sons, some with daughters. No man deserves to be cursed with such as you.

name: Brienne Tarth
quote: The queen remembered the Maid of Tarth, a huge, ugly, shambling thing who dressed in man's mail. Jaime_Lannister would never abandon me for such a creature.

name: Broken Nose
quote: Broken Nose: You girls put away them rocks and sticks before you get spanked. None of you knows what end of a sword to hold.Arya: I do!Broken Nose: Put the blade away, little girl, no one wants to hurt you.

name: Bronn
quote: Tyrion: Scum you may be, but you're undeniably useful, and with a sword in your hand you're almost as good as my brother Jaime_Lannister. What do you want, Bronn? Gold? Land? Women? Keep me alive, and you'll have it. Bronn: And if you die?Tyrion: Why then, I'll have one mourner whose grief is sincere. The gold ends when I do.

name: Bronn
quote: Tyrion: How do you know which ones to hire? Bronn: I look them over. I question them, to learn where they've fought and how well they lie. And then I give them a chance to kill me, while I do the same for them. Tyrion: Have you killed any? Bronn: No one we could have used.

name: Bronn
quote: Tyrion: Tell me, Bronn. If I told you to kill a babe ... Barra, say, still at her mother's breast ... would you do it? Without question? Bronn: Without question? No. I'd ask how much.

name: Bronn
quote: By Tywin_Lannister command, I'm Ser Bronn of the Blackwater now, Imp. See you don't forget it.

name: Bronn
quote: Bronn: I like you well enough, ugly little whoreson that you are ... but if I fight your battle, I lose either way. Either Gregor_Clegane spills my guts, or I kill him and lose Stokeworth. I sell my sword, I don't give it away. I'm not Jaime_LannisterTyrion: No. You're not. Begone, then. Run to Stokeworth and Lady Lollys_Stokeworth. May you find more joy in your marriage bed than I ever found in Sansa_Stark. Bronn: What will you do, Imp?Tyrion: Kill Gregor myself. Won't that make for a jolly song?Bronn: I hope I hear them sing it. .

name: Bronn
quote: Courage he had, and strength, but there was no kindness in him, and little loyalty.

name: Bronn
quote: She had seen Bronn fight on the high road; it was no accident that he had survived the journey while other men had died. He moved like a panther, and that ugly sword of his seemed a part of his arm.

name: Bronn
quote: And this is Bronn, a sellsword of no particular allegiance. He has already changed sides twice in the short time I've known him, you and he ought to get on famously, Father.

name: Bronn
quote: Every lord has need of a beast from time to time ... a lesson you seem to have learned, judging from Ser Bronn and those clansmen of yours.

name: Bronn
quote: Is it your fault that Bronn's an insolent black-hearted rogue? He’s always been an insolent black-hearted rogue. That's what I liked about him.

name: Bronn
quote: Bronn was no knight, that was true. Bronn was a battle-hardened killer.

name: Bronn
quote: Tyrion: You will find, Ben_Plumm, that I can be very generous to my friends. If you doubt me, ask Bronn. Ask Shagga, son of Dolf. Ask Timett, son of Timett_(father). Tybero: And who would they be? Tyrion: Good men who pledged me their swords and prospered greatly by that service. Oh, very well, I lied about the 'good' part. They're bloodthirsty bastards, like you lot.

name: Bryce Caron
quote: Bryce: No man here is a turncloak, ser. My fealty belongs to Storm's End, and King Stannis_Baratheon is its rightful lord... and our true king. He is the last of House Baratheon, Robert_I_Baratheon heir and Renly_Baratheon. Cortnay: If that is so, why is the Loras_Tyrell not among you? And where is Mathis_Rowan? Randyll_Tarly? Arwyn_Oakheart? Why are they not here in your company, they who loved Renly best? Where is Brienne_Tarth, I ask you?

name: Bryce Caron
quote: Jon: I would gladly take this challenge myself, though I'm not half the swordsman Lord Caron is, or Ser Guyard_Morrigen. Renly_Baratheon left no notable knights at Storm's End. Garrison duty is for old men and green boys. Bryce: An easy victory, to be sure. And what glory, to win Storm's End with a single stroke! Stannis: You chatter like magpies, and with less sense. I will have quiet.

name: Bryce Caron
quote: Your Grace, if Melisandre is with us, afterward men will say it was her victory, not yours. They will say you owe your crown to her spells.

name: Bryce Caron
quote: Davos: Bryce the Orange, of the Rainbow Guard. Cressen: The Rainbow Guard? Davos: Renly_Baratheon made his own Kingsguard, but these seven don't wear white. Each one has his own color.

name: Bryce Caron
quote: You wear your cloak of many colors, I see. The one Renly_Baratheon gave you when you swore your oath to protect him. If he is dead, how is it you are not?

name: Bryce Caron
quote: And Lord Caron and the others who like to kick will want to take up Ser Cortnay_Penrose gauntlet and hazard all upon a single combat. Each one imagining he will be my champion and win undying fame.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: Treason is no less vile because the traitor proves a craven.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: There have always been Targaryens who dreamed of things to come, since long before the Conquest.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: I wore many names when I was quick, but even I had Melissa_Blackwood, and the name she gave me at her breast was Brynden.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: I have my own ghosts, Bran. A brother that I loved, Aegor_Rivers, Shiera_Seastar. Through the trees, I see them still, but no word of mine has ever reached them. The past remains the past. We can learn from it, but we cannot change it.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: The Mother marked Lord Rivers on the day that he was born, and Aegor_Rivers marked him once again upon the Redgrass Field.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: How many eyes does Lord Bloodraven have? the riddle ran. A thousand eyes, and one. Some claimed the King's Hand was a student of the dark arts who could change his face, put on the likeness of a one-eyed dog, even turn into a mist. Packs of gaunt gray wolves hunted down his foes, men said, and carrion crows spied for him and whispered secrets in his ear. Most of the tales were only tales, Dunk did not doubt, but no one could doubt that Bloodraven had informers everywhere.

name: Brynden Rivers
quote: Lord Bloodraven is a sorceror and a bastard.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: I asked Lysa_Arryn for leave to take a thousand seasoned men and ride for Riverrun with all haste. Do you know what she told me? 'The Vale cannot spare a thousand swords, nor even one, Uncle,' she said. 'You are the Knight of the Gate. Your place is here.' Well, I told her she could bloody well find herself a new Knight of the Gate. Black fish or no, I am still a Tully. I shall leave for Riverrun by evenfall.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Catelyn: He says he is too sick to fight.Brynden: I am too old a soldier to believe that. Hoster_Tully will be chiding me about the Bethany_Redwyne even as we light his funeral pyre, damn his bones.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Peace. Peace is sweet, my lady ... but on what terms? It is no good hammering your sword into a plowshare if you must forge it again on the morrow.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Brynden: That thing's not crimson. Nor Tully red, the mud red of the river. That's blood up there, child, smeared across the sky.Catelyn: Our blood or theirs?Brynden: Was there ever a war where only one side bled?

name: Brynden Tully
quote: My first rule of war, Cat—never give the enemy his wish.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Brynden: I am the last man in the Seven Kingdoms to tell anyone who they must wed, Nephew. Nonetheless, you did say something of making amends for your Battle of the Fords.Edmure: I had in mind a different sort of amends. Single combat with the Jaime_Lannister. Seven years of penace as a begging brother. Swimming the sunset sea with my legs tied. The Others take you all! Very well, I'll wed Roslin_Frey. As amends.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Jaime: Some might say a cripple and an old man are well matched. Free me from my vow to Lady Catelyn_Stark and I will meet you sword to sword. If I win, Riverrun is ours. If you slay me, we'll lift the siege.Brynden: Much as I would welcome the chance to take that golden sword away from you and cut out your black heart, your promises are worthless. I would gain nothing from your death but the pleasure of killing you, and I will not risk my own life for that ... as small a risk as that may be.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: The Blackfish. Thank you for joining us, ser. We need men of your courage.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Ser Brynden Tully was Robb_Stark eyes and ears, the commander of his scouts and outriders.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Small chance the Blackfish will pay good coin for Arya_Stark he doesn't know. Those Tullys are a sour, suspicious lot, he's like to think we're selling him false goods.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Resolve is one thing Brynden Blackfish never lacked for. Hoster_Tully could have told you that.

name: Brynden Tully
quote: Tully had a craggy face, deeply lined and windburnt beneath a shock of stiff grey hair, but Jaime could still see the great knight who once enthralled a squire with tales of the Ninepenny Kings.

name: Butterwell (Hand of the King)
quote: Lord Butterwell was renowned for wit, Myles_Smallwood for courage, Ser Otto_Hightower for learning, yet they failed as Hands, every one.

name: Byan Votyris
quote: Take this one away to await the pleasure of the khal. His goods I gift to you as well, Princess. Small token of regret, that one of mine would do this thing.

name: Byan Votyris
quote: A dozen caravan guards had come running. With them was the master himself, Merchant Captain Byan Votyris, a diminutive Norvoshi with skin like old leather and a bristling blue mustachio that swept up to his ears. He seemed to know what had happened without a word being spoken.

name: Byron the Beautiful
quote: Petyr: I was just now telling these good knights what a Sansa_Stark I had. Byron: Dutiful and beautiful.

name: Caggo
quote: Caggo Corpsekiller the men were calling him now, though not to his face; he was quick to anger, and that curved black sword of his was as nasty as its owner.

name: Caleotte
quote: Shall I fetch my prince a thimble cup of milk of the poppy?

name: Caleotte
quote: Despite his age and girth, he was still nimble enough, and clever as they came, but meek. He is no match for any Sand Snake, the captain thought.

name: Captain's sister
quote: Brienne: Your door is very pretty. What castle is that meant to be?The captain's sister: All castles. The only one I know is the Dun Fort by the harbour. I made t'other in my head, what a castle ought to look like. I never seen a dragon neither, nor a griffin, nor a unicorn.

name: Captain of the Myraham
quote: We're out of Oldtown, bearing apples and oranges, wines from the Arbor, feathers from the Summer Isles. I have pepper, woven leathers, a bolt of Myrish lace, mirrors for milady, a pair of Oldtown woodharps sweet as any you ever heard. And I've brought your Theon_Greyjoy back to you.

name: Cassana Estermont
quote: I stopped believing in gods the day I saw the Windproud break up across the bay. Any gods so monstrous as to drown my mother and Steffon_Baratheon would never have my worship, I vowed.

name: Cassana Estermont
quote: The Estermonts were her good-kin through Robert, whose Steffon_Baratheon had taken one of them to wife in what must have been a fit of lust or madness.

name: Cassandra Baratheon
quote: I have four daughters. Choose any one you like. Cass is oldest, she'll be first to flower, but Floris_Baratheon is prettier. And if it’s a clever wife you want, there's Maris_Baratheon.

name: Cassandra Baratheon
quote: She will give me strong sons, worthy of the Iron Throne.

name: Cassella Vaith
quote: Duncan: I don't know how to talk with highborn ladies. We both might have been killed in Dorne, on account of what I said to Lady Vaith. Aegon: Lady Vaith was mad, but you could have been more gallant. Ladies like it when you're gallant.

name: Lady Caswell
quote: You shall receive the same terms you gave my nephew Maelor_Targaryen.

name: Lady Caswell
quote: No castle can be held against a dragon.

name: Lady Caswell
quote: Have mercy on my children, Ormund_Hightower.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: My son lies here broken and dying, Luwin, and you wish to discuss a new master of horse? Do you think I care what happens in the stables? Do you think it matters to me one whit? I would gladly butcher every horse in Winterfell with my own hands if it would open Bran_Stark eyes, do you understand that? Do you?

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Catelyn: A woman can rule as wisely as a man. Brynden: The right woman can. Make no mistake, Cat. Lysa_Arryn is not you.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: I was born a Tully and wed to Eddard_Stark. I do not frighten easily.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Robb, if that sword could bring him back, I should never let you sheathe it until Eddard_Stark stood at my side once more... but he is gone, and a hundred Whispering Woods will not change that.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: If I must trade our four Lannisters for their two Starks, I will call that a bargain and thank the gods. I want you safe, Robb, ruling at Winterfell from Eddard_Stark's seat. I want you to live your life, to kiss a girl and wed a woman and father a son. I want to write an end to this. I want to go home, my lords, and weep for my husband.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: I want to weep, she thought. I want to be comforted. I'm so tired of being strong. I want to be foolish and frightened for once. Just for a small while, that's all ... a day ... an hour.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: It is a monstrous cruel thing to lose a child.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Wars need not be fought until the last drop of blood.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Catelyn: On my honor as a Tully, on my honor as a Stark, I will trade your boy's life for Robb_Stark's. A son for a son. Walder: A son for a son, heh. But that's Aegon_Frey_(son_of_Stevron) ... and he never was much use.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: All his life Tyrion had prided himself on his cunning, the only gift the gods had seen fit to give him, yet this seven-times-damned she-wolf Catelyn Stark had outwitted him at every turn. The knowledge was more galling than the bare fact of his abduction.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Catelyn Stark might take a man prisoner, but she'd never stoop to rob him. That wouldn't be honorable.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: You have courage. Not battle courage perhaps but ... I don't know ... a kind of woman's courage.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Hang them.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: She don't speak. You bloody bastards cut her throat too deep for that. But she remembers.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Her cloak and collar hid the gash Raymund_Frey's blade had made, but her face was even worse than he remembered. The flesh had gone pudding soft in the water and turned the color of curdled milk. Half her hair was gone and the rest had turned as white and brittle as a crone’s. Beneath her ravaged scalp, her face was shredded skin and black blood where she had raked herself with her nails. But her eyes were the most terrible thing. Her eyes saw him, and they hated.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: And there's this other band, led by this woman Stoneheart... Lord Beric_Dondarrion lover, according to one tale. Supposedly she was hanged by the Freys, but Dondarrion kissed her and brought her back to life, and now she cannot die, no more than he.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Brienne: Lady Catelyn? They said... they said that you were dead. Thoros: She is. The Freys slashed her throat from ear to ear. When we found her by the river she was three days dead. Harwin begged me to give her the kiss of life, but it had been too long. I would not do it, so Lord Beric_Dondarrion put his lips to hers instead, and the flame of life passed from him to her. And... she rose. May the Lord of Light protect us. She rose.

name: Catelyn Stark
quote: Brienne: What does she want of me? Lem: She wants Robb_Stark alive, or the men who killed him dead. She wants to feed the crows, like they did at the Red Wedding. Freys and Boltons, aye. We'll give her those, as many as she likes. All she asks from you is Jaime_Lannister.

name: Catspaw
quote: You weren't s'posed to be here.

name: Catspaw
quote: He was a small, dirty man in filthy brown clothing, and he stank of horses. Catelyn knew all the men who worked in their stables, and he was none of them. He was gaunt, with limp blond hair and pale eyes deep-sunk in a bony face, and there was a dagger in his hand.

name: Catspaw
quote: Rodrik: Lady Stark, did you chance to notice the dagger the killer used? Catelyn: The circumstances did not allow me to examine it closely, but I can vouch for its edge. Why do you ask? Rodrik: We found the knife still in the villain's grasp. It seemed to me that it was altogether too fine a weapon for such a man, so I looked at it long and hard. The blade is Valyrian steel, the hilt dragonbone. A weapon like that has no business being in the hands of such as him. Someone gave it to him.

name: Catspaw
quote: Some poxy lackwit willing to risk his life for Joffrey_Baratheon favor and a little coin.

name: Cellador
quote: Jon: Eddard_Stark used to tell me that a man must know his enemies. We understand little of the wights and less about the Others. We need to learn. Cellador: I think this most unwise, Lord Snow. I shall pray to the Crone to lift her shining lamp and lead you down the path of wisdom.

name: Cellador
quote: Salvation can be found only through the Seven.

name: Cellador
quote: Hungry was not the word Jon would have used. Septon Cellador appeared confused and groggy and in dire need of some scales from the dragon that had flamed him, whilst First Builder Othell_Yarwyck looked as if he had swallowed something he could not quite digest.

name: Cerrick
quote: Count yourself fortunate that I am ironborn. The priests of the Drowned God know how to drown a man and bring him back, and I have made a study of their beliefs and customs.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die. There is no middle ground.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Jaime_Lannister and I are more than brother and sister. We are one person in two bodies. We shared a womb together. He came into this world holding my foot, our old maester said. When he is in me, I feel ... whole.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: A true man does what he will, not what he must.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: A woman's life is nine parts mess to one part magic, you'll learn that soon enough... and the parts that look like magic often turn out to be messiest of all.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Love is poison. A sweet poison, yes, but it will kill you all the same.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: The only way to keep your people loyal is to make certain they fear you more than they do the enemy.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: I waited, and so can Tommen_Baratheon. I waited half my life. She had played the dutiful daughter, the blushing bride, the pliant wife. She had suffered Robert_I_Baratheon drunken groping, Jaime_Lannister jealousy, Renly_Baratheon mockery, Varys with his titters, Stannis_Baratheon endlessly grinding his teeth. She had contended with Jon_Arryn, Eddard_Stark, and her vile, treacherous, murderous Tyrion_Lannister, all the while promising herself that one day it would be her turn. If Margaery_Tyrell thinks to cheat me of my hour in the sun, she had bloody well think again.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Come at once. Help me. Save me. I need you now as I have never needed you before. I love you. I love you. I love you. Come at once.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: I am a lioness. I will not cringe for them.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: She was as beautiful as men said. A jeweled tiara gleamed amidst her long golden hair, its emeralds a perfect match for the green of her eyes.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: And Cersei ... I have Jon_Arryn to thank for her. I had no wish to marry after Lyanna_Stark was taken from me, but Jon said the realm needed an heir. Cersei Lannister would be a good match, he told me, she would bind Lord Tywin_Lannister to me should Viserys_Targaryen ever try to win back Aerys_II_Targaryen throne. I loved that old man, I swear it, but now I think he was a bigger fool than Moon_Boy. Oh, Cersei is lovely to look at, truly, but cold ... the way she guards her cunt, you’d think she had all the gold of Casterly Rock between her legs.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: The longer Cersei waits, the angrier she'll become, and anger makes her stupid. I much prefer angry and stupid to composed and cunning.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: I have never liked you, Cersei, but you were my own sister, so I never did you harm. You've ended that. I will hurt you Alayaya. I don't know how yet, but give me time. A day will come when you think yourself safe and happy, and suddenly your joy will turn to ashes in your mouth, and you'll know the debt is paid.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: They are knights now, all three, and your sister has promised them further advancement. And the eldest, Ser Osmund_Kettleblack of the Kingsguard, dreams of certain other ... favors ... as well. You can match the queen coin for coin, I have no doubt, but she has a second purse that is quite inexhaustible.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Every man's a piece to start with, and every maid as well. Even some who think they are players. Cersei, for one. She thinks herself sly, but in truth she is utterly predictable. Her strength rests on her beauty, birth, and riches. Only the first of those is truly her own, and it will soon desert her. I pity her then. She wants power, but has no notion what to do with it when she gets it.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Cersei is a lying whore, she's been fucking Lancel_Lannister and Osmund_Kettleblack and probably Moon_Boy for all I know.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: His sister liked to think of herself as Lord Tywin_Lannister with teats, but she was wrong. Their father had been as relentless and implacable as a glacier, where Cersei was all wildfire, especially when thwarted. She had been giddy as a maiden when she learned that Stannis_Baratheon had abandoned Dragonstone, certain that he had finally given up the fight and sailed away to exile. When word came down from the north that he had turned up again at the Wall, her fury had been fearful to behold. She does not lack for wits, but she has no judgment, and no patience.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: Cersei is as gentle as King Maegor_I_Targaryen, as selfless as Aegon_IV_Targaryen, as wise as Aerys_II_Targaryen. She never forgets a slight, real or imagined. She takes caution for cowardice and dissent for defiance. And she is greedy. Greedy for power, for honor, for love.

name: Cersei Lannister
quote: This head of mine is worth a lordship... back in Westeros, half a world away. By the time you get it there, only bone and maggots will remain. My sweet sister will deny the head is mine and cheat you of the promised reward. You know how it is with queens. Fickle cunts, the lot of them, and Cersei is the worst.

name: Chataya
quote: My people hold that there is no shame to be found in the pillow house. In the Summer Isles, those who are skilled at giving pleasure are greatly esteemed. Many highborn youths and maidens serve for a few years after their flowerings, to honor the gods.

name: Chataya
quote: The gods made our bodies as well as our souls, is it not so? They gave us voices, so we might worship them with song. They gave us hands, so we might build them temples. And they gave us desire, so we might mate and worship them in that way.

name: Chataya
quote: A handsome woman. He had seldom seen such elegance and dignity in a whore. Though to be sure, she saw herself more as a kind of priestess. Perhaps that is the secret. It is not what we do, so much as why we do it.

name: Chayle
quote: The gods will take me when they see fit, though I scarcely think it likely that I'll drown, Bran.

name: Chayle
quote: I bear you no ill will, but you and your gods have no place here now.

name: Cheese (the rat-catcher)
quote: Helaena: Who are you? Cheese: Debt collectors. An eye for an eye, a son for Lucerys_Velaryon. We only want the one, t' square things. Won't hurt the rest o' you fine folks, not one lil' hair. Which one you want t' lose Your Grace?

name: Cheese (the rat-catcher)
quote: You hear that, little boy? Helaena_Targaryen wants you dead.

name: Cheese (the rat-catcher)
quote: Cheese knew the Red Keep better than the shape of his own cock.

name: Chella
quote: Chella: Why should we trust your word? Lowland lords have lied to the clans before. Tyrion: You wound me, Chella. Here I thought we had become such friends.

name: Chella
quote: We will ride with you, lion lord, but only if Tyrion_Lannister goes with us. He has bought his breath with promises. Until we hold the steel he has pledged us, his life is ours.

name: Chella
quote: Shae: M'lord Varys complimented Chella on her ears and said she must have killed many men to have such a fine necklace. And Chella told him only cowards kill the vanquished. Chella: Braver to leave the man alive, with a chance to cleanse his shame by winning back his ear. Only so can you prove you do not fear your enemies.

name: Chella
quote: Chella was a small hard woman, flat as a boy, and no fool.

name: Chella
quote: One is never quite safe when Chella daughter of Cheyk is about.

name: Chett
quote: Jon: Why shouldn't Samwell_Tarly be a steward? Chett: I'm a steward. You think it's easy work, fit for cowards? The order of stewards keeps the Watch alive. We hunt and farm, tend the horses, milk the cows, gather firewood, cook the meals. Who do you think makes your clothing? Who brings up supplies from the south? The stewards.

name: Chett
quote: He had liked the look of Craster's Keep, himself. Craster lived high as a lord there, so why shouldn't he do the same? That would be a laugh. Chett the leechman's son, a lord with a keep. His banner could be a dozen leeches on a field of pink. But why stop at lord? Maybe he should be a king. Mance_Rayder started out a crow. I could be a king same as him, and have me some wives.

name: Chett
quote: He could see Bessa_(Hag's_Mire)'s face floating before him. It wasn't the knife I wanted to put in you, he wanted to tell her. I picked you flowers, wild roses and tansy and goldencups, it took me all morning.

name: Chett
quote: Chett had a wen on his neck the size of a pigeon's egg, and a face red with boils and pimples. Perhaps that was why he always seemed so angry.

name: Chezdhar zo Rhaezn
quote: None of the poor bastards can run unless they all run... and if they do all run, they won't run very fast.

name: Chiggen
quote: Chiggen: Want a taste, dwarf?Tyrion: My brother Jaime_Lannister gave me that mare for my twenty-third name day.Chiggen: Thank him for us, then. If you ever see him again. Tastes well bred.Bronn: Better if you fry it up with onions.

name: Chiggen
quote: Tyrion: You were quick enough to silence your friend Chiggen when he caught that arrow in his belly.Bronn: He was good as dead, and his moaning was bringing them down on us. Chiggen would have done the same for me ... and he was no friend, only a man I rode with.

name: Chiswyck
quote: Oho, a fierce one.

name: Chiswyck
quote: Hot Pie: I don’t want to go there. There's ghosts in there. Chiswyck: Baker boy, here’s your choice. Come join the ghosts, or be one.

name: Chiswyck
quote: She had killed Chiswyck with a whisper, and she would kill two more before she was through.

name: Clarence Crabb
quote: Dick: Ser Clarence Crabb would have wiped his hairy arse with your Perfect Knight, m'lady. If they'd ever have met, there'd be one more bloody head sitting on the shelf at the Whispers, you ask me. 'I should have used the magic sword,' it'd be saying to all the other heads. 'I should have used the bloody sword.' Brienne: Perhaps, but Ser Galladon was no fool. Against a foe eight feet tall mounted on an aurochs, he might well have unsheathed the Just Maid. He used her once to slay a dragon, they say.

name: Clarence Crabb
quote: I'm a Crabb. I got the same blood as old Ser Clarence. It's the sword that makes the lord, some say.

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: Godry: I had forgotten that you northmen worship trees. Clayton: What sort of god lets himself be pissed upon by dogs?

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: A sacrifice will prove our faith still burns true, Sire.

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: Suggs was an upjumped hedge knight, as crude as he was strong.

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: She had seen him at the nightfires, watching, his lips parted and his eyes avid. It is not the god he loves, it is the flames, she concluded.

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: Some men had faces that cried out for a beard. Ser Clayton's face cried out for an axe between the eyes.

name: Clayton Suggs
quote: He learned all he knows in the wynds of Flea Bottom. Were I to put you in his charge, he might strangle you with your own chain or scoop your eye out with a spoon.

name: Clegane (founder)
quote: Bitch tore into Tytos_Lannister's horse and would have done for my lord too, but my grandfather came up with the hounds. Three of his dogs died running her off. My grandfather lost a leg, so Lannister paid him for it with lands and a towerhouse, and took Clegane_(father_of_Gregor_and_Sandor) to squire. The three dogs on our banner are the three that died, in the yellow of autumn grass. A hound will die for you, but never lie to you.

name: Clement Piper
quote: I say what I mean straight out, like an honest man. But what would you know of the ways of honest men? You're a treacherous lying weasel, like all your kin. I'd sooner drink a pint of piss than take the word of any Frey.

name: Cleon
quote: I have given Astapor a butcher king.

name: Cleon
quote: Great Cleon bid me tell you not to be afraid. Astapor remembers. Astapor will not forsake you.

name: Cleon
quote: Daenerys: I should have gone to Astapor. Barristan: Your Grace could not have saved them. You warned King Cleon against this war with Yunkai. The man was a fool, and his hands were red with blood.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: Cleos: My lady, I knew naught of any escape. The Tyrion_Lannister said a Lannister must needs have a Lannister escort, on my oath as a knight— Catelyn: Arise, ser. I know no grandson of Walder_Frey would be an oathbreaker.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: Cleos: I know nothing of any— Catelyn: You know nothing.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: He is not a bold man, this one. More of a Frey than a Lannister, in truth.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: Your grandfather Lord Walder_Frey pledged me his support and that of House Frey. Many of your cousins and uncles rode with us in the Whispering Wood, but you chose to fight beneath the lion banner. That makes you a Lannister, not a Frey.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: Ser Cleos looked like a Weasel, fought like a goose, and had the courage of an especially brave ewe.

name: Cleos Frey
quote: What do we have here, an honest muttonhead or a lickspittle?

name: Cleos Frey
quote: Jaime: We were set upon by outlaws. Ser Cleos scattered them, but it cost his life. Emmon: The boy had courage, I always said so. It was in his blood. Genna: His bones should be interred beneath the Rock, in the Hall of Heroes. Jaime: When this war is done, I will find the place and send him home.

name: Cletus Yronwood
quote: Give Daenerys_Targaryen a kiss for me.

name: Cletus Yronwood
quote: Cletus: This will be a tale to tell our grandchildren. Willam: A tale to tell tavern wenches, you mean, in hopes they'll lift their skirts. Cletus: For grandchildren, you need children. For children, you need to lift some skirts.

name: Cletus Yronwood
quote: Cletus had been Quentyn's dearest friend for half his life, a brother in all but blood.

name: Cletus Yronwood
quote: A grand adventure, Cletus called it. Demon roads and stormy seas, and at the end of it the Daenerys_Targaryen in the world. A tale to tell our grandchildren. But Cletus will never father a child, unless he left a bastard in the belly of that tavern wench he liked. Willam_Wells will never have his wedding. Their deaths should have some meaning.

name: Clydas
quote: Jon: Do I intrude?Clydas: Not at all. I was mulling wine. Will my lord take a cup?Jon: With pleasure.

name: Clydas
quote: Alys: You do not wear a chain. Are you a maester?Clydas: No, but I have served Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I).

name: Clydas
quote: Jon: We have much to do before the gate is opened. Tormund and his people will need to be fed and clothed and housed. Some are sick and will need nursing. Those will fall to you, Clydas. Save as many as you can.Clydas: I will do my best, Jon. My lord, I mean.

name: Clydas
quote: He's sixty if he's a day. An old man. He only seemed young compared with Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I). Short and round, he had the dim pink eyes of some nocturnal creature.

name: Clydas
quote: Clydas tended to the ravens well enough, but he had not a tenth of Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) knowledge or experience, and even less of his wisdom.

name: Clydas
quote: Cellador would be half-drunk, and Clydas was a poor substitute for a real maester, but they were what he had.

name: Coldhands
quote: The world believes Bran_Stark is dead ... Let his bones lie undisturbed. We want no seekers coming after us. Swear it, Samwell of the Night's Watch. Swear it for the life you owe me.

name: Coldhands
quote: Bran: What happened to the men? The foes behind us? Coldhands: They will not trouble you. Bran: Who were they? Wildlings? Coldhands: They were foes. Bran: You killed them. You and the ravens. Their faces were all torn, and their eyes were gone. They were your brothers. I saw. The wolves had ripped their clothes up, but I could still tell. Their cloaks were black. Like your hands. Who are you? Why are your hands black? Coldhands: Once the heart has ceased to beat, a man's blood runs down into his extremities, where it thickens and congeals ... His hands and feet swell up and turn as black as pudding. The rest of him becomes as white as milk.

name: Coldhands
quote: Jojen: This ... Coldhands? Gilly: That wasn't his true name. We only called him that, Samwell_Tarly and me. His hands were cold as ice, but he saved us from the dead men, him and his ravens, and he brought us here on his elk.

name: Coldhands
quote: The direwolf did not like the way that Coldhands smelled. Dead meat, dry blood, a faint whiff of rot. And cold. Cold over all.

name: Coldhands
quote: I don't like him. And I don't trust him. Those hands of his are bad enough. He hides his face, and will not speak a name. Who is he? What is he? Anyone can put on a black cloak. Anyone, or any thing. He does not eat, he never drinks, he does not seem to feel the cold.

name: Coldhands
quote: Bran: The ranger ... Leaf: He cannot come. Bran: They'll kill him. Leaf: No. They killed him long ago.

name: Colemon
quote: Robert: I don't want to be leeched! Colemon: My lord, your blood needs thinning. It is the bad blood that makes you angry, and the rage that brings on the shaking.

name: Colemon
quote: Petyr: Robert_Arryn is fond of sweets, is he not? Colemon: Sweets? Petyr: Sweets. Cakes and pies, jams and jellies, honey on the comb. Perhaps a pinch of sweetsleep in his milk, have you tried that? Just a pinch, to calm him and stop his wretched shaking. Colemon: A pinch? One small pinch ... perhaps, perhaps. Not too much, and not too often, yes, I might try ...

name: Colemon
quote: Eddard: I have heard that you sent Maester Colemon away. Pycelle: I did, and I fear the Lady Lysa_Arryn will never forgive me that. Maybe I was wrong, but at the time I thought it best. Maester Colemon is like a son to me, and I yield to none in my esteem for his abilities, but he is young, and the young ofttimes do not comprehend the frailty of an older body. He was purging Lord Jon_Arryn with wasting potions and pepper juice, and I feared he might kill him.

name: Colemon
quote: Maester Colemon put something vile in my milk last night, I could taste it. I told him I wanted sweetmilk, but he wouldn't bring me any. Not even when I commanded him. I am the lord, he should do what I say. No one does what I say.

name: Colemon
quote: Colemon only wanted the best for his charge, Alayne knew, but what was best for Robert_Arryn and what was best for Lord Arryn were not always the same. Petyr_Baelish had said as much, and it was true. Maester Colemon cares only for the boy, though. Father and I have larger concerns.

name: Collio Quaynis
quote: And Collio, with that absurd Tyroshi accent! If you understand one word in three, count yourself fortunate.

name: Collio Quaynis
quote: Then the heralds summoned another singer; Collio Quaynis of Tyrosh, who had a vermilion beard and an accent as ludicrous as Symon_Silver_Tongue had promised. Collio began with his version of "The Dance of the Dragons," which was more properly a song for two singers, male and female. Tyrion suffered through it with a double helping of honey-ginger partridge and several cups of wine. A haunting ballad of two dying lovers amidst the Doom of Valyria might have pleased the hall more if Collio had not sung it in High Valyrian, which most of the guests could not speak.

name: Conn
quote: Tyrion: This hauberk I wear is large for me, but it should fit Conn nicely, and the battle-axe I carry would suit Shagga's mighty hand far better than that wood-axe he holds. Conn: The half man would pay us with our own coin.

name: Conn
quote: Kevan: By what right do you savages intrude on our councils? Conn: Savages, lowlander? We are free men, and free men by rights sit on all war councils.

name: Conn
quote: Tywin: It is said that the men of the mountain clans are warriors without fear. Conn: It is said truly.

name: Conn
quote: Conn might have been handsome if you washed him.

name: Lady Corbray
quote: Innocence and experience make for a perfect marriage.

name: Lady Corbray
quote: We have had a letter from Petyr_Baelish. He is on his way home, he says, and hopes to see his darling daughter soon. He writes that Lyonel_Corbray seems well pleased with his bride, and even more so with her dowry. I do hope Lord Lyonel remembers which one he needs to bed.

name: Lady Corbray
quote: The second Lady Corbray was sixteen, the daughter of a wealthy Gulltown merchant, but she had come with an immense dowry, and men said she was a tall, strapping, healthy girl, with big breasts and good, wide hips. And fertile too, it seems.

name: Corliss Penny
quote: Corliss: The gods of the north have unleashed this storm on us. Godry: False gods.

name: Corliss Penny
quote: Corliss: You northmen brought these snows upon us. You and your demon trees. R'hllor will save us. Artos: R'hllor will doom us.

name: Corliss Penny
quote: Corliss Penny, come over here. What sort of name is Penny? Is that how much your mother charged?

name: Corlys Velaryon
quote: Mayhaps the Seven have preserved me for this fight.

name: Corlys Velaryon
quote: My knees are old and stiff and do not bend easy.

name: Corlys Velaryon
quote: He likes his boats better than he likes me.

name: Corlys Velaryon
quote: His captains said they had never seen such a natural sailor.

name: Corlys Velaryon
quote: Seventy-nine years of age, he had served four kings and Rhaenyra_Targaryen, sailed to the ends of the earth, raised House Velaryon to unprecedented levels of wealth and power, married Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aemon) who might have been a queen, fathered dragonriders, built towns and fleets, proved his valor in times of war and his wisdom in times of peace. The Seven Kingdoms would never see his like again.

name: Cortnay Penrose
quote: A man who changes kings and gods the way I change my boots. As do these other turncloaks I see before me.

name: Cortnay Penrose
quote: Is it the justice of your cause you doubt, my lord, or the strength of your arm? Are you afraid I’ll piss on your burning sword and put it out?

name: Cortnay Penrose
quote: May the Others bugger your Lord of Light, and wipe his arse with that rag you bear.

name: Cortnay Penrose
quote: Stannis: A smuggler must be a fair judge of men. What do you make of this Ser Cortnay Penrose? Davos: A stubborn man.

name: Cortnay Penrose
quote: He throws my pardon in my face. Aye, and throws his life away in the bargain, and the lives of every man inside those walls. Single combat? No doubt he mistook me for Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Cosgrove
quote: Cosgrove is as fond of silver as the next man.

name: Cossomo
quote: Cossomo: It's magic. Arya: It's not. The mouse was up your sleeve the whole time. I could see it moving.

name: Lord Costayne (Daeron II)
quote: Egg: Rebel lords. Dunk: What do you mean? Egg: They were for the black dragon. Well, Lord_Shawney was, and Lord_Costayne_(Aerys_I) father. Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) and I used to fight the battle on Maester Melaquin's green table with painted soldiers and little banners. Costayne's arms quarter a silver chalice on black with a black rose on gold. That banner was on the left of Daemon_I_Blackfyre host.

name: Lord Costayne (Aerys I)
quote: It's death that one deserves, not justice!

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: Understand this, boy. I don't want the bloody job, and never did. I fight best with a deck beneath me, not a horse, and Castle Black is too far from the sea. But I'll be buggered with a red-hot sword before I turn the Night's Watch over to Denys_Mallister from the Shadow Tower.

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: Lord Snow, if you muck this up, I'm going to rip your liver out and eat it raw with onions.

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: The commanders at the Shadow Tower and Eastwatch were good men, but very different; Ser Denys_Mallister courtly and cautious, as chivalrous as he was elderly, Pyke younger, bastard-born, rough-tongued, and bold to a fault. Worse, the two men despised each other. The Jeor_Mormont had always kept them far apart, at opposite ends of the Wall.

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: Those look like Eastwatch men. Sailors on horses. Cotter Pyke always had more guts than sense.

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: Samwell, it is not my habit to speak unkindly of my brothers, but let us be frank ... the ironborn are a race of pirates and thieves, and Cotter Pyke was raping and murdering when he was still half a boy.

name: Cotter Pyke
quote: We are done with Eastwatch. We did not like it there. A queen should be mistress beneath her own roof. We found your Cotter Pyke to be an uncouth and unpleasant man, quarrelsome and niggardly.

name: Crackbones
quote: Crackbones fought a dragon too, but he didn't need no magic sword. He just tied its neck in a knot, so every time it breathed fire it roasted its own arse.

name: Cragorn
quote: Moqorro: And the man who blew the horn, what of him? Victarion: He died. There were blisters on his lips, after. His bird was bleeding too. The hawk, just here. Every feather dripping blood. I heard the man was all burned up inside, but that might just have been some tale.

name: Craster
quote: Jeor: These are bad times to dwell alone in the wild. The cold winds are rising.Craster: Let them rise. My roots are sunk deep.

name: Craster
quote: A godly man got no cause to fear such. I said as much to that Mance_Rayder once, when he come sniffing round. He never listened, no more'n you crows with your swords and your bloody fires. That won't help you none when the white cold comes. Only the gods will help you then. You best get right with the gods.

name: Craster
quote: Craster: Who calls me bastard?Karl: It's no more than all men know.

name: Craster
quote: Eddison_Tollett says Craster's a terrible savage. He marries his daughters and obeys no laws but those he makes himself. And Dywen told Grenn he's got black blood in his veins. His mother was a wildling woman who lay with a ranger, so he's a bas ...

name: Craster
quote: The man's half-mad, I won't deny it, but you'd be the same if you'd spent your life in this cursed wood. Even so, he's never turned a ranger away from his fire, nor does he love Mance_Rayder. He'll give us good counsel.

name: Craster
quote: Jon: At Winterfell one of the serving women told us stories. She used to say that there were wildlings who would lay with the Others to birth half-human children. Jeor: Hearth tales. Does Craster seem less than human to you? Jon: He gives his sons to the wood.

name: Craster
quote: Craster's blood is black, and he bears a heavy curse.

name: Cregan Karstark
quote: Jon: You are no guest of mine. You came to the Wall without my leave, armed, to carry off your niece against her will. Lady Alys_Karstark was given bread and salt. She is a guest. You are a prisoner. Your niece is wed. Cregan: Alys was promised to me. My lord father— Jon: Your father is a castellan, not a lord. And a castellan has no right to make marriage pacts.

name: Cregan Karstark
quote: Cregan: I see what you are, Snow. Half a wolf and half a wildling, baseborn get of Eddard_Stark and a whore. You would deliver Alys_Karstark to the bed of Sigorn. Did you sample her yourself first? If you mean to kill me, do it and be damned for a kinslayer. Stark and Karstark are one blood. Jon: My name is Snow.

name: Cregan Karstark
quote: Once Cregan gets a child by me they won't need me anymore. He's buried two wives already.

name: Cregan Karstark
quote: I should make his head a wedding gift for Lady Alys_Karstark and Sigorn, Jon thought, but dare not take the risk.

name: Cregan Stark
quote: Benjicot: Half your men will die, Lord Stark. Cregan: They died the day we marched, boy.

name: Cregan Stark
quote: Cregan: Small boys become large men in time, and a babe sucks down his mother's hate with his mother's milk. Finish these foes now, or those of us not in our graves in twenty years will rue our folly when those babes strap on their father's swords and come seeking after vengeance. Corlys: King Aegon_II_Targaryen said the same and died for it. Had he heeded our counsel and offered peace and pardon to his foes, he might be sitting with us here today. Cregan: Is that why you poisoned him, my lord?

name: Cregan Stark
quote: No knight of the Kingsguard should outlive his king when that king dies by violence.

name: Cregan Stark
quote: Whenever the Wolf of the North stalked into a room, Benjicot_Blackwood would recall that he was but three-and-ten, whilst Kermit_Tully and Oscar_Tully blustered and stammered and flushed as red as their hair.

name: Cregan Stark
quote: The city was his, to do with as he wished. The northman had taken it without drawing a sword or loosing an arrow. Be they king's men or queen's men, stormlanders or seahorses, riverlords or Perkin_the_Flea, highborn or low, common soldiers deferred to him as if they had been born to his service.

name: Cregan Stark
quote: When was a wolf ever moved by words?

name: Cregan Stark
quote: Oh, there, he's Cregan Stark. He fought with Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) once, and the Dragonknight said he'd never faced a finer swordsman.

name: Creighton Longbough
quote: I have the honor to be Ser Creighton, of whom the singers sing ... you will have heard of my deeds on the Blackwater, mayhaps.

name: Creighton Longbough
quote: A sword is only as good as the man who wields it.

name: Creighton Longbough
quote: When swords clash, you shall ne'er find Ser Creighton Longbough to the rear.

name: Creighton Longbough
quote: Hibald: As to portly knights, it is hard for any honest man to keep his belly round when so many lack for food ... though your Ser Creighton has not hungered, it would seem. Creighton: I have big bones.

name: Creighton Longbough
quote: If there was a song about Ser Creighton, it was not one Brienne had heard.

name: Cressen
quote: Talking gargoyles and prophecies in the sky. I am an old done man, grown giddy as a child again. Had a lifetime's hard-won wisdom fled him along with his health and strength? He was a maester, trained and chained in the great Citadel of Oldtown. What had he come to, when superstition filled his head as if he were an ignorant fieldhand?

name: Cressen
quote: When a maester donned his collar, he put aside the hope of children, yet Cressen had oft felt a father nonetheless. Robert_I_Baratheon, Stannis_Baratheon, Renly_Baratheon... three sons he had raised after the angry sea claimed Lord Steffon_Baratheon. Had he done so ill that now he must watch one kill the other? He could not allow it, would not allow it.

name: Cressen
quote: Melisandre: Now here is a riddle. A clever fool and a foolish wise man. A crown to match your chain, Lord Maester. Cressen: I need no crown but truth. Melisandre: There are truths in this world that are not taught at Oldtown.

name: Cressen
quote: Davos: My liege, Pylos is pleasant enough, but I cannot see the chain about his neck without mourning for Maester Cressen. Stannis: Is it his fault the old man died? I never wanted Cressen at that feast. He'd angered me, yes, he'd given me bad counsel, but I did not want him dead. I'd hoped he might be granted a few years of ease and comfort. He had earned that much, at least, but— but he died. And Pylos serves me ably.

name: Cressen
quote: Davos: Cressen had wisdom. Stannis: I trusted in his wisdom and your wiles, and what did they avail me, smuggler?

name: Cressen
quote: I had a maester on Dragonstone who was almost a father to me.

name: Criston Cole
quote: Seven save this realm if we seat Jacaerys_Velaryon on the Iron Throne. They will turn the Red Keep into a brothel. No man's daughter will be safe, nor any man's wife. Even the boys ... we know what Laenor_Velaryon was.

name: Criston Cole
quote: Aegon: My new Hand is a steel fist. We are done with writing letters. Criston: It is not for you to plead for support from your lords, like a beggar pleading for alms. You are the lawful king of Westeros, and those who deny it are traitors. It is past time they learned the price of treason.

name: Criston Cole
quote: We can begin here, the four of us. One of me against the three of you. Will that be enough to make a fight of it?

name: Criston Cole
quote: My white knight.

name: Criston Cole
quote: Ser Criston protects Rhaenyra_Targaryen from her enemies, but who protects the princess from Ser Criston?

name: Criston Cole
quote: When he looks at you, he sees the little girl you were, not the woman you've become, but I can teach you how to make him see you as a woman.

name: Criston Cole
quote: I saved my maidenhead for you. Take it now, as proof of my love. It will mean little and less to Laenor_Velaryon, and perhaps when he learns that I am not chaste he will refuse me.

name: Criston Cole
quote: I'll have no songs about how brave you died, Kingmaker. There's tens o' thousands dead on your account.

name: Criston Cole
quote: Criston the Kingmaker had set brother against sister and divided the Kingsguard against itself, bringing on the terrible war the singers named the Dance of the Dragons.

name: Criston Cole
quote: Loras: The heroes will always be remembered. The best. Jaime: The best and the worst. And a few who were a bit of both. Like him. Loras: Who? Ten black pellets on a scarlet field. I do not know those arms. Jaime: They belonged to Criston Cole, who served the Viserys_I_Targaryen and the Aegon_II_Targaryen. They called him Kingmaker.

name: Criston Cole
quote: My new Hand is a steel fist.

name: Cromm
quote: Tristifer: We cannot fight so many. Cromm: We can fight as many as come, pup. The more there are, the more the glory. Men will sing of us. Come the morrow we will feast beneath the sea. Hagen: If we die with dry feet, how will we find our way to the Drowned God's watery halls? Cromm: These woods are full of little streams. All of them lead to rivers, and all the rivers to the sea.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Daario: I count no day as lived unless I have loved a woman, slain a foeman, and eaten a fine meal ... and the days that I have lived are as numberless as the stars in the sky. I make of slaughter a thing of beauty, and many a tumbler and fire dancer has wept to the gods that they might be half so quick, a quarter so graceful. I would tell you the names of all the men I have slain, but before I could finish your dragons would grow large as castles, the walls of Yunkai would crumble into yellow dust, and winter would come and go and come again. Daenerys: Draw your sword and swear it to my service. Daario: My sword is yours. My life is yours. My love is yours. My blood, my body, my songs, you own them all. I live and die at your command, fair queen.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Better the butcher than the meat. All kings are butchers. Are queens so different?

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Daenerys: You boasted that you'd had a hundred women. Daario: A hundred? I lied, sweet queen. It was a thousand. But never once a dragon.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Daenerys: Where are you going? Daario: Out into your city, to drink a keg or two and pick a quarrel. It has been too long since I've killed a man. Might be I should seek out Hizdahr_zo_Loraq.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: I have seen how false men are. Very few are worthy of trust, and Daario Naharis is not one of them. Even his beard wears false colors.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: She had a city to take, and dreaming of kisses and some sellsword's bright blue eyes would not help her breach the walls of Meereen.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: She was a queen, and Daario Naharis was not the stuff of kings.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: He is a monster. A gallant monster, but a monster still.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: He has a sellsword's conscience, That is to say, none at all.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: If he did not betray her, he would master her. She did not know which of those she feared the most.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Daenerys_Targaryen loved her captain, but that was the girl in her, not the queen.

name: Daario Naharis
quote: Daenerys_Targaryen love for Daario is poison. A slower poison than the locusts, but in the end as deadly.

name: Dacey Mormont
quote: I have fought beside the Robb_Stark in every battle. He has not lost one yet.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: I would never marry her. She can barely read. She should find some lord in need of stupid children, for that’s the only sort he will ever have of her.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: He likes his boats better than he likes me.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: They don’t believe in the gods. I’d go to hell.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys: If she wants I can find a hundred men and line them up before her naked, and she can pick the one she likes. I would sooner she wed a lord, but if she prefers a hedge knight or a merchant or Spotted_Pate, I am past the point of caring, so long as she picks someone. Alysanne: A hundred naked men would frighten her. Jaehaerys: A hundred naked ducks would frighten her.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: Find her someone. Someone gentle, as she is. A kind man, who will never raise his voice or his hand to her, who will speak to her sweetly and tell her she is precious and protect her... against dragons and horses and bees and kittens and boys with boils and whatever else she fears.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: My precious princess.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: She was not old enough or strong enough to bear a child. We ought never have pushed her into marriage.

name: Daella Targaryen
quote: ... George had some new ideas for some of the names and the stories of the children who died young, and corrected some issues that came out of his original birth order (we actually got the names of all the kids quite late in the production of TWoIaF—literally a month before we had to finalize the book—so there was not much time to interrogate it). However, the stories of those who live to adulthood, as published in TWoIaF, do remain the same (just, of course, much more detailed).

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: The first and greatest of the Blackfyre Pretenders was the natural son of Daena_Targaryen, sister, betrothed, and (briefly) wife to King Baelor_I_Targaryen.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: Daemon was the name Daena_Targaryen gave to this child, for Prince Daemon_Targaryen had been the wonder and terror of his age, and in later days that was seen as a warning of what the boy would become.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: The rightful king, Daemon Blackfyre. The King Who Bore the Sword.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: With ax or lance or flail, he was as good as any knight I ever saw, but with the sword he was the Warrior himself. When Prince Daemon had Blackfyre in hand, there was not a man equal him ... not Ulrick_Dayne with Dawn, no, nor even the Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) with Dark Sister.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: Traitors have always paid with their lives.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: Daemon Blackfyre loved the Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV), and rose in rebellion when denied her.

name: Daemon I Blackfyre
quote: Daemon Blackfyre was a rebel and usurper.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: "John": I dreamed that you were all in white from head to heel, with a long pale cloak flowing from those broad shoulders. You were a White Sword, ser, a Sworn Brother of the Kingsguard, the greatest knight in all the Seven Kingdoms, and you lived for no other purpose but to guard and serve and please your king. You have dreamed the same dream, I know you have. Dunk: It makes no matter what I dream. Only a king can make a Kingsguard knight."John": I suppose that means I'll have to take the throne, then. I would much rather be teaching you to fiddle.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: Dunk: You're drunk. "John": Wonderfully drunk. Wine makes all things possible, Ser Duncan. You'd look a god in white, I think, but if the color does not suit you, perhaps you would prefer to be a lord? Dunk: No, I'd sooner sprout big blue wings and fly. One's as likely as t'other. "John": Now you mock me. A true knight would never mock his king.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: This pale white castle, you, a dragon bursting from an egg, I dreamed it all, just as I once dreamed of Aegon_Blackfyre Aemon_Blackfyre lying dead. They were twelve and I was only seven, so they laughed at me, and died. I am two-and-twenty now, and I trust my dreams.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: "John": Where are you going, ser? Dunk: To my bed, to sleep. I’m drunk as a dog. "John": Be my dog, ser. The night’s alive with promise. We can howl together, and wake the very gods.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: Daemon: They cannot cow us, for our cause is just. We'll slash through them and ride hell-bent for King's Landing! Sound the trumpets! We'll make another Redgrass Field today. Squire: Piss on that, fiddle boy. I'd rather live.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: I will fight you, or the coward Aerys_I_Targaryen, or any champion you care to name.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: His dreams will be the death of all of us.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: Daemon's mine. I will command his Kingsguard. You are not worthy of a white cloak.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: I wept when Bittersteel carried him off to exile, and again when Lord Gormon_Peake told me he was coming home. But then he saw you upon the road, and forgot that I existed.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: You would be surprised to know how many lords prefer their kings brave and stupid. Daemon is young and dashing, and looks good on a horse.

name: Daemon II Blackfyre
quote: There have always been Targaryens who dreamed of things to come, since long before the Conquest, so we should not be surprised if from time to time a Blackfyre displays the gift as well. Daemon dreamed that a dragon would be born at Whitewalls, and it was. The fool just got Aegon_V_Targaryen.

name: Daemon Sand
quote: He was a boy then, and bastard born, no fit consort for a princess of Dorne, he should have known better. And it was Doran_Martell will, not mine.

name: Daemon Sand
quote: Arianne: Be gentle with Teora_Toland, my lady. I remember when I was her age. Doran_Martell despaired of me, I'm sure. Daemon: I can attest to that.

name: Daemon Sand
quote: The man was as smug as he was comely. Of all the knights in Dorne, why did Doran_Martell chose this one to be my shield? He knows our history.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Dark Sister was made for nobler tasks than slaughtering sheep. She has a thirst for blood.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: The war will end when the heads of the traitors are mounted on spikes above the King's Gate, and not before.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Aemond: You were a fool to come alone. Daemon: Were I not alone, you would not have come. Aemond: Yet you are, and here I am. You have lived too long, nuncle. Daemon: On that much we agree.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Over the centuries, House Targaryen has produced both great men and monsters. Prince Daemon was both. In his day there was not a man so admired, so beloved, and so reviled in all Westeros. He was made of light and darkness in equal parts. To some he was a hero, to others the blackest of villains.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: On no account can Prince Daemon be allowed to ascend to the Iron Throne. He would be a second Maegor_I_Targaryen, or worse. Better the Rhaenyra_Targaryen than Lord Flea Bottom.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Make no mistake, should Rhaenyra_Targaryen ever sit the Iron Throne, it will be Lord Flea Bottom who rules us, a king consort as cruel and unforgiving as Maegor_I_Targaryen ever was. My own head will be the first cut off, I do not doubt, but Alicent_Hightower, my daughter, will soon follow.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Rhaenyra_Targaryen on Dragonstone is not the threat. No more than Thaddeus_Rowan and these traitors in the Reach. The danger is my uncle. Once Daemon is dead, all these fools flying our sister's banners will run back to their castles and trouble us no more.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Manfryd Mooton's captain of the guard: This thing is easily done. The prince sleeps beside Nettles, but he has grown old. Three men should be enough to subdue him should he try to interfere, but I will take six to be certain. Does my lord wish this done tonight? Manfryd Mooton's brother: Six men or sixty, he is still Daemon Targaryen.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Prince Daemon had been the wonder and the terror of his age.

name: Daemon Targaryen
quote: Prince Daemon, a rogue if there ever was one.

name: Daena Targaryen
quote: I was born to ride a dragon.

name: Daena Targaryen
quote: Daena was Targaryen to the bone; strong, beautiful, willful.

name: Daena Targaryen
quote: Lancel: Marriage requires consummation. King Baelor_I_Targaryen was made to wed his sister Daena, but they never lived as man and wife, and he put her aside as soon as he was crowned. Jaime: The realm would have been better served if he had closed his eyes and fucked her. I know enough of history to know that.

name: Daenaera Velaryon
quote: Brother, if it please you, we have brought your new queen.

name: Daenaera Velaryon
quote: She sparkled, and when she smiled, the singers in the gallery rejoiced, for they knew that here at last was a maid worthy of a song.

name: Daenaera Velaryon
quote: The sound of the queen's laughter was like music to this fool, so sweet that even Aegon_III_Targaryen was known to smile.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: She is so clever, she will be reading to me before long. She is going to be a great queen, I know it.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: You sound a queen already, laying down the law.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Alysanne: Daenerys is older. She is first in line; she should be queen. Jaehaerys: She shall be queen, when she and Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Jaehaerys_I) marry. They will rule together, just as we have.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Mother, I'm cold.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: How could this happen? What sin did she commit? Why would the gods take her? How could this happen?

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: It was unthinkable that a pureborn princess should die shivering, as if she were some common child. And yet she had. Even as they mourned for her and the sweet soul she had been, Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen and Alysanne_Targaryen must also have been confronting that awful realization. Mayhaps the Targaryens were not so close to gods as they had believed. Mayhaps, in the end, they too were only men.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: ... George had some new ideas for some of the names and the stories of the children who died young, and corrected some issues that came out of his original birth order (we actually got the names of all the kids quite late in the production of TWoIaF—literally a month before we had to finalize the book—so there was not much time to interrogate it). However, the stories of those who live to adulthood, as published in TWoIaF, do remain the same (just, of course, much more detailed).

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Whether Daenerys loved Daemon_I_Blackfyre, as those who rose for the Black Dragon later claimed, who could say? In the years afterward, Daenerys was never aught but a loyal wife to Prince Maron_Martell, and if she mourned Daemon Blackfyre, she left no record of it.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: The Water Gardens are my favorite place in this world, ser. Maron_Martell had them built to please his Targaryen bride and free her from the dust and heat of Sunspear. Daenerys was her name. She was sister to King Daeron_II_Targaryen, and it was her marriage that made Dorne part of the Seven Kingdoms. The whole realm knew that the girl loved Daeron's bastard brother Daemon_I_Blackfyre, and was loved by him in turn, but the king was wise enough to see that the good of thousands must come before the desires of two, even if those two were dear to him.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: As the children splashed in the pools, Daenerys watched from amongst the orange trees, and a realization came to her. She could not tell the highborn from the low. Naked, they were only children. All innocent, all vulnerable, all deserving of long life, love, protection. 'There is your realm,' she told Maron_Martell's_son, 'remember them, in everything you do.' Princess_of_Dorne_(mother_of_Doran) said those same words to me when I was old enough to leave the pools. It is an easy thing for a prince to call the spears, but in the end the children pay the price. For their sake, the wise prince will wage no war without good cause, nor any war he cannot hope to win.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Daemon_I_Blackfyre loved the first Daenerys, and rose in rebellion when denied her.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: A hundred years ago, Daenerys Targaryen came to Dorne to make a peace. Now Daenerys_Targaryen comes to make a war, and Quentyn_Martell will be her king and consort.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: I am blood of the dragon, she told herself. I am Daenerys Stormborn, Princess of Dragonstone, of the blood and seed of Aegon_I_Targaryen.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Jorah: You are your brother's sister, in truth. Daenerys: Viserys_Targaryen? Jorah: No. Rhaegar_Targaryen.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: If I look back I am lost.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Mirri: You are mad. Daenerys: Is it so far from madness to wisdom?

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: No, no, Jorah_Mormont, do not fear for me. The fire is mine. I am Daenerys Stormborn, daughter of dragons, bride of dragons, mother of dragons, don't you see? Don't you SEE?

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: A queen must listen to all. The highborn and the low, the strong and the weak, the noble and the venal. One voice may speak you false, but in many there is always truth to be found.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: It seems to me that a queen who trusts no one is as foolish as a queen who trusts everyone.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Do you know what it is like to be sold, squire? I do. Viserys_Targaryen sold me to Khal Drogo for the promise of a golden crown. Well, Drogo crowned him in gold, though not as he had wished, and I... my sun-and-stars made a queen of me, but if he had been a different man, it might have been much otherwise. Do you think I have forgotten how it felt to be afraid?

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Why do the gods make kings and queens, if not to protect the ones who can't protect themselves?

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: A dragon is no slave.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Mother of dragons, Daenerys thought. Mother of monsters. What have I unleashed upon the world? A queen I am, but my throne is made of burned bones, and it rests on quicksand. Without dragons, how could she hope to hold Meereen, much less win back Westeros? I am the blood of the dragon, she thought. If they are monsters, so am I.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Jorah: You are a queen. In Westeros. Daenerys: It is such a long way. I was tired, Jorah. I was weary of war. I wanted to rest, to laugh, to plant trees and see them grow. I am only a young girl. Jorah: No. You are the blood of the dragon. Dragons plant no trees. Remember that. Remember who you are, what you were made to be. Remember your words. Daenerys: Fire and Blood.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Armen: The tales are not the same. Dragons in Asshai, dragons in Qarth, dragons in Meereen, Dothraki dragons, dragons freeing slaves ... each telling differs from the last. Mollander: Only in details. All speak of dragons, and a beautiful young queen.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Daenerys is our hope. Tell them that, at the Citadel. Make them listen. They must send her a maester. Daenerys must be counseled, taught, protected.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: The frightened child who sheltered in my manse died on the Dothraki sea, and was reborn in blood and fire. This dragon queen who wears her name is a true Targaryen. When I sent ships to bring her home, she turned toward Slaver's Bay. In a short span of days she conquered Astapor, made Yunkai bend the knee, and sacked Meereen.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: Tyrion: If Daenerys is no more than a sweet young girl, the Iron Throne will cut her into sweet young pieces. Illyrio: Fear not, my little friend. The blood of Aegon_I_Targaryen flows in her veins.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: You are her perfect prince, agreed, bright and bold and comely as any maid could wish. Daenerys Targaryen is no maid, however. She is the widow of a Drogo, a mother of dragons and a sacker of cities, Aegon_I_Targaryen with teats. She may not prove as willing as you wish.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: I know that she spent her childhood in exile, impoverished, living on dreams and schemes, running from one city to the next, always fearful, never safe, friendless but for a brother who was by all accounts half-mad... a brother who sold her maidenhood to the Dothraki for the promise of an army. I know that somewhere upon the grass, her dragons hatched, and so did she. I know she is proud. How not? What else was left her but pride? I know she is strong. How not? The Dothraki despise weakness. If Daenerys had been weak, she would have perished with Viserys_Targaryen. I know she is fierce. Astapor, Yunkai and Meereen are proof enough of that. She has survived assassins and conspiracies and fell sorceries, grieved for a brother and Drogo and Rhaego, trod the cities of the slavers to dust beneath her dainty sandaled feet.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
quote: On wings of song I fly to you, Daenerys.

name: Daeron I Targaryen
quote: Jon: Daeron Targaryen was only fourteen when he conquered Dorne. Benjen: A conquest that lasted a summer. Your Boy King lost ten thousand men taking the place, and another fifty trying to hold it. Someone should have told him that war isn't a game.

name: Daeron I Targaryen
quote: King Daeron wrote with an elegant simplicity, and his history is rich with blood, battle, and bravery.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: Too many dragons are as dangerous as too few.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: He was a good king, everybody says so. He brought Dorne into the realm and made the Dornishmen our friends.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: A king's mercy is a poisoned gift. Daeron Targaryen left me life, but took my pride and dreams and honor.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: Egg: King Daeron was a good man. Why would you choose Daemon_I_Blackfyre? Eustace: Daeron... Daeron was spindly and round of shoulder, with a little belly that wobbled when he walked. Daemon stood straight and proud, and his stomach was flat and hard as an oaken shield. And he could fight.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: You can know a man by his friends, Egg. Daeron surrounded himself with maesters, septons, and singers. Always there were women whispering in his ear, and his court was full of Dornishmen. How not, when he had taken Myriah_Martell into his bed, and sold Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV) to Maron_Martell, though it was Daemon_I_Blackfyre that she loved? Daeron bore the same name as Daeron_I_Targaryen, but when his Dornish wife gave him a son he named the child Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II), after Baelor_I_Targaryen who ever sat the Iron Throne.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: The roads were not so safe as when Good King Daeron sat the Iron Throne.

name: Daeron II Targaryen
quote: In King Daeron's day, a man did not have to fear to speak his mind, but now?

name: Daeron II Targaryen
