quote: The whole realm knew that Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV) loved Daeron's bastard brother Daemon_I_Blackfyre, and was loved by him in turn, but the king was wise enough to see that the good of thousands must come before the desires of two, even if those two were dear to him.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Ormund: Ser Daeron the Daring.Daeron: My Lord is kind to say so, but the victory belongs to Tessarion.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Little boys should be more mannerly when men are speaking. I think Viserys_I_Targaryen did not beat you often enough. Take care I do not make up for his lack.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: I dreamed of you. You stay away from me, do you hear? You stay well away.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Aegon: Maekar_I_Targaryen is going to join the seven accusers. He says it is the only way to redeem Aerion_Targaryen honor, and Daeron's. Daeron: Not that I ever asked to have my honor redeemed. Whoever has it can keep it, so far as I'm concerned.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: My brothers have my measure when it comes to fighting and dancing and thinking and reading books, but none of them is half my equal at lying insensible in the mud.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: My dreams are not like yours, Ser Duncan. Mine are true.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: I'm doomed to some hell, I know. Likely one without wine.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Never you mind that one, ser. All he does is drink and talk about his dreams.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Baelor: Daeron has done this before. You should never have commanded him to enter the lists. He belongs on a tourney field no more than Aerys_I_Targaryen does, or Rhaegel_Targaryen. Maekar: By which you mean he'd sooner ride a whore than a horse.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Raymun: There's a wild tale of robber knights going about, but I'll wager the prince is just off drunk again. Duncan: Which prince is this now? Raymun: Maekar_I_Targaryen heir. Daeron, he's named, after Daeron_II_Targaryen. They call him Daeron the Drunken, though not in his father's hearing.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: Someday the dragons will return. My brother Daeron's dreamed of it, and King Aerys_I_Targaryen read it in a prophecy. Maybe it will be my egg that hatches. That would be splendid.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: The Baratheons have always had some queer notions, to be sure. It comes from their Targaryen blood, I should think. They tried to marry me to a Targaryen once, but I soon put an end to that.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: All three of the sons of Aegon_V_Targaryen had wed for love in defiance of their father's wishes. And because that unlikely monarch had followed his heart when he chose Betha_Blackwood, he allowed his sons to have their way, making bitter enemies when he might have made fast friends.

name: Daeron Targaryen
quote: The gods will not suffer a bastard to sit the Iron Throne.

name: Dagmer
quote: The day is won, and yet you do not smile, boy. The living should smile, for the dead cannot.

name: Dagmer
quote: Theon: There is no man in the Iron Islands half so skilled with spear or sword. Dagmer: You have been too long away, boy. When you left, it was as you say, but I am grown old in Balon_Greyjoy service. The singers call Andrik best now. Andrik the Unsmiling, they name him. A giant of a man. He serves Dunstan_Drumm of Old Wyk. And Black_Lorren and Qarl_the_Maid are near as dread. Theon: This Andrik may be a great fighter, but men do not fear him as they fear you. Dagmer: Aye, that's so.

name: Dagmer
quote: Rodrik_Cassel are more cunning than you think, or they would never have lived to see their first grey hair.

name: Dagmer
quote: He gave me more smiles than Balon_Greyjoy and Eddard_Stark together.

name: Dagmer
quote: His hair is white and his teeth are rotten, but he still has a taste for glory.

name: Dagmer
quote: If I had a man like you in my service, I should not waste him on this child's business of harrying and burning. This is no work for Lord Balon_Greyjoy best man...

name: Dagmer
quote: Old Nan said he couldn't be killed, that once a foe had cut his head in two with an axe, but Dagmer was so fierce he'd just pushed the two halves back together and held them until they healed up.

name: Dagmer
quote: Torrhen's Square was not a ruin like Moat Cailin, and Dagmer was iron to the bone. He would die before he'd yield.

name: Dagon Codd
quote: Theon: Give up your swords and come with me, and Ramsay_Snow will feed you and give you leave to march unmolested to the Stony Shore and find a ship for home. Elsewise you die. Dagon: Is that a threat? Dagon Codd yields to no man.

name: Dagon Codd
quote: A big man, but pop-eyed and wide of mouth, with dead white flesh. He looked as if his father had sired him on a fish, but he still wore a longsword.

name: Dagon Greyjoy
quote: That Dagon Greyjoy wants for hanging. Aye, but who's to hang him?

name: Dagon Greyjoy
quote: Duncan: Lord Beron_Stark is gathering swords to drive the krakens from his shores for good. Maynard: Too cold up there for me. If you want to kill krakens, go west. The Lannisters are building ships to strike back at the ironmen on their home islands. That's how you put an end to Dagon Greyjoy. Fighting him on land is fruitless, he just slips back to sea. You have to beat him on the water.

name: Dagon Greyjoy
quote: Old women on Fair Isle still frightened their grandchildren with tales of Lord Dagon and his men.

name: Dagon Greyjoy
quote: In Dagon's day Aerys_I_Targaryen sat the Iron Throne, his rheumy eyes fixed across the narrow sea where bastards and exiles plotted rebellion. So forth from Pyke Lord Dagon sailed, to make the Sunset Sea his own. He bearded the lion in his den and tied the direwolf's tail in knots, but even Dagon could not defeat the dragons.

name: Dagon Greyjoy
quote: Dagon the Drunkard, men called him, but drunk or sober he loved to fight.

name: Dalbridge
quote: It's always pretty women in my dreams. Would that I dreamed more often.

name: Dalla
quote: We free folk know things you kneelers have forgotten. Sometimes the short road is not the safest, Jon Snow. The Horned_Lord once said that sorcery is a sword without a hilt. There is no safe way to grasp it.

name: Dalla
quote: The good woman at the brazier is Dalla. Treat her like you would any queen, she is carrying my child.

name: Dalla
quote: It's a wise woman I've found. A true queen.

name: Dalla
quote: Fire is a cruel way to die. Dalla died to give Aemon_Steelsong life, but Gilly have nourished him, cherished him. You saved Monster from the ice. Now save hers from Melisandre.

name: Dalla
quote: Jon: Dalla told me something once. Val's sister, Mance_Rayder's wife. She said that sorcery was a sword without a hilt. There is no safe way to grasp it. Melisandre: A wise woman. A sword without a hilt is still a sword, though, and a sword is a fine thing to have when foes are all about.

name: Dalton Greyjoy
quote: Only the Drowned God may sunder the bond between a man and his salt wives.

name: Dalton Greyjoy
quote: The women of the west prefer men of iron to cowardly lions, it would seem, for they jump into the sea and plead with us to take them.

name: Dalton Greyjoy
quote: The storm is coming.

name: Dalton Greyjoy
quote: He loved three things: the sea, his sword, and women.

name: Damon
quote: Ramsay_Snow means to cut your lips off when all this is done.

name: Damon Morrigen
quote: Maegor: Let us not bandy words. Swords will decide this matter. Damon: Let each side have seven champions, as it was done in Andalos of old. Can you find six men to stand beside you?

name: Dancy
quote: Dancy: Is milord feeling unloved? I have a cure for that. Tyrion: You are too beautiful for words, sweetling, but I've grown fond of Alayaya's remedy. Dancy: You've never tried mine. Milord never chooses anyone but 'Yaya. She's good but I'm better, don't you want to see?

name: Dancy
quote: I don't think he wants to wait till next time. He wants to come out and count all my freckles, I think.

name: Dancy
quote: I'd hate to have the poor child lose her pearls on account of me.

name: Danelle Lothston
quote: Mad Danelle Lothston herself rode forth in strength from her haunted towers at Harrenhal, clad in black armor that fit her like an iron glove, her long red hair streaming.

name: Danelle Lothston
quote: My old ma used to say that giant bats flew out from Harrenhal on moonless nights, to carry bad children to Mad Danelle for her cookpots. Sometimes I'd hear them scrabbling at the shutters.

name: Danwell Frey
quote: Kennos: If the gods are good, they'll be swallowed up in quicksand or gobbled down by lizard-lions. Danwell: Or taken in by frogeaters. I would not put it past the crannogmen to shelter outlaws.

name: Danwell Frey
quote: It was, oh, a year ago, no more, Jon_Arryn was still the King's Hand, and I went to the city to see my sons ride in the tourney. Stevron_Frey and Jared_Frey are too old for the lists now, but Danwell and Hosteen_Frey rode, Perwyn_Frey as well, and a couple of my bastards tried the melee. If I'd known how they'd shame me, I would never have troubled myself to make the journey. Why did I need to ride all that way to see Hosteen knocked off his horse by that Loras_Tyrell? I ask you. The boy's half his age, Ser Daisy they call him, something like that. And Danwell was unhorsed by a hedge knight! Some days I wonder if those two are truly mine.

name: Dareon
quote: Dareon: The stewards are fine for the likes of you and me, Samwell_Tarly, but not for Lord Snow.Jon: I'm a better swordsman and a better rider than any of you. It's not fair.Dareon: Fair? Mathis_Rowan's_daughter was waiting for me, naked as the day she was born. She pulled me through the window, and you talk to me of fair?

name: Dareon
quote: Samwell: You should have asked Moonshadow for silver. It's coin we need, not kisses.Dareon: Some kisses are worth more than yellow gold, Slayer.

name: Dareon
quote: Dareon: Have a girl or go away, Sam. You're ruining my wedding.Samwell: I'll go, but you'll come with me.Dareon: No. I'm done with you. I'm done with black.

name: Dareon
quote: Hard beds, salt cod, and endless watches, that's the Wall. Besides, there's no one half as pretty as you at Eastwatch. How could I ever leave you?

name: Dareon
quote: Dareon, I am told that you sang at many a high lord's table and shared their meat and mead. We are sending you to Eastwatch-by-the-Sea. It may be your palate will be some help to Cotter_Pyke when merchant galleys come trading.

name: Dareon
quote: Gilly: That was pretty, Sam. You sing good."Samwell: You should hear Dareon. His voice is sweet as mead.

name: Dareon
quote: Dareon was supposed to be his brother. Ask him to sing, and no one could be better. Ask him to do aught else ...

name: Dareon
quote: The whores called him the black singer, but there was hardly any black about him now. With the coin his singing brought him, the crow had transformed himself into a peacock. Today he wore a plush purple cloak lined with vair, a striped white-and-lilac tunic, and the parti-colored breeches of a bravo, but he owned a silken cloak as well, and one made of burgundy velvet that was lined with cloth-of-gold. The only black about him was his boots. Cat had heard him tell Lanna_(Happy_Port) that he'd thrown all the rest in a canal. "I am done with darkness," he had announced.

name: Dareon
quote: He sings a pretty song. The gods must have loved him to give him such a voice, and that fair face as well.

name: Dareon
quote: Dareon had been a deserter from the Night's Watch; he had deserved to die.

name: Daughter of the captain of the Myraham
quote: Her father had forbidden her to come ashore, but whenever Theon came to Lordsport he spied her wandering forlornly about the deck.

name: Daughter of the captain of the Myraham
quote: Daughter: Milord, a moment. As it please milord... Esgred: Did she? Please milord?

name: Daven Lannister
quote: I vowed I would not let my hair be cut until Stafford_Lannister was avenged. The Robb_Stark got to Rickard_Karstark first, though. Robbed me of my vengeance. I like a bit of hair. The nights grow colder, and a little foliage helps to keep your face warm. Aye, and Aunt Genna_Lannister always said I had a brick for a chin.

name: Daven Lannister
quote: I told Tywin_Lannister I would forage for him, but he refused me. Some tasks are fit for lions, he said, but foraging is best left for Vargo_Hoat and Gregor_Clegane.

name: Daven Lannister
quote: You know the best thing about heroes, Jaime? They all die young and leave more women for the rest of us.

name: Daven Lannister
quote: Jaime: I hope you do not intend to take vows as well, coz. The Freys are prickly where marriage contracts are concerned. I would hate to disappoint them again. Daven: I'll wed and bed my stoat, never fear. I know what happened to Robb_Stark.

name: Daven Lannister
quote: Brynden: Ser Stafford_Lannister, it's said. Catelyn: Another nephew? Brynden: Cousin. Brother to Lord Tywin_Lannister late Joanna_Lannister, so twice related. An old man and a bit of a dullard, but he has a son, Ser Daven, who is more formidable. Catelyn: Then let us hope it is the father and not the son who takes this army into the field.

name: Daven Lannister
quote: For a man who looked so leonine, Daven Lannister sounded oddly sheepish.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: King Stannis_Baratheon is my god. He made me and blessed me with his trust.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Melisandre: Are you a good man, Davos Seaworth? Davos: I am a man. I am kind to Marya_Seaworth, but I have known other women. I have tried to be a father to my sons, to help make them a place in this world. Aye, I've broken laws, but I never felt evil until tonight. I would say my parts are mixed, m'lady. Good and bad. Melisandre: A grey man. Neither white nor black, but partaking of both. Is that what you are, Ser Davos? Davos: What if I am? It seems to me that most men are grey. Melisandre: If half of an onion is black with rot, it is a rotten onion. A man is good, or he is evil.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Seaworth had a lordly ring to it, but down deep he was still Davos of Flea Bottom, coming home to his city on its three high hills. He knew as much of ships and sails and shores as any man in the Seven Kingdoms, and had fought his share of desperate fights sword to sword on a wet deck. But to this sort of battle he came a maiden, nervous and afraid. Smugglers do not sound warhorns and raise banners. When they smell danger, they raise sail and run before the wind.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Stannis: I know the cost! Last night, gazing into that hearth, I saw things in the flames as well. I saw a king, a crown of fire on his brows, burning ... burning, Davos. His own crown consumed his flesh and turned him into ash. Do you think I need Melisandre to tell me what that means? Or you? If Joffrey should die ... what is the life of one Edric_Storm against a kingdom? Davos: Everything.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Kings and corpses always draw attendants.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Jared: The Red Wedding was the Young Wolf's work. He changed into a beast before our eyes and tore out the throat of my cousin Aegon_Frey_(son_of_Stevron), a harmless simpleton. He would have slain Walder_Frey too, if Ser Wendel_Manderly had not put himself in the way. Davos: Is it your claim that Robb_Stark killed Wendel Manderly? Jared: And many more. Mine own son Tytos_Frey was amongst them, and Garse_Goodbrook. When Stark changed into a wolf, his northmen did the same. The mark of the beast was on them all. Wargs birth other wargs with a bite, it is well-known. It was all my brothers and I could do to put them down before they slew us all. Davos: Ser, may I have your name? Jared: Ser Jared, of House Frey. Davos: Jared of House Frey, I name you liar.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: I was a better smuggler than a knight, he had written to his wife, a better knight than a King's Hand, a better King's Hand than a husband. I am so sorry. Marya, I have loved you. Please forgive the wrongs I did you.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: A good act does not wash out the bad, nor a bad act the good. Each should have its own reward. You were a hero and a smuggler.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: You have a passing clever father, Devan. He makes me wish I had more smugglers in my service. And fewer lords.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Cersei: Stannis_Baratheon has sent his onion smuggler to treat with White Harbor on his behalf. Wyman_Manderly has clapped the wretch inside a cell. He asks us what he should do with him. Orton: Send him here, that we might question him. The man might know much of value. Qyburn: Let him die. His death will be a lesson to the north, to show them what becomes of traitors. Cersei: I quite agree. I have instructed Lord Manderly to have his head off forthwith. That should put an end to any chance of White Harbor supporting Stannis. Aurane: Stannis will need another Hand. The turnip knight, perhaps?

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: Leona: An admiral without ships, a hand without fingers, in service to a king without a throne. Is this a knight who comes before us, or the answer to a child's riddle? Wyman: He is a messenger, good-daughter, an onion of ill omen. Stannis_Baratheon did not like the answer his ravens brought him, so he has sent this … this smuggler.

name: Davos Seaworth
quote: It's not a king I need but a smuggler.

name: Lord Deddings
quote: Lord and Lady_Deddings, that was so rich.

name: Del
quote: She's lucky, like your Ygritte. She's kissed by fire.

name: Delena Florent
quote: The mother was a Florent, niece to the Lady Selyse_Florent, one of her bedmaids. Renly_Baratheon says that Robert_I_Baratheon carried the girl upstairs during the feast, and broke in the wedding bed while Stannis_Baratheon and his bride were still dancing. Lord Stannis seemed to think that was a blot on the honor of his wife's House, so when the boy was born, he shipped him off to Renly.

name: Delena Florent
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon and Delena defiled our bed and laid a curse upon our union. Edric_Storm is the foul fruit of their fornications. Lift his shadow from my womb and I will bear you many trueborn sons, I know it. He is only one boy, born of your brother's lust and my cousin's shame.

name: Demon of Darry
quote: Jaime: You would do well to know about the lives of those who went before.Loras: I do. Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II), Ser Ryam_Redwyne, the Greatheart, Barristan_Selmy …Jaime: … Gwayne_Corbray, Alyn_Connington, the Demon of Darry, aye.

name: Denyo Terys
quote: Our walls are made of wood and painted purple. Our galleys are our walls. We need no other.

name: Denys Mallister
quote: We are the sons of great lords, you and I. We know the importance of birth, blood, and that early training that can ne'er be replaced. I was a squire at twelve, a knight at eighteen, a champion at two-and-twenty. I have been the commander at the Shadow Tower for thirty-three years. Blood, birth, and training have fitted me to deal with kings.

name: Denys Mallister
quote: It was a hard thing young Samwell_Tarly asked of me. When Lord_Commander_Qorgyle was chosen, I told myself, 'No matter, he has been longer on the Wall than you have, your time will come.' When it was Jeor_Mormont, I thought, 'He is strong and fierce, but he is old, your time may yet come.' But you are half a boy, Lord Snow, and now I must return to the Shadow Tower knowing that my time will never come. Do not make me die regretful. Benjen_Stark was a great man. Eddard_Stark and Rickard_Stark as well. I shall expect full as much of you.

name: Denys Mallister
quote: The commanders at the Shadow Tower and Eastwatch were good men, but very different; Ser Denys courtly and cautious, as chivalrous as he was elderly, Cotter_Pyke younger, bastard-born, rough-tongued, and bold to a fault. Worse, the two men despised each other. The Jeor_Mormont had always kept them far apart, at opposite ends of the Wall.

name: Denys Mallister
quote: Cotter: The man's too bloody old for the job, maybe you ought to go tell him that. We choose him, and we're like to be back here in a year, choosing someone else. Samwell: He's old, but he's well ex-experienced. Cotter: At sitting in his tower and fussing over maps, maybe. What does he plan to do, write letters to the wights? He's a knight, well and good, but he's not a fighter, and I don't give a kettle of piss who he unhorsed in some fool tourney fifty years ago. The Qhorin_Halfhand fought all his battles, even an old blind man should see that.

name: Denys Mallister
quote: The commander of the Shadow Tower had been born beneath the Booming Tower of Seagard, and looked every inch a Mallister.

name: Denzo D'han
quote: That was butchery, not battle.

name: Denzo D'han
quote: Let us be frank. The Yunkai'i do not inspire confidence. Whatever the outcome of this war, the Windblown should share in the spoils of victory. Our prince is wise to keep all roads open.

name: Denzo D'han
quote: Denzo was a captain, and veteran of a hundred battles. Frog's experience was limited to practice yard and tourney ground, so he did not think it was his place to dispute the verdict of such a seasoned warrior.

name: Desmera Redwyne
quote: Daven: Stafford_Lannister was treating with Paxter_Redwyne before Oxcross, did you know? Redwyne has a nicely dowered daughter ... Jaime: Desmera? How well do you like freckles? Daven: If my choice is Freys or freckles, well ... half of Lord Walder's brood look like stoats.

name: Desmond
quote: Desmond: Lord Eddard_Stark guarded night and day. He'll come to no harm. Arya: The Lannisters have more than fifty men. Desmond: So they do, but every northerner is worth ten of these southron swords, so you can sleep easy. Arya: What if a wizard was sent to kill him? Desmond: Well, as to that, wizards die the same as other men, once you cut their heads off.

name: Desmond
quote: You liar!

name: Desmond Grell
quote: Desmond: Would that Lord Hoster_Tully could have seen that. It would have made him dance. Catelyn: My father's dancing days are past, I fear, and this fight is just begun. The Lannisters will come again. Lord Tywin_Lannister has twice my brother's numbers. Desmond: He could have ten times and it would not matter. The west bank of the Red Fork is higher than the east, my lady, and well wooded. Our bowmen have good cover, and a clear field for their shafts ... and should any breach occur, Edmure_Tully will have his best knights in reserve, ready to ride wherever they are most sorely needed. The river will hold them. Catelyn: I pray that you are right.

name: Desmond Grell
quote: Desmond: Oh, if only I might have been with him. Where is that fool Rymund_the_Rhymer? There's a song in this, by the gods, and one that even Edmure_Tully will want to hear. The mill that ground the Gregor_Clegane down, I could almost make the words myself, had I the singer's gift. Catelyn: I'll hear no songs until the fighting's done.

name: Desmond Grell
quote: Desmond: Your sons. Maester Vyman told us. The poor lads. Terrible. Terrible. But ... Utherydes: We share your grief, my lady. All Riverrun mourns with you, but ... Desmond: The news must have driven you mad, a madness of grief, a mother's madness, men will understand. You did not know ... Catelyn: I did. I understood what I was doing and knew it was treasonous. If you fail to punish me, men will believe that we connived together to free Jaime_Lannister. It was mine own act and mine alone, and I alone must answer for it.

name: Desmond Grell
quote: This castle's been my home for forty years. You say I'm free to go, but where? I'm too old and too stout to make a hedge knight. But men are always welcome at the Wall.

name: Desmond Grell
quote: Ser Desmond Grell had served House Tully all his life. He had been a squire when Catelyn was born, a knight when she learned to walk and ride and swim, master-at-arms by the day that she was wed. He had seen Lord Hoster_Tully little Cat become a young woman, Eddard_Stark lady, mother to Robb_Stark. And now he has seen me become a traitor as well.

name: Devan Seaworth
quote: My brothers have ascended to the Hall of Light, to sit beside the Lord. I will pray for them at the nightfires, and for you as well, Father, so you might walk in the Light of the Lord till the end of your days.

name: Dick
quote: When we find the man who did this, I will flay the skin off him, cook it crisp as crackling, and make him eat it, every bite.

name: Dick
quote: Theon: Yellow Dick—Rowan: —stank as bad as you. A pig of a man.

name: Dick Bean
quote: I been a king's man since I was a boy. I mean to die a king's man.

name: Dick Bean
quote: This bean shames us all! Are there no true knights here? No leal men?

name: Dick Crabb
quote: Dick: I know a lot o' words. Tell me which m'lady wants t' hear, and Nimble Dick will say it. Brienne: I heard you fooled a fool. Dick: Mighten be I did. Or not.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: Dick: Old Dick's a harmless fellow. Chivalrous as a knight, and honest as the day is long. Brienne: The days are growing shorter.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: The world's full o' liars, ready to cheat an honest man.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: It's the sword that makes the lord, some say.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: Nimble Dick will have a grave. He was a Crabb. This is his place.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: I'm sorry that I never trusted you. I don't know how to do that anymore.

name: Dick Crabb
quote: Proprietor: You're the big one went off with Nimble Dick. I remember. He cheat you? Brienne: No. Proprietor: Rape you? Brienne: No. Proprietor: Steal your horse? Brienne: No. He was slain by outlaws. Proprietor: Outlaws? I always figured Dick would hang, or get sent off to that Wall.

name: Dick Follard
quote: Dick Follard was deaf as a stone, but his nose worked well enough.

name: Dick Follard
quote: Dick could read your lips if there was enough light and he gave a damn what you were saying, but he knew it all already.

name: Domeric Bolton
quote: Domeric. A quiet boy, but most accomplished. He served four years as Barbrey_Dustin page, and three in the Vale as a squire to Horton_Redfort. He played the high harp, read histories, and rode like the wind. Horses … the boy was mad for horses, Lady Dustin will tell you. Not even Rickard_Stark Lyanna_Stark could outrace him, and that one was half a horse herself. Redfort said he showed great promise in the lists. A great jouster must be a great horseman first.

name: Domeric Bolton
quote: Ramsay_Snow killed him. A sickness of the bowels, Maester Uthor says, but I say poison. In the Vale, Domeric had enjoyed the company of Horton_Redfort sons. He wanted a brother by his side, so he rode up the Weeping Water to seek Ramsay_Snow out. I forbade it, but Domeric was a man grown and thought that he knew better than his father. Now his bones lie beneath the Dreadfort with the bones of his brothers, who died still in the cradle, and I am left with Ramsay. Tell me, my lord … if the kinslayer is accursed, what is a father to do when one son slays another?

name: Domeric Bolton
quote: Once he had heard Skinner say that Ramsay_Snow had killed his trueborn brother, but he had never dared to believe it. He could be wrong. Brothers die sometimes, it does not mean that they were killed.

name: Donal Noye
quote: The yard is for fighting. Keep your quarrels out of my armory, or I'll make them my quarrels. You won't like that.

name: Donal Noye
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon was the true steel. Stannis_Baratheon is pure iron, black and hard and strong, yes, but brittle, the way iron gets. He'll break before he bends. And Renly_Baratheon, that one, he's copper, bright and shiny, pretty to look at but not worth all that much at the end of the day.

name: Donal Noye
quote: The Watch is not what it was. Too few honest men to keep the rogues in line.

name: Donal Noye
quote: Donal: Jon, you have the Wall till I return. Jon: My lord? Donal: Lord? I'm a blacksmith. I said, the Wall is yours.

name: Donal Noye
quote: The armorer could talk about life. He'd had one. He'd only taken the black after he'd lost an arm at the siege of Storm's End. Before that he'd smithed for Stannis_Baratheon, the king's brother. He'd seen the Seven Kingdoms from one end to the other; he'd feasted and wenched and fought in a hundred battles. They said it was Donal Noye who'd forged King Robert's warhammer, the one that crushed the life from Rhaegar_Targaryen on the Trident. He'd done all the things that Jon would never do, and then when he was old, well past thirty, he'd taken a glancing blow from an axe and the wound had festered until the whole arm had to come off. Only then, crippled, had Donal Noye come to the Wall, when his life was all but over.

name: Donal Noye
quote: Tormund: Some great lord was he, this Donal Noye? One of your shiny knights in their steel smallclothes? Jon: A blacksmith. He only had one arm. Tormund: A one-armed smith slew Mag_Mar_Tun_Doh_Weg? Har! That must o' been a fight to see. Mance_Rayder will make a song of it, see if he don't. This will warm us some. To Donal Noye, and Mag the Mighty.

name: Donal Noye
quote: His treasures were his tools, and the swords and knives he made. His life was at the forge.

name: Donal Noye
quote: Noye made my first sword for me, and Robert's warhammer as well. Had the god seen fit to spare him, he would have made a better Lord Commander for your order than any of these fools who are squabbling over it now.

name: Donal Noye
quote: Even Samwell_Tarly could appear almost formidable, clad head to heel in Donal Noye's steel.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: Bran: We are very sorry for all you have suffered, my lady. Winterfell will remember. Donella: That is good to know.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: Rodrik: You will be safe enough, my lady ... though perhaps in time, when your grief is passed, you may find it prudent to wed again. Donella: I am past my childbearing years, what beauty I had long fled, yet men come sniffing after me as they never did when I was a maid.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: Rodrik: We shall try and find you a prospect more to your taste. Donella: Perhaps you need not look very far, ser.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: She was born a Manderly, you know. Perhaps, when her grief has run its course, she would like to be a Manderly again, eh? As it happens, I am a widower these past eight years. Past time I took another wife, don't you agree, my lords? A man does get lonely. Or if the lady fancies a younger lad, well, my son Wendel_Manderly is unwed as well. He is off south guarding Lady Catelyn_Stark, but no doubt he will wish to take a bride on his return. A valiant boy, and jolly. Just the man to teach her to laugh again, eh?

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: She was a pale husk of a woman, every line of her face etched with grief.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: Mors: Who better to protect the widow's lands than an Umber, and what Umber better than me? Luwin: Lady Donella is still grieving. Mors: I have a cure for grief under my furs.

name: Donella Hornwood
quote: And do you imagine the Hornwood men have forgotten Ramsay_Snow last marriage, and how his lady wife was left to starve, chewing her own fingers? What do you think passes through their heads when they hear Jeyne_Poole weeping?

name: Donnel Hightower
quote: Lord Donnel is a schemer and a sulker. I do not trust him. Nor should you. He does what he thinks best for himself, his house, and Oldtown, and cares not a fig for anyone or anything else. Not even for his king.

name: Donnel Hill
quote: Mance_Rayder will never look for us so far north. And this great host of his is a shambling horde, full of useless mouths who won't know what end of a sword to hold. One blow will take all the fight out of them and send them howling back to their hovels for another fifty years.

name: Donnel of Duskendale
quote: Duncan: Have you come to enter the lists? Donnel: It would not be fitting for us to ride against those we are sworn to protect.

name: Donnel Swann
quote: Renly_Baratheon, Stannis_Baratheon, Joffrey_Baratheon, Tommen_Baratheon how did he come to omit Balon_Greyjoy and Robb_Stark? He might have been the first knight in the realm to swear fealty to all six kings.

name: Donnel Waynwood
quote: The clans have grown bolder since Lord Jon_Arryn died. If it were up to me, I would take a hundred men into the mountains, root them out of their fastnesses, and teach them some sharp lessons, but Lysa_Arryn has forbidden it.

name: Donnel Waynwood
quote: He was a stocky youth of twenty years, earnest and homely, with a wide nose and a shock of thick brown hair.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Dontos: I lose. Fetch me some wine. Joffrey: A cask from the cellars! I'll see him drowned in it.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Sansa: You're drunk, aren't you? Dontos: Only one cup of wine, to help my courage.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Dontos: I know it's queer, but ... all those years I was a knight, I was truly a fool, and now that I am a fool I think ... I think I may find it in me to be a knight again, sweet lady. And all because of you ... your grace, your courage. You saved me, not only from Joffrey_Baratheon, but from myself. The singers say there was another fool once who was the greatest knight of all ... Sansa: Florian_the_Fool. Dontos: Sweet lady, I would be your Florian.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: My life is a poor thing, but it is yours.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Sansa: What stones are these? Dontos: Black amethysts from Asshai. The rarest kind, a deep true purple by daylight. Sansa: It's very lovely. Dontos: Lovelier than you know, sweet child. It's magic, you see. It's justice you hold. It's vengeance for Eddard_Stark. It's home.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: A fool. You're so clever, to see it. He's better fitted to be a fool than a knight, isn't he? You ought to dress him in motley and make him clown for you.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Sansa: You killed him. Petyr: My lady, your grief is wasted on such a man as that. He was a sot, and no man's friend.

name: Dontos Hollard
quote: Ser Dontos the Red was a skin of wine with legs.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Princess_of_Dorne_(mother_of_Doran) taught me long ago that only madmen fight wars they cannot win.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Doran: I like it no more than you do, but there is a blood debt, and Quentyn_Martell is the only coin Lord Ormond_Yronwood will accept. Mellario: Coin? He is your son. What sort of father uses Quentyn_Martell to pay his debts? Doran: The princely sort.

name: Doran Martell
quote: I have worked at the downfall of Tywin_Lannister since the day they told me of Elia_Martell and Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar) Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar).

name: Doran Martell
quote: Doran: Quentyn_Martell has gone to bring us back our heart's desire. Arianne: What is our heart's desire? Doran: Vengeance. Justice. Fire and blood.

name: Doran Martell
quote: I am not blind, nor deaf. I know you all believe me weak, frightened, feeble. Your father knew me better. Oberyn_Martell was ever the viper. Deadly, dangerous, unpredictable. No man dared tread on him. I was the grass. Pleasant, complaisant, sweet-smelling, swaying with every breeze. Who fears to walk upon the grass? But it is the grass that hides the viper from his enemies and shelters him until he strikes.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Doran: Until Gregor_Clegane crushed Oberyn_Martell skull, no Dornishmen had died in this War of the Five Kings. Tell me, Captain, is that my shame or my glory? Areo: That is not for me to say, my prince.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Doran plays to win, whether at cyvasse or the game of thrones.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Doran is a cautious man, a reasoned man, subtle, deliberate, even indolent to a degree. He is a man who weighs the consequences of every word and every action.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Though he was but two-and-fifty, Doran Martell seemed much older. His body was soft and shapeless beneath his linen robes, and his legs were hard to look upon. The gout had swollen and reddened his joints grotesquely; his left knee was an apple, his right a melon, and his toes had turned to dark red grapes, so ripe it seemed as though a touch would burst them. Even the weight of a coverlet could make him shudder, though he bore the pain without complaint. Silence is a prince's friend, the captain had heard him tell his daughter once. Words are like arrows, Arianne_Martell. Once loosed, you cannot call them back.

name: Doran Martell
quote: My father is very good at doing nothing. He calls it thinking.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Your father keeps his secrets well, Prince Quentyn. Too well, I fear.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Jon: Above all else, we must have Doran Martell. Harry: Small chance of that. The Dornishman is scared of his own shadow. Not what you call daring. Jon: Prince Doran is a cautious man, that's true. He will never join us unless he is convinced that we will win. So to persuade him we must show our strength.

name: Doran Martell
quote: Your father married for love, it's said. How much joy has he had of that?

name: Doreah
quote: Once there were two moons in the sky, but one wandered too close to the sun and cracked from the heat. A thousand thousand dragons poured forth, and drank the fire of the sun. That is why dragons breathe flame.

name: Doreah
quote: She's very good, Illyrio_Mopatis and I can both swear to that.

name: Doreah
quote: The Lysene girl had hair the color of honey, and eyes like the summer sky.

name: Dorna Swyft
quote: Kevan loved his chinless lady, flat-chested and chicken-legged as she was.

name: Dorna Swyft
quote: In King's Landing she would be as happy as one of Tommen_Baratheon's kittens in a pit of vipers.

name: Dorna Swyft
quote: It is a wise woman who knows her place.

name: Dorna Swyft
quote: Varys: Ser Kevan. Forgive me if you can. I bear you no ill will. This was not done from malice. It was for the realm. For the children. Kevan (thinking): I have children. I have a wife. Oh, Dorna.

name: Drazenko Rogare
quote: I feared he meant to kiss me.

name: Drennan
quote: I'd say Drennan was pulling down his breeches to stick it in Osha when she stuck it in him. His own cheese knife, by the look of it.

name: Drinkwater twins
quote: I want to go back to Yronwood and kiss both of your sisters, marry Gwyneth_Yronwood, watch her flower into beauty, have a child by her.

name: Drogo
quote: Daenerys: You speak the Common Tongue. Drogo: No.

name: Drogo
quote: Crown! Here. A crown for Cart King!

name: Drogo
quote: This seller of poisons ran from the Daenerys_Targaryen. Better he should run after her. So he will. Jhogo, Jorah the Andal, to each of you I say, choose any horse you wish from my herds, and it is yours. Any horse save my red and the silver that was my bride gift to the moon of my life. I make this gift to you for what you did. And to Rhaego son of Drogo, the stallion who will mount the world, to him I also pledge a gift. To him I will give this iron chair his Aerys_II_Targaryen sat in. I will give him Seven Kingdoms. I, Drogo, khal, will do this thing. I will take my khalasar west to where the world ends, and ride the wooden horses across the black salt water as no khal has done before. I will kill the men in the iron suits and tear down their stone houses. I will rape their women, take their children as slaves, and bring their broken gods back to Vaes Dothrak to bow down before the Mother of Mountains, as the stars look down to witness.

name: Drogo
quote: See how fierce Daenerys_Targaryen grows! It is Rhaego inside her, the stallion who mounts the world, filling her with his fire. Ride slowly, Qotho … if the mother does not burn you where you sit, the son will trample you into the mud. And you, Mago, hold your tongue and find another lamb to mount. These belong to my khaleesi.

name: Drogo
quote: Daenerys: Drink neither wine nor the milk of the poppy. Pain you will have, but you must keep your body strong to fight the poison spirits. Drogo: I am khal. I spit on pain and drink what I like.

name: Drogo
quote: Khal Drogo was a head taller than the tallest man in the room, yet somehow light on his feet, as graceful as the panther in Illyrio's menagerie. He was younger than she'd thought, no more than thirty. His skin was the color of polished copper, his thick mustachios bound with gold and bronze rings.

name: Drogo
quote: Do you see his braid, sweet sister? You see how long it is? When Dothraki are defeated in combat, they cut off their braids in disgrace, so the world will know their shame. Khal Drogo has never lost a fight. He is Aegon_I_Targaryen come again, and you will be his queen.

name: Drogo
quote: Daenerys: Your spells are costly, maegi. Mirri: He lives. You asked for life. You paid for life. Daenerys: This is not life, for one who was as Drogo was. His life was laughter, and meat roasting over a firepit, and a horse between his legs. His life was an arakh in his hand and his bells ringing in his hair as he rode to meet an enemy. His life was his bloodriders, and me, and Rhaego I was to give him. When will he be as he was? Mirri: When the sun rises in the west and sets in the east. When the seas go dry and mountains blow in the wind like leaves. When your womb quickens again, and you bear a living child. Then he will return, and not before.

name: Drogo
quote: Remember, Drogo. Remember our first ride together, the day we wed. Remember the night we made Rhaego, with the khalasar all around us and your eyes on my face. Remember how cool and clean the water was in the Womb of the World. Remember, my sun-and-stars. Remember, and come back to me.

name: Drogo
quote: Khal Drogo had been her sun-and-stars, her first, and perhaps he must be her last. The maegi Mirri_Maz_Duur had sworn she would never bear a living child, and what man would want a barren wife? And what man could hope to rival Drogo, who had died with his hair uncut and rode now through the night lands, the stars as his khalasar?

name: Drogo
quote: Do you know what it is like to be sold, squire? I do. Viserys_Targaryen sold me to Khal Drogo for the promise of a golden crown. Well, Drogo crowned him in gold, though not as he had wished, and I ... my sun-and-stars made a queen of me, but if he had been a different man, it might have been much otherwise.

name: Dudley
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Egg: If you took me, I could squire for you. Dunk: I have no need of a squire. Egg: Every knight needs a squire. You look as though you need one more than most. Dunk And you look as though you need a clout in the ear, it seems to me.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Egg: I have never heard of any Ser Duncan the Tall. Dunk: Do you know every knight in the Seven Kingdoms, then? Egg: The good ones. Dunk: I'm as good as any. After the tourney, they'll all know that.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Duncan: The old man, Ser Arlan_of_Pennytree, he used to say I was thick as a castle wall and slow as an aurochs. Baelor: And strong as an aurochs, by the look of you.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Duncan: What color paint do you have? Tanselle: I can mix paints to make any color you want. Duncan: The field should be the color of sunset. Arlan_of_Pennytree liked sunsets. And the device... Egg: An elm tree. A big elm tree, like the one by the pool, with a brown trunk and green branches. Duncan: Yes. That would serve. An elm tree... but with a shooting star above.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Duncan: What am I to them? Pate: A knight who remembered his vows.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Oak and iron, guard me well, or else I'm dead and doomed to hell.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Rohanne: Did you come to knighthood on some battlefield, Ser Duncan? Your speech suggests that you were not born of noble blood, if you will forgive my saying so. Duncan: A hedge knight named Ser Arlan_of_Pennytree took me on to squire for him when I was just a boy. He taught me chivalry and the arts of war. Rohanne: And this same Ser Arlan knighted you? Duncan: No one else was like to do it.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Rohanne: If you were better born, I'd marry you. Duncan: Aye, m'lady. And if pigs had wings and scales and breathed flame, they'd be as good as dragons.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Maekar: Brother, have you taken leave of your senses? This man attacked Aerion_Targaryen. Baelor: This man protected Tanselle, as every true knight must. Let the gods determine if he was right or wrong.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Dunk the lunk, Arlan_of_Pennytree used to call you. I recall. Lunks shouldn't try and think, their heads is too bloody thick for such.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: I dreamed that you were all in white from head to heel, with a long pale cloak flowing from those broad shoulders. You were a White Sword, ser, a Sworn Brother of the Kingsguard, the greatest knight in all the Seven Kingdoms, and you lived for no other purpose but to guard and serve and please your king.

name: Duncan the Tall
quote: Think on my offer, ser. The snail may leave a trail of slime behind him, but a little slime will do a man no harm… whilst if you dance with dragons, you must expect to burn.

name: Duncan Targaryen
quote: The Prince of Dragonflies loved Jenny_of_Oldstones so much he cast aside a crown, and Westeros paid the price in corpses.

name: Duncan Targaryen
quote: Afterward Prince Duncan helped him to his feet and removed his helm. "A boy," he had proclaimed to the crowd. "A bold boy."

name: Dunstan Drumm
quote: Where is it written that our king must be a kraken? What right has Pyke to rule us? Great Wyk is the largest isle, Harlaw the richest, Old Wyk the most holy. When the black line was consumed by dragonfire, the ironborn gave the primacy to Vickon_Greyjoy, aye ... but as lord, not king.

name: Duram Bar Emmon
quote: Davos: Surely there is someone better ... some great lord ... Stannis: Bar Emmon, that boy?

name: Durran
quote: Names such as Brandon_the_Builder, Garth_Greenhand, Lann_the_Clever, and Durran Godsgrief are names to conjure with, but it is likely that their legends hold less truth than fancy.

name: Dusky woman
quote: I want none of your leavings.

name: Dusky woman
quote: I could kill Euron_Greyjoy. Though it is a great sin to kill your king, and a worse one to kill your brother.

name: Dusky woman
quote: Euron_Greyjoy gifts are poisoned, the captain had reminded himself the day the dusky woman came aboard. I want none of his leavings. He had decided then that he would slit her throat and toss her in the sea, a blood sacrifice to the Drowned God. Somehow, though, he had never quite gotten around to it.

name: Dwarf brother
quote: Brienne: I met some other brothers going to King's Landing. Dwarf brother: Aye, there's hundreds on the roads. Not only brothers. Septons too, and smallfolk. Sparrows all. Might be I'm a sparrow too. The Smith, he made me small enough.

name: Dwarf brother
quote: Are you thinking of Sansa_Stark? The Crone will light your way to her, never fear. The Maiden will keep her safe.

name: Dwarf brother
quote: You've killed the Tyrion_Lannister dwarf.

name: Dwarf brother
quote: First man: This one come walking along as bold as you please, some ugly dwarf, so we thought... Second man: He said he were a sparrow, and you said he was lying.

name: Dwarf juggler
quote: Your head may have glass eyes, but I do not. There are gargoyles on Dragonstone that look more like Tyrion_Lannister than this creature.

name: Dwarf juggler
quote: Tyroshi: An honest mistake. One dwarf looks so much like another, and... Your Grace will observe, he has no nose... Cersei: He has no nose because you cut it off.

name: Dwarf juggler
quote: Penny: Are you sorry about the juggler too? Tyrion: I never knew your juggler existed until this very moment... but yes, I am sorry he is dead. Penny: He died for you. His blood is on your hands. Tyrion: His blood is on Cersei_Lannister hands, and the hands of the brutes who killed him.

name: Dwarf juggler
quote: My hands... my hands are crusted with old blood, aye. Call me kinslayer, and you won't be wrong. Kingslayer, I'll answer to that one as well. [...] But I have never killed a juggler, nor a dwarf, and I am not to blame for what happened to Oppo.

name: Dyanna Dayne
quote: Egg: You’re going to Ashford, aren’t you? Take me with you, ser.Dunk: And what might your mother say to that?Egg: My mother? My mother’s dead, she wouldn’t say anything.

name: Dywen
quote: Best we be starting back, m'lord. Dark's falling, and there's something in the smell o' the night that I mislike.

name: Dywen
quote: Dywen: I know this wood as well as any man alive, and I tell you, I wouldn't care to ride through it alone tonight. Can't you smell it? Edd: All I smell is the shit of two hundred horses. And this stew. Which has a similar aroma, now that I come to sniff it.

name: Dywen
quote: We'll learn you what you need t' know, ser. Teach you how t' wipe your highborn arse with leaves, just like a proper ranger.

name: Dywen
quote: Jon: Dywen says you can find anything beyond the Wall. Jeor: Aye, Dywen says. And the last time he went ranging, he says he saw a bear fifteen feet tall. Maege_Mormont is said to have taken a bear for her lover. I'd believe that before I'd believe one fifteen feet tall. Though in a world where Othor ... ah, even so, a man must believe his eyes.

name: Dywen
quote: No man in Castle Black knew the woods as well as Dywen did, the trees and streams, the plants that could be eaten, the ways of predator and prey.

name: Ebben
quote: Man and boy I've served the Watch, and ranged as far as any. I've seen the bones of giants, and heard many a queer tale, but no more. I want to see them with my own eyes.

name: Ebben
quote: Ebben can make any man give up his secrets.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Bran: Can a man still be brave if he’s afraid? Eddard: That is the only time a man can be brave.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: The blood of the First Men still flows in the veins of the Starks, and we hold to the belief that the man who passes the sentence should swing the sword. If you would take a man's life, you owe it to him to look into his eyes and hear his final words. And if you cannot bear to do that, then perhaps the man does not deserve to die.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: A ruler who hides behind paid executioners soon forgets what death is.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Eddard: We are not the boys we were. Robert: You were never the boy you were.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: When the snows fall and the white winds blow, the lone wolf dies, but the pack survives.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Know the men who follow you and let them know you. Don't ask your men to die for a stranger.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Some secrets are safer kept hidden. Some secrets are too dangerous to share, even with those you love and trust.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Black and white and grey, all the shades of truth.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: "If it came to that, the life of some child I did not know, against Robb_Stark and Sansa_Stark and Arya_Stark and Bran_Stark and Rickon_Stark, what would I do? Even more so, what would Catelyn_Stark do, if it were Jon_Snow's life, against the children of her body?" He did not know. He prayed he never would.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Cersei: You should have taken the realm for yourself. It was there for the taking. Jaime_Lannister told me how you found him on the Iron Throne the day King's Landing fell, and made him yield it up. That was your moment. All you needed to do was climb those steps, and sit. Such a sad mistake. Eddard: I have made more mistakes than you can possibly imagine, but that was not one of them.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: In this world only winter is certain. We may lose our heads, it's true ... but what if we prevail?

name: Eddard Stark
quote: You are too hard on yourself, Ned. You always were. Damn it, no woman wants Baelor_I_Targaryen in her bed.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Damn you, Ned Stark. You and Jon_Arryn, I loved you both. What have you done to me? You were the one should have been king, you or Jon.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: You never could lie for love nor honor, Ned Stark.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: No, my lord, when the swords come out in earnest, you will be the only true friend Robert_I_Baratheon will have.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: You wear your honor like a suit of armor, Stark. You think it keeps you safe, but all it does is weigh you down and make it hard for you to move.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: You are an honest and honorable man, Lord Eddard. Ofttimes I forget that. I have met so few of them in my life ... When I see what honesty and honor have won you, I understand why.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Ned Stark a traitor? Not bloody likely. The Long Summer will come again before that one would besmirch his precious honor.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: As for your Ned, he should have kissed the hand that killed Aerys_II_Targaryen, but he preferred to scorn the arse he found sitting on Robert_I_Baratheon throne.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: I knew Ned Stark as well. Your father was no friend of mine, but only a fool would doubt his honor or his honesty.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: A long time ago, she remembered her father saying that when the cold wind blows the lone wolf dies but the pack survives. He had it all backwards. Arya, the lone wolf, still lived, but the wolves of the pack had been taken and slain and skinned.

name: Eddard Stark
quote: Your father was a stubborn man as well. Honor, he called it. Well, honor has its costs, as Lord Eddard learned to his sorrow.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: The dead are likely dull fellows, full of tedious complaints—the ground's too cold, my gravestone should be larger, why does he get more worms than I do...

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Some dogs crawled atop me during the night. My cloak was almost dry when one of them pissed in it. Or perhaps it was Brown_Bernarr. Have you noticed that the rain stopped the instant I had a roof above me? It will start again now that I'm back out. Gods and dogs alike delight to piss on me.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: There are worse ways to die than warm and drunk. I knew a brother drowned himself in wine once. It was a poor vintage, though, and his corpse did not improve it.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Once they figure a way to work a dead horse, we'll be next. Likely I'll be the first too. 'Edd' they'll say, 'dying's no excuse for laying down no more, so get on up and take this spear, you've got the watch tonight.' Well, I shouldn't be so gloomy. Might be I'll die before they work it out.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Edd: I never win anything. The gods always smiled on Watt, though. When the wildlings knocked him off the Bridge of Skulls, somehow he landed in a nice deep pool of water. How lucky was that, missing all those rocks? Grenn: Was it a long fall? Did landing in the pool of water save his life? Edd: No. He was dead already, from that axe in his head. Still, it was pretty lucky, missing the rocks.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: I just want to say to whoever is voting for me that I would certainly make an awful Lord Commander. But so would all these others.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Cotter: We'll defend the Wall to the last man. Edd: Probably me.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Samwell: Jon_Snow wants to see me? Edd: As to that, I could not say. I never wanted to see half the things I’ve seen, and I’ve never seen half the things I wanted to. I don’t think wanting comes into it. You’d best go all the same.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: My old septon used to say that books are dead men talking. Dead men should keep quiet, is what I say. No one wants to hear a dead man's yabber.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Place was overrun with rats when we moved in. The spearwives killed the nasty buggers. Now the place is overrun with spearwives. There's days I want the rats back.

name: Eddison Tollett
quote: Edd, fetch me a block.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: How can we talk of peace while the Lannisters spread like a pestilence over my father's domains, stealing his crops and slaughtering his people?

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Catelyn: Who are all these folk? Edmure: My people. They were afraid.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Edmure: Tell Hoster_Tully I have gone to make him proud. Catelyn: He was always proud of you, Edmure. And he loves you fiercely. Believe that. Edmure: I mean to give him better reason than mere birth.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Brynden: I am the last man in the Seven Kingdoms to tell anyone who they must wed, Nephew. Nonetheless, you did say something of making amends for your Battle of the Fords. Edmure: I had in mind a different sort of amends. Single combat with the Jaime_Lannister. Seven years of penance as a begging brother. Swimming the sunset sea with my legs tied. The Others take you all! Very well, I'll wed Roslin_Frey. As amends.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Roslin: Lord Edmure, I hope I am not a disappointment to you. Edmure: You are a delight to me, my lady. And ever will be, I know.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Edmure: Kingslayer? Better a sword than a rope. Do it, Ilyn_Payne. Jaime: Ser Ilyn, you heard Lord Tully. Do it.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Edmure: And if I will not yield? Jaime: You've seen our numbers, Edmure. You've seen the ladders, the towers, the trebuchets, the rams. If I speak the command, Daven_Lannister will bridge your moat and break your gate. Hundreds will die, most of them your own. Your former bannermen will make up the first wave of attackers, so you'll start your day by killing the fathers and brothers of men who died for you at the Twins. The second wave will be Freys, I have no lack of those. My westermen will follow when your archers are short of arrows and your knights so weary they can hardly lift their blades. When the castle falls, all those inside will be put to the sword. Your herds will be butchered, your godswood will be felled, your keeps and towers will burn. I'll pull your walls down, and divert the Tumblestone over the ruins. By the time I'm done no man will ever know that a castle once stood here. Roslin_Frey may whelp before that. You'll want your child, I expect. I'll send him to you when he's born. With a trebuchet.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: This was Hoster_Tully solar. He ruled the riverlands from here, wisely and well. The light was good there, and whenever he looked up from his work he could see the river. When his eyes were tired he would have Catelyn_Stark read to him. Petyr_Baelish and I built a castle out of wooden blocks once, there beside the door. You will never know how sick it makes me to see you in this room, Kingslayer. You will never know how much I despise you.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Is it my fault that your fool brother lost his battle before we could march? I am told the Jaime_Lannister went through him like an axe through ripe cheese.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Only my sweet brother would crowd all these useless mouths into a castle that might soon be under siege. Catelyn knew that Edmure had a soft heart; sometimes she thought his head was even softer. She loved him for it, yet still ...

name: Edmure Tully
quote: You owe Robb_Stark your thanks for his forbearance. He played out that mummer's farce in the Great Hall so as not to shame you before your own people. Had it been me I would have flayed you for your stupidity rather than praising this folly of the fords.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Robb: We must win back the Freys. With them, we still have some chance of success, however small. Without them, I see no hope. I am willing to give Lord Walder_Frey whatever he requires ... apologies, honors, lands, gold ... there must be something that would soothe his pride ... Catelyn: Not something. Someone.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Tom: Lord Hoster_Tully was hanging outlaws before you were shaving. And that son of his ... a man who hates music can't be trusted, I always say. Lem: It's not music he hates. It's you, fool.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: To keep him standing there day after day, with that noose around his neck ... better to have his head off and be done with it.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: A fish on a leash. There's a sight I never saw before.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: A Lannister pays his debts, and you're the only coin that's left to me.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: He had the same blue eyes as his sister Catelyn, and Jaime saw the same loathing there that he'd once seen in hers.

name: Edmure Tully
quote: Tytos: For honor's sake I must ask about my liege lord. Jaime: Ser Edmure is on his way to Casterly Rock as my captive. Roslin_Frey will remain at the Twins until their child is born. Then she and the babe will join him. So long as he does not attempt escape or plot rebellion, Edmure will live a long life. Tytos: Long and bitter. A life without honor. Until his dying day, men will say he was afraid to fight. Jaime (thinking): Unjustly. It was his child he feared for. He knew Tywin_Lannister I am.

name: Edric Dayne
quote: Edric: I won a prize once, riding at rings. Arya: I never learned the lance, but I could beat you with a sword. Have you killed anyone? Edric: I'm only twelve.

name: Edric Dayne
quote: Arya: You have a House? Who are you? Edric: My lady? I'm Edric Dayne, the ... the Lord of Starfall.

name: Edric Dayne
quote: Arya got goosebumps when Lord Beric_Dondarrion said Eddard_Stark name, but this Ned was only a boy, a fair-haired squire no more than ten or twelve.

name: Edric Dayne
quote: The squire seemed nice enough to Arya; maybe a little shy, but good-natured. She had always heard that Dornishmen were small and swarthy, with black hair and small black eyes, but Ned had big blue eyes, so dark that they looked almost purple. And his hair was a pale blond, more ash than honey.

name: Edric Dayne
quote: Arya: Dornishmen lie, don't they? Anguy: They're famous for it. Of course, they say the same of us marchers, so there you are. What's the trouble now? Ned's a good lad ... Arya: He's just a stupid liar.

name: Edric Storm
quote: I won't go pray to the Lord of Light. I am a Warrior's man, like Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Andrew: I shall go with you, Cousin. There's nothing to be frightened of. Edric: I am not frightened.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Davos: You are Robert_I_Baratheon so I know you will be brave, no matter what happens. Edric: I will. Only ... Davos: Think of this as an adventure, my lord. It's the start of your life's great adventure. May the Warrior defend you. Edric: And may the Father judge you justly, Lord Davos.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Edric Storm, they call him. He is said to be the very image of Robert_I_Baratheon. If men were to see him, and then look again at Joffrey_Baratheon and Tommen_Baratheon, they could not help but wonder, I would think.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Did the boy charm you? He has that gift. He got it from Robert_I_Baratheon, with the blood. He knows he is a king’s son, but chooses to forget that he is bastard-born.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Cortnay_Penrose chose to die rather than give him up. It still angers me. How could he think I would hurt the boy? I chose Robert_I_Baratheon, did I not? When that hard day came. I chose blood over honor.

name: Edric Storm
quote: The Lord of Light cherishes the innocent. There is no sacrifice more precious. From his king's blood and his untainted fire, a dragon shall be born.

name: Edric Storm
quote: Davos: His name is Edric Storm, sire. Stannis: I know his name. Was there ever a name so apt? It proclaims his bastardy, his high birth, and the turmoil he brings with him. Edric Storm. There, I have said it. Are you satisfied, my lord Hand? Davos: Edric— Stannis: —is one boy! He may be the best boy who ever drew breath and it would not matter. My duty is to the realm.

name: Edric Storm
quote: If Stannis_Baratheon is Azor_Ahai come again, does that mean Edric Storm must play the part of Nissa_Nissa?

name: Edric Storm
quote: Davos: I am speaking of a boy, Shireen_Baratheon friend, Robert_I_Baratheon son. Melisandre: A king's son, with the power of kingsblood in his veins. Do you think you've saved this boy, Onion Knight? When the long night falls, Edric Storm shall die with the rest, wherever he is hidden. Your own sons as well. Darkness and cold will cover the earth. You meddle in matters you do not understand.

name: Edwyn Frey
quote: Edwyn: Once Ser Brynden_Tully dies, Riverrun is ours.Emmon: Mine. Riverrun is mine.Karyl: Will the night soil be your own contribution, Edwyn? A mortal poison, I don't doubt.

name: Edwyn Frey
quote: Jaime: Edwyn, I am giving you Ryman_Frey command. Try not to be so stupid as your sire.Edwyn: That ought not pose much difficulty, my lord.

name: Edwyn Frey
quote: Stevron_Frey son Ser Ryman_Frey stood to inherit now; a thick-witted, stubborn, greedy man. And after Ryman came his own sons, Edwyn and Walder_Frey_(son_of_Ryman), who were even worse. "Fortunately," Lothar_Frey once said, "they hate each other even more than they hate us."

name: Edwyn Frey
quote: Brynden_Tully ought to make a sortie, to remind us all we're still at war. Be nice if he culled some Freys too. Ryman_Frey, for a start. The man's drunk more oft than not. Oh, and Edwyn. Not as thick as his father, but as full of hate as a boil's full of pus.

name: Edwyn Frey
quote: I say what I mean straight out, like an honest man. But what would you know of the ways of honest men? You're a treacherous lying weasel, like all your kin. I'd sooner drink a pint of piss than take the word of any Frey.

name: Elaena Targaryen
quote: Daenerys: He likes you, Ben. Ben: And well he might. I have me a drop of the dragon blood myself, you know. Daenerys: You? How could that be? Ben: Well, there was some Ossifer_Plumm in the Sunset Kingdoms who wed a dragon princess. My grandmama told me the tale. He lived in King Aegon_IV_Targaryen day.

name: Elaena Targaryen
quote: Rennifer: I am not one to boast, but there is royal blood in my veins. I am descended from a princess. My father told me the tale when I was a tad of a lad. She was the fairest treasure of the Maidenvault. Lord Alyn_Velaryon the great admiral lost his heart to her, though he was married Baela_Targaryen. She gave Jon_Waters the bastard name of "Waters" in honor of his father, and he grew to be a great knight, as did Longwaters, who put the "Long" before the "Waters" so men might know that he was not basely born himself. So I have a little dragon in me. Jaime: Yes, I almost mistook you for Aegon_I_Targaryen.

name: Elder Brother
quote: The Seven have blessed our Elder Brother with healing hands. He has restored many a man to health that even the maesters could not cure, and many a woman too.

name: Elder Brother
quote: He looks more like a man made to break bones than to heal one, thought the Maid of Tarth, as the Elder Brother strode across the room to embrace Septon Meribald and pat Dog.

name: Elder Brother
quote: Rorge who raped and killed at Saltpans was not Sandor_Clegane, though he may be as dangerous. The riverlands are full of such scavengers. I will not call them wolves. Wolves are nobler than that... and so are dogs, I think.

name: Elder Brother
quote: Brienne: You sound as if you pity Sandor_Clegane. Elder Brother: I did. You would have pitied him as well, if you had seen him at the end. I came upon him by the Trident, drawn by his cries of pain. He begged me for the gift of mercy, but I am sworn not to kill again.

name: Elder Brother
quote: Brienne: It is true, then. Sandor Clegane is dead. Elder Brother: He is at rest.

name: Elder Brother
quote: All in all, I was a sad man. When I was not fighting, I was drunk. My life was writ in red, in blood and wine.

name: Elder Brother
quote: The battle was a bloody thing. The singers would have us believe it was all Rhaegar_Targaryen and Robert struggling in the stream for Lyanna_Stark both of them claimed to love, but I assure you, other men were fighting too, and I was one.

name: Elder Brother
quote: We are all born naked, so I suppose it was only fitting that I come into my second life the same way.

name: Elder Brother
quote: Go home, child. You have a home, which is more than many can say in these dark days.

name: Elderly man
quote: Arya: He is an evil man. His lips are cruel, his eyes are mean, and he has a villain's beard. Kindly man: He is a man like any other, with light in him and darkness. It is not for you to judge him.

name: Elderly man
quote: Arya: When I kill him he will look in my eyes and thank me. Kindly man: If he does, you will have failed. It would be best if he takes no note of you at all.

name: Eldiss
quote: Skyte: The Drowned God needed a strong oarsman, I fear. Qarl: What he means is, Eldiss drank too much wine and his fat belly burst.

name: Eldon Estermont
quote: Cersei: How old is Sylva_Santagar? Qyburn: Three-and-twenty, Your Grace. Whereas Lord Estermont— Cersei: —must be seventy. I am aware of that.

name: Elia Martell
quote: Daenerys: ... that was the tourney when he crowned Lyanna_Stark as queen of love and beauty! Princess Elia was there, his wife, and yet Rhaegar_Targaryen gave the crown to the Stark girl, and later stole her away from Robert_I_Baratheon. How could he do that? Did the Dornish woman treat him so ill? Barristan: It is not for such as me to say what might have been in your brother’s heart, Your Grace. The Princess Elia was a good and gracious lady, though her health was ever delicate.

name: Elia Martell
quote: I grant you, it was done too brutally. Elia need not have been harmed at all, that was sheer folly.

name: Elia Martell
quote: Justice is in short supply this side of the mountains. There has been none for Elia, Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) or Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar).

name: Elia Martell
quote: You raped her. You murdered her. You killed her children.

name: Elia Martell
quote: EEEEELLLLLLIIIIIAAAAA! If you die before you say her name, ser, I will hunt you through all seven hells.

name: Elia Martell
quote: It must have been the madness that led Aerys_II_Targaryen to refuse Lord Tywin_Lannister daughter and take Jaime_Lannister instead, whilst marrying Rhaegar_Targaryen to a feeble Dornish princess with black eyes and a flat chest.

name: Elia Martell
quote: Princess Elia was a good woman, Your Grace. She was kind and clever, with a gentle heart and a sweet wit. I know Rhaegar_Targaryen was very fond of her.

name: Elia Sand
quote: Valena: Are you half horse, child? Princess, did you bring a stable girl? Elia: I'm Elia. Lady Lance. Valena: The girl jouster. Yes I've heard of you. Since you were the first to the yard, you've won the honor of watering and bridling the horses. Arianne: And after that find the bath house.

name: Elia Sand
quote: Joss: Someone needs to spank that child. Elia: I am almost a woman grown, ser. I'll let you spank me, though ... but first you'll need to tilt with me, and knock me off my horse. Joss: We are on a ship, and without horses. Garibald: And ladies do not joust. Elia: I do. I'm Lady Lance. Arianne: You may be a lance, but you are no lady.

name: Elia Sand
quote: Oberyn_Martell wanted vengeance for Elia_Martell. Now the three of you want vengeance for him. I have four daughters, I remind you. Your sisters. My Elia is fourteen, almost a woman. Obella_Sand is twelve, on the brink of maidenhood. They worship you, as Dorea_Sand and Loreza_Sand worship them. If you should die, must El and Obella seek vengeance for you, then Dorea and Loree for them? Is that how it goes, round and round forever? I ask again, where does it end?

name: Elia Sand
quote: The girl was mad for horses, which might be why she often smelled like one, to the despair of Ellaria_Sand.

name: Elinor Tyrell
quote: Roses from lower on the bush.

name: Elinor Tyrell
quote: Alyn_Ambrose said her favor made him fearless. He says he shouted her name for his battle cry, isn't that ever so gallant? Someday I want some champion to wear my favor, and kill a hundred men.

name: Elissa Farman
quote: Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I) found her true love on Fair Isle, not with Androw_Farman, but with his sister, Lady Elissa.

name: Elissa Farman
quote: Her dreams were full of sundering rivers and windswept plains and towering mountains with their shoulders in the clouds, of green islands verdant in the sun, of strange beasts no man had tamed and queer fruits no man had tasted, of golden cities shining underneath strange stars.

name: Ellaria Sand
quote: Oberyn_Martell wanted vengeance for Elia_Martell. Now the three of you want vengeance for him. I have four daughters, I remind you. Your sisters. My Elia_Sand is fourteen, almost a woman. Obella_Sand is twelve, on the brink of maidenhood. They worship you, as Dorea_Sand and Loreza_Sand worship them. If you should die, must El and Obella seek vengeance for you, then Dorea and Loree for them? Is that how it goes, round and round forever? I ask again, where does it end? I saw your father die. Here is Gregor_Clegane. Can I take a skull to bed with me, to give me comfort in the night? Will it make me laugh, write me songs, care for me when I am old and sick?

name: Ellaria Sand
quote: Shae had told her that this Ellaria worshiped some Lysene love goddess. "She was almost a whore when he found her, m'lady," her maid confided, "and now she's near a princess." Sansa had never been this close to the Dornishwoman before. She is not truly beautiful, she thought, but something about her draws the eye.

name: Ellaria Sand
quote: Even weeping, she has a strength in her.

name: Ellaria Sand
quote: Nymeria: I know she loved Oberyn_Martell well, but it is plain she never understood him. Doran: She understood more than you ever will, Nymeria. And she made your father happy. In the end a gentle heart may be worth more than pride or valor. Be that as it may, there are things Ellaria does not know and should not know. This war has already begun.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: Take care of Lady Ellyn.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: Lady Ellyn must surely be a sorceress, for she has made it rain inside the Rock all year.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: Send back Walderan_Tarbeck, or these three shall answer for any harm that may come to him.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: Walderan: Well, you have us, boy. We're worth a good ransom, as I am sure you know. Ask what you will, my lady wife will pay. Tywin: With our own gold. No, my lord. I think not.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: You are not the only lions in the west, ser. My brothers are coming, and their claws are just as long and sharp as yours.

name: Ellyn Reyne
quote: When Tarbeck Hall came crashing down on Lady Ellyn, that scheming bitch, Tygett_Lannister claimed Tywin_Lannister smiled then.

name: Elmo Tully
quote: I would sooner the rest of his did not die with him.

name: Elmo Tully
quote: A dragon in one's courtyard does wonder to resolve one's doubts.

name: Elyas Scales
quote: Your Grace, you will never be a Kingsguard, but if by some sorcery your uncle Maegor_I_Targaryen himself were to rise from the grave, my coin would be on you.

name: Elysar
quote: He was better with roads than with daughters.

name: Emmett
quote: Gods be good, our Lord Commander's still in swaddling clothes. I hope this don't mean I can't beat the bloody piss out of you next time we train, my lord.

name: Emmett
quote: Men are men, vows are words, and words are wind.

name: Emmett
quote: Emmett was an amiable man, and he loved the song of swords.

name: Emmon Cuy
quote: Wicked woman! Away from Renly_Baratheon, you vile creature!

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Emmon: For Tyrion_Lannister to raise his hand against Tywin_Lannister. Monstrous. These are dark days in Westeros. I fear for us all with Lord Tywin_Lannister gone. Genna: You feared for us all when he was here.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Emmon: Ser Jaime, Tywin_Lannister faith in me was well placed, you shall see. I mean to be firm but fair with my new vassals. Blackwood and Bracken, Jason_Mallister, Vance and Piper, they shall learn that they have a just overlord in Emmon Frey. Walder_Frey as well, yes. He is the Lord of the Crossing, but I am the Lord of Riverrun. A son has a duty to obey his father, true, but a bannerman must obey his overlord. Jaime: You are not his overlord, ser. Read your parchment. You were granted Riverrun with its lands and incomes, no more. Petyr_Baelish is the Lord Paramount of the Trident. Riverrun will be subject to the rule of Harrenhal.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Emmon: I rule in Riverrun, by Tommen_Baratheon own decree, I— Genna: Emmon, the Jaime_Lannister knows about the king's decree. Ser Edmure_Tully knows about the king's decree. The stableboys know about the king's decree.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Cleos_Frey was his Genna_Lannister son by that dullard Emmon Frey, who had lived in terror of Lord Tywin_Lannister since the day he wed his sister. When Lord Walder_Frey had brought the Twins into the war on the side of Riverrun, Ser Emmon had chosen his wife's allegiance over his father's. Casterly Rock got the worst of that bargain, Jaime reflected.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: And our own Ser Emmon ... no, Lord Emmon, Seven save us, must not forget his new title . . . our Lord of Riverrun does nought but try to tell me how to run the siege. He wants me to take the castle without damaging it, since it is now his lordly seat.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Emmon Frey was a fretful man with nervous hands. He might have weighed ten stone ... but only wet, and clad in mail. He was a weed in wool, with no chin to speak of, a flaw that the prominence of the apple in his throat made even more absurd.

name: Emmon Frey
quote: Genna_Lannister has played her part as well. Jaime remembered many a feast where Emmon sat poking at his food sullenly whilst his wife made ribald jests with whatever household knight had been seated to her left, their conversations punctuated by loud bursts of laughter. She gave Frey four sons, to be sure. At least she says they are his. No one in Casterly Rock had the courage to suggest otherwise, least of all Ser Emmon.

name: Endrew Tarth
quote: Ser Endrew Tarth, a good man.

name: Eon Hunter
quote: The honor should be mine, for the love I bore Jon_Arryn, let me avenge his death.

name: Eon Hunter
quote: Eon Hunter was even older than Jon_Arryn had been, half-crippled by gout, and cursed with three quarrelsome sons, each more grasping than the last.

name: Erena Glover
quote: Asha: Sybelle_Glover and the children should not want for wood nor warmth. Put them in some tower, not the dungeons. The babe is sick.Three-Tooth: Babes are often sick. Most die, and folks are sorry. I shall ask Rodrik_Harlaw where to put these wolf folk.Asha: You will do as I say. And if this babe dies, no one will be sorrier than you.

name: Erik Ironmaker
quote: I am Erik Ironmaker, for them who's blind. Erik the Just. Erik Anvil-Breaker. Show them my hammer, Thormor_Ironmaker.
