I can't count how many hands I've smashed to pulp with that hammer, but might be some thief could tell you. I can't say how many heads I've crushed against my anvil neither, but there's some widows could. I could tell you all the deeds I've done in battle, but I'm eight-and-eighty and won't live long enough to finish. If old is wise, no one is wiser than me. If big is strong, no one's stronger. You want a king with heirs? I've more'n I can count. King Erik, aye, I like the sound o' that. Come, say it with me. ERIK! ERIK ANVIL-BREAKER! ERIK KING!

name: Erik Ironmaker
quote: Asha: You've despoiled me, you beardless boy. My lord husband will cut your balls off and put you in a dress. Qarl: If he can get out of his chair.

name: Erik Ironmaker
quote: I hope Erik did not insist on a consummation.

name: Ermesande Hayford
quote: Tyrek_Lannister was the son of his late Tygett_Lannister, a boy of thirteen. He had vanished in the riot, not long after wedding the Lady Ermesande, a suckling babe who happened to be the last surviving heir of House Hayford. And likely the first bride in the history of the Seven Kingdoms to be widowed before she was weaned.

name: Ermesande Hayford
quote: My fealty's owed to House Hayford, and Lady Ermesande bends her little knee at King's Landing, or will when she's old enough to walk.

name: Eroeh
quote: Jhogo: Mago seized her, who is Khal Jhaqo's bloodrider now. He mounted her high and low and gave her to his khal, and Jhaqo gave her to his other bloodriders. They were six. When they were done with her, they cut her throat. Aggo: It was her fate, Khaleesi. Daenerys: It was a cruel fate, yet not so cruel as Mago's will be. I promise you that, by the old gods and the new, by the lamb god and the horse god and every god that lives. I swear it by the Mother of Mountains and the Womb of the World. Before I am done with them, Mago and Ko Jhaqo will plead for the mercy they showed Eroeh.

name: Eroeh
quote: Ben: Who is Eroeh? Daenerys: A girl I thought I'd saved from rape and torment. All I did was make it worse for her in the end.

name: Erryk Cargyll
quote: Erryk: I love you, brother. Arryk: And I you, brother.

name: Esgred
quote: Theon: Does Balon_Greyjoy know that you've married his shipwright? Asha: No more than Sigrin does. Esgred was the first ship he built. He named her after his mother. I would be hard-pressed to say which he loves best.

name: Esgred
quote: Theon: My name is Theon. You have to know your name. You... you told me you were Esgred, but that was a lie. Your name is Asha. Asha: It is.

name: Estermont (cousin of Robert)
quote: Her father was good to me, and she and I would play together when the two of us were small.

name: Ethan Glover
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn_Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo_Wull; Ethan Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark_Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland_Reed; Lord Willam_Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Ethan Glover
quote: Jaime: Aerys_II_Targaryen sent his guards to arrest them all for plotting Rhaegar_Targaryen murder. The others were lords' sons too, it seems to me. Catelyn: Ethan Glover was Brandon_Stark squire. He was the only one to survive.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Godless? Why, Aeron_Greyjoy, I am the godliest man ever to raise sail! You serve one god, Damphair, but I have served ten thousand. From Ib to Asshai, when men see my sails, they pray.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: We are the ironborn, and once we were conquerors. Our writ ran everywhere the sound of the waves was heard. Victarion_Greyjoy would have you be content with the cold and dismal north, Asha_Greyjoy with even less ... but I shall give you Lannisport. Highgarden. The Arbor. Oldtown. The riverlands and the Reach, the kingswood and the rainwood, Dorne and the marches, the Mountains of the Moon and the Vale of Arryn, Tarth and the Stepstones. I say we take it all! I say, we take Westeros.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: I am the storm, my lord. The first storm, and the last.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Perhaps we can fly. All of us. How will we ever know unless we leap from some tall tower? No man ever truly knows what he can do unless he dares to leap.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Kneel, brother. I am your king. I am your god. Worship me, and I will raise you up to be my priest.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Lord Balon_Greyjoy eldest brother had never given up the Old Way, even for a day. His Silence, with its black sails and dark red hull, was infamous in every port from Ibben to Asshai, it was said.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Theon: My uncle Euron has not been seen in the islands for close on two years. He may be dead. Esgred: He may be dead, and if he lives, why, he has spent so long at sea, he'd be half a stranger here. The ironborn would never seat a stranger in the Seastone Chair.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Euron Greyjoy is no man’s notion of a king, if half of what Theon_Greyjoy said of him was true.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Tristifer: The Crow's Eye brought back monsters from the east ... aye, and wizards too. Asha: Nuncle always had a fondness for freaks and fools. Balon_Greyjoy used to fight with him about it. Let the wizards call upon their gods. Aeron_Greyjoy will call on ours, and drown them.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Balon_Greyjoy was mad, Aeron_Greyjoy is madder, and Euron is the maddest of them all.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Euron's gifts are poisoned.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Tell the Crow's Eye he's afraid of kinslaying and he'll murder one of his own sons just to prove you wrong.

name: Euron Greyjoy
quote: Moqorro: Others seek Daenerys_Targaryen too. Tyrion: Have you seen these others in your fires? Moqorro: Only their shadows. One most of all. A tall and twisted thing with one black eye and ten long arms, sailing on a sea of blood.

name: Eustace
quote: And as her lord husband Prince Daemon_Targaryen escorted her from the hall, cuts were seen upon Her Grace's legs and the palm of her left hand. Drops of blood fell to the floor as she went past, and wise men looked at one another, though none dared speak the truth aloud: the Iron Throne had spurned her, and her days upon it would be few.

name: Eustace
quote: When Our Father's Feast was done and the mob before the gates dispersed, the King's Hand was well satisfied.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: A great battle is a terrible thing, but in the midst of blood and carnage, there is sometimes also beauty, beauty that could break your heart.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: I am old, but I am not dead. Rohanne_Webber will soon find that the chequy lion still has claws!

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: A king's mercy is a poisoned gift. Daeron_II_Targaryen left me life, but took my pride and dreams and honor. I should have gone with Aegor_Rivers into exile, or died beside my sons and Daemon_I_Blackfyre. That would have been a death worthy of a chequy lion descended from so many proud lords and mighty warriors. Daeron's mercy made me smaller.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: Better to go boldly than hide behind stone walls. Better to die a lion than a rabbit.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: Sefton: Osgrey of the chequy lion? I thought House Osgrey was extinguished. Lucas: Near enough as makes no matter. The old man is the last of them.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: Duncan: The old man's sons died in service to the king, why would His Grace take his stream away? Rohanne: If King Daeron_II_Targaryen had been a less forgiving man, he should have lost his head as well.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: Ser Eustace Osgrey is a rebel and a traitor.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: Ser Eustace chose Daemon_I_Blackfyre over Daeron_II_Targaryen, in the hope that a Blackfyre king might restore the lands and castles that the Osgreys had lost under the Targaryens. Chiefly he wanted Coldmoat. His sons paid for his treason with their life's blood. When he brought their bones home and delivered Alysanne_Osgrey to the king's men for a hostage, his wife threw herself from the top of Standfast tower. Did Ser Eustace tell you that? No, I did not think so.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: You swore your sword to a traitor, lunk. You ate a traitor's bread and slept beneath a rebel's roof.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: You'll find Ser Useless in his chambers, brooding on how great he used to be.

name: Eustace Osgrey
quote: In his heart the black dragon never died, Dunk realized.

name: Farlen
quote: It's freedom they're calling for. They don't like being walled up, and who's to blame them? Wild things belong in the wild, not in a castle.

name: Farlen
quote: Farlen: And why would I care to hunt down my own trueborn lords, and babes at that? Theon: I am your trueborn lord now, and the man who keeps Palla safe. Farlen: Aye, m'lord.

name: Farlen
quote: Theon: The only thing those dogs are fit for is a bear baiting. Would that I had a bear. Farlen: The dogs are not at fault. Running water don't hold no scents, m'lord.

name: Ferny
quote: Samwell: Mother have mercy. Mother have mercy. Mother have mercy. Ferny: Melessa_Florent can't help you none. Jeor_Mormont can't neither. You take his sword and you take that big warm fur cloak o' his and you take his horse if you can find him. And you go.

name: Ferret
quote: Ferret, Rafe, and Pudding. Little monsters, those three, and me the worst of all.

name: Ferret
quote: Better a beggar than a thief. He had been both in Flea Bottom, when he ran with Ferret, Rafe, and Pudding, but Arlan_of_Pennytree had saved him from that life.

name: Flement Brax
quote: Flement: Tyrion. My lord, we all feared you dead, or ... These … companions of yours ... Tyrion: Bosom friends and loyal retainers.

name: Flement Brax
quote: A party of mounted horsemen rode forward to challenge them as they approached the stakes. The knight who led them wore silver armor inlaid with amethysts and a striped purple-and-silver cloak. His shield bore a unicorn sigil, and a spiral horn two feet long jutted up from the brow of his horsehead helm.

name: Flement Brax
quote: If you admire the bloody thing so much, lop off your own sword hand and you can have it.

name: Florian the Fool
quote: Bran, that is only a story, like the tales of Florian the Fool. A fable from the Age of Heroes.

name: Florian the Fool
quote: Jonquil: You are no knight, I know you. You are Florian the Fool. Florian: I am, my lady, As great a fool as ever lived, and as great a knight as well. Jonquil: A fool and a knight? I have never heard of such a thing. Florian: Sweet lady, all men are fools, and all men are knights, where women are concerned.

name: Florian the Fool
quote: Sweet lady, I would be your Florian.

name: Florian the Fool
quote: Sandor: I never got my song. Sansa: I ... I know a song about Florian and Jonquil. Sandor: Florian and Jonquil? A fool and his cunt. Spare me. But one day I'll have a song from you, whether you will it or no. Sansa: I will sing it for you gladly.

name: Florian Greysteel
quote: The Nettles is but a child, however foul her treasons. The Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen would never have asked this of any man of honor.

name: Forley Prester
quote: Scouts and outriders will screen our march, and we'll fortify our camps by night. I have picked ten men to stay with Edmure_Tully day and night, my best longbowmen. If he should ride so much as a foot off the road, they will loose so many shafts at him that Minisa_Whent would take him for a goose.

name: Forley Prester
quote: Though he bore a bull's head upon his surcoat and horns upon his helm, Ser Forley could not have been less bovine.

name: Forley Prester
quote: Like most innkeeps, Ser Forley was no man's fool.

name: Fralegg
quote: Highgarden's close. I say, look for dragons there. The golden kind!

name: Franklyn Farman
quote: Franklyn: I had hoped my Elissa_Farman might come home to do her duty once she fled from you, but we have had no word of her, nor of your daughter. I cannot claim to know the princess, but I would say she is well rid of you, as was Fair Isle. If she turns up here we shall see her off, just as we did her mother. Rhaena: You do not know Aerea_Targaryen, that much is true, if she does indeed find her way to these shores, my lord, you may find she is not as forbearing as her mother. Oh, and I wish you luck if you should try to ‘see off’ the Black Dread. Balerion quite enjoyed your Androw_Farman, by now he may desire another course.

name: Franklyn Flowers
quote: My mother was a washerwoman at Cider Hall till one of milord's sons raped her. Makes me a sort o' brown apple Fossoway, the way I see it.

name: Franklyn Flowers
quote: Aegon: Why should I go running to Daenerys_Targaryen as if I were a beggar? My claim is better than her own. Let her come to me ... in Westeros. Franklyn: I like it. Sail west, not east. Leave the little queen to her olives and seat Prince Aegon upon the Iron Throne. The boy has stones, I give him that.

name: Franklyn Flowers
quote: So long as I can kill some Fossoways, I'm for it.

name: Franklyn Frey
quote: Ser Franklyn Frey is well regarded along the Green Fork.

name: Franklyn Frey
quote: Ser Harbert_Paege rode a golden courser barded in black and decorated with the red and white serpents of House Paege, Ser Franklyn a sorrel whose gray silk trapper bore the twin towers of Frey.

name: Franklyn Frey
quote: Ser Franklyn rode a dapple grey with a flowing silver mane, to match the grey of his silks and the silver of his armor. On shield and surcoat and horse trappings he bore the twin towers of Frey.

name: Lady Frey (wife of Ambrose Butterwell)
quote: Lady Butterwell, the maiden bride, my darling daughter. May the Mother make her fertile. I shall want a grandson before the year is out. Twins would suit me even better, so churn the butter well tonight, my sweet.

name: Lady Frey (wife of Ambrose Butterwell)
quote: Was there any flour on her teats when you got the smallclothes off her?

name: Lord Frey
quote: The Daemon_II_Blackfyre! Lord Ambrose_Butterwell, our gracious host. May the Father grant him long life and many sons. Lady Butterwell, the maiden bride, my darling daughter. May the Mother make her fertile. I shall want a grandson before the year is out. Twins would suit me even better, so churn the butter well tonight, my sweet. I give you the King's Hand, Brynden_Rivers. May the Crone's lamp light his path to wisdom.

name: Lord Frey
quote: Brynden: You have my leave to go as well, Lord Frey, we will speak again later. Lord Frey: As my lord commands.

name: Fulk the Flea
quote: Jon: Shouldn't you be inside, out of this wind? Fulk: That'd be sweet, m'lord, but your wolf's in no mood for company today. Mully: He tried to take a bite o' me, he did.

name: Fulk the Flea
quote: Jon: Those cells will be buried again by morning. We'd best move the prisoners before they smother. Fulk: Cregan_Karstark too, m'lord? Can't we just leave that one shivering till spring? Jon: Would that we could. Take him to the Lord Commander's Tower. The undervault should hold him.

name: Gaemon Palehair
quote: Aegon_III_Targaryen will marry Lady Daenaera_Velaryon of House Velaryon!

name: Gaemon Palehair
quote: You may beat poor Gaemon's bones, but you will get no more blood from him.

name: Gaemon Targaryen
quote: The little prince is with the Mother Above now, and she will care for him better than we could ever hope to, here in this world of strife and pain.

name: Gage
quote: Well, your dreams are your business. Mine's in the kitchens, and I'd best be getting back before Gage starts to shouting and waving that big wooden spoon of his.

name: Gage
quote: Mors: When last I was inside those walls, your cook served us a steak and kidney pie. Made with ale, I think, best I ever tasted. What was his name, that cook? Jeyne: Gage. He was a good cook. He would make lemoncakes for Sansa_Stark whenever we had lemons.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: The Mother of Dragons must don the tokar or be forever hated. In the wools of Westeros or a gown of Myrish lace, Your Radiance shall forever remain a stranger amongst us, a grotesque outlander, a barbarian conqueror. Meereen's queen must be a lady of Old Ghis.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: I shall return to the Temple of the Graces and pray for the gods to show my queen the course of wisdom.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: The peace that we worked so hard to forge flutters like a leaf in an autumn wind. These are dire days.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: Grazdan_zo_Galare, she had been forewarned, was a cousin of the Green Grace, whose support she had found invaluable. The priestess was a voice for peace, acceptance, and obedience to lawful authority.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: The Green Grace will accomplish nothing. She may be conspiring with the Yunkai'i even as we sit here.

name: Galazza Galare
quote: Galazza Galare was attended by four Pink Graces. An aura of wisdom and dignity seemed to surround her that Ser Barristan could not help but admire. This is a strong woman, and she has been a faithful friend to Daenerys_Targaryen.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: You must not do this, my lord. Lord Walder_Frey is not to be trusted.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: You cannot mean to hold to Joffrey_Baratheon, my lord. He put Eddard_Stark to death.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: Galbart: The ironmen have my castle and now the Lannisters hold Robett_Glover. Robb: Not for long. I will offer them Martyn_Lannister in exchange.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: Ser Brynden_Tully had played a part in every victory Robb_Stark had won. Galbart Glover had taken command of the scouts and outriders in his place; a good man, loyal and steady, but without the Blackfish's brilliance.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: Asha Greyjoy was seated in Galbart Glover's longhall drinking Galbart Glover's wine when Galbart Glover's maester brought the letter to her.

name: Galbart Glover
quote: Deepwood be Galbart Glover's seat. No home for squids.

name: Galladon of Morne
quote: The Perfect Knight? The Perfect Fool, he sounds like. What's the point o' having some magic sword if you don't bloody well use it?

name: Gared
quote: We should start back. The wildlings are dead.

name: Gared
quote: Waymar: What do you think might have killed these men, Gared? Gared: It was the cold. I saw men freeze last winter, and the one before, when I was half a boy. Everyone talks about snows forty foot deep, and how the ice wind comes howling out of the north, but the real enemy is the cold. It steals up on you quieter than Will, and at first you shiver and your teeth chatter and you stamp your feet and dream of mulled wine and nice hot fires. It burns, it does. Nothing burns like the cold. But only for a while. Then it gets inside you and starts to fill you up, and after a while you don't have the strength to fight it. It's easier just to sit down or go to sleep. They say you don't feel any pain toward the end. First you go weak and drowsy, and everything starts to fade, and then it's like sinking into a sea of warm milk. Peaceful, like. Waymar: Such eloquence, Gared. I never suspected you had it in you.

name: Gared
quote: Everyone talks about snows forty foot deep, and how the ice wind comes howling out of the north, but the real enemy is the cold.

name: Gared
quote: Gared had spent forty years in the Night's Watch, man and boy, and he was not accustomed to being made light of. Yet it was more than that. Under the wounded pride, Will could sense something else in the older man. You could taste it; a nervous tension that came perilous close to fear.

name: Gared
quote: Robb: The deserter died bravely. He had courage, at the least. Jon: No. It was not courage. This one was dead of fear. You could see it in his eyes, Stark.

name: Gared
quote: The poor man was half mad. Something had put a fear in him so deep that my words could not reach him.

name: Gared
quote: Gared was near as old as I am and longer on the Wall, yet it would seem he forswore himself and fled. I should never have believed it, not of him, but Lord Eddard_Stark sent me his head from Winterfell.

name: Gared
quote: Jeor: Benjen_Stark was searching for Ser Waymar_Royce, who'd vanished with Gared and young Will. Craster: Aye, those three I recall. The lordling no older than one of these pups. Too proud to sleep under my roof, him in his sable cloak and black steel. My wives give him big cow eyes all the same. Gared says they were chasing raiders. I told him, with a commander that green, best not catch 'em. Gared wasn't half-bad, for a crow. Had less ears than me, that one. The 'bite took 'em, same as mine.

name: Gareth Long
quote: You always were a bloody fool, Victor.

name: Gareth Long
quote: You may beat poor Gaemon_Palehair bones, but you will get no more blood from him.

name: Garibald Grey
quote: Criston: If I strike my banners, do you promise us our lives? Garibald: I made my promise to the dead. I told them I would built a sept for them out of traitors' bones. I don't have near enough bones yet, so ...

name: Garin
quote: Arianne: Here is gay Garin of the orphans, who makes me laugh. Myrcella: I am sorry she is dead. Garin: She's not, sweet queen. I'm of the orphans of the Greenblood, is what my lady means.

name: Garin
quote: He's the one I fear for most. The orphans are free spirits, they live to wander. Garin needs sunshine and fresh air. If they lock him away in some dank stone cell, how will he survive? He will not last a year at Ghaston Grey.

name: Garin the Great
quote: We shall all be slaves unless we join together to end this threat.

name: Garin the Great
quote: It shall go ill for any man who fails me.

name: Garin the Great
quote: Garin: Prince Oberyn_Martell was full of stories. He told about Prince Garin, I remember, the one that I was named for. Andrey: Garin the Great, the wonder of the Rhoyne. Garin: That's the one. He made Valyria tremble. Gerold: They trembled, then they killed him. If I led a quarter of a million men to death, would they call me Gerold the Great?

name: Garin the Great
quote: Tyrion: Garin's Curse is only greyscale. Damp is said to be the culprit. Foul humors in the air. Not curses. Ysilla: The conquerors did not believe either, Hugor Hill. The men of Volantis and Valyria hung Garin in a golden cage and made mock as he called upon his Mother to destroy them. But in the night the waters rose and drowned them, and from that day to this they have not rested. They are down there still beneath the water, they who were once the lords of fire. Their cold breath rises from the murk to make these fogs, and their flesh has turned as stony as their hearts.

name: Garlan Tyrell
quote: Sansa: I see why they name you Garlan the Gallant, ser.Garlan: My lady is gracious to say so. My brother Willas_Tyrell gave me that name, as it happens. To protect me.Sansa: To protect you?Garlan: I was a plump little boy, I fear, and we do have an uncle called Garth_Tyrell. So Willas struck first, though not before threatening me with Garlan the Greensick, Garlan the Galling, and Garlan the Gargoyle.

name: Garlan Tyrell
quote: Tyrion: If I am ever Hand again, the first thing I'll do is hang all the singers.Garlan: A valiant deed unsung is no less valiant.

name: Garlan Tyrell
quote: Loras: Garlan often trains against three men, or even four. In battle it is seldom one against one, he says, so he likes to be prepared. Sansa: He must be very brave.Loras: He is a great knight. A better sword than me, in truth, though I'm the better lance.

name: Garlan Tyrell
quote: King Renly's shade was seen as well, slaying right and left as he led the Tywin_Lannister van. It's said his green armor took a ghostly glow from the wildfire, and his antlers ran with golden flames.

name: Garth IX Gardener
quote: When a wolf descends upon your flocks, all you gain by killing him is a short respite, for other wolves will come. If instead you feed the wolf and tame him and turn his pups into your guard dogs, they will protect the flock when the pack comes ravening.

name: Garth Greenhand
quote: Garth liked to plant his seed in fertile ground, they say. I shouldn't wonder that more than his hands were green.

name: Garth
quote: The Whore don't look like much, but when I heat her up red-hot and let her touch your cock, you'll cry for mother. And this here's my Lady Lu. It's her who'll take your head and hands, when Lord Wyman_Manderly sends down word.

name: Gawen Westerling
quote: Gawen is a good man, but his wife is Sybell_Spicer. He should never have wed her. The Westerlings always did have more honor than sense.

name: Gawen Westerling
quote: Jaime had to wonder how much Lord Gawen knew about Sybell_Spicer scheming. How much do we men ever know?

name: Gedmund Peake
quote: They are my fleets now, and Baela_Targaryen monkey is more suited to command them than Nuncle Gedmund.

name: Gendel
quote: Jon: Gendel had the king to the south, the Umbers to the east, and the Watch to the north of him. He died as well. Ygritte: You know nothing, Jon Snow. Gendel did not die. He cut his way free, through the crows, and led his people back north with the wolves howling at their heels. Only Gendel did not know the caves as Gorne had, and took a wrong turn. Deeper he went, and deeper, and when he tried t' turn back the ways that seemed familiar ended in stone rather than sky. Soon his torches began t' fail, one by one, till finally there was naught but dark. Gendel's folk were never seen again, but on a still night you can hear their children's children's children sobbing under the hills, still looking for the way back up. Listen? Do you hear them? Jon: This way under the Wall was lost as well? Ygritte: Some have searched for it. Them that go too deep find Gendel's children, and Gendel's children are always hungry. There's naught to eat in the dark but flesh.

name: Gendry
quote: Gendry: I'm a 'prentice smith, and one day might be I'll make a master armorer ... if I don't run off and lose my feet or get myself killed. Arya: The next helm you make, put mule's ears on it in place of bull's horns!

name: Gendry
quote: Arya: You're not my brother. Gendry: That's right. I'm too bloody lowborn to be kin to m'lady high. Arya: That's not the way I meant it. Gendry: Yes it is. Go away. I want to drink this wine in peace. Then maybe I'll go find that Bella and ring her bell for her.

name: Gendry
quote: Brienne: My lord? Gendry: Lord? I'm just a smith.

name: Gendry
quote: Brienne: You're a bastard. Gendry: I'm a knight.

name: Gendry
quote: Eddard: You know who the boy is. That is not a question. Tobho: The boy is my apprentice. Who he was before he came to me, that's none of my concern.

name: Gendry
quote: If the day ever comes when Gendry would rather wield a sword than forge one, send him to me. He has the look of a warrior.

name: Gendry
quote: The Baratheon look was stamped on his face, in his jaw, his eyes, that black hair.

name: Gendry
quote: When he worked, nothing existed for him but metal, bellows, fire. The hammer was like part of his arm.

name: Gendry
quote: Gendry had his own secret, though even he didn't seem to know what it was.

name: Gendry
quote: In his chainmail shirt with a sword in his hand, Gendry looked almost a man grown, and dangerous.

name: Gendry
quote: Bella: Don't he like girls? Arya: He's just stupid. He likes to polish helmets and beat on swords with hammers.

name: Gendry's mother
quote: Eddard: Gendry, when Jon_Arryn came to see you, what did you talk about?Gendry: He asked me questions is all, m'lord.Eddard: What sort of questions?Gendry: How was I, and was I well treated, and if I liked the work, and stuff about my mother. Who she was and what she looked like and all.Eddard: What did you tell him?Gendry: She died when I was little. She had yellow hair, and sometimes she used to sing to me, I remember. She worked in an alehouse.

name: Gendry's mother
quote: At least Eddard_Stark raised Jon_Snow, not like mine. I don't even know Robert_I_Baratheon name. Some smelly drunk, I'd wager, like the others my mother dragged home from the alehouse. Whenever she got mad at me, she'd say, 'If your father was here, he'd beat you bloody.' That's all I know of him.

name: Gendry's mother
quote: Brienne: Is your mother still alive? And your father, who was he?Gendry: You ask too many questions. My mother's dead and I never knew Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: Genna: I am sorry for your loss. Jaime: I had a new hand made, of gold. Genna: Very nice. Will they make you a gold father too? Tywin_Lannister was the loss I meant.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: Emmon: I have the decree. Signed by the king, by Tommen_Baratheon, see, the royal seal, the stag and lion. I am the lawful lord of Riverrun, and I will not have it reduced to a smoking ruin. Genna: Oh, put that fool thing away. So long as the Brynden_Tully sits inside Riverrun you can wipe your arse with that paper for all the good it does us.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: I may be an old fat woman, but I do not have cheese between my ears, Jaime.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: I was Tytos_Lannister precious princess ... and Tywin_Lannister too, until I disappointed him. My brother never learned to like the taste of disappointment.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: Though she had been a Frey for fifty years, Lady Genna remained very much a Lannister. Quite a lot of Lannister.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: Lady Genna claimed her stool with a look that dared any man there to question her presence. None did.

name: Genna Lannister
quote: Jaime: I would have expected you to depart with the Freys. Tom: Emmon_Frey a Frey, and this castle seems a nice snug place to pass the winter. Whitesmile_Wat went home with Ser Forley_Prester, so I thought I'd see if I could win his place. Wat's got that high sweet voice that the likes o' me can't hope to match. But I know twice as many bawdy songs as he does. Begging my lord's pardon. Jaime: You should get on famously with my aunt. If you hope to winter here, see that your playing pleases Lady Genna. She's the one that matters.

name: Gerion Lannister
quote: Tytos_Lannister would have made a splendid innkeep, but old Toad would have been a better lord.

name: Gerion Lannister
quote: That shadow Tywin_Lannister cast was long and black, and each of them had to struggle to find a little sun. Tygett_Lannister tried to be his own man, but he could never match your father, and that just made him angrier as the years went by. Gerion made japes. Better to mock the game than to play and lose. But Kevan_Lannister saw how things stood early on, so he made himself a place by your father's side.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: If I led a quarter of a million men to death, would they call me Gerold Garin_the_Great? I shall remain Darkstar, I think. At least it is mine own.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: I was weaned on venom, Dalt. Any viper takes a bite of me will rue it.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: Myrcella: Are you the Sword of the Morning now? Gerold: Men call me Darkstar, and I am of the night.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: He is highborn enough to make a worthy consort, she thought. Doran_Martell would question my good sense, but our children would be as beautiful as dragonlords. If there was a handsomer man in Dorne, she did not know him.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: By tradition the Kingsguard were the finest knights in all the Seven Kingdoms ... but Darkstar was Darkstar.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: You were a fool to make him part of this. Darkstar is the most dangerous man in Dorne. You and he have done us all great harm.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: Ser Gerold is more a viper than your uncle ever was. Prince Oberyn_Martell could see that he was poison, he said so more than once. It's just a pity that he never got around to killing him.

name: Gerold Dayne
quote: Poison, yes. Pretty poison, though.

name: Gerold Grafton
quote: Gerold: Lady Alayne. You look bright-eyed this morning. Alayne: You are kind to say so, my lord.

name: Gerold Hightower
quote: The Kingsguard does not flee.

name: Gerold Hightower
quote: You swore a vow to guard the king, not to judge him.

name: Gerold Hightower
quote: That was the White Bull, loyal to the end and a better man than me, all agree.

name: Gerold Hightower
quote: I learned from the White Bull and Barristan_Selmy. I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn_Martell and Ser Oswell_Whent and Ser Jonothor_Darry, good men every one.

name: Gerold Lannister
quote: Sefton: Were I given to wagering, I should place my gold on Gerold Lannister. He has yet to put in an appearance, but they say he is golden-haired and quick of wit, and more than six feet tall… Rohanne: …and Lady Webber is much taken with his letters.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood
quote: Scrubbed and groomed, clad in green velvets and an ermine half-cape, with his long red hair freshly washed and his fiery beard shaped and trimmed, the wildling looked every inch a southron lord.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood
quote: Gerrick of House Redbeard, King of the Wildlings.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood
quote: King o' the Wildlings? Har! King o' My Hairy Butt Crack, more like.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: Men's lives have meaning, not their deaths.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: Men may be fond of maidens, but women like a man who knows what he's about in the bedchamber. It's another sort of sword-play. Takes training to be good at it.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: I told him it was folly. I begged him to go home. Your Daenerys_Targaryen had no use for him, any man could see that. He crossed the world to offer her his love and fealty, and she laughed in his face.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: It was not in Gerris Drinkwater's nature to imagine they might fail, let alone that they might die.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: That smile has won many a maiden's heart, I'll wager.

name: Gerris Drinkwater
quote: If this one had been the prince, things might have gone elsewise, he could not help but think ... but there was something a bit too pleasant about Drinkwater for his taste. False coin, the old knight thought. He had known such men before.

name: Gevin Harlaw
quote: Paying the iron price. Balon_Greyjoy would approve.

name: Ghost of High Heart
quote: The old gods stir and will not let me sleep. I dreamt I saw a shadow with a burning heart butchering a Renly_Baratheon, aye. I dreamt of a man without a face, waiting on a bridge that swayed and swung. On his shoulder perched a Euron_Greyjoy. I dreamt of a roaring river and a woman that was a fish. Dead she drifted, with red tears on her cheeks, but when her eyes did open, oh, I woke from terror. All this I dreamt, and more.

name: Ghost of High Heart
quote: I dreamt a wolf howling in the rain, but no one heard his grief. I dreamt such a clangor I thought my head might burst, drums and horns and pipes and screams, but the saddest sound was the little bells. I dreamt of a Sansa_Stark at a feast with purple serpents in her hair, venom dripping from their fangs. And later I dreamt that maid again, slaying a savage giant in a castle built of snow.

name: Ghost of High Heart
quote: I see you. I see you, wolf child. Blood child. I thought it was the Beric_Dondarrion ... You are cruel to come to my hill, cruel. I gorged on grief at Summerhall, I need none of yours. Begone from here, dark heart. Begone!

name: Ghost of High Heart
quote: She has her own ways of knowing things, that one. The weirwoods whisper in her ear when she sleeps.

name: Ghost of High Heart
quote: Daenerys: A woods witch? Barristan: She came to court with Jenny_of_Oldstones. A stunted thing, grotesque to look upon. A dwarf, most people said, though dear to Lady Jenny, who always claimed that she was one of the children of the forest. Daenerys: What became of her? Barristan: Summerhall.

name: Gilly
quote: Gilly: They say Robert_I_Baratheon gives justice and protects the weak. M'lord, I beg you— Jon: Don't beg me anything.

name: Gilly
quote: Jon: I don't even know your name. Gilly: Gilly, Craster called me. For the gillyflower. Jon: That's pretty.

name: Gilly
quote: Jon: As you command, my lady. Gilly: Don't you call me that. I'm a mother, not a lady. I'm Craster's wife and Craster's daughter, and a mother.

name: Gilly
quote: Gilly: We could name the little one Maester, if you like. When he's old enough, not now. We could. Samwell: Maester is not a name. You could call him Aemon, though. Gilly: Dalla brought him forth during battle, as the swords sang all around her. That should be his name. Aemon Battleborn. Aemon_Steelsong.

name: Gilly
quote: Samwell: What we did ... if I could take a wife, I would sooner have you than any princess or highborn maiden, but I can't. I am still a crow. I said the words, Gilly. I went with Jon_Snow into the woods and said the words before a heart tree. Gilly: The trees watch over us. In the forest, they see all ... but there are no trees here. Only water, Sam. Only water.

name: Gilly
quote: A mother can't leave her son, or else she's cursed forever. Not a son. We saved Monster, Samwell_Tarly and me. Please. Please, m'lord. We saved him from the cold.

name: Gilly
quote: She was younger than he'd thought at first. A girl of fifteen or sixteen years, he judged, dark hair plastered across a gaunt face by the falling rain, her bare feet muddy to the ankles.

name: Gilly
quote: Damn her, he thought resentfully, and damn Samwell_Tarly twice for sending her to me. What did he think I could do for her? We're here to fight wildlings, not save them.

name: Gilly
quote: Jon: You're more than fond of Gilly, aren't you? Samwell: Gilly's good. She's good and kind. She ... she made me braver, Jon. Not brave, but ... braver.

name: Gilly
quote: If my wet nurse had looked like her, I'd still be on the teat.

name: Gilly
quote: Gilly was dark-haired and slim, with the big brown eyes of a doe.

name: Gilly
quote: Samwell: I took a vow. I will take no wife, and father no children. I said the words. Kojja: She knows the words you said. She is a child in some ways, but she is not blind. She knows why you wear the black, why you go to Oldtown. She knows she cannot keep you. She wants you for a little while, is all. She lost Craster and her husband, Gilly's_mother and her sisters, her home, her world. All she has is you, and Aemon_Steelsong. So you go to her, or swim.

name: Gilly
quote: She will curse me with her dying breath, but I saw no other way.

name: Gilly's mother
quote: Gilly don't lie. She's my girl, and I beat the lying out of her early on. You said you'd help her. Do what Ferny says, boy. Take the girl and be quick about it.

name: Gilwood Hunter
quote: The crown has made you Lord of Harrenhal. That should be enough for any man.

name: Gilwood Hunter
quote: Gilwood: Lysa_Arryn was never truly of the Vale, nor had she the right to dispose of us.Petyr: And Lord Robert_Arryn? Will your lordship also claim that Lady Lysa had no right to dispose of her own son?

name: Gilwood Hunter
quote: Hunter's cheeks and nose were red as apples, which bespoke a certain fondness for the grape. She made certain to fill his cup as often as he emptied it.

name: Girl bought to please the king
quote: Now you look all a princess.

name: Girl bought to please the king
quote: girl: My name— Tyrion: —is of no interest to me. Do you know where whores go? Girl: Whores sell themselves for coin. Tyrion: Or jewels, or gowns, or castles. But where do they go? Girl: Is it a riddle, m'lord? I'm no good at riddles.

name: Girl bought to please the king
quote: She despises me, he realized, but no more than I despise myself.

name: Girl bought to please the king
quote: It might please m'lord to strangle you. That's how I served Shae. Do you think Illyrio_Mopatis would object? Surely not. He has a hundred more like you, but no one else like me.

name: Girl bought to please the king
quote: She was trained in Lys, where they make an art of love. Viserys_Targaryen enjoyed her greatly.

name: Glover steward
quote: My Sybelle_Glover begs that Bran_Stark excuse her absence. Her babes are still too young for such a journey, and she was loath to leave them.

name: Godric Borrell
quote: These kings never bother with the Sisters. Why should they? We are small and poor. And yet you're here. Delivered to me by the storms.

name: Godric Borrell
quote: The sea's a treacherous cruel thing.

name: Godric Borrell
quote: The lords of the Three Sisters had a black repute, and none more so than Godric Borrell, Lord of Sweetsister, Shield of Sisterton, Master of Breakwater Castle, and Keeper of the Night Lamp … but even robber lords and wreckers were bound by the ancient laws of hospitality.

name: Godry Farring
quote: Godry: A man who bears Valyrian steel should use it for more than scratching his arse. Jon: I use Longclaw when I must, ser. Godry: How well, though? Show us. I promise not to hurt you, lad. Jon: Some other time, ser. I fear that I have other duties just now. Godry: You fear. I see that. He fears.

name: Godry Farring
quote: I have slain a giant, boy. Why should I fear some Mors_Umber who paints one on his shield?

name: Godry Farring
quote: Lord of Light, preserve us from this evil. Show us your bright sun again, still these winds, and melt these snows, that we may reach your foes and smite them. The night is dark and cold and full of terrors, but yours is the power and glory and the light. R'hllor, fill us with your fire.

name: Godry Farring
quote: Godry the Giantslayer. A big name for a small man. Farring was broad-chested and well muscled under his plate and mail. He was also arrogant and vain, it seemed to Asha, hungry for glory, deaf to caution, a glutton for praise, and contemptuous of smallfolk, wolves, and women.

name: Goghor the Giant
quote: Daenerys: I freed you. Why should you wish to end your lives upon the scarlet sands? Goghor: I train since three. I kill since six. Mother of Dragons says I am free. Why not free to fight? Daenerys: If it is fighting you want, fight for me. Swear your sword to the Mother's Men or the Free Brothers or the Stalwart Shields. Teach my other freedmen how to fight. Goghor: Before, I fight for master. You say, fight for you. I say, fight for me. For gold. For glory.

name: Goghor the Giant
quote: Barristan: Fall back before you are surrounded. Goghor: Goghor not fall back. Never.

name: Goodwin
quote: Men will always underestimate you,[...], and their pride will make them want to vanquish you quickly, let it be said that a woman tried them sorely. Let them spend their strength in furious attacks, whilst you conserve your own. Wait and watch, girl, wait and watch.

name: Gorghan of Old Ghis
quote: Gorghan of Old Ghis once wrote that a prophecy is like a treacherous woman. She takes your member in her mouth, and you moan with the pleasure of it and think, how sweet, how fine, how good this is... and then her teeth snap shut and your moans turn to screams. That is the nature of prophecy, said Gorghan. Prophecy will bite your prick off every time.

name: Gorold Goodbrother
quote: This is my hall, Damphair. It is not for you to say who must go and who remains.

name: Gorold Goodbrother
quote: Gorold: I must send word to Pyke, and soon. Damphair, I would have your counsel. What shall it be, homage or defiance? Aeron: For now, send only silence. I must pray on this.

name: Gorold Goodbrother
quote: The man lives too far from the sea.

name: Gravedigger
quote: Too many corpses, these days. Our gravedigger knows no rest.

name: Grazdan mo Eraz
quote: I pride myself on my knowledge of the savage senseless west. And yet, why should we speak thus harshly to one another? It is true that you committed savageries in Astapor, but we Yunkai'i are a most forgiving people. Your quarrel is not with us, Your Grace. Why squander your strength against our mighty walls when you will need every man to regain your father’s throne in far Westeros? Yunkai wishes you only well in that endeavor, and to prove the truth of that, I have brought you a gift. Fifty thousand golden marks. Yours, as a gesture of friendship from the Wise Masters of Yunkai. Gold given freely is better than plunder bought with blood, surely? So I say to you, Daenerys Targaryen, take this chest, and go.

name: Grazdan mo Eraz
quote: You shall rue this arrogance, whore. These little lizards will not keep you safe, I promise you. We will fill the air with arrows if they come within a league of Yunkai. Do you think it is so hard to kill a dragon?

name: Great Walrus
quote: Jon: The Great Walrus? Truly? Tormund: They have queer names along the Frozen Shore.

name: Greenbeard
quote: Greenbeard: The wolves will drown in blood if the Kingslayer's loose again. Thoros must be told. The Lord of Light will show him Jaime_Lannister in the flames. Anguy: There's a fire burning here. Greenbeard: Do I look a priest to you, Archer? When Pello of Tyrosh peers into the fire, the cinders singe his beard.

name: Greenbeard
quote: Little one, a peasant may skin a common squirrel for his pot, but if he finds a gold squirrel in his tree he takes it to his lord, or he will wish he did.

name: Greenbeard
quote: Greenbeard, is it? Or Greybeard? Mother take mercy, when did you get so old?

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: A man who sees nothing has no use for his eyes, cut them out and give them to your next outrider. Tell him you hope that four eyes might see better than two ... and if not, the man after him will have six.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Oberyn: Have they told you who I am? Gregor: Some dead man.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Elia_Martell. I killed Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar). Then I raped her. Then I smashed her fucking head in. Like this.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: No one could ever withstand Gregor.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Pycelle: The man is an anointed knight. Marq: A false knight! Lord Tywin_Lannister mad dog.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: That beast's head would make a noble gift for all the people of the realm, I vow.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Ser Gregor has served us well. No other knight in the realm inspires such terror in our enemies.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Ellaria: You are going to fight that? Oberyn: I am going to kill that.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: The flesh mortifies and the wounds ooze pus. Even maggots will not touch such foulness. His convulsions are so violent that I have had to gag him to prevent him from biting off his own tongue. I have cut away as much tissue as I dare, and treated the rot with boiling wine and bread mold, to no avail. The veins in his arms are turning black. When I leeched him, all the leeches died.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: Qyburn: It is a wonder that the man is still alive, if truth be told. Cersei: His size. Gregor is a very large man. Also a very stupid one. Too stupid to know when he should die, it seems.

name: Gregor Clegane
quote: If ever a man deserved to die screaming, it was Gregor Clegane.

name: Grenn
quote: Grenn: Nobody likes cravens. I wish we hadn't helped Samwell_Tarly. What if they think we're craven too? Pypar: You're too stupid to be craven. Grenn: I am not. Pypar: Yes you are. If a bear attacked you in the woods, you'd be too stupid to run away. Grenn: I would not. I'd run away faster than you.

name: Grenn
quote: Pypar: We're not all as dumb as Grenn. Grenn: You are so. You're dumber.

name: Grenn
quote: Todder: This is so stupid, it's like something the Aurochs would do. Grenn: I would not. I'm no oathbreaker. I said the words and I meant them.

name: Grenn
quote: Samwell: They're mocking me, the same way they mock Bedwyck by calling him 'Giant.' Grenn: He's not a giant, though, and Small_Paul was never small. Well, maybe when he was a babe at the breast, but not after. You did slay the Other, though, so it's not the same. Samwell: I just ... I never ... I was scared! Grenn: No more than me. It's only Pypar who says I'm too dumb to be frightened. I get as frightened as anyone. I used to be scared of Jon_Snow, whenever I had to fight him. He was so quick, and he fought like he meant to kill me. I never said, though. Sometimes I think everyone is just pretending to be brave, and none of us really are. Maybe pretending is how you get brave, I don't know. Let them call you Slayer, who cares? Samwell: You never liked Ser Alliser_Thorne to call you Aurochs. Grenn: He was saying I was big and stupid. If Pyp wanted to call me Aurochs, though, he could. Or you, or Jon. An aurochs is a fierce strong beast, so that's not so bad, and I am big, and getting bigger.

name: Grenn
quote: Jon: Grenn, you have the Wall. Grenn: Me? Pypar: Him? Grenn: But, b-but what do I do if the wildlings attack again? Jon: Stop them.

name: Grenn
quote: The night before they left the Wall, Pypar had teased Grenn the way he did, Sam remembered, smiling and saying how Grenn was a good choice for the ranging, since he was too stupid to be terrified. Grenn hotly denied it until he realized what he was saying. He was stocky and thick-necked and strong—Ser Alliser_Thorne had called him "Aurochs," the same way he called Sam "Ser Piggy" and Jon_Snow "Lord Snow"—but he had always treated Sam nice enough.

name: Grenn
quote: Grenn had changed a great deal from the big, clumsy, red-necked boy Jon had first befriended. He had grown half a foot, his chest and shoulders had thickened, and he had not cut his hair nor trimmed his beard since the Fist of the First Men. It made him look as huge and shaggy as an aurochs, the mocking name that Ser Alliser_Thorne had hung on him during training.

name: Grenn
quote: I am the shield that guards the realms of men, he remembered. He wondered what those men would say if they realized their realms were being guarded by the likes of Grenn, Pypar, and Eddison_Tollett.

name: Grey King
quote: The Grey King was king over all the Iron Islands, but he left a hundred sons behind him, and upon his death they began to quarrel over who would succeed him.

name: Grey Worm
quote: It is a lucky name. The name this one was born to was accursed. That was the name he had when he was taken for a slave. But Grey Worm is the name this one drew the day Daenerys Stormborn set him free.

name: Grey Worm
quote: I have no plans for Grey Worm's race or personal history to become important at this time, though I do reserve the right to change my mind. Sometimes the muse plays strange tricks on me.

name: Grimtongue
quote: Rolfe_the_Dwarf's not so tall as he once was.

name: Grimtongue
quote: Nine, and damn you all.

name: Grunt
quote: Grunt had no tongue and Sour_Alyn had no wits, Lord Ramsay_Snow liked to say. One was brutal, the other mean, but both had spent most of their lives in service at the Dreadfort. They did as they were told.

name: Guncer Sunglass
quote: The Rambtons had slain four of the queen's men before the others overwhelmed them. Afterward Guncer Sunglass, mildest and most pious of lords, told Stannis_Baratheon he could no longer support his claim. Now he shared a sweltering cell with Barre and Ser Hubard_Rambton two surviving sons.

name: Guncer Sunglass
quote: Davos: I want no part of you, my lady. Or your god. May the Seven protect me. Melisandre: They did not protect Guncer Sunglass. He prayed thrice each day, and bore seven seven-pointed stars upon his shield, but when R'hllor reached out his hand his prayers turned to screams, and he burned.

name: Gunthor
quote: When you meet your gods, say it was Gunthor son of Gurn of the Stone Crows who sent you to them.

name: Gunthor
quote: Gunthor: What would you give us for your lives, Tyrion son of Tywin_Lannister? Swords? Lances? Mail? Tyrion: All that, and more, Gunthor son of Gurn. I will give you the Vale of Arryn.

name: Guyard Morrigen
quote: Jon: Renly_Baratheon, I beg the honor.Guyard: Beg all you like, by rights it should be one of the seven who strikes the first blow.Randyll: It takes more than a pretty cloak to charge a shield wall. I was leading Mace_Tyrell's van when you were still sucking on your mother's teat, Guyard.

name: Guyard Morrigen
quote: Guyard the Green, yes? Of the Rainbow Guard? Sworn to give his own life for Renly_Baratheon? If I had such a cloak, I would be ashamed to wear it.

name: Gwayne Corbray
quote: For near an hour they danced together on their horses, wheeling and circling and slashing as men died all around them. It's said that whenever Blackfyre and Lady Forlorn clashed, you could hear the sound for a league around. It was half a song and half a scream, they say. But when at last the Lady faltered, Blackfyre clove through Ser Gwayne's helm and left him blind and bleeding. Daemon_I_Blackfyre dismounted to see that his fallen foe was not trampled, and commanded Redtusk to carry him back to the maesters in the rear.

name: Gwayne V Gardener
quote: They gave us seven gods, we gave them dirt and daughters, and our sons and grandsons shall be as brothers.

name: Gwynesse Harlaw
quote: I will only stay until my grief has passed, though by rights Ten Towers should be mine, for I am seven years your elder.

name: Gwynesse Harlaw
quote: I am seven years Rodrik_Harlaw. Ten Towers should be mine.

name: Gwynesse Harlaw
quote: Asha: And how fares my aunt? Rodrik: Still seven years my elder, and convinced Ten Towers should be hers. Gwynesse grows forgetful, but that she does not forget. She mourns for her dead husband as deeply as she did the day he died, though she cannot always recall his name.

name: Gwyneth Yronwood
quote: I want to go back to Yronwood and kiss both of your sisters, marry Gwyneth Yronwood, watch her flower into beauty, have a child by her.

name: Gylbert Farwynd
quote: We will build ten thousand ships as Nymeria once did and take sail with all our people to the land beyond the sunset. There every man shall be a king and every wife a queen.

name: Gylbert Farwynd
quote: His eyes, Aeron saw, were now grey, now blue, as changeable as the seas. Mad eyes, he thought, fool's eyes. The vision he spoke of was doubtless a snare set by the Storm God to lure the ironborn to destruction.

name: Gyldayn
quote: Who can know the heart of a dragon?

name: Gyles Greycloak
quote: Jaime: Gyles Greycloak? Orivel the Open-Handed? Loras: Gyles was a traitor, Orivel a coward. Men who shamed the white cloak.

name: Gyles Belgrave
quote: You were not wrong, Lord Stark. A knight of the Kingsguard should not outlive Aegon_II_Targaryen.

name: Gyles Belgrave
quote: No knight of the Kingsguard should outlive Aegon_II_Targaryen when that king dies by violence.

name: Gyles Rosby
quote: Pycelle: Where is the coin to come from? Gyles: There is no ... no ... we do not ... Harys: The crown incomes have never been greater. Ser Kevan_Lannister told me so himself. Gyles: ... expenses ... gold cloaks ... Cersei: Our lord treasurer is trying to say that we have too many gold cloaks and too little gold.

name: Gyles Rosby
quote: The gods must have been mad to waste manhood on the likes of him, and I must have been mad to demand his release.

name: Gyles Rosby
quote: Cersei: I have asked Lord Gyles Rosby to serve as our new master of coin, and he has done me the honor of accepting. Mace: Rosby? That ... cougher?

name: Gyles Rosby
quote: Lord Gyles has been threatening to die for as long as I have known him, but he is still with us, and will be for many years, I do hope. No doubt he will cough the whole lot of us into our graves.

name: Gyles Rosby
quote: Pycelle: I ... I have purged his lordship, bled him, treated him with poultices and infusions ... the mists give him some relief and sweetsleep helps with the violence of his coughing, but he is bringing up bits of lung with the blood now, I fear. Cersei: Be that as it may. You will return to Lord Gyles and inform him that he does not have my leave to die.

name: Haereg
quote: You may dress an ironman in silks and velvets, teach him to read and write and give him books, instruct him in chivalry and courtesy and the mysteries of the Faith, but when you look into his eyes, the sea will still be there, cold and grey and cruel.

name: Hagen
quote: Hagen: If we die with dry feet, how will we find our way to the Drowned God's watery halls? Cromm: These woods are full of little streams. All of them lead to rivers, and all the rivers to the sea.

name: Hagen
quote: AH​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​oo​ooo, the warhorn cried, long and low, a sound to curdle blood. Asha had begun to hate the sound of horns. On Old Wyk her uncle's hellhorn had blown a death knell for her dreams, and now Hagen was sounding what might well be her last hour on earth.

name: Hagen
quote: Hagen, blow your horn and make the forest shake.

name: Hagen's daughter
quote: Asha: You know Hagen's daughter, the one with the red hair. She steers a ship as well as any man and has a pretty face. Seventeen, and I've seen her looking at you. Tristifer: I don't want Hagen's daughter.

name: Hagen's daughter
quote: Hagen's daughter stumbled to her knees, snatched up his sword, stabbed the second man, and then rose again, smeared with blood and mud, her long red hair unbound, and plunged into the fight.

name: Haggon
quote: The free folk fear skinchangers, but they honor us as well. South of the Wall, the kneelers hunt us down and butcher us like pigs.

name: Hake
quote: Dywen: Seems to me like it smells ... well ... cold. Hake: Your head's as wooden as your teeth. There's no smell to cold.

name: Hake
quote: The man who owns a boat need never be a thrall, for every captain is a king upon the deck of his own ship.

name: Halder
quote: It's the builders for me. What use would rangers be if the Wall fell down?

name: Halder
quote: I helped Pate_(ranger) carve the stone for the pommel, and your friend Samwell_Tarly bought the garnets in Mole's Town.

name: Halder
quote: Halder: Do we have to bind your hands, or will you give us your word you'll ride back peaceful? Jon: I won't run, if that's what you mean.

name: Halder
quote: Know your foe, Ser Rodrik_Cassel had taught him once; Jon knew Halder, brutally strong but short of patience, with no taste for defense. Frustrate him, and he would leave himself open, as certain as sunset.

name: Haldon
quote: A book can be as dangerous as a sword in the right hands.

name: Haldon
quote: The dead do not rise.

name: Haldon
quote: The Lannisters make enemies easily but seem to have a harder time keeping friends.

name: Hali
quote: He's a fierce one, he is. You mean to fight us, boy?

name: Hali
quote: You’re as stupid as you are ugly, Hali.

name: Halleck
quote: I don't like you, crow, but I never liked Mance_Rayder neither, no more'n Harma did. Still, we fought for him. Why not fight for you?

name: Halleck Hoare
quote: Though he called himself ironborn, sacrificed to the Drowned God, and always kept three priests at his side, there was more of the Trident than of the salt sea in Halleck Hoare, and he seemed to look upon the islands only as a source of arms, ships, and men.

name: Halleck Hoare
quote: Like Harwyn_Hoare, King Halleck spent a great deal of his reign in camp tents, on campaign. When not at war, he ruled his broad domains from a modest tower house at Fairmarket in the heart of the riverlands, near the site of his father's greatest victory.

name: Hallis Mollen
quote: They're coming, my lady. Gods be with us.

name: Hallis Mollen
quote: A tourney.

name: Hallis Mollen
quote: He had asked for the honor of protecting her in the battle to come; it was his right, as Winterfell's captain of guards, and Robb_Stark had not refused it to him.

name: Hallis Mollen
quote: He had a penchant for loudly announcing the obvious.

name: Hallis Mollen
quote: It made her wonder where Eddard_Stark had come to rest. The silent sisters had taken his bones north, escorted by Hallis Mollen and a small honor guard. Had Ned ever reached Winterfell, to be interred beside his brother Brandon_Stark in the dark crypts beneath the castle? Or did the door slam shut at Moat Cailin before Hal and the sisters could pass?

name: Hallyne
quote: Wildfire is but one of the dread secrets of our ancient order.

name: Hallyne
quote: The substance flows through my veins, and lives in the heart of every pyromancer. We respect its power.

name: Hallyne
quote: Jaime: If these flames spread beyond the tower, you may end up burning down the castle whether you mean to or not. Wildfire is treacherous. Cersei: Lord Hallyne has assured me that his pyromancers can control the fire. Let all of King's Landing see the flames. It will be a lesson to our enemies.

name: Hallyne
quote: I know that Aurane_Waters is a bad idea, and Hallyne is a worse one.

name: Halys Hornwood
quote: Jovial Lord Hornwood had no daughters, but he did bring gifts, a horse one day, a haunch of venison the next, a silver-chased hunting horn the day after, and he asked nothing in return ... nothing but a certain holdfast taken from his grandfather, and hunting rights north of a certain ridge, and leave to dam the White Knife, if it please the lord.

name: Harbert Paege
quote: All bastards are thieves, or worse. Blood will tell.

name: Hareth
quote: Everyone called him Horse. He had been a stablehand in Mole's Town, one of the few moles who had stayed at Castle Black. The rest had run back to their fields and hovels, or their beds in the underground brothel. Horse wanted to take the black, though, the great buck-toothed fool.

name: Harghaz
quote: Perhaps he was drunk, or mad. Perhaps he had loved Barsena_Blackhair from afar or had heard some whisper of the girl Hazzea. Perhaps he was just some common man who wanted bards to sing of him. He darted forward, his boar spear in his hands. Red sand kicked up beneath his heels, and shouts rang out from the seats. Drogon raised his head, blood dripping from his teeth. The hero leapt onto his back and drove the iron spearpoint down at the base of the dragon's long scaled neck. Dany and Drogon screamed as one.

name: Harghaz
quote: Quentyn: His name was Harghaz. Archibald: Hizdahr, Humzum, Hagnag, what does it matter? I call them all Harzoo. He was no dragonslayer. All he did was get his arse roasted black and crispy. Quentyn: He was brave.

name: Harghaz
quote: Half the city is calling the dragonslayer a hero, and the other half spits blood at the mention of his name.

name: Harma
quote: Harma: Kill him. Send his body back up in that cage o' theirs and tell them to send us someone else. I'll keep his head for my standard. A turncloak's worse than a dog. Varamyr: I warned you he was false. I never did like the smell o' him. Tormund: Pull in your claws, beastling. Jon_Snow here to hear. You lay a paw on him, might be I'll take me that shadowskin cloak I been wanting. Harma: Tormund Crowlover. You are a great sack o' wind, old man.

name: Harma
quote: Kedge: Harma the Dogshead has the van, the poxy bitch. Goady crept up on her camp and saw her plain by the fire. That fool Tumberjon wanted to pick her off with an arrow, but Thoren_Smallwood had better sense. Chett: How many were there, could you tell? Kedge: Many and more. Twenty, thirty thousand, we didn't stay to count. Harma had five hundred in the van, every one ahorse.

name: Harma
quote: There was Harma Dogshead, a squat keg of a woman with cheeks like slabs of white meat, who hated dogs and killed one every fortnight to make a fresh head for her banner; earless Styr, Magnar of Thenn, whose own people thought him more god than lord; Varamyr Sixskins, a small mouse of a man whose steed was a savage white snow bear that stood thirteen feet tall on its hind legs.

name: Harma
quote: Behind her stood her banner bearer, holding a pole with a dog's head on it, fresh enough to still be leaking blood.

name: Harma
quote: Ygritte: You call us thieves, but at least a thief has t' be brave and clever and quick. A kneeler only has t' kneel. Jon: Harma and the Bag of Bones don't come raiding for fish and apples. They steal swords and axes. Spices, silks, and furs. They grab every coin and ring and jeweled cup they can find, casks of wine in summer and casks of beef in winter, and they take women in any season and carry them off beyond the Wall.

name: Harma
quote: Edd: Just last night I dreamt I was pissing off the Wall when someone decided to give the horn a toot. Not that I'm complaining. It was better than my old dream, where Harma Dogshead was feeding me to her pigs. Jon: Harma's dead. Edd: But not the pigs. They look at me the way Samwell_Tarly used to look at ham.

name: Harmon Dondarrion
quote: This Vulture_King_(Aenys_I) is half-mad, and his followers are a rabble, undisciplined and unwashed. We can smell them coming fifty leagues away.

name: Harmund Sharp
quote: Asha: Harmund Sharp, your son Harrag_Sharp died at Winterfell, for this. You have other sons, I think. If you'd trade their lives for turnips, shout Victarion_Greyjoy name!Harmund: And if I shout your name? What then?Asha: Peace. Land. Victory.

name: Harmune
quote: Maester Mullin at the Shadow Tower is more fighter than scholar, and Maester Harmune of Eastwatch is drunk more than he's sober.

name: Harrag Sharp
quote: Asha: Harmund Sharp, your son Harrag died at Winterfell, for this. You have other sons, I think. If you'd trade their lives for turnips, shout Victarion_Greyjoy name! Harmund: And if I shout your name? What then? Asha: Peace. Land. Victory.

name: Harren Hoare
quote: Aegon: Yield now and you may remain as Lord of the Iron Islands. Yield now, and your sons will live to rule after you. I have eight thousand men outside your walls. Harren: What is outside my walls is of no concern to me. Those walls are strong and thick. Aegon: But not so high as to keep out dragons. Dragons fly. Harren: I built in stone. Stone does not burn. Aegon: When the sun sets, your line shall end.

name: Harren Hoare
quote: Had I a daughter, the dragonslayer could claim her hand as well. Instead I will give him one of Tully's daughters, or all three if he likes. Or he may pick one of Blackwood's whelps, or Strong's, or any girl born of these traitors of the Trident, these lords of yellow mud.

name: Harren Hoare
quote: No king in Westeros was more feared than Black Harren, whose cruelty had become legendary all through the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Harren Hoare
quote: Harren had beggared the riverlands and the Iron Islands alike to ornament his dream.

name: Harrion Karstark
quote: As to this of my cousins, we offer Harrion Karstark and Ser Wylis_Manderly for Willem_Lannister, and Medger_Cerwyn and Ser Donnel_Locke for your brother Tion_Frey. Tell Robb_Stark that two Lannisters are worth four northmen in any season.

name: Harrion Karstark
quote: No one ransomed the northmen, though. Wylis_Manderly haunted the kitchens, Hot_Pie told her, always looking for a morsel. His mustache was so bushy that it covered his mouth, and the clasp that held his cloak was a silver-and-sapphire trident. He belonged to Lord Tywin_Lannister, but the fierce, bearded young man who liked to walk the battlements alone in a black cloak patterned with white suns had been taken by some hedge knight who meant to get rich off him. Sansa_Stark would have known who he was, and the fat one too, but Arya had never taken much interest in titles and sigils.

name: Harrion Karstark
quote: Brynden: Rickard_Karstark heir was at Harrenhal as well. The eldest son, the one the Lannisters took captive on the Green Fork. Robb: Harrion. His name is Harrion. A king had best know the names of his enemies, don't you think? Brynden: You know that for a certainty? That this will make young Karstark your enemy? Robb: What else would he be? I am about to kill his father, he's not like to thank me. Brynden: He might. There are sons who hate their fathers, and in a stroke you will make him Lord of Karhold. Robb: Even if Harrion were that sort, he could never openly forgive his father's killer. His own men would turn on him. These are northmen, Uncle. The north remembers.

name: Harrion Karstark
quote: Harrion Karstark was captive here when we took the castle, did you know? I gave him all the Karhold men still with me and sent him off with Robett_Glover. I do hope nothing ill befell him at Duskendale ... else Alys_Karstark would be all that remains of Lord Rickard_Karstark progeny.

name: Harrion Karstark
quote: Alys: Harry was a prisoner at Maidenpool when last we heard, but that was almost a year ago. He may be dead as well. I did not know where else to turn but to the last son of Eddard_Stark. Jon: Why not the king? Karhold declared for Stannis_Baratheon. Alys: Arnolf_Karstark declared for Stannis, in hopes it might provoke the Lannisters to take poor Harry's head. Should my brother die, Karhold should pass to me, but my uncles want my birthright for their own. Once Cregan_Karstark gets a child by me they won't need me anymore.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Alayne: If it please you, I will show you to your chambers myself. Harrold: Why should it please me to be escorted anywhere by Petyr_Baelish bastard? Anya: You are a guest here, Harry. See that you remember that.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Harrold: No one told me you were clever. Alayne: Should we ever wed, you'll have to send Saffron back to her father. I'll be all the spice you'll want. Harold: I will hold you to that promise, my lady. Until that day, may I wear your favor in the tourney? Alayne: You may not. It is promised to ... another.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Alayne: I pray he proves a worthy knight. Myranda: I pray he gets the pox. He has a bastard daughter by some common girl, you know. Nestor_Royce had hoped to marry me to Harry, but Anya_Waynwood would not hear of it. I do not know whether it was me she found unsuitable, or just my dowry.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Petyr: You are promised to Harrold Hardyng, sweetling, provided you can win his boyish heart ... which should not be hard, for you. Alayne: Harry the Heir? He was just knighted. And he has a bastard daughter by some common girl. Petyr: And another on the way by a different wench. Harry can be a beguiling one, no doubt. Soft sandy hair, deep blue eyes, and dimples when he smiles. And very gallant, I am told. Bastard-born or no, sweetling, when this match is announced you will be the envy of every highborn maiden in the Vale, and a few from the riverlands and the Reach as well.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: When Robert_Arryn dies, Harry the Heir becomes Lord Harrold, Defender of the Vale and Lord of the Eyrie. Jon_Arryn's bannermen will never love me, nor our silly, shaking Robert, but they will love their Young Falcon ... and when they come together for his wedding, and you come out with your long auburn hair, clad in a maiden's cloak of white and grey with a direwolf emblazoned on the back ... why, every knight in the Vale will pledge his sword to win you back your birthright.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Ser Harrold Hardyng looked every inch a lord-in-waiting; clean-limbed and handsome, straight as a lance, hard with muscle. Men old enough to have known Jon_Arryn in his youth said Ser Harrold had his look, she knew. He had a mop of sandy blond hair, pale blue eyes, an aquiline nose. Joffrey_Baratheon was comely too, though, she reminded herself.

name: Harrold Hardyng
quote: Harry the Heir? Harry the Arse, I say. He’s just some upjumped squire.

name: Harry Strickland
quote: You will pardon me if I do not rise. Our march was wearisome, and my toes are prone to blisters. It is a curse.

name: Harry Strickland
quote: Homeless Harry looked little like a warrior.

name: Harry Strickland
quote: Harry Strickland had always been a genial man, better at hammering out contracts than at hammering on foes. He had a nose for gold, but whether he had the belly for battle was another question.

name: Harry Strickland
quote: Harry's an old maid, isn't he?

name: Harsley
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Harsley
quote: They was king's men burned our village. Before that, some other king's men took our sheep. They were for a different king, but that didn't matter none to our sheep. King's men killed Harsley and Ser Ormond_(knight), and raped Lacey till she died.

name: Harwood Fell
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon would have done it in ten. Robert would have been inside Winterfell a fortnight ago, thumbing his nose at Roose_Bolton from the battlements.

name: Harwood Stout
quote: Hosteen: We should take the fight to Stannis_Baratheon and make an end to him. Harwood: Leave the castle? Would you have us charge blindly into the snow?

name: Harwyn Hoare
quote: Longships are meant to be sailed [and] swords are meant to be blooded.

name: Harwyn Hoare
quote: Raventree shall endure long after you and yours are cast down and destroyed. Your line shall end in blood and fire.

name: Harwyn Hoare
quote: His palace was a tent, his throne a saddle.

name: Harwyn Plumm
quote: Harwyn was a different sort of Plumm; hard-eyed and taciturn, unforgiving ... and deadly, with his hammer in his hand. A good man to command a garrison, but not a man to love.

name: Harwyn Plumm
quote: Jaime: Darry needs a lion, coz. So does Amerei_Frey. She gets moist between the legs every time someone mentions Hardstone. If she hasn't bedded him yet, she will soon. Lancel: If she loves him, I wish them joy of one another.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: Harys: Ser Jaime_Lannister taken, the siege broken ... this is a catastrophe! Addam: I am sure we are all grateful to you for pointing out the obvious, Ser Harys.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: These are perilous times.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: Better than you, you chinless craven, Tyrion thought. Jaime_Lannister might have lost Riverrun, but it angered him to hear his brother slandered by the likes of Swyft, a shameless lickspittle whose greatest accomplishment was marrying Dorna_Swyft to Ser Kevan_Lannister, and thereby attaching himself to the Lannisters.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: Kevan_Lannister should be Tommen_Baratheon Hand. Harys Swyft is a toad, and Cersei_Lannister is a fool if she thinks elsewise.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: Genna: Is it true that Cersei_Lannister burned the Red Keep? Jaime: Only the Tower of the Hand. Genna: She would have done better to leave the tower and burn her Hand. Harys Swyft? If ever a man deserved his arms, it is Ser Harys.

name: Harys Swyft
quote: The knight of the yellow chicken, Cersei mused. You ought to take a worm for your sigil, ser. A chicken is too bold for you.

name: Hazzea
quote: "It were the black one," the Hazzea's_father said, in a Ghiscari growl, "the winged shadow. He come down from the sky and … and …" No. Daenerys_Targaryen shivered. No, no, oh no. […] Ser Barristan_Selmy said quietly, "[…] Those are no sheep bones." No, Dany thought, those are the bones of a child.

name: Hazzea
quote: Her name had been Hazzea.

name: Hazzea
quote: "Drogon killed a little girl. Her name was … her name …" Dany could not recall the child's name. That made her so sad that she would have cried if all her tears had not been burned away.

name: Hazzea's father
quote: "It were the black one," the man said, in a Ghiscari growl, "the winged shadow. He come down from the sky and … and …" No. Daenerys_Targaryen shivered. No, no, oh no. […] Ser Barristan_Selmy said quietly, "[…] Those are no sheep bones." No, Dany thought, those are the bones of a child.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: Daemon_Targaryen will find some pretext to put them all to death. Even Helaena and her little ones.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: Aegon_II_Targaryen is not in my bed, you may be sure. Feel free to search beneath the blankets.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: As for my half-brothers and my sweet sister, Helaena, they have been led astray by the counsel of evil men. Let them come to Dragonstone, bend the knee, and ask my forgiveness, and I shall gladly spare their lives and take them back into my heart, for they are of my own blood, and no man or woman is as accursed as the kinslayer.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: You hear that, little boy? Your momma wants you dead.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: Though Blood and Cheese had spared her life, Queen Helaena cannot be said to have survived that fateful dusk.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: Rhaenyra_Targaryen who sits bleeding on the Iron Throne, her whore's lips glistening and red with the blood of her sweet sister.

name: Helaena Targaryen
quote: I want to see my sons again, and Helaena, my sweet girl...

name: Helicent Uffering
quote: Duncan: Ser Eustace_Osgrey bid me talk with you concerning the recent trouble at your dam.Helicent: The... dam, you say?Duncan: The stream, the Chequy Water. Your ladyship built a dam across it...Helicent: Oh, I am quite sure I haven't. Why, I have been at my devotions all morning, ser.

name: Helicent Uffering
quote: Do not think ill of Lady Helicent, I pray you. My good-sister is a simple creature, but she has no harm in her. For all her piety, she could not dress herself without her septas.

name: Helman Tallhart
quote: Lady Catelyn, you are fair as ever, a welcome sight in troubled times.

name: Helman Tallhart
quote: Catelyn: Lord Walder will grant you your crossing. His swords are yours as well, less four hundred he means to keep back to hold the Twins. I suggest that you leave four hundred of your own, a mixed force of archers and swordsmen. He can scarcely object to an offer to augment his garrison ... but make certain you give the command to a man you can trust. Lord Walder may need help keeping faith. Robb: As you say, Mother. Perhaps ... Ser Helman Tallhart, do you think? Catelyn: A fine choice.

name: High Septon (Aegon's Conquest)
quote: I must do as he did, three hundred years ago. I must pray, and fast.

name: High Septon (fat one)
quote: High Septon: As we sin, so do we suffer. This man has confessed his crimes in the sight of gods and men, here in this holy place. The gods are just, yet Blessed Baelor taught us that they are also merciful. What shall be done with this traitor, Your Grace? Joffrey: Cersei_Lannister bids me let Lord Eddard_Stark take the black, and Lady Sansa_Stark has begged mercy for her father. But they have the soft hearts of women. So long as I am your king, treason shall never go unpunished. Ser Ilyn_Payne, bring me his head!

name: High Septon (fat one)
quote: The High Septon haggles worse than a Dornish fishmonger.

name: High Septon (fat one)
quote: Even the High Septon has forgotten the gods! He bathes in scented waters and grows fat on lark and lamprey while his people starve!

name: High Septon (fat one)
quote: What was it that Moon_Boy had said of him the other day? A pious man who worships the Seven so fervently that he eats a meal for each of them whenever he sits to table. The memory of the fool's jape made Tyrion smile.

name: High Septon (Tyrion's)
