quote: My lords, autumn is upon us, and all men of good heart are weary of war.

name: High Septon (Tyrion's)
quote: Our present High Septon is a trained seal who barks prettily on command.

name: High Septon (Tyrion's)
quote: When it seemed that I might die, Kevan_Lannister brought the High Septon to pray for me. He is a good man. He says the Mother spared me for some holy purpose, so I might atone for my sins.

name: High Septon (Tyrion's)
quote: He was an old done man, Your Grace His passing should not have surprised us. No man can ask for more than to die peacefully in his sleep, full of years.

name: High Septon (Tyrion's)
quote: I complained of the High Septon, I admit it. He was Tyrion_Lannister creature, weak and corrupt, a stain upon our Holy Faith. Your High Holiness knows that as well as I. It may be that Osney_Kettleblack thought that his death would please me. If so, I bear some part of the blame ... but murder? No. Of that I am innocent.

name: High Sparrow
quote: These are the bones of holy men, murdered for their faith. They served the Seven even unto death. Some starved, some were tortured. Septs have been despoiled, maidens and mothers raped by godless men and demon worshipers. Even silent sisters have been molested. Our Mother Above cries out in her anguish. It is time for all anointed knights to forsake their worldly masters and defend our Holy Faith. Come with us to the city, if you love the Seven.

name: High Sparrow
quote: Cersei: Septon Raynard? What are you doing on your knees? High Sparrow: He is cleaning the floor. Work is a form of prayer, most pleasing to the Smith.

name: High Sparrow
quote: Cersei: Tywin_Lannister gave High_Septon_(Tyrion's) a crown of rare beauty, wrought in crystal and spun gold. High Sparrow: And for that gift we honor him in our prayers, but the poor need food in their bellies more than we need gold and crystal on our head. That crown has been sold. So have the others in our vaults, and all our rings, and our robes of cloth-of-gold and cloth-of-silver. Wool will keep a man as warm. That is why the Seven gave us sheep.

name: High Sparrow
quote: High Sparrow: This debt shall be forgiven, and King Tommen_Baratheon will have his blessing. The Warrior's Sons shall escort me to him, shining in the glory of their Faith, whilst my sparrows go forth to defend the meek and humble of the land, reborn as Poor Fellows as of old. Cersei: I shall have the papers drawn up, and His Grace will sign them and affix them with the royal seal. High Sparrow: Seven save His Grace. Long may he reign. Let the wicked tremble!

name: High Sparrow
quote: There can be no penance without pain. No man should spare himself the scourge, as I told Ser Osney_Kettleblack. I seldom feel so close to god as when I am being whipped for mine own wickedness, though my darkest sins are no wise near as black as his.

name: High Sparrow
quote: Cersei: Tommen_Baratheon loves his Margaery_Tyrell so much, Your Holiness, I fear it might be hard for him or his lords to judge her justly. Perhaps the Faith should conduct the trial?High Sparrow: I have had the selfsame thought, Your Grace. Just as Maegor the Cruel once took the swords from the Faith, so Jaehaerys the Conciliator deprived us of the scales of judgment. Yet who is truly fit to judge a queen, save the Seven Above and the godsworn below? A sacred court of seven judges shall sit upon this case. Three shall be of your female sex. A maiden, a mother, and a crone. Who could be more suited to judge the wickedness of women?

name: High Sparrow
quote: High Sparrow: These are common sins. The wickedness of widows is well-known, and all women are wantons at heart, given to using their wiles and their beauty to work their wills on men. There is no treason here, so long as you did not stray from your marriage bed whilst His Grace King Robert_I_Baratheon was still alive. Cersei: Never. Never, I swear it.

name: High Sparrow
quote: Cersei: I have confessed— High Sparrow: —to certain sins, aye. Others you deny. Your trial will separate the truths from the falsehoods. I shall ask the Seven to forgive the sins you have confessed and pray that you be found innocent of these other accusations.

name: High Sparrow
quote: He is utterly mad. The Most Devout must have been mad as well, to elevate this creature ... mad, or terrified of the beggars at their doors.

name: High Sparrow
quote: He is just a priest, he cannot do this.

name: High Sparrow
quote: The Swords and Stars have been re-formed, and this new High Septon is not the puppet that the others were. Try and get close to him.

name: High Sparrow
quote: This man is implacable, she realized once again.

name: High Sparrow
quote: What have we become, when kings and high lords must dance to the twittering of sparrows?

name: Lord Hightower
quote: On no account can Prince Daemon be allowed to ascend to the Iron Throne.[...] He would be a second Maegor_I_Targaryen, or worse.[...] Better the Rhaenyra_Targaryen than Lord Flea Bottom.

name: Hildy
quote: Jaime: If a man wants to sell his turnips, he needs to set them out. Hildy: You been looking at my turnips since you came in, ser. And they're not for sale, neither. Jaime: My apologies if I mistook you for something you're not.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Daenerys: I have refused you six times. Hizdahr: Your Radiance has seven gods, so perhaps she will look upon my seventh plea with favor.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Men are born to strive and suffer. Our woes only vanish when we die.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Daenerys: Why should the Sons of the Harpy lay down their knives for you? Are you one of them? Hizdahr: No. Daenerys: Would you tell me if you were? Hizdahr: No. Daenerys: The Shavepate has ways of finding the truth. Hizdahr: I do not doubt that Skahaz would soon have me confessing. A day with him, and I will be one of the Harpy's Sons. Two days, and I will be the Harpy. Three, and it will turn out I slew Aerys_II_Targaryen too, back in the Sunset Kingdoms when I was yet a boy. Then he will impale me on a stake and you can watch me die... but afterward the killings will go on. Or you can marry me and let me try to stop them.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Before you came Meereen was dying. Our rulers were old men with withered cocks and crones whose puckered cunts were dry as dust. They sat atop their pyramids sipping apricot wine and talking of the glories of the Old Empire whilst the centuries slipped by and the very bricks of the city crumbled all around them. Custom and caution had an iron grip upon us till you awakened us with fire and blood. A new time has come, and new things are possible.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: One day all men must die, but it serves no good to dwell on death. I prefer to take each day as it comes.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: All men must die, but not all can die in glory, with the cheers of the city ringing in their ears.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Her? She's nothing. A bedslave. I misspoke. Not a slave. A free woman. Trained in pleasure.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Hizdahr, if you could marshal armies as you marshal arguments, you could conquer the world.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Wed Hizdahr zo Loraq and make a son with him, a son whose father is the harpy, whose mother is the dragon. In him the prophecies shall be fulfilled, and your enemies will melt away like snow.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: On her terrace, in her bathing pool, the little fish would nibble at her legs as she soaked. Even they kissed with more fervor than Hizdahr zo Loraq.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: I have to trust in Hizdahr. I have to hope for peace.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Hizdahr zo Loraq might be Daenerys_Targaryen consort, but he would never be his king.

name: Hizdahr zo Loraq
quote: Naked men felt vulnerable and were less inclined to acts of suicidal heroism.

name: Lord Commander Hoare
quote: They came from a hundred quarrelsome kingdoms, and they knew times may change, but men do not. So they pledged as well that the Night's Watch would take no part in the battles of the realms it guarded. They kept their pledge. When Aegon_I_Targaryen slew Harren_Hoare and claimed his kingdom, Harren's brother was Lord Commander on the Wall, with ten thousand swords to hand. He did not march.

name: Hobb
quote: You're a man who appreciates cooking, Slayer. We need more o' your sort.

name: Hobb
quote: Besides, I never done no wedding feast, m'lord. Black brothers don't never take no wifes. It's in the bloody vows, I swear 'tis.

name: Hobb
quote: Samwell: Who are these five who keep voting for Three-Finger Hobb? Clydas: Brothers who want him out of the kitchens?

name: Hobb
quote: Bowen: Who better to command the black cloaks than Janos_Slynt who once commanded the gold, sire? Stannis: Any of you, I would think. Even the cook.

name: Hobb
quote: Three corns and one roast raven. Very good, m'lord, only Hobb's made boiled eggs, black sausage, and apples stewed with prunes. The apples stewed with prunes are excellent, except for the prunes. I won't eat prunes myself. Well, there was one time when Hobb chopped them up with chestnuts and carrots and hid them in a hen. Never trust a cook, my lord. They'll prune you when you least expect it.

name: Hobb
quote: Hobb's sausages were made of grease and salt and things that did not bear thinking about.

name: Hobber Redwyne
quote: Sansa_Stark and Jeyne_Poole used to call them Ser Horror and Ser Slobber, and giggle whenever they caught sight of them. They did not look funny now.

name: Hobber Redwyne
quote: Poorly ridden.

name: Hobber Redwyne
quote: Varys: Ser Horas_Redwyne and Ser Hobber Redwyne have bribed a guard to let them out a postern gate, the night after next. Arrangements have been made for them to sail on the Pentoshi galley Moonrunner, disguised as oarsmen. Tyrion: Can we keep them on those oars for a few years, see how they fancy it? No, Cersei_Lannister would be distraught to lose such treasured guests. Inform Ser Jacelyn_Bywater. Seize the man they bribed and explain what an honor it is to serve as a brother of the Night's Watch. And have men posted around the Moonrunner, in case the Redwynes find a second guard short of coin.

name: Hobber Redwyne
quote: So long as I hold those poxy twins of his, Lord Paxter_Redwyne will squat on the Arbor and count himself fortunate to be out of it.

name: Hobber Redwyne
quote: The Redwynes have always had more freckles than wits.

name: Hobert Hightower
quote: Any man can be killed, but what of the dragons?

name: Hobert Hightower
quote: History has little good to say about Ser Hobert Hightower, but no man can question the manner of his death. Rather than betray his fellow Caltrops, he let the squire fill his cup, drank deep, and asked for more.

name: Hobert Hightower
quote: No man ever feared Ser Hobert's sword, but his wine cup was deadlier than Valyrian steel.

name: Hodor
quote: Luwin: Hodor, will you help Bran_Stark down to the hall? Hodor: Hodor!

name: Hodor
quote: Bran: Hodor, you forgot your clothes. Hodor: Hodor. Osha: Now there's a big man. He has giant's blood in him, or I'm Cersei_Lannister.

name: Hodor
quote: Bran: You could have been a knight too, I bet. If the gods hadn't taken your wits, you would have been a great knight. Hodor: Hodor? Bran: Yes.

name: Hodor
quote: Hoooodor. Hooooooodor, hoooooodor, hoDOR, hoDOR, hoDOR.

name: Hodor
quote: Hodor: HODOR! HODOR! HODOR! HODOR! Bran: NO! NO HODORING! Hodor: HOOOODOR! HOOOOOODOOOOOOOR!

name: Hodor
quote: Theon_Greyjoy had once commented that Hodor did not know much, but no one could doubt that he knew his name. Old Nan had cackled like a hen when Bran told her that, and confessed that Hodor's real name was Walder. No one knew where "Hodor" had come from, she said, but when he started saying it, they started calling him by it. It was the only word he had.

name: Hodor
quote: If I had a poleaxe with a big long haft, Hodor could be my legs. We could be a knight together.

name: Hodor
quote: Bran: It made me so mad I almost gave him a swat in the head, like Old Nan is always doing. I didn't, though. Luwin: Good. Hodor is a man, not a mule to be beaten.

name: Hodor
quote: Walder: Now there's an ugly horse. Bran: Hodor's no horse.

name: Hodor
quote: Luwin: The boy is simple, you know that. He does as he is told. How many times has he groomed your horse, soaped your saddle, scoured your mail? Theon: If he does not fight us, we will let him live.

name: Hodor
quote: Sometimes he liked to do this, just saying his name different ways, over and over and over. Other times, he would stay so quiet you forgot he was there. There was never any knowing with Hodor.

name: Hodor
quote: The big stableboy no longer fought him as he had the first time, back in the lake tower during the storm. Like a dog who has had all the fight whipped out of him, Hodor would curl up and hide whenever Bran reached out for him. His hiding place was somewhere deep within him, a pit where not even Bran could touch him.

name: Hodor
quote: Under the hill, Jojen_Reed brooded, Meera_Reed fretted, and Hodor wandered through dark tunnels with a sword in his right hand and a torch in his left. Or was it Bran wandering? No one must ever know.

name: Hodor
quote: No one wants to hurt you, Hodor, I just want to be strong again for a while. I'll give it back, the way I always do.

name: Hooded man
quote: Man: Theon Turncloak. Theon Kinslayer. Theon: I'm not. I never ... I was ironborn. Man: False is all you were. How is it you still breathe? Theon: The gods are not done with me. Lord Ramsay_Snow is not done with me. Man: I leave you to him, then.

name: Hop-Bean
quote: You have to be careful around big people. Be jolly and playful with them, keep them smiling, make them laugh, that's what my father always said.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: Sansa_Stark and Jeyne_Poole used to call them Ser Horror and Ser Slobber, and giggle whenever they caught sight of them. They did not look funny now.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: This is a feeble show.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: Varys: Ser Horas and Ser Hobber_Redwyne have bribed a guard to let them out a postern gate, the night after next. Arrangements have been made for them to sail on the Pentoshi galley Moonrunner, disguised as oarsmen. Tyrion: Can we keep them on those oars for a few years, see how they fancy it? No, Cersei_Lannister would be distraught to lose such treasured guests. Inform Ser Jacelyn_Bywater. Seize the man they bribed and explain what an honor it is to serve as a brother of the Night's Watch. And have men posted around the Moonrunner, in case the Redwynes find a second guard short of coin.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: So long as I hold those poxy twins of his, Lord Paxter_Redwyne will squat on the Arbor and count himself fortunate to be out of it.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: The Redwynes have always had more freckles than wits.

name: Horas Redwyne
quote: Hobber_Redwyne brings flowers and fruit, and Horror's taken up the lute. To hear Osney_Kettleblack tell it, you could make a sweeter sound strangling a cat.

name: Horned Lord
quote: The Horned Lord once said that sorcery is a sword without a hilt. There is no safe way to grasp it.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Hosteen: Someone must have the courage to say it. The war is lost. King Robb_Stark must be made to see that. Roose: His Grace has defeated the Lannisters every time he has faced them in battle. Hosteen: He has lost the north. He has lost Winterfell! His brothers are dead ...

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Wyman: White Harbor does not fear to ride with you, Ser Hosteen. Lead us out, and my knights will ride behind you. Hosteen: Close enough to drive a lance through my back, aye. Where are my kin, Manderly? Tell me that.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Roose: Ser Hosteen, assemble your knights and men-at-arms by the main gates. As you are so eager for battle, you shall strike our first blow. Lord Wyman_Manderly, gather your White Harbor men by the east gate. They shall go forth as well. Hosteen: As my lord commands. But after I deliver you the head of Stannis_Baratheon, I mean to finish hacking off Lord Lard's.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Why did I need to ride all that way to see Hosteen knocked off his horse by Loras_Tyrell? I ask you. The boy's half his age, Ser Daisy they call him, something like that.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Hosteen and Aenys_Frey. He remembered them from before he knew his name. Hosteen was a bull, slow to anger but implacable once roused, and by repute the fiercest fighter of Lord Walder_Frey get. Aenys was older, crueler, and more clever—a commander, not a swordsman. Both were seasoned soldiers.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: They are strangers here as well, he thought, watching Ser Aenys_Frey and his half-brother Ser Hosteen. Born and bred in the riverlands, the Freys had never seen a snow like this.

name: Hosteen Frey
quote: Theon: Aenys_Frey broke his neck, I heard, but Ser Hosteen only lost a horse, more's the pity. He will be angry now. Stannis: Angry foes do not concern me. Anger makes men stupid, and Hosteen Frey was stupid to begin with, if half of what I have heard of him is true. Let him come.

name: Hoster Blackwood
quote: Past a certain point, all the dates grow hazy and confused, and the clarity of history becomes the fog of legend.

name: Hoster Blackwood
quote: A weakling, this one. Water for blood. Never mind how tall he is, any one of my girls could snap him like a rotten twig.

name: Hoster Blackwood
quote: Tyrion_Lannister would like this one. They could talk from dusk to dawn, arguing about books.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Little cat. My little cat. I watched for you ...

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Catelyn: Riverrun is free again, Father.Hoster: I saw. Last night, when it began, I told them ... had to see. They carried me to the gatehouse ... watched from the battlements. Ah, that was beautiful ... the torches came in a wave, I could hear the cries floating across the river ... sweet cries ... when that siege tower went up, gods ... would have died then, and glad, if only I could have seen you children first.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: That stripling ... Petyr_Baelish ... not speak that name to me, your duty ... Minisa_Whent, she would ... Oh, gods forgive me, forgive me, forgive me.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Forgive me. Tansy ... blood ... the blood ... gods be kind ...

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Your lord father did not come to the wedding. An insult, as I see it. Even if he is dying. He never came to Annara_Farring. He calls me the Late Lord Frey, you know. Does he think I'm dead? I'm not dead, and I promise you, I'll outlive him as I outlived his father. Your family has always pissed on me, don't deny it, don't lie, you know it's true.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Catelyn: He says he is too sick to fight.Brynden: I am too old a soldier to believe that. Hoster will be chiding me about Bethany_Redwyne even as we light his funeral pyre, damn his bones.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: I have always done my duty, she thought. Perhaps that was why her lord father had always cherished her best of all his children. Her two older brothers had both died in infancy, so she had been son as well as daughter to Lord Hoster until Edmure_Tully was born. Then Minisa_Whent had died and her father had told her that she must be the lady of Riverrun now, and she had done that too. And when Lord Hoster promised her to Brandon_Stark, she had thanked him for making her such a splendid match.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Vyman: His last strength is going, though still he tries to fight.Catelyn: He was ever a fighter. A sweet stubborn man.Vyman: Yes, but this battle he cannot win. It is time he lay down his sword and shield. Time to yield.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: You're a young fool, Archer. If we go to Riverrun it will only be to collect Arya_Stark, won't be no time for you to sit about making bows. Be thankful if you get out with your hide. Lord Hoster was hanging outlaws before you were shaving.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: The weight of his armor would carry Lord Hoster down to rest in the soft mud of the riverbed, in the watery halls where the Tullys held eternal court, with schools of fish their last attendants.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: Lord Hoster looked as noble as a king, my lady. Would that I had been given the chance to know him.

name: Hoster Tully
quote: When Riverrun declared for Robert_I_Baratheon, Goodbrook stayed loyal to Aerys_II_Targaryen, so Lord Tully came down on him with fire and sword. After the Trident, Goodbrook's son made his peace with Robert and Lord Hoster, but that didn't help the dead none.

name: Hot Pie
quote: Tom: Will you give us your names like honest men? Hot Pie: I'm Hot Pie. Tom: Aye, and good for you. It's not every day I meet a lad with such a tasty name. And what would your friends be called, Gendry and Arya_Stark?

name: Hot Pie
quote: Sharna says she needs me to bake bread. Anyhow I'm tired of rain and saddlesores and being scared all the time. There's ale here, and rabbit to eat, and the bread will be better when I make it.

name: Hot Pie
quote: Everyone was yelling stuff. Hot Pie yelled hot pie. He must have yelled it a hundred times.

name: Hot Pie
quote: In his chainmail shirt with a sword in his hand, Gendry looked almost a man grown, and dangerous. Hot Pie looked like Hot Pie.

name: Hother Umber
quote: The Cerwyns and the Tallharts are not to be relied on, my fat friend Lord Wyman_Manderly plots betrayal, and Whoresbane ... the Umbers may seem simple, but they are not without a certain low cunning.

name: Hother Umber
quote: And Lord Wyman_Manderly is not the only man who lost kin at your Red Wedding, Frey. Do you imagine Whoresbane loves you any better? If you did not hold the Greatjon, he would pull out your entrails and make you eat them, as Donella_Hornwood ate her fingers.

name: Hotho Harlaw's daughter
quote: Victarion: How old is this daughter? Hotho: Twelve. Fair and fertile, newly flowered, with hair the color of honey. Her breasts are small as yet, but she has good hips. She takes after her mother, more than me.

name: Howland Reed
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn_Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo_Wull; Ethan_Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark_Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland Reed; Lord Willam_Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Howland Reed
quote: They had been seven against three, yet only two had lived to ride away; Eddard Stark himself and the little crannogman, Howland Reed.

name: Howland Reed
quote: Howland Reed was a great friend to Eddard_Stark.

name: Howland Reed
quote: The finest knight I ever saw was Ser Arthur_Dayne, who fought with a blade called Dawn, forged from the heart of a fallen star. They called him the Sword of the Morning, and he would have killed me but for Howland Reed.

name: Howland Reed
quote: Bran: Did he have green dreams like Jojen? Meera: No, but he could breathe mud and run on leaves, and change earth to water and water to earth with no more than a whispered word. He could talk to trees and weave words and make castles appear and disappear.

name: Howland Reed
quote: In his head, the crannogman looked like Jojen_Reed, only older and stronger and dressed like Meera_Reed.

name: Howland Reed
quote: Eddard_Stark knew the worth of Howland Reed.

name: Hugh
quote: This was needless. War should not be a game.

name: Hugh
quote: Lord Arryn was a kindly, trusting man. There was one boy. All he was, he owed Jon_Arryn, but when Lysa_Arryn fled to the Eyrie with her household, he stayed in King's Landing and prospered. It always gladdens my heart to see the young rise in the world. He must have cut a gallant figure in the tourney, him in his bright new armor, with those crescent moons on his cloak. A pity he died so untimely, before you could talk to him …

name: Hugh Grandison
quote: Grandison had seemed a pleasant fellow, less querulous than Estermont and more robust than Gyles_Rosby. She would never marry him, however. Not even if Areo_Hotah stands behind me with his axe.

name: Hugh Hammer
quote: Why be a lord when you can be a king?

name: Hugh Hammer
quote: We need a strong man to lead us, not Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_I). The throne should be mine.

name: Hugh Hammer
quote: Jon: Lord Hammer, my condolences.Hugh: For what?Jon: You died in the battle.

name: Hugh Hammer
quote: A crown does not make a man a king. You should wear a horseshoe on your head, blacksmith.

name: Hugo Wull
quote: This is no winter. Up in the hills we say that autumn kisses you, but winter fucks you hard. This is only autumn's kiss.

name: Hugo Wull
quote: Hugo: Arya_Stark. And we should have had her and the castle both if you prancing southron jackanapes didn't piss your satin breeches at a little snow. Robin: A little snow? Your ill counsel forced this march upon us, Wull. I am starting to suspect you have been Roose_Bolton creature all along. Is that the way of it? Did he send you to us to whisper poison in Stannis_Baratheon ear? Hugo: Lord Pea Pod. If you were a man, I would kill you for that, but my sword is made of too fine a steel to besmirch with craven's blood. Aye, men are dying. More will die before we see Winterfell. What of it? This is war. Men die in war. That is as it should be. As it has always been.

name: Hugo Wull
quote: Corliss: Do you want to die, Wull? Hugo: I want to live forever in a land where summer lasts a thousand years. I want a castle in the clouds where I can look down over the world. I want to be six-and-twenty again. When I was six-and-twenty I could fight all day and fuck all night. What men want does not matter. Winter is almost upon us, boy. And winter is death. I would sooner my men die fighting for Eddard_Stark Jeyne_Poole than alone and hungry in the snow, weeping tears that freeze upon their cheeks. No one sings songs of men who die like that. As for me, I am old. This will be my last winter. Let me bathe in Bolton blood before I die. I want to feel it spatter across my face when my axe bites deep into a Bolton skull. I want to lick it off my lips and die with the taste of it on my tongue.

name: Hugo Wull
quote: Jon: Flint, Wull, Norrey, Liddle ... win Torghen_Flint and Big Bucket, the rest will follow. Stannis: Big Bucket? Jon: The Wull. He has the biggest belly in the mountains, and the most men.

name: Hullen
quote: He always said he'd die in a stable, but we all thought some bad-tempered stallion would be his death, not a pack of lions.

name: Humfrey Beesbury
quote: Duncan: The others. How did they fare? Has anyone died? Raymun: Beesbury. Slain by Donnel_of_Duskendale in the first charge.

name: Humfrey Beesbury
quote: How could my foot be worth Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) life? And the other two as well, the Humfrey_Hardyng, they were good men too.

name: Humfrey Hewett
quote: Lord Hewett himself sat in his accustomed place upon the dais, dressed in all his heraldic finery. His arms and legs had been tied to his chair, and a huge white radish shoved between his teeth so he could not speak ... though he could see and hear.

name: Humfrey Wagstaff
quote: Her hand went to her sword hilt, and she found herself wondering if Ser Shadrich would think her easy prey just because she was a woman. Lord Grandison's castellan had once made that error. Humfrey Wagstaff was his name; a proud old man of five-and-sixty, with a nose like a hawk and a spotted head.

name: Hunchbacked septon
quote: His hands are scarlet with Daemon_I_Blackfyre blood, and the blood of his Aegon_Blackfyre Aemon_Blackfyre too. A shadow came at his command to strangle brave Prince Valarr_Targaryen's sons in Kiera_of_Tyrosh womb. Where is our Young Prince now? Where is his brother, sweet Matarys_Targaryen? Where has Good King Daeron_II_Targaryen gone, and fearless Baelor Breakspear? The grave has claimed them, every one, yet he endures, this pale bird with bloody beak who perches on King Aerys_I_Targaryen shoulder and caws into his ear. The mark of hell is on his face and in his empty eye, and he has brought us drought and pestilence and murder. Rise up, I say, and remember our Daemon_II_Blackfyre across the water. Seven gods there are, and seven kingdoms, and Daemon_I_Blackfyre sired seven sons! Rise up, my lords and ladies. Rise up, you brave knights and sturdy yeomen, and cast down Bloodraven, that foul sorcerer, lest your children and your children's children be cursed forever-more.

name: Hunchbacked septon
quote: Every word was treason. Even so, it was a shock to see him here, with holes where his eyes had been.

name: Hunchbacked septon
quote: Dunk: Bad business, cutting off the heads of septons. All he did was talk. Words are wind. Egg: Some words are wind, ser. Some are treason.

name: Hunchbacked septon
quote: Egg: He might have been a septon, but he was preaching lies, ser. The drought wasn't Lord Bloodraven's fault, nor the Great Spring Sickness either. Dunk: Might be that's so, but if we start cutting off the heads of all the fools and liars, half the towns in the Seven Kingdoms will be empty.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Hyle: Randyll_Tarly informed me that he had no further need of my sword, or my insolence. It amounts to the same thing. Henceforth I shall enjoy the adventuresome life of a hedge knight ... though if we do find Sansa_Stark, I imagine we will be well rewarded. Brienne: I mean to save the girl, not sell her. I swore a vow. Hyle: I don't recall that I did.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Hyle: Your heart is as mushy as Meribald porridge. Can it be? Somewhere inside our swordswench is a mother just squirming to give birth. What you really want is a sweet pink babe to suckle at your teat. You need a man for that, I hear. A husband, preferably. Why not me? Brienne: If you still hope to win your wager— Hyle: What I want to win is you, Lord Selwyn_Tarth only living child. I've known men to wed lackwits and suckling babes for prizes a tenth the size of Tarth. I am not Renly_Baratheon, I confess it, but I have the virtue of being still amongst the living. Some would say that is my only virtue. Marriage would serve the both of us.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Hyle: In the dark you'd be as beautiful as any other woman. Your lips were made for kissing. Brienne: They are lips. All lips are the same. Hyle: And all lips are made for kissing. Leave your chamber door unbarred tonight, and I will steal into your bed and prove the truth of what I say. Brienne: If you do, you'll be a eunuch when you leave.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: My lady, you should have wed me when I made my offer. Now I fear you're doomed to die a maid, and me a poor man.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: You think too much.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Podrick: What did he do to you, ser? I mean, my lady. Brienne: At Highgarden, when King Renly_Baratheon called his banners, some men played a game with me. Ser Hyle was one of them. It was a cruel game, hurtful and unchivalrous.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Hyle Hunt was no true knight. His honest face was just a mummer's mask. I do not need his help, I do not need his protection, and I do not need him, she told herself.

name: Hyle Hunt
quote: Ser Hyle Hunt is a gallant from the Reach.

name: Iggo
quote: Only the belled man stood his ground. His horse kicked in the head of one of her sisters, and he cut another almost in half with his curved silvery claw as his hair tinkled softly.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Viserys: The realm will rise for its rightful king. Tyrell, Redwyne, Darry, Greyjoy, they have no more love for the Robert_I_Baratheon than I do. The Dornishmen burn to avenge Elia and her children. And the smallfolk will be with us. They cry out for their king. They do, don't they? Illyrio: They are your people, and they love you well. In holdfasts all across the realm, men lift secret toasts to your health while women sew dragon banners and hide them against the day of your return from across the water. Or so my agents tell me.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: If one Hand can die, why not a second? You have danced the dance before, my friend.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Tyrion: Slaver's Bay is a long way from Pentos. Illyrio: This is so, but the world is one great web, and a man dare not touch a single strand lest all the others tremble.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Tyrion: Are you quite certain that Daenerys_Targaryen will make good Viserys_Targaryen promises? Illyrio: She will, or she will not. I told you, my little friend, not all that a man does is done for gain. Believe as you wish, but even fat old fools like me have friends, and debts of affection to repay.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Tyrion: I admire your powers of persuasion. How did you convince the Golden Company to take up the cause of Daenerys_Targaryen when they have spent so much of their history fighting against the Targaryens? Illyrio: Black or red, a dragon is still a dragon.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Tell Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) I am sorry that I will not be with him for his wedding. I will rejoin you in Westeros. That I swear, by my sweet Serra's hands.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Illyrio is no fool. The magister knows that I will not forget my friends when I come into my throne.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: He had friends in all of the Nine Free Cities, it was said, and even beyond, in Vaes Dothrak and the fabled lands beside the Jade Sea. It was also said that he'd never had a friend he wouldn't cheerfully sell for the right price.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Some pox-ridden Pentoshi cheesemonger had Viserys_Targaryen and Daenerys_Targaryen walled up on his estate with pointy-hatted eunuchs all around them, and now he's handed them both over to the Dothraki. I should have had them both killed years ago, when it was easy to get to them.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Daenerys: Illyrio protected us from the Usurper's knives, and he believed in Viserys_Targaryen cause." Jorah: Illyrio believes in no cause but Illyrio. Gluttons are greedy men as a rule, and magisters are devious. Illyrio Mopatis is both.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Daenerys: Magister Illyrio has protected me in the past. Strong Belwas says that he wept when he heard my brother was dead. Jorah: Yes, but did he weep for Viserys_Targaryen, or for the plans he had made with him?

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Illyrio Mopatis. A whale with whiskers, I am telling you truly. These chairs were built to his measure, though he is seldom bestirring himself from Pentos to sit in them. A fat man always sits comfortably, I am thinking, for he takes his pillow with him wherever he goes.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
quote: Lemore: Illyrio could not have been expected to know that Daenerys_Targaryen would choose to remain at Slaver's Bay. Jon: No more than he knew that the Viserys_Targaryen would die young, or that Khal Drogo would follow him into the grave. Very little of what the fat man has anticipated has come to pass. I have danced to the fat man's pipes for years, Lemore.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Oft-times Ser Ilyn frightens me as well, sweet lady. He has a fearsome aspect.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Renly: Ser Ilyn has not been feeling talkative these past fourteen years. Joffrey: Aerys_II_Targaryen had his tongue ripped out with hot pincers. Cersei: He speaks most eloquently with his sword, however, and his devotion to our realm is unquestioned.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Jeyne: Ser Ilyn's the King's Justice, not Ser Loras_Tyrell. Lord Eddard_Stark should have sent him. Sansa: Ser Ilyn's almost like a second monster. I'm glad Father didn't pick him.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Lords and knights moved aside as he stepped through, tall and fleshless, a skeleton in iron mail, the King's Justice.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Sansa: Why is Ser Ilyn here? Cersei: To deal with treason, and to defend us if need be. He was a knight before he was a headsman. When the axes smash down those doors, you may be glad of him.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: He had been too young to have known Ser Ilyn before he'd lost his tongue. He would have been a different man in those days, but now the silence is as much a part of him as those hollow eyes, that rusty chainmail shirt, and the greatsword on his back.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: You were a knight once, ser. So was I. Let us see what we are now.

name: Ilyn Payne
quote: Ser Ilyn made the perfect drinking companion. He never interrupted, never disagreed, never complained or asked for favors or told long pointless stories. All he did was drink and listen.

name: Imry Florent
quote: A small spoon of victory is just the thing to settle the stomach before battle. It makes the men hungry for a larger helping.

name: Imry Florent
quote: It had been Ser Imry Florent who led them blindly up the Blackwater Rush with all oars pulling, paying no heed to the small stone towers at the mouth of the river. Davos was not like to forget him.

name: Imry Florent
quote: Curse Tyrion_Lannister, curse the pyromancers, curse that fool of Florent who sailed my fleet into the jaws of a trap. Or curse me for my stubborn pride, for sending her away when I needed her most. But not Melisandre. She remains my faithful servant.

name: Irri
quote: Daenerys: Have you ever seen a dragon? Irri: Dragons are gone, Khaleesi. Jhiqui: Dead. Long and long ago. Daenerys: Everywhere? Even in the east? Irri: No dragon. Brave men kill them, for dragon terrible evil beasts. It is known. Jhiqui: It is known.

name: Irri
quote: Daenerys: What happened that night, when you woke... you're no bed slave, I freed you, remember? You... Irri: I am handmaid to the Mother of Dragons. It is great honor to please my khaleesi.

name: Irri
quote: Irri: Daenerys_Targaryen, you must not touch the Stalwart_Shield. It is bad luck to touch the dead. Jhiqui: Unless you killed them yourself. That is known. Irri: It is known.

name: Irri
quote: A khaleesi must have a khal … This is known.

name: Irri
quote: Jhiqui: You are too skinny for him. You are almost a boy. Rakharo does not bed with boys. This is known. Irri: It is known that you are almost a cow. Rakharo does not bed with cows.

name: Jacaerys Velaryon
quote: We should bear those messages. Dragons will win the lords over quicker than ravens.

name: Jacaerys Velaryon
quote: One day this will be your seat, lad.

name: Jacaerys Velaryon
quote: Seven save this realm if we seat a bastard on the Iron Throne.

name: Jacaerys Velaryon
quote: Though his fifteenth nameday was still half a year away, Prince Jacaerys proved himself a man, and a worthy heir to the Iron Throne.

name: Jacaerys Velaryon
quote: Broken after the Lucerys_Velaryon, Rhaenyra_Targaryen seemed to find new strength after the loss of a second. Jace's death hardened her, burning away her fears, leaving only her anger and hatred.

name: Jacelyn Bywater
quote: No man likes to look craven in the sight of his fellows, so they'll fight brave enough at the start, when it's all warhorns and blowing banners. But if the battle looks to be going sour they'll break, and they'll break bad. The first man to throw down his spear and run will have a thousand more trodding on his heels.

name: Jacelyn Bywater
quote: Bywater. Well. Brave man, to be sure, yet ... he's rigid, that one. A queer dog. The men don't like him. A cripple too, lost his hand at Pyke, that's what got him knighted. A poor trade, if you ask me, a hand for a ser. Ser Jacelyn thinks overmuch of himself and his honor, as I see it.

name: Jacelyn Bywater
quote: You will find Ser Jacelyn to be courageous, honorable, obedient ... and most grateful.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: Lem: The Beric_Dondarrion not so easy to kill. Ser Gregor_Clegane might have put his eye out, but a man don't die o' that. Jack could tell you. Jack: Well, I never did. My father got himself good and hanged by Clement_Piper bailiff, my brother Wat_(Night's_Watch) got sent to the Wall, and the Lannisters killed my other brothers. An eye, that's nothing.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: The crows await us all. M'lord, Gendry seems brave enough, and we do have need of what he brings us. Take him, says Jack.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: Jack: You ought t'have bought some land and made one o' them roast swan girls an honest woman. Raised yourself a crop o' turnips and a crop o' sons. Sandor: Warrior defend me! What a waste that would have been, to turn my gold to turnips. Jack: I like turnips. I could do with some mashed turnips right now.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: Merrett: Please. I've done you no harm. I brought the gold, the way you said. I answered your question. I have children. Jack: That Robb_Stark never will.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: Jeyne: Guest right don't mean so much as it used to. Not since Catelyn_Stark come back from the wedding. Some o' them swinging down by the river figured they was guests too. Lem: We figured different. They wanted beds. We gave 'em trees. Jack: We got more trees, though. We always got more trees.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: Jack: Jaime_Lannister whore. Brienne: Why would you call me that? Jack: If I had a silver stag for every time you said his name, I'd be as rich as your friends the Lannisters.

name: Jack-Be-Lucky
quote: The other outlaws called him Jack-Be-Lucky, though losing an eye didn't seem very lucky to Arya.

name: Jaehaera Targaryen
quote: These are not normal children. They have no joy in them; they neither laugh nor play. The girl wets her bed at night and weeps inconsolably when she is corrected. Her own ladies say that she is eight, going on four. Had I not laced her milk with sweetsleep before the wedding, I am convinced the child would have collapsed during the ceremony.

name: Jaehaerys I Targaryen
quote: He was nine-and-sixty at his death, and had ruled wisely and well for five-and-fifty years. Westeros mourned, and it was claimed that even in Dorne men wept and women tore their garments in lament for a king who had been so just and good. His ashes were interred with that of his beloved, the Good Queen Alysanne_Targaryen, beneath the Red Keep. And the realm never saw their like again.

name: Jaehaerys I Targaryen
quote: Aegon_I_Targaryen and Visenya_Targaryen Rhaenys_Targaryen conquered the Seven Kingdoms (six of them, at least), but it was Jaehaerys the Conciliator who truly made them one.

name: Jaehaerys I Targaryen
quote: It is a poor king who wages battle against his own lords and leaves his own kingdom burned, bloody, and strewn with corpses. His Grace was a wiser man than that.

name: Jaehaerys II Targaryen
quote: King Jaehaerys once told me that madness and greatness were two sides of the same coin. Every time a new Targaryen is born, he said, the gods toss the coin in the air and the world holds its breath to see how it will land.

name: Jaehaerys II Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys. Barristan_Selmy knew my grandfather.

name: Jafer Flowers
quote: Strength and courage did not avail much against foemen who would not fall because they were already dead; even arms and armor offered small protection.

name: Jafer Flowers
quote: Alliser: I brought Jared's hand, torn from his corpse by the bastard's wolf. Petyr: And where is this charming token? Alliser: It ... rotted to pieces while I waited, unheard. There's naught left to show but bones. Tyrion: Lord Baelish, buy our brave Ser Alliser a hundred spades to take back to the Wall with him. Alliser: Spades? Tyrion: If you bury your dead, they won't come walking.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: The things I do Cersei_Lannister.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Jaime: If there are gods, why is the world so full of pain and injustice?Catelyn: Because of men like you.Jaime: There are no men like me. There's only me.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: I think it passing odd that I am loved Tyrion_Lannister for Tysha, and reviled by so many for my finest act.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: It was that white cloak that soiled me, not the other way around.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Jaime had decided that he would return Sansa_Stark, and the Arya_Stark as well if she could be found. It was not like to win him back his honor, but the notion of keeping faith when they all expected betrayal amused him more than he could say.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Jaime: Ser, you've been remiss in teaching our new brothers their duties.Meryn: What duties?Jaime: Keeping Joffrey_Baratheon alive. How many monarchs have you lost since I left the city? Robert_I_Baratheon, is it?

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: And me, that boy I was ... when did he die, I wonder? When I donned the white cloak? When I opened Aerys_II_Targaryen throat? That boy had wanted to be Ser Arthur_Dayne, but someplace along the way he had become the Smiling_Knight instead.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: I've lost a hand, a Tywin_Lannister, a Joffrey_Baratheon, a Cersei_Lannister, and a lover, and soon enough I will lose a Tyrion_Lannister. And yet they keep telling me House Lannister has won this war.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: I have Joffrey_Baratheon Tommen_Baratheon and Aerys_II_Targaryen. Sansa_Stark is my last chance for honor.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Cersei: You must take Tywin_Lannister place as Hand. You see that now, surely. Tommen_Baratheon will need you ...Jaime: A Hand without a hand? A bad jape, sister. Don't ask me to rule.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: This was justice. Make a habit of it, Lannister, and one day men might call you Goldenhand after all. Goldenhand the Just.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Jaime: Are there any terms you will accept?Brynden: From you? No.Jaime: Why did you even come to treat with me?Brynden: A siege is deadly dull. I wanted to see this stump of yours and hear whatever excuses you cared to offer up for your latest enormities. They were feebler than I'd hoped. You always disappoint, Kingslayer.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: They called him the Lion of Lannister to his face and whispered "Kingslayer" behind his back. Jon found it hard to look away from him. "This is what Robert_I_Baratheon should look like", he thought to himself as he passed.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Rodrik: Even the Kingslayer would flinch at the murder of Bran_Stark. Theon: Oh, would he? I wonder.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: My brother is worth a hundred of Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Robert: Why should I mistrust him? He has done everything I have ever asked of him. His sword helped win the throne I sit on. Eddard: He swore a vow to protect his king's life with his own. Then he opened that king's throat with a sword.Robert: Seven hells, someone had to kill Aerys_II_Targaryen! If Jaime hadn't done it, it would have been left for you or me.Eddard: We were not Sworn Brothers of the Kingsguard.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: His brother never untied a knot when he could slash it in two with his sword.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Jaime and I are more than brother and sister. We are one person in two bodies. We shared a womb together. He came into this world holding my foot, our old maester said. When he is in me, I feel... whole.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: The Kingslayer ... The false knight who profaned his blade with the blood of Aerys_II_Targaryen he had sworn to defend.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: He was weak from imprisonment, and chained at the wrists. No knight in the Seven Kingdoms could have stood against him at his full strength, with no chains to hamper him. Jaime had done many wicked things, but the man could fight! His maiming had been monstrously cruel. It was one thing to slay a lion, another to hack his paw off and leave him broken and bewildered.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: My brother, Jaime, thirsts for battle, not for power. He's run from every chance he's had to rule.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Barristan_Selmy had never approved of Jaime's presence in his precious Kingsguard. Before the rebellion, the old knight thought him too young and untried; afterward, he had been known to say that the Kingslayer should exchange that white cloak for a black one.

name: Jaime Lannister
quote: Ser Jaime of House Lannister. Firstborn son of Lord Tywin_Lannister and Lady Joanna_Lannister of Casterly Rock. Served against the Kingswood Brotherhood as squire to Lord Sumner_Crakehall. Knighted in his 15th year by Ser Arthur_Dayne of the Kingsguard, for valor in the field. Chosen for the Kingsguard in his 15th year by King Aerys_II_Targaryen. During the Sack of King's Landing, slew King Aerys II at the foot of the Iron Throne. Thereafter known as the "Kingslayer." Pardoned for his crime by King Robert_I_Baratheon. Served in the honor guard that brought his sister the Lady Cersei_Lannister to King's Landing to wed King Robert. Champion in the tourney held at King's Landing on the occasion of their wedding.

name: Jalabhar Xho
quote: Jalabhar Xho was all in feathers, a plumage so fantastic and extravagant that he seemed like to take flight.

name: Jalabhar Xho
quote: Beneath his jewels and feathers, Xho was little more than a wellborn beggar. Robert_I_Baratheon could have put an end to his importuning for good with one firm "No," but the notion of conquering the Summer Isles had appealed to her drunken lout of a husband.

name: Jalabhar Xho
quote: Splendid as he looked in his bright feather cloak, he had only come to beg.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: You and your threats, well, we will see. I am the king's friend, you know. We shall hear what Joffrey_Baratheon has to say about this. And Petyr_Baelish and Cersei_Lannister, oh, yes. Janos Slynt has a good many friends. We will see who goes sailing, I promise you. Indeed we will.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Janos: You lie through your bastard's teeth. Well, I will not suffer it. I will not! You might have fooled Donal_Noye, but not Janos Slynt! Oh, no. Janos Slynt does not swallow lies so easily. Did you think my skull was stuffed with cabbage? Jon: I don't know what your skull is stuffed with. My lord.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Janos: Lies, all lies! A strong man makes enemies, Your Grace, they whisper lies behind your back. Naught was ever proven, not a man came forward... Stannis: Two men who were prepared to come forward died suddenly on their rounds. Do not trifle with me, my lord, I saw the proofs Jon_Arryn laid before the small council. If I had been king, you would have lost more than your office, I promise you that, but Robert_I_Baratheon shrugged away your little lapses. 'They all steal' I recall him saying. 'Better a thief we know than one we don't, the next man might be worse'. Lord Petyr_Baelish words in my brother's mouth, I'll warrant.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Jon: It is forty leagues to Greyguard. Pack up your arms and armor, say your farewells, and be ready to depart at first light on the morrow. Janos: No. I will not go meekly off to freeze and die. No Eddard_Stark bastard gives commands to Janos Slynt! I am not without friends, I warn you. Here, and in King's Landing too. I was the Lord of Harrenhal! Give your ruin to one of the blind fools who cast a stone for you, I will not have it. Do you hear me, boy? I will not have it!

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Jon: You are refusing to obey my order? Janos: You can stick your order up your bastard's arse. Jon: As you will. Please take Lord Janos to the Wall, and hang him.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: If the boy thinks that he can frighten me, he is mistaken. He would not dare to hang me. Janos Slynt has friends, important friends, you'll see…

name: Janos Slynt
quote: If you cannot keep the king's peace, Janos, perhaps the City Watch should be commanded by someone who can.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Frog-faced Lord Slynt sat at the end of the council table wearing a black velvet doublet and a shiny cloth-of-gold cape, nodding with approval every time Joffrey_Baratheon pronounced a sentence. Sansa stared hard at his ugly face, remembering how he had thrown down Eddard_Stark for Ser Ilyn_Payne to behead, wishing she could hurt him, wishing that some hero would throw him down and cut off his head.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Whose notion was it to make this Janos Slynt a lord? The man's father was a butcher, and they grant him Harrenhal. Harrenhal, that was the seat of kings! Not that he will ever set foot inside it, if I have a say. I am told he took a bloody spear for his sigil. A bloody cleaver would have been my choice.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Tyrion: Janos Slynt is a butcher's son. You yourself told me— Tywin: I recall what I told you. Castle Black is not Harrenhal, however. The Night's Watch is not the king's council. There is a tool for every task, and a task for every tool. Tyrion: Lord Janos is a hollow suit of armor who will sell himself to the highest bidder.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Bowen: Who better to command the black cloaks than a man who once commanded the gold? Stannis: Any one of you I would think. Even Hobb.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: This so-called Lord of Harrenhal is a butcher's whelp upjumped by the Lannisters. Small wonder he is venal and corrupt.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: All of a man's crimes were wiped away when he took the black, and all of his allegiances as well, yet he found it hard to think of Janos Slynt as a brother. There is blood between us. This man helped slay Eddard_Stark and did his best to have me killed as well.

name: Janos Slynt
quote: Jon: I will not hang him. Bring him here. Bowen: Oh, Seven save us. Jon: Eddison_Tollett, fetch me a block.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: A man could use another taste of beer. A man has a thirst, wearing these heavy bracelets. A man could use a bath too. A boy could make a friend.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: A man must be ashamed of the company he keeps, Arry. This man has the honor to be Jaqen H'ghar, once of the Free City of Lorath. Would that he were home.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen: A boy becomes a girl. Arya: I was always a girl. I didn't think you saw me. Jaqen: A man sees. A man knows.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen: A man pays his debts. A man owes three. Arya: Three? Jaqen: The Red God has his due, sweet girl, and only death may pay for life. This girl took three that were his. This girl must give three in their places. Speak the names, and a man will do the rest.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Arya: How'd you make the dog kill Weese? Did you call Rorge and Biter up from hell? Is Jaqen H'ghar your true name? Jaqen: Some men have many names.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen: A girl whispers if she fears to speak aloud. Whisper it now. Is it Joffrey_Baratheon? Arya: It's Jaqen H'ghar.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen: A god has his due. And now a man must die. Arya: Die? But I unsaid the name. You don't need to die now. Jaqen: I do. My time is done.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Arya: Who are you? How did you do that? Was it hard? Jaqen: No harder than taking a new name, if you know the way.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen: If you would learn, you must come with me. Arya: Where? Jaqen: Far and away, across the narrow sea. Arya: I can't. I have to go home. To Winterfell. Jaqen: Then we must part, for I have duties too.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Arya: Please don't go, Jaqen. Jaqen: Jaqen is as dead as Arry, and I have promises to keep. Valar morghulis, Arya Stark.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Something about the way he talked reminded her of Syrio_Forel; it was the same, yet different too.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen made me brave again. He made me a ghost instead of a mouse.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: She had been avoiding the Lorathi since Weese's death. Chiswyck had been easy, anyone could push a man off the wallwalk, but Weese had raised that ugly spotted dog from a pup, and only some dark magic could have turned the animal against him. Yoren found Jaqen in a black cell, the same as Rorge and Biter, she remembered. Jaqen did something horrible and Yoren knew, that's why he kept him in chains. If the Lorathi was a wizard, Rorge and Biter could be demons he called up from some hell, not men at all.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Jaqen still owed her one death. In Old Nan's stories about men who were given magic wishes by a grumkin, you had to be especially careful with the third wish, because it was the last. […] So long as she could kill with a whisper, Arya need not be afraid of anyone... but once she used up the last death, she would only be a mouse again.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Sometimes she wished she had gone off across the narrow sea with Jaqen H'ghar. She still had the stupid coin he'd given her, a piece of iron no larger than a penny and rusted along the rim. One side had writing on it, queer words she could not read. The other showed a man's head, but so worn that all his features had rubbed off. He said it was of great value, but that was probably a lie too, like his name and even his face.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
quote: Arya: Is Jaqen H'ghar a priest too? Do you know if Jaqen will be coming back to Braavos? Kindly man: Who? Arya: Jaqen H'ghar. He gave me the iron coin. Kindly man: I know no one by this name, child.

name: Jared Frey
quote: Walder: I called my swords, yes I did, here they are, you saw them on the walls. It was my intent to march as soon as all my strength was assembled. Well, to send my sons. I am well past marching myself, Lady Catelyn. Tell her, Jared. Tell her that was my intent. Jared: It was, my lady. On my honor.

name: Jared Frey
quote: Davos: Is it your claim that Robb_Stark killed Wendel_Manderly? Jared: And many more. Mine own son Tytos_Frey was amongst them, and Garse_Goodbrook. When Stark changed into a wolf, his northmen did the same. The mark of the beast was on them all. Wargs birth other wargs with a bite, it is well-known. It was all my brothers and I could do to put them down before they slew us all. Davos: Ser, may I have your name? Jared: Ser Jared, of House Frey. Davos: Jared of House Frey, I name you liar. Jared: Some men cry when slicing onions, but I never had that weakness. If you are indeed a knight, ser, defend that slander with your body.

name: Jaremy Rykker
quote: Jeor: Ser Alliser_Thorne is an anointed knight, one of the few to take the black since I have been Lord Commander. He fought bravely at King's Landing. Jaremy: On the wrong side. I ought to know, I was there on the battlements beside him. Tywin_Lannister gave us a splendid choice. Take the black, or see our heads on spikes before evenfall. No offense intended, Tyrion. Tyrion: None taken, Ser Jaremy. My father is very fond of spiked heads, especially those of people who have annoyed him in some fashion. And a face as noble as yours, well, no doubt he saw you decorating the city wall above the King's Gate. I think you would have looked very striking up there.

name: Jarl
quote: Mance: The good woman at the brazier is Dalla. Treat her like you would any queen, she is carrying Aemon_Steelsong. This beauty is her sister Val. Young Jarl beside her is her latest pet. Jarl: I am no man's pet. Tormund: Val's no man. You ought to have noticed that by now, lad.

name: Jarl
quote: Mance_Rayder had called the dark youth a "pet" of Val, who was sister to Dalla, his own queen, which made Jarl a sort of good brother once removed to the King-beyond-the-Wall. Styr plainly resented sharing his authority. He had brought a hundred Thenns, five times as many men as Jarl, and often acted as if he had the sole command. But it would be the younger man who got them over the ice, Jon knew. Though he could not have been older than twenty, Jarl had been raiding for eight years, and had gone over the Wall a dozen times with the likes of Alfyn_Crowkiller and the Weeper, and more recently with his own band.

name: Jarl
quote: Jon: I was sorry when Jarl fell. Val: He always climbed too fast.

name: Jarl
quote: Val: Before I go, one question. Did you kill Jarl, my lord? Jon: The Wall killed Jarl. Val: So I'd heard. But I had to be sure.

name: Jason Mallister
quote: Jason: Seagard will be brightened by your presence, Lady Catelyn. Catelyn: You would make me a prisoner. Jason: An honored guest.

name: Jason Mallister
quote: His brown hair was salted with white now, his face chiseled gaunt by time, yet the years had not touched his pride. He rode like a man who feared nothing.

name: Jasper Wylde
quote: Otto: Such men as bend the knee and swear fealty to King Aegon_II_Targaryen shall suffer no harm at our hands. Orwyle: And those who will not? Jasper: Are traitors, and must die a traitor's death.

name: Jasper Wylde
quote: Two dragons are better than one.

name: Jenny of Oldstones
quote: Robb: There's a song. 'Jenny of Oldstones, with the flowers in her hair.' Catelyn: We're all just songs in the end. If we are lucky.

name: Jenny of Oldstones
quote: High in the halls of the kings who are gone, Jenny would dance with her ghosts...

name: Jenny of Oldstones
quote: The Duncan_Targaryen loved Jenny of Oldstones so much he cast aside a crown, and Westeros paid the bride price in corpses.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: The cold winds are rising. Summer is at an end, and a winter is coming such as this world has never seen.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Jeor: Doubtless you loved Eddard_Stark. The things we love destroy us every time, lad. Remember when I told you that? Jon: I remember. Jeor: See that you never forget it. The hard truths are the ones to hold tight.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Jeor: Do you think they chose me Lord Commander of the Night's Watch because I'm dumb as a stump, Snow? Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) told me you'd go. I told him you'd be back. I know my men ... and my boys too. Honor set you on the kingsroad ... and honor brought you back. Jon: My friends brought me back. Jeor: Did I say it was your honor?

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: When dead men come hunting in the night, do you think it matters who sits the Iron Throne?

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Tarly, when I was a lad half your age, my lady mother told me that if I stood about with my mouth open, a weasel was like to mistake it for his lair and run down my throat. If you have something to say, say it. Otherwise, beware of weasels.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: We never knew! But we must have known once. The Night's Watch has forgotten its true purpose, Tarly. You don't build a wall seven hundred feet high to keep savages in skins from stealing women. The Wall was made to guard the realms of men … and not against other men, which is all the wildlings are when you come right down to it. Too many years, Tarly, too many hundreds and thousands of years. We lost sight of the true enemy. And now he's here, but we don't know how to fight him.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Samwell: Tell them what, my lord? Jeor: All. The Fist. The wildlings. Dragonglass. This. All. Tell my son. Jorah_Mormont. Tell him, take the black. My wish. Dying wish.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Old as he was, the Lord Commander still had the strength of a bear.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: He was in deadly earnest, Tyrion realized. He felt faintly embarrassed for the old man. Lord Mormont had spent a good part of his life on the Wall, and he needed to believe if those years were to have any meaning.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Jon: Do you think I want to spend the rest of my life washing an old man's smallclothes? Samwell: The old man is Lord Commander of the Night's Watch. You'll be with him day and night. Yes, you'll pour his wine and see that his bed linen is fresh, but you'll also take his letters, attend him at meetings, squire for him in battle. You'll be as close to him as his shadow. You'll know everything, be a part of everything ... and the Bowen_Marsh said Mormont asked for you himself!

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Tyrion had rather liked old Jeor Mormont, with his gruff manner and talking bird.

name: Jeor Mormont
quote: Stannis: Donal_Noye made my first sword for me, and Robert_I_Baratheon warhammer as well. Had the god seen fit to spare him, he would have made a better Lord Commander for your order than any of these fools who are squabbling over it now. Jon: Cotter_Pyke and Ser Denys_Mallister are no fools, sire. They're good men, and capable. Othell_Yarwyck as well, in his own way. Lord Mormont trusted each of them. Stannis: Your Lord Mormont trusted too easily. Else he would not have died as he did.

name: Jeremy Hightower
quote: Highgarden defends our backs, so we are free to gaze outward, to the sea and the lands beyond.

name: Jeremy Norridge
quote: All three of the sons of Aegon_V_Targaryen had wed for love in defiance of their father's wishes. And because that unlikely monarch had followed his heart when he chose Betha_Blackwood, he allowed his sons to have their way, making bitter enemies when he might have made fast friends.

name: Jessamyn Redfort
quote: Forty years of age, [Jeyne Arryn] perished in the Motherhouse of Maris on its stony island in the harbor of Gulltown, wrapped in the arms of Jessamyn Redfort, her "dear companion."

name: Red Jeyne
quote: Red Jeyne slammed into his chest and knocked him off his feet. She was lean, hard muscle, where Reek was loose, grey skin and brittle bones, a white haired starveling.

name: Jeyne Arryn
quote: Thrice have mine own kin sought to replace me. My cousin Ser Arnold_Arryn is wont to say that women are too soft to rule. I have him in one of my sky cells, if you would like to ask him.

name: Jeyne Arryn
quote: Your Prince Daemon_Targaryen used Rhea_Royce most cruelly, it is true... but notwithstanding Rhaenyra_Targaryen poor taste in consorts, she remains our rightful queen, and mine own blood besides, an Arryn on Aemma_Arryn side.

name: Jeyne Arryn
quote: In this world of men, we women must band together.

name: Jeyne Arryn
quote: I have no fear of armies. Many and more have broken themselves against my Bloody Gate, and the Eyrie is known to be impregnable. But you have descended on us from the sky, as Queen Visenya_Targaryen once did during the Conquest, and I was powerless to halt you. I mislike feeling powerless. Send me dragonriders.

name: Jeyne Arryn
quote: The great lords would have given us another two years of war, it was the women who made the peace. Alysanne_Blackwood, the Maiden of the Vale, the Three Widows, the Dragon Twins, ’twas them who brought the bloodshed to an end, and not with swords or poison, but with ravens, words, and kisses.

name: Jeyne Farman
quote: Cersei did not care to think about Senelle. She repaid my kindness with betrayal. Sansa_Stark had done the same. So had Melara_Hetherspoon and fat Jeyne Farman when the three of them were girls. I would never have gone into that tent if not for them. I would never have allowed Maggy_the_Frog to taste my morrows in a drop of blood.

name: Jeyne Farman
quote: Fat Jeyne Farman hung back as she always did. It was a wonder she had come this far.

name: Jeyne Farman
quote: Lord Tywin_Lannister daughter was the first through the flap, with Melara_Hetherspoon close behind her. Jeyne Farman came last, and tried to hide behind the other two, the way she always did.

name: Jeyne Farman
quote: Plump stupid timid little Jeyne, pasty-faced and fat and scared of every shadow. She was the wise one, though. Jeyne lived on Fair Isle still. She had married one of Sebaston_Farman Gareth_Clifton and whelped a dozen children.

name: Jeyne Heddle
quote: Brienne: Bread and salt. The inn ... Septon Meribald fed the children ... we broke bread with Willow_Heddle ... Jeyne: Guest right don't mean so much as it used to. Not since m'lady come back from the wedding.

name: Jeyne Heddle
quote: Brown hair, brown eyes, plain. Willow_Heddle, six years older.

name: Jeyne Heddle
quote: She is too young to be so hard.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Lord Beric_Dondarrion is as much a hero as Ser Loras_Tyrell. He's ever so brave and gallant.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: They're killing everyone.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: Ser Jaime. You are kind to see me off. Jaime: You know me, then? Jeyne: You may not recall, my lord, as I was littler then... but I had the honor to meet you at Winterfell when King Robert came to visit my father Lord Eddard_Stark. I'm Arya_Stark. Jaime: I understand you're to be married. Jeyne: I am to wed Roose_Bolton's son, Ramsay_Snow. He used to be a Snow, but Tommen_Baratheon has made him a Bolton. They say he's very brave. I am so happy.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: I pray that I will make you a good wife and give you strong sons to follow after you.Ramsay: That you will, and soon.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: I was never beautiful like Sansa_Stark, but they all said I was pretty.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: Help me. Please. I used to watch you in the yard, playing with your swords. You were so handsome. If we ran away, I could be your wife, or your … your whore … whatever you wanted. You could be my man. Theon: I'm no … I'm no one's man. Just … just be Arya_Stark, be Ramsay_Snow wife. Please him, or … just please him, and stop this talk about being someone else. It is time. Wipe those tears from your eyes. Good. Now smile.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: This is some trick. It's Ramsay_Snow, it's my … my lord, my sweet lord, he sent you, this is just some test to make sure that I love him. I do, I do, I love him more than anything. Tell him, you tell him. I'll do what he wants … whatever he wants … with him or … or with the dog or … please … he doesn't need to cut my feet off, I won't try to run away, not ever, I'll give him sons, I swear it, I swear it…Rowan: Gods curse the man.Jeyne: I'm a good girl. They trained me.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: Stay close to me. Don't leave me.Theon: I will be right beside you.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne: You saved me.Theon: I saved Lady Arya_Stark.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Of course, Jeyne had been in love with Lord Beric_Dondarrion ever since she had first glimpsed him in the lists. Sansa thought she was being silly; Jeyne was only Vayon_Poole daughter, after all, and no matter how much she mooned after him, Lord Beric would never look at someone so far beneath him, even if she hadn't been half his age.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Sansa: No one will talk to us or tell us what's happened… Cersei: Us? Boros: We put Vayon_Poole's girl in with her. We did not know what else to do with her. Cersei: Next time, you will ask. The gods only know what sort of tales she's been filling Sansa's head with.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Sansa: Where is Vayon_Poole? Why can't Ser Boros_Blount take her to him instead of Lord Petyr_Baelish having to do it? Where are you sending her? She hasn't done anything wrong, she's a good girl.Cersei: She's upset you. We can't be having that. Not another word, now. Lord Baelish will see that Jeyne's well taken care of, I promise you.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: The girl's long brown hair blew wild in the wind. She had a pretty face, he thought, but her eyes were sad and wary.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: If the north must have a Stark, we'll give them one.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: That's Sansa_Stark's little friend, the Vayon_Poole's girl. Jeyne, that was her name. Jeyne Poole.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Jeyne, Jeyne, it rhymes with pain.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Brown eyes. They should be Arya_Stark. Someone will see. Someone will remember.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: Valiant Eddard_Stark precious little girl. Lady Arya_Stark sobs do us more harm than all of Lord Stannis_Baratheon swords and spears. If Ramsay_Snow means to remain Lord of Winterfell, he had best teach his wife to laugh.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: We are all dead. I told them this was folly, but none of them would listen. Abel had doomed them. All singers were half-mad. In songs, the hero always saved the maiden from the monster's castle, but life was not a song, no more than Jeyne was Arya_Stark. Her eyes are the wrong color. And there are no heroes here, only whores.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: They trained you in a brothel. Jeyne is the next thing to a whore, you must go on being Arya_Stark. No one will care what Arya looks like, so long as she is heir to Winterfell. A hundred men will want to marry her. A thousand.

name: Jeyne Poole
quote: I saved her. I saved the girl. We flew.

name: Jeyne Royce
quote: Now, Jon_Arryn married thrice, but his first two wives gave him no children, so for long years his nephew Elbert_Arryn was his heir.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: The Westerlings are better blood than the Freys. They're an ancient line, descended from the First Men. The Kings of the Rock sometimes wed Westerlings before the Conquest, and there was another Jeyne Westerling who was queen to Maegor_I_Targaryen three hundred years ago.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Catelyn: I have a new daughter. Be welcome to our hall and hearth. Jeyne: Thank you, my lady. I shall be a good and true wife to Robb_Stark, I swear. And as wise a queen as I can.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jeyne: I want to be a good wife to Robb_Stark, I do, but I don't know how to help. To cheer him, or comfort him. I don't know what he needs. Please, my lady, you're his mother, tell me what I should do. Catelyn: Sometimes, the best thing you can do is nothing. When I first came to Winterfell, I was hurt whenever Eddard_Stark went to the godswood to sit beneath his heart tree. Part of his soul was in that tree, I knew, a part I would never share. Yet without that part, I soon realized, he would not have been Ned. Jeyne, child, you have wed the north, as I did ... and in the north, the winters will come. Be patient. Be understanding. He loves you and he needs you, and he will come back to you soon enough. This very night, perhaps. Be there when he does. That is all I can tell you.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Sybell: She would not give up the little crown the rebel gave her, and when I tried to take it from her the willful child fought me. Jeyne: It was mine. You had no right. Robb_Stark had it made for me. I loved him.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Queen. Yes, this pretty little girl is a queen, I must remember that. She was pretty, undeniably, with her chestnut curls and heart-shaped face, and that shy smile. Slender, but with good hips, Catelyn noted. She should have no trouble bearing children, at least.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jeyne is bright as well as beautiful. And kind as well. She has a gentle heart.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: I took her castle and she took my heart.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Tywin: Robb_Stark has taken Gawen_Westerling's eldest daughter to wife. Tyrion: He broke his sworn word? He threw away the Freys for... Kevan: A maid of sixteen years, named Jeyne.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jeyne seemed a sweet child, I'll grant you, though I only saw her once. But with such doubtful blood...

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Having once married Tysha, Tyrion could not entirely share Kevan_Lannister horror at the thought of wedding a girl whose great grandfather sold cloves.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jeyne Westerling is Sybell_Spicer daughter, and Robb_Stark is Eddard_Stark son.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Walder: And where's your bride, Your Grace? The fair Queen Jeyne. A Westerling of the Crag, I'm told, heh. Robb: I left her at Riverrun, my lord. She was too weary for more travel, as we told Ser Ryman_Frey. Walder: That makes me grievous sad. I wanted to behold her with mine own weak eyes. We all did, heh. Isn't that so, my lady? Joyeuse: Y-yes, my lord. We all so wanted to pay homage to Queen Jeyne. She must be fair to look on. Robb: She is most fair, my lady.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jaime: Will you exchange the Westerlings for Edmure_Tully? Brynden: No. Robb_Stark entrusted his queen to my keeping, and I swore to keep her safe. I will not hand her over to a Frey noose.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jeyne Westerling had been Robb_Stark's queen, the girl who cost him everything. With a wolf in her belly, she could have proved more dangerous than Brynden_Tully.

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: She did not look dangerous. Jeyne was a willowy girl, no more than fifteen or sixteen, more awkward than graceful. She had breasts the size of apples, a mop of chestnut curls, and the soft brown eyes of a doe. Pretty enough for a child, Jaime decided, but not a girl to lose a kingdom for.[N 1]

name: Jeyne Westerling
quote: Jaime: Best keep some archers near Lord Westerling's daughter as well. Forley: Gawen_Westerling girl? She's— Jaime: —the Robb_Stark widow, and twice as dangerous as Edmure_Tully if she were ever to escape us.

name: Jhiqui
quote: Daenerys: Have you ever seen a dragon? Irri: Dragons are gone, Khaleesi. Jhiqui: Dead. Long and long ago. Daenerys: Everywhere? Even in the east? Irri: No dragon. Brave men kill them, for dragon terrible evil beasts. It is known. Jhiqui: It is known.

name: Jhiqui
quote: Daenerys: I have won no victories. Jhiqui: You burned the maegi in their house of dust and sent their souls to hell.

name: Jhiqui
quote: Irri: Daenerys_Targaryen, you must not touch the Stalwart_Shield. It is bad luck to touch the dead. Jhiqui: Unless you killed them yourself. That is known. Irri: It is known.

name: Jhiqui
quote: Jhiqui: You are too skinny for him. You are almost a boy. Rakharo does not bed with boys. This is known. Irri: It is known that you are almost a cow. Rakharo does not bed with cows.

name: Jhogo
quote: Jhogo: If Eroeh wailing offends your ears, Khaleesi, Jhogo will bring you her tongue. Daenerys: I will not have her harmed. I claim her. Do as I command you, or Khal Drogo will know the reason why.

name: Jhogo
quote: Daenerys: Jhogo, to you I give the silver-handled whip that was my bride gift, and name you ko, and ask your oath, that you will live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm. Jhogo: Khaleesi, this is not done. It would shame me, to be bloodrider to a woman.

name: Jhogo
quote: When cowards hide behind great walls, it is they who are defeated, Khaleesi.

name: Jhogo
quote: He was a youth of sixteen years, whip-thin, fearless, quick to laugh, with the faint shadow of his first mustachio on his upper lip.

name: Jhogo
quote: Aggo and Jhogo fell in to either side of them, walking with the bowlegged swagger all the horselords affected when forced to dismount and stride the earth like common mortals.

name: Jhogo
quote: Aggo, Jhogo, and Rakharo were brave warriors, but they were young, and too valuable to risk. They kept her khalasar together, and were her best scouts too.

name: Jhogo
quote: Grey Worm: If it pleases the Barristan_Selmy to recall, the Wise Masters hold our Hero too. Also the horselord Jhogo, Daenerys_Targaryen own blood rider. Rommo: Blood of her blood. He must be freed. The honor of the khalasar demands it.

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: Only Lady Joanna truly knows Tywin_Lannister, and all his smiles belong to her and her alone. I do avow that I have even observed her make him laugh, not once, but on three separate occasions!

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: With her death, Grand Maester Pycelle observes, the joy went out of Tywin_Lannister, yet still he persisted in his duty.

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: Tyrion: I want you to stand up before the realm and proclaim that I am your son and your lawful heir. Tywin: Casterly Rock. Never. Tyrion: Why? Tywin: You ask that?
