You, who killed your mother to come into the world? You are an ill-made, devious, disobedient, spiteful little creature full of envy, lust, and low cunning. Men's laws give you the right to bear my name and display my colors, since I cannot prove that you are not mine.

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: Lord Tywin_Lannister seldom spoke of his wife, but Tyrion had heard his uncles talk of the love between them. In those days, his father had been Aerys_II_Targaryen Hand, and many people said that Lord Tywin Lannister ruled the Seven Kingdoms, but Lady Joanna ruled Lord Tywin.

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: Tywin_Lannister was not the same man after she died, Imp. The best part of him died with her.

name: Joanna Lannister
quote: Daenerys: And my father? Was there some woman he loved better than Rhaella_Targaryen? Barristan: Not ... not loved. Mayhaps wanted is a better word, but ... it was only kitchen gossip, the whispers of washerwomen and stableboys ... Daenerys: I want to know. I never knew my father. I want to know everything about him. The good and ... the rest. Barristan: As you command. Prince Aerys_II_Targaryen ... as a youth, he was taken with a certain lady of Casterly Rock, a cousin of Tywin_Lannister. When she and Tywin wed, your father drank too much wine at the wedding feast and was heard to say that it was a great pity that the lord's right to the first night had been abolished. A drunken jape, no more, but Tywin Lannister was not a man to forget such words, or the ... the liberties your father took during the bedding.

name: Jocelyn Stark
quote: Your Eddard_Stark Rickard_Stark had no siblings, but his Edwyle_Stark had a sister who married a Benedict_Royce of Lord Raymar_Royce, of the junior branch. They had three daughters, all of whom wed Vale lordlings.

name: Jocelyn Swyft
quote: Tommen: The gods are weeping for Tywin_Lannister. Lady Jocelyn says the raindrops are their tears. Cersei: Jocelyn Swyft is a fool. If the gods could weep, they would have wept for Joffrey_Baratheon. Rain is rain.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: I cannot abide the wailing of women.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: What is it, sweet lady? Why are you afraid? No one will hurt you.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Cersei_Lannister bids me let Lord Eddard_Stark take the black, and Lady Sansa_Stark has begged mercy for her father. But they have the soft hearts of women. So long as I am your king, treason shall never go unpunished. Ser Ilyn_Payne, bring me his head!

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: I'll get you with child as soon as you're able. If the first one is stupid, I'll chop off your head and find a smarter wife.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Tywin: Joffrey, when your enemies defy you, you must serve them steel and fire. When they go to their knees, however, you must help them back to their feet. Elsewise no man will ever bend the knee to you. And any man who must say 'I am the king' is no true king at all. Aerys_II_Targaryen never understood that, but you will. When I've won your war for you, we will restore the king's peace and the king's justice. The only head that need concern you is Margaery_Tyrell's maidenhead. Joffrey: You talk about Aerys, Grandfather, but you were scared of him. Cersei: Joffrey, apologize to your grandfather. Joffrey: Why should I? Everyone knows it's true. Robert_I_Baratheon won all the battles. He killed Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen and took the crown, while your father was hiding under Casterly Rock. A strong king acts boldly, he doesn't just talk.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Joffrey: I want to see, kof, see you ride that, kof kof, pig, Tyrion_Lannister. I want... Margaery: Your Grace? Joffrey: It's, kof, the pie, noth- kof, pie. I, kof, I can't, kof kof kof kof...

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Joffrey is truly a little shit.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Sansa did not really know Joffrey yet, but she was already in love with him. He was all she ever dreamt her prince should be, tall and handsome and strong, with hair like gold. She treasured every chance to spend time with him, few as they were.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: I am sorry for Arya_Stark, Ned. Truly. About the wolf, I mean. My son was lying, I'd stake my soul on it. My son ...

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: I have dreamed of giving up the crown. Take ship for the Free Cities with my horse and my hammer, spend my time warring and whoring, that's what I was made for. The sellsword king, how the singers would love me. You know what stops me? The thought of Joffrey on the throne, with Cersei_Lannister standing behind him whispering in his ear. My son. How could I have made a son like that, Ned?

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Cersei: Sansa_Stark would have done anything for Joffrey, until he cut off Eddard_Stark head and called it mercy. That put an end to that. Tyrion: His Grace has a unique way of winning the hearts of his subjects.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Joffrey the Illborn, small wonder he's faithless, with the Jaime_Lannister for a father.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Olenna: What sort of man is this Joffrey, who calls himself Baratheon but looks so very Lannister? Sansa A monster. Joffrey is a monster. He lied about the Mycah and made Eddard_Stark kill my wolf. When I displease him, he has the Kingsguard beat me. He's evil and cruel, my lady, it's so. And Cersei_Lannister as well. Olenna: Ah, that's a pity.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: You can lead a king to water, but with Joff one had to splash it about before he realized he could drink it.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Cersei: Joffrey had no love for Robb_Stark, but Bran_Stark was nothing to him. He was only a child himself. Jaime: A child hungry for a pat on the head from Robert_I_Baratheon you let him believe was his father.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Brienne: Joffrey was your... Jaime: My king. Leave it at that. Brienne: You say Sansa_Stark killed him. Why protect her? Jaime: Because Joff was no more to me than a squirt of seed in Cersei_Lannister cunt. And because he deserved to die.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Tyrion: Joffrey would have been a worse king than Aerys_II_Targaryen ever was. He stole his father's dagger and gave it to Catspaw to slit the throat of Bran_Stark, did you know that? Jaime: I ... I thought he might have. Tyrion: Well, a son takes after his father. Joffrey would have killed me as well, once he came into his power. For the crime of being short and ugly, of which I am conspicuously guilty.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Joffrey is in my prayers as well. I loved him dearly, though I never had the chance to know him.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
quote: Joffrey had never had a close friend of his own age, that she recalled. The poor boy was always alone. I had Jaime_Lannister when I was a child ... and Melara_Hetherspoon, until she fell into the well. Joff had been fond of the Sandor_Clegane, to be sure, but that was not friendship. He was looking for the father he never found in Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Joffrey Caswell
quote: Lord Caswell passed out at the table with his face in a puddle of wine, and Lady Vyrwel began to weep, though no one was quite certain as to the cause of her distress.

name: Joffrey Caswell
quote: Kyle: I am sent against Lord Caswell, the very man I came to see. Duncan: It's a wonder he can sit a horse, after last night. The victory is yours, ser. Kyle: Oh, no. The cat who wants his bowl of cream must know when to purr and when to show his claws, Ser Duncan. If His Lordship's lance so much as scrapes against my shield, I shall go tumbling to the earth. Afterwards, when I bring my horse and armor to him, I will compliment His Lordship on how much his prowess has grown since I made him his first sword. That will recall me to him, and before the day is out, I shall be a Caswell man again, a knight of Bitterbridge.

name: Joffrey Velaryon
quote: I want to fight for you, Mother, as my brothers did. Let me prove that I am as brave as they were.

name: Young John Mudd
quote: We serve Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar), old crone.

name: Young John Mudd
quote: The Mudds had been kings up by the Trident a thousand years ago, she knew, but there was nothing royal about this one. Nor was he particularly young, but it seemed his father had also served in the Golden Company, where he had been known as Old_John_Mudd.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: You were sitting at supper, but instead of a servant, Maester Luwin brought you your food. He served you the king’s cut off the roast, the meat rare and bloody, but with a savory smell that made everyone’s mouth water. The meat he served the Freys was old and grey and dead. Yet they liked their supper better than you liked yours.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: I dreamed that the sea was lapping all around Winterfell. I saw black waves crashing against the gates and towers, and then the salt water came flowing over the walls and filled the castle. Drowned men were floating in the yard. When I first dreamed the dream, back at Greywater, I didn’t know their faces, but now I do. That Alebelly is one, the guard who called our names at the feast. Chayle another. Mikken as well.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: This is not the day I die.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: Meera: My brother has the greensight. He dreams things that haven't happened, but sometimes they do. Jojen: There is no sometimes, Meera.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: I dreamed of Ramsay_Snow who came today, the one they call Reek. You and Rickon_Stark lay dead at his feet, and he was skinning off your faces with a long red blade.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: There is a power in living wood, a power strong as fire.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: Bran: You're a greenseer. Jojen: No, only a boy who dreams.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: If ice can burn, then love and hate can mate.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: No, my prince. Jojen Reed may have had a dream or two that he believes came true, but he does not have the greensight. No living man has that power.

name: Jojen Reed
quote: It was hard to sulk with Meera_Reed. She was much more cheerful than her brother, and always seemed to know how to make him smile. Nothing ever scared her or made her angry. Well, except Jojen, sometimes ... Jojen Reed could scare most anyone.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: I need good men about me. Men like Jon Arryn.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: Jon Arryn was a wise man and a good Hand.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: I loved that old man, I swear it, but now I think he was a bigger fool than Moon_Boy.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: Lord Arryn was a dutiful husband, but Lysa_Arryn was made from politics, not passion.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: The seed is strong, Jon Arryn had cried on his deathbed, and so it was.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: Stannis: I believed Robert_I_Baratheon would be more disposed to listen if the charges came from Lord Arryn, whom he loved. Renly: Ah. So we have the word of a dead man.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: Lysa_Arryn match with Lord Arryn had been hastily arranged, and Jon was an old man even then, older than Hoster_Tully. An old man without an heir. His first two wives had left him childless, Elbert_Arryn had been murdered with Brandon_Stark in King's Landing, Denys_Arryn had died in the Battle of the Bells. He needed a young wife if House Arryn was to continue ... a young wife known to be fertile.

name: Jon Arryn
quote: The death of the noble Hand, Jon Arryn, has unleashed a madness on the land, a madness of pride and violence.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Jon: Tywin_Lannister himself could have done no more. Myles: There is where you're wrong. Lord Tywin would not have bothered with a search. He would have burned that town and every living creature in it. Men and boys, babes at the breast, noble knights and holy septons, pigs and whores, rats and rebels, he would have burned them all. When the fires guttered out and only ash and cinders remained, he would have sent his men in to find the bones of Robert Baratheon. Later, when Eddard_Stark and Hoster_Tully turned up with their host, he would have offered pardons to the both of them, and they would have accepted and turned for home with their tails between their legs.

name: Jon Connington
quote: I understand hate well enough.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Seventeen years had come and gone since the Battle of the Bells, yet the sound of bells ringing still tied a knot in his guts. Others might claim that the realm was lost when Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen fell to Robert's warhammer on the Trident, but the Battle of the Trident would never have been fought if the griffin had only slain the stag there in Stoney Sept. The bells tolled for all of us that day. For Aerys_II_Targaryen and Rhaella_Targaryen, for Elia_Martell of Dorne and Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar), for every true man and honest woman in the Seven Kingdoms. And for my silver prince.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Let me live long enough to see Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) sit on the Iron Throne, and Varys will pay for that slight and so much more. Then we'll see who's soon forgotten.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Death, he knew, but slow. I still have time. A year. Two years. Five. Some stone men live for ten. Time enough to cross the sea, to see Griffin's Roost again. To end the Usurper's line for good and all, and put Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) upon the Iron Throne. Then Lord Jon Connington could die content.

name: Jon Connington
quote: I rose too high, loved too hard, dared too much. I tried to grasp a star, overreached, and fell.

name: Jon Connington
quote: I failed Rhaegar_Targaryen, but I will not fail Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar).

name: Jon Connington
quote: Too soon. Connington is too young, too bold, too eager for glory.

name: Jon Connington
quote: He has supped on hate himself, this one. It has warmed him in the night for years.

name: Jon Connington
quote: We want no songs about the gallant exile. Those who die heroic deaths are long remembered, thieves and drunks and cravens soon forgotten.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Send me against my uncle, and I will bring you back his head, and the head of Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) too.

name: Jon Connington
quote: What victories has he ever won that we should fear him? He could have ended Robert's Rebellion at Stoney Sept. He failed. Just as the Golden Company has always failed. Some may rush to join them, aye. The realm is well rid of such fools.

name: Jon Connington
quote: If this is indeed Jon Connington, he will be a different man. Older, harder, more seasoned ... more dangerous.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Arianne: What sort of man was he? Honest and honorable, venal and grasping, proud? Daemon: Proud, for a certainty. Even arrogant. A faithful friend to Rhaegar_Targaryen, but prickly with others. Robert_I_Baratheon was his liege, but I've heard it said that Connington chafed at serving such a lord.

name: Jon Connington
quote: Melons or maidenheads, it’s all the same to your sort. If you want it, you take it. If you should see this Lord Connington, you tell him that I knew his mother, and she would be ashamed.

name: Jon Fossoway
quote: I would gladly take this challenge myself, though I'm not half the swordsman Lord Bryce_Caron is, or Ser Guyard_Morrigen. Renly_Baratheon left no notable knights at Storm's End. Garrison duty is for old men and green boys.

name: Jon Heddle
quote: Later it passed to a crippled knight named Long Jon Heddle, who took up iron-working when he grew too old to fight. He forged a new sign for the yard, a three-headed dragon of black iron that he hung from a wooden post.

name: Jon Myre
quote: Jon: This girl forgets herself. Balon_Greyjoy let her believe she was a man. Asha: Your father made the same mistake with you.

name: Jon Roxton
quote: We kill the bastards now. Afterward, let the bravest of us claim their dragons and fly them into battle.

name: Jon Roxton
quote: Jon: Lord Hammer, my condolences. Hugh: For what? Jon: You died in the battle.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Arya: I wish you were coming with us. Jon: Different roads sometimes lead to the same castle.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Jon: First lesson: stick them with the pointy end. Arya: I know which end to use!

name: Jon Snow
quote: Tell Robb_Stark that I'm going to command the Night's Watch and keep him safe, so he might as well take up needlework with the girls and have Mikken melt down his sword for horseshoes.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Tyrion_Lannister had claimed that most men would rather deny a hard truth than face it, but Jon was done with denials. He was who he was; Jon Snow, bastard and oathbreaker, motherless, friendless, and damned. For the rest of his life—however long that might be—he would be condemned to be an outsider, the silent man standing in the shadows who dares not speak his true name.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Jon was not afraid of death, but he did not want to die like that, trussed and bound and beheaded like a common brigand. If he must perish, let it be with a sword in his hand, fighting his father's killers. He was no true Stark, had never been one... but he could die like one. Let them say that Eddard_Stark had fathered four sons, not three.

name: Jon Snow
quote: There's no shame in fear, Eddard_Stark told me, what matters is how we face it.

name: Jon Snow
quote: The more you give a king, the more he wants. We are walking on a bridge of ice with an abyss on either side. Pleasing Stannis_Baratheon is difficult enough. Pleasing Tommen_Baratheon is hardly possible.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Edd, fetch me a block.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Cregan: I see what you are, Snow. Half a wolf and half a wildling, baseborn get of a Eddard_Stark and a whore. You would deliver a Alys_Karstark to the bed of Sigorn. Did you sample her yourself first? If you mean to kill me, do it and be damned for a kinslayer. Stark and Karstark are one blood. Jon: My name is Snow. Cregan: Bastard. Jon: Guilty. Of that at least.

name: Jon Snow
quote: You have more of the north in you than your brothers.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Never ask me about Jon. He is my blood and that is all you need to know.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Whoever Jon's mother had been, Eddard_Stark must have loved her fiercely, for nothing Catelyn said would persuade him to send the boy away. It was the one thing she could never forgive him. She had come to love her husband with all her heart, but she had never found it in her to love Jon. She might have overlooked a dozen bastards for Ned's sake, so long as they were out of sight. Jon was never out of sight, and as he grew, he looked more like Ned than any of the trueborn sons she bore him. Somehow that made it worse.

name: Jon Snow
quote: You know nothing, Jon Snow.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Jon's more a Stark than some lordlings from the Vale who have never so much as set eyes on Winterfell.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Jon Snow was the only brother that remained to her. I am a bastard too now, just like him. Oh, it would be so sweet to see him once again.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Needle was Jon Snow's smile. He used to mess my hair and call me "little sister," she remembered, and suddenly there were tears in her eyes.

name: Jon Snow
quote: My lords, when Donal_Noye was slain, it was this young man Jon Snow who took the Wall and held it, against all the fury of the north. He has proved himself valiant, loyal, and resourceful. Were it not for him, you would have found Mance_Rayder sitting here when you arrived, Lord Slynt. You are doing him a great wrong. Jon Snow was Jeor_Mormont own steward and squire. He was chosen for that duty because the Lord Commander saw much promise in him. As do I.

name: Jon Snow
quote: The gift was strong in Snow, but the youth was untaught, still fighting his nature when he should have gloried in it.

name: Jon Snow
quote: Stannis_Baratheon had been a younger son living in the shadow of Robert_I_Baratheon, just as Jon Snow, bastard-born, had always been eclipsed by his trueborn sibling, the fallen hero men had called Robb_Stark. Both men were unbelievers by nature, mistrustful, suspicious. The only gods they truly worshiped were honor and duty.

name: Jon Umber
quote: Robb: Eddard_Stark taught me that it was death to bare steel against your liege lord, but doubtless you only meant to cut my meat. Jon: Your meat is bloody tough.

name: Jon Umber
quote: We'll shove our swords up Tywin_Lannister's bunghole soon enough, begging your pardons, and then it's on to the Red Keep to free Eddard_Stark.

name: Jon Umber
quote: MY LORDS! Here is what I say to these two kings! Renly_Baratheon is nothing to me, nor Stannis_Baratheon neither. Why should they rule over me and mine, from some flowery seat in Highgarden or Dorne? What do they know of the Wall or the wolfswood or the barrows of the First Men? Even their gods are wrong. The Others take the Lannisters too, I've had a bellyful of them. Why shouldn't we rule ourselves again? It was the dragons we married, and the dragons are all dead! There sits the only king I mean to bow my knee to, m'lords. The King in the North!

name: Jon Umber
quote: Leave off, Karstark, it was a mother's folly. Women are made that way.

name: Jon Umber
quote: Your creepers best come fast, or my men will swarm those walls and win the Moat before you show your face. I'll make a gift of it to you when you come dawdling up.

name: Jon Umber
quote: I thought he was going to kill me. Did you see the way he threw down Hallis_Mollen, like he was no bigger than Rickon_Stark? Gods, I was so scared.

name: Jon Umber
quote: Catelyn: Eddard_Stark once told me that the Greatjon was as fearless as any man he had ever known. Robb: Grey Wind ate two of his fingers, and he laughed about it.

name: Jon Umber
quote: The Greatjon's the Robb_Stark strong right hand, all know that to be true.

name: Jon Umber
quote: Amongst the living, Greatjon Umber was stronger, Lyle_Crakehall of Crakehall most likely, both Cleganes for a certainty. Gregor_Clegane strength was like nothing human. It did not matter. With speed and skill, Jaime could beat them all.

name: Jon Umber
quote: Catelyn would sooner Lord Umber had seen fit to stay sober, but telling the Greatjon not to drink was like telling him not to breathe for a few hours.

name: Jon Umber
quote: You shall have one task and one task only, Merrett, but I believe you are well suited to it. I want you to see to it that Greatjon Umber is so bloody drunk that he can hardly stand, let alone fight.

name: Jon Waters
quote: Elaena_Targaryen gave their son the bastard name of 'Waters' in honor of his Alyn_Velaryon, and he grew to be a great knight.

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: Gregor_Clegane laid waste to my fields, slaughtered my smallfolk, and left Stone Hedge a smoking ruin. Am I now to bend the knee to the ones who sent him? What have we fought for, if we are to put all back as it was before?

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: Jonos: You took me unawares, my lord. I was not told of your coming. Jaime: And I seem to have Hildy.

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: Aye, I kept faith with Robb_Stark. As I'll keep faith with you, so long as you treat me fair. I bent the knee because I saw no sense in dying for the dead nor shedding Bracken blood in a lost cause.

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: The red stallion was ever a welcome sight in Riverrun. Hoster_Tully counts Jonos Bracken among his oldest and most loyal bannermen.

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: The plan's a good one. Lord Tytos_Blackwood says so, and Lord Jonos as well. When did Blackwood and Bracken agree about anything that was not certain, I ask you?

name: Jonos Bracken
quote: Tytos: For all his rutting, he has not proved man enough to father sons. Jaime: He had a bastard son killed in the war. Tytos: Did he? Harry_Rivers was a bastard, true enough, but whether Jonos sired him is a thornier question. A fair-haired boy, he was, and comely. Jonos is neither.

name: Jonothor Darry
quote: When you donned that cloak, you promised to obey.

name: Jonothor Darry
quote: Jaime: We are sworn to protect Rhaella_Targaryen as well. Jonothor: We are, but not from Aerys_II_Targaryen.

name: Jonothor Darry
quote: I learned from the Gerold_Hightower and Barristan_Selmy. I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn_Martell and Ser Oswell_Whent and Ser Jonothor Darry, good men every one.

name: Jonquil
quote: Jonquil: You are no knight, I know you. You are Florian the Fool. Florian: I am, my lady, As great a fool as ever lived, and as great a knight as well. Jonquil: A fool and a knight? I have never heard of such a thing. Florian: Sweet lady, all men are fools, and all men are knights, where women are concerned.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: The common people pray for rain, healthy children, and a summer that never ends. It is no matter to them if the high lords play their game of thrones, so long as they are left in peace. They never are.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Horselord. Try me.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Daenerys: Viserys_Targaryen is dead. I am his heir, the last blood of House Targaryen. Whatever was his is mine now. Jorah: My ... queen. My sword that was his is yours, Daenerys. And my heart as well, that never belonged to your brother.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Jorah: I vow to serve you, to obey you, to die for you if need be. Daenerys: Whatever may come? Jorah: Whatever may come. Daenerys: I shall hold you to that oath. I pray you never regret the giving of it.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Jorah: There are ghosts everywhere. We carry them with us wherever we go. Daenerys: Tell me the name of your ghost, Jorah. You know all of mine. Jorah: Her name was Lynesse_Hightower.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: I did things it shames me to speak of. For gold. So Lynesse_Hightower might keep her jewels, her harper, and her cook. In the end it cost me all.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Jorah: I should not have waited so long. I should have kissed you in Qarth, in Vaes Tolorro. I should have kissed you in the red waste, every night and every day. You were made to be kissed, often and well. Daenerys: I ... that was not fitting. I am your queen.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: There is a savage beast in every man, and when you hand that man a sword or spear and send him forth to war, the beast stirs. The scent of blood is all it takes to wake him.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: widow: Why would you seek Daenerys_Targaryen, whom half the world wants dead? Jorah: To serve her. Defend her. Die for her, if need be. widow: You want to rescue her, is that the way of it? From more enemies than I can name, with swords beyond count … this is what you'd have the poor widow believe? That you are a true and chivalrous Westerosi knight crossing half the world to come to the aid of this ... well, she is no maiden, though she may still be fair.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: His crime had dishonored the north.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: So the slaver has become a spy. I would rather he become a corpse.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: Sometimes he thinks of me as a child he must protect, and sometimes as a woman he would like to bed, but does he ever truly see me as his queen?

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: You have been a better friend to me than any I have known, a better brother than Viserys_Targaryen ever was. You are the first of my Queensguard, the commander of my army, my most valued counselor, my good right hand. I honor and respect and cherish you—but I do not desire you, Jorah Mormont, and I am weary of your trying to push every other man in the world away from me, so I must needs rely on you and you alone. It will not serve, and it will not make me love you any better.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: He lied to me, informed on me, but he loved me too, and he always gave good counsel.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: One whispered word had done what fists and clubs could not; it had broken him. I should have let Zahrina have him. He's going to be about as useful as nipples on a breastplate.

name: Jorah Mormont
quote: He looks every inch a sellsword and not at all like the half-broken thing we took from Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz cage.

name: Jory Cassel
quote: Jory: Trouble, my lord? Eddard: Beyond a doubt. Come, let us see what mischief my sons have rooted out now.

name: Jory Cassel
quote: Jory: Is there any other service I might perform? Eddard: I suppose you'd best begin visiting whorehouses. Jory: Hard duty, my lord.

name: Jory Cassel
quote: Eddard: We all lie. Or did you truly think I'd believe that Nymeria_(direwolf) ran off? Arya: Jory promised not to tell. Eddard: Jory kept his word.

name: Jory Cassel
quote: They killed Jory? Why would anyone kill Jory?

name: Joseth
quote: Joseth: This is fruitless, my lord. We will lame a horse, break a leg. Luwin: Joseth has the right of it. Groping through the woods by torchlight will avail us nothing.

name: Joseth
quote: You can go back to the feast now, but don't go bothering Joseth and that woman.

name: Josmyn Peckledon
quote: Jaime: Peck was a hero on the Blackwater. He slew two knights and captured two more. Daven: You must be more dangerous than you look, lad. Is that a beard, or did you forget to wash the dirt off your face? Selyse_Florent has a thicker mustache. How old are you? Josmyn: Fifteen, ser. Daven: You know the best thing about heroes, Jaime? They all die young and leave more women for the rest of us.

name: Josmyn Peckledon
quote: The boy has good instincts.

name: Joth Quickbow
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Joy Hill
quote: Sybell: Tywin_Lannister said that Raynald_Westerling should have joy of him, if all went as we hoped. Jaime: Joy is my late uncle Gerion_Lannister natural daughter. A betrothal can be arranged, if that is your wish, but any marriage will need to wait. Joy was nine or ten when last I saw her. Sybell: His natural daughter? You want a Westerling to wed a bastard? Jaime: No more than I want Joy to marry the son of some scheming turncloak bitch. She deserves better.

name: Joyeuse Erenford
quote: Joyeuse: We all so wanted to pay homage to Queen Jeyne_Westerling. She must be fair to look on. Robb: She is most fair, my lady.

name: Joyeuse Erenford
quote: Lord Walder_Frey was ninety, a wizened pink weasel with a bald spotted head, too gouty to stand unassisted. His newest wife, a pale frail girl of sixteen years, walked beside his litter when they carried him in. She was the eighth Lady Frey.

name: Joyeuse Erenford
quote: Did you see her? Sixteen she is, a little flower, and her honey's only for me. I wager she gives me a son by this time next year.

name: Joyeuse Erenford
quote: I remember what to do with a woman too. That wife of mine will give me a son before this time next year, I'll wager. Or a daughter, that can't be helped. Boy or girl, it will be red, wrinkled, and squalling, and like as not she'll want to name it Walder or Walda.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Justin: Oh, leave off, Godry. We all know what a big giant sword you have, I'm sure. No need for you to wave it in our faces yet again.Godry: The only thing waving here is your tongue, Massey.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Justin: Stannis_Baratheon has other plans for Asha_Greyjoy.Clayton: The king? Or you? Scheme all you like, Massey. She'll still be for the fire, her and her king's blood.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Humfrey: If death is our fate, let us die with swords in hand.Justin: Feel free to perish as you wish, Humfrey. Myself, I would sooner live to see another spring.Robin: Some might call that craven.Justin: Better a craven than a cannibal.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Justin: Gods be good, are all you Karstarks mad?Richard: Gods? You forget yourself, Justin. We have but one god here. Speak not of demons in this company. Only the Lord of Light can save us now. Wouldn't you agree?Justin: The Lord of Light, aye. My faith runs as deep as your own, Richard, you know that.Richard: It is your courage I question, Justin, not your faith. You have preached defeat every step of the way since we rode forth from Deepwood Motte. It makes me wonder whose side you are on.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Stannis: Serve me well in this matter of the sellswords, and you may have what you desire. Until such time, Asha_Greyjoy must needs remain my captive.Justin: I understand.Stannis: Your understanding is not required. Only your obedience.

name: Justin Massey
quote: Richard_Horpe and Massey aspire to your father's seat. Massey wants Val too. He once served my brother Robert_I_Baratheon as squire and acquired his appetite for female flesh.

name: Justin Massey
quote: A man of easy smiles and endless japes, large and well fleshed, with pink cheeks, blue eyes, and a wind-tossed tangle of white-blond hair as pale as flax, he was a considerate gaoler, ever solicitous of his captive's comfort.

name: Justin Massey
quote: The Euron_Greyjoy could eat Ser Justin to break his fast and never even belch.

name: Justin Massey
quote: My champion is made of suet. Even so, Ser Justin was one of the few who might object should the queen's men try to burn her.

name: Kaeth
quote: Aenys_I_Targaryen was weak and Maegor_I_Targaryen was cruel, and Aegon_II_Targaryen was grasping, but no king before or after would practice so much willful misrule.

name: Karyl Vance
quote: I was attending Lord_Vance in the pass below the Golden Tooth, as was Ser Marq_Piper. When the word of these outrages reached Ser Edmure_Tully, he sent word that we should take a small force of men to find what survivors we could and bring them to Robert_I_Baratheon.

name: Karyl Vance
quote: Edwyn: His helm bears a black trout on its crest that makes him easy to pick out from afar. I propose that we move our siege towers close, fill them full of bowmen, and feign an attack upon the gates. That will bring Ser Brynden_Tully to the battlements, crest and all. Let every archer smear his shafts with night soil, and make that crest his mark. Once Ser Brynden dies, Riverrun is ours.Emmon: Mine. Riverrun is mine.Karyl: Will the night soil be your own contribution, Edwyn? A mortal poison, I don't doubt.

name: Karyl Vance
quote: Tywin: Marq_Piper and Karyl Vance are loose in our rear, raiding our lands across the Red Fork.Tyrion: The gall of them, fighting back.

name: Kasporio
quote: If you would like to start the bleeding now, I will happ'ly oblige you.

name: Kasporio
quote: Tyrion: Now how do I go about securing arms and armor? Kasporio: Will you want a pig to ride as well? Tyrion: Why, I did not know your wife was in the company. That's kind of you to offer her, but I would prefer a horse.

name: Kasporio
quote: The peacock calls himself Kasporio the Cunning, though Kasporio the Cunt would be more apt. A nasty piece of work.

name: Kella
quote: I don’t know the child. Another of Kella’s bastards, I suppose. She pops one out every few years.

name: Kem
quote: Kem: Who told you I was from King's Landing? Tyrion: No one. Your wits gave you away. There's no one clever as a Kingslander, they say.

name: Kem
quote: Kem: They say all Lannisters are twisty snakes. Tyrion: Snakes? That sound you hear is Tywin_Lannister, slithering in his grave. We are lions, or so we like to say. But it makes no matter, Kem. Step on a snake or a lion's tail, you'll end up just as dead.

name: Kem
quote: Every word out of your mouth reeks of Flea Bottom.

name: Kermit Tully
quote: Let it be on your head, Stark. I want no part of this, but I will not have it said that Riverrun stood in the way of justice.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: A man who fights for coin is loyal only to his purse.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Tywin: Unleash Ser Gregor_Clegane and send him before us with his reavers. Send forth Vargo_Hoat and his freeriders as well, and Ser Amory_Lorch. Each is to have three hundred horse. Tell them I want to see the riverlands afire from the Gods Eye to the Red Fork. Kevan: They will burn, my lord. I shall give the commands.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Kevan: You would be wise to trust him.Tyrion: You love him.Kevan: He is Tywin_Lannister.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Cersei: By what right do you presume to give me terms? You are no more than one of my father's household knights. Kevan: I hold no lands, that is true. But I have certain incomes, and chests of coin set aside. Tytos_Lannister forgot none of his children when he died, and Tywin_Lannister knew how to reward good service. I feed two hundred knights and can double that number if need be. There are freeriders who will follow my banner, and I have the gold to hire sellswords. You would be wise not to take me lightly, Your Grace ... and wiser still not to make of me a foe.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Cersei: Bring us Sandor_Clegane head, and I know His Grace will be most grateful. Joffrey_Baratheon may have liked the man, but Tommen_Baratheon was always afraid of him ... with good reason it would seem. Kevan: When a dog goes bad, the fault lies with his master.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Cersei: Tommen_Baratheon is my son! Kevan: Aye, and from what I saw of Joffrey_Baratheon, you are as unfit a mother as you are a ruler.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: But it did no good to brood on lost battles and roads not taken. That was a vice of old done men.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Ser Kevan seldom "had a thought" that Lord Tywin_Lannister had not had first.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: The next Hand will know his place, she promised herself. It would have to be Ser Kevan. Her uncle was tireless, prudent, unfailingly obedient. She could rely on him, as Tywin_Lannister had. The hand does not argue with the head.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Kevan should be Tommen_Baratheon Hand. Harys_Swyft is a toad, and Cersei_Lannister is a fool if she thinks elsewise.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: Genna: Kevan always did what was asked of him. It is not like him to turn away from any duty. Something is awry here, I can smell it. Jaime: He said that he was tired. Genna: Tired? I suppose he has a right to be. It has been hard for Kevan, living all his life in Tywin_Lannister shadow.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: My uncle Kevan would make a passably good regent if someone pressed the duty on him, but he will never reach for it. The gods shaped him to be a follower, not a leader.

name: Kevan Lannister
quote: This pains me, my lord. You do not deserve to die alone on such a cold dark night. There are many like you, good men in service to bad causes ... but you were threatening to undo all Cersei_Lannister good work, to reconcile Highgarden and Casterly Rock, to bind the Faith to your little king, unite the Seven Kingdoms under Tommen_Baratheon rule.

name: Khorane Sathmantes
quote: He had the pale blue eyes you often saw on Lys, set in a bony weatherworn face, but he had spent many years trading in the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Khorane Sathmantes
quote: This was well done, Khorane. You will be having a fine reward, I am thinking.

name: Khrazz
quote: Barristan: Throw down your steel and stand aside, and no harm need come to you. Khrazz: Old man. I will eat your heart. Barristan: Then come.

name: Khrazz
quote: Hizdahr: Khrazz will have the honor of the day's first kill. There has never been a better fighter. Belwas: Strong Belwas was better.

name: Khrazz
quote: Khrazz believes the hearts of brave men make him stronger.

name: Kiera of Tyrosh
quote: A shadow came at Brynden_Rivers command to strangle brave Prince Valarr's sons in their mother's womb.

name: Kindly Man
quote: You lie. Worse, you lie poorly.

name: Kindly Man
quote: Death is not the worst thing. It is His gift to us, an end to want and pain.

name: Kindly Man
quote: Men take many paths through this vale of tears and pain. Ours is the hardest. Few are made to walk it. It takes uncommon strength of body and spirit, and a heart both hard and strong.

name: Kindly Man
quote: And are you a god, to decide who should live and who should die? We give the gift to those marked by Him of Many Faces, after prayers and sacrifice.

name: Kindly Man
quote: We kill men, but we do not presume to judge them.

name: Kindly Man
quote: Does he think to scare me?

name: Kindly Man
quote: If he could have secrets, so could she.

name: Kojja Mo
quote: All you Westerosi make a shame of loving. There is no shame in loving. If your septons say there is, your seven gods must be demons. In the isles we know better. Our gods gave us legs to run with, noses to smell with, hands to touch and feel. What mad cruel god would give a man eyes and tell him he must forever keep them shut, and never look at all the beauty in the world? Only a monster god, a demon of the darkness.

name: Kojja Mo
quote: Gilly knows the words you said. She is a child in some ways, but she is not blind. She knows why you wear the black, why you go to Oldtown. She knows she cannot keep you. She wants you for a little while, is all. She lost Craster, her mother and her sisters, her home, her world. All she has is you, and Aemon_Steelsong. So you go to her, or swim.

name: Koss
quote: When four men assaulted the gate with axes, Koss shot them down with arrows, one by one.

name: Kraznys mo Nakloz
quote: Tell her to look at the soldiers. Even the dim purple eyes of a sunset savage can see how magnificent my creatures are surely.

name: Kromm
quote: Kromm: They're fighting. More men came up, hundreds of them, and at first they made to join the others. But now they've fallen on them! Theon: Is it Asha_Greyjoy? Kromm: No. These are northmen, I tell you. With a bloody man on their banner.

name: Kurleket
quote: At your word, m'lady, I'll toss Tyrion_Lannister lying tongue at your feet.

name: Kurleket
quote: He looked at Kurleket, but the man was too dim to taste the mockery.

name: Kurz
quote: Kurz caught a fish with his bare hands. Arya saw how he did it, standing over a shallow pool, calm as still water, his hand darting out quick as a snake when the fish swam near. It didn't look as hard as catching cats. Fish didn't have claws.

name: Kurz
quote: She wished the poacher hadn't died. He'd known more about the woods than all the rest of them together, but he'd taken an arrow through the shoulder pulling in the ladder at the towerhouse.

name: Kyle
quote: It's an old tale, the red dragon and the black. No sense for us to fight about it now, lad. We are all brothers of the hedges here.

name: Kyle
quote: The cat who wants his bowl of cream must know when to purr and when to show his claws.

name: Kyle
quote: Ser Kyle would not be the first hedge knight to trade his honor for a warm place by the fire.

name: Kyle
quote: You're safe now. There's no one here but hedge knights, and the gods know that we're a harmless lot.

name: Lady of the Leaves
quote: We cannot stay here much longer, with autumn on us. A dozen wolves went down the Hayford road nine days past, hunting. If they'd chanced to look up they might have seen us.

name: Lady of the Leaves
quote: You swear Beric_Dondarrion not dead? Bless you, Lem, that's the best tidings we've had in half a year. May the Warrior defend him, and Thoros_of_Myr too.

name: Laena Velaryon
quote: By taking the girl to wife, Viserys_I_Targaryen could heal the rift that had grown up between the Iron Throne and Driftmark. And Laena would surely make a splendid queen.

name: Laena Velaryon
quote: Her ladyship shows far more interest in flying than in boys.

name: Laena Velaryon
quote: [She] was almost as pretty as Laenor_Velaryon.

name: Laena Velaryon
quote: Whilst Princess Rhaenyra_Targaryen misliked her stepmother, Queen Alicent_Hightower, she became fond and more than fond of her good-sister Lady Laena.

name: Laenor Velaryon
quote: One objection was raised: Laenor Velaryon was now nineteen years of age yet had never shown any interest in women. Instead he surrounded himself with handsome squires of his own age and was said to prefer their company. But Grand Maester Mellos dismissed this concern out of hand. "What of it?" he is supposed to have said. "I am not fond of fish, but when fish is served, I eat it." Thus was the match decided.

name: Laenor Velaryon
quote: My half-brothers would be more to his taste.

name: Laenor Velaryon
quote: Laena_Velaryon was almost as pretty as her brother.

name: Laenor Velaryon
quote: Do keep trying, soon or late, you may get one who looks like you.

name: Laenor Velaryon
quote: They will turn the Red Keep into a brothel. No man's daughter will be safe, nor any man's wife. Even the boys... we know what Laenor was.

name: Lambert Turnberry
quote: Ser Lambert, the fool who hides a good eye behind a patch.

name: Lamprey
quote: I am not a man to him, Davos thought, only a stone that eats and shits and speaks.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Lancel: Have a care how you speak to me, Imp. Tyrion: Oh, unhand your sword. One cry from me and Shagga will burst in and kill you. With an axe, not a wineskin.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Jaime: How long has it been since you've eaten? Lancel: My faith is all the nourishment I need.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Jaime: In any case, you're not like to be taken for Baelor_I_Targaryen. Lancel: No. He was a rare spirit, pure and brave and innocent, untouched by all the evils of the world. I am a sinner, with much and more to atone for. Jaime: What do you know of sin, coz? I killed Aerys_II_Targaryen. Lancel: The brave man slays with a sword, the craven with a wineskin. We are both kingslayers, ser.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: I know the lad well. A stalwart boy, Ser Kevan_Lannister's son, nephew to Lord Tywin and cousin to Cersei_Lannister. I hope the dear sweet lad does not blame himself. Children are so vulnerable in the innocence of their youth, how well do I remember.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Bronn: Four hairs on his lip and he thinks he's a man. Tyrion: Four hairs and a knighthood. He's Ser Lancel now, never forget.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Look at him. Not quite so tall, his features not so fine, and his hair is sand instead of spun gold, yet still ... even a poor copy of Jaime_Lannister is sweeter than an empty bed, I suppose.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Though only seventeen, he might have passed for seventy; grey-faced, gaunt, with hollow cheeks, sunken eyes, and hair as white and brittle as chalk. How can Lancel be among the living when Tywin_Lannister is dead? Have the gods taken leave of their wits?

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: And Lancel ... I suppose we should have seen this coming from afar. A life protecting the High_Sparrow is not so different from a life protecting Tommen_Baratheon, after all.

name: Lancel Lannister
quote: Cersei: Lancel loved me. He was half a boy, but I never doubted his devotion to me or Joffrey_Baratheon. High Sparrow: And yet you still corrupted him. Cersei: I was lonely. I had lost Robert_I_Baratheon, Joffrey_Baratheon, Tywin_Lannister. I was regent, but a queen is still a woman, and women are weak vessels, easily tempted ... Your High Holiness knows the truth of that. Even holy septas have been known to sin. I took comfort with Lancel. He was kind and gentle and I needed someone.

name: Lann the Clever
quote: In the songs, Lann was the fellow who winkled the Casterlys out of Casterly Rock with no weapon but his wits, and stole gold from the sun to brighten his curly hair.

name: Larissa Velaryon
quote: A kinder ghost, but no less sad.

name: Larra Rogare
quote: Let Aegon_III_Targaryen have Daenaera_Velaryon; Larra of Lys was like to give Viserys_II_Targaryen children sooner rather than later, thereby securing the dynasty.

name: Larra Rogare
quote: I could sometimes make the lady laugh, though she did not understand more than a few words of our tongue, but Sandoq_the_Shadow playing always made her weep, and strange to say she liked that better.

name: Larra Rogare
quote: If you are come to take my lady wife, ser, turn and go, for you shall not pass whilst I still stand.

name: Larra Rogare
quote: You stood beside me when the dragon ate Rhaenyra_Targaryen. All you did was watch. I will not have you watch while they kill Viserys_II_Targaryen wife.

name: Larra Rogare
quote: The Lyseni and their queer foreign gods had no place in the Seven Kingdoms. It was always intended that Lady Larra should die together with her brothers, so Viserys_II_Targaryen would be free to take a proper Westerosi queen.

name: Larys Strong
quote: When was a wolf ever moved by words?

name: Larys Strong
quote: When I am dead, hack off my clubfoot with that great sword of yours. I have dragged it with me all through life, let me be free of it in death at least.

name: Larys Strong
quote: A man who gathers whispers can spread them just as well.

name: Larys Strong
quote: Was there ever a man as devious as the Clubfoot? Oh, he would have made a splendid fool, that one. The words dripped from his lips like honey from a comb, and never did poison taste so sweet.

name: Larys Strong
quote: The enigma that is Larys Strong the Clubfoot has vexed students of history for generations, and is not one we can hope to unravel here. Where did his true loyalty lie? What was he about?

name: Last hero
quote: Oh my sweet summer child … What do you know of fear? Fear is for the winter, my little lord, when the snows fall a hundred feet deep and the ice wind comes howling out of the north, when the sun hides it face for years at a time, and little children are born and live and die all in darkness while the direwolves grow gaunt and hungry, and the white walkers move through the woods. The Others … Thousands and thousands of years ago, a winter fell that was cold and hard and endless beyond all memory of man. There came a night that lasted a generation, and kings shivered and died in their castles even as the swineherds in their hovels. Women smothered their children rather than see them starve, and cried, and felt their tears freeze on their cheeks. In that darkness, the Others came for the first time … They were cold things, dead things, that hated iron and fire and the touch of the sun, and every creature with hot blood in its veins. They swept over holdfasts and cities and kingdoms, felled heroes and armies by the score, riding pale dead horses, and leading hosts of the slain. All the swords of men could not stay their advance, and even maidens and suckling babes, found no pity in them. They hunted the maids through the frozen forests, and fed their dead servants on the flesh of human children. Now these were the days before the Andals came, and long before the women fled across the narrow sea from the cities of the Rhoyne, and the hundred kingdoms of those times were the kingdoms of the First Men, who had taken those lands from the children of the forest. Yet here and there in the fastness of the woods, the children still lived in their wooden cities and hollow hills, and the faces in the trees kept watch. So as cold and death filled the earth, the last hero determined to seek out the children, in the hopes that their ancient magics could win back what the armies of men had lost. He set out into the dead lands with a sword, a horse, a dog, and a dozen companions. For years he searched until he despaired of ever finding the children of the forest in their secret cities. One by one his friends died, and his horse, and finally even his dog, and his sword froze so hard the blade snapped when he tried to use it. And the Others smelled the hot blood in him and came silent on his trail, stalking him with packs of pale white spiders big as hounds –

name: Laswell Peake
quote: Even after a century, some of us still have friends in the Reach. The power of Highgarden may not be what Mace_Tyrell imagines.

name: Leaf
quote: Men, they are the children.

name: Leaf
quote: Bran: Where are the rest of you? Leaf: Gone down into the earth. Into the stones, into the trees. Before the First Men came all this land that you call Westeros was home to us, yet even in those days we were few. The gods gave us long lives but not great numbers, lest we overrun the world as deer will overrun a wood where there are no wolves to hunt them. That was in the dawn of days, when our sun was rising. Now it sinks, and this is our long dwindling. The giants are almost gone as well, they who were our bane and our brothers. The great lions of the western hills have been slain, the unicorns are all but gone, the mammoths down to a few hundred. The direwolves will outlast us all, but their time will come as well. In the world that men have made, there is no room for them, or us.

name: Leaf
quote: That was not Arya_Stark voice, nor any child's. It was a woman's voice, high and sweet, with a strange music in it like none that he had ever heard and a sadness that he thought might break his heart.

name: Leathers
quote: Cellador: Even in the south the treachery of wildlings is renowned. Leathers: That battle down below? I was on t'other side, remember? Now I wear your blacks and train your boys to kill. Some might call me turncloak. Might be so ... but I am no more savage than you crows. We have gods too. The same gods they keep in Winterfell.

name: Leathers
quote: Bowen: Is it true that you mean to replace Emmett with this savage Leathers as our master-at-arms? That is an office most oft reserved for knights, or rangers at the least. Jon: Leathers is savage. I can attest to that. I've tried him in the practice yard. He's as dangerous with a stone axe as most knights are with castle-forged steel. I grant you, he is not as patient as I'd like, and some of the boys are terrified of him ... but that's not all for the bad. One day they'll find themselves in a real fight, and a certain familiarity with terror will serve them well.

name: Lem
quote: Dreams, what good are dreams? Catelyn_Stark and Euron_Greyjoy. I had a dream myself last night. I was kissing this tavern wench I used to know. Are you going to pay me for that, old woman?

name: Lem
quote: You must be a lackwit, boy. We're outlaws. Lowborn scum, most of us, excepting Beric_Dondarrion. Don't think it'll be like Tom_of_Sevenstreams fool songs neither. You won't be stealing no kisses from a princess, nor riding in a tourney in stolen armor. You join us, you'll end with your neck in a noose, or your head mounted up above some castle gate.

name: Lem
quote: What do a bunch o' bloody peasants know about Walder_Frey's honor? We know some about murder, though.

name: Lem
quote: She don't speak. You bloody bastards cut her throat too deep for that. But she remembers.

name: Lem
quote: Thoros: There is nothing good about that helm, nor the men who wore it. Sandor_Clegane was a man in torment, and Rorge a beast in human skin. Lem: I'm not them. Thoros: Then why show the world their face? Savage, snarling, twisted ... is that who you would be, Lem? Lem: The sight of it will make my foes afraid. Thoros: The sight of it makes me afraid. Lem: Close your eyes, then.

name: Lem
quote: Thick and heavy, stained here with grass and there with blood, frayed along the bottom and patched with deerskin on the right shoulder, the greatcloak gave the big man the look of some huge yellow bird.

name: Lem
quote: This great lout with the brown teeth is Lem, short for Lemoncloak. It's yellow, you see, and Lem's a sour sort.

name: Lem
quote: Lem, is that you? Still wearing that same ratty cloak, are you? I know why you never wash it, I do. You're afraid all the piss will wash out and we'll see you're really a knight o' the Kingsguard!

name: Lem
quote: Even brave men blind themselves sometimes, when they are afraid to see.

name: Lemore
quote: Lemore: Good morrow, Hugor. How did you sleep? Tyrion: Fitfully, good lady. I dreamed of you again. Lemore: A wicked dream, no doubt. You are a wicked man.

name: Lemore
quote: Tyrion: Plainly, this boat was not named for you. Lemore: The Mother and the Father made us in their image, Hugor. We should glory in our bodies, for they are the work of gods.

name: Lemore
quote: Haldon: What are we to make of this sudden loss of faith? I preferred you in your septa's robes, Lemore. Tyrion: I preferred her naked. Lemore: That is because you have a wicked soul. Septa's robes scream of Westeros and might draw unwelcome eyes onto us.

name: Lemore
quote: You are not the only one who must needs hide.

name: Lemore
quote: Still, a curious man might wonder why some sellsword's whelp would need a soiled septa to instruct him in the Faith, or a chainless maester to tutor him in history and tongues.

name: Lemore
quote: Who is she, really? Why is she here? Not for gold, I'd judge. What is this prince to her? Was she ever a true septa?

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Armen: I had understood that you were still confined to the Citadel for... Leo: ...three more days. Perestan says the world is forty thousand years old. Mollos says five hundred thousand. What are three days, I ask you?

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Leo: I understand you won your copper link. I'll drink to that. Alleras: I only buy for friends.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Alleras: You shame your House with every word you say. You shame the Citadel by being one of us. Leo: I know. So buy me some wine, that I might drown my shame.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Mollander: I would tear your tongue out by the roots. Leo: Truly? Then how would I tell you about the dragons?

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Dragons and darker things. The grey sheep have closed their eyes, but Marwyn sees the truth. Old powers awaken. Shadows stir. An age of wonder and terror will soon be upon us, an age for gods and heroes.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Armen: We've drunk enough. Morn will be upon us sooner than we'd like, and Archmaester Ebrose will be speaking on the properties of urine. Those who mean to forge a silver link would do well not to miss his talk. Leo: Far be it from me to keep you from the piss tasting. Myself, I prefer the taste of Arbor gold. Mollander: If the choice is piss or you, I'll drink piss.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: The Citadel is not what it was. They will take anything these days. Dusky dogs and Dornishmen, Pate_(novice), Mollander, cretins, and now a black-clad whale. And here I thought leviathans were grey.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: He has a mocking name for everyone.

name: Leo Tyrell
quote: Leo had two names where Pate had only one, and his second was Tyrell.

name: Leona Woolfield
quote: Davos: I have a string of titles too. Lord of the Rainwood, Admiral of the Narrow Sea, Hand of the King. Leona: An admiral without ships, a hand without fingers, in service to a king without a throne. Is this a knight who comes before us, or the answer to a child's riddle?

name: Leona Woolfield
quote: The Seven defend White Harbor. We do not fear Melisandre or her god. Let her send what spells she will. The prayers of godly men will shield us against evil.

name: Leona Woolfield
quote: Young girls should be an ornament to the eye, not an ache in the ear.

name: Leona Woolfield
quote: She speaks from fear. If White Harbor should declare for Stannis_Baratheon, Wylis_Manderly would answer with his life.

name: Leona Woolfield
quote: Forgive her if you can, my lord. She is a foolish, frightened woman, and Wylis_Manderly is her life.

name: Leonette Fossoway
quote: Perhaps you should be a singer, my lord. You rhyme as well as this Galyeon_of_Cuy.

name: Lewyn Martell
quote: I learned from the Gerold_Hightower and Barristan_Selmy. I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn of Dorne and Ser Oswell_Whent and Ser Jonothor_Darry, good men every one.

name: Lewyn Martell
quote: I never had the honor to know Prince Lewyn but all agree that he was a great knight.

name: Lewyn Martell
quote: My uncle always said that it was the sword in a man's hand that determined his worth, not the one between his legs.

name: Leyton Hightower
quote: Samwell: The Hightower must be doing something. Captain: To be sure. Lord Leyton's locked atop his tower with the Malora_Hightower, consulting books of spells. Might be he'll raise an army from the deeps. Or not.

name: Lharys
quote: Twenty men, maybe twenty-five. Milk Snakes or Moon Brothers, by my guess. They must have eyes out, m'lady ... hidden watchers ... they know we're here.

name: The Liddle
quote: Come in and warm yourselves. There's stone enough to keep the rain off all our heads.

name: The Liddle
quote: Liddle: It was different when there was a Stark in Winterfell. But the Eddard_Stark dead and Robb_Stark gone south to play the game of thrones, and all that's left us is the ghosts. Jojen: The wolves will come again. Liddle: And how would you be knowing, boy? Jojen: I dreamed it. Liddle: Some nights I dream of me mother that I buried nine years past, but when I wake, she's not come back to us. Jojen: There are dreams and dreams, my lord.

name: The Liddle
quote: One day there would be Starks in Winterfell again, he told himself, and then he'd send for the Liddles and pay them back a hundredfold for every nut and berry.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: Lollys: I don't want to. Please, please, I don't want to. Sansa: We'll all be thrice protected inside, and there's to be food and drink and song as well. Lollys: I don't want to. Falyse: You have to, and that is the end of it.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: You must forgive my daughter, she has not been well.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: Lollys gaped at her, mouth open. She had dull brown eyes that always seemed to be wet with tears.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: Can I come to Joffrey_Baratheon wedding feast? Lollys won't go. I told her no one's like to rape her in the king's own throne room, but she's so stupid.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: Tyrion: Cersei_Lannister has sold you a lame horse. The girl's dim-witted. Bronn: If I wanted wits, I'd marry you. Tyrion: Lollys is big with another man's child. Bronn: And when she pops him out, I'll get her big with mine.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: The Seven Kingdoms were full of highborn maidens, but even the oldest, poorest, and ugliest spinster in the realm would balk at wedding such lowborn scum as Bronn. Unless she was soft of body and soft of head, with a fatherless child in her belly from having been raped half a hundred times.

name: Lollys Stokeworth
quote: On the day Myrcella_Baratheon sailed for Dorne, the day of the bread riots, gold cloaks had been posted all along the route of the procession, but the mob had broken through their lines to tear High_Septon_(fat_one) into pieces and rape Lollys Stokeworth half a hundred times. And if that pale soft stupid creature could incite the animals when fully clothed, how much more lust would a queen inspire?

name: Lomas Longstrider
quote: Tyrion: Lomas Longstrider told it true. The road's a wonder. Rolly: Lomas Longstrider? Haldon: A scribe, long dead. He spent his life traveling the world and writing about the lands he visited in two books he called Wonders and Wonders Made by Man.

name: Lomas Longstrider
quote: For years afterward, he had cherished a dream that one day he would travel the world and see Longstrider's wonders for himself.

name: Lomas Longstrider
quote: Lomas Longstrider saw the walls of Qarth. His books suffice for me. I have gone as far east as I intend to go.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Loras: Lord Eddard, what of me? Eddard: No one doubts your valor, Ser Loras, but we are about justice here, and what you seek is vengeance.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: I will defend King Tommen_Baratheon with all my strength, I swear it. I will give my life for his if need be. But I will never betray Renly_Baratheon, by word or deed. He was the king that should have been. He was the best of them.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Give me the command, Your Grace. The castle will be yours within a fortnight if I have to tear it down with my bare hands.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Have you seen Mace_Tyrell's boy? The Knight of Flowers, they call him. Now there's a son any man would be proud to own to. Last tourney, he dumped the Jaime_Lannister on his golden rump, you ought to have seen the look on Cersei_Lannister face. I laughed till my sides hurt.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: He's me. I am speaking to myself, as I was, all cocksure arrogance and empty chivalry. This is what it does to you, to be too good too young.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Under all his flowers and finery, Ser Loras is as hot tempered as Jaime_Lannister. Toss Joffrey_Baratheon, Margaery_Tyrell and Loras into a pot, and you've got the makings for Kingslayer stew.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Ser Loras might be as pretty as a maiden's dream, but underneath his white cloak he was Tyrell to the bone.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: The Knight of Flowers was still half a boy, arrogant and vain, but he had it in him to be great, to perform deeds worthy of the White Book.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Cersei: Ser Loras is so Tyrell he pisses rosewater. He should never have been given a white cloak. Jaime: He would not have been my choice, I'll grant you. No one troubled to consult me. Loras will do well enough, I think. Once a man puts on that cloak, it changes him.

name: Loras Tyrell
quote: Cersei: Oh, how sad. Tommen_Baratheon will be heartbroken. He did so admire our gallant Knight of Flowers. Aurane: The smallfolk too. We'll have maidens weeping into their wine all across the realm when Loras dies.

name: Lorcas
quote: Samwell: How much longer will it be? Lorcas: Theobald is an important man. Samwell: I came all the way from the Wall. Lorcas: Then you will have no trouble going a bit farther. To that bench just there, beneath the window.

name: Lorcas
quote: Alleras: You need to slip Lorcas a penny, or you'll be waiting here three days. What brings the Night's Watch to the Citadel? Samwell: Jon_Snow is restoring the abandoned castles. We need more maesters, for the ravens ... did you say, a penny? Alleras: A penny will serve. For a silver stag Lorcas will carry you up to Theobald on his back. He has been fifty years an acolyte. He hates novices, particularly novices of noble birth.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: Lord of Bones: To crows I be the Lord o' Bones. Qhorin: I see no lord. Only a dog dressed in chickenbones, who rattles when he rides. Lord of Bones: It's your bones I'll be rattling soon, Halfhand. I'll boil the flesh off you and make a byrnie from your ribs. I'll carve your teeth to cast me runes, and eat me oaten porridge from your skull.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: Lord of Bones: The free folk have no need of cravens. Ygritte: This is the Jon_Snow, who spared me. Let him live. Lord of Bones: The black crow is a tricksy bird. I trust him not.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: Might be you fooled these others, crow, but don't think you'll be fooling Mance. He'll take one look a' you and know you're false. And when he does, I'll make a cloak o' your wolf there, and open your soft boy's belly and sew a weasel up inside.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: I want me some crow bones.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: No, mercy. This is not right, I'm not Mance_Rayder, they—

name: Lord of Bones
quote: Rattleshirt, we called him. Treacherous and bloodthirsty. If there's honor in him, he hides it down beneath his suit of bones.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: A small, malicious, treacherous man, as stupid as he is cruel. Jon did not believe for a moment that he would keep faith.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: The Lord o' Bones? No one ever trusted Rattleshirt but fools.

name: Lord of Bones
quote: Rattleshirt could wash his hands a hundred times a day and he'd still have blood beneath his nails.

name: Loreza Sand
quote: Loreza is six. Dorea_Sand is eight. What wars could they foment? What wars could they foment? Yet Doran_Martell has imprisoned them with their sisters.

name: Loreza Sand
quote: I have four daughters, I remind you. Your sisters. My Elia_Sand is fourteen, almost a woman. Obella_Sand is twelve, on the brink of maidenhood. They worship you, as Dorea_Sand and Loreza worship them. If you should die, must El and Obella seek vengeance for you, then Dorea and Loree for them? Is that how it goes, round and round forever?

name: Black Lorren
quote: Lorren: They fear no foe in open battle, but it is another thing to dwell among enemies, never knowing if the washerwoman means to kiss you or kill you, or whether the serving boy is filling your cup with ale or bale. We would do well to leave this place. Theon: I am the Prince of Winterfell! This is my seat, no man will drive me from it. No, Asha_Greyjoy either!

name: Black Lorren
quote: I'll take my axe and stand on that drawbridge, and let them come try me. One at a time, two, three, it makes no matter. None will pass the moat while I still draw breath.

name: Black Lorren
quote: Lorren: Only blood can wash out blood. Knights may keep their truces with other knights, but they are not so careful of their honor when dealing with those they deem outlaw. Theon: I am the Prince of Winterfell and heir to the Iron Islands. Now go find Beth_Cassel and do as I told you.

name: Black Lorren
quote: The singers call Andrik best now. Andrik the Unsmiling, they name him. A giant of a man. He serves Dunstan_Drumm of Old Wyk. And Black Lorren and Qarl_the_Maid are near as dread.

name: Black Lorren
quote: Winterfell is yours in my absence. If we do not return, do with it as you will.

name: Black Lorren
quote: He means to die, thought Theon. It's not victory he wants, it's an end worthy of a song.

name: Black Lorren
quote: He had been hacked and cut so badly that his beard looked a reddish-brown now.

name: Lorren Longaxe
quote: Asha: Lorren, Six-Toed_Harl, fetch me Sybelle_Glover and her maester. Lorren: Whole or bloody? Asha: Whole and unharmed.

name: Lothar Frey
quote: Lothar was a very amusing fellow to get drunk with, but Merrett would never be so foolish as to turn his back on him.

name: Lothar Frey
quote: We must each play our part, according to our gifts.

name: Lotho Rogare
quote: Praise Yndros, I am left-handed.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Lothor: Singer, best go, if you want to sing again. Marillion: Find your own wench— You cut me! Lothor: I'll do worse, if you don't go.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Lord Petyr_Baelish said watch out for you.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Harrold_Hardyng? Harry the Arse, I say. He's just some upjumped squire.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Ser Lothor, she had to remind herself; the man had been knighted for his valor in the Battle of the Blackwater. Though no proper knight would wear those patched brown breeches and scuffed boots, nor that cracked and water-stained leather jerkin. A square-faced stocky man with a squashed nose and a mat of nappy grey hair, Brune spoke seldom. He is stronger than he looks, though.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Sansa: Oswell_Kettleblack ... my lord, Oswell rowed me from King's Landing the night that I escaped. He must know who I am. Petyr: If he's half as clever as a sheep pellet, you would think so. Ser Lothor knows as well. But Oswell has been in my service a long time, and Brune is close-mouthed by nature. Kettleblack watches Brune for me, and Brune watches Kettleblack.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: It is a common face but an honest one.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Sober, he was a quiet man, but a strong one. And Petyr_Baelish says he's loyal. He trusts him as much as he trusts anyone. Brune would be a good match for a bastard girl like Mya_Stone, she thought.

name: Lothor Brune
quote: Sansa: Ser Lothor is fond of her. More than fond. Myranda: Lothor Brune? Does she know? He has no hope, poor man. Nestor_Royce tried to make a match for Mya_Stone, but she'll have none of them. She is half mule, that one. Sansa: Do you think Ser Lothor likes her as she is, in mail and leather? Or does he dream of her draped in silks and velvets? Myranda: He's a man. He dreams of her naked.

name: Lothor Burley
quote: Lothor: We do what we can, Your Grace, but our beds are hard, our halls are cold, and our food—Alysanne: —is nourishing. And that is all that I require. It will please me to eat as you do.

name: Lucamore Strong
quote: When I rose against my uncle Maegor_I_Targaryen, two of his Kingsguard abandoned him to fight for me. They might well have believed they would be allowed to keep their white cloaks once I'd won, perhaps even be honored with lordships and a higher place at court. I sent them to the Wall instead. I wanted no oathbreakers around me, then or now.

name: Lucamore Strong
quote: Arianne: Yes, and what of Lucamore the Lusty, with his three wives and sixteen children? The song always makes me laugh. Arys: The truth is less funny. He was never called Lucamore the Lusty whilst he lived. His name was Ser Lucamore Strong, and his whole life was a lie. When his deceit was discovered, his own sworn bothers gelded him, and Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen sent him to the Wall. Those sixteen children were left weeping. He was no true knight, no more than Terrence_Toyne...

name: Lucas Blackwood
quote: Lucas was murdered at the Red Wedding. Walder_Frey's fourth wife was Alyssa_Blackwood, but kinship counts for no more than guest right at the Twins.

name: Lucas Codd
quote: Lucas: I am unwed. Asha: And for good reason. All women do despise the Codds as well. Don't look at me so mournful, Lucas. You still have your famous hand. Euron: Was that courteous, Asha? You have wounded Lucas to the quick. Asha: Easier than wounding him in the prick. I throw an axe as well as any man, but when the target is so small ...

name: Lucas Inchfield
quote: Hedge knights are beggars with blades at best, outlaws at worst.

name: Lucas Inchfield
quote: Lucas: You will marry me when this mummer's farce is done. As Wyman_Webber wished. Rohanne: My lord father never knew you as I do.

name: Lucas Inchfield
quote: Sam_Stoops says the castellan at Coldmoat is as big as you are. Lucas Inchfield is his name, but he's called the Longinch for his size.

name: Lucerys Velaryon
quote: Aegon_II_Targaryen calls us Strongs, and claims we are bastards, but when the lords see us on dragonback they will know that for a lie. Only Targaryens ride dragons.

name: Lucerys Velaryon
quote: Little Luke Strong, the bastard. You are wet, bastard. Is it raining, or did you piss yourself in fear?

name: Lucerys Velaryon
quote: Aemond: Hold, Strong. First pay the debt you owe me. You have a knife, just as you did then. Put out your eye, and I will let you leave. One will serve. I would not blind you. Lucerys: I will not fight you. I came here as an envoy, not a knight. Aemond: You came here as a craven and a traitor. I will have your eye or your life, Strong.

name: Lucerys Velaryon
quote: And with his death, the war of ravens and envoys and marriage pacts came to an end, and the war of fire and blood began in earnest.

name: Lucerys Velaryon
quote: An eye for an eye, a son for a son. Lucerys shall be avenged.

name: Lucos
quote: Septon Lucos will instruct him in matters of the spirit.

name: Luthor Largent
quote: Daemon_Targaryen gave us these cloaks and they're gold no matter how you turn them.

name: Luthor Tyrell
quote: Oh, I loved him well enough, don't mistake me. A kind man, and not unskilled in the bedchamber, but an appalling oaf all the same.

name: Luwin
quote: Folly and desperation are ofttimes hard to tell apart.

name: Luwin
quote: Luwin: There are some who call my order the knights of the mind. You are a surpassing clever boy when you work at it, Bran. Have you ever thought that you might wear a maester's chain? There is no limit to what you might learn. Bran: I want to learn magic. The crow promised that I would fly. Luwin: I can teach you history, healing, herblore. I can teach you the speech of ravens, and how to build a castle, and the way a sailor steers his ship by the stars I can teach you to measure the days and marks the seasons, and at the Citadel in Oldtown they can teach you a thousand things more. But, Bran, no man can teach you magic.

name: Luwin
quote: Take a lesson, Bran. The man who trusts in spells is dueling with a glass sword. As the children did.

name: Luwin
quote: A good lord comforts and protects the weak and helpless.

name: Luwin
quote: The years pass in their hundreds and their thousands, and what does any man see of life but a few summers, a few winters? We look at mountains and call them eternal, and so they seem ... but in the course of time, mountains rise and fall, rivers change their courses, stars fall from the sky, and great cities sink beneath the sea. Even gods die, we think. Everything changes.

name: Luwin
quote: Sadly, no victory is without cost.

name: Luwin
quote: Luwin: My order serves. Theon: yes, but whom? Luwin: The realm. And Winterfell. Theon, once I taught you sums and letters, history and warcraft. And might have taught you more, had you wished to learn. I will not claim to bear you any great love, no, but I cannot hate you either. Even if I did, so long as you hold Winterfell I am bound by oath to give you counsel. So now I counsel you to yield.

name: Luwin
quote: I do not know ... war everywhere ... each man against his neighbor, and winter coming ... such folly, such black mad folly ... You must be strong now. Strong.

name: Luwin
quote: The maester was a small grey man. His eyes were grey, and quick, and saw much. His hair was grey, what little the years had left him. His robe was grey wool, trimmed with white fur, the Stark colors. Its great floppy sleeves had pockets hidden inside. Luwin was always tucking things into those sleeves and producing other things from them: books, messages, strange artifacts, toys for the children. With all he kept hidden in his sleeves, Catelyn was surprised that Maester Luwin could lift his arms at all.

name: Luwin
quote: Maester Luwin, I trust you as I would my own blood. Give Catelyn_Stark your voice in all things great and small. Teach Robb_Stark the things he needs to know. Winter is coming.

name: Luwin
quote: The maester is timid as an old woman.

name: Luwin
quote: Maester Luwin is a wise counsellor, but unskilled in the arts of war.

name: Luwin
quote: Maester Luwin would have helped anyone who came to him, she was certain.

name: Lyanna Mormont
quote: Bear Island knows no king but the King in the North, whose name is STARK.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon will never keep to one bed. I hear he has gotten Mya_Stone on some girl in the Vale. Love is sweet, dearest Ned, but it cannot change a man's nature.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Promise me, Ned.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Lyanna had only been sixteen, a child-woman of surpassing loveliness. Ned had loved her with all his heart. Robert_I_Baratheon had loved her even more. She was to have been his bride.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: She was more beautiful than that. Ah, damn it, Ned, did you have to bury her in a place like this? She deserved more than darkness ...

name: Lyanna Stark
