quote: Robert_I_Baratheon grows more restless every day. Having Eddard_Stark beside him will only make him worse. He's still in love with the sister, the insipid little dead sixteen-year-old. How long till he decides to put me aside for some new Lyanna?

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Robert: Go down into your crypt and ask Lyanna about Rhaegar_Targaryen honor! Eddard: You avenged Lyanna at the Trident. Robert: That did not bring her back. The gods be damned. It was a hollow victory they gave me. A crown ... it was the girl I prayed them for. Your sister, safe ... and mine again, as she was meant to be. I ask you, Ned, what good is it to wear a crown?

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Arya: Lyanna was beautiful. Eddard: She was, beautiful, and willful, and dead before her time.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: You never knew Lyanna as I did, Robert. You saw her beauty, but not the iron underneath.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Rhaegar_Targaryen ... Rhaegar won, damn him. I killed him, Ned, I drove the spike right through that black armor into his black heart, and he died at my feet. They made up songs about it. Yet somehow he still won. He has Lyanna now, and I have Cersei_Lannister.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: Eddard: I remember Robert_I_Baratheon as he was the day he took the throne, every inch a king. A thousand other women might have loved him with all their hearts. What did he do to make you hate him so? Cersei: The night of our wedding feast, the first time we shared a bed, he called me by your sister's name. He was on top of me, in me, stinking of wine, and he whispered Lyanna. Eddard: I do not know which of you I pity most.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: You ride like a northman, milady. Your aunt was the same.

name: Lyanna Stark
quote: The northern girl had a wild beauty, as he recalled, though however bright a torch might burn it could never match Cersei_Lannister.

name: Lyle Crakehall
quote: No one will hurt you now.

name: Lyle Crakehall
quote: Lyle: Lady Mariya, Lady Amerei, your distress has moved me. You have my word, once Riverrun has fallen I shall return to hunt down the Hound and kill him for you. Dogs do not frighten me. Amerei: You are a true knight, Ser Lyle, to help a lady in distress.

name: Lyle Crakehall
quote: The Brynden_Tully deserves a nobler death, and I'm the man to give it to him. I will challenge him to single combat. Mace or axe or longsword, makes no matter. The old man will be my meat.

name: Lyle Crakehall
quote: We rode across half the bloody realm and for what? So you could make Edmure_Tully piss his breeches? There's no song in that. I need a fight. I want the Hound, Jaime. Him, or Beric_Dondarrion.

name: Lyman Beesbury
quote: I am an old man, but not so old that I will sit here meekly whilst the likes of you plot to steal Rhaenyra_Targaryen crown.

name: Lyman Darry
quote: Marq: Whatever you may decide for yourselves, I shall never call Joffrey_Baratheon my king. Lyman: Nor I! I never will!

name: Lyman Darry
quote: Catelyn: Darry was only a child. Brynden: Aye, and the last of his line as well. The boy would have brought a fine ransom, but what does gold mean to a frothing dog like Gregor_Clegane?

name: Lyman Lannister
quote: They were kings once. He smiles, but he was raised on tales of the Field of Fire; he will not have forgotten.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: The gods favor the man with the just cause, yet often that turns out to be the man with the surest sword. We all know who that is.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Anya: Mind your tongue, ser. Lyn: My tongue is my concern. Your ladyship should take care to mind her own. I have never taken kindly to chastisement, as any number of dead men could tell you.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: My lady has a thirst. Whenever she comes out to dance, she likes a drop of red.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Alayne: Well struck, Ser Lyn. Though I fear you've knocked poor Ser Owen_(knight) insensible. Lyn: He had no sense to start with, or he should not have tried me.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Alayne: Petyr_Baelish is always pleased to be of service to one of Lord Robert_Arryn leal bannermen. I'm sure he would be most delighted to help broker a marriage for you as well, Ser Lyn. Lyn: How kind of him. But what need have I for heirs when I am landless and like to remain so, thanks to our Lord Protector? No. Tell your lord father I need none of his brood mares.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Ser Lyn was a different sort of folly; lean and handsome, heir to an ancient but impoverished house, but vain, reckless, hot-tempered ... and, it was whispered, notoriously uninterested in the intimate charms of women.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Petyr: Ser Lyn mislikes me, for some reason. Nestor: Lyn Corbray is a dangerous man.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: If even half of what she had heard from Lord Robert's guards was true, Lyn Corbray was more dangerous than all six of the Lords Declarant put together.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Ser Lyn is very handsome, for an older man, she thought, but I do not like the way he smiles.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Petyr: Ser Lyn will remain my implacable enemy. He will speak of me with scorn and loathing to every man he meets, and lend his sword to every secret plot to bring me down. Alayne: And how shall you reward him for this service? Petyr: With gold and boys and promises, of course. Ser Lyn is a man of simple tastes, my sweetling. All he likes is gold and boys and killing.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: Myranda: Do you think if I asked nicely Ser Lyn would kill my suitors for me? Alayne: He might, for a plump bag of gold. Myranda: Alas, all I have is a plump pair of teats. Though with Ser Lyn, a plump sausage under my skirts would serve me better.

name: Lyn Corbray
quote: The venom in his voice was so thick that for a moment she almost forgot that Lyn Corbray was actually her father's catspaw, bought and paid for. Or was he? Perhaps, instead of being Petyr_Baelish man pretending to be Petyr's foe, he was actually his foe pretending to be his man pretending to be his foe.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: The things we love destroy us every time, lad. Remember that. Jorah_Mormont loved that young wife of his. Vain woman. If not for her, he would never have thought to sell those poachers.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: The first time I beheld her, I thought she was a goddess come to earth, the Maid herself made flesh.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: Daenerys: Do you hate her?Jorah: Almost as much as I love her.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: Arstan had seen Ser Jorah_Mormont fight at Lannisport, Dany knew, in the tourney Mormont had won with a lady's favor knotted round his arm. He had won the lady too; Lynesse of House Hightower, his second wife, highborn and beautiful ... but she had ruined him, and abandoned him, and the memory of her was bitter to him now.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: Maege: My nephew Jorah_Mormont brought home a proper lady once. He won her in a tourney. How she hated that carving.Dacey: Aye, and all the rest. She had hair like spun gold, that Lynesse. Skin like cream. But her soft hands were never made for axes.Maege: Nor her teats for giving suck.

name: Lynesse Hightower
quote: She remembered how young the Lady Lynesse had been, how fair, and how unhappy.

name: Lyonel Baratheon
quote: Duncan: Ser Lyonel, I cannot thank you enough for coming, nor Ser Steffon_Fossoway for bringing you.Lyonel: Ser Steffon? It was your squire who came to me. The boy, Aegon_V_Targaryen. My own lad tried to chase him off, but he slipped between his legs and turned a flagon of wine over my head. There has not been a trial of seven for more than a hundred years, do you know that? I was not about to miss a chance to fight the Kingsguard knights, and tweak Prince Maekar's nose in the bargain.

name: Lyonel Baratheon
quote: Raymun of House Fossoway, in the name of the Warrior I charge you to be brave. In the name of the Father I charge you to be just. In the name of the Mother I charge you to defend the young and innocent. In the name of the Maid I charge you to protect all women.

name: Lyonel Baratheon
quote: Ser Lyonel Baratheon also fought several notable matches. Against lesser foes, he would often break into booming laughter the moment they touched his shield, and laugh all the time he was mounting and charging and knocking them from their stirrups. If his challengers wore any sort of crest on their helm, Ser Lyonel would strike it off and fling it into the crowd.

name: Lyonel Corbray
quote: Lord Lyonel Corbray is well disposed toward my rule, but Lyn_Corbray goes his own way.

name: Lyonel Corbray
quote: We have had a letter from Petyr_Baelish. He is on his way home, he says, and hopes to see his darling daughter soon. He writes that Lyonel Corbray seems well pleased with Lady_Corbray, and even more so with her dowry. I do hope Lord Lyonel remembers which one he needs to bed.

name: Lyonel Corbray
quote: Alayne: Petyr_Baelish tells me your brother's Lady_Corbray is with child. Lyn: Lyonel sends his regrets. He remains at Heart's Home with his peddler's daughter, watching her belly swell as if he were the first man who ever got a wench pregnant.

name: Lyonel Strong
quote: This Hand will not hector me.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: The Eyrie is impregnable. Tyrion_Lannister is trying to frighten us, sweet baby. The Lannisters are all liars. No one will hurt my sweet boy.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Petyr: Perhaps I could bed you now, and wed you later? Lysa: Oh, Petyr Baelish, you are so wicked. No, I say no, I am the Lady of the Eyrie, and I command you to wed me this very moment! Petyr: As my lady commands, then. I am helpless before you, as ever.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: A man will tell you poison is dishonorable, but a woman's honor is different. The Mother shaped us to protect our children, and our only dishonor is in failure.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Petyr_Baelish can't want Sansa_Stark. You can't. She's a stupid empty-headed little girl. She doesn't love you the way I have. I've always loved you. I've proved it, haven't I? I gave you my maiden's gift. I would have given you a son too, but they murdered him with moon tea, with tansy and mint and wormwood, a spoon of honey and a drop of pennyroyal. It wasn't me, I never knew, I only drank what Hoster_Tully gave me...

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Tears, tears, tears. No need for tears... but that's not what you said in King's Landing. You told me to put the tears in Jon_Arryn wine, and I did. For Robert_Arryn, and for us! And I wrote Catelyn_Stark and told her the Lannisters had killed my lord husband, just as you said. That was so clever... you were always clever, I told Hoster_Tully that, I said Petyr's so clever, he'll rise high, he will, he will, and he's sweet and gentle and I have his little baby in my belly... Why did you kiss her? Why? We're together now, we're together after so long, so very long, why would you want to kiss Sansa_Stark?

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Jaime: Lysa Arryn is a frightened cow. Cersei: That frightened cow shared Jon_Arryn's bed.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: If an old man may be forgiven his blunt speech, let me say that grief can derange even the strongest and most disciplined of minds, and the Lady Lysa was never that. Since her last stillbirth, she has seen enemies in every shadow, and the death of Jon_Arryn left her shattered and lost.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: I'd tell you to slap some sense into your sister, if I thought it would do any good, but you'd only bruise your hand.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Petyr: Lysa is more tractable than Catelyn_Stark, true ... but also more fearful, and I understand she hates you. Tyrion: She believes she has good reason. When I was her guest in the Eyrie, she insisted that I'd murdered her husband, and was not inclined to listen to denials. If I gave her Jon_Arryn's true killer, she might think more kindly of me.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Father, I know what you did. You made him take her. Lysa was the price Jon_Arryn had to pay for the swords and spears of House Tully.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Mead and marriage had taken years off Lady Lysa. She laughed at everything so long as she held Petyr_Baelish hand, and her eyes seemed to glow whenever she looked at him.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: She was mad and dangerous. She murdered Jon_Arryn, and would have murdered me if Petyr_Baelish had not come along to save me.

name: Lysa Arryn
quote: Lysa Tully was never truly of the Vale, nor had she the right to dispose of us.

name: Lysono Maar
quote: Arianne: You look... Lysono: ...like a woman? That I am not. Arianne: ...like a Targaryen. Lysono: I am flattered. The women of House Targaryen are said to be without peer in all the world. Arianne: And the men of House Targaryen? Lysono: Oh, even prettier. Though if truth be told, I have only seen the one.

name: Lysono Maar
quote: The spymaster was new to Griff, a Lyseni named Lysono Maar, with lilac eyes and white-gold hair and lips that would have been the envy of a whore. At first glance, Griff had almost taken him for a woman.

name: Lysono Maar
quote: Arianne's company was met by a column of sellswords down from Griffin's Roost, led by the most exotic creature that the princess had ever laid her eyes on, with painted fingernails and gemstones sparkling in his ears.

name: Lysono Maar
quote: Was this what Viserys_Targaryen looked like? If so perhaps it is a good thing he is dead.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: There is no greater pleasure than to serve the King's Grace. If I was deemed worthy to join your royal council, you would find none more loyal or true.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: Is there anything as pointless as a king without a kingdom? No, it's plain, Robb_Stark must abandon the riverlands, join his forces to Roose_Bolton's once more, and throw all his strength against Moat Cailin. That is what I would do.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: Mace: Once Paxter_Redwyne sweeps the ironmen from the seas, my sons will retake the Shields. The snows will do for Stannis_Baratheon, or Roose_Bolton will. As for Jon_Connington ... Randyll: If it is him. Mace: ... as for Connington, what victories has he ever won that we should fear him? He could have ended Robert's Rebellion at Stoney Sept. He failed. Just as the Golden Company has always failed. Some may rush to join them, aye. The realm is well rid of such fools.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: Olenna: The thought that one day he may see his grandson with his arse on the Iron Throne makes Mace puff up like ... now, what do you call it? Margaery, you're clever, be a dear and tell your poor old half-daft grandmother the name of that queer fish from the Summer Isles that puffs up to ten times its own size when you poke it. Margaery: They call them puff fish, Grandmother.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: He has a prodigious appetite, this one.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: Robb_Stark had won more battles in a year than the Lord of Highgarden had in twenty.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: The mob loved Margaery_Tyrell so much they were even willing to love Joffrey_Baratheon again. She had belonged to Renly_Baratheon, the handsome young prince who had loved them so well he had come back from beyond the grave to save them. And the bounty of Highgarden had come with her, flowing up the roseroad from the south. The fools didn't seem to remember that it had been Mace Tyrell who closed the roseroad to begin with, and made the bloody famine.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: You would be a fool to make Mace Tyrell your Hand, but a bigger fool to make him your foe.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: His sigil ought to be a fat man sitting on his arse.

name: Mace Tyrell
quote: The more I give him, the more he wants.

name: Mad Huntsman
quote: Sandor: How about you? Or did you leave all your courage in your kennels? Huntsman: No, but I should have left you in a crow cage. I might still.

name: Mad Huntsman
quote: Thoros: You will die soon enough, dog, but it shan't be murder, only justice. Huntsman: Aye, and a kinder fate than you deserve for all your kind have done. Lions, you call yourselves. At Sherrer and the Mummer's Ford, girls of six and seven years were raped, and babes still on the breast were cut in two while their mothers watched. No lion ever killed so cruel. Sandor: I was not at Sherrer, nor the Mummer's Ford. Lay your dead children at some other door.

name: Mad Huntsman
quote: One of our lads keeps the meanest dogs you'd ever want to see.

name: Mad Huntsman
quote: Captain: He took his dogs out for a sniff round. If Ser Jaime_Lannister hereabouts, they'll find him. I've seen them dogs rip bears apart. Think they'll like the taste of lion blood? Lem: A chewed-up corpse's no good to no one. The Huntsman bloody well knows that, too.

name: Maddy
quote: I hate Maddy. She has a wart on her eye, and she scrubs so hard it hurts. Lysa_Arryn never hurt me scrubbing.

name: Maddy
quote: She has a mouth as big as her thighs, and her thighs are enormous.

name: Maege Mormont
quote: You are not the only one touched by this war. Like as not, my sister is marching in Robb_Stark’s host, her and those daughters of hers, dressed in men’s mail. Maege is a hoary old snark, stubborn, short-tempered, and willful. Truth be told, I can hardly stand to be around the wretched woman, but that does not mean my love for her is any less than the love you bear your half sisters.

name: Maegelle Targaryen
quote: The Mother Above has been so good to me, to bless me with so many babes, all bright and beautiful. It is only fitting that I give one back.

name: Maegelle Targaryen
quote: This is foolish, Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aemon) is to be married next year, and it should be a great occasion. She will want all of us there, including both you and Alysanne_Targaryen. The archmaesters call you the Conciliator, I have heard. It is time that you conciliated.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: The Iron Throne will go to the man who has the strength to seize it.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: Maegor, the First of His Name, came to the throne after the sudden death of his brother, King Aenys_I_Targaryen, in the year 42 AC. He is better remembered as Maegor the Cruel, and it was a well-earned sobriquet, for no crueler king ever sat the Iron Throne. His reign began with blood and ended in blood as well.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: What demon possessed him none could say. Even today, some give thanks that his tyranny was a short one, for who knows how many noble houses might have vanished forever simply to state his desire.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: Aegon_I_Targaryen had commanded it built. His son Maegor the Cruel had seen it completed. Afterward he had taken the heads of every stonemason, woodworker, and builder who had labored on it. Only the blood of the dragon would ever know the secrets of the fortress the Dragonlords had built, he vowed.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: King Maegor wanted no rats in his own walls, if you take my meaning. He did require a means of secret egress, should he ever be trapped by his enemies, but that door does not connect with any other passages.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: What did she care what Maegor the Cruel had decreed three hundred years ago? Instead of taking the swords out of the hands of the faithful, he should have used them for his own ends.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: Brother, you need never kneel to me again. We shall rule this realm together, you and I. You are more fit to bear this blade than me. Wield it in my service, and I shall be content.

name: Maegor I Targaryen
quote: A true king, blood of Aegon the Conqueror, who was my brother, my husband, and my love. If any man questions my son’s right to the Iron Throne, let him prove his claim with his body.

name: Maegor Targaryen
quote: No sane man wanted any blood of Aerion’s on the throne.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: I did not come here to take counsel from Duncan_the_Tall.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: If a cause is just, good men will fight for it.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: Maekar: Some men will say I meant to kill my brother. The gods know it is a lie, but I will hear the whispers till the day I die. And it was my mace that dealt the fatal blow, I have no doubt. The only other foes he faced in the melee were three Kingsguard, whose vows forbade them to do any more than defend themselves. So it was me. Strange to say, I do not recall the blow that broke his skull. Is that a mercy or a curse? Some of both, I think. Duncan: I could not say, Your Grace. You swung the mace, m'lord, but it was for me Prince Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) died. So I killed him too, as much as you.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: Daeron_II_Targaryen fourth son, not as bold as Prince Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II), nor as clever as Prince Aerys_I_Targaryen nor as gentle as Prince Rhaegel_Targaryen, and now he must suffer seeing his own sons overshadowed by his brother's.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: Prince Maekar was a hard man, proud and full of scorn.

name: Maekar I Targaryen
quote: And my father ... he never thought the throne would pass to him, and yet it did. He used to say that was his punishment for the blow that slew Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II). I pray he found the peace in death that he never knew in life.

name: Maelor Targaryen
quote: You hear that, little boy? Helaena_Targaryen wants you dead.

name: Maelor Targaryen
quote: The gods will curse us all for this.

name: Maelor Targaryen
quote: You shall receive the same terms you gave my nephew Maelor.

name: Maelys Blackfyre
quote: When Maelys the Monstrous died upon the Stepstones, it was the end of the male line of House Blackfyre.

name: Maerie
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Goodwife Maerie. Maerie_the_Whore. Becca_the_Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla— Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they? Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Maerie the Whore
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie the Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Mag Mar Tun Doh Weg
quote: Jon: Was that their king? Tormund: Giants have no kings, no more'n mammoths do, nor snow bears, nor the great whales o' the grey sea. That was Mag Mar Tun Doh Weg. Mag the Mighty. You can kneel to him if you like, he won't mind. I know your kneeler's knees must be itching, for want of some king to bend to. Watch out he don't step on you, though. Giants have bad eyes, and might be he wouldn't see some little crow all the way down there by his feet.

name: Mag Mar Tun Doh Weg
quote: Tormund: Mag himself went in that gate o' yours and never did come out. Jon: He died on the sword of a brave man named Donal_Noye. Tormund: Aye? Some great lord was he, this Donal Noye? One of your shiny knights in their steel smallclothes? Jon: A blacksmith. He only had one arm. Tormund: A one-armed smith slew Mag the Mighty? Har! That must o' been a fight to see. Mance_Rayder will make a song of it, see if he don't. This will warm us some. To Donal Noye, and Mag the Mighty. Jon: To Donal Noye, and Mag the Mighty.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Melara: Just tell us our futures, then we'll go. Maggy: Some are here who have no futures.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Three questions may you ask. You will not like my answers.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Cersei: When will I wed Rhaegar_Targaryen? Maggy: Never. You will wed Robert_I_Baratheon. Cersei: I will be queen, though? Maggy: Aye. Queen you shall be... until there comes another, younger and more beautiful, to cast you down and take all that you hold dear.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Cersei: Will the king and I have children? Maggy: Oh, aye. Six-and-ten for him, and three for you. Gold shall be their crowns and gold their shrouds. And when your tears have drowned you, the valonqar shall wrap his hands about your pale white throat and choke the life from you.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Melara: Will I marry Jaime_Lannister? Maggy: Not Jaime, nor any other man. Worms will have your maidenhead. Your death is here tonight, little one. Can you smell her breath? She is very close.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: A frightening old crone, supposed to be a priestess. Maegi, they called her. No one could pronounce her real name. Half of Lannisport used to go to her for cures and love potions and the like.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Melara_Hetherspoon said that if we never spoke about her prophecies, we would forget them. She said that a forgotten prophecy couldn't come true.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: I would never have gone into that tent if not for them. I would never have allowed Maggy the Frog to taste my morrows in a drop of blood.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Wrapped in roughspun cloaks with their hoods pulled up, the three of them had stolen from their beds and crossed the tourney grounds to seek the sorceress. Melara_Hetherspoon had heard the serving girls whispering how she could curse a man or make him fall in love, summon demons and foretell the future.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: In Lannisport it was said that she had been young and beautiful when her husband had brought her back from the east with a load of spices, but age and evil had left their marks on her.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: You're a liar and a warty frog and a smelly old savage, and I don't believe a word of what you say. Come away, Melara_Hetherspoon. She is not worth hearing.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Cersei: I don't recall the woman's name. Something long and eastern and outlandish. The smallfolk used to call her Maggy. Qyburn: Maegi? Cersei: Is that how you say it? The woman would suck a drop of blood from your finger, and tell you what your morrows held. Qyburn: Bloodmagic is the darkest kind of sorcery. Some say it is the most powerful as well.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: The maegi knew how many children I would have, and she knew of Robert's bastards. Years before he'd sired even Mya_Stone of them, she knew.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: It was a pity that Maggy the Frog was dead. Piss on your prophecy, old woman. Margaery_Tyrell may be younger than I, but she has never been more beautiful, and soon she will be dead.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: This was a hateful woman, old and sick and ugly. You were young and beautiful, full of life and pride. She lived in Lannisport, you said, so she would have known of Tyrion_Lannister and how he killed Joanna_Lannister. This creature dared not strike you, because of who you were, so she sought to wound you with her viper's tongue.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: Maggy the Frog should have been in motley too, for all she knew about the morrow. Cersei prayed the old fraud was screaming down in hell. Margaery_Tyrell whose coming she'd foretold was finished, and if that prophecy could fail, so could the rest. No golden shrouds, no valonqar, I am free of your croaking malice at last.

name: Maggy the Frog
quote: And suddenly the hag was there, standing in the crowd with her pendulous teats and her warty greenish skin, leering with the rest, with malice shining from her crusty yellow eyes.

name: Mago
quote: Rakharo: They took Khal Drogo's herds, Khaleesi. We were too few to stop them. It is the right of the strong to take from the weak. They took many slaves as well, the khal's and yours, yet they left some few. Daenerys: Eroeh? Jhogo: Mago seized her, who is Khal Jhaqo's bloodrider now. He mounted her high and low and gave her to his khal, and Jhaqo gave her to his other bloodriders. They were six. When they were done with her, they cut her throat.

name: Mallador Locke
quote: Jarman: A year ago Robert_I_Baratheon was king, and the realm was at peace. Much can change in a year's time. Mallador: One thing hasn't changed. Fewer wildlings means fewer worries. I won't mourn, whatever's become of them. Raiders and murderers, the lot of them.

name: Mallador Locke
quote: Jeor: Remember your words, brothers. For we are the swords in the darkness, the watchers on the walls ... Mallador: The fire that burns against the cold.

name: Malleon
quote: It was a ponderous tome by Grand Maester Malleon on the lineages of the great houses.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: The Wall can stop an army, but not a man alone.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: I know every bawdy song that's ever been made, north or south of the Wall.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Qhorin_Halfhand was carved of old oak, but I am made of flesh, and I have a great fondness for the charms of women ... which makes me no different from three-quarters of the Watch.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Jon: Are you a true king? Mance: I've never had a crown on my head or sat my arse on a bloody throne, if that's what you're asking. My birth is as low as a man's can get, no septon's ever smeared my head with oils, I don't own any castles, and Dalla wears furs and amber, not silk and sapphires. I am my own champion, my own fool, and my own harpist.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Free folk don't follow names, or little cloth animals sewn on a tunic. They won't dance for coins, they don't care how you style yourself or what that chain of office means or who your grandsire was. They follow strength. They follow the man.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Mance thinks he'll fight, the brave sweet stubborn man, like the white walkers were no more than rangers, but what does he know? He can call himself King-beyond-the-Wall all he likes, but he's still just another old black crow who flew down from the Shadow Tower. He's never tasted winter.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: I knew Mance Rayder, Jon. He is an oathbreaker, yes ... but he has eyes to see, and no man has ever dared to name him faintheart.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Jon: Why did he desert? Qhorin: For a wench, some say. For a crown, others would have it. He liked women, Mance did, and he was not a man whose knees bent easily, that's true. But it was more than that. He loved the wild better than the Wall. It was in his blood. He was wildling born, taken as a child when some raiders were put to the sword. When he left the Shadow Tower he was only going home again. Jon: Was he a good ranger? Qhorin: He was the best of us, and the worst as well.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Mance has cunning. He was raised a crow, you know, and the crow's a tricksy bird.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: The king was plainly a man who liked the sound of his own voice.

name: Mance Rayder
quote: Abel had doomed them. All singers were half-mad. In songs, the hero always saved the maiden from the monster's castle, but life was not a song, no more than Jeyne_Poole was Arya_Stark.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Mandon: Cersei_Lannister left orders, the council in session is not to be disturbed. Tyrion: I would be only a small disturbance, ser. I bear a letter from my father, Lord Tywin_Lannister, the Hand of the King. There is his seal. Mandon: Her Grace does not wish to be disturbed.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Tyrion: Where's Sansa_Stark? Joffrey: She was riding by me. I don't know where she went. Tyrion: Ser Mandon, you were her shield. Mandon: When they mobbed the Hound, I thought first of the king. Cersei: And rightly so.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Jaime_Lannister had once told him that Moore was the most dangerous of the Kingsguard—excepting himself, always—because his face gave no hint as what he might do next.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Tyrion rode down an archer, opened a spearman from shoulder to armpit, glanced a blow off a swordfish-crested helm. At the ram his big red reared but the black stallion leapt the obstacle smoothly and Ser Mandon flashed past him, death in snow-white silk. His sword sheared off limbs, cracked heads, broke shields asunder—though few enough of the enemy had made it across the river with shields intact.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Tyrion: Ser Mandon? Podrick: I n-never meant to k-k-k-k- Tyrion: Dead? You're, certain? Dead? Podrick: Drowned.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Tyrion: What do you know of Ser Mandon Moore? Bronn: I know he's bloody well drowned.

name: Mandon Moore
quote: Ser Barristan_Selmy was once heard to say that the man had no friend but his sword and no life but duty ... but you know, I do not think Selmy meant it altogether as praise. Which is queer when you consider it, is it not? Those are the very qualities we seek in our Kingsguard, it could be said—men who live not for themselves, but for their king. By those lights, our brave Ser Mandon was the perfect white knight. And he died as a knight of the Kingsguard ought, with sword in hand, defending one of the king's own blood.

name: Manfryd Mooton
quote: Manfryd: These are foul times and it is a foul choice Rhaenyra_Targaryen has given me. Nettles is a guest beneath my roof. If I obey, Maidenpool shall be forever cursed. If I refuse, we shall be attainted and destroyedBrother: It may be we shall be destroyed whatever choice we make. Daemon_Targaryen is more than fond of this brown child, and his dragon is close at hand. A wise lord would kill them both, lest the prince burn Maidenpool in his wroth.Manfryd: The queen has forbidden any harm to come to him, and murdering two guests in their beds is twice as foul as murdering one. I should be doubly cursed. Would that I had never read this letter.Norren: Mayhaps you never did.

name: Manfryd Mooton
quote: If Aegon_III_Targaryen dies without an heir, we shall dance again, however much we may dislike the music.

name: Marei
quote: Marei was a cool, pale, delicate girl Tyrion had noticed once or twice. Green eyes and porcelain skin, long straight silvery hair, very lovely, but too solemn by half.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Margaery: Grandmother, mind your words, or what will Sansa_Stark think of us? Olenna: She might think we have some wits about us. One of us, at any rate.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Sansa: You mustn't marry him. He's not like he seems, he's not. He'll hurt you. Margaery: I shouldn't think so. It's brave of you to warn me, but you need not fear. Joffrey_Baratheon spoiled and vain and I don't doubt that he's as cruel as you say, but Mace_Tyrell forced him to name Loras_Tyrell to his Kingsguard before he would agree to the match. I shall have the finest knight in the Seven Kingdoms protecting me night and day, as Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) protected Naerys_Targaryen. So our little lion had best behave, hadn't he?

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: I know what a burden you bear. You should let me share the load. There must be some things I could do to help you. It would put to rest all this talk that you and I are rivals for Tommen_Baratheon.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Cersei: You wrong me, daughter. All I want— Margaery: —is Tommen_Baratheon, all for yourself. He will never have a wife that you don't hate. And I am not your daughter, thank the gods.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Ned was not sure what to make of Renly_Baratheon, with all his friendly ways and easy smiles. A few days past, he had taken Ned aside to show him an exquisite rose gold locket. Inside was a miniature painted in the vivid Myrish style, of a lovely young girl with doe's eyes and a cascade of soft brown hair.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: The girl is a maid of fourteen, sweet and beautiful and tractable, and Lord Renly_Baratheon and Ser Loras_Tyrell intend that Robert_I_Baratheon should bed her, wed her, and make a new queen.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Stannis: We both know your wedding was a mummer's farce. A year ago you were scheming to make the girl one of Robert_I_Baratheon's whores. Renly: A year ago I was scheming to make the girl Robert’s queen.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: If you had to fall into Jeyne_Westerling arms, Robb_Stark, why couldn't they have been Margaery Tyrell's? The wealth and power of Highgarden could have made all the difference in the fighting yet to come. And perhaps Grey Wind would have liked the smell of her as well.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Margaery was different, though. Sweet and gentle, yet there was a little of her grandmother in her, too.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Her smile was shy and sweet. A lovely girl, thought Tyrion, and a kinder fate than Joffrey_Baratheon deserves.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: Lady Olenna was not about to let Joffrey_Baratheon harm her precious darling granddaughter, but unlike Mace_Tyrell she also realized that under all his flowers and finery, Ser Loras_Tyrell is as hot-tempered as Jaime_Lannister. Toss Joffrey, Margaery, and Loras in a pot, and you've got the makings for kingslayer stew. The old woman understood something else as well. Her son was determined to make Margaery a queen, and for that he needed a king... but he did not need Joffrey.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: We shall have another wedding soon, wait and see. Margaery will marry Tommen_Baratheon. She'll keep her queenly crown and her maidenhead, neither of which she especially wants, but what does that matter? The great western alliance will be preserved... for a time, at least.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: So the girl is as clever as she is pretty. Tommen_Baratheon could do a deal worse for a queen.

name: Margaery Tyrell
quote: She is pretty enough, she had to admit, but most of that is youth. Even peasant girls are pretty at a certain age, when they are still fresh and innocent and unspoiled, and most of them have the same brown hair and brown eyes as she does. Only a fool would ever claim she was more beautiful than I. The world was full of fools, however. So was Tommen_Baratheon court.

name: Marghaz zo Loraq
quote: Barristan: If Hizdahr_zo_Loraq should learn that you are here ... Skahaz: Who will tell him? Marghaz? Marghaz knows what I want him to know. The Beasts are still mine. Do not forget it.

name: Marghaz zo Loraq
quote: Selmy had already formed a healthy contempt for the man. He had known his sort in King's Landing—fawning to his superiors, harsh to his inferiors, as blind as he was boastful and too proud by half.

name: Marillion
quote: Marillion: My name is Marillion. Doubtless you've heard me play somewhere? Catelyn: I fear not.

name: Marillion
quote: In truth, I was made to sing for kings and high lords.

name: Marillion
quote: Marillion: I'm a singer, I want no part of this fight! Tyrion: What, lost your taste for adventure?

name: Marillion
quote: All night I have been making songs for you in my head. A lay for your eyes, a ballad for your lips, a duet to your breasts. I will not sing them, though. They were poor things, unworthy of such beauty. Let me sing to you with my body instead.

name: Marillion
quote: If I had eyes I should weep. I loved her so, I could not bear to see her in another's arms, to know she shared his bed. I meant no harm to my sweet lady, I swear it. I barred the door so no one could disturb us whilst I declared my passion, but Lady Lysa_Arryn was so cold ... when she told that she was carrying Lord Petyr_Baelish child, a ... a madness seized me ...

name: Marillion
quote: As she had suspected, he was more interested in telling his own story than in hearing theirs. Singers loved nothing half so well as the sound of their own voices.

name: Marillion
quote: Craven rhymes nicely with raven.

name: Marillion
quote: She did not understand why the gods would have given such a voice to such a wicked man.

name: Marillion
quote: We have come to an agreement, Marillion and I. Mord can be most persuasive. And if our singer disappoints us and sings a song we do not care to hear, why, you and I need only say he lies. Whom do you imagine Lord Nestor_Royce will believe?

name: Marillion
quote: Marwyn: The man must die. He should have followed Lady Lysa_Arryn out the Moon Door. Albar: Without his tongue. Without that lying, mocking tongue. Petyr: I have been too gentle with him, I know. If truth be told, I pity him. He killed for love. Marwyn: For love or hate, he must die. Nestor: Soon enough. No man lingers long in the sky cells. The blue will call to him. Petyr: It may, but whether Marillion will answer, only he can say.

name: Mariya Darry
quote: Amerei: Outlaws killed Merrett_Frey. Father had only gone out to ransom Petyr_Frey. He brought them the gold they asked for, but they hung him anyway. Mariya: Hanged, Ami. Your father was not a tapestry.

name: Mariya Darry
quote: Saltpans was the work of some fell beast in human skin.

name: Mark Ryswell
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn_Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo_Wull; Ethan_Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland_Reed; Lord Willam_Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Marlon Manderly
quote: Marlon: Your lordship asked Davos_Seaworth what Stannis_Baratheon offers us. Let me answer. He offers us defeat and death. He would have you mount a horse of air and give battle with a sword of wind. Wyman: My cousin cuts to the bone, as ever.

name: Maron Greyjoy
quote: Balon: Not here, not in Pyke, not in my hearing, you will not name him brother, Robb_Stark of Eddard_Stark who put your true brothers to the sword. Or have you forgotten Rodrik_Greyjoy and Maron, who were your own blood? Theon: I forget nothing. I remember my brothers very well.

name: Maron Greyjoy
quote: And now I must tell Alannys_Harlaw that Theon_Greyjoy is dead, and drive yet another dagger through her heart. There were two knives buried there already. On the blades were writ the words Rodrik_Greyjoy and Maron, and many a time they twisted cruelly in the night.

name: Maron Martell
quote: Whether Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV) loved Daemon_I_Blackfyre, as those who rose for the Black Dragon later claimed, who could say? In the years afterward, Daenerys was never aught but a loyal wife to Prince Maron, and if she mourned Daemon Blackfyre, she left no record of it.

name: Maron Martell
quote: The Water Gardens are my favorite place in this world, ser. One of my ancestors had them built to please his Targaryen bride and free her from the dust and heat of Sunspear. Daenerys was her name. She was sister to King Daeron_I_Targaryen, and it was her marriage that made Dorne part of the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Maron Martell's son
quote: There is your realm, remember them, in everything you do.

name: Maron Volmark
quote: Volmark is a callow boy, but he has Harren_Hoare blood in him through his mother.

name: Marq Piper
quote: Raymun: By the time I could return to my own lands, Gregor_Clegane and his vermin were back across the Red Fork, riding for Lannister's hills. Petyr: And if they come again, ser? Marq: If they come again, we'll use their blood to water the fields they burnt.

name: Marq Piper
quote: Marq: Do we have your leave to take our vengeance against Ser Gregor_Clegane, then? Eddard: Vengeance? I thought we were speaking of justice.

name: Marq Piper
quote: Alyx: I hear Tully men have trout between their legs instead of cocks. Does it take a worm to make them rise? Marq: I hear that Frey women have two gates in place of one! Alyx: Aye, but both are closed and barred to little things like you!

name: Marq Piper
quote: He was a swaggering bantam rooster of a youth, too young and too hot-blooded for Ned's taste, though a fast friend of Catelyn_Stark brother, Edmure_Tully.

name: Marq Piper
quote: Tywin: Marq Piper and Karyl_Vance are loose in our rear, raiding our lands across the Red Fork. Tyrion: The gall of them, fighting back.

name: Marq Piper
quote: Clement: Where is Marq, answer me that? What have you done with my son? He was a guest at your bloody wedding. Edwyn: And our honored guest he shall remain, until you prove your loyalty to His Grace, King Tommen.

name: Marro
quote: By then Marro had appeared behind him, gaunt and terrible in the Stranger's long black robes. His face was black as well, his teeth red and shiny with blood, while ivory horns jutted upwards from his brow. Bobono could not see him, but the balconies could, and now the pit as well. The Gate grew deathly quiet. Marro moved forward silently.

name: Marselen
quote: Daenerys: If you fear what may follow when I leave, come with me to Westeros. Marselen: Wherever the Mother of Dragons goes, the Mother's Men will go as well.

name: Marselen
quote: Missandei and her brothers had been taken from their home on Naath by raiders from the Basilisk Isles and sold into slavery in Astapor. Young as she was, Missandei had shown such a gift for tongues that the Good Masters had made a scribe of her. Mossador and Marselen had not been so fortunate. They had been gelded and made into Unsullied.

name: Marston Waters
quote: Your Grace does us wrong to think we mean him harm. We acted only to protect Your Grace from false friends and traitors.

name: Marston Waters
quote: Marston: We are the both of us bastards and Sworn Brothers besides. Mervyn: You will be wanting my steel.

name: Marston Waters
quote: Aegon_III_Targaryen can command me. You cannot.

name: Princess of Dorne (mother of Doran)
quote: Tyrion: Well, Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen married Elia_Martell of Dorne, not Cersei_Lannister of Casterly Rock. So it would seem your mother won that tilt. Oberyn: She thought so, but Tywin_Lannister is not a man to forget such slights.

name: Princess of Dorne (mother of Doran)
quote: Doran: Instead I mean to take you with us to the Water Gardens. There are lessons there if you have the wit to see them.Obara: Lessons? All I've seen are naked children.Doran: Aye. I told the story to Ser Balon_Swann, but not all of it. As the children splashed in the pools, Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV) watched from amongst the orange trees, and a realization came to her. She could not tell the highborn from the low. Naked, they were only children. All innocent, all vulnerable, all deserving of long life, love, protection. 'There is your realm,' she told Maron_Martell's_son, 'remember them, in everything you do.' My own mother said those same words to me when I was old enough to leave the pools. It is an easy thing for a prince to call the spears, but in the end the children pay the price. For their sake, the wise prince will wage no war without good cause, nor any war he cannot hope to win.

name: Martyn Cassel
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo_Wull; Ethan_Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark_Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland_Reed; Lord Willam_Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Martyn Cassel
quote: My brother Martyn fathered four strong sons, yet only Jory_Cassel lived to be a man. When he was slain, Martyn's line died with him. When we speak of the morrow nothing is ever certain.

name: Martyn Rivers
quote: Well met, my lady. Edmure_Tully charged us to keep an eye out for your party, and escort you back to Riverrun in all haste should we come upon you.

name: Martyn Rivers
quote: Martyn has been of great service scouting.

name: Marwyn
quote: Marwyn: Gorghan of Old Ghis once wrote that a prophecy is like a treacherous woman. She takes your member in her mouth, and you moan with the pleasure of it and think, how sweet, how fine, how good this is... and then her teeth snap shut and your moans turn to screams. That is the nature of prophecy, said Gorghan. Prophecy will bite your prick off every time. Still ...Alleras: Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) would have gone to Daenerys_Targaryen if he had the strength. He wanted us to send a maester to her, to counsel her and protect her and fetch her safely home.Marwyn: Did he? Perhaps it's good that he died before he got to Oldtown. Elsewise the grey sheep might have had to kill him, and that would have made the poor old dears wring their wrinkled hands.Samwell: Kill him? Why?Marwyn: If I tell you, they may need to kill you too. Who do you think killed all the dragons the last time around? Gallant dragonslayers armed with swords? The world the Citadel is building has no place in it for sorcery or prophecy or glass candles, much less for dragons. Ask yourself why Aemon Targaryen was allowed to waste his life upon the Wall, when by rights he should have been raised to archmaester. His blood was why. He could not be trusted. No more than I can.

name: Marwyn
quote: Samwell: B-b-but, the other archmaesters... the Seneschal... what should I tell them? Marwyn: Tell them how wise and good they are. Tell them that Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) commanded you to put yourself into their hands. Tell them that you have always dreamed that one day you might be allowed to wear the chain and serve the greater good, that service is the highest honor, and obedience the highest virtue. But say nothing of prophecies or dragons, unless you fancy poison in your porridge.

name: Marwyn
quote: Mirri: Marwyn, he named himself. From the sea. Beyond the sea. The Seven Lands, he said. Sunset Lands. Where men are iron and dragons rule. He taught me this speech.Jorah: A maester in Asshai. Tell me, Godswife, what did this Marwyn wear about his neck?Mirri: A chain so tight it was like to choke him, Iron Lord, with links of many metals.

name: Marwyn
quote: Armen: Marwyn is unsound. Archmaester Perestan would be the first to tell you that.Roone: Archmaester Ryam says so too.Leo: The sea is wet, the sun is warm, and the menagerie hates the mastiff.

name: Marwyn
quote: The Mage was not like other maesters. People said that he kept company with whores and hedge wizards, talked with hairy Ibbenese and pitch-black Summer Islanders in their own tongues, and sacrificed to queer gods at the little sailors' temples down by the wharves. Men spoke of seeing him down in the undercity, in rat pits and black brothels, consorting with mummers, singers, sellswords, even beggars. Some even whispered that once he had killed a man with his fists.

name: Marwyn
quote: Marwyn wore a chain of many metals around his bull's neck. Save for that, he looked more like a dockside thug than a maester.

name: Mary Mertyns
quote: If you two are knights, I'm still a maiden. And I'll speak as I please. What will you do, kill me? I have lived too long already.

name: Marya Seaworth
quote: Only a starving man begs bread from a beggar.

name: Marya Seaworth
quote: Davos: I do not know this Lord of Light, but I knew the gods we burned this morning. The Smith has kept my ships safe, while the Mother has given me seven strong sons.Stannis: Your wife has given you seven strong sons. Do you pray to her? It was wood we burned this morning.

name: Marya Seaworth
quote: I was a better smuggler than a knight, a better knight than a King's Hand, a better King's Hand than a husband. I am so sorry. Marya, I have loved you. Please forgive the wrongs I did you.

name: Masha Heddle
quote: Masha: Don’t kill him here! Tyrion: Don't kill him anywhere.

name: Masha Heddle
quote: A room, a meal, and a flagon of wine, that was all I asked.

name: Matarys Targaryen
quote: Neither young nor old were spared, nor rich nor poor, nor great nor humble. […] His Grace King Daeron, sweet Matarys and bold Valarr, the Hand… oh, it was a dreadful time.

name: Matarys Targaryen
quote: Brynden_Rivers hands are scarlet with a Daemon_I_Blackfyre blood, and the blood of his Aemon_Blackfyre Aegon_Blackfyre too. A shadow came at his command to strangle brave Prince Valarr_Targaryen sons in their Kiera_of_Tyrosh womb. Where is our Young Prince now? Where is his brother, sweet Matarys?

name: Mathis Rowan
quote: Mathis: They are all so young.Catelyn: War will make them old, as it did us. I pity them.Mathis: Why? Look at them. They're young and strong, full of life and laughter. And lust, aye, more lust than they know what to do with. There will be many a bastard bred this night, I promise you. Why pity?Catelyn: Because it will not last. Because they are the knights of summer, and winter is coming.

name: Mathis Rowan's daughter
quote: The girl was waiting for me, naked as the day she was born. She pulled me through the window, and you talk to me of fair?

name: Little Matt
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Matthar
quote: Grenn: I hope I'm a ranger. Matthar: You and everyone else.

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: Duncan: We'd all be bastard sons of old King Aegon_IV_Targaryen if half these tales were true. Maynard: And who's to say we're not?

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: A marriage is a melee, as any married man could tell you.

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: An honorable death is well and good, but if the life at stake is not your own, what then?

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: Duncan: Who are you? Maynard: A friend. One who has been watching you, and wondering at your presence in this nest of adders.

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: Stay well away from that one. He could be a robber knight, for all we know.

name: Maynard Plumm
quote: This close, there was something queer about the cast of Ser Maynard's features. The longer Dunk looked, the less he seemed to see.

name: Mebble
quote: Them Bloody Mummers killed some of Ser Amory_Lorch lot in their beds, and the rest at table after they were good and drunk. Roose_Bolton will be here before the day's out, with his whole host. He's from the wild north up where that Wall is, and they say he's a hard one. This lord or that lord, there's still work to be done. Any foolery and I'll whip the skin off your back.

name: Mebble
quote: His true name was Mebble, but everyone called him Pinkeye for his runny eyes.

name: Medger Cerwyn
quote: As to this of my cousins, we offer Harrion_Karstark and Ser Wylis_Manderly for Willem_Lannister, and Lord Cerwyn and Ser Donnel_Locke for your brother Tion_Frey. Tell Robb_Stark that two Lannisters are worth four northmen in any season.

name: Medger Cerwyn
quote: She did remember Lord Cerwyn, though. His lands had been close to Winterfell, so he and his son Cley had often visited. Yet as fate would have it, he was the only captive who was never seen; he was abed in a tower cell, recovering from a wound. For days and days Arya tried to work out how she might steal past the door guards to see him. If he knew her, he would be honor bound to help her.

name: Medger Cerwyn
quote: When Arya asked who it was, one of the guards told her that Lord Cerwyn had died. The words felt like a kick in the belly. He could never have helped you anyway, she thought as the sisters drove the wagon through the gate. He couldn't even help himself, you stupid mouse.

name: Meera Reed
quote: Meera: Up and down, then down and up. Then up and down again. I hate these stupid mountains of yours, Prince Bran.Bran: Yesterday you said you loved them.Meera: Oh, I do. Howland_Reed told me about mountains, but I never saw one till now. I love them more than I can say.Bran: But you just said you hated them.Meera: Why can't it be both?

name: Meera Reed
quote: Remember Old Nan's stories, Bran. Remember the way she told them, the sound of her voice. So long as you do that, part of her will always be alive in you.

name: Meera Reed
quote: It was hard to sulk with Meera. She was much more cheerful than her brother, and always seemed to know how to make him smile. Nothing ever scared her or made her angry. Well, except Jojen_Reed, sometimes ... Jojen Reed could scare most anyone.

name: Meera Reed
quote: The woods were full of frozen streams and cold black lakes, and Meera was as good a fisher with her three-pronged frog spear as most men were with hook and line.

name: Megga Tyrell
quote: King Joffrey_Baratheon has such beautiful lips, oh, poor Sansa, how your heart must have broken when you lost him. Oh, how you must have wept!

name: Megga Tyrell
quote: Megga couldn't sing, but she was mad to be kissed. She and Alla_Tyrell played a kissing game sometimes, she confessed, but it wasn't the same as kissing a man, much less Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Megga Tyrell
quote: Taena: Elinor_Tyrell is promised to the Alyn_Ambrose, but loves to flirt, and Megga has a new suitor every fortnight. Once she kissed a potboy in the kitchen. I have heard talk of her marrying Lady_Bulwer's_brother, but if Megga were to choose for herself, she would sooner have Mark_Mullendore, I am certain. Cersei: The butterfly knight who lost his arm on the Blackwater? What good is half a man?" Taena: Megga thinks him sweet. She has asked Lady Margaery to help her find a monkey for him.

name: Megga Tyrell
quote: And Megga ... she laughs as loud as a dockside whore, I know, but inside she's still just a little girl.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: Melara: Just tell us our futures, then we'll go. Maggy: Some are here who have no futures.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: Melara: I get three questions too. Will I marry Jaime_Lannister? Maggy: Not Jaime, nor any other man. Worms will have your maidenhead. Your death is here tonight, little one. Can you smell her breath? She is very close.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: If we never talk about it we'll soon forget, and then it will be just a bad dream we had. Bad dreams never come true.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: Cersei had not had a friend she so enjoyed since Melara Hetherspoon, and Melara had turned out to be a greedy little schemer with ideas above her station. I should not think ill of her. She’s dead and drowned, and she taught me never to trust anyone but Jaime_Lannister.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: Cersei did not care to think about Senelle. She repaid my kindness with betrayal. Sansa_Stark had done the same. So had Melara Hetherspoon and fat Jeyne_Farman when the three of them were girls. I would never have gone into that tent if not for them. I would never have allowed Maggy_the_Frog to taste my morrows in a drop of blood.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: You stupid girl, the queen thought, angry even now. Jaime_Lannister does not even know you are alive. Back then her brother lived only for swords and dogs and horses... and for her, his twin.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: Cersei: This maegi made certain prophecies. I laughed at them at first, but... she foretold the death of one of my bedmaids. At the time she made the prophecy, the girl was one-and-ten, healthy as a little horse and safe within the Rock. Yet she soon fell down a well and drowned. Qyburn: Do you still grieve for this friend of your childhood? Is that what troubles you, Your Grace? Cersei: Melara? No. I can hardly recall what she looked like.

name: Melara Hetherspoon
quote: She could still hear Melara Hetherspoon insisting that if they never spoke about the prophecies, they would not come true. She was not so silent in the well, though. She screamed and shouted.

name: Meldred Merlyn
quote: One raven summons me to Pyke, another to Ten Towers. You krakens have too many arms, you pull a man to pieces. What say you, priest? Where should I send my longships?

name: Meldred Merlyn
quote: Aeron: Who shall rule the ironborn? Who shall be king over us? Meldred: Make your claim, Victarion. Let us have done with this mummer's farce. Victarion: When I am ready.

name: Melessa Florent
quote: If she saw me in my blacks, it might even make her proud. "I am a man now, Mother,” I could tell her, "a steward and a man of the Night's Watch. My brothers call me Sam the Slayer sometimes."

name: Melisandre
quote: Melisandre: The night is dark and full of terrors. Cressen: Only children fear the dark.

name: Melisandre
quote: Davos: Are you good or evil, my lady? Melisandre: Oh, good. I am a knight of sorts myself, sweet ser. A champion of light and life.

name: Melisandre
quote: These little wars are no more than a scuffle of children before what is to come. The one whose name may not be spoken is marshaling his power, Davos Seaworth, a power fell and evil and strong beyond measure. Soon comes the cold, and the night that never ends. Unless true men find the courage to fight it. Men whose hearts are fire.

name: Melisandre
quote: When the red star bleeds and the darkness gathers, Azor_Ahai shall be born again amidst smoke and salt to wake dragons out of stone.

name: Melisandre
quote: Melisandre: When I gaze into the flames, I can see through stone and earth, and find the truth within men's souls. I can speak to kings long dead and children not yet born, and watch the years and seasons flicker past, until the end of days. Jon: Are your fires never wrong? Melisandre: Never ... though we priests are mortal and sometimes err, mistaking this must come for this may come.

name: Melisandre
quote: We all must choose. Man or woman, young or old, lord or peasant, our choices are the same. We choose light or we choose darkness.

name: Melisandre
quote: I pray for a glimpse of Azor_Ahai, and R'hllor shows me only Jon_Snow.

name: Melisandre
quote: With Stannis_Baratheon gone, her bed saw little use. She had no time for sleep, with the weight of the world upon her shoulders. And she feared to dream. Sleep is a little death, dreams the whisperings of the Other, who would drag us all into his eternal night. She would sooner sit bathed in the ruddy glow of her red lord's blessed flames, her cheeks flushed by the wash of heat as if by a lover's kisses.

name: Melisandre
quote: Her hair was not the orange or strawberry color of common red-haired men, but a deep burnished copper that shone in the light of the torches. Even her eyes were red ... but her skin was smooth and white, unblemished, pale as cream. Slender she was, graceful, taller than most knights, with full breasts and narrow waist and a heart-shaped face. Men's eyes that once found her did not quickly look away, not even a maester's eyes. Many called her beautiful. She was not beautiful. She was red, and terrible, and red.

name: Melisandre
quote: Half my knights are afraid even to say her name, did you know? If she can do nothing else, a sorceress who can inspire such dread in grown men is not to be despised. A frightened man is a beaten man. And perhaps she can do more. I mean to find out.

name: Melisandre
quote: She spoke to me. We called the fire, she said. We called the shadows too. I rowed Melisandre into the bowels of Storm's End and watched her birth a horror. She killed Cressen and Lord Renly_Baratheon and a brave man named Cortnay_Penrose, and she killed my sons as well. Now it is time someone killed her.

name: Melisandre
quote: She even smells red. The scent reminded him of Mikken's forge, of the way iron smelled when red-hot; the scent was smoke and blood. Kissed by fire, he thought, remembering Ygritte.

name: Melisandre
quote: Lady Melisandre wore no crown, but every man there knew that she was Stannis_Baratheon's real queen, not Selyse_Florent he had left to shiver at Eastwatch-by-the-Sea.

name: Melissa Blackwood
quote: I wore many names when I was quick, but even I once had a mother, and the name she gave me at her breast was Brynden_Rivers.

name: Melissa Blackwood
quote: Hoster: Lady Melissa. Missy, they called her. There's a statue of her in our godswood. She was much more beautiful than Barba_Bracken, but slender, and Barba was heard to say that Missy was flat as a boy. When King Aegon_IV_Targaryen heard, he ... Jaime: ... gave her Barba's teats.

name: Mellario
quote: Doran: I like it no more than you do, but there is Edgar_Yronwood, and Quentyn_Martell is the only coin Lord Ormond_Yronwood will accept.Mellario: Coin? He is your son. What sort of father uses his own flesh and blood to pay his debts?

name: Mellario
quote: It wasn't a good marriage. They married because of an attraction to something new and exotic. Sometimes, attraction happens when you least expect it. Doran_Martell of a distant country, and she was a woman full of life, who was very appealing, who came from a very different culture.

name: Mellario
quote: Doran: The bells were ringing, and the bears danced down the steps. Areo will recall the day.Areo: I remember. The bears danced and the bells rang, and the prince wore red and gold and orange. My lady asked me who it was who shone so bright.

name: Mellario
quote: Doran_Martell and his Norvoshi wife had spent half their marriage apart and the other half arguing. It was the only rash thing his father had ever done, to hear some tell it, the only time he had followed his heart instead of his head, and he had lived to rue it.

name: Mellario
quote: I should have gone to Norvos to see my mother and the place that gave her birth, so she would know that I had not forgotten her.

name: Mellos
quote: What of it? I am not fond of fish, but when fish is served, I eat it.

name: Meralyn
quote: The boys unload the ships, and my girls unload the lads who sail them.

name: Meralyn
quote: Meralyn is her true name, but everyone calls her Merry, and she is.

name: Meria Martell
quote: Meria: I will not fight you, nor will I kneel to you. Dorne has no king. Tell Aegon_I_Targaryen that. Rhaenys: I shall, but we will come again, Princess, and the next time we shall come with fire and blood. Meria: Your words. Ours are Unbowed, Unbent, Unbroken. You may burn us, my lady ... but you will not bend us, break us, or make us bow. This is Dorne. You are not wanted here. Return at your peril.

name: Meria Martell
quote: Fire for fire.

name: Meria Martell
quote: The Yellow Toad has melted into the sands.

name: Meria Martell
quote: The toad hops into her hole whenver threatened.

name: Meria Martell
quote: Meria fought like a woman, with lies and treachery and witchery.

name: Meribald
quote: I have a weakness for the orange, I confess.

name: Meribald
quote: Hyle: The War of the Ninepenny Kings? Meribald: So they called it, though I never saw a king, nor earned a penny. It was war, though. That it was.

name: Meris
quote: You were told your scheme was madness, have you forgotten? Do what you came to do.

name: Meris
quote: Pretty Meris frightened him. A Westerosi woman, but taller than he was, just a thumb under six feet. After twenty years amongst the free companies, there was nothing pretty about her, inside or out.

name: Meris
quote: Quentyn: How did you learn their word? Tattered Prince: We chanced upon some Brazen Beasts and Meris asked them prettily. But a prince should know better than to pose such questions, Dornish. In Pentos, we have a saying. Never ask the baker what went into the pie. Just eat.

name: Mern IX Gardener
quote: Our iron fist.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: I never did have any luck.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: You needed some sort of distinction in the Twins, else they were liable to forget you were alive, but a reputation as the biggest drinker in the castle had done little to enhance his prospects, he'd found. I once hoped to be the greatest knight who ever couched a lance. The gods took that away from me. Why shouldn't I have a cup of wine from time to time? It helps my headaches. Besides, Mariya_Darry is a shrew, Walder_Frey despises me, my children are worthless. What do I have to stay sober for?

name: Merrett Frey
quote: He wasn't clever enough to be a maester, pious enough to be a septon, or savage enough to be a sellsword. The gods gave me no gift but birth, and they stinted me there. What good was it to be the son of a rich and powerful House if you were the ninth son? When you took grandsons and great-grandsons into account, Merrett stood a better chance of being chosen High Septon than he did of inheriting the Twins.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: Merrett: Please. I've done you no harm. I brought the gold, the way you said. I answered your question. I have children. Jack: That Robb_Stark never will.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: He picked her because she's fat. You think Roose_Bolton gave a mummer's fart that she was your whelp? Think he sat about thinking, 'Heh, Merrett Muttonhead, that's the very man I need for a good-father'? Your Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Merrett) a sow in silk, that's why he picked her, and I'm not like to thank you for it. We'd have had the same alliance at half the price if your little porkling put down her spoon from time to time.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: We must each play our part, according to our gifts. You shall have one task and one task only, Merrett, but I believe you are well suited to it. I want you to see to it that Greatjon Umber is so bloody drunk that he can hardly stand, let alone fight.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: When Jaime had arrived, Merrett Frey had been the castle bully, lording it over all the younger boys. Then he tried to bully me.

name: Merrett Frey
quote: Amerei: Outlaws killed him. Father had only gone out to ransom Petyr_Frey. He brought them the gold they asked for, but they hung him anyway. Mariya: Hanged, Ami. Your father was not a tapestry.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Meryn: You are quick, for a dancing master. Syrio: You are slow, for a knight.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Sansa: I shall do whatever Joffrey_Baratheon commands. Meryn: As I do. Sansa: Yes ... but you are no true knight, Ser Meryn.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Jaime: Ser, you've been remiss in teaching our new brothers their duties. Meryn: What duties? Jaime: Keeping the king alive.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Jaime: Ser Meryn I have heard it said that Joffrey_Baratheon made use of you to chastise Sansa_Stark. Here, show me where it is in our vows that we swear to beat women and children. Meryn: I did as His Grace commanded me. We are sworn to obey. Jaime: Henceforth you will temper that obedience. Cersei_Lannister is Queen Regent. Tywin_Lannister is the King's Hand. I am Lord Commander of the Kingsguard. Obey us. None other. Meryn: Are you telling us not to obey the king? Jaime: The king is eight. Our first duty is to protect him, which includes protecting him from himself. Use that ugly thing you keep inside your helm. If Tommen_Baratheon wants you to saddle his horse, obey him. If he tells you to kill his horse, come to me.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Ser Boros_Blount and Ser Meryn are Cersei_Lannister creatures to the bone, and I have deep suspicions of the others.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: He did not hate her, Sansa realized; neither did he love her. He felt nothing for her at all. She was only a ... a thing to him.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Sandor_Clegane would have laughed at that, Sansa knew. Other men might have cursed her, warned her to keep silent, even begged for her forgiveness. Ser Meryn Trant did none of these. Ser Meryn Trant simply did not care.

name: Meryn Trant
quote: Ser Meryn had always been Cersei_Lannister creature.

name: Mikken
quote: The sea, is it? Happens I always wanted to see the sea. Never got where I could go to it, though. So now it's coming to me, is it? The gods are good, to take such trouble for a poor smith.

name: Mikken
quote: Theon: You all know me— Mikken: Aye, we know you for a sack of steaming dung!

name: Mikken
quote: It's blood he drowned on, Bran thought numbly. His own blood.

name: Mikken
quote: They were all dead now. Jory, old Ser Rodrik_Cassel, Lord Eddard_Stark, Harwin and Hullen, Cayn and Desmond and Fat Tom, Alyn with his dreams of knighthood, Mikken who had given him his first real sword. Even Old Nan, like as not.

name: Mikken
quote: Mikken. His name was Mikken. The castle blacksmith had never made any lemoncakes for Sansa_Stark, which made him far less important than Gage in the sweet little world she had shared with her friend Jeyne_Poole. Remember, damn you. Vayon_Poole was the steward, he had charge of the whole household. The smith's name was Mikken, Mikken, Mikken. I had him put to death before me!

name: Miller's sons
quote: On their iron spikes atop the gatehouse, the heads waited. Theon gazed at them silently while the wind tugged on his cloak with small ghostly hands. The miller's boys had been of an age with Bran_Stark and Rickon_Stark, alike in size and coloring, and once Ramsay_Snow had flayed the skin from their faces and dipped their heads in tar, it was easy to see familiar features in those misshapen lumps of rotting flesh. People were such fools. If we'd said they were rams' heads, they would have seen horns.

name: Miller's sons
quote: Luwin: Bran_Stark. And Rickon_Stark too. The gods are good. I knew...Bran: Knew?Luwin: The legs, I could tell... the clothes fit, but the muscles in his legs... poor lad...

name: Miller's sons
quote: And for one strange moment it seemed as if it were Bran_Stark's face carved into the pale trunk of the weirwood, staring down at him with eyes red and wise and sad. Bran's ghost, he thought, but that was madness. Why should Bran want to haunt him? He had been fond of the boy, had never done him any harm. It was not Bran we killed. It was not Rickon_Stark. They were only miller's sons, from the mill by the Acorn Water.

name: Miller's wife
quote: This miller's marriage had been performed without my leave or knowledge. The man had cheated me. So I had him hanged, and claimed my rights beneath the tree where he was swaying. If truth be told, the wench was hardly worth the rope. The fox escaped as well, and on our way back to the Dreadfort my favorite courser came up lame, so all in all it was a dismal day.

name: Miller's wife
quote: Get the keys and remove those chains from Theon_Greyjoy, before you make me rue the day I raped your mother.

name: Miller's wife from Acorn Water
quote: "Reek": You know that old mill, sitting lonely on the Acorn Water? We stopped there when I was being dragged to Winterfell a captive. The miller's wife sold us hay for our horses while Rodrik_Cassel clucked over Miller's_sons. Might be the Starks are hiding there.Theon: Why there? There are a dozen villages and holdfasts just as close."Reek": Why? Now that’s past knowing. But they’re there, I have a feeling.

name: Miller's wife from Acorn Water
quote: Theon had forgotten her name, but he remembered her body, soft pillowy breasts and stretch marks on her belly, the way she clawed his back when he fucked her. Last night in his dream he had been in bed with her once again, but this time she had teeth above and below, and she tore out his throat even as she was gnawing off his manhood. It was madness. He'd seen her die too. Gelmarr had cut her down with one blow of his axe as she cried to Theon for mercy. Leave me, woman. It was him who killed you, not me. And he's dead as well.

name: Miller's wife from Acorn Water
quote: He was trapped here, with the ghosts. The old ghosts from the crypts and the younger ones that he had made himself, Mikken and Farlen, Gynir Rednose, Aggar, Gelmarr the Grim, the miller's wife from Acorn Water and Miller's_sons, and all the rest. My work. My ghosts. They are all here, and they are angry.

name: Miller's wife from Acorn Water
quote: The two we killed were just some Miller's_sons. Theon did not want to think about their mother. He had known the miller's wife for years, had even bedded her. Big heavy breasts with wide dark nipples, a sweet mouth, a merry laugh. Joys that I will never taste again.

name: Minisa Whent
quote: Brynden: Hoster_Tully misses her still. You have her face. I can see it in your cheekbones, and your jaw ... Catelyn: You remember more of her than I do. It has been a long time.

name: Minisa Whent
quote: Lady Minisa Tully had died in childbed, trying to give Lord Hoster_Tully a second son. The baby had perished with her, and afterward some of the life had gone out of Father. She was always so calm, Catelyn thought, remembering her mother's soft hands, her warm smile. If she had lived, how different our lives might have been.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: This is bloodmagic, lady. Only death may pay for life.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: Daenerys: You warned me that only death could pay for life. I thought you meant the horse. Mirri: No. That was a lie you told yourself. You knew Rhaego.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: The stallion who mounts the world will burn no cities now. His khalasar shall trample no nations into dust.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: Daenerys: I spoke for you. I saved you. Mirri: Saved me? Three riders had taken me, not as a man takes a woman but from behind, as a dog takes a bitch. The fourth was in me when you rode past. How then did you save me? I saw my god's house burn, where I had healed good men beyond counting. My home they burned as well, and in the street I saw piles of heads. I saw the head of a baker who made my bread. I saw the head of a boy I had saved from deadeye fever, only three moons past. I heard children crying as the riders drove them off with their whips. Tell me again what you saved. Daenerys: Your life. Mirri: Look to Drogokhal and see what life is worth, when all the rest is gone.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: Daenerys: I thank you, Mirri Maz Duur, for the lessons you have taught me. Mirri: You will not hear me scream. Daenerys: I will, but it is not your screams I want, only your life. I remember what you told me. Only death can pay for life.

name: Mirri Maz Duur
quote: The godswife thought her a child, but children grow, and children learn.

name: Missandei
quote: All kneel for Daenerys Stormborn, the Unburnt, Queen of Meereen, Queen of the Andals and the Rhoynar and the First Men, Khaleesi of Great Grass Sea, Breaker of Shackles, and Mother of Dragons.

name: Missandei
quote: Missandei: Your Grace, forgive this one her outburst. Your slave's name is Missandei, but ... Daenerys: Missandei is no longer a slave. I free you, from this instant. Come ride with me in the litter, I wish to talk. If you stay with me you will serve as one of my handmaids. I shall keep you by my side to speak for me as you spoke for Kraznys_mo_Nakloz. But you may leave my service whenever you choose, if you have father or mother you would sooner return to. Missandei: This one will stay. This one ... I ... there is no place for me to go. This ... I will serve you, gladly.

name: Missandei
