quote: Daenerys: Never lie to me, Missandei. Never betray me. Missandei: I never would.

name: Missandei
quote: Daenerys: Say the word, my sweet, and I will send you from this awful place. I will find a ship somehow and send you home. To Naath. Missandei: I would sooner stay with you. On Naath I'd be afraid. What if the slavers came again? I feel safe when I'm with you. Daenerys: I want to keep you safe. No one ever kept me safe when I was little. Well, Ser Willem_Darry did, but then he died, and Viserys_Targaryen ... I want to protect you but ... it is so hard. To be strong. I don't always know what I should do. I must know, though. I am all they have. I am the queen ... the ... the ... Missandei: ... mother.

name: Missandei
quote: The little scribe with the big golden eyes was wise beyond her years. She is brave as well. She had to be, to survive the life she's lived.

name: Missandei
quote: She relied so much on the little scribe that she oft forgot that Missandei had only turned eleven.

name: Missandei
quote: Only Missandei remained, a forlorn little ghost haunting Daenerys_Targaryen chambers at the apex of the pyramid.

name: Missandei
quote: Eleven years of age, yet Missandei is as clever as half the men at this table and wiser than all of them.

name: Moelle
quote: A sweet face oft hides a sinner's heart.

name: Moelle
quote: Only the innocent know the peace of untroubled sleep. Confess your sins, and you will sleep like a newborn babe.

name: Moelle
quote: This one still has her maidenhead, I'll wager, though by now it's hard and stiff as boiled leather.

name: Monford Velaryon
quote: Davos would have given much to know what he was thinking, but one such as Velaryon would never confide in him. The Lord of the Tides was of the blood of ancient Valyria, and his House had thrice provided brides for Targaryen princes; Davos Seaworth stank of fish and onions.

name: Monford Velaryon
quote: The others bobbed their heads up and down like a flock of geese, all but Velaryon, who said that steel would decide the matter, not words on parchment. As if I had never suspected.

name: Monford Velaryon
quote: Lord Velaryon will urge me to storm the castle walls at first light, grapnels and scaling ladders against arrows and boiling oil. The young mules will think this a splendid notion.

name: Monster
quote: My son. My blood. You think I'd give him to you crows?

name: Monster
quote: Even if Craster gave us the child, he'd be dead before we reached the Wall. We need a newborn babe to care for near as much as we need more snow. Do you have milk to feed him in those big teats of yours? Or did you mean to take Gilly too?

name: Monster
quote: Jon: Craster married all his daughters. Gilly's boy was the fruit of their union. Stannis: Her own father got this child on her? We are well rid of her, then. I will not suffer such abominations here. This is not King's Landing.

name: Monster
quote: A mother can't leave her son, or else she's cursed forever. Not a son. We saved him, Samwell_Tarly and me. Please. Please, m'lord. We saved him from the cold.

name: Monster
quote: Val: How fares the little monster? Jon: Twice as big as when you left us, and thrice as loud. When he wants the teat, you can hear him wail in Eastwatch.

name: Moon
quote: What can the death of Maegor_I_Targaryen matter when Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen rises up to take its place?

name: Moon
quote: Westeros will not be clean again until all the Targaryens have been slain or driven back into the sea.

name: Moon Boy
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon own fool, the pie-faced simpleton called Moon Boy, danced about on stilts, all in motley, making mock of everyone with such deft cruelty that Sansa wondered if he was simple after all.

name: Moon Boy
quote: Varys pays in gold for any little trifle. I think Moon Boy had been his for years.

name: Moon Boy
quote: Tyrion: Our present High_Septon_(Tyrion's) is a trained seal who barks prettily on command. Moon Boy is more like to annul my marriage than he is. Tywin: Perhaps I should have married Sansa_Stark to Moon Boy. He might have known what to do with her.

name: Moon Boy
quote: Cersei_Lannister is a lying whore, she's been fucking Lancel_Lannister and Osmund_Kettleblack and probably Moon Boy for all I know.

name: Moon Boy
quote: A fool he may be, but he wears his folly honestly.

name: Moqorro
quote: Dragons old and young, true and false, bright and dark. And you. A small man with a big shadow, snarling in the midst of it all.

name: Moqorro
quote: The Lord of Light has shown me your worth, Victarion_Greyjoy. Every night in my fires I glimpse the glory that awaits you.

name: Moqorro
quote: Victarion: Why do you say this man is a wizard? I see only a ragged red priest. Rodrik: I thought the same, lord Captain... but he knows things. He knew that we made for Slaver's Bay before any man could tell him, and he knew you would be here, off this island.

name: Mord
quote: Mord: Is lie. Dwarf man cheat me. Tyrion: I will put my promise in writing. Mord: Writing down gold. Much gold. Tyrion: Oh, much gold.

name: Mord
quote: The turnkey was twenty stone of gross stupidity, with brown rotting teeth and small dark eyes.

name: Mordane
quote: Sansa_Stark work is as pretty as she is. She has such fine, delicate hands. Arya_Stark has the hands of a blacksmith.

name: Mordane
quote: Mordane: A noble lady does not feed dogs at her table. Sansa: She's not a dog, she's a direwolf.

name: Mordane
quote: Sansa: Arya_Stark and I were remarking on how pleased we were to have Myrcella_Baratheon with us today. Mordane: Indeed. A great honor for us all.

name: Mordane
quote: Sansa, Eddard_Stark knows best. You are not to question his decisions.

name: Mordane
quote: You had best run back to your room, little sister. Septa Mordane will surely be lurking. The longer you hide, the sterner the penance.

name: Mordane
quote: Eddard: What would Septa Mordane say if she knew you were playing with swords? Arya: I wasn't playing. I hate Septa Mordane. Eddard: That's enough. The septa is doing no more than is her duty, though gods know you have made it a struggle for the poor woman. Catelyn_Stark and I have charged her with the impossible task of making you a lady.

name: Mordane
quote: Sansa: Why did you kill her? She was god-sworn ... Joffrey: She was a traitor.

name: Mordane
quote: What was it that Septa Mordane used to tell her? A lady's armor is courtesy, that was it.

name: Moreo Tumitis
quote: Moreo: My good friend. It is so fine to see you looking better. Rodrik: Yes. I haven't wanted to die for almost two days now.

name: Moreo Tumitis
quote: Moreo: Yet first, if I may be so bold, there is the matter of the second half of the payment we agreed upon. And of course the extra silver you were so kind as to promise. Sixty stags, I believe it was. Catelyn: For the oarmen. Moreo: Oh, of a certainty. Though perhaps I should hold it for them until we return to Tyrosh. For the sake of their wives and children. If you give them the silver here, my lady, they will dice it away or spend it all for a night's pleasure. Rodrik: There are worse things to spend money on. Winter is coming. Catelyn: A man must make his own choices. They earned the silver. How they spend it is no concern of mine. Moreo: As you say, my lady.

name: Moreo Tumitis
quote: The Tyroshi knew who they were and where they were, damn him. She hoped he'd gotten a good price for the information.

name: Morgan Liddle
quote: Robin: This march was madness. More dying every day, and for what? Some girl? Morgan: Eddard_Stark Jeyne_Poole.

name: Morghaz zo Zherzyn
quote: It's a wonder he was able to crawl out of the flagon long enough to give a halfway-sensible command.

name: Morgil Hastwyck
quote: Well, the singers embroider everything, but there was a Ser Morgil and he did accuse Naerys_Targaryen of various things... probably adultery and treason with Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II), but I haven't nailed all that down yet....

name: Morgil Hastwyck
quote: Why, every child in Westeros knows how Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) championed his sister Queen Naerys against Ser Morghil's[sic] accusations.

name: Morna White Mask
quote: The warrior witch Morna removed her weirwood mask just long enough to kiss his gloved hand and swear to be his man or his woman, whichever he preferred.

name: Morrec
quote: Jyck swung a fair enough sword, but Morrec scarcely counted; he was part groom, part cook, part body servant, and no soldier.

name: Mors Umber
quote: Mors: The Greatjon's the Robb_Stark strong right hand, all know that to be true. Who better to protect the widow's lands than an Umber, and what Umber better than me? Luwin: Lady Donella_Hornwood is still grieving. Mors: I have a cure for grief under my furs.

name: Mors Umber
quote: I shall wed again if Robb_Stark commands it, but Mors Crowfood is a drunken brute, and older than my father.

name: Mors Umber
quote: Stannis: Can this man Mors be trusted? Jon: Your Grace should have him swear an oath before his heart tree.

name: Mors Umber
quote: Godry: I have slain a giant, boy. Why should I fear some flea-ridden northman who paints one on his shield? Jon: The giant was running away. Mors won't be.

name: Mors Umber
quote: An old man, huge and powerful, with a ruddy face and a shaggy white beard.

name: Mortimer Boggs
quote: Dunk: How many horses have you won? Glendon: I lost count. Mortimer Boggs still owes me one. He said he'd rather eat his horse than have Penny_Jenny bastard riding her. And he took a hammer to his armor before sending it to me. It's full of holes. I suppose I can still get something for the metal.

name: Morton Waynwood
quote: Eon: Ser Vardis_Egen is a doughty fighter. He will make short work of Bronn.Catelyn: Will he, my lord? I wonder.Morton: Women understand little of these things. Ser Vardis is a knight, sweet lady. This other fellow, well, his sort are all cowards at heart. Useful enough in a battle, with thousands of their fellows around them, but stand them up alone and the manhood leaks right out of them.

name: Mossador
quote: Missandei: He was a good brother. Daenerys: Tell me of him. Missandei: He taught me how to climb a tree when we were little. He could catch fish with his hands. Once I found him sleeping in our garden with a hundred butterflies crawling over him. He looked so beautiful that morning, this one … I mean, I loved him. Daenerys: As he loved you.

name: Mullin
quote: Maester Mullin at the Shadow Tower is more fighter than scholar, and Maester Harmune of Eastwatch is drunk more than he's sober.

name: Mully
quote: Mully: But how can I find a target? It's black as the inside of a pig's belly. Where are they? Donal: Loose enough arrows, might be you'll find a few. At least you'll make them fretful.

name: Mully
quote: My old grandmother always used to say, Summer friends will melt away like summer snows, but winter friends are friends forever.

name: Munda
quote: Tormund: That Ryk stole me daughter. Munda, me little autumn apple. Took her right out o' my tent with all four o' her brothers about. Toregg slept through it, the great lout, and Torwynd ... well, Torwynd the Tame, that says all that needs saying, don't it? The young ones gave the lad a fight, though. Jon: And Munda? Tormund: She's my own blood. She broke his lip for him and bit one ear half off, and I hear he's got so many scratches on his back he can't wear a cloak. She likes him well enough, though. And why not? He don't fight with no spear, you know. Never has. So where do you think he got that name? Har!

name: Munda
quote: Took that Ryk to husband, if you believe it. Boy's got more cock than sense, you ask me, but he treats her well enough. I told him if he ever hurt her, I'd yank his member off and beat him bloody with it.

name: Murenmure
quote: Aeron: I must pray on this. Murenmure: Pray all you wish. It does not change the law. Theon_Greyjoy is the rightful heir, and Asha_Greyjoy next. Aeron: Silence! Too long have the ironborn listened to you chain-neck maesters prating of the green lands and their laws. It is time we listened to the sea again. It is time we listened to the voice of god.

name: Murmison
quote: Septon Murmison's prayers worked miracles, but as Hand he soon had the whole realm praying for his death.

name: Mushroom
quote: What did Viserys_I_Targaryen ever have that Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aemon) did not? A little sausage? Is that all it takes to be a king? Let Mushroom rule, then. My sausage is thrice the size of his.

name: Mushroom
quote: Only I could lighten Rhaenyra_Targaryen heart. In this dark hour, I became the queen's counselor, setting aside my fool's sceptre and pointed hat to lend her all my wisdom and compassion. Unbeknownst to all, it was the jester who ruled them now, an invisible king in motley.

name: Mushroom
quote: Joffrey: Mother, what if they kill Tyraxes? Rhaenyra: They are vermin. Drunks and fools and gutter rats. One taste of dragonflame and they will run. Mushroom: Drunks they may be, but a drunken man knows not fear. Fools, aye, but a fool can kill a king. Rats, that too, but a thousand rats can bring down a bear. I saw it happen once, down there in Flea Bottom.

name: Mushroom
quote: I was myself tempted to return to my cask of flour, but thankfully I proved too small for Cregan_Stark to notice.

name: Mushroom
quote: I do confess that I was tempted. In Westeros my wit is wasted capering for Aegon_III_Targaryen, but in Braavos they would love me… too well, I fear. Every courtesan would want me, and soon or late some bravo would take umbrage at the size of my member and prick me with his little pointy dwarf-skewer. So back to the Red Keep Mushroom scurried, and more fool me.

name: Mushroom
quote: I mean to give the smallfolk peace and food and justice. If that will not suffice to win their love, let Mushroom make a progress.

name: Mya Stone
quote: I promise you, my lady, no harm will come to you. It would be my honor to take you up. I've made the dark climb a hundred times. Mychel_Redfort says my father must have been a goat.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Mychel_Redfort says I have the eyes of the owl.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Mya: My lord, will you ride down with me? Robert: I just want Sansa_Stark. You smell all stinky, like a mule. Mya: As you wish.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Alayne: You almost fell. Mya: You're mistaken. I never fall. Alayne: Almost, I said. I saw you. Weren't you afraid? Mya: I remember a man throwing me in the air when I was very little. He stands as tall as the sky, and he throws me up so high it feels as though I'm flying. We're both laughing, laughing so much that I can hardly catch a breath, and finally I laugh so hard I wet myself, but that only makes him laugh the louder. I was never afraid when he was throwing me. I knew that he would always be there to catch me. Then one day he wasn't. Men come and go. They lie, or die, or leave you. A mountain is not a man, though, and stone is a mountain's daughter. I trust my father, and I trust my mules. I won't fall. Best finish. We have a long way yet to go, and I can smell a storm.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Mya's a clever girl, and if she vows she will bring you safely to the Lady Lysa_Arryn, I believe her. She has not failed me yet.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Alayne: Mya Stone is waiting down at Sky, and she'll be hurt if you go to sleep on her. You know how much she loves you. Robert: I don't love her. She's just the mule girl.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Mya's eyes were her best feature, big and blue. She could be pretty, if she would dress up like a girl. Alayne found herself wondering whether Ser Lothor_Brune liked her best in her iron and leather, or dreamed of her gowned in lace and silk. Mya liked to say that her father had been a goat and her mother an owl, but Alayne had gotten Robert_I_Baratheon from Maddy. Yes, she thought, looking at her now, those are his eyes, and she has his hair too, the thick black hair he shared with Renly_Baratheon.

name: Mya Stone
quote: Alayne: Ser Lothor_Brune is fond of her. More than fond. Myranda: Lothor Brune? Does she know? He has no hope, poor man. Nestor_Royce tried to make a match for Mya, but she'll have none of them. She is half mule, that one. Alayne: Do you think Ser Lothor likes her as she is, in mail and leather? Or does he dream of her draped in silks and velvets? Myranda: He's a man. He dreams of her naked.

name: Mya Stone
quote: No one in the Vale was better at handling a mule, but Lordling were another matter.

name: Mya Stone's mother
quote: My mother says that hundreds of years ago, this was where the snow began. It was always white above here, and the ice never melted. I can't remember ever seeing snow this far down the mountain, but maybe it was that way once, in the olden times.

name: Mychel Redfort
quote: Catelyn: You mentioned Mychel before. Mya: Mychel's my love. Mychel Redfort. He's squire to Ser Lyn_Corbray. We're to wed as soon as he becomes a knight, next year or the year after.

name: Mychel Redfort
quote: His love she might be, but no Redfort would ever wed a bastard. His family would arrange a more suitable match for him, to a Corbray or a Waynwood or a Royce, or perhaps a daughter of some greater house outside the Vale. If Mychel Redfort laid with Mya_Stone at all, it would be on the wrong side of the sheet.

name: Mychel Redfort
quote: Mychel Redfort was the one. He used to be Lyn_Corbray's squire. A real squire, not like that loutish lad Ser Lyn's got squiring for him now. He only took that one on for coin, they say. Mychel was the best young swordsman in the Vale, and gallant ... or so poor Mya_Stone thought, till he wed Ysilla_Royce. Lord Horton_Redfort gave him no choice in the matter, I am sure, but it was still a cruel thing to do to Mya.

name: Myles Smallwood
quote: I was made to sit a horse, not a cushion.

name: Myles Smallwood
quote: Lord Butterwell_(Hand_of_the_King) was renowned for wit, Myles Smallwood for courage, Ser Otto_Hightower for learning, yet they failed as Hands, every one.

name: Myles Toyne
quote: A captain-general should be feared, by friend and foe alike. If men think me cruel, so much the better.

name: Myles Toyne
quote: Jon: Tywin_Lannister himself could have done no more. Myles: There is where you're wrong. Lord Tywin would not have bothered with a search. He would have burned that town and every living creature in it. Men and boys, babes at the breast, noble knights and holy septons, pigs and whores, rats and rebels, he would have burned them all. When the fires guttered out and only ash and cinders remained, he would have sent his men in to find the bones of Robert Baratheon. Later, when Eddard_Stark and Hoster_Tully turned up with their host, he would have offered pardons to the both of them, and they would have accepted and turned for home with their tails between their legs.

name: Myles Toyne
quote: In life, Ser Myles Toyne had been ugly as sin. His famous forebear, the dark and dashing Terrence_Toyne of whom the singers sang, had been so fair of face that even Aegon_IV_Targaryen Bethany_Bracken could not resist him; but Myles had been possessed of jug ears, a crooked jaw, and the biggest nose that Jon Connington had ever seen. When he smiled at you, though, none of that mattered.

name: Myles Toyne
quote: Soldier to the bone, Toyne was fierce but always fair, a father to his men and always generous to the exile lord Jon_Connington.

name: Myranda Royce
quote: I do need another husband. I had one once, but I killed him.

name: Myranda Royce
quote: Alayne: That must have been dreadful, my lady. Him dying. There, I mean, whilst... whilst he was... Myranda: ...fucking me? It was disconcerting, certainly. Not to mention discourteous. He did not even have the common decency to plant a child in me. Old men have weak seed. So here I am, a widow, but scarce used.

name: Myranda Royce
quote: Harrold_Hardyng could have done much worse. I daresay that he will.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: Joffrey: Don't be childish. Myrcella: We're children. We're supposed to be childish.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: She had all of Cersei_Lannister's beauty, and none of her nature.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: Sansa: A royal wheelhouse is no place for Nymeria_(direwolf). And Princess Myrcella is afraid of them, you know that. Arya: Myrcella is a little baby.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: She is so pretty, don't you think? I wish that I had curls like hers. She was made to be a queen, just like Cersei_Lannister.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: I love Myrcella as a daughter.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: The truth was, the princess was braver than Tommen_Baratheon, and brighter and more confident as well. Her wits were quicker, her courtesies more polished. Nothing daunted her, not even Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: Protect Myrcella with your life. Defend her... and her rights. Set a crown upon her head.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: Ser Arys_Oakheart was still dead, and Myrcella... I never wanted that, never. I meant the girl no harm. All I wanted was for her to be a queen. If we had not been betrayed...

name: Myrcella Baratheon
quote: Tyrion: My niece Myrcella is in Dorne, as it happens. And I have half a mind to make her a queen. Illyrio: What has this poor child done to you that you would wish her dead? Tyrion: Even a kinslayer is not required to slay all his kin. Queen her, I said. Not kill her. Illyrio: In Volantis they use a coin with a crown on one face and a death's-head on the other. Yet it is the same coin. To queen her is to kill her. Dorne might rise for Myrcella, but Dorne alone is not enough. If you are as clever as Varys insists, you know this.

name: Myriah Martell
quote: It's said Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) favors his mother. She was a Dornish princess.

name: Myriah Martell
quote: You can know a man by his friends, Egg. Daeron_II_Targaryen surrounded himself with maesters, septons, and singers. Always there were women whispering in his ear, and his court was full of Dornishmen. How not, when he had taken a Dornishwoman into his bed, and sold Daenerys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon_IV) to Maron_Martell, though it was Daemon_I_Blackfyre that she loved? Daeron bore the same name as Daeron_I_Targaryen, but when his Dornish wife gave him a son he named the child Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II), after Baelor_I_Targaryen who ever sat the Iron Throne.

name: Mysaria
quote: He also gave up a description of the whore he claimed had hired them: an older woman, foreign by her talk, cloaked and hooded, very pale. The other harlots called her Misery.

name: Mysaria
quote: Let Daemon_Targaryen slake his hungers where he will, and we shall do the same.

name: Naerys Targaryen
quote: Naerys: I have done my duty by you, and given you an Daeron_II_Targaryen. I beg you, let us live henceforth as brother and sister.Aegon: That is what we are doing.

name: Naerys Targaryen
quote: I love Joffrey_Baratheon as much as Queen Naerys loved Prince Aemon the Dragonknight.

name: Naerys Targaryen
quote: Arianne: And the Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II)? The noblest knight who ever lived, you said, and he took his queen to bed and got her with child. Arys: I will not believe that. The tale of Prince Aemon's treason with Queen Naerys was only that, a tale, a lie his Aegon_IV_Targaryen told when he wished to set his Daeron_II_Targaryen aside in favor of his Daemon_I_Blackfyre.

name: Naerys Targaryen
quote: Why, every child in Westeros knows how Prince Aemon the Dragonknight championed his sister Queen Naerys against Ser Morgil_Hastwyck[sic] accusations.

name: Nan
quote: Bran: I hate your stupid stories. Old Nan: My stories? No, my little lord, not mine. The stories are, before me and after me, before you too. Bran: I don't care whose stories they are, I hate them. Old Nan: I know a story about a boy who hated stories.

name: Nan
quote: Bran: My favorites were the scary ones. Old Nan: Oh, my sweet summer child, what do you know of fear?

name: Nan
quote: Fear is for the winter, my little lord, when the snows fall a hundred feet deep and the ice wind comes howling out of the north. Fear is for the long night, when the sun hides its face for years at a time, and little children are born and live and die all in darkness while the direwolves grow gaunt and hungry, and the white walkers move through the woods.

name: Nan
quote: Stories wait, my little lord, and when you come back to them, why, there they are. Visitors are not so patient, and ofttimes they bring stories of their own.

name: Nan
quote: Dragons. It be dragons, boy.

name: Nan
quote: Beyond the gates the monsters live, and the giants and the ghouls, but they cannot pass so long as the Wall stands strong. So go to sleep, my little Brandon, my baby boy. You needn't fear. There are no monsters here.

name: Nan
quote: Beyond the Wall the monsters live, the giants and the ghouls, the stalking shadows and the dead that walk, but they cannot pass so long as the Wall stands strong and the men of the Night's Watch are true. So go to sleep, my little Brandon, my baby boy, and dream sweet dreams. There are no monsters here.

name: Nan
quote: She had lived so long, Catelyn_Stark had told him once, that all the Brandon Starks had become one person in her head.

name: Nan
quote: Bran: Do you think the ironmen killed her? She never hurt no one, not even Theon_Greyjoy. She just told stories. Theon wouldn't hurt someone like that. Would he? Jojen: Some people hurt others just because they can. Meera: And it wasn't Theon who did the killing at Winterfell. Too many of the dead were ironmen. Remember Old Nan's stories, Bran. Remember the way she told them, the sound of her voice. So long as you do that, part of her will always be alive in you.

name: Nan
quote: Sometimes Old Nan would tell the same story she'd told before, but we never minded, if it was a good story. Old stories are like old friends, she used to say. You have to visit them from time to time.

name: Narbert Grandison
quote: Jon: Wun Wun is a guest of the Night's Watch, as you are. Narbert: I had been told all the giants were dead. Jon: Almost all.

name: Narbo
quote: Narbo was good at picking pockets, not so good at picking whores.

name: Nate
quote: Arianne: He is twice your age. A serving man. He cleans up birdshit for the maester. Elia, what were you thinking?Elia: We were only kissing. I’m not going to marry him.

name: Ned Bean
quote: I would have hanged him, but I am loath to waste good hempen rope on a bean.

name: Nestor Royce
quote: I will not say I had not hoped for this. Whilst Lord Jon_Arryn ruled the realm as Hand, it fell to me to rule the Vale for him. I did all that he required of me and asked nothing for myself. But by the gods, I earned this!

name: Nestor Royce
quote: Lysa_Arryn often called Lord Nestor a rock, though I do not think she meant it as a compliment. She called Albar_Royce a clod.

name: Nestor Royce
quote: Our rock is a Royce, which is to say he is overproud and prickly. Had I asked him his price, he would have swelled up like an angry toad at the slight upon his honor. But this way... the man is not utterly stupid, but the lies I served him were sweeter than the truth. He wants to believe that Lysa_Arryn valued him above her other bannermen. One of those others is Yohn_Royce, after all, and Nestor is very much aware that he was born of the lesser branch of House Royce. He wants more for Albar_Royce. Men of honor will do things for their children that they would never consider doing for themselves.

name: Nettles
quote: A skinny brown girl on a skinny brown dragon.

name: Nettles
quote: She is a common thing, with the stink of sorcery upon her. Daemon_Targaryen would ne'er lay with such a low creature. You need only look at her to know she has no drop of dragon's blood in her. It was with spells that she bound a dragon to her, and she has done the same with my lord husband.

name: Nettles
quote: The girl is but a child, however foul her treasons.

name: Nettles
quote: Daemon_Targaryen is more than fond of this brown child, and his dragon is close at hand. A wise lord would kill them both, lest the prince burn Maidenpool in his wroth.

name: Nettles
quote: High above the town, Nettles turned her dragon toward the Bay of Crabs, and vanished in the morning mists, never to be seen again at court or castle.

name: Night's King
quote: He had been the thirteenth man to lead the Night's Watch, she said; a warrior who knew no fear. 'And that was the fault in him,' she would add, 'for all men must know fear.'

name: Night's King
quote: Night's King was only a man by light of day, Old Nan would always say, but the night was his to rule.

name: Night's King
quote: ... in the books he is a legendary figure, akin to Lann_the_Clever and Brandon_the_Builder, and no more likely to have survived to the present day than they have.

name: Nightingale (courtesan)
quote: If they ask who is the most beautiful woman in the world, say the Nightingale or else they'll challenge you.

name: Noho Dimittis
quote: Ser Meryn_Trant, show the noble Noho Dimittis to the door.

name: Nolla
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Goodwife Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca_the_Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla— Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they? Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Norbert Vance
quote: Norbert: I have known Brynden_Tully since we were squires together, in service to Lord Darry. If it please my lords, let me go and speak with him and try to make him understand the hopelessness of his position. Clement: He understands that well enough. The man's not bloody stupid, Norbert. He has eyes ... and too much sense to yield to such as these.

name: Notch
quote: Notch: Let me feather the dog a few times, discourage him some. Beric: Sandor_Clegane won his life beneath the hollow hill. I will not rob him of it.

name: Nute
quote: The strong have always taken from the weak. Thralls or slaves, it makes no matter. Their men could not defend them, so now they are ours, to do with as we will.

name: Nute
quote: Nute: The Euron_Greyjoy sends us forth to face the longships, whilst his own men take the castles and the villages and grab all the loot and women. What has he left for us? Victarion: We have the glory. Nute: Glory is good, but gold is better.

name: Nute
quote: Euron: And rise, Nute the Barber, Lord of Oakenshield. Nute: A lord? Victarion: Refuse him! Nute: Refuse him? Lands and lordship? Will you make me a lord?

name: Nute
quote: Nute the Barber can shave a man with a thrown axe from twenty yards away.

name: Nute
quote: By raising him to Lord of Oakenshield, Euron_Greyjoy made Victarion's best man his own.

name: Nymeria
quote: This is a war we cannot hope to win.

name: Nymeria
quote: Our wanderings are at an end. We have found a new home, and here we shall live and die.

name: Nymeria
quote: That is Nymeria's star, burning bright, and that milky band behind her, those are ten thousand ships. She burned as bright as any man, and so shall I.

name: Nymeria
quote: Myrcella: I thought you were the Rhoynar. You Dornishmen, I mean. Arianne: We are in part, Your Grace. Nymeria's blood is in me, along with that of Mors_Martell, the Dornish lord she married. On the day they wed, Nymeria fired her ships, so her people would understand that there could be no going back.

name: Nymeria
quote: We will build ten thousand ships as Nymeria once did and take sail with all our people to the land beyond the sunset.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: She was no little girl in the dream; she was a wolf, huge and powerful, and when she emerged from beneath the trees in front of them and bared her teeth in a low rumbling growl, she could smell the rank stench of fear from horse and man alike.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: She dreamed of wolves most every night. A great pack of wolves, with her at the head. She was bigger than any of them, stronger, swifter, faster. She could outrun horses and outfight lions. When she bared her teeth even men would run from her, her belly was never empty long, and her fur kept her warm even when the wind was blowing cold. And her brothers and sisters were with her, many and more of them, fierce and terrible and hers. They would never leave her.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: Rise. Rise and eat and run with us.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: She had yellow eyes. When they caught the sunlight, they gleamed like two golden coins. Arya had named her after Nymeria of the Rhoyne, who had led her people across the narrow sea.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: Arya: Jory_Cassel promised not to tell. Eddard: Jory kept his word. There are some things I do not need to be told. Even a blind man could see that wolf would never have left you willingly. Arya: We had to throw rocks. I told her to run, to go be free, that I didn't want her anymore. There were other wolves for her to play with, we heard them howling, and Jory_Cassel said the woods were full of game, so she'd have deer to hunt. Only she kept following and finally we had to throw rocks. I hit her twice. She whined and looked at me and I felt so 'shamed, but it was right, wasn't it? Cersei_Lannister would have killed her. Eddard: It was right. And even the lie was ... not without honor.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: There's this great pack, hundreds of them, mankillers. The one that leads them is a she-wolf, a bitch from the seventh hell.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: They say the pack is led by a monstrous she-wolf, a stalking shadow grim and grey and huge. They will tell you that she has been known to bring aurochs down all by herself, that no trap nor snare can hold her, that she fears neither steel nor fire, slays any wolf that tries to mount her, and devours no other flesh but man.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: I dreamed I was a wolf again. She could remember the smells best of all: trees and earth, her pack brothers, the scents of horse and deer and man, each different from the others, and the sharp acrid tang of fear, always the same. Some nights the wolf dreams were so vivid that she could hear her brothers howling even as she woke, and once Brea had claimed that she was growling in her sleep as she thrashed beneath the covers. She thought that was some stupid lie till Talea said it too.

name: Nymeria (direwolf)
quote: Could Ser Dermot_of_the_Rainwood direwolf be the same beast that had mauled Joffrey_Baratheon near the crossroads?

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: You know the Fowler words? Let Me Soar! That is all I ask of you. Let me soar, Uncle.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: Nymeria: Obara_Sand would make Oldtown our father's funeral pyre, but I am not so greedy. Four lives will suffice for me. Lord Tywin_Lannister golden twins, as payment for Elia_Martell children. The old lion, for Elia herself. And last of all Tommen_Baratheon, for Oberyn_Martell.Doran: The boy has never wronged us.Nymeria: Only royal blood can wash out my father's murder.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: Ellaria: Where does it end?Nymeria: It ends in blood, as it began. It ends when Casterly Rock is cracked open, so the sun can shine on the maggots and the worms within. It ends with the utter ruin of Tywin_Lannister and all his works.Ellaria: The man died at the hand of Tyrion_Lannister. What more could you wish?Nymeria: I could wish that he died at my hand. If he had, his dying would not have been so easy.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: Doran: We need a voice in council, an ear at court. Be careful, though. King's Landing is a pit of snakes.Nymeria: Why, Uncle, I love snakes.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: Nymeria was least dangerous when nearly naked. Elsewise she was sure to have a dozen blades concealed about her person.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: Hotah studied each of them in turn. Obara_Sand, rusted nails and boiled leather, with her angry, close-set eyes and rat-brown hair. Nymeria, languid, elegant, olive-skinned, her long black braid bound up in red-gold wire. Tyene_Sand, blue-eyed and blond, a child-woman with her soft hands and little giggles.

name: Nymeria Sand
quote: The Lady Nym. But no lady, if even half of what Qyburn reports is true. A bastard daughter of the Red Viper, near as notorious as her father and intent on claiming the council seat that Prince Oberyn_Martell himself had occupied so briefly.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Doran: Obara, look at the children, if it please you.Obara: It does not please me. I'd get more pleasure from driving my spear into Lord Tywin_Lannister belly. I'll make him sing 'The Rains of Castamere' as I pull his bowels out and look for gold.

name: Obara Sand
quote: The day Oberyn_Martell came to claim me, Obara_Sand's_mother did not wish for me to go. 'She is a girl,' she said, 'and I do not think that she is yours. I had a thousand other men.' He tossed his spear at my feet and gave my mother the back of his hand across the face, so she began to weep. 'Girl or boy, we fight our battles,' he said, 'but the gods let us choose our weapons.' He pointed to the spear, then to my mother's tears, and I picked up the spear. 'I told you she was mine,' my father said, and took me. My mother drank herself to death within the year. They say that she was weeping as she died. Let me use the spear; I ask no more.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Give me back my spear, Uncle. Cersei_Lannister sent us a head. We should send her back a bag of them.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Obara Sand always walked too fast. She is chasing after something she can never catch, Doran_Martell had told Arianne_Martell once, in the captain's hearing.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Quick and strong as she was, the woman was no match for him, he knew ... but she did not, and he had no wish to see her blood upon the pale pink marble.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Doran: Obara would have me go to war.Nymeria: Yes, she wants to set the torch to Oldtown. She hates that city as much as Sarella_Sand loves it.

name: Obara Sand
quote: Hotah studied each of them in turn. Obara, rusted nails and boiled leather, with her angry, close-set eyes and rat-brown hair. Nymeria_Sand, languid, elegant, olive-skinned, her long black braid bound up in red-gold wire. Tyene_Sand, blue-eyed and blond, a child-woman with her soft hands and little giggles.

name: Obara Sand's mother
quote: The day Oberyn_Martell came to claim me, my mother did not wish for me to go. 'She is a girl,' she said, 'and I do not think that she is yours. I had a thousand other men.' He tossed his spear at my feet and gave my mother the back of his hand across the face, so she began to weep. 'Girl or boy, we fight our battles,' he said, 'but the gods let us choose our weapons.' He pointed to the spear, then to my mother's tears, and I picked up the spear. 'I told you she was mine,' my father said, and took me. My mother drank herself to death within the year. They say that she was weeping as she died.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: Tyrion: Did you tire of your paramour on the road?Oberyn: Never. We share too much. We have never shared a beautiful blonde woman, however, and Ellaria_Sand is curious. Do you know of Cersei_Lannister?

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: Ellaria: You're going to fight Gregor_Clegane?Oberyn: I'm going to kill that.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: Elia_Martell, Princess of Dorne, you raped her. You murdered her. You killed her children.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: If you die before you say Elia_Martell, I will hunt you through all seven hells.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: Oberyn has always been half-mad.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: The man's infamous, and not just for poisoning his sword. He has more bastards than Robert_I_Baratheon, and beds with boys as well.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: He knew the man only by reputation ... but the reputation was fearsome.

name: Oberyn Martell
quote: Oberyn was ever the viper. Deadly, dangerous, unpredictable. No man dared tread on him.

name: Old Pate
quote: Are you Old Pate's daughter, then? A sister? A wife? Tell me no lies, Squab. I buried Old Pate myself, right there under that willow where you were hiding, and you don't have his look.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: All men are fools, if truth be told, but the ones in motley are more amusing than ones with crowns.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: There is entirely too much tut-tutting in this realm, if you ask me. All these kings would do a deal better if they put down their swords and listened to their mothers.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: Hush, Alerie, don't take that tone with me. And don't call me Mother. If I'd given birth to you, I'm sure I'd remember. I'm only to blame for your husband, the Mace_Tyrell.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: Night falls for all of us in the end, and too soon for some. You would know that more than most, poor child. You've had your share of grief, I know. We are sorry for your losses.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: Sansa: The Queen of Thorns, she's called. Isn't that right? Loras: It is. You'd best not use that name in her presence, though, or you're like to get pricked.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: Why, she's just the littlest bit of a thing. There was nothing the least bit thorny about her.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: Tyrion was beginning to wonder whether Lord Luthor_Tyrell had ridden off that cliff intentionally.

name: Olenna Redwyne
quote: The old woman is not boring, though, I'll grant her that. A fearsome old harridan, and not near as frail as she pretends.

name: Ollo Lophand
quote: Ollo Lophand now, he was talking about sailing back to Tyrosh, where he claimed men didn't lose their hands for a bit of honest thievery, nor get sent off to freeze their life away for being found in bed with some knight's wife.

name: Ollo Lophand
quote: He went from man to man, sniffing, before settling on the biggest, a faceless thing who clutched black iron in one hand. His other hand was missing, severed at the wrist, the stump bound up in leather. Blood flowed thick and sluggish from the slash across his throat. The wolf lapped at it with his tongue, licked the ragged eyeless ruin of his nose and cheeks, then buried his muzzle in his neck and tore it open, gulping down a gobbet of sweet meat. No flesh had ever tasted half as good.

name: Olyvar Frey
quote: Robb: I'd hoped to ask Olyvar to squire for me when we march north, but I do not see him here. Would he be at the other feast? Ryman: Olyvar? No. Not Olyvar. Gone ... gone from the castles. Duty.

name: One-eyed crone
quote: The old woman trembled and looked at Dany almost as if she were afraid.

name: Oppo
quote: His blood is on Cersei_Lannister hands, and the hands of the brutes who killed him.

name: Orell
quote: The bird hates you, Jon Snow. And well he might. He was a man, before you killed him.

name: Orell
quote: Can a bird hate? Jon had slain the wilding Orell, but some part of the man remained within the eagle. The golden eyes looked out on him with cold malevolence.

name: Orell
quote: Bag o' Bones, call off your hellcrow!

name: Orivel
quote: Jaime: Gyles_Greycloak? Orivel the Open-Handed? Loras: Gyles was a traitor, Orivel a coward. Men who shamed the white cloak.

name: Ormond
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond. Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca_the_Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla— Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they? Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Ormond
quote: They was king's men burned our village. Before that, some other king's men took our sheep. They were for a different king, but that didn't matter none to our sheep. King's men killed Harsley and Ser Ormond, and raped Lacey till she died.

name: Ormund Wylde
quote: Ormund: We should remain here until the weather breaks. Here at least we have some shelter, and there are fish in the lakes. Robin: Too few fish and too many fishermen.

name: Ormund Wylde
quote: Asha had heard rumors that some of the men-at-arms were wagering on which of the great knights and lords would be the next to die. Ser Ormund had emerged as a clear favorite.

name: Orton Merryweather
quote: Pycelle: A war in the Vale would be most tragic. Orton: War? Petyr_Baelish is a most amusing man, but one does not fight a war with witticisms.

name: Orton Merryweather
quote: Stannis_Baratheon is more cunning than we knew. Your Grace is clever to have seen through his ploy.

name: Orton Merryweather
quote: Cersei: I have no doubt that you are more able than Ser Harys_Swyft. Will you consent to serve? Orton: I ... yes, of course. Your Grace does me great honor. Cersei: You have served me ably as justiciar, my lord. And will continue to do so through these ... trying times ahead.

name: Orton Merryweather
quote: Cersei: If danger excites you so, why wed Lord Orton? We all love him, it is true, but still ... Taena: My lord is more bountiful than dangerous, this is so. Yet ... I hope Your Grace will not think the less of me, but I did not come a maid entire to Orton's bed.

name: Orton Merryweather
quote: Petyr_Baelish had once remarked that the horn of plenty that adorned House Merryweather's arms suited Lord Orton admirably, since he had carrot-colored hair, a nose as bulbous as a beetroot, and pease porridge for wits.

name: Orwyle
quote: George noted that his account was written up while he sat in a prison cell uncertain if he was going to end up executed or not and wanting to lay down "his side" of the story to try and paint himself in the best possible light. (Yep, Orwyle actually has quite an interesting little story that unfortunately we really had trim almost entirely out of the world book. Definitely will be one of the many highlights of Fire and Blood, IMO.)

name: Orys Baratheon
quote: The King's Hand should have a hand. I will not have men speaking of the King's Stump.

name: Orys Baratheon
quote: Wyl_of_Wyl took my hand. I claim yours as repayment.

name: Orys Baratheon
quote: These are the only hands your bastard shall have of me.

name: Orys Baratheon
quote: My shield, my stalwart, my strong right hand.

name: Osfryd Kettleblack
quote: Amiable rogues all three, the brothers were in truth much more skilled at deceit than they'd ever been at bloodletting. Cersei_Lannister had managed to buy herself three hollow drums; they would make all the fierce booming sounds she required, but there was nothing inside.

name: Osfryd Kettleblack
quote: Sansa: Won't your guards protect us? Cersei: And who will protect us from my guards? Loyal sellswords are rare as virgin whores.

name: Osfryd Kettleblack
quote: Tyrion: The Kettleblacks were supposed to be ours. Bronn: They were, so long as I could give them two of your pennies for every one they had from Cersei_Lannister, but now she's raised the stakes. Osney_Kettleblack and Osfryd were made knights after the battle, same as me. Gods know what for, no one saw them do any fighting.

name: Osfryd Kettleblack
quote: When Tyrion_Lannister sent off her guards, Cersei_Lannister had Ser Lancel_Lannister hire sellswords for her. Lancel found her the Kettleblacks, which delighted your little lord husband, since the lads were in his pay through his man Bronn. But it was me who told Oswell_Kettleblack to get his sons to King's Landing when I learned that Bronn was looking for swords. Three hidden daggers, Alayne, now perfectly placed.

name: Osfryd Kettleblack
quote: Osfryd was the middle Kettleblack, quieter than his siblings, more apt to scowl than smile. And crueler as well, if the tales are true.

name: Osha
quote: Bran: Tell me what you meant, about hearing the gods. Osha: You asked them and they're answering. Open your ears, listen, you'll hear. Bran: It's only the wind. Osha: Who do you think sends the wind, if not the gods? They see you, boy. They hear you talking. That rustling, that's them talking back.

name: Osha
quote: Bran: Are there truly giants beyond the Wall? Osha: Giants and worse than giants, Lordling. I tried to tell Robb_Stark when he asked his questions, him and Luwin and that smiley boy Theon_Greyjoy.

name: Osha
quote: Bran: But the children of the forest are all gone now, you said. Osha: Here, they are. North of the Wall, things are different. That's where the children went, and the giants, and the other old races. Luwin: Woman, by rights you ought to be dead or in chains. The Starks have treated you more gently than you deserve. It is unkind to repay them for their kindness by filling the boys' heads with folly.

name: Osha
quote: Bran: You've got a lot of scars. Osha: Every one hard earned.

name: Osha
quote: Theon: I need fighters, not kitchen sluts. Osha: It was Robb_Stark put me in the kitchens. For the best part of a year, I've been left to scour kettles, scrape grease, and warm the straw for Gage. I've had a bellyful of it. Put a spear in my hand again. Stygg: I got a spear for you right here. Osha: You keep that soft pink thing. I'll have me the wood and iron.

name: Osha
quote: Hodor must stay with Bran_Stark, to be his legs. I will take Rickon_Stark with me.

name: Osha
quote: Even in irons, the wildling moved quiet as a cat.

name: Osha
quote: Her hair was growing out, brown and shaggy. It made her look more womanly, that and the simple dress of brown roughspun they'd given her when they took her mail and leather.

name: Osha
quote: The wildling woman could give Old Nan lessons in telling tales, I think.

name: Osha
quote: I should have known better than to trust that one. She's as unnatural as Asha_Greyjoy. Even their names sound alike.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Do as you're told, sweetling, it won't be so bad. Wolves are supposed to be brave, aren't they?

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Osmund: It was the day they gave me the white cloak, my lords. Joffrey_Baratheon said to me, 'Good Ser Osmund, guard me well, for Tyrion_Lannister loves me not. He means to be king in my place.' Tyrion: Liar!

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Jaime: Ser Osmund. I do not know you. I find that curious. I've fought in tourneys, mêlées, and battles throughout the Seven Kingdoms. I know of every hedge knight, freerider, and upjumped squire of any skill who has ever presumed to break a lance in the lists. So how is it that I have never heard of you, Ser Osmund? Osmund: That I couldn't say, my lord. I'm a soldier, though, not no tourney knight.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Amiable rogues all three, the brothers were in truth much more skilled at deceit than they'd ever been at bloodletting. Cersei_Lannister had managed to buy herself three hollow drums; they would make all the fierce booming sounds she required, but there was nothing inside.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Cersei_Lannister had insisted that Joffrey_Baratheon strip Boros_Blount of his white cloak on the grounds of treason and cowardice. And now she replaces him with another man just as hollow.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Of late Ser Osmund had taken Sandor_Clegane's place by Joffrey_Baratheon's side, and Sansa had heard the women at the washing well saying he was as strong as the Hound, only younger and faster. If that was so, she wondered why she had never once heard of these Kettleblacks before Ser Osmund was named to the Kingsguard.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Varys: And the eldest, Ser Osmund of the Kingsguard, dreams of certain other... favors... as well. You can match the queen coin for coin, I have no doubt, but she has a second purse that is quite inexhaustible. Tyrion: Are you suggesting that Cersei_Lannister fucking Osmund Kettleblack? Varys: Oh, dear me, no, that would be dreadfully dangerous, don't you think? No, the queen only hints... perhaps on the morrow, or when the wedding's done... and then a smile, a whisper, a ribald jest... a breast brushing lightly against his sleeve as they pass... and yet it seems to serve. But what would a eunuch know of such things?

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: What was Cersei_Lannister thinking when she gave this one a white cloak?

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: When Tyrion_Lannister sent off her guards, Cersei_Lannister had Ser Lancel_Lannister hire sellswords for her. Lancel found her the Kettleblacks, which delighted your little lord husband, since the lads were in his pay through his man Bronn. But it was me who told Oswell_Kettleblack to get his sons to King's Landing when I learned that Bronn was looking for swords. Three hidden daggers, Alayne, now perfectly placed.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Osmund has become especially unreliable since he joined the Kingsguard. That white cloak does things to a man, I find. Even a man like him.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: Cersei_Lannister is a lying whore, she's been fucking Lancel_Lannister and Osmund Kettleblack and probably Moon_Boy for all I know.

name: Osmund Kettleblack
quote: As fond as she was of Osmund, at times he seemed as slow as Robert_I_Baratheon. I hope his sword is quicker than his wits. The day may come that Tommen_Baratheon has some need of it.

name: Osmynd
quote: Each of the Seven embodies all of the Seven.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Cersei: Is that your wish, to join your brother Osmund_Kettleblack in our Kingsguard? Osney: I'd rather be the queen's guard, if it please Your Grace. Cersei: You have a bold tongue, ser. You will make me forget myself again. Osney: Good. My sweet queen. Cersei: You are a wicked man, and no true knight, I think.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Cersei: Bed Margaery_Tyrell and kill Jon_Snow and I am yours. Do you have the courage? Osney: I am your man.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Usually if I lie about some woman, it's me saying how I never fucked them and them saying how I did. This... I never lied to no High Septon before. I think you go to some hell for that. One o' the bad ones.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: You can keep the crown on. I like you in the crown.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: High Sparrow: Ser Osney, did you have carnal knowledge of Margaery_Tyrell? Osney: Aye. Cersei_Lannister. She's the queen I fucked, the one sent me to kill High_Septon_(Tyrion's).

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Amiable rogues all three, the brothers were in truth much more skilled at deceit than they'd ever been at bloodletting. Cersei_Lannister had managed to buy herself three hollow drums; they would make all the fierce booming sounds she required, but there was nothing inside.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Tyrion: The Kettleblacks were supposed to be ours. Bronn: They were, so long as I could give them two of your pennies for every one they had from Cersei_Lannister, but now she's raised the stakes. Osney and Osfryd_Kettleblack were made knights after the battle, same as me. Gods know what for, no one saw them do any fighting.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: When Tyrion_Lannister sent off her guards, Cersei_Lannister had Ser Lancel_Lannister hire sellswords for her. Lancel found her the Kettleblacks, which delighted your little lord husband, since the lads were in his pay through his man Bronn. But it was me who told Oswell_Kettleblack to get his sons to King's Landing when I learned that Bronn was looking for swords. Three hidden daggers, Alayne, now perfectly placed.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: One good night for one good knight. You did High_Septon_(Tyrion's), and you had your reward.

name: Osney Kettleblack
quote: Cersei: Your brother Osney. How good a sword is he? Osmund: Good. You've seen him. He's not as strong as me nor Osfryd_Kettleblack, but he's quick to the kill.

name: Ossifer Lipps
quote: Petyr_Baelish daughter. And full as lovely as the tales told of her, I see.

name: Ossifer Lipps
quote: Ossifer Lipps is the dullest knight in the Vale, but Uther_Shett aspires to his laurels. I am praying they fight a duel for my hand, and kill each other.

name: Ossifer Plumm
quote: Ben: Well, there was some old Plumm in the Sunset Kingdoms who wed Elaena_Targaryen. My grandmama told me the tale. He lived in King Aegon_IV_Targaryen day. Daenerys: Which King Aegon? Five Aegons have ruled in Westeros. Ben: Five, were there? Well, that's a confusion. I could not give you a number, my queen. This old Plumm was a lord, though, must have been a famous fellow in his day, the talk of all the land. The thing was, begging your royal pardon, he had himself a cock six foot long. Daenerys: You mean inches, I think. Ben: Feet. If it was inches, who'd want to talk about it, now?

name: Ossifer Plumm
quote: Jaime: There can be no danger of a consummation. Tommen_Baratheon is much too young. Cersei: And Ossifer Plumm was much too dead, but that did not stop him fathering Viserys_Plumm, did it?

name: Oswell Kettleblack
quote: You could turn King's Landing upside down and not find a single man with a mockingbird sewn over his heart, but that does not mean I am friendless. Oswell, come up here and let the Lady Sansa have a look at you.

name: Oswell Kettleblack
quote: Sansa: I never saw Oswell before I got into his boat, I'm certain. Oswell: No, but m'lady might of met my three sons. Sansa: Kettleblack! You're a Kettleblack!

name: Oswell Kettleblack
quote: When Tyrion_Lannister sent off her guards, Cersei_Lannister had Ser Lancel_Lannister hire sellswords for her. Lancel found her the Kettleblacks, which delighted your little lord husband, since the lads were in his pay through his man Bronn. But it was me who told Oswell to get his sons to King's Landing when I learned that Bronn was looking for swords. Three hidden daggers, Alayne, now perfectly placed.

name: Oswell Kettleblack
quote: Sansa: Oswell... my lord, Oswell rowed me from King's Landing the night that I escaped. He must know who I am. Petyr: If he's half as clever as a sheep pellet, you would think so. Ser Lothor_Brune knows as well. But Oswell has been in my service a long time, and Brune is close-mouthed by nature. Kettleblack watches Brune for me, and Brune watches Kettleblack.

name: Oswell Whent
quote: Eddard: I looked for you on the Trident. Gerold: We were not there. Oswell: Woe to the Usurper if we had been.

name: Oswell Whent
quote: I learned from the Gerold_Hightower and Barristan_Selmy. I learned from Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, who could have slain all five of you with his left hand while he was taking a piss with the right. I learned from Prince Lewyn_Martell and Ser Oswell Whent and Ser Jonothor_Darry, good men every one.

name: Othell Yarwyck
quote: Othell: Some of the abandoned castles are scarce more than ruins. Stannis: Ruins can be rebuilt. Othell: Rebuilt? But who will do the work? Stannis: That is my concern. I shall require a list from you, detailing the present state of every castle and what might be required to restore it. I mean to have them all garrisoned again within the year, and nightfires burning before their gates.

name: Othell Yarwyck
quote: Jon: Othell, how goes the work at the Nightfort? I have had a letter from Ser Axell_Florent, who styles himself the Queen's Hand. He tells me that Queen Selyse_Florent is not pleased with her quarters at Eastwatch-by-the-Sea and wishes to move into Stannis_Baratheon new seat at once. Will that be possible? Othell: We've got most of the keep restored and put a roof back on the kitchens. She'd need food and furnishings and firewood, mind you, but it might serve. Not so many comforts as Eastwatch, to be sure. And a long way from the ships, should Her Grace wish to leave us, but … aye, she could live there, though it will be years before the place looks a proper castle. Sooner if I had more builders. Jon: I could offer you Wun_Weg_Wun_Dar_Wun.

name: Othell Yarwyck
quote: Bad and worse and worst makes a beggar's choice. My lord had as well present us with a pack of wolves and ask which we'd like to tear our throats out.

name: Othell Yarwyck
quote: Cotter_Pyke and Ser Denys_Mallister are no fools, sire. They're good men, and capable. Othell Yarwyck as well, in his own way. Lord Jeor_Mormont trusted each of them.

name: Othell Yarwyck
quote: Othell Yarwyck was not a man of strong convictions, except when it came to wood and stone and mortar.

name: Otho Bracken
quote: Duncan: Ser Otho, all know you for a great champion. Join us, I beg you. In the names of the old gods and the new. My cause is just. Otho: That may be, but it is your cause, not mine. I know you not, boy.

name: Othor
quote: And might be I'm a fool, but I don’t know that Othor never had no blue eyes afore.

name: Otto Hightower
quote: Better Rhaenyra_Targaryen than Daemon_Targaryen.

name: Otto Hightower
quote: Make no mistake, should Rhaenyra_Targaryen ever sit the Iron Throne, it will be Daemon_Targaryen who rules us, a king consort as cruel and unforgiving as Maegor_I_Targaryen ever was. My own head will be the first cut off, I do not doubt, but your queen, Alicent_Hightower, will soon follow.

name: Otto Hightower
quote: Otto: Do them no violence, unless they resist. Such men as bend the knee and swear fealty to King Aegon_II_Targaryen shall suffer no harm at our hands. Orwyle: And those who will not? Jasper: Are traitors, and must die a traitor's death.

name: Otto Hightower
quote: You only lost one eye. How could you be so blind?

name: Otto Hightower
quote: Thrones are won with swords, not quills. Spill blood, not ink.

name: Otto Hightower
quote: Lord Butterwell_(Hand_of_the_King) was renowned for wit, Myles_Smallwood for courage, Ser Otto Hightower for learning, yet they failed as Hands, every one.

name: Ottyn Wythers
quote: This wet has soaked my bones, and even my saddle sores complain of saddle sores.

name: Ottyn Wythers
quote: We are the shield that guards the realms of men. You do not throw away your shield for no good purpose.

name: Owain Bourney
quote: Once a turncloak, ever a turncloak.

name: Owen the Oaf
quote: Owen: I had a dream that the king had come. Maester Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) sent a raven, and King Robert_I_Baratheon came with all his strength. I dreamed I saw his golden banners. Jon: That would be a welcome sight to see, Owen.

name: Owen the Oaf
quote: And through the smoke another wedge of armored riders came, on barded horses. Floating above them were the largest banners yet, royal standards as big as sheets; a yellow one with long pointed tongues that showed a flaming heart, and another like a sheet of beaten gold, with a black stag prancing and rippling in the wind. Robert_I_Baratheon, Jon thought for one mad moment, remembering poor Owen, but when the trumpets blew again and the knights charged, the name they cried was "Stannis_Baratheon! Stannis! STANNIS!"

name: Owen Bush
quote: Maegor: Chain Viserys_Targaryen_(son_of_Aenys_I) in a black cell and question him sharply. Ask him where Alyssa_Velaryon has gone.Owen: He may not know.Maegor: Then let him die. Perhaps the bitch will turn up for his funeral.

name: Owen Merryweather
quote: Tywin_Lannister claimed the only thing Merryweather was good for was chuckling at Aerys_II_Targaryen witticisms. His lordship chuckled himself right into exile, as I recall.

name: Owen Merryweather
quote: Replacing Tywin_Lannister with Owen Merryweather had proved to be akin to replacing a destrier with a donkey, to be sure, but Owen had been an old done man when Aerys_II_Targaryen raised him, amiable if ineffectual.

name: Oznak zo Pahl
quote: I knew a man, Scarb, this Oznak cut his liver out. Claimed to be defending a lady’s honor, he did, said Scarb had raped her with his eyes. How do you rape a wench with eyes, I ask you? But his uncle is the richest man in Meereen and his father commands the city guard, so I had to run like a rat before he killed me too.

name: Palla
quote: Farlen: And why would I care to hunt down my own trueborn lords, and babes at that? Theon: I am your trueborn lord now, and the man who keeps Palla safe. Farlen: Aye, m'lord.

name: Palla
quote: Theon: Do as you say and you'll not find me ungrateful. You can name your own reward. "Reek": Well, m'lord, I haven't had no woman since I was with Lord Ramsay_Snow. I've had my eye on that Palla, and I hear she's already been had, so... Theon: Two hundred men and she's yours. But a man less and you can go back to fucking pigs.

name: Palla
quote: So you'd offer me a kennel girl for my good service, is that the way of it?

name: Patchface
quote: The shadows come to dance, my lord, dance my lord, dance my lord. The shadows come to stay, my lord, stay my lord, stay my lord.

name: Patchface
quote: Under the sea, smoke rises in bubbles, and flames burn green and blue and black. I know, I know, oh, oh, oh.

name: Patchface
quote: Fool's blood, king's blood, blood on the maiden's thigh, but chains for the guests and chains for the bridegroom, aye, aye, aye.

name: Patchface
quote: Under the sea the old fish eat the young fish. Up here the young fish teach the old fish.

name: Patchface
quote: In the dark the dead are dancing. I know, I know, oh oh oh.

name: Patchface
quote: Under the sea the mermen feast on starfish soup, and all the serving men are crabs.

name: Patchface
quote: The crow, the crow. Under the sea the crows are white as snow, I know, I know, oh, oh, oh.

name: Patchface
quote: Malegorn: Lord Snow, who will lead this ranging? Jon: Are you offering yourself, ser? Malegorn: Do I look so foolish? Patchface: I will lead it! We will march into the sea and out again. Under the waves we will ride seahorses, and mermaids will blow seashells to announce our coming, oh, oh, oh.

name: Patchface
quote: We have found the most splendid fool. Only a boy, yet nimble as a monkey and witty as a dozen courtiers. He juggles and riddles and does magic, and he can sing prettily in four tongues. We have bought his freedom and hope to bring him home with us. Robert_I_Baratheon will be delighted with him, and perhaps in time he will even teach Stannis_Baratheon how to laugh.

name: Patchface
quote: Shireen_Baratheon was the only one who laughed at him now, the only one who cared if he lived or died.

name: Patchface
quote: The wretch is mad, and in pain, and no use to anyone, least of all himself. The kindest thing you could do for that one is fill his cup with the milk of the poppy. A painless sleep, and there's an end to it. He'd bless you if he had the wit for it.

name: Patchface
quote: Petyr: In my experience, the more bizarre and shocking a tale the more apt it is to be repeated. Stannis_Baratheon keeps an especially grotesque fool, a lackwit with a tattooed face. Pycelle: Surely you do not mean to suggest that Lady Selyse would bring a fool into her bed? Petyr: You'd have to be a fool to want to bed Selyse_Florent. Doubtless Patchface reminded her of Stannis. And the best lies contain within them nuggets of truth, enough to give a listener pause. As it happens, this fool is utterly devoted to Shireen_Baratheon and follows her everywhere. They even look somewhat alike. Shireen has a mottled, half-frozen face as well. Pycelle: But that is from the greyscale that near killed her as a babe, poor thing. Petyr: I like my tale better, and so will the smallfolk.

name: Patchface
quote: As to Shireen_Baratheon, I understand. If my wife looked like Selyse_Florent, I'd send my fool to service her as well.

name: Patchface
quote: Davos was reminded of Patchface, Princess Shireen_Baratheon lackwit fool. He had gone into the sea as well, and when he came out he was mad. Am I mad as well?

name: Patchface
quote: That creature is dangerous. Many a time I have glimpsed him in my flames. Sometimes there are skulls about him, and his lips are red with blood.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: Emma had decreed that Rosey's maidenhead would cost a golden dragon. Pate had saved nine silver stags and a pot of copper stars and pennies, for all the good that would do him. He would have stood a better chance of hatching a real dragon than saving up enough coin to make a golden one.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: Ebrose might not think him worthy of the silver, but Pate knew how to set a bone and leech a fever. The smallfolk would be grateful for his help. If he could learn to cut hair and shave beards, he might even be a barber. That would be enough, he told himself, so long as I had Rosey. Rosey was all that he wanted in the world.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: When I am a maester in a castle I will have a horse to ride, he thought. Then he tripped upon a cobble and wondered who he was fooling. There would be no chain for him, no seat at a lord's high table, no tall white horse to ride. His days would be spent listening to ravens quork and scrubbing shit stains off Archmaester Walgrave's smallclothes.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: Alchemist: Have you decided what you are? Pate: I suppose I am a thief. Alchemist: I thought you might be.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: He had no time to think about it, to weigh his choices. The Alchemist was walking away. Pate had to follow or lose Rosey and the dragon both, forever. He followed.

name: Pate (novice)
quote: Pate: What's happening? I don't understand. Alchemist: And never will.

name: Pate (whipping boy)
quote: If you lie to me, I will have no choice but to send for Pate and have him beaten till he bleeds. Is that what you want?

name: Pate (whipping boy)
quote: If Tommen_Baratheon refuses, or says one word of protest, summon Qyburn and tell him to remove Pate's tongue, so His Grace can learn the cost of insolence.

name: Pate of the Blue Fork
quote: I married Amerei_Frey to Ser Pate of Sevenstreams, but the Gregor_Clegane killed the oaf so I got her back.

name: Pate of the Blue Fork
quote: When Amerei_Frey was caught in the stables with no fewer than three grooms, he'd been forced to marry her off to a bloody hedge knight. That situation could not possibly get any worse, he'd thought... until Ser Pate decided he could win renown by defeating Ser Gregor_Clegane. Ami had come running back a widow, to Merrett's dismay and the undoubted delight of every stablehand in the Twins.

name: Pate of the Blue Fork
quote: I sang at Amerei_Frey wedding. And passing well, I thought. That Pate she married was a cousin. We're all cousins in Sevenstreams. Didn't stop him from turning niggard when it was time to pay me.

name: Pate of the Blue Fork
quote: I begged him not to go, but my Pate was oh so very brave, and swore he was the man to slay Gregor_Clegane. He wanted to make a great name for himself.

name: Pate of Lancewood
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Pate of Longleaf
quote: I'll have no songs about how brave you died, Kingmaker. There's tens o' thousands dead on your account.

name: Pate of Mory
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Pate of Shermer's Grove
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Patrek Mallister
quote: Patrek Mallister was not too ill a fellow; they shared a taste for wenches, wine, and hawking.

name: Patrek Mallister
quote: Mallister or no, he was a more amiable riding companion than this sour old priest that his uncle Aeron_Greyjoy had turned into.

name: Patrek of King's Mountain
quote: Jon: Eddard_Stark used to say a man should never draw his sword unless he means to use it. Patrek: Using it was my intent.

name: Patrek of King's Mountain
quote: No man has ever had cause to question my courage. No woman ever will.

name: Patrek of King's Mountain
quote: Another bloody southron fool.

name: Patrek of King's Mountain
quote: Axell: Ser Patrek feels he would have made a better match for Lady Alys_Karstark. His lands were lost to him when he came north. Jon: There are many in this hall who have lost far more than that, and more who have given up their lives in service to the realm. Ser Patrek should count himself fortunate.

name: Patrek of King's Mountain
quote: So I invented a character called Ser Patrek of King's Mountain and described his heraldry as looking somewhat like the heraldry of the Dallas Cowboys with the silver star on a white field. And then I had him ripped apart by Wun_Weg_Wun_Dar_Wun.

name: Patricia Redwyne
quote: I shot one with an arrow. In the arse.

name: Penny
quote: She looks so young, he thought. A girl, that's all she is. A girl, and almost pretty if you can forget that she's a dwarf. Her hair was a warm brown, thick and curly, and her eyes were large and trusting. Too trusting.

name: Perestan
quote: Perestan says the world is forty thousand years old.

name: Perestan
quote: Marwyn is unsound. Archmaester Perestan would be the first to tell you that.

name: Perestan
quote: [Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I)] was the oldest man in Westeros, and lived through more history than Archmaester Perestan has ever learned.

name: Perestan
quote: This was not a case of the Eyrie winning so much as Winterfell losing interest. For ten long centuries the direwolf and the falcon had fought and bled over three rocks, until one day the wolf awoke as from a dream and realized it was only stone between his teeth, whence he spat it out and walked away.

name: Perianne Moore
quote: The boys train at fighting every morning, why shouldn't we train at kissing? That's what girls are meant to do, isn't it?

name: Perianne Moore
quote: Saera_Targaryen is smarter than the septas.

name: Perwyn Frey
quote: Hallis: They have hanged some Lannisters. Wendel: A pretty sight. Perwyn: Our friends have begun without us.

name: Perwyn Frey
quote: Catelyn: Is Ser Perwyn about? He helped escort me to Storm's End and back, when Robb_Stark sent me to speak with Lord Renly_Baratheon. I was looking forward to seeing him again. Lothar: Perwyn is away. I shall give him your regards. I know he will regret having missed you.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Catelyn: I will not forget the help you gave me, Petyr. When your men came for me, I did not know whether they were taking me to a friend or an enemy. I have found you more than a friend. I have found a brother I'd thought lost. Petyr: I am desperately sentimental, sweet lady. Best not tell anyone. I have spent years convincing the court that I am wicked and cruel, and I should hate to see all that hard work go for naught.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Eddard: I ... am grateful for your help. Perhaps I was wrong to distrust you. Petyr: You are slow to learn, Lord Eddard. Distrusting me was the wisest thing you've done since you climbed down off your horse.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Catelyn_Stark was my queen of beauty once. You have her hair.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Petyr: Do you perchance recall what I said to you that day Eddard_Stark sat the Iron Throne? Sansa: You told me that life was not a song. That I would learn that one day, to my sorrow. Is it all lies, forever and ever, everyone and everything? Petyr: Almost everyone. Save you and I, of course.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Petyr: Always keep your foes confused. If they are never certain who you are or what you want, they cannot know what you are like to do next. Sometimes the best way to baffle them is to make moves that have no purpose, or even seem to work against you. Remember that, Sansa, when you come to play the game. Sansa: What... what game? Petyr: The only game. The game of thrones.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Everyone wants something, Alayne. And when you know what a man wants you know who he is, and how to move him.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: You could turn King's Landing upside down and not find a single man with a mockingbird sewn over his heart, but that does not mean I am friendless.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Clean hands, Sansa. Whatever you do, make certain your hands are clean.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Petyr: My sweet silly jealous wife. I've only loved one woman, I promise you. Lysa: Only one? Oh, Petyr, do you swear it? Only one? Petyr: Only Catelyn_Stark.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Men of honor will do things for their children that they would never consider doing for themselves.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: In the game of thrones, even the humblest pieces can have wills of their own. Sometimes they refuse to make the moves you've planned for them. Mark that well, Alayne. It's a lesson that Cersei_Lannister still has yet to learn.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Rodrik: Littlefinger sits on the small council now. Catelyn: I knew he would rise high. He was always clever, even as a boy, but it is one thing to be clever and another to be wise.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: He had grey-green eyes that did not smile when his mouth did.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Catelyn: Why would Petyr lie to me? Tyrion: Why does a bear shit in the woods? Because it is his nature. Lying comes as easily as breathing to a man like Littlefinger. You ought to know that, you of all people. Catelyn: And what does that mean, Lannister? Tyrion: Why, every man at court has heard him tell how he took your maidenhead, my lady. Catelyn: That is a lie!

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Littlefinger... the gods only know what game Littlefinger is playing.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Something about the way the small man looked at her made Sansa feel as though she had no clothes on.

name: Petyr Baelish
