quote: Littlefinger is the second most devious man in the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Littlefinger was no threat to anyone. A clever, smiling, genial man, everyone's friend, always able to find whatever gold Robert_I_Baratheon or Jon_Arryn required, and yet of such undistinguished birth, one step up from a hedge knight, he was not a man to fear. He had no banners to call, no army of retainers, no great stronghold, no holdings to speak of, no prospects of a great marriage.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Littlefinger's gold is made from thin air, with a snap from his fingers.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: I shall make him Lord Protector of the Vale. He many not look as tall or as strong as some, but he is worth more than all of them. Trust in him and do as he says.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: He was Petyr, her protector, warm and funny and gentle ... but he was also Littlefinger, the lord she'd known at King's Landing, smiling slyly and stroking his beard as he whispered in Queen Cersei_Lannister ear. And Littlefinger was no friend of hers.

name: Petyr Baelish
quote: Littlefinger was as amiable as he was clever, but too lowborn to threaten any of the great lords, with no swords of his own. The perfect Hand.

name: Petyr Frey
quote: The lad with the unfortunate face. Petyr Pimple, his brothers call him.

name: Petyr Frey
quote: Whores did have charms, especially if you had a face like Petyr's.

name: Petyr Piper
quote: I swore her my sword. I'm older now, but not so old that I've forgotten the words I said, and it happens I still have the sword.

name: Pia
quote: I was a slip of a girl when you came for Lord Whent's tourney and Aerys_II_Targaryen give you your cloak. You were so handsome all in white, and everyone said what a brave knight you were. Sometimes when I'm with some man, I close my eyes and pretend it's you on top of me, with your smooth skin and gold curls. I never truly thought I'd have you, though.

name: Pia
quote: And as lords and ladies never notice the little grey mice under their feet, Arya heard all sorts of secrets just by keeping her ears open as she went about her duties. Pretty Pia from the buttery was a slut who was working her way through every knight in the castle.

name: Pia
quote: Pia is quite skilled, would you not agree? And so ... willing.

name: Pia
quote: She is a font of corruption. I won't have her near my men, flaunting her ... parts.

name: Pia
quote: Pia listened as solemnly as a girl of five being lessoned by her septa. That's all she is, a little girl in a woman's body, scarred and scared.

name: Pia
quote: Josmyn: Kind, my lord? How .... how would I ...? Jaime: Sweet words. Gentle touches. You don't want to wed her, but so long as you're abed treat her as you would your bride.

name: Pimply squire
quote: Is this the lost puppy Ser Gregor_Clegane spoke of? The one who piddled in the rushes and ran off? Ser said his puppy brother tucked his tail between his legs when the battle got too warm at King’s Landing. He said he ran off whimpering.

name: Pimply squire
quote: Are you Sandor_Clegane puppy?

name: Pimply squire
quote: I came for the girls ... make me a man, Polliver said ... oh, gods, please, take me to a castle ... a maester, take me to a maester, my father's got gold ... it was only for the girls ... mercy, ser.

name: Pimply squire
quote: Polliver: The lad's drunk. He can't hold his wine, is all. Sandor: Then he shouldn't drink.

name: Pimply squire
quote: I wouldn't have killed him if he hadn't grabbed me.

name: Pisswater prince
quote: The girl had been recognizably the Princess Rhaenys_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Rhaegar), but the boy ... a faceless horror of bone and brain and gore. None of us looked long. Tywin_Lannister said that it was Prince Aegon and we took him at his word.

name: Plague face
quote: Death holds no sweetness in this house. We are not warriors, nor soldiers, nor swaggering bravos puffed up with pride. We do not kill to serve some lord, to fatten our purses, to stroke our vanity. We never give the gift to please ourselves. Nor do we choose the ones we kill. We are but servants of the God of Many Faces.

name: Plague face
quote: Bloody sores held no terror for her. She had been too long in the House of Black and White to be afraid of a false face.

name: Plummer
quote: Duncan: Are you Plummer the steward? I came for the tourney. To enter the lists. Plummer: Lord_Ashford tourney is a contest for knights. Are you a knight?

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Tyrion: You're too young. Go back.Podrick: I'm your squire, my lord.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Sansa: Are purple, gold, and white the colors of House Payne, Podrick?Podrick: No. I mean, yes. The colors. Our arms are purple and white chequy, my lady. With gold coins. In the checks. Purple and white. Both.Tyrion: There's a tale behind those coins. No doubt Pod will confide it to your toes one day.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Brienne: This road is too dangerous for a boy alone.Podrick: Not for a squire. I'm his squire. The Hand's squire.Brienne: Lord Tywin_Lannister?Podrick: No. Not that Hand. The one before. Tyrion_Lannister. I fought with him in the battle. I shouted 'Halfman! Halfman!'Brienne: Why are you stalking after me? What do you want?Podrick: To find her. His lady. You're looking for her. Brella told me. She's his wife. Not Brella, Lady Sansa_Stark. So I thought, if you found her ... I'm his squire, but he left me.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Brienne: You may call yourself a squire, but I've seen pages half your age who could have beat you bloody. If you stay with me, you'll go to sleep with blisters on your hands and bruises on your arms most every night, and you'll be so stiff and sore you'll hardly sleep. You don't want that.Podrick: I do. I want that. The bruises and the blisters. I mean, I don't, but I do. Ser. My lady.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Dick: They'd eat you, boy. They'd eat you raw.Podrick: If they try, I'll kill them.Dick: You try that. You just try. Squishers don't die easy.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Podrick Payne was so shy he was furtive. Tyrion had never quite gotten over the suspicion that Tywin_Lannister had inflicted the boy on him as a joke.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: It was Pod on the bridge of boats, the lad saved my life.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: He is such a timid boy.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: You've been a good squire to me. Better than I deserved. Whatever happens, I thank you for your leal service.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: The boy may be a stumbletongue, but he’s not stupid.

name: Podrick Payne
quote: Not the quickest lad I've ever known, but a decent squire in the end. I hope he found a better man to serve.

name: Pono
quote: The horselords come, we give them gifts, the horselords go.

name: Porridge
quote: Porridge at least seemed to know he was alive, and there was a queer sort of kindness to the man.

name: Porther
quote: Porther was a brave man, but headstrong. He wanted someone more solid and sensible to keep watch over his daughters.

name: Prendahl na Ghezn
quote: Prendahl: The Stormcrows do not stand alone. Daenerys: Stormcrows do not stand at all. They fly, at the first sign of thunder. Perhaps you should be flying now.

name: Prendahl na Ghezn
quote: Daenerys: I am Daenerys Stormborn of House Targaryen, the Unburnt, Mother of Dragons, khaleesi to Drogo's riders, and queen of the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros. Prendahl: What you are is a horselord's whore. When we break you, I will breed you to my stallion.

name: Prendahl na Ghezn
quote: Prendahl talked too much and said too little. And Sallor_the_Bald picked his nose as if his snot was gold.

name: Pudding
quote: Ferret, Rafe, and Pudding. Little monsters, those three, and me the worst of all.

name: Pudding
quote: Better a beggar than a thief. He had been both in Flea Bottom, when he ran with Ferret, Rafe, and Pudding, but Arlan_of_Pennytree had saved him from that life.

name: Pyat Pree
quote: Come with me to the House of the Undying, and you shall drink of truth and wisdom.

name: Pyat Pree
quote: Not all your enemies are in the Yellow City. Beware men with cold hearts and blue lips.

name: Pycelle
quote: Minds are like swords, I do fear. The old ones go to rust.

name: Pycelle
quote: Once I counseled King Aerys_II_Targaryen as loyally as I council King Robert_I_Baratheon now...

name: Pycelle
quote: Treason is a noxious weed. It must be torn up, root and stem and seed, lest new traitors sprout from every roadside.

name: Pycelle
quote: Tyrion: How long have you been spying for Cersei_Lannister? Pycelle: All I did, I did for House Lannister. Always ... for years ... Tywin_Lannister, ask him, I was ever his true servant ... twas I who bid Aerys_II_Targaryen to open his gates.... Tyrion: So the Sack of King's Landing was your work as well?

name: Pycelle
quote: Pycelle: I was Tywin_Lannister man, and a friend to you in the matter of Lord Jon_Arryn. I could not survive the dungeons, not again ... Cersei: Why does Margaery_Tyrell send for you? Pycelle: Moon tea. Moon tea, for .... Cersei: I know what moon tea is for. Very well. Get off those saggy knees and try to remember what it was to be a man.

name: Pycelle
quote: How many have you betrayed, I wonder? Aerys_II_Targaryen, Eddard_Stark, me... King Robert_I_Baratheon as well? Lord Jon_Arryn, Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen? Where does it begin, Pycelle?

name: Pycelle
quote: Pycelle is a toad. But better a Lannister toad then a Gormon_Tyrell, no?

name: Pycelle
quote: That one has outlived any usefulness he ever had, the queen decided. All Pycelle ever seemed to do of late was plague her with cautions and objections.

name: Pycelle
quote: This is no man, she thought, only the ruins of one. The black cells robbed him of whatever strength he had. That, and the Tyrion_Lannister's razor.

name: Pycelle's serving girl
quote: Shagga: Shagga would give her a strong child. Tyrion: If she wants a strong child, she'll know whom to seek.

name: Pyg
quote: She knew that nose. She knew those eyes. Pyg, his friends had called him.

name: Pylos
quote: Words are wind, you know, and you've blown mine away with your good sense.

name: Pylos
quote: Davos: The King's Hand should be a highborn lord, someone wise and learned, a battle commander or a great knight... Pylos: Ser Ryam_Redwyne was the greatest knight of his day, and one of the worst Hands ever to serve a king. Septon Murmison's prayers worked miracles, but as Hand he soon had the whole realm praying for his death. Lord Ambrose_Butterwell was renowned for wit, Myles_Smallwood for courage, Ser Otto_Hightower for learning, yet they failed as Hands, every one. As for birth, the dragonkings oft chose Hands from amongst their own blood, with results as various as Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) and Maegor_I_Targaryen. Against this, you have Septon Barth, the blacksmith's son the Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen plucked from the Red Keep's library, who gave the realm forty years of peace and plenty. Read your history, Lord Davos, and you will see that your doubts are groundless.

name: Pylos
quote: Any man can read, my lord. There is no magic needed, nor high birth. I am teaching the art to Devan_Seaworth, at Stannis_Baratheon command. Let me teach you as well.

name: Pylos
quote: Edric: Are you coming with us, Maester? Pylos: No. My place is here on Dragonstone.

name: Pylos
quote: Pylos was a polite youth, no more than five-and-twenty, yet solemn as a man of sixty. If only he had more humor, more life in him; that was what was needed here.

name: Pylos
quote: My liege, Pylos is pleasant enough, but I cannot see the chain about his neck without mourning for Maester Cressen.

name: Pylos
quote: Davos had been uncertain of Pylos. Perhaps he resented him for taking old Cressen's place. But now he could only admire the man's courage. This could mean his life as well.

name: Pypar
quote: Samwell: I ... if you want, you can call me Sam. My mother calls me Sam. Pypar: You can call him Lord Snow. You don't want to know what his mother calls him. Jon: These two are Grenn and Pypar. Pypar: Grenn's the ugly one. Grenn: You're uglier than me. At least I don't have ears like a bat.

name: Pypar
quote: Pypar: So here are your choices. Kill me, or come back with me. Jon: Damn you. Damn you all.

name: Pypar
quote: The turtle was stuffed full of rabbits! Look at them hop away!

name: Pypar
quote: Jon: You’re all a bunch of mad fools, do you know that? Pypar: Us? You call us fools? We’re not the ones who got chosen as the nine-hundredth-and-ninety-eighth Lord Commander of the Night’s Watch. You best have some wine, Lord Jon. I think you’re going to need a lot of wine.

name: Pypar
quote: Pypar: The night is dark and full of turnips. Let us all pray for venison, my children, with some onions and a bit of tasty gravy. Jon: Making mock of another man's prayer is fool's work, Pyp. And dangerous. Pypar: If the red god's offended, let him strike me down.

name: Pypar
quote: The mummer's boy with the big ears was a born liar with a hundred different voices, and he did not tell his tales so much as live them, playing all the parts as needed, a king one moment and a swineherd the next. When he turned into an alehouse girl or a virgin princess, he used a high falsetto voice that reduced them all to tears of helpless laughter, and his eunuchs were always eerily accurate caricatures of Ser Alliser_Thorne.

name: Pypar
quote: They will call you men of Night's Watch now, but you are bigger fools than the Mummer's Monkey here if you believe that. You are boys still, green and stinking of summer, and when the winter comes you will die like flies.

name: Pypar
quote: I am the shield that guards the realms of men, he remembered. He wondered what those men would say if they realized their realms were being guarded by the likes of Grenn, Pyp, and Eddison_Tollett.

name: Qarl the Maid
quote: Euron: IRONMEN, you have heard my horn. Now hear my words. I am Balon_Greyjoy brother, Quellon_Greyjoy eldest living son. Lord Vickon_Greyjoy blood is in my veins, and the blood of the Loron_Greyjoy. Yet I have sailed farther than any of them. Only one living kraken has never known defeat. Only one has never bent his knee. Only one has sailed to Asshai by the Shadow, and seen wonders and terrors beyond imagining ... Qarl: If you liked the Shadow so well, go back there.

name: Qarl the Maid
quote: Asha: Get out. I want to be alone. Qarl: What you want is me.

name: Qarl the Maid
quote: Asha: I am a woman wed. You've despoiled me, you beardless boy. Erik_Ironmaker will cut your balls off and put you in a dress. Qarl: If he can get out of his chair.

name: Qarl the Maid
quote: The singers call Andrik best now. Andrik the Unsmiling, they name him. A giant of a man. He serves Dunstan_Drumm of Old Wyk. And Black_Lorren and Qarl the Maid are near as dread.

name: Qarl the Maid
quote: A shy smile, strong arms, clever fingers, and two sure swords. What more could any woman want? She would have married Qarl, and gladly, but she was Lord Balon_Greyjoy daughter and he was common-born, the grandson of a thrall.

name: Qarl Corbray
quote: Rogar: You think you can dismiss me? No. No. Qarl: Yes.

name: Qarlton Chelsted
quote: I'd thought the man craven, but the day he confronted Aerys_II_Targaryen he found some courage somewhere. He did all he could to dissuade him. He reasoned, he jested, he threatened, and finally he begged. When that failed he took off his chain of office and flung it down on the floor. Aerys burnt him alive for that, and hung his chain about the neck of Rossart, his favorite pyromancer.

name: Qarlton Chelsted
quote: Cersei thought of all the King's Hands that she had known through the years: Owen_Merryweather, Jon_Connington, Qarlton Chelsted, Jon_Arryn, Eddard_Stark, her brother Tyrion_Lannister. And her father, Lord Tywin_Lannister, her father most of all. All of them are burning now, she told herself, savoring the thought. They are dead and burning, every one, with all their plots and schemes and betrayals.

name: Qavo Nogarys
quote: Is he for sale? The triarch's grotesquerie is in need of Tyrion_Lannister.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: Jeor: I am loath to risk more men. Qhorin: We can only die. Why else do we don these black cloaks, but to die in defense of the realm?

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: To lead men you must know them, Jon Snow. I know more of you now than I did this morning.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: If we are taken, you will go over to them, as Ygritte you captured once urged you. They may demand that you cut your cloak to ribbons, that you swear them an oath on Eddard_Stark grave, that you curse your brothers and Jeor_Mormont. You must not balk, whatever is asked of you. Do as they bid you ... but in your heart, remember who and what you are. Ride with them, eat with them, fight with them, for as long as it takes. And watch.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: The Halfhand had ventured deeper into the wild than any other living man.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: He knew. He knew what they would ask of me.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: I will see, and hear, and learn, and when I have I will carry the word back to the Wall. The wildlings had taken him for an oathbreaker, but in his heart he was still a man of the Night's Watch, doing the last duty that Qhorin Halfhand had laid on him. Before I killed him.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: Mance: Qhorin was my enemy. But also my brother, once. So ... shall I thank you for killing him, Jon Snow? Or curse you? Jon: You ought to thank me for killing your enemy, and curse me for killing your friend.

name: Qhorin Halfhand
quote: The Halfhand could have killed me as easy as you swat a bug.

name: Qhorwyn Hoare
quote: War is bad for trade. Weakness invites attack. To have peace, we must be strong.

name: Qoren Martell
quote: Dorne has danced with dragons before. I would sooner sleep with scorpions.

name: Quaithe
quote: They shall come day and night to see the wonder that has been born again into the world, and when they see they shall lust. For dragons are fire made flesh, and fire is power.

name: Quaithe
quote: To go north, you must journey south, to reach the west you must go east. To go forward you must go back and to touch the light you must pass beneath the shadow.

name: Quaithe
quote: Quaithe: The glass candles are burning. Soon comes the pale mare, and after her the others. Victarion_Greyjoy and Moqorro, Tyrion_Lannister and Jon_Connington, the Quentyn_Martell and the mummer's dragon. Trust none of them. Remember the Undying. Beware the perfumed seneschal. Daenerys: Reznak_mo_Reznak? Why should I fear him? If you have some warning for me, speak plainly. What do you want of me, Quaithe? Quaithe: To show you the way.

name: Quaithe
quote: Jorah: She speaks truly, my queen ... though I like her no more than the others. Daenerys: I do not understand her.

name: Quaithe
quote: Was she an enemy too, or only a dangerous friend? Dany could not say.

name: Quaithe
quote: Khaleesi, better a man should swallow scorpions than trust in the spawn of shadows, who dare not show their face beneath the sun. It is known.

name: Queen o' whores
quote: Prostitute: Who in seven hells is this one? Jaime: The Lord Commander of the Kingsguard. I might ask the same of you, my lady. Prostitute: Lady? I'm no lady. I'm the queen. Jaime: Cersei_Lannister will be surprised to hear that. Prostitute: Lord Ryman_Frey crowned me his very self. I'm the queen o' whores.

name: Queen o' whores
quote: See that you are not in camp when the sun comes up. You may take your queen of whores, but not that crown of hers.

name: Quellon Greyjoy
quote: Nine sons had been born from the loins of Quellon Greyjoy, but only four had lived to manhood. That was the way of this cold world, where men fished the sea and dug in the ground and died, whilst women brought forth short-lived children from beds of blood and pain.

name: Quellon Greyjoy
quote: Lord Quellon never returned from his last voyage; the Drowned God in his goodness granted him a death at sea. It was Lord Balon_Greyjoy who came back, with his brothers Euron_Greyjoy and Victarion_Greyjoy.

name: Quellon Greyjoy
quote: Aeron: Do you mean to claim our father's crown? Victarion: If the Drowned God wills it. Aeron: The waves will speak. Listen to the waves, brother.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: Daenerys: Tell me, Prince Quentyn, are you enchanted? Quentyn: No, Your Grace. Daenerys: I feared as much.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: I am a prince of Dorne, Your Grace. I will not run from slaves and sellswords.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: I want to go back to Yronwood and kiss both of Drinkwater_twins, marry Gwyneth_Yronwood, watch her flower into beauty, have a child by her. I want to ride in tourneys, hawk and hunt, visit Mellario in Norvos, read some of those books Doran_Martell sends me. I want Cletus_Yronwood and Willam_Wells and Maester Kedry to be alive again.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: Quentyn had never felt so much a boy as when he'd stood before Daenerys_Targaryen, pleading for her hand. The thought of bedding her terrified him almost as much as her dragons had.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: Quentyn: This will be my grand adventure. Gerris: Men die on grand adventures.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: The hero sets out with his friends and companions, faces dangers, comes home triumphant. Only some of his companions don't return at all. The hero never dies, though. I must be the hero.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: She leaned her back against a fluted pillar and wondered if her brother was looking at the same stars tonight, wherever he might be. Do you see the white one, Quentyn? That is Nymeria's star, burning bright, and that milky band behind her, those are ten thousand ships. She burned as bright as any man, and so shall I. You will not rob me of my birthright!

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: Dorne will be yours. You have my word on that, if my word still has any meaning for you. Your brother Quentyn has a harder road to walk.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: That one is Doran_Martell son. Short and stocky, plain-faced, he seemed a decent lad, sober, sensible, dutiful ... but not the sort to make a young girl's heart beat faster. And Daenerys_Targaryen, whatever else she might be, was still a young girl, as she herself would claim when it pleased her to play the innocent. Like all good queens she put her people first—else she would never have wed Hizdahr_zo_Loraq—but the girl in her still yearned for poetry, passion, and laughter. She wants fire, and Dorne sent her mud. You could make a poultice out of mud to cool a fever. You could plant seeds in mud and grow a crop to feed your children. Mud would nourish you, where fire would only consume you, but fools and children and young girls would choose fire every time.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: He should have stayed in Dorne. He should have stayed a frog. Not all men are meant to dance with dragons.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: Barristan: Prince Quentyn's death was his own doing, and yours. Gerris: Ours? How are we at fault, ser? Quentyn was our friend, yes. A bit of a fool, you might say, but all dreamers are fools. But first and last he was our prince. We owed him our obedience.

name: Quentyn Martell
quote: King Quentyn. Why did that sound so silly?

name: Quince
quote: The most splendid work ever built by the hands of men, a palace worthy of the gods themselves. Surely even the Father Above does not have such a seat.

name: Quincy Cox
quote: Meribald: Ser Quincy is an old man. His sons and good-sons are far away or dead, his grandsons are still boys, and he has two daughters. What could he have done, one man against so many? Elder Brother: True words, and wise. When you cross to Saltpans, no doubt Ser Quincy will ask you for forgiveness. I am glad you are here to give it. I could not.

name: Quincy Cox
quote: He could have tried. He could have died. Young or old, a true knight is sworn to protect those who are weaker than himself, or die in the attempt.

name: Qyburn
quote: Qyburn: Terrible times breed terrible things, my lord. Roose: Are these times so terrible, Maester?

name: Qyburn
quote: Jaime: Do you believe in ghosts, Maester? Qyburn: Once, at the Citadel, I came into an empty room and saw an empty chair. Yet I knew a woman had been there, only a moment before. The cushion was dented where she'd sat, the cloth was still warm, and her scent lingered in the air. If we leave our smells behind us when we leave a room, surely something of our souls must remain when we leave this life? The archmaesters did not like my thinking, though. Well, Marwyn did, but he was the only one.

name: Qyburn
quote: The Citadel took my chain, but they could not take my knowledge.

name: Qyburn
quote: This poison... it would be useful to know more about it, would it not? Send a knight to slay a knight and an archer to kill an archer, the smallfolk often say. To combat the black arts ...

name: Qyburn
quote: Cersei: Need I say that it will go ill for you if any word of your ... labors ... should pass beyond these walls? Qyburn: No, Your Grace. Your secrets are safe with me.

name: Qyburn
quote: Qyburn was old, but his hair still had more ash than snow in it, and the laugh lines around his mouth made him look like some little girl's favorite grandfather. A rather shabby grandfather, though.

name: Qyburn
quote: Jaime: As for Qyburn ... gods be good, Cersei, he rode with Vargo_Hoat. The Citadel stripped him of his chain! Cersei: The grey sheep. Qyburn has made himself most useful to me. And he is loyal, which is more than I can say of mine own kin.

name: Qyburn
quote: Pycelle: Lord Qyburn? Your Grace, this ... a maester swears sacred vows, to hold no lands or lordships ... Cersei: Your Citadel took away his chain. If he is not a maester, he cannot be held to a maester's vows. We called Varys lord as well, you may recall. Pycelle: This man is ... he is unfit ...

name: Qyburn
quote: Jaime: Qyburn stinks of secrets. Cersei: We all have secrets, brother.

name: Qyburn
quote: Lord Qyburn had them, and Lord Qyburn could do wonders. And horrors. He can do horrors as well.

name: Racallio Ryndoon
quote: I want sons as brave and strong as you.

name: Racallio Ryndoon
quote: ...surely one of the most curious and flamboyant rogues in the annals of history...

name: Racallio Ryndoon
quote: Racallio Ryndoon was mad. Yet his men loved him, fought for him, died for him. And for a few short years, they made him a king.

name: Rafe
quote: There wasn't a girl in King's Landing who could run as fast as Rafe.

name: Rafe
quote: Ferret, Rafe, and Pudding. Little monsters, those three, and me the worst of all.

name: Rafford
quote: Raff: Can you walk? Lommy: No, you got to carry me. Raff: Think so?

name: Rafford
quote: Mercy: I'm a maiden now. Raff: Not for long. I'm Lord Rafford, sweetling, and I know just what I want.

name: Rafford
quote: Raff: You'll need to carry me. Arya: Think so?

name: Rafford
quote: See? You know your line, and so do I.

name: Rafford
quote: Raff the Sweetling looked up sharply as the long thin blade came sliding from her sleeve. She slipped it through his throat beneath the chin, twisted, and ripped it back out sideways with a single smooth slash. A fine red rain followed, and in his eyes the light went out.

name: Ragwyle
quote: If Jon_Snow would join the free folk, let him show us his prowess and prove the truth of him.

name: Rakharo
quote: They took Khal Drogo's herds, Khaleesi. We were too few to stop them. It is the right of the strong to take from the weak.

name: Rakharo
quote: Daenerys: Rakharo, you shall have the great arakh that was my bride gift, with hilt and blade chased in gold. And you too I name my ko, and ask that you live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm. Rakharo: You are khaleesi. I shall ride at your side to Vaes Dothrak beneath the Mother of Mountains, and keep you safe from harm until you take your place with the crones of the dosh khaleen. No more can I promise.

name: Rakharo
quote: Khaleesi, better a man should swallow scorpions than trust in the Quaithe, who dare not show their face beneath the sun. It is known.

name: Rakharo
quote: Blood of my blood, when cowards hide and burn the food and fodder, great khals must seek for braver foes.

name: Rakharo
quote: Aggo, Jhogo, and Rakharo were brave warriors, but they were young, and too valuable to risk. They kept her khalasar together, and were her best scouts too.

name: Rakharo
quote: Jhiqui: You are too skinny for him. You are almost a boy. Rakharo does not bed with boys. This is known. Irri: It is known that you are almost a cow. Rakharo does not bed with cows. Daenerys: Rakharo is blood of my blood. His life belongs to me, not you.

name: Ralf
quote: This voyage was cursed from the first. The Euron_Greyjoy fears you, my lord, why else send you so far away? He does not mean for us to return.

name: Ralf Kenning
quote: The wolves are broken, lord. What good to win this swamp and lose the isles?

name: Ralf Kenning
quote: Ralf was rotting too.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Strip off their skins. Roose_Bolton, he used to say a naked man has few secrets, but a flayed man's got none.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Ramsay. Snow, Donella_Hornwood called me before she ate her fingers, but I say Bolton.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: You're not a man, Reek. You're just my creature.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Roose: By Tommen_Baratheon decree you are now a Bolton. Try and act like one. Tales are told of you, Ramsay. I hear them everywhere. People fear you.Ramsay: Good.Roose: You are mistaken.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Tainted blood is ever treacherous, and Ramsay's nature was sly, greedy, and cruel. I count myself well rid of him. The trueborn sons my young wife has promised me would never have been safe while he lived.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Wylla: He won't ever be my lord! He made Donella_Hornwood marry him, then shut her in a dungeon and made her eat her fingers.Locke: The maid tells it true. Roose_Bolton's cold and cunning, aye, but a man can deal with Roose. We've all known worse. But this bastard son of his ... they say he's mad and cruel, a monster.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: The Boltons have always been as cruel as they are cunning, but this one seems a beast in human skin.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Power tastes best when sweetened by courtesy; you had best learn that if you ever hope to rule.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: His blood is bad. He needs to be leeched. The leeches suck away the bad blood, all the rage and pain. No man can think so full of anger. Ramsay, though ... his tainted blood would poison even leeches, I fear.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Underneath the Dreadfort, he had learned there were far worse things than death. Ramsay had taught him that lesson, finger by finger and toe by toe, and it was not one that he was ever like to forget.

name: Ramsay Snow
quote: Stannis: Ramsay Snow, you mean. The Bastard.Theon: Never call him that! Ramsay Bolton, not Ramsay Snow, never Snow, never, you have to remember his name, or he will hurt you.Stannis: He is welcome to try. Whatever name he goes by.

name: Randa
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: You are almost a man grown now, and my heir. You have given me no cause to disown you, but neither will I allow you to inherit the land and title that should be Dickon_Tarly. Heartsbane must go to a man strong enough to wield her, and you are not worthy to touch her hilt. So I have decided that you shall this day announce that you wish to take the black. You will forsake all claim to your brother's inheritance and start north before evenfall.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Randyll: No disrespect to you, Lady Stark, but it would have been more seemly had Lord Robb_Stark come to pay homage to Renly_Baratheon himself, rather than hiding behind his mother's skirts.Catelyn: King Robb is warring, my lord, not playing at tourney.Renly: Go softly, Lord Randyll, I fear you're overmatched.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: I say that Stannis_Baratheon is a danger to you, leave him unblooded and he will only grow stronger, while your own power is diminished by battle. The Lannisters will not be beaten in a day. By the time you are done with them, Lord Stannis may be as strong as you ... or stronger.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: It takes more than a pretty cloak to charge a shield wall. I was leading Mace_Tyrell's van when you were still sucking on your mother's teat, Guyard.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: You ruined Samwell_Tarly with those soft septon's songs, do you mean to do the same to Dickon_Tarly?

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: No son of House Tarly will ever wear a chain. The men of Horn Hill do not bow and scrape to petty lords.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Brienne: I came to fight. To be a knight. Randyll: The gods made men to fight, and women to bear children. A woman's war is in the birthing bed.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: What have we become, when kings and high lords must dance to the twittering of sparrows?

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: He wondered what his father would say if he could see him now. I killed one of the Others, my lord, he imagined saying. I stabbed him with an obsidian dagger, and my Sworn Brothers call me Sam the Slayer now. But even in his fancies, Lord Randyll only scowled, disbelieving.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Stannis: Your father is an able soldier. He defeated Robert_I_Baratheon once, at Ashford. Mace_Tyrell has been pleased to claim the honors for that victory, but Lord Randyll had decided matters before Tyrell ever found the battlefield. He slew Lord_Cafferen with that great Valyrian sword of his and sent his head to Aerys_II_Targaryen. You are not the sort of son I would expect such a man to have. Samwell: I ... I am not the sort of son he wanted, sire.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: The sight of blood might make Sam faint, but he knew how wars were won. His own father had seen to that.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Randyll Tarly is the finest soldier in the realm. A poor Hand for peacetime, but with Tywin_Lannister dead there's no better man to finish this war.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Dunstan: Lord Tarly bears the greatsword Heartsbane, forged of Valyrian steel, and he is always in Lord Mace_Tyrell van. Victarion: Let him come. I will take his sword for mine own, as your own forebear took Red Rain.

name: Randyll Tarly
quote: Tarly is the real danger. A narrow man, but iron-willed and shrewd, and as good a soldier as the Reach could boast.

name: Rast
quote: You girls do as you please, but if Alliser_Thorne sends me against Samwell_Tarly, I'm going to slice me off a rasher of bacon.

name: Rast
quote: Jon had once threatened to have Ghost rip his throat out unless he stopped tormenting Samwell_Tarly, and Rast did not forget things like that.

name: Rat Cook
quote: Once the direwolf bolted through a dark door and returned a moment later with a grey rat between his teeth. The Rat Cook, Bran thought, but it was the wrong color, and only as big as a cat. The Rat Cook was white, and almost as huge as a sow ...

name: Rat Cook
quote: It was not for murder that the gods cursed him, nor for serving the Andal king his son in a pie. A man has a right to vengeance. But he slew a guest beneath his roof, and that the gods cannot forgive.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: Lord of Bones: To crows I be the Lord o' Bones. Qhorin: I see no lord. Only a dog dressed in chickenbones, who rattles when he rides. Lord of Bones: It's your bones I'll be rattling soon, Halfhand. I'll boil the flesh off you and make a byrnie from your ribs. I'll carve your teeth to cast me runes, and eat me oaten porridge from your skull.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: Lord of Bones: The free folk have no need of cravens. Ygritte: This is the Jon_Snow, who spared me. Let him live. Lord of Bones: The black crow is a tricksy bird. I trust him not.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: Might be you fooled these others, crow, but don't think you'll be fooling Mance. He'll take one look a' you and know you're false. And when he does, I'll make a cloak o' your wolf there, and open your soft boy's belly and sew a weasel up inside.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: I want me some crow bones.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: No, mercy. This is not right, I'm not Mance_Rayder, they—

name: Rattleshirt
quote: Rattleshirt, we called him. Treacherous and bloodthirsty. If there's honor in him, he hides it down beneath his suit of bones.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: A small, malicious, treacherous man, as stupid as he is cruel. Jon did not believe for a moment that he would keep faith.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: The Lord o' Bones? No one ever trusted Rattleshirt but fools.

name: Rattleshirt
quote: Rattleshirt could wash his hands a hundred times a day and he'd still have blood beneath his nails.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: Who dressed Arya_Stark in those Bolton rags? That badge... there's many a man who would hang her in half a heartbeat for wearing a flayed man on her breast.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: Ravella: Are you fond of dancing, child? My Carellen_Smallwood's a lovely dancer. She sings beautifully as well. What do you like to do? Arya: Needlework. Ravella: Very restful, isn't it? Arya: Well, not the way I do it.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: The gods give each of us our little gifts and talents, and it is meant for us to use them, my aunt always says. Any act can be a prayer, if done as well as we are able. Isn't that a lovely thought?

name: Ravella Swann
quote: In times like these, we all must make do as best we can.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: Tom: Someone could make a rare fine song of that. Ravella: Someone who doesn't rhyme carry on with Dondarrion, perhaps. Or play 'Oh, Lay My Sweet Lass Down in the Grass' to every milkmaid in the shire and leave two of them with big bellies." Tom: It was 'Let Me Drink Your Beauty,' and milkmaids are always glad to hear it. As was a certain highborn lady I do recall. I play to please.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: Ravella: A pack of wolves came howling around my gates, thinking I might have Jaime_Lannister in here. Tom: Then it's true, the Kingslayer is loose again? Ravella: I hardly think they'd be hunting him if he was chained up under Riverrun. Jack: What did m'lady tell them? Ravella: Why, that I had Ser Jaime naked in my bed, but I'd left him much too exhausted to come down. One of them had the effrontery to call me a liar, so we saw them off with a few quarrels.

name: Ravella Swann
quote: Ravella: They were my son's things. He died when he was seven. Arya: I'm sorry, my lady. I'm sorry I tore the acorn dress too. It was pretty. Ravella: Yes, child. And so are you. Be brave.

name: Raymun Darry
quote: Varys: You are quite certain these were more than brigands? Raymun: Brigands, Lord Varys? Oh, they were brigands, beyond a doubt. Lannister brigands.

name: Raymun Darry
quote: The lords of the Trident keep the king's peace. The Lannisters have broken it. We ask leave to answer them, steel for steel. We ask justice for the smallfolk of Sherrer and Wendish Town and the Mummer's Ford.

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: Steffon_Fossoway has promised to knight me, but insists that I am not ripe yet.

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: I may not be ripe, but Steffon_Fossoway is rotten to the core. Knock the seeds out of him.

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: Raymun: If you think I wish any part of this, you're as thick as you are vile. Steffon: Vile? Guard your tongue, Raymun. We're both apples from the same tree. And you are my squire. Or have you forgotten your vows? Raymun: No. Have you forgotten yours? You swore to be a knight. Steffon: I shall be more than a knight before this day is done. Lord Fossoway. I like the sound of that.

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: I needed to make a small change to my sigil, lest I be mistaken for Steffon_Fossoway. I fear I am still not ripe ... but better green than wormy, eh?

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: Here's an apple that's not ripe yet.

name: Raymun Fossoway
quote: Raymun of House Fossoway, in the name of the Warrior I charge you to be brave. In the name of the Father I charge you to be just. In the name of the Mother I charge you to defend the young and innocent. In the name of the Maid I charge you to protect all women.

name: Raymund Connington
quote: No harm will come to any of you unless Ronnet_Connington proves an utter fool.

name: Raynald Westerling
quote: Catelyn: Sybell_Spicer, sers, are you new to Robb_Stark cause? Raynald: New, but fierce in our courage and firm in our loyalties, as I hope to prove to you, my lady.

name: Raynald Westerling
quote: Sybell: Rollam_Westerling is with me, but Raynald was a knight and went with the rebels to the Twins. If I had known what was to happen there, I would never have allowed that. Raynald knew nought of any ... of the understanding with Tywin_Lannister. He may be a captive at the Twins. Jaime: I will make inquiries. If Ser Raynald is still a captive, we'll pay his ransom for you.

name: Raynald Westerling
quote: Jaime: Tell me, is Ser Raynald Westerling amongst these captives? Edwyn: The knight of seashells? You'll find that one feeding the fish at the bottom of the Green Fork.

name: Red Flea
quote: Kraznys: What is your name? Red Flea: This one's name is Red Flea, your worship. Kraznys: And yesterday, what was it? Red Flea: Black Rat, your worship. Kraznys: The day before? Red Flea: Brown Flea, your worship. Kraznys: Before that? Red Flea: This one does not recall, your worship. Blue Toad, perhaps. Or Blue Worm.

name: Red Lamb
quote: I am not afraid. Should I die, I will go before the Great Shepherd of Lhazar, break his crook across my knee, and say to him, "Why did you make your people lambs, when the world is full of wolves?" Then I will spit into his eye.

name: Red Oarsman
quote: Jon: Balon_Greyjoy let her believe she was a man. Asha: Your father made the same mistake with you. Red Oarsman: Give her to me, Euron_Greyjoy. I'll spank her till her arse is as red as my hair.

name: Reek
quote: Ramsay_Snow is a sly creature by all accounts, and he has a servant who is almost as cruel as he is. Reek, they call the man. It's said he never bathes. They hunt together, the Bastard and this Reek, and not for deer. I've heard tales, things I can scarce believe, even of a Bolton.

name: Reek
quote: The smell was something he was born with. A curse, the smallfolk said. The gods had made him stink so that men would know his soul was rotting.

name: Reek
quote: I do wonder, though ... was it Ramsay_Snow who corrupted Reek, or Reek Ramsay?

name: Regis Groves
quote: I do not kneel to bastards, much less Alys_Rivers's_son of Aemond_Targaryen and a milk cow.

name: Rego Draz
quote: If I could tax air, I would be a lord indeed.

name: Rego Draz
quote: Why should I steal from Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen? I am twice as rich as he is.

name: Rego Draz
quote: She is all the god I need.

name: Rego Draz
quote: Rego: Sickness? This is no sickness. A weasel in the guts, dead in a day... this is the tears of Lys. Jaehaerys: Poison? Rego: We know more of such things in the Free Cities. It is the tears, never doubt it. The Culiper would have seen it soon enough, so he had to die first. That is how I would do it. Not that I would. Poison is... dishonorable. Daemon: Only women were struck down. Rego: Only women got the poison, then.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Sansa: The honor is mine, good knight. Even in the far north, the singers praise the deeds of Barristan the Bold. Renly: Barristan the Old, you mean. Don't flatter him too sweetly, child, he thinks overmuch of himself already. Now, wolf girl, if you can put a name to me as well, then I must concede that you are truly Eddard_Stark daughter.Sansa: I can answer. Your helmet bears golden antlers, my lord. The stag is the sigil of the royal House. King Robert has two brothers. By your extreme youth, you can only be Renly Baratheon, Lord of Storm's End and councillor to the king, and so I name you.Barristan: By his extreme youth, he can only be a prancing jackanapes, and so I name him.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Eddard: You must forgive me, but sometimes you look the very image of your brother Robert_I_Baratheon.Renly: A poor copy.Petyr: Though much better dressed. Lord Renly spends more on clothing than half the ladies of the court.Renly: There are worse crimes. The way you dress, for one.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Strike! Now, while the castle sleeps. We must get Joffrey_Baratheon away from Cersei_Lannister and take him in hand. Protector of the Realm or no, he who holds the king holds the kingdom.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Stannis: Robert_I_Baratheon was my elder brother. You are the younger.Renly: Younger, bolder, and far more comely ...Stannis: ... and a thief and a usurper besides.Renly: The Targaryens called Robert usurper. He seemed to be able to bear the shame. So shall I.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Stannis: Do you think a few bolts of cloth will make you king?Renly: Tyrell swords will make me king. Rowan and Tarly and Caron will make me king, with axe and mace and warhammer. Tarth arrows and Penrose lances, Fossoway, Cuy, Mullendore, Estermont, Selmy, Hightower, Oakheart, Crane, Caswell, Blackbar, Morrigen, Beesbury, Shermer, Dunn, Footly ... even House Florent, Selyse_Florent brothers and uncles, they will make me king. All the chivalry of the south rides with me, and that is the least part of my power. My foot is coming behind, a hundred thousand swords and spears and pikes. And you will destroy me? With what, pray? That paltry rabble I see there huddled under the castle walls? I'll call them five thousand and be generous, codfish lords and Davos_Seaworth and sellswords. Half of them are like to come over to me before the battle starts. You have fewer than four hundred horse, my scouts tell me-freeriders in boiled leather who will not stand an instant against armored lances. I do not care how seasoned a warrior you think you are, Stannis, that host of yours won't survive the first charge of my vanguard.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Why the oldest son, and not the best-fitted? The crown will suit me, as it never suited Robert_I_Baratheon and would not suit Stannis_Baratheon.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Tell me, my lady, do direwolves vote on who should lead the pack?

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Renly had been a boy of eight when Robert_I_Baratheon won the throne, but he had grown into a man so like his brother that Ned found it disconcerting. Whenever he saw him, it was as if the years had slipped away and Robert stood before him, fresh from his victory on the Trident.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Ned was not sure what to make of Renly, with all his friendly ways and easy smiles.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: They are quite a pair, Stannis_Baratheon and Renly. The iron gauntlet and the silk glove.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: It was just the sort of notion that would appeal to Renly Baratheon; a splendid new order of knighthood, with gorgeous new raiment to proclaim it. Even as a boy, Renly had loved bright colors and rich fabrics, and he had loved his games as well. "Look at me!" he would shout as he ran laughing through the halls of Storm's End. "Look at me, I'm a dragon," or "Look at me, I'm a wizard," or "Look at me, look at me, I'm the rain god." The bold little boy with wild black hair and laughing eyes was a man grown now, one-and-twenty, and still he played his games. Look at me, I'm a king, Cressen thought sadly. Oh, Renly, Renly, dear sweet child, do you know what you are doing? And would you care if you did? Is there anyone who cares for him but me?

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: What has Renly ever done to earn a throne? He sits in council and jests with Petyr_Baelish, and at tourneys he dons his splendid suit of armor and allows himself to be knocked off his horse by a better man. That is the sum of my brother Renly, who thinks he ought to be king.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: This is madness. Real enemies on every side and half the realm in flames, and Renly sits here playing at war like a boy with his first wooden sword.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Small wonder the lords gather around him with such fervor, she thought, he is Robert_I_Baratheon come again. Renly was handsome as Robert had been handsome; long of limb and broad of shoulder, with the same coal-black hair, fine and straight, the same deep blue eyes, the same easy smile.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon was the true steel. Stannis_Baratheon is pure iron, black and hard and strong, yes, but brittle, the way iron gets. He'll break before he bends. And Renly, that one, he's copper, bright and shiny, pretty to look at but not worth all that much at the end of the day.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: He knew how to dress and he knew how to smile and he knew how to bathe, and somehow he got the notion that this made him fit to be king.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Tyrion: What of love?Loras: When the sun has set, no candle can replace it.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: I will defend King Tommen_Baratheon with all my strength, I swear it. I will give my life for his if need be. But I will never betray Renly, by word or deed. He was the king that should have been. He was the best of them.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Illifer: Creighton_Longbough, behold the Maid o' Tarth, who opened Renly's royal throat for him.Brienne: That is a lie. I would have given my life for King Renly, and died happy. I did no harm to him. I swear it by my sword.

name: Renly Baratheon
quote: Brienne: Am I to be arrested?Hyle: What, for Renly? Who was he? We've changed kings since then, some of us twice. No one cares, no one remembers.

name: Rennifer Longwaters
quote: I have a little dragon in me.

name: Rhaegar Frey
quote: The Robb_Stark? He was a vile dog and died like one.

name: Rhaegar Frey
quote: Robb_Stark betrayed us all. He abandoned the north to the cruel mercies of the ironmen to carve out a fairer kingdom for himself along the Trident. Then he abandoned the riverlords who had risked much and more for him, breaking his marriage pact with Walder_Frey to wed the first Jeyne_Westerling who caught his eye.

name: Rhaegar Frey
quote: Wynafryd: Wylla_Manderly has always been a willful child. I fear that she will make a willful wife. Rhaegar: Marriage will soften her, I have no doubt. A firm hand and a quiet word.

name: Rhaegar Frey
quote: That smirking worm who wears Rhaegar_Targaryen.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Rhaegar: Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar). What better name for a king? Elia: Will you make a song for him? Rhaegar: He has a song. He is the prince that was promised, and his is the song of ice and fire. There must be one more. The dragon has three heads.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: I will require sword and armor. It seems I must be a warrior.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: When the battle's done I mean to call a council. Changes will be made. I meant to do it long ago, but ... well, it does no good to speak of roads not taken. We shall talk when I return.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: The battle screamed about Lord Robert_I_Baratheon and Prince Rhaegar both, and by the will of the gods, or by chance-or perhaps by design-they met amidst the shallows of the ford. The two knights fought valiantly upon their destriers, according to all accounts. For despite his crimes, Prince Rhaegar was no coward.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: In my dreams, I kill him every night. A thousand deaths will still be less than he deserves.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: And Rhaegar ... how many times do you think he raped Lyanna_Stark? How many hundreds of times? I will kill every Targaryen I can get my hands on, until they are as dead as their dragons, and then I will piss on their graves.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Robert: Treachery was a coin the Targaryens knew well. Lannister paid them back in kind. It was no less than they deserved. I shall not trouble my sleep over it. Eddard: You were not there. There was no honor in that conquest. Robert: The Others take your honor! What did any Targaryen ever know of honor? Go down into your crypt and ask Lyanna_Stark about the dragon's honor!

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Your brother Rhaegar was the last dragon, and he died on the Trident. Viserys_Targaryen is less than the shadow of a snake.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Rubies flew like drops of blood from the chest of a dying prince, and he sank to his knees in the water and with his last breath murmured a woman's name.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Daenerys: Ser Jorah_Mormont named Rhaegar the last dragon once. He had to have been a peerless warrior to be called that, surely? Arstan: Your Grace, the Prince of Dragonstone was a most puissant warrior, but... Daenerys: Go on. You may speak freely to me. Arstan: As you command. A warrior without peer ... those are fine words, Your Grace, but words win no battles.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Rhaegar fought valiantly, Rhaegar fought nobly, Rhaegar fought honorably. And Rhaegar died.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Arstan: But I am not certain it was in Rhaegar to be happy. Daenerys: You make him sound so sour. Arstan: Not sour, no, but ... there was a melancholy to Prince Rhaegar, a sense ... Daenerys: Say it. A sense? Arstan: ... of doom. He was born in grief, my queen, and that shadow hung over him all his days.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Daenerys: One day you must tell me all. The good and the bad. There is some good to be said of Aerys_II_Targaryen, surely? Barristan: There is, your Grace. Of him, and those who came before him. Your grandfather Jaehaerys_II_Targaryen and Duncan_Targaryen, their father Aegon_V_Targaryen, Rhaella_Targaryen ... and Rhaegar. Him most of all. Daenerys: I wish I could have known him.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Had any man ever been so beautiful? He was more than a man, though. His blood was the blood of old Valyria, the blood of dragons and gods.

name: Rhaegar Targaryen
quote: Prince Rhaegar loved his Lady Lyanna_Stark and thousands died for it.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: Maekar_I_Targaryen should never have commanded Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) to enter the lists. He belongs on a tourney field no more than Aerys_I_Targaryen does, or Rhaegel.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: The Daeron_II_Targaryen fourth Maekar_I_Targaryen, not quite as bold as Prince Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II), nor as clever as Prince Aerys_I_Targaryen, nor as gentle as Prince Rhaegel.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: There is no one to oppose [Brynden_Rivers]. Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen sulks at Summerhall, nursing his grievances against his Aerys_I_Targaryen. Prince Rhaegel is as meek as he is mad, and his children are…well, children.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: The throne should take a lesson from Stark and Lannister. At least they fight. What do the Targaryens do? King Aerys_I_Targaryen hides amongst his books, Prince Rhaegel prances naked through the Red Keep's halls, and Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen broods at Summerhall.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: Kyle: Aerys_I_Targaryen is weak, and when he dies it will be bloody war between Lord Brynden_Rivers and Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen for the crown, the Hand against the heir.Maynard: You have forgotten Prince Rhaegel, my friend. He comes next in line to Aerys, not Maekar, and Aelor_Targaryen Aelora_Targaryen after him.

name: Rhaegel Targaryen
quote: Kyle: Rhaegel is feeble-minded. Why, I bear him no ill will, but the man is good as dead, and Aelor_Targaryen Aelora_Targaryen of his as well, though whether they will die of Maekar_I_Targaryen mace or Brynden_Rivers spells…Aegon: Prince Maekar_I_Targaryen is Prince Rhaegel's brother. He loves him well. He'd never do harm to him or his.

name: Rhaego
quote: One-eyed crone: What shall he be called, the stallion who mounts the world? Daenerys: He shall be called Rhaego. Dothraki: Rhaego, Rhaego, Rhaego, Rhaego!

name: Rhaego
quote: Drogo: What is meaning, name Rhaego? Daenerys: My brother Rhaegar_Targaryen was a fierce warrior, my sun-and-stars. He died before I was born. Ser Jorah_Mormont says that he was the last of the dragons. Drogo: Is good name, Dan Ares wife, moon of my life.

name: Rhaego
quote: Jorah: The stallion is the khal of khals promised in ancient prophecy, child. He will unite the Dothraki into a single khalasar and ride to the ends of the earth, or so it was promised. All the people of the world will be his herd. Daenerys: Oh. I named him Rhaego. Jorah: A name to make the Usurper's blood run cold.

name: Rhaego
quote: Daenerys: My son... Rhaego... where is he? I want him. Jhiqui: The boy... he did not live, Khaleesi.

name: Rhaego
quote: Monstrous. Twisted. I drew him forth myself. He was scaled like a lizard, blind, with the stub of a tail and small leather wings like the wings of a bat. When I touched him, the flesh sloughed off the bone, and inside he was full of graveworms and the stink of corruption. He had been dead for years.

name: Rhaego
quote: Daenerys: My handmaids say there are ghosts here. Jorah: There are ghosts everywhere. We carry them with us wherever we go. Daenerys [thinking]: Yes. Viserys_Targaryen, Khal Drogo, my son Rhaego, they are with me always.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
quote: You're hurting me. You're hurting me.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
quote: When Viserys_Targaryen sold their mother's crown, the last joy had gone from him, leaving only rage.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
quote: Whenever Aerys_II_Targaryen gave a man to the flames, Queen Rhaella would have a visitor in the night.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
quote: The queen your mother was always mindful of her duty.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
quote: I have had the best mother any child could wish for, the Mother Above, and you are to thank for her.

name: Rhaelle Targaryen
quote: Stannis has some of the dragon blood in him, yes. Robert_I_Baratheon Renly_Baratheon did as well. Rhaelle, Aegon_V_Targaryen little girl, she was how they came by it … their Steffon_Baratheon mother … she used to call me Uncle Maester when she was a little girl. I remembered that, so I allowed myself to hope …

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: You are fearless when facing a girl on a horse, I see. The next time I come, I will be on a dragon. Throw dirt on me then, I pray you.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: I do not have time for tears.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys: Should the dragons turn up, anywhere from here to Yi Ti, we will demand their return. They were stolen from us, they are ours by right. If that demand should be denied, then we must needs go and get them. Take them back if we can, kill them if not. No hatchlings can hope to stand against Vermithor and Dreamfyre. Rhaena: And Silverwing? Alysanne_Targaryen— Jaehaerys: —had no part in this. I will not put her at risk. Rhaena: She is Rhaenys_Targaryen, and I am Visenya_Targaryen. I have never thought otherwise.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Alyssa_Velaryon blood is on your hands. Her blood is on your cock. May you die screaming. [...] She gave you one son, that should have been enough. Save my wife, you should have said, but what are wives to men like you? Hear this, my lord. Do not think to wed again. Take care of the whelps my mother gave you, my Boremund_Baratheon and Jocelyn_Baratheon. See that they want for nothing. Do that, and I will let you be. If I should hear even a whisper of your taking some other poor maid to wife, I will make another Harrenhal of Storm's End, with you and her inside it.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Franklyn: I cannot claim to know Aerea_Targaryen, but I would say she is well rid of you, as was Fair Isle. If she turns up here we shall see her off, just as we did her mother. Rhaena: You do not know Aerea, that much is true. If she does indeed find her way to these shores, my lord, you may find she is not as forbearing as her mother. Oh, and I wish you luck if you should try to ‘see off’ the Black Dread. Balerion quite enjoyed Androw_Farman, by now he may desire another course.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: It would seem that I am doomed to always come too late.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: I fed Androw_Farman to my dragon. If you make me take another, I may eat him myself.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: She is mad. Does she think to frighten me? Me? I did not fear the wroth of Maegor the Cruel, should I fear hers?

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Whatever else she may be, Rhaena remains the blood of the dragon, and my sister, whom I love.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: My brother Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Aenys_I) died at the hands of Maegor_I_Targaryen in the Battle Beneath the Gods Eye. His wife, my sister Rhaena, was not with him at the battle, but she died that day as well.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: So long as [my husband] is kind and gentle and noble, I know that I shall love him.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Brother, if it please you, we have brought Daenaera_Velaryon.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Lady Rhaena would make a splendid queen.

name: Rhaena Targaryen
quote: Of Baelor_I_Targaryen other sisters, Rhaena was almost as pious as her brother, and in time became a septa. Elaena_Targaryen, the youngest, was more willful than Rhaena, but not as beautiful as either of her sisters.

name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
quote: Rhaenyra: Dear brother. I had hoped that you were dead. Aegon: After you. You are the elder.

name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
quote: I offered her an honorable peace, and the whore spat in my face. What happens now is on her own head.

name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
quote: Daemon_I_Blackfyre, the brothers Toyne, the Vulture King, Grand Maester Hareth_(Maester)... traitors have always paid with their lives... even Rhaenyra Targaryen. She was daughter to Viserys_I_Targaryen and mother to Aegon_III_Targaryen Viserys_II_Targaryen, yet she died a traitor's death for trying to usurp Aegon_II_Targaryen crown.

name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
quote: The Viserys_I_Targaryen intended his daughter Rhaenyra to follow him, do you deny it? But as the king lay dying the Criston_Cole decided that it should be otherwise.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Aegon, First of His Name, King of All Westeros, and Shield of His People.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Meria: I will not fight you, nor will I kneel to you. Dorne has no king. Tell Aegon_I_Targaryen that. Rhaenys: I shall, but we will come again, Princess, and the next time we shall come with fire and blood. Meria: Your words. Ours are Unbowed, Unbent, Unbroken. You may burn us, my lady ... but you will not bend us, break us, or make us bow. This is Dorne. You are not wanted here. Return at your peril.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Visenya’s dragon was Vhagar, Rhaenys had Meraxes, and Aegon rode Balerion, the Black Dread.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Jorah:The three heads were Aegon and his sisters. Daenerys:I am descended from Aegon_I_Targaryen and Rhaenys through their son Aenys_I_Targaryen and their grandson Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: We can go back to the ends of the earth together. But I'll get there first, as I'll be flying.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: What did Viserys_I_Targaryen ever have that she did not? A little sausage? Is that all it takes to be a king?

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Beloved daughter of Lady Jocelyn_Baratheon and Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Jaehaerys_I), faithful wife to Lord Corlys_Velaryon, mother and grandmother, the Queen Who Never Was lived fearlessly, and died amidst blood and fire. She was fifty-five years old.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: I see no babes. Only dragonspawn.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Last night he had dreamt of Rhaegar_Targaryen children. Lord Tywin_Lannister had laid the bodies beneath the Iron Throne, wrapped in the crimson cloaks of his house guard. That was clever of him; the blood did not show so badly against the red cloth. The little princess had been barefoot, still dressed in her bed gown, and Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar)... the boy...

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Rhaenys was a child too. Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen daughter. A precious little thing, younger than Sansa_Stark Arya_Stark. She had a small black kitten she called Balerion, did you know? I always wondered what happened to him. Rhaenys liked to pretend he was the true Balerion, the Black Dread of old, but I imagine the Lannisters taught her the difference between a kitten and a dragon quick enough, the day they broke down her door.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Why is it always the innocents who suffer most, when you high lords play your game of thrones?

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: It was Ser Amory_Lorch who brought me the girl's body, if you must know. He found her hiding under her father's bed, as if she believed Rhaegar_Targaryen could still protect her.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Ser Amory_Lorch was almost as bestial [as Gregor_Clegane] with Rhaenys. I asked him afterward why it had required half a hundred thrusts to kill a girl of... two? Three? He said she'd kicked him and would not stop screaming. If Lorch had half the wits the gods gave a turnip, he would have calmed her with a few sweet words and used a soft silk pillow. The blood was in him.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Justice is in short supply this side of the mountains. There has been none for Elia_Martell, Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar), or Rhaenys. Why should there be any for you?

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: Arys: Only a beast would harm Myrcella_Baratheon. Doran: My sister Elia_Martell had a little girl as well. Her name was Rhaenys. She was a princess too.

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
quote: And what did Robert say when he saw them? Did he smile? Barristan Selmy had been badly wounded on the Trident, so he had been spared the sight of Lord Tywin_Lannister gift, but oft he wondered. If I had seen him smile over the red ruins of Rhaegar_Targaryen children, no army on this earth could have stopped me from killing him.

name: Richard Horpe
quote: Risk is part of war. Every battle is a gamble, Snow. The man who does nothing also takes a risk.

name: Richard Horpe
quote: Richard: Only the Lord of Light can save us now. Wouldn't you agree?Justin: My faith runs as deep as your own, Richard, you know that.Richard: It is your courage I question, Justin, not your faith. You have preached defeat every step of the way since we rode forth from Deepwood Motte. It makes me wonder whose side you are on.

name: Richard Horpe
quote: Horpe will take Val to wife if I command it, but it is battle he lusts for. As a squire he dreamed of a white cloak, but Cersei_Lannister spoke against him and Robert_I_Baratheon passed him over. Perhaps rightly. Ser Richard is too fond of killing.

name: Richard Horpe
quote: Dormund was cut down in the battle for the Wall, and him still half a boy. One o' Stannis_Baratheon knights did for him, some bastard all in grey steel with moths upon his shield. I saw the cut, but my boy was dead before I reached him.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Rickard: You are the gentle sex. A man has a need for vengeance. Catelyn: Give me Cersei_Lannister, Lord Karstark, and you would see how gentle a woman can be.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Any man who steps between a father and his vengeance asks for death.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: How can it be treason to kill Lannisters, when it is not treason to free them? Has Your Grace forgotten that we are at war with Casterly Rock? In war you kill your enemies. Didn't Eddard_Stark teach you that, boy?

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Robb: This is my work, he dies at my word. He must die by my hand. Rickard: For that much, I thank you. But for naught else. The blood of the First Men flows in my veins as much as yours, boy. You would do well to remember that. I was named for Rickard_Stark. I raised my banners against King Aerys_II_Targaryen for Eddard_Stark, and against King Joffrey_Baratheon for you. At Oxcross and the Whispering Wood and in the Battle of the Camps, I rode beside you, and I stood with Lord Eddard on the Trident. We are kin, Stark and Karstark.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Old gods or new, it makes no matter, no man is so accursed as the kinslayer.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: You cannot afford to seem indecisive in front of men like Roose_Bolton and Rickard Karstark. Make no mistake, Robb—these are your bannermen, not your friends.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Lord Rickard Karstark, gaunt and hollow-eyed in his grief, took his seat like a man in a nightmare, his long beard uncombed and unwashed.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: Rickard Karstark killed more than Tion_Frey and Willem_Lannister. He killed my honor.

name: Rickard Karstark
quote: My father never bellowed like the Greatjon, but he was no less dangerous in his wroth.

name: Rickard Stark
quote: Lord Rickard demanded trial by combat, and the king granted the request. Stark armored himself as for battle, thinking to duel one of the Kingsguard. Me, perhaps. Instead they took him to the throne room and suspended him from the rafters while two of Aerys_II_Targaryen pyromancers kindled a blaze beneath him. The king told him that fire was the champion of House Targaryen. So all Lord Rickard needed to do to prove himself innocent of treason was ... well, not burn.

name: Rickard Stark
quote: They tend to us when we are sick and injured, or distraught over the illness of a parent or a child. Whenever we are weakest and most vulnerable, there they are. Sometimes they heal us, and we are duly grateful. When they fail, they console us in our grief, and we are grateful for that as well. Out of gratitude we give them a place beneath our roof and make them privy to all our shames and secrets, a part of every council. And before too long, the ruler has become the ruled. That was how it was with Lord Rickard Stark. Maester Walys_Flowers was his grey rat's name.

name: Rickard Stark
quote: The day I learned that Brandon_Stark was to marry Catelyn_Stark, though ... there was nothing sweet about that pain. He never wanted her, I promise you that. He told me so, on our last night together ... but Rickard Stark had great ambitions too. Southron ambitions that would not be served by having his heir marry the daughter of Rodrik_Ryswell.

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Rickon: You let Eddard_Stark be. You let him be. Bran: Rickon. Father's not here. Rickon: Yes he is. I saw him. I saw him last night.

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Are we going home? I want my horse. And I want applecakes and butter and honey, and Shaggy. Are we going where Shaggydog is?

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Rickon needs you. He's only three, he doesn't understand what's happening. He thinks everyone has deserted him, so he follows me around all day, clutching my leg and crying. I don't know what to do with him.

name: Rickon Stark
quote: His baby brother had been wild as a winter storm since he learned Robb_Stark was riding off to war, weeping and angry by turns.

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Though he knew Lord Eddard_Stark was dead, sometimes Rickon forgot ... willfully, Bran suspected. His little brother was stubborn as only a boy of four can be.

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Brienne: I ... there are no words, my lady. My good lady. Your sons, they ... they're with the gods now.Catelyn: Are they? What god would let this happen? Rickon was only a baby. How could he deserve such a death?

name: Rickon Stark
quote: Roose_Bolton has Lord Eddard's Arya_Stark. To thwart him White Harbor must have Eddard_Stark son ... and the direwolf. The wolf will prove the boy is who we say he is, should the Dreadfort attempt to deny him. That is my price, Lord Davos. Smuggle me back my liege lord, and I will take Stannis_Baratheon as my king.

name: Rigney
quote: Archmaester Rigney once wrote that history is a wheel, for the nature of man is fundamentally unchanging. What has happened before will perforce happen again, he said.

name: Rob
quote: Lying there, so still and cold, with a ragged red wound gaping in his belly, he did not look very big at all.

name: Rob
quote: I worked them hard. Drew a little blood off that big lackwit, just to make him mad. He fights better when he's mad.

name: Robar Royce
quote: A second son must find glory where he can. A man grows weary of tourneys.

name: Robar Royce
quote: Catelyn: Brienne_Tarth is innocent, Robar. You have my word, on Eddard_Stark grave and my honor as a Stark! Robar: I will hold them. Get her away.

name: Robar Royce
quote: Ser Robar's ancestral runes proved small protection as Ser Loras_Tyrell split his shield and drove him from his saddle to crash with an awful clangor in the dirt. Robar lay moaning as the victor made his circuit of the field.

name: Robar Royce
quote: They are still unblooded, Catelyn thought as she watched Lord Bryce_Caron goad Ser Robar into juggling a brace of daggers. It is all a game to them still, a tourney writ large, and all they see is the chance for glory and honor and spoils. They are boys drunk on song and story, and like all boys, they think themselves immortal.

name: Robar Royce
quote: Renly_Baratheon is dead. Robar as well. What use to speak of them?

name: Robb Rivers
quote: Though a dozen birds took wing, not one ever reached Aemond_Targaryen; Red Robb Rivers, said to be the finest archer in all Westeros, took them down on the wing.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Robb: I can't release the Jaime_Lannister, not even if I wanted to. My lords would never abide it. Catelyn: Your lords made you their king. Robb: And can unmake me just as easy.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Love's not always wise, I've learned. It can lead us to great folly, but we follow our hearts ... wherever they take us.

name: Robb Stark
quote: I've made a botch of everything but the battles, haven't I? I thought the battles would be the hard part, but ... if I had listened to you and kept Theon_Greyjoy as my hostage, I'd still rule the north, and Bran_Stark and Rickon_Stark would be alive and safe in Winterfell.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Gods be good, why would any man ever want to be king? When everyone was shouting King in the North, King in the North, I told myself ... swore to myself ... that I would be a good king, as honorable as Eddard_Stark, strong, just, loyal to my friends and brave when I faced my enemies ... now I can't even tell one from the other. How did it all get so confused? Lord Rickard_Karstark's fought at my side in half a dozen battles. His sons died for me in the Whispering Wood. Tion_Frey and Willem_Lannister were my enemies. Yet now I have to kill my dead friends' father for their sakes.

name: Robb Stark
quote: I have won every battle, yet somehow I'm losing the war.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Catelyn: You would not be the first king to bend the knee, nor even the first Stark. Robb: Never. Catelyn: There is no shame in it. Balon_Greyjoy bent the knee to Robert_I_Baratheon when his rebellion failed. Torrhen_Stark bent the knee to Aegon_I_Targaryen rather than see his army face the fires. Robb: Did Aegon kill King Torrhen’s father?

name: Robb Stark
quote: If you keep all your treasures in one purse, you only make it easier for those who would rob you.

name: Robb Stark
quote: No sword is strong until it's been tempered. The Stark boy is a child. No doubt he likes the sound of warhorns well enough, and the sight of his banners fluttering in the wind, but in the end it comes down to butcher's work. I doubt he has the stomach for it.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Eddard: Robb is only a boy. Varys: A boy with an army.

name: Robb Stark
quote: There sits the only king I mean to bow my knee to, m'lords. The King in the North!

name: Robb Stark
quote: He is a boy no longer, she realized with a pang. He is sixteen now, a man grown. Just look at him. War had melted all the softness from his face and left him hard and lean.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Robb Stark had won more battles in a year than the Mace_Tyrell had in twenty.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Tyrion: He foreswore himself, shamed Walder_Frey, betrayed a solemn promise. Where is the honor in that? Kevan: He chose Jeyne_Westerling's honor over his own. Once he had deflowered her, he had no other course.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Yes, Lord Umber, leave me to the king. He means to give me a scolding before he forgives me. That’s how he deals with treason, our King in the North. Or should I call you the King Who Lost the North, Your Grace?

name: Robb Stark
quote: The crown is crushing him, she thought. He wants so much to be a good king, to be brave and honorable and clever, but the weight is too much for a boy to bear.

name: Robb Stark
quote: He won the war on the battlefield and lost it in a bedchamber.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Stannis: Your brother was the rightful Lord of Winterfell. If he had stayed home and done his duty, instead of crowning himself and riding off to conquer the riverlands, he might be alive today. Be that as it may. You are not Robb, no more than I am Robert_I_Baratheon. Jon: I loved my brother. Stannis: And I mine. Yet they were what they were, and so are we.

name: Robb Stark
quote: I would have slain Robb Stark in the Whispering Wood, if I could have reached him. Some fools got in my way. Does it matter how the boy perished? He's no less dead, and his kingdom died when he did.

name: Robb Stark
quote: More beast than boy, that one, puffed up with pride and bloodlust ... Robb Stark betrayed us all. He abandoned the north to the cruel mercies of the ironmen to carve out a fairer kingdom for himself along the Trident. Then he abandoned the riverlords who had risked much and more for him, breaking his marriage pact with Walder_Frey to wed Jeyne_Westerling who caught his eye. The Young Wolf? He was a vile dog and died like one.

name: Robb Stark
quote: Robb who had been more a brother to Theon than any son born of Balon_Greyjoy's loins. Murdered at the Red Wedding, butchered by the Freys. I should have been with him. Where was I? I should have died with him.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: The Tyrion_Lannister. Mother, can I make him fly? I want to see him fly.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Robert: It wasn't me, it was a giant hurt the castle. Sansa_Stark killed him! I hate her! She's a bastard and I hate her! I don't want to be leeched! Colemon: My lord, your blood needs thinning. It is the bad blood that makes you angry, and the rage that brings on the shaking.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Alayne: Mya_Stone will keep the mules from biting, and I'll be riding just behind you. I'm only a girl, not as brave or strong as you. If I can do it, I know you can, Sweetrobin. Robert: I could do it, but I don't choose to. Tell Mya I am going to stay abed. Perhaps I will come down on the morrow, if I feel better. Today is too cold out, and my head hurts. You can have some sweetmilk too, and I'll tell Gretchel to bring us some honeycombs to eat. We'll sleep and kiss and play games, and you can read me about the Winged Knight.

name: Robert Arryn
