quote: Myranda: My lord, you've grown so big! Robert: Have I? Myranda: You will be taller than me soon.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Alayne: Sweetrobin, I'm scared. Hold my hand, and help me get across. I know you're not scared. Robert: I'm not? Alayne: Not you. You're my winged knight, Ser Sweetrobin. Robert: The Winged Knight could fly. Alayne: Higher than the mountains.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Lord Robert. Six years old, sickly, and prone to weep if you take his dolls away. Jon_Arryn's trueborn heir, by all the gods, yet there are some who say he is too weak to sit his father's seat.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Isn't he beautiful? And strong too, don't you believe the things you hear. Jon knew. The seed is strong, he told me. His last words. He kept saying Robert's name, and he grabbed my arm so hard he left marks. Tell them, the seed is strong. His seed. He wanted everyone to know what a good strong boy my baby was going to be.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: The boy is utterly without discipline. He will never be strong enough to rule unless he is taken away from Lysa_Arryn for a time.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: The boy is weak and sickly.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Arryn won't live long enough to breed.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: No matter what you offered him, Robert always wanted more.

name: Robert Arryn
quote: Petyr: So tell me, sweetling—why is Harrold_Hardyng the Heir? Alayne: He is not Anya_Waynwood's heir. He's Robert's heir. If Robert were to die ... Petyr: When Robert dies. Our poor brave Sweetrobin is such a sickly boy, it is only a matter of time.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: I will not kill Barristan_Selmy for loyalty, nor for fighting well.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Balon: You may take my head, but you cannot name me traitor. No Greyjoy ever swore an oath to a Baratheon. Robert: Swear one now, or lose that stubborn head of yours.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: The gods be damned. It was a hollow victory they gave me. A crown ... it was Lyanna_Stark I prayed them for. Your sister, safe ... and mine again, as she was meant to be. I ask you, Ned, what good is it to wear a crown? The gods mock the prayers of kings and cowherds alike.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Eddard: You're too fat for your armor, Robert. Robert: Fat? Fat, is it? Is that how you speak to your king? Ah, damn you, Ned, why are you always right?

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: I swear to you, I was never so alive as when I was winning this throne, or so dead as now that I've won it.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: STOP THIS MADNESS, IN THE NAME OF YOUR KING!

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Robert: The realm ... the realm knows ... what a wretched king I've been. Bad as Aerys_II_Targaryen, the gods spare me. Eddard: No, not as bad as Aerys, Your Grace. Not near so bad as Aerys.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: The king was a great disappointment to Jon. Eddard_Stark had talked of him often: the peerless Robert Baratheon, demon of the Trident, the fiercest warrior of the realm, a giant among princes. Jon saw only a fat man, red-faced under his beard, sweating through his silks. He walked like a man half in his cups.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Varys had hit upon a truth; tell Robert Baratheon he could not, should not, or must not do a thing, and it was as good as done.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Robert was never the same after he put on that crown. Some men are like swords, made for fighting. Hang them up and they go to rust.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: They said Robert Baratheon was strong as a bull and fearless in battle, a man who loved nothing better than war.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Robert wanted smiles and cheers, always, so he went where he found them, to his friends and his whores. Robert wanted to be loved. My brother Tyrion_Lannister has the same disease.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Robert was as generous with his coin as he was with his cock.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Sandor: Robert is the king of the worms now. Is that why you're down in the earth, to keep his court for him? Beric: The king is dead, but we are still king's men, though the royal banner we bore was lost at the Mummer's Ford when your brother's butchers fell upon us. Robert is slain, but his realm remains. And we defend her.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Robert ... He is in my dreams as well. Laughing. Drinking. Boasting. Those were the things he was best at. Those, and fighting. I never bested him at anything.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: It's not Aerys_II_Targaryen I rue, it's Robert ... Why is it no one names Robert oathbreaker? He tore the realm apart, yet I am the one with shit for honor.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Yes, I hoped Bran_Stark would die. So did you. Even Robert thought that would have been for the best. 'We kill our horses when they break a leg, and our dogs when they go blind, but we are too weak to give the same mercy to crippled children,' he told me. He was blind himself at the time, from drink.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Arys: Robert was no monster. Arianne: He climbed onto his throne over the corpses of children, though I will grant you he was no Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: Jaime: What do you know of sin, coz? I killed Aerys_II_Targaryen. Lancel The brave man slays with a sword, the craven with a wineskin. We are both kingslayers, ser. Jaime: Robert was no true king. Some might even say that a stag is a lion's natural prey.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: He was a good knight but a bad king, for he had no right to the throne he sat.

name: Robert I Baratheon
quote: We all know what my brother would do. Robert would gallop up to the gates of Winterfell alone, break them with his warhammer, and ride through the rubble to slay Roose_Bolton with his left hand and Ramsay_Snow with his right. I am not Robert. But we will march, and we will free Winterfell ... or die in the attempt.

name: Robert Stone
quote: Jaime: Who knighted you? Osmund: Ser Robert... Stone. He's dead now, my lord..

name: Robert Stone
quote: Ser Robert Stone might have been some bastard from the Vale, he supposed, selling his sword in the Disputed Lands. On the other hand, he might be no more than a name Ser Osmund_Kettleblack cobbled together from a dead king and a castle wall. What was Cersei_Lannister thinking when she gave this one a white cloak?

name: Robin Peasebury
quote: Robin: I am starting to suspect you have been Roose_Bolton creature all along. Is that the way of it? Did he send you to us to whisper poison in Stannis_Baratheon ear? Hugo: Lord Pea Pod. If you were a man, I would kill you for that, but my sword is made of too fine a steel to besmirch with craven's blood.

name: Robin Ryger
quote: Jaime: Come to wish me godspeed, Ser Robin? Robin: Come to take you back, Kingslayer. How is it that you've lost your golden hair? Jaime: I hope to blind my enemies with the sheen off my head. It's worked well enough for you.

name: Robin Ryger
quote: Robin: Say what you will, Kingslayer, but say it quickly. Jaime: I know a better way to settle this—single combat. You and I. Robin: I was not born this morning, Lannister. Jaime: No, but you're like to die this afternoon. I'll fight you in chains. What could you fear? Robin: Not you, ser. If the choice were mine, I'd like nothing better, but I am commanded to bring you back alive if possible.

name: Robin Ryger
quote: In his day Ser Robin Ryger had been a notably tenacious fighter, but his day was done; he was of an age with Hoster_Tully, and had grown old with his lord.

name: Robyn Rhysling
quote: Three times more, they rode at each other, the wind whipping Ser Robyn's hair while the shards of broken lances flew round his bare face like wooden knives, which Dunk thought all the more wondrous when Aegon_V_Targaryen told him that Ser Robyn had lost his eye to a splinter from a broken lance not five years earlier. Leo_Tyrell_(Longthorn) was too chivalrous to aim another lance at Ser Robyn's unprotected head, but even so Rhysling's stubborn courage (or was it folly?) left Dunk astounded.

name: Roderick Dustin
quote: We have come to die for the Rhaenyra_Targaryen.

name: Roderick Dustin
quote: Best make an end to these lions before the dragons come.

name: Roderick Dustin
quote: Criston: If there is to be battle here, many of your own will die as well. Roderick: That's why we come. Winter's here. Time for us to go. No better way to die than sword in hand.

name: Roderick Dustin
quote: As the singers tell it, Lord Roderick was blood from head to heel as he came on, with splintered shield and cracked helm, yet so drunk with battle that he did not even seem to feel his wounds.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: Sandor: Are you training women here? Rodrik: I am training knights. They will have steel when they are ready. When they are of an age.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: Never draw your sword unless you mean to use it. How many times must I tell you, foolish boy?

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: The gods frown on the gambler.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: Rodrik: We shall try and find you a prospect more to your taste. Donella: Perhaps you need not look very far, ser.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: When we speak of the morrow nothing is ever certain.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: Theon: It grieves me that we must meet as foes. Rodrik: My own grief is that I must wait a while to hang you. Theon Turncloak.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: Know your foe, Ser Rodrik had taught him once; Jon knew Halder, brutally strong but short of patience, with no taste for defense.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: The castellan at Winterfell is a brave man, but age has stiffened his wits as well as his limbs. When he learns that one of his king's bannermen is under attack by the fearsome Dagmer Cleftjaw, he will summon his strength and ride to Leobald_Tallhart aid. It is his duty. Ser Rodrik is nothing if not dutiful.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: That dear brave loyal old soul. She could almost see him, tugging on his fierce white whiskers.

name: Rodrik Cassel
quote: There is always someone quicker and stronger, Ser Rodrik had once told Jon and Robb_Stark. He's the man you want to face in the yard before you need to face his like upon a battlefield.

name: Rodrik Greyjoy
quote: A fine fool he proved, yet not half so foolish as Dalton_Greyjoy.

name: Rodrik Greyjoy
quote: Patrek: Never mind that the bell has been rung just once in three hundred years. Theon: When my brother stormed Seagard. If Jason_Mallister supposes I bear him some enmity for that, it's only because he never knew Rodrik.

name: Rodrik Greyjoy
quote: Balon: Not here, not in Pyke, not in my hearing, you will not name him brother, Robb_Stark of Eddard_Stark who put your true brothers to the sword. Or have you forgotten Rodrik and Maron_Greyjoy, who were your own blood? Theon: I forget nothing. I remember my brothers very well.

name: Rodrik Greyjoy
quote: And now I must tell Alannys_Harlaw that Theon_Greyjoy is dead, and drive yet another dagger through her heart. There were two knives buried there already. On the blades were writ the words Rodrik and Maron_Greyjoy, and many a time they twisted cruelly in the night.

name: Rodrik Harlaw
quote: Rodrik: I prefer my history dead. Dead history is writ in ink, the living sort in blood. Asha: Do you want to die old and craven in your bed? Rodrik: How else? Though not till I'm done reading.

name: Rodrik Harlaw
quote: Euron: I have sailed the Smoking Sea and seen Valyria. Rodrik: Have you? Euron: Reader, you would do well to keep your nose in your books.

name: Rodrik Harlaw
quote: Harlaw was not the largest of the Iron Islands, but it was the richest and most populous, and Lord Rodrik's power was not to be despised.

name: Rodrik Harlaw
quote: Lord Rodrik was seldom seen without a book in hand, be it in the privy, on the deck of his Sea Song, or whilst holding audience.

name: Rodrik Harlaw
quote: You read too much and fight too little. Your blood is milk.

name: Rodrik Ryswell
quote: And my lord father was always pleased to play host to the heir to Winterfell. My father had great ambitions for House Ryswell. He would have served up my maidenhead to any Stark who happened by, but there was no need. Brandon_Stark was never shy about taking what he wanted.

name: Rogar Baratheon
quote: Maegor_I_Targaryen has only one dragon. Our prince has two.

name: Rogar Baratheon
quote: I have seen Prunella_Celtigar Prudence_Celtigar. They have no chins, no teats, and no sense.

name: Rogar Baratheon
quote: You are weak, as weak as your Aenys_I_Targaryen was, as weak as your son. Sentiment may be forgiven in a mother, but not in a regent, and never in a king. We were fools to crown Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. He thinks only of himself, and he will be a worse king than his father was. Thank the gods that it is not too late. We must act now and put him aside.

name: Rogar Baratheon
quote: All I did and all I tried to do was for the good of the realm and the Iron Throne.

name: Rogar Baratheon
quote: My maester says that I am dying. I believe him. Even before the Shivers there was pain. It has gotten worse since. He gives me milk of the poppy, and that helps, but I use only a little. I would not sleep away what life remains to me. Nor would I die abed, bleeding out of my arse. I mean to find my brother Borys_Baratheon and deal with him, and with this Vulture_King_(Jaehaerys_I) as well. A fool's errand, Garon_Baratheon calls it. He is not wrong. But when I die, I want to die with my axe in my hand, screaming a curse.

name: Roger Corne
quote: A crown does not make a man a king. You should wear a horseshoe on your head, blacksmith.

name: Roger Ryswell
quote: Roger: These dead were all strong men, and none of them were stabbed. Theon_Greyjoy not our killer. Roose: I am inclined to agree. Strength aside, he does not have it in him to betray Ramsay_Snow. Roger: If not him, who? Stannis_Baratheon has some man inside the castle, that's plain.

name: Roggon Rustbeard
quote: Asha: Scout ahead and make sure our way is clear. I want no surprises when we reach the shore. If you come on wolves, ride back to me with word. Roggon: If we must.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Duncan: I... I am sorry for all your losses, m'lady. I want to say... your gown... Rohann: Gown? I wear no gown. Duncan: Your hair, I meant... it's soft and... Rohanne: And how would you know that, ser? If you had ever touched my hair, I should think that I might remember. Duncan: Not soft. Red, I meant to say. Your hair is very red. Rohanne: Very red, ser? Oh, not as red as your face, I hope.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Egg: Are you the Red Widow? I'm near as tall as you are! Rohanne: Another boy made that same observation not half a year ago. I sent him to the rack to make him taller.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: I was ten years old when Daemon_I_Blackfyre rose. I begged Wyman_Webber not to put himself at risk, or at least to leave my husband. Who would protect me, if both my men were gone? So he took me up onto the ramparts, and pointed out Coldmoat's strong points. 'Keep them strong,' he said, 'and they will keep you safe. If you see to your defenses, no man may do you harm.' The first thing he pointed at was the moat. My first husband perished on the Redgrass Field. My father found me others, but the Stranger took them, too. I no longer trust in men, no matter how ample they may seem. I trust in stone and steel and water. I trust in moats, ser, and mine will not go dry.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Rohanne: Look at my fields, Osgrey. How dry they are. I would have been a fool to set a fire. Had the wind changed direction, the flames might well have leapt the stream and burned out half my crops. Eustace: Might have? It was my woods that burned, and you that burned them. Most like you cast some witch's spell to drive the wind, just as you used your dark arts to slay your husbands and your brothers!

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: I scarce remember Addam_Osgrey any longer. It was more than half my life ago. I remember that I loved him, though. I have not loved any of the others.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: I cannot return to Coldmoat empty-handed. They will say the Red Widow has lost her bite, that she was too weak to do justice, that she could not protect her smallfolk.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: I have heard a thousand empty courtesies in my time, but you are the first knight who ever said pissing in my presence.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Those pissing contests are how lords judge one another's strength, and woe to any man who shows his weakness. A woman must needs piss twice as hard, if she hopes to rule. And if that woman should happen to be small... Lord_Stackhouse covets my Horseshoe Hills, Ser Clifford_Conklyn has an old claim to Leafy Lake, those dismal Durwells live by stealing cattle... and beneath mine own roof I have Lucas_Inchfield. Every day I wake wondering if this might be the day he marries me by force.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Rohanne: You are quite mad. If you were better born, I’d marry you. Duncan: Aye, m'lady. And if pigs had wings and scales and breathed flame, they'd be as good as dragons.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: The woman has a spider's heart. She murdered three of her husbands. And all her brothers died in swaddling clothes. Five, there were. Or six, mayhaps, I don't recall. They stood between her and the castle. She would whip the skin off any peasant who displeased her, I do not doubt, but for you to cut Wolmer... no, she will not suffer such an insult.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Aegon: Whenever she gives birth, a demon comes by night to carry off the issue. Sam_Stoops' Sam_Stoops'_wife says she sold her babes unborn to the Lord of the Seven Hells, so he'd teach her his black arts. Duncan: Highborn ladies don't meddle with the black arts. They dance and sing and do embroidery. Aegon: Maybe she dances with demons and embroiders evil spells.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: You'd best not take any food or drink at Coldmoat, ser. The Red Widow poisoned all her husbands.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: When she smiled, she looked a girl of five-and-ten, not a woman five-and-twenty. A pretty girl full of mischief and laughter.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: There has been a dearth of suitors. My good-sister is not hard to look upon, you will have noticed, and a stout castle and broad lands add to her charms. You would think that younger sons and landless knights would swarm about her ladyship like flies. You would be wrong. The four dead husbands make them wary, and there are those who will say that she is barren, too... though never in her hearing, unless they yearn to see the inside of a crow cage. She has carried two children to term, a boy and a girl, but neither lived to see a name day. Those few who are not put off by talk of poisonings and sorcery want no part of the Lucas_Inchfield.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: She's not for the likes of you. She is too small, too clever, and much too dangerous.

name: Rohanne Webber
quote: Aegon: She said she wanted to give you a new horse, ser. Duncan: Even highborn ladies don’t get all they want. It wasn't a horse I wanted. I took something else to remember her by instead. A lock of that red hair.

name: Roland Crakehall
quote: Roland: The castle is ours, ser, and the city. Jaime: Tell them Aerys_II_Targaryen is dead. Spare all those who yield and hold them captive. Roland: Shall I proclaim a new king as well? Jaime: Proclaim who you bloody well like.

name: Roland Crakehall
quote: Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) is what he is, but he is still your blood and mine. I have no doubt Ser Roland will turn him up, and Aegon_V_Targaryen with him.

name: Roland Waynwood
quote: Roland: I had heard that Lord Petyr_Baelish was fair of face and full of grace, but no one ever told me that she was a thief.Alayne: You wrong me, ser. I am no thief!Roland:Then how do you explain this hole in my chest, from where you stole my heart?Wallace: He is only t-teasing you, my lady. My n-n-nephew never had a h-h-heart.

name: Rolfe the Dwarf
quote: Rolfe the Dwarf's not so tall as he once was.

name: Rollam Westerling
quote: Rollam: Must I go too? I'm your squire.Robb: But I'm not in need of squiring just now.Rollam: Oh.Raynald: His Grace has gotten along for sixteen years without you, Rollam. He will survive a few hours more, I think.

name: Rollam Westerling
quote: Rollam Westerling, my squire.

name: Rollam Westerling
quote: A dutiful squire.

name: Rollam Westerling
quote: Bran would have been the same.

name: Rolland Storm
quote: The Bastard of Nightsong had a pox-ravaged face and an air of tattered chivalry; Ser Gerald_Gower was broad, bluff, and blond; Ser Andrew_Estermont stood a head taller, with a spade-shaped beard and shaggy brown eye-brows. They were all good men in their own ways, Davos thought.

name: Rolland Storm
quote: The pox-scarred bastard that Stannis_Baratheon had left to hold his castle was no callow tourney champion but a seasoned killer. If the gods were good, he would give Ser Loras_Tyrell the glorious end he seemed to want.

name: Rolland Uffering
quote: My husbands seldom linger long, I fear. The last died in the spring.

name: Rolland Uffering
quote: Lady Helicent_Uffering was sister to Ser Rolland Uffering, Lady Rohanne_Webber fourth husband, who died in the spring. My brother was his predecessor, Ser Simon_Staunton, who had the great misfortune to choke upon a chicken bone. Coldmoat crawls with revenants, it must be said. The husbands die yet their kin remain, to drink my lady's wines and eat her sweetmeats, like a plague of plump pink locusts done up in silk and velvet.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: Tyrion: Are these two known to you, Illyrio_Mopatis? They look like outlaws. Should I find my axe? Rolly: Your axe? Did you hear that, Haldon? The little man wants to fight with us! Haldon: Small men oft feel a need to prove their courage with unseemly boasts. I doubt if he could kill a duck. Tyrion: Fetch the duck. Haldon: If you insist. Rolly: I'm Duck, you mouthy little pisspot. Tyrion: I had a smaller duck in mind. Rolly: Did you hear, Haldon? He wants a smaller Duck! Haldon: I should gladly settle for a quieter one.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: Illyrio: How fares our lad? Haldon: He is as tall as Griff now. Three days ago he knocked Duck into a horse trough. Rolly: I wasn't knocked. I fell in just to make him laugh. Haldon: Your ploy was a success. I laughed myself.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: Haldon: Tell Tyrion_Lannister how you came by your name, why don't you? Rolly: A knight needs more than just the one name, and, well, we were in a field when Jon_Connington dubbed me, and I looked up and saw these ducks, so ... don't laugh, now.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: Griff: I am no knight. Tyrion: And yet Ser Duck says you knighted him. Griff: Duck talks too much. Tyrion: Some might wonder that a duck can talk at all.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: Duck will die for me if need be, and that's all I require in my Kingsguard.

name: Rolly Duckfield
quote: At least I convinced him to leave the other six slots open, else Duck might have six ducklings trailing after him, each more blindingly adequate than the last.

name: Rolph Spicer
quote: A square-built man with a broken nose and a close-cropped grey beard, he looked doughty enough.

name: Rolph Spicer
quote: Robb: Grey Wind doesn't like her uncle either. He bares his teeth every time Ser Rolph comes near him. Catelyn: Send Ser Rolph away. At once. Robb: Where? Back to the Crag, so the Lannisters can mount his head on a spike? Jeyne_Westerling loves him. He's her uncle, and a fair knight besides. I need more men like Rolph Spicer, not fewer. I am not going to banish him just because my wolf doesn't seem to like the way he smells. Catelyn: Robb. I told you once to keep Theon_Greyjoy close, and you did not listen. Listen now. Send this man away. I am not saying you must banish him. Find some task that requires a man of courage, some honorable duty, what it is matters not ... but do not keep him near you.

name: Rolph Spicer
quote: This grants Ser Rolph Spicer title to the castle Castamere and raises him to the rank of lord.

name: Rommo
quote: Symon: Thirteen ships ... that's not enough. A hundred ships might not be enough. Rommo: Wooden horses are no good. Dothraki will ride.

name: Rommo
quote: Grey Worm: If it pleases the Barristan_Selmy to recall, the Wise Masters hold our Hero too. Also the horselord Jhogo, Daenerys_Targaryen own blood rider. Rommo: Blood of her blood. He must be freed. The honor of the khalasar demands it.

name: Ronald Storm
quote: Ronnet_Connington going to kill you.

name: Ronald Storm
quote: No harm will come to any of you unless Ronnet_Connington proves an utter fool.

name: Ronel Rivers
quote: Ronel: Had Stannis_Baratheon won, all might have been different. Hosteen: Stannis lost. Wishing it were otherwise will not make it so. King Robb_Stark must make his peace with the Lannisters. He must put off his crown and bend the knee, little as he may like it.

name: Ronnel Arryn
quote: Mother, can I go flying with Visenya_Targaryen?

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: Jaime: How is it that you did not wed?Ronnet: Why, I went to Tarth and saw her. I had six years on her, yet the wench could look me in the eye. She was a sow in silk, though most sows have bigger teats. When she tried to talk she almost choked on her own tongue. I gave her a rose and told her it was all that she would ever have from me. The bear was less hairy than that freak, I'll—Jaime: You are speaking of a highborn lady, ser. Call her by her name. Call her Brienne_Tarth.Ronnet: Brienne. If it please my lord. Brienne the Beauty.

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: Ronnet: I am no traitor. I am King Tommen_Baratheon man, and yours.Kevan: So you say, ser. Words are wind.Ronnet: Send me against Jon_Connington, and I will bring you back his head, and the head of this false dragon too.

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: A roar went up from the crowd as a helmetless red-bearded man with a griffin on his shield went down before Brienne_Tarth.

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: She remembered a day at Evenfall, and a young knight with a rose in his hand. He brought the rose to give to me. Or so her septa told her. All she had to do was welcome him to Selwyn_Tarth castle. He was eighteen, with long red hair that tumbled to his shoulders. She was twelve, tightly laced into a stiff new gown, its bodice bright with garnets. The two of them were of a height, but she could not look him in the eye, nor say the simple words her septa had taught her. Ser Ronnet. I welcome you to my lord father's hall. It is good to look upon your face at last.

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: Brienne: One day I'll thank you in a mêlée, ser. Hyle: The way you thanked Red Ronnet?

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: In the mêlée at Bitterbridge she had sought out her suitors and battered them one by one, Richard_Farrow and Edmund_Ambrose and Ben_Bushy, Mark_Mullendore and Raymond_Nayland and Will_the_Stork. She had ridden over Harry_Sawyer and broken Robin_Potter's helm, giving him a nasty scar. And when the last of them had fallen, the Mother had delivered Connington to her. This time Ser Ronnet held a sword and not a rose. Every blow she dealt him was sweeter than a kiss.

name: Ronnet Connington
quote: Ser Ronnet was a landed knight, no more. For any such, the Maid of Tarth would have been a sweet plum indeed.

name: Roone
quote: I should like to see a dragon. I should like that very much.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Frequent leechings are the secret of a long life. A man must purge himself of bad blood.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Roose: Lord Tywin_Lannister is many leagues from here. He has many matters yet to settle at King's Landing. He will not march on Harrenhal for some time. Aenys: You do not know the Lannisters as we do, my lord. King Stannis_Baratheon thought Lord Tywin was a thousand leagues away as well, and it undid him. Roose: I am not a man to be undone, ser.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Roose: People fear you. Ramsay: Good. Roose: You are mistaken. It is not good. No tales were ever told of me. Do you think I would be sitting here if it were otherwise? Your amusements are your own, I will not chide you on that count, but you must be more discreet. A peaceful land, a quiet people. That has always been my rule. Make it yours.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Power tastes best when sweetened by courtesy.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: All you have I gave you. You would do well to remember that, bastard. As for this ... Theon_Greyjoy ... if you have not ruined him beyond redemption, he may yet be of some use to us. Get the keys and remove those chains from him, before you make me rue the day I raped your mother.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Fear is what keeps a man alive in this world of treachery and deceit.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: That man scares me.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Robb: Lord Roose never says a word, he only looks at me, and all I can think of is that room they have in the Dreadfort, where the Boltons hang the skins of their enemies. Bran: That's just one of Old Nan's stories. Isn't it?

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Lord Bolton, he used to say a naked man has few secrets, but a flayed man's got none.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Bolton's silence was a hundred times more threatening than Vargo_Hoat's slobbering malevolence. Pale as morning mist, his eyes concealed more than they told.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: This is a cold man.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: There was an agelessness about him, a stillness; on Roose Bolton's face, rage and joy looked much the same.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Once, a boy called Theon Greyjoy had enjoyed tweaking Bolton as they sat at council with Robb_Stark, mocking his soft voice and making japes about leeches. He must have been mad. This is no man to jape with. You had only to look at Bolton to know that he had more cruelty in his pinky toe than all the Freys combined.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Ramsay_Snow is just the shadow of the father.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Eddard_Stark had never had any reason to complain of the Lord of the Dreadfort, so far as Jon knew, but even so he had never trusted him, with his whispery voice and his pale, pale eyes.

name: Roose Bolton
quote: Roose has no feelings, you see. Those leeches that he loves so well sucked all the passions out of him years ago. He does not love, he does not hate, he does not grieve. This is a game to him, mildly diverting. Some men hunt, some hawk, some tumble dice. Roose plays with men. You and me, these Freys, Wyman_Manderly, Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Merrett), even Ramsay_Snow, we are but his playthings.

name: Roose Ryswell
quote: Hosteen: We should take the fight to Stannis_Baratheon and make an end to him. Harwood: Leave the castle? Would you have us charge blindly into the snow? Roose: To fight Lord Stannis we would first need to find him. Our scouts go out the Hunter's Gate, but of late, none of them return.

name: Rorge
quote: Come closer, and I'll shove that stick up your bunghole and fuck you bloody.

name: Rorge
quote: You're the ugliest woman I've ever seen, but don't think I can’t make you uglier. You want a nose like mine? Fight me, and you'll get one. And two eyes, that's too many. One scream out o' you, and I'll pop one out and make you eat it, and then I'll pull your fucking teeth out one by one.

name: Rorge
quote: Brienne: We only seek one outlaw. The Hound. Meribald: So Ser Hyle_Hunt told me. May the Seven save you, child. It's said he leaves a trail of butchered babes and ravished maids behind him. The Mad Dog of Saltpans, I have heard him called.

name: Rosamund Lannister
quote: Dressed in Myrcella_Baratheon's bedrobe with the maester's salve smeared across her face... she might even have fooled me, in a dim light.

name: Rosamund Lannister
quote: Rosamund doesn't truly favor me, but when she dresses up in my clothes people who don't know us think she's me.

name: Rosey
quote: Rosey was all that he wanted in the world.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Roslin: Lord Edmure, I hope I am not a disappointment to you. Edmure: You are a delight to me, my lady. And ever will be, I know. Roslin: My lord is kind. Edmure: My lady is beautiful. But why are you crying? Roslin: For joy. I weep for joy, my lord.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Catelyn: My brother has just lost Hoster_Tully. He needs time to mourn. Lothar: Roslin is a cheerful girl. She may be the very thing Lord Edmure_Tully needs to help him through his grief.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Why, I would wager a guess that even now Roslin is dancing round the Twins chanting 'Lady Tully, Lady Tully, Lady Roslin Tully.' By the morrow she'll be holding swatches of Riverrun red-and-blue to her cheek to picture how she'll look in her bride's cloak.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: She's prettier than I dared hope. I know there are more important things, spare me the sermon, septa.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Look at this little thing! No meat on her at all!

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Roslin caught Edmure_Tully. Her brothers gave her Robb_Stark Catelyn_Stark of wolf pelts for her wedding.

name: Roslin Frey
quote: Jaime: I am told your wife is pretty. She'd have to be, for you to bed her while Catelyn_Stark and Robb_Stark were being murdered. Edmure: I never knew. There were fiddlers outside the bedchamber... Jaime: And Lady Roslin was distracting you. Edmure: She... they made her do it, Lord Walder_Frey and the rest. Roslin never wanted... she wept, but I thought it was... Jaime: The sight of your rampant manhood? Aye, that would make any woman weep, I'm sure. Edmure: She is carrying my child.

name: Rossart
quote: Aerys: All the traitors. Rossart says they are inside the walls! He's gone to make them a warm welcome. Whose blood? Whose?. Jaime: Rossart's.

name: Rossart
quote: Queer that they never asked who killed Rossart...but of course, he was no one, lowborn, Hand for a fortnight, just another mad fancy of the Aerys_II_Targaryen.

name: Rossart
quote: Aerys's Hand, Rossart, was killed at a postern gate after cravenly attempting to flee the castle.

name: Rowan
quote: Did the Bastard hurt you? Chopped off your fingers, did he? Skinned your widdle toes? Knocked your teeth out? Poor lad. There will be no more o' that, I promise. You prayed, and the gods sent us. You want to die as Theon? We'll give you that. A nice quick death, 'twill hardly hurt at all.

name: Rowan
quote: Theon: Winter is coming ... Rowan: You have no right to mouth Lord Eddard_Stark words. Not you. Not ever.

name: Rowena Arryn
quote: Now, Jon_Arryn married thrice, but his first two wives gave him no children, so for long years his nephew Elbert_Arryn was his heir.

name: Rowley
quote: A man who knows how to ease pain will also know how to inflict it, but it is also important that we have a Lord Confessor who sees his work as duty, not pleasure.

name: Rugen
quote: Varys had transformed himself into a grizzled turnkey, reeking of sweat and sour wine.

name: Russell Merryweather
quote: Cersei: A little foster brother might be just what Tommen_Baratheon needs to wean him away from Margaery_Tyrell and her hens. In time they might grow as close as Robert_I_Baratheon and his boyhood friend Eddard_Stark. A fool, but a loyal fool. Tommen will have need of loyal friends to watch his back. Taena: Your Grace is kind, but Russell has never known any home but Longtable. I fear he would be lost in this great city.

name: Russell Merryweather
quote: Cersei: When do you mean to bring that boy of yours to court? Russell, was that his name? He could train with Tommen_Baratheon. Taena: That would thrill the boy, I know ... but things are so uncertain just now, I thought it best to wait until the danger passed. Cersei: Soon enough. Send word to Longtable and have Russell pack his best doublet and his wooden sword. A new young friend will be just the thing to help Tommen forget his loss, after Margaery_Tyrell little head has rolled."

name: Russell Merryweather
quote: He could foster the Merryweather boy himself, whilst Lady Taena accompanied Cersei_Lannister back to Casterly Rock.

name: Ryam
quote: Leave spells and prayers to priests and septons and bend your wits to learning truths a man can trust in.

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: Some problems cannot be solved by hitting them with a stick.

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: He thought back on all the songs he had heard, songs of blind Symeon_Star-Eyes and noble Serwyn_of_the_Mirror_Shield, of Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II), Ser Ryam Redywne, and Florian_the_Fool. They had all won victories against foes far more terrible than any he would face. But they were great heroes, brave men of noble birth, except for Florian. And what am I?

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: Bran was going to be a knight himself someday, one of the Kingsguard. Old Nan said they were the finest swords in all the realm. There were only seven of them, and they wore white armor and had no wives or children, but lived only to serve the king. Bran knew all the stories. Their names were like music to him. Serwyn_of_the_Mirror_Shield. Ser Ryam Redwyne. Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II). The twins Ser Erryk_Cargyll and Ser Arryk_Cargyll, who had died on one another's swords hundreds of years ago, when brother fought sister in the war the singers called the Dance of the Dragons. The White Bull, Gerold_Hightower. Ser Arthur_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning. Barristan the Bold.

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: The days when men like Ryam Redwyne and Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II) wore the white cloak are gone to dust and song.

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: Ser Ryam Redwyne was the greatest knight of his day, and one of the worst Hands ever to serve a king.

name: Ryam Redwyne
quote: White wool hangings covered the walls, and there was a white shield and two crossed longswords mounted above the hearth. The chair behind the table was old black oak, with cushions of blanched cowhide, the leather worn thin. Worn by the bony arse of Barristan_Selmy and Ser Gerold_Hightower before him, by Prince Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_II), Ser Ryam Redwyne, and the Demon_of_Darry, by Ser Duncan_the_Tall and the Pale Griffin Alyn_Connington. How could the Kingslayer belong in such exalted company?

name: Ryben
quote: “Amongst the smallfolk there are always men of a lascivious character who delight in tales of great lords and noble knights despoiling maidens, for this persuades them that their betters share their own base lusts.”

name: Ryger Rivers
quote: Ryger: This is no way to speak in front of Catelyn_Stark, Father. Walder: Now my bastards presume to teach me courtesy. I'll speak any way I like, damn you. I've had three kings to guest in my life, and queens as well, do you think I require lessons from the likes of you, Ryger? Your mother was milking goats the first time I gave her my seed.

name: Ryk
quote: Rattleshirt: Might be you fooled these others, crow, but don't think you'll be fooling Mance_Rayder. He'll take one look a' you and know you're false. And when he does, I'll make a cloak o' your wolf there, and open your soft boy's belly and sew a weasel up inside. Ryk: And where would you find a weasel in the snow?

name: Ryk
quote: Ygritte: So, d'you believe us now, Jon Snow? Did you see the giants on their mammoths? Tormund: Har! The crow's in love! He means to marry one! Ryk: A giantess? Tormund: No, a mammoth!

name: Ryk
quote: She broke his lip for him and bit one ear half off, and I hear he's got so many scratches on his back he can't wear a cloak. She likes him well enough, though. And why not? He don't fight with no spear, you know. Never has. So where do you think he got that name? Har!

name: Ryk
quote: Ygritte had been fond of Longspear Ryk. He hoped he found some joy with Tormund's Munda. Someone needed to find some joy somewhere.

name: Ryk
quote: Munda. Took that Longspear Ryk to husband, if you believe it. Boy's got more cock than sense, you ask me, but he treats her well enough. I told him if he ever hurt her, I'd yank his member off and beat him bloody with it.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: If you would follow me, Stevron_Frey awaits.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: Ryman: I have done nothing... Jaime: ...but drink and whore. I know.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: Little Walder: Ryman is old too. Past forty, I bet. And he has a bad belly. Do you think he'll be lord? Big Walder: I'll be lord. I don't care if he is.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: Brynden_Tully ought to make a sortie, to remind us all we're still at war. Be nice if he culled some Freys too. Ryman, for a start. The man's drunk more oft than not.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: A sot, a fool, and a craven. Lord Walder_Frey had best outlive this one, or the Freys are done.

name: Ryman Frey
quote: Jaime: Edwyn, I am giving you your father's command. Try not to be so stupid as your sire. Edwyn: That ought not pose much difficulty, my lord.

name: Rymolf Stormdrunk
quote: Theon: My uncle Victarion_Greyjoy has loaned me his own steersman.Esgred: Rymolf Stormdrunk? A good man, so long as he's sober.

name: Anvil Ryn
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Sabitha Vypren
quote: ... sharp-featured, sharp-tongued harridan of House Vypren, who would sooner ride than dance, wore mail instead of silk, and was fond of killing men and kissing women.

name: Saera Targaryen
quote: Such a fierce little thing she is, they say, she has no need of comfort. They are wrong in that, I fear. All men need comfort.

name: Saera Targaryen
quote: I have my own kingdom here.

name: Saera Targaryen
quote: ... George had some new ideas for some of the names and the stories of the children who died young, and corrected some issues that came out of his original birth order (we actually got the names of all the kids quite late in the production of TWoIaF—literally a month before we had to finalize the book—so there was not much time to interrogate it). However, the stories of those who live to adulthood, as published in TWoIaF, do remain the same (just, of course, much more detailed).

name: Saffron
quote: Harrold: It is different with Saffron.Alayne: Saffron? Truly?Harrold: Her father says she is more precious to him than gold.

name: Saffron
quote: Should we ever wed, you'll have to send Saffron back to her father. I'll be all the spice you'll want.

name: Sailor's Wife
quote: She thinks that if she finds the right god, maybe he will send the winds and blow her old love back to her, but I pray it never happens. Her love is dead, I could taste that in her blood. If he ever should come back to her, it will be a corpse.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: The men of Westeros are ever rushing. What good is this, I ask you? He who hurries through life hurries to his grave.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: Davos: How is it you come by a Pentoshi ship? Have you gone pirate again, my lord? Salladhor: Vile calumny. Who has suffered more from pirates than Salladhor Saan? I ask only what is due me. Much gold is owed, oh yes, but I am not without reason, so in place of coin I have taken a handsome parchment, very crisp. It bears the name and seal of Lord Alester_Florent, the Hand of the King. I am made Lord of Blackwater Bay, and no vessel may be crossing my lordly waters without my lordly leave, no. And when these outlaws are trying to steal past me in the night to avoid my lawful duties and customs, why, they are no better than smugglers, so I am well within my rights to seize them.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: Salladhor the Beggar, that's what Stannis_Baratheon has made me. Salladhor the Smashed. Where are my ships? And my gold, where is all the gold that I was promised? When, when? On the morrow, on the new moon, when the red comet comes again? He is promising me gold and gems, always promising, but this gold I have not seen. I have his word, he is saying, oh yes, his royal word, he writes it down. Can Salladhor Saan eat the king's word? Can he quench his thirst with parchments and waxy seals? Can he tumble promises into a feather bed and fuck them till they squeal?

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: The Lyseni was a sleek, smiling man whose flamboyance was a byword on both sides of the narrow sea.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: When a pirate grows rich enough, they make him a prince.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: Salladhor Saan thinks only of gold! His head is full of dreams of the treasure he fancies lies under the Red Keep, so let us hear no more of Salladhor Saan. The day I need military counsel from a Lysene brigand is the day I put off my crown and take the black.

name: Salladhor Saan
quote: You are a treacherous old rogue, Salladhor Saan, but a good friend all the same.

name: Sallor the Bald
quote: Daenerys: Tell me this—are the Stormcrows slave or free? Sallor: We are a brotherhood of free men.

name: Sallor the Bald
quote: Prendahl_na_Ghezn talked too much and said too little. And Sallor picked his nose as if his snot was gold.

name: Salloreon
quote: My lord, this is crude work at best. There is no art to it. Suitable labor for common smiths, no doubt, for men who bend horseshoes and hammer out kettles, but I am a master armorer, as it please my lord. This is no work for me, nor my fellow masters. We make swords as sharp as song, armor such as a god might wear. Not this.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Samwell: I've never had a friend before.Jon: We're not friends. We're brothers.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Samwell: I'm to assist Maester Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) with the library and the birds. He needs someone who can read and write letters.Jon: You'll do well at that.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Jon: You're more than fond of Gilly, aren't you?Samwell: Gilly's good. She's good and kind. She ... she made me braver, Jon. Not brave, but ... braver.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Stannis: You are the one that killed the creature in the snow.Melisandre: Sam the Slayer.Samwell: No, my lady. Your Grace. I mean, I am, yes. I'm Samwell Tarly, yes.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Sam thought of all the trials that he and Gilly suffered, Craster's Keep and the death of the Jeor_Mormont, snow and ice and freezing winds, days and days and days of walking, the wights at Whitetree, Coldhands and the tree of ravens, the Wall, the Wall, the Wall, the Black Gate beneath the earth. What had it all been for? No happy choices and no happy endings.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: The worst isn't done. The worst is just beginning, and there are no happy endings.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: No matter where he went in this wide world, his fears went with him.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Samwell: I am Sam, from Horn Hill. Lord Randyll_Tarly's son.Leo: Truly? I suppose you are. Your father told us all that you were dead. Or was it only that he wished you were? Are you still a craven?Samwell: No. I went beyond the Wall and fought in battles. They call me Sam the Slayer.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Nobody likes cravens. I wish we hadn't helped him. What if they think we're craven too?

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: The world was full of cravens who pretended to be heroes; it took a queer sort of courage to admit to cowardice as Samwell Tarly had.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: It was Ghost who knew what to do. Silent as shadow, the pale direwolf moved closer and began to lick the warm tears off Samwell Tarly's face. The fat boy cried out, startled .. and somehow, in a heartbeat, his sobs turned to laughter.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: You're fat but you're not stupid, boy. You did well back there.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: Tarly, when I was a lad half your age, my lady mother told me that if I stood about with my mouth open, a Weasel was like to mistake it for his lair and run down my throat. If you have something to say, say it. Otherwise, beware of weasels.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: I don't care if you're so scared you foul your breeches, and I don't care if a thousand wildlings are coming over the walls howling for your blood, you get those birds off, or I swear I'll hunt you through all seven hells and make you damn sorry that you didn't.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: You have no father. Only brothers. Only us. Your life belongs to the Night's Watch, so go and stuff your smallclothes into a sack, along with anything else you care to take to Oldtown. You leave an hour before sunrise. And here's another order. From this day forth, you will not call yourself a craven. You've faced more things this past year than most men face in a lifetime. You can face the Citadel, but you'll face it as a Sworn Brother of the Night's Watch. I can't command you to be brave, but I can command you to hide your fears.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: You're a man who appreciates cooking, Slayer. We need more o' your sort.

name: Samwell Tarly
quote: The Citadel is not what it was. They will take anything these days. Alleras, Pate_(novice), Mollander, cretins, and now a black-clad whale. And here I thought leviathans were grey.

name: Sandoq the Shadow
quote: Sandoq is no beast. He cannot speak, but he hears and he obeys.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Eddard: You rode him down. Sandor: He ran. But not very fast.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Spare me your empty little compliments, girl ... and your ser's. I am no knight. I spit on them and their vows. Gregor_Clegane is a knight.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: The septons preach about the seven hells. What do they know? Only a man who's been burned knows what hell is truly like.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Sansa: Why do you let people call you a dog? You won't let anyone call you a knight. Sandor: I like dogs better than knights... A hound will die for you, but never lie to you. And he'll look you straight in the face.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Killing is the sweetest thing there is.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: What do you think a knight is for, girl? You think it's all taking favors from ladies and looking fine in gold plate? Knights are for killing. I killed my first man at twelve. I've lost count of how many I've killed since then. High lords with old names, fat rich men dressed in velvet, knights puffed up like bladders with their honors, yes, and women and children too—they're all meat, and I'm the butcher.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Sandor: If there are gods, they made sheep so wolves could eat mutton, and they made the weak for the strong to play with. Sansa: True knights protect the weak. Sandor: There are no true knights, no more than there are gods. If you can't protect yourself, die and get out of the way of those who can. Sharp steel and strong arms rule this world, don't ever believe any different. Sansa: You're awful. Sandor: I'm honest. It's the world that's awful.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: I could keep you safe. They’re all afraid of me. No one would hurt you again, or I’d kill them.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: I've killed a lot more than him, I promise you. You think that makes me some monster. Well, maybe it does, but I saved Sansa_Stark life too. The day the mob pulled her off her horse, I cut through them and brought her back to the castle, else she would have gotten what Lollys_Stokeworth got. And she sang for me. You didn't know that, did you? Your sister sang me a sweet little song.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Even a dog gets tired of being kicked.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Bowman: You're Joffrey_Baratheon dog. Sandor: My own dog now.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Bugger that. Bugger him. Bugger you.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: And dismissing Barristan_Selmy, where was the sense in that? Yes, the man was old, but the name of Barristan the Bold still has meaning in the realm. He lent honor to any man he served. Can anyone say the same of the Hound? You feed your dog bones under the table, you do not seat him beside you on the high bench.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: He is a dog, just as he says. A half-wild, mean-tempered dog that bites any hand that tries to pet him, and yet will savage any man who tries to hurt his masters.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: He is no true knight, but he saved me all the same. Save him if you can, and gentle the rage inside him.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: I wish the Hound were here. The night of the battle, Sandor Clegane had come to her chambers to take her from the city, but Sansa had refused. Sometimes she lay awake at night, wondering if she’d been wise. She had his stained white cloak hidden in a cedar chest beneath her summer silks. She could not say why she'd kept it. The Hound had turned craven, she heard it said; at the height of the battle, he got so drunk Tyrion_Lannister had to take his men. But Sansa understood. She knew the secret of his burned face. It was only the fire he feared. That night, the wildfire had set the river itself ablaze, and filled the very air with green flame. Even in the castle, Sansa had been afraid. Outside ... she could scarcely imagine it.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Sandor Clegane would kill us all gladly, but not in our sleep.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: When a dog goes bad, the fault lies with his master.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Sandor had been hard and brutal, yes, but it was Gregor_Clegane who was the real monster in House Clegane.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Both men were large and powerful, but Sandor Clegane was much quicker, and fought with a savagery that Lyle_Crakehall could not hope to match.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: I know a little of this man, Sandor Clegane. He was Prince Joffrey_Baratheon sworn shield for many a year, and even here we would hear tell of his deeds, both good and ill. If even half of what we heard was true, this was a bitter, tormented soul, a sinner who mocked both gods and men. He served, but found no pride in service. He fought, but took no joy in victory. He drank, to drown his pain in a sea of wine. He did not love, nor was he loved himself. It was hate that drove him. Though he committed many sins, he never sought forgiveness. Where other men dream of love, or wealth, or glory, this man Sandor Clegane dreamed of slaying his own brother, a sin so terrible it makes me shudder just to speak of it. Yet that was the bread that nourished him, the fuel that kept his fires burning. Ignoble as it was, the hope of seeing his brother's blood upon his blade was all this sad and angry creature lived for... and even that was taken from him, when Prince Oberyn_Martell of Dorne stabbed Ser Gregor_Clegane with a poisoned spear.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Brienne: You sound as if you pity him. Elder Brother: I did. You would have pitied him as well, if you had seen him at the end. I came upon him by the Trident, drawn by his cries of pain. He begged me for the gift of mercy, but I am sworn not to kill again.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Brienne: It is true, then. Sandor Clegane is dead. Elder Brother: He is at rest.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: As Robert_Arryn lips touched her own she found herself thinking of another kiss. She could still remember how it felt, when his cruel mouth pressed down on her own. He had come to Sansa in the darkness as green fire filled the sky. He took a song and a kiss, and left me nothing but a bloody cloak.

name: Sandor Clegane
quote: Sandor Clegane was a man in torment.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: All she wanted was for things to be nice and pretty, the way they were in the songs.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: The Sandor_Clegane is right ... I am only a little bird, repeating the words they taught me.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Once, she had loved Prince Joffrey_Baratheon with all her heart, and admired and trusted his mother, Cersei_Lannister. They had repaid that love and trust with Eddard_Stark's head. Sansa would never make that mistake again.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: If I am ever a queen, I'll make them love me.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Tyrion: You hide behind courtesy as if it were a castle wall. Sansa: Courtesy is a lady's armor.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: My skin has turned to porcelain, to ivory, to steel.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Petyr: Can you be my daughter in your heart? Sansa: I ... I am Alayne, Father. Who else would I be? Petyr: With my wits and Catelyn_Stark beauty, the world will be yours, sweetling.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: As Robert_Arryn lips touched her own she found herself thinking of another kiss. She could still remember how it felt, when Sandor_Clegane pressed down on her own. He had come to Sansa in the darkness as green fire filled the sky. He took a song and a kiss, and left me nothing but a bloody cloak.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: You're like one of those birds from the Summer Isles, aren't you? A pretty little talking bird, repeating all the pretty little words they taught you to recite.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Life is not a song, sweetling. Someday you may learn that, to your sorrow.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: I think I may find it in me to be a knight again, sweet lady. And all because of you ... your grace, your courage. You saved me, not only from Joffrey_Baratheon, but from myself.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Sansa was a lady at three, always so courteous and eager to please. She loved nothing so well as tales of knightly valor. Men would say she had my look, but she will grow into a woman far more beautiful than I ever was, you can see that. I often sent away her maid so I could brush her hair myself. She had auburn hair, lighter than mine, and so thick and soft... the red in it would catch the light of the torches and shine like copper.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: The man who weds Sansa Stark can claim Winterfell in her name.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Tyrion: Sansa is too young. Tywin: She is old enough to be Lady of Winterfell once her brother is dead. Claim her maidenhood and you will be one step closer to claiming the north. Get her with child, and the prize is all but won.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: She is just as comely as Margaery_Tyrell. Her hair was a rich autumn auburn, her eyes a deep Tully blue. Grief had given her a haunted, vulnerable look; if anything, it had only made her more beautiful. He wanted to reach her, to break through the armor of her courtesy.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: My brother Doran_Martell would be most pleased to meet the rightful heir to Casterly Rock... especially if he brought his lovely wife, the Lady of Winterfell.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Shadrich: A little lost sister, is it? With blue eyes and auburn hair? You are not the only hunter in the woods. I seek for Sansa Stark as well.Brienne: Who is this Sansa Stark, and why do you seek her? Shadrich: For love, why else? Brienne: Love? Shadrich: Aye, love of gold.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: Sansa was a little lady, always courteous and eager to please. She loved tales of knightly valor. She will grow into a woman far more beautiful than I, you can see that. I would often brush her hair myself. She had auburn hair, thick and soft ... the red in it would shine like copper in the light of the torches.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: You have Catelyn_Stark eyes. Honest eyes, and innocent. Blue as a sunlit sea. When you are a little older, many a man will drown in those eyes.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: I ought to have shown her to the black cells as the daughter of Eddard_Stark, but instead I made her part of mine own household. She shared my hearth and hall, played with my own children. I fed her, dressed her, tried to make her a little less ignorant about the world, and how did she repay me for my kindness? She helped murder my son. When we find Tyrion_Lannister, we will find the Lady Sansa too. She is not dead ... but before I am done with her, I promise you, she will be singing to the Stranger, begging for his kiss.

name: Sansa Stark
quote: When Robert_Arryn dies, Harry the Heir becomes Lord Harrold_Hardyng, Defender of the Vale and Lord of the Eyrie. Jon_Arryn's bannermen will never love me, nor our silly, shaking Robert, but they will love their Young Falcon ... and when they come together for his wedding, and you come out with your long auburn hair, clad in a maiden's cloak of white and grey with a direwolf emblazoned on the back ... why, every knight in the Vale will pledge his sword to win you back your birthright. So those are your gifts from me, my sweet Sansa ... Harry, the Eyrie, and Winterfell. That's worth another kiss now, don't you think?

name: Sarella Sand
quote: Areo: What of Sarella? She is a woman grown, almost twenty.Doran: Unless she returns to Dorne, there's naught I can do about Sarella save pray that she shows more sense than her sisters. Leave her to her... game.

name: Satin
quote: Satin: There must be a hundred thousand. How can we stop so many? Jon: The Wall will stop them. The Wall will stop them. The Wall defends itself.

name: Satin
quote: Jon: Get your shield up. Satin: It's too heavy. Jon: It's as heavy as it needs to be to stop a sword. Now get it up. Good. That was good. But you need to put your body into it. Get your weight behind the steel and you'll do more damage than with arm strength alone. Come, try it again, drive at me, but keep the shield up or I'll ring your head like a bell ...

name: Satin
quote: Satin: It was Melisandre we were laughing at. We were only having a jape, my lord. Jon: You have your gods and she has hers. Leave her be.

name: Satin
quote: Satin, they called him, even in the wool and mail and boiled leather of the Night's Watch; the name he'd gotten in the brothel where he'd been born and raised. He was pretty as a girl with his dark eyes, soft skin, and raven's ringlets. Half a year at Castle Black had toughened up his hands, however, and Donal_Noye said he was passable with a crossbow. Whether he had the courage to face what was coming, though...

name: Satin
quote: Cellador: My lord, the boy's a whore... a... dare I say... a painted catamite from the brothels of Oldtown. Jon: What he was in Oldtown is none of our concern. He's quick to learn and very clever. The other recruits started out despising him, but he won them over and made friends of them all. He's fearless in a fight and can even read and write after a fashion. He should be capable of fetching me my meals and saddling my horse, don't you think?

name: Satin
quote: Whatever Satin may have done in Oldtown, he is our brother now, and he will be my squire.

name: Sauron Salt-Tongue
quote: We did not come to these holy islands from godless lands across the seas. We came from beneath those seas, from the watery halls of the Drowned God who made us in his likeness and gave to us dominion over all the waters of the earth.

name: Scarb
quote: I knew a man, Scarb, this Oznak_zo_Pahl cut his liver out. Claimed to be defending a lady's honor, he did, said Scarb had raped her with his eyes. How do you rape a wench with eyes, I ask you? But his uncle is the richest man in Meereen and his father commands the city guard, so I had to run like a rat before he killed me too.

name: Scolera
quote: You must feel so much lighter now, clean and innocent as a maid on the morning of her wedding.

name: Scolera
quote: But one day I will have your tongue ripped out with hot pincers, and that will be hilarious.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: You are all your lord father claimed you were.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: Brienne: I never knew my mother. My father had ladies... a different lady every year, but... Catelyn: Those were no ladies.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: Jaime: Do you have any siblings, my lady? Brienne: No. I was my father's only s—child. Jaime: Son, you meant to say. Does he think of you as a son? You make a queer sort of daughter, to be sure.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: As for you, my lady, it is said that your father is a good man. If so, I pity him. Some men are blessed with sons, some with daughters. No man deserves to be cursed with such as you.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: You have a noble father who must surely love you. Consider his grief if you should never return. Perhaps they will bring your sword and shield to him, after you have fallen. Perhaps he will even hang them in his hall and look on them with pride... but if you were to ask him, I know he would tell you that he would sooner have a living daughter than a shattered shield.

name: Selwyn Tarth
quote: A daughter. He deserves that. A daughter who could sing to him and grace his hall and bear him grandsons. He deserves a son too, a strong and gallant son to bring honor to his name. Galladon_Tarth drowned when I was four and he was eight, though, and Alysanne_Tarth and Arianne_Tarth died still in the cradle. I am the only child the gods let him keep. The freakish one, not fit to be a son or daughter.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Melisandre: R'hllor chooses such instruments as he requires. His ways are mysterious, but no man may withstand his fiery will. Selyse: No man may withstand him! Stannis: Be quiet, woman. You are not at a nightfire now.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Selyse: Robert_I_Baratheon and Delena_Florent defiled our bed and laid a curse upon our union. Edric_Storm is the foul fruit of their fornications. Lift his shadow from my womb and I will bear you many trueborn sons, I know it. He is only one boy, born of your brother's lust and my cousin's shame. Stannis: He is mine own blood. Stop clutching me, woman.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: We are done with Eastwatch. We did not like it there. A queen should be mistress beneath her own roof. We found your Cotter_Pyke to be an uncouth and unpleasant man, quarrelsome and niggardly.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Jon: Your Grace, they are starving at Hardhome by the thousands. Many are women— Selyse: —and children, yes. Very sad. We are sorry for the little ones, of course, but we must be sensible. We have no food for them, and they are too young to help the king Stannis_Baratheon in his wars. Better that they be reborn into the light.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Melisandre had won her, heart and soul, turning her from the gods of the Seven Kingdoms, both old and new, to worship the one they called the Lord of Light.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Petyr: Ser Axell_Florent might serve for Shireen_Baratheon father, but in my experience, the more bizarre and shocking a tale the more apt it is to be repeated. Stannis_Baratheon keeps an especially grotesque fool, a lackwit with a tattooed face. Pycelle: Surely you do not mean to suggest that Lady Selyse would bring a fool into her bed? Petyr: You'd have to be a fool to want to bed Selyse Florent. Doubtless Patchface reminded her of Stannis. And the best lies contain within them nuggets of truth, enough to give a listener pause.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Lady Melisandre wore no crown, but every man there knew that she was Stannis_Baratheon's real queen, not the homely woman he had left to shiver at Eastwatch-by-the-Sea.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Those flames on her crown are the warmest thing about her.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: There must have been a blizzard the day she and Stannis wed. Huddled beneath her ermine mantle and surrounded by her ladies, serving girls, and knights, the southron queen seemed a frail, pale, shrunken thing. A strained smile was frozen into place on her thin lips, but her eyes brimmed with reverence. She hates the cold but loves the flames. He had only to look at her to see that. A word from Melisandre, and she would walk into the fire willingly, embrace it like a lover.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: You lied about her beard. That one has more hair on her chin than I have between my legs.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: This queen never fails to disappoint.

name: Selyse Florent
quote: Afraid of being carried off, is she? I hope you never said how big me member is, Jon Snow, that'd frighten any woman. I always wanted me one with a mustache.

name: Senelle
quote: Alas. The poor girl is quite … exhausted.

name: Senelle
quote: Do not presume to smile at me, you treacherous little bitch. You will be begging me for mercy before I’m done with you.

name: Septon of Sallydance
quote: They hacked the Maiden's breasts off too, though those were only wood. And the eyes, the eyes were jet and lapis and mother-of-pearl, they pried them out with their knives. May the Mother have mercy on them all.

name: Shadrick
quote: Shadrich: Some call me the Mad Mouse. The brown is for the lands I've roamed, the blue for the rivers that I've crossed. The mouse is me. Brienne: And are you mad? Shadrich: Oh, quite. Your common mouse will run from blood and battle. The mad mouse seeks them out.

name: Shadrick
quote: You are not the only hunter in the woods. I seek for Sansa_Stark as well.

name: Shadrick
quote: We mice are quiet creatures.

name: Shadrick
quote: Myranda: Will you be seeking wings? Shadrich: A mouse with wings would be a silly sight. Alayne: Perhaps you will try the melee instead? Shadrich: A good melee is all a hedge knight can hope for, unless he stumbles on a bag of dragons. And that's not likely, is it?

name: Shadrick
quote: He had the sort of easy arrogance that comes with skill at arms.

name: Shadrick
quote: Ser Shadrich was so short that he might have been taken for a squire, but his face belonged to a much older man.

name: Shae
quote: My mother named me Shae. Men call me ... often.

name: Shae
quote: Shae: M'lord looks fearsome. Tyrion: M'lord looks a dwarf in mismatched armor, but I thank you for your kindness.

name: Shae
quote: Tyrion: Most men would be deceived. Shae: And most women, maybe. But not whores. A whore learns to see the man, not his garb, or she turns up dead in an alley.

name: Shae
quote: Tyrion: What do you think they would do if they got their hands on the Hand's lady? Shae: The Hand's whore, you mean? Though I would be your lady, m'lord. I'd dress in all the beautiful things you gave me, in satin and samite and cloth-of-gold, and I'd wear your jewels and hold your hand and sit by you at feasts. I could give you sons, I know I could ... and I vow I'd never shame you. Tyrion: A sweet dream, Shae. Now put it aside, I beg you. It can never be.

name: Shae
quote: Tyrion: Did you ever like my touch? Shae: More than anything, my giant of Lannister. Tyrion: For hands of gold are always cold, but a woman's hands are warm.

name: Shae
quote: Shae only stood a shade over five feet, yet still he must look up to her ... but in her case he found he did not mind. She was sweet to look up at.

name: Shae
quote: Shae may only be a whore, but I am faithful to her after my fashion.

name: Shae
quote: I'm free of Tysha now. She's haunted me half my life, but I don't need her any more, no more than I need Alayaya or Dancy or Marei, or the hundreds like them I've bedded with over the years. I have Shae now. Shae.

name: Shae
quote: Tyrion: Pardon me if I do not weep for you. Varys: I shall, but you must pardon me if I do not weep for Shae. I confess, I do not understand what there is in her to make a clever man like you act such a fool. Tyrion: You might, if you were not a eunuch.

name: Shae
quote: She did all that was asked of her, but sometimes she gave Sansa the most insolent looks.

name: Shae
quote: You knew what she was.

name: Shaena Targaryen
quote: The gods will not suffer a bastard to sit the Iron Throne.

name: Shagga
quote: Little boyman, will you mock my axe after I chop off your manhood and feed it to the goats?

name: Shagga
quote: Shagga: A Stone Crow's axe is always sharp, and Shagga's axes are sharpest of all. Once I cut off a man's head, but he did not know it until he tried to brush his hair. Then it fell off. Tyrion: Is that why you never brush yours?

name: Shagga
quote: Shagga: Shagga wants this woman. Timett: Shagga wants every whore in this city of whores. Shagga: Yes. Shagga would give her a strong child.

name: Shagga
quote: Tyrion: I want night attacks, so many and so sudden that they'll be afraid to sleep— Shagga: All this I learned from Dolf son of Holger before my beard had grown. This is the way of war in the Mountains of the Moon.

name: Shagga
quote: Shagga son of Dolf is the one who looks like Casterly Rock with hair.

name: Shagga
quote: Leo: I saw that great hairy one today, the one who insisted that he must have two battle-axes, the heavy black steel ones with twin crescent blades. Tyrion: Shagga likes to kill with either hand. Leo: He still had that wood-axe of his strapped to his back. Tyrion: Shagga is of the opinion that three axes are even better than two.

name: Shagga
quote: Telling Shagga and Timett how to pillage is like telling a rooster how to crow, but I should prefer to keep them with me.

name: Shagga
quote: Tyrion: Perhaps you should eat the goose and marry Lollys_Stokeworth. Or better still, send Shagga. Bronn: Shagga's more like to eat the maid and marry the goose.

name: Shagga
quote: Ben: Shagga, did you say? Is that a woman's name? Tyrion: His teats are big enough. Next time we meet I'll peek beneath his breeches to be sure.

name: Shagwell
quote: Shagwell: A riddle! If Lord Roose_Bolton goat eats the men who fed Lord Tywin_Lannister goat, how many goats are there?" Arya: Vargo_Hoat. Shagwell: Now there's a weasel clever as a goat!

name: Shagwell
quote: The lovers, and what a lovely sight they are. 'Twould be cruel to separate the good knight and his lady. Ah, but which one is the knight and which one is the lady?

name: Shagwell
quote: Shagwell: You mustn't hurt sweet Shagwell, I'm too droll to die. Brienne: You are no better than the rest of them. You have robbed and raped and murdered. Shagwell: Oh, I have, I have, I shan't deny it... but I'm amusing, with all my japes and capers. I make men laugh. Brienne: And women weep. Shagwell: Is that my fault? Women have no sense of humor.

name: Shagwell
quote: He better shut his mouth or I'll put him on Arya_Stark with the rest.

name: Sharna
quote: She has a sharp tongue and a fierce eye, I’ll grant you that, but her heart’s a good one.

name: Shepherd
quote: We shall meet in hell before this year is done.

name: Shiera Seastar
quote: Duncan: You've known queens and princesses. Did they dance with demons and practice the black arts? Aegon: Lady Shiera does. Lord Brynden_Rivers paramour. She bathes in blood to keep her beauty.

name: Shiera Seastar
quote: I have my own ghosts, Bran. A brother that I loved, Aegor_Rivers that I hated, a woman I desired.

name: Shiera Seastar
quote: Aegor_Rivers and Brynden_Rivers both loved Shiera Seastar, and the Seven Kingdoms bled.

name: Shiera Seastar
quote: Though she never wed, she had many offers, and several lovers through the years. Duels were fought over the right to sit beside her, men killed themselves after falling from her favor, poets outdid each other writing songs about her beauty. Her most ardent admirer was her half-brother, Brynden_Rivers, who proposed marriage to her half a hundred times. Shiera gave him her bed, but never her hand. It amused her more to make him jealous.

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: I had bad dreams. About the dragons. They were coming to eat me.

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: Wun Wun: Kneel queen. Little queen. Shireen: He's a giant! A real true giant, like from the stories. But why does he talk so funny? Jon: He only knows a few words of the Common Tongue as yet. In their own land, giants speak the Old Tongue.

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: Her name was Shireen. She would be ten on her next name day, and she was the saddest child that Maester Cressen had ever known.

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: This is Stannis_Baratheon true heir. Shireen will one day sit the Iron Throne and rule the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: The maesters may believe what they wish. Ask a woods witch if you would know the truth. The grey death sleeps, only to wake again. The child is not clean!

name: Shireen Baratheon
quote: Justin: Your Grace, if you are dead — Stannis: — you will avenge my death, and seat my daughter on the Iron Throne. Or die in the attempt. Justin: On my honor as a knight, you have my word.

name: Shitmouth
quote: Jaime: Who might you be? Shitmouth: Gregor_Clegane used to call me Shitmouth, if it please m'lord. Jaime: Charming.

name: Shitmouth
quote: Bonifer: Any man who remains with me shall have a hide of land to work, a second hide when he takes a wife, a third at the birth of his first child. Shitmouth: Land, ser? Piss on that. If we wanted to grub in the bloody dirt, we could have bloody well stayed home, begging your pardon, ser. Rich rewards, Gregor_Clegane said. Meaning gold.

name: Shitmouth
quote: Though the one they called Shitmouth had the foulest tongue she had ever heard, he'd give you an extra piece of bread if you asked, while jolly old Chiswyck and soft spoken Raff would just give you the back of their hand.

name: Shitmouth
quote: You heard the man. Find a nice long spear, and shove it up his arse.

name: Shrouded Lord
quote: He dreamt of his lord father and the Shrouded Lord. He dreamt that they were one and the same, and when his father wrapped stone arms around him and bent to give him his grey kiss, he woke with his mouth dry and rusty with the taste of blood and his heart hammering in his chest.

name: Shrouded Lord
quote: Beyond the veil of dream, the Sorrows were waiting for him. Stone steps ascending endlessly, steep and slick and treacherous, and somewhere at the top, the Shrouded Lord. I do not want to meet the Shrouded Lord.

name: Sigorn
quote: Fight for you? Not fight for you. Kill you better. Kill all you.

name: Sigorn
quote: Melisandre: Sigorn, will you share your fire with Alys_Karstark, and warm her when the night is dark and full of terrors? Sigorn: I swear me. By the red god's flames, I warm her all her days. Melisandre: Alys, do you swear to share your fire with Sigorn, and warm him when the night is dark and full of terrors? Alys: Till his blood is boiling. Melisandre: Then come to me and be as one.

name: Sigorn
quote: Jon: You're not scared? Alys: Let him be scared of me. Jon: Winter's lady.

name: Sigorn
quote: Jon: If Harrion_Karstark is dead, Karhold belongs to Lady Alys_Karstark. And she has given her hand in marriage to Sigorn, Magnar of Thenn. Cregan: A wildling. A filthy, murdering wilding. I see what you are, Snow. Half a wolf and half a wildling, baseborn get of Eddard_Stark and a whore. You would deliver a highborn maid to the bed of some stinking savage.

name: Sigorn
quote: A Alys_Karstark and a wildling warrior, bound together by the Lord of Light.

name: Silver haired whore in Selhorys
quote: From what he'd read, the slaver cities were the place where whores were made. Jeor_Mormont should have bought one for himself. A pretty slave girl might have done wonders to improve his temper ... particularly one with silvery hair, like the whore who had been sitting on his cock back in Selhorys.

name: Simon Toyne
quote: When he was young, Rhaegar_Targaryen rode brilliantly in a tourney at Storm's End, defeating Lord Steffon_Baratheon, Lord Jason_Mallister, the Oberyn_Martell of Dorne, and a mystery knight who proved to be the infamous Simon Toyne, chief of the kingswood outlaws.

name: Simon Toyne
