quote: The world was simpler in those days, Jaime thought, and men as well as swords were made of finer steel. Or was it only that he had been fifteen? They were all in their graves now, the Arthur_Dayne and the Smiling_Knight, the Gerold_Hightower and Prince Lewyn_Martell, Ser Oswell_Whent with his black humor, earnest Jon Darry, Simon Toyne and his Kingswood Brotherhood, bluff old Sumner_Crakehall.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: Your Grace has not asked for my counsel, but I say that blood must pay for blood. Take one man from each of the families I have named and kill him. The next time one of yours is slain, take two from each great House and kill them both. There will not be a third murder.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: The Sons of the Harpy are laughing in their pyramids. What good are hostages if you will not take their heads?

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: Barristan: Your way is dishonorable. Skahaz: Your way is stupid.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: Skahaz was the Shavepate ... and the vilest of traitors to the Sons of the Harpy and their ilk.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: It was a blunt, brutal, angry face. She could only pray it was an honest one as well.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: She trusted Skahaz more than she trusted Hizdahr_zo_Loraq, but the Shavepate would be a disaster as a king. He was too quick to anger, too slow to forgive.

name: Skahaz mo Kandaq
quote: Daenerys: The Shavepate has ways of finding the truth. Hizdahr: I do not doubt that Skahaz would soon have me confessing. A day with him, and I will be one of the Harpy's Sons. Two days, and I will be the Harpy. Three, and it will turn out I slew Aerys_II_Targaryen too, back in the Sunset Kingdoms when I was yet a boy. Then he will impale me on a stake and you can watch me die ... but afterward the killings will go on.

name: Skinner
quote: Go away, Reek. The smell of you turns my stomach.

name: Skinner
quote: No pain Theon had ever known came close to the agony that Skinner could evoke with a little flensing blade.

name: Smiling Knight
quote: Smiling Knight: It's that white sword of yours I want. Arthur: Then you shall have it, ser.

name: Smiling Knight
quote: The Smiling Knight was a madman, cruelty and chivalry all jumbled up together, but he did not know the meaning of fear.

name: Smiling Knight
quote: The world was simpler in those days, Jaime thought, and men as well as swords were made of finer steel. Or was it only that he had been fifteen? They were all in their graves now, the Sword of the Morning and the Smiling Knight, the Gerold_Hightower and Prince Lewyn_Martell, Ser Oswell_Whent with his black humor, earnest Jon Darry, Simon_Toyne and his Kingswood Brotherhood, bluff old Sumner_Crakehall. And me, that boy I was ... when did he die, I wonder? When I donned the white cloak? When I opened Aerys_II_Targaryen throat? That boy had wanted to be Ser Arthur_Dayne, but someplace along the way he had become the Smiling Knight instead.

name: Smiling Knight
quote: Gregor_Clegane of my boyhood. Half as big but twice as mad.

name: Smiling Knight
quote: Amerei: You could kill Lord Beric_Dondarrion, Ser Jaime. You slew the Smiley Knight. Please, my lord, I beg you, stay and help us with Lord Beric and the Hound. Jaime: The Sword of the Morning slew the Smiling Knight, my lady. Ser Arthur_Dayne, a better knight than me.

name: Snatch
quote: Nasty thing, a crossbow.

name: Snatch
quote: Now, a good trained warhorse, he'll charge a wall o' spears. Some will leap a fire ditch. But I never once seen any horse could run on water.

name: Snatch
quote: Bronn's meaner bastard shadow, or I'm Baelor_I_Targaryen.

name: Soren Shieldbreaker
quote: Soren's axe is yours, Jon Snow, if ever you have need of such.

name: Spare Boot
quote: The bloody buggers got my leg. The wooden one!

name: The Sparr
quote: I was drowned as a boy, and Steffarion_Sparr upon his name day.

name: The Sparr
quote: Aeron knew the Sparr, a hatched-faced old man with watery eyes whose quavery voice was law on this part of Great Wyk.

name: Spotted Cat
quote: Now comes the Spotted Cat. See how he moves, my queen. A poem on two feet.

name: Spotted Pate
quote: In the real world pig boys never fared so well. Pate sometimes thought his mother must have hated him to have named him as she did.

name: Squint
quote: They found Squint floating facedown in the moat, his entrails drifting behind him like a nest of pale snakes.

name: Squirrel
quote: I was twelve the first time my brother took me raiding south o' your Wall. That's where I got my name. My brother said I looked like a squirrel running up a tree. I've done that Wall six times since, over and back again. I think I can climb down some stone tower.

name: Stableboy at King's Landing
quote: Stableboy: She don't know me, but I knows her, oh, yes. The wolf girl.Arya: Help me saddle a horse. Eddard_Stark the Hand of the King, he'll reward you.Stableboy: Father's dead. It's Cersei_Lannister who'll be rewarding me.

name: Stableboy at King's Landing
quote: Arya stood over the body, still and frightened in the face of death. Blood had gushed from the boy's mouth as he collapsed, and more was seeping from the slit in his belly, pooling beneath his body. His palms were cut where he'd grabbed at the blade. She backed away slowly, Needle red in her hand. She had to get away, someplace far from here, someplace safe away from the stableboy's accusing eyes.

name: Stafford Lannister
quote: Brynden: Brother to Lord Tywin_Lannister Joanna_Lannister, so twice related. An old man and a bit of a dullard, but he has a son, Ser Daven_Lannister, who is more formidable. Catelyn: Then let us hope it is the father and not the son who takes this army into the field.

name: Stafford Lannister
quote: Do not take Oxcross too much to heart, my lady. A battle is not a war, and Tywin_Lannister is assuredly not my uncle Stafford. The next time you visit the godswood, pray that Robb_Stark has the wisdom to bend the knee.

name: Stalwart Shield
quote: The knives that slew my Stalwart Shield were meant for me.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Kings have no friends, only subjects and enemies.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: These pardoned lords would do well to reflect on that. Good men and true will fight for Joffrey_Baratheon, wrongly believing him the true king. A northman might even say the same of Robb_Stark. But these lords who flocked to Renly_Baratheon banners knew him for a usurper. They turned their backs on their rightful king for no better reason than dreams of power and glory, and I have marked them for what they are. Pardoned them, yes. Forgiven. But not forgotten.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: It is not a question of wanting. The throne is mine, as Robert_I_Baratheon heir. That is law. After me, it must pass to my daughter, unless Selyse_Florent should finally give me a son. I am king. Wants do not enter into it. I have a duty to my daughter. To the realm. Even to Robert. He loved me but little, I know, yet he was my brother. The Cersei_Lannister gave him horns and made a motley fool of him. She may have murdered him as well, as she murdered Jon_Arryn and Eddard_Stark. For such crimes there must be justice. Starting with Cersei and her abominations. But only starting. I mean to scour that court clean. As Robert should have done after the Trident.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: I never asked for this, no more than I asked to be king. Yet dare I disregard Melisandre? We do not choose our destinies. Yet we must ... we must do our duty, no? Great or small, we must do our duty.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: I know the cost! Last night, gazing into that hearth, I saw things in the flames as well. I saw a king, a crown of fire on his brows, burning… burning, Davos. His own crown consumed his flesh and turned him into ash. Do you think I need Melisandre to tell me what that means? Or you?

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: I never asked for this crown. Gold is cold and heavy on the head, but so long as I am the king, I have a duty... If I must sacrifice Edric_Storm to the flames to save a million from the dark... Sacrifice... is never easy, Davos. Or it is no true sacrifice.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Lord Davos_Seaworth is a man of humble birth, but he reminded me of my duty, when all I could think of was my rights. I had the cart before the horse, Davos said. I was trying to win the throne to save the kingdom, when I should have been trying to save the kingdom to win the throne.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Demons made of snow and ice and cold. The ancient enemy. The only enemy that matters.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Stannis: I thought the wet nurse was this man Craster's daughter? Melisandre: Wife and daughter both, Your Grace. Craster married all his daughters. Gilly's boy was the fruit of their union. Stannis: Her own father got this child on her? We are well rid of her, then. I will not suffer such abominations here. This is not King's Landing.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon lusts were the subject of ribald drinking songs throughout the realm, but Stannis was a different sort of man; a bare year younger than the king, yet utterly unlike him, stern, humorless, unforgiving, grim in his sense of duty.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Ned found it hard to imagine what could frighten Stannis Baratheon, who had once held Storm's End through a year of siege, surviving on rats and boot leather while the Lords Mace_Tyrell and Paxter_Redwyne sat outside with their hosts, banqueting in sight of his walls.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: His claim is the true one, he is known for his prowess as a battle commander, and he is utterly without mercy. There is no creature on earth half so terrifying as a truly just man.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: I have felt from the beginning that Stannis was a greater danger than all the others combined.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Stannis, my lord, my sad sullen boy, son I never had, you must not do this, don't you know how I have cared for you, lived for you, loved you despite all? Yes, loved you, better than Robert_I_Baratheon even, or Renly_Baratheon, for you were the one unloved, the one who needed me most.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Robert_I_Baratheon was the true steel. Stannis is pure iron, black and hard and strong, yes, but brittle, the way iron gets. He'll break before he bends. And Renly_Baratheon, that one, he's copper, bright and shiny, pretty to look at but not worth all that much at the end of the day.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Let us be blunt, my lady. Stannis would make an appalling king. Nor is he like to become one. Men respect Stannis, even fear him, but precious few have ever loved him.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: And Stannis has always felt he was cheated of Storm's End. The ancestral seat of House Baratheon, his by rights... if you knew how many times he came to Robert_I_Baratheon singing that same dull song in that gloomy aggrieved tone he has. When Robert gave the place to Renly_Baratheon, Stannis clenched his jaw so tight I thought his teeth would shatter.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Were it anyone else outside the gates, I might hope to beguile him. But this is Stannis Baratheon. I'd have a better chance of seducing his horse.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: This is Stannis Baratheon. The man will fight to the bitter end and then some.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: Stannis Baratheon with a grievance was like a mastiff with a bone; he gnawed it down to splinters.

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: What does Stannis offer you? Vengeance. Vengeance for my sons and yours, for your husbands and your fathers and your brothers. Vengeance for Eddard_Stark, Robb_Stark, your butchered princes. Vengeance!

name: Stannis Baratheon
quote: His eyes were sunk in deep pits, his close-cropped beard no more than a shadow across his hollow cheeks and bony jawbone. Yet there was power in his stare, an iron ferocity that told Asha this man would never, ever turn back from his course.

name: Steely Pate
quote: Duncan: You do good work. Pate: None better.

name: Steely Pate
quote: Pate: You know the old shield rhyme? Oak and iron, guard me well... Duncan: Or else I'm dead, and doomed to hell. How much do you want for the new rim and all? Pate: From you? A copper.

name: Steely Pate
quote: Duncan: What am I to them? Pate: A knight who remembered his vows.

name: Steely Pate
quote: Look what Duncan_the_Tall done to me armor. All dinted and banged and scratched. Aye, I ask you, why do I bother?

name: Steely Pate
quote: Uthor: I have my own armor, and a better horse than yours. What do I want with some old done nag and a sack of dinted plate and rusty mail?" Duncan: Steely Pate made that armor. Aegon_V_Targaryen has taken good care of it. There's not a spot of rust on my mail, and the steel is good and strong.

name: Steffon Baratheon
quote: I stopped believing in gods the day I saw the Windproud break up across the bay. Any gods so monstrous as to drown my Cassana_Estermont and father would never have my worship, I vowed.

name: Steffon Baratheon
quote: The Estermonts were her good-kin through Robert, whose father had taken Cassana_Estermont to wife in what must have been a fit of lust or madness.

name: Steffon Fossoway
quote: Here's an apple that's not ripe yet.

name: Steffon Fossoway
quote: Raymun: If you think I wish any part of this, you're as thick as you are vile. Steffon: Vile? Guard your tongue, Raymun. We're both apples from the same tree. And you are my squire. Or have you forgotten your vows? Raymun: No. Have you forgotten yours? You swore to be a knight. Steffon: I shall be more than a knight before this day is done. Lord Fossoway. I like the sound of that.

name: Steffon Fossoway
quote: I may not be ripe, but my good cousin is rotten to the core. Knock the seeds out of him.

name: Steffon Fossoway
quote: Knights like Ser Steffon had sharp eyes to find a man's weakness at a glance.

name: Steffon Fossoway
quote: My cousin keeps a sharp watch on every tilt, though. Should any man be wounded on the morrow, or show signs of exhaustion or weakness, Steffon will be quick to knock on his shield, you may count on it. No one has ever accused him of an excess of chivalry.

name: Stevron Frey
quote: Stevron: Father, you forget yourself. Catelyn_Stark is here at your invitation. Walder: Did I ask you? You are not Lord Frey yet, not until I die. Do I look dead? I'll hear no instructions from you.

name: Stevron Frey
quote: The Freys all looked like weasels; Ser Stevron, past sixty with grandchildren of his own, looked like an especially old and tired weasel, yet he was polite enough.

name: Stevron Frey
quote: They're all waiting for me to die. Stevron's been waiting for forty years, but I keep disappointing him. Heh. Why should I die just so he can be a lord? I ask you. I won't do it.

name: Stevron Frey
quote: When Ser Stevron had been heir, that was one thing. Walder_Frey had been grooming Stevron for sixty years, and had pounded it into his head that blood was blood. But Stevron had died whilst campaigning with Robb_Stark in the west—"of waiting, no doubt," Lothar_Frey had quipped when the raven brought them the news—and his sons and grandsons were a different sort of Frey.

name: Stiv
quote: Bran Direwolves. Stiv: Dogs. Yet I'm told there's nothing like a wolfskin cloak to warm a man by night.

name: Stiv
quote: Stiv: Starks, bloody Starks. Osha, kill the wolves and get Robb_Stark sword. Osha: Kill them yourself. I'll not be getting near those monsters.

name: Stiv
quote: The man's clothes were filthy, fallen almost to pieces, patched here with brown and here with blue and there with a dark green, and faded everywhere to grey, but once that cloak might have been black.

name: Stiv
quote: A dead enemy is a thing of beauty.

name: Stiv
quote: Robb: Deserters from the Night's Watch. They must have been fools, to come so close to Winterfell. Luwin: Folly and desperation are ofttimes hard to tell apart.

name: Stiv
quote: I might have taken something off that wildling I killed to save Bran_Stark, but he had nothing worth the taking. That's my cursed luck, I kill the poor.

name: Stonesnake
quote: The mountain is your mother. Cling to her, press your face up against her teats, and she won't drop you.

name: Stonesnake
quote: If any man in the Night's Watch can make it through the Frostfangs alone and afoot, it is you, brother.

name: Stygg
quote: Stygg: I got a spear for you right here. Osha: You keep that soft pink thing. I'll have me the wood and iron.

name: Styr
quote: Styr: What do I want with Jon_Snow? Mance: He knows the Watch and he knows the Wall, and he knows Castle Black better than any raider ever could. You'll find a use for him, or you're a fool. Styr: His heart may still be black. Mance: Then cut it out.

name: Styr
quote: Crow, do not take me for Mance_Rayder. If you lie to me, I will have your tongue.

name: Styr
quote: He was straight as a spear, all long wiry muscle, clean-shaved, bald, with a strong straight nose and deepset grey eyes. He might even have been comely if he'd had ears, but he had lost both along the way, whether to frostbite or some enemy's knife Jon could not tell. Their lack made the man's head seem narrow and pointed.

name: Styr
quote: The Magnar claimed to be the last of the First Men, and ruled with an iron hand. His little land of Thenn was a high mountain valley hidden amongst the northernmost peaks of the Frostfangs, surrounded by cave dwellers, Hornfoot men, giants, and the cannibal clans of the ice rivers. Ygritte said the Thenns were savage fighters, and that their Magnar was a god to them. Jon could believe that. Unlike Jarl and Harma and Rattleshirt, Styr commanded absolute obedience from his men, and that discipline was no doubt part of why Mance_Rayder had chosen him to go over the Wall.

name: Styr
quote: The Magnar is a ruler, not a raider.

name: Styr
quote: Give me one clean shot at the Magnar of Thenn, he prayed to his father's gods. The Magnar at least was a foe that he could hate. Give me Styr.

name: Styr
quote: Tormund: The Magnar of Thenn swore t'us that he'd have the gate wide open, so all we'd need to do was stroll through singing. He was going to bring the whole Wall down. Jon: He brought down part. On his head. Tormund: Har! Well, I never had much use for Styr. When a man's got no beard nor hair nor ears, you can't get a good grip on him when you fight.

name: Sumner Crakehall
quote: 'Keep friends at your back and foes where you can see them,' Sumner Crakehall had once counseled him. Or had that been Tywin_Lannister?

name: Sunset girl
quote: Have you ever bedded a monster before?

name: Sunset girl
quote: This girl is as good as dead. I have just fucked a corpse.

name: Lord Sweet
quote: The craven sees an outlaw behind every blade of grass.

name: Sweets
quote: You are trying to decide if I'm a man or woman. I'm both, and Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz loves me best.

name: Sweets
quote: Sweets: Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz must not die. Penny: Some masters free their slaves when they die. Sweets: Only favorites. They free them from the woes of the world, to accompany their beloved master to the grave and serve him in the afterlife.

name: Sweets
quote: His will be the first throat slit.

name: Sweets
quote: Sweets sounded numb. It was more than just fear of having her throat cut; alone amongst Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz's treasures, she actually seemed fond of their immense master.

name: Sweets
quote: Tyrion: Sweets said Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz must have water. Scar: Sweets can go fuck himself. He's made for it. We don't take commands from that freak neither.

name: Sweets
quote: The hermaphrodite had long been their master's special pet, indulged and favored, and the noble Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz's other slaves hated him for it.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: Sybell: She would not give up the little crown the rebel gave her, and when I tried to take it from her head the willful child fought me. Jeyne: It was mine. You had no right. Robb_Stark had it made for me. I loved him.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: Sybell: You want a Westerling to wed a bastard? Jaime: No more than I want Joy_Hill to marry Raynald_Westerling of some scheming turncloak bitch. She deserves better. Jeyne_Westerling is worth ten of you, my lady.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: Gawen_Westerling is a good man, but his wife is Sybell Spicer. He should never have wed her.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: The Westerlings were old blood, but they had more pride than power. It would not surprise him to learn that Lady Sybell had brought more wealth to the marriage than Gawen_Westerling.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: Jeyne_Westerling is her mother's daughter, and Robb_Stark is Eddard_Stark son.

name: Sybell Spicer
quote: Jaime had to wonder how much Lord Gawen_Westerling knew about his wife's scheming. How much do we men ever know?

name: Sybelle Glover
quote: We will exchange Asha_Greyjoy for the children. Gawen_Glover is four now. I missed his nameday. And Erena_Glover… give me back my children, and no harm need come to you. Nor to your men.

name: Sybelle Glover
quote: Whether Sybelle Glover would find any joy in the fall of Moat Cailin, Asha could not say. Lady Sybelle all but lived in her godswood, praying for her children and her husband's safe return. Another prayer like to go unanswered. Her heart tree is as deaf and blind as our Drowned God. Robett_Glover and his brother Galbart_Glover had ridden south with the Robb_Stark. If the tales they had heard of the Red Wedding were even half-true, they were not like to ride north again. Her children are alive, at least, and that is thanks to me.

name: Sylva Santagar
quote: Arianne: Might I present Lady Sylva Santagar, my queen? My dearest Spotted Sylva. Myrcella: Why do they call you that? Sylva: For my freckles, Your Grace, though they all pretend it is because I am the heir to Spottswood.

name: Sylva Santagar
quote: Andrey_Dalt and Spotted Sylva were her dearest friends, aside from her cousin Tyene_Sand, and Garin_(orphan) had been teasing her since both of them were drinking from his mother's teats, but just now she was in no mood for japery.

name: Sylva Santagar
quote: Lady Sylva received no punishment from me, but she was of an age to marry. Symon_Santagar has shipped her to Greenstone to wed Lord Estermont.

name: Symon Silver Tongue
quote: Symon: I am called Symon Silver Tongue, my lord. A player, a singer, a taleteller— Tyrion: And a great fool.

name: Symon Silver Tongue
quote: Very good, my lord. I shall sing the night of King Joffrey's wedding. Should it happen that I am called to court, why, I will want to offer Joffrey_Baratheon my very best compositions, songs I have sung a thousand times that are certain to please. If I should find myself singing in some dreary winesink, though ... well, that would be an apt occasion to try my new song. For hands of gold are always cold, but Shae are warm.

name: Symon Silver Tongue
quote: Tyrion: Who is that? Ibbenese: Fatbelly singer.

name: Symon Silver Tongue
quote: Tyrion: How well does he sing? Shae: Better than some. Not so good as others.

name: Symon Silver Tongue
quote: In his soft hands he held a twelve-stringed woodharp more deadly than a longsword.

name: Symond Templeton
quote: A beak of a nose and icy blue eyes made the Knight of Ninestars look like some elegant bird of prey. His doublet displayed nine black stars within a golden saltire.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Syrio: Nine years Syrio Forel was first sword to the Sealord of Braavos, he knows these things. Listen to him, boy. Arya: I'm a girl. Syrio: Boy, girl. You are a sword, that is all.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Now we will begin the dance. Remember, child, this is not the iron dance of Westeros we are learning, the knight's dance, hacking and hammering, no. This is the bravo's dance, the water dance, swift and sudden. All men are made of water, do you know this? When you pierce them, the water leaks out and they die.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Arya: You saw what was there. Syrio: Just so. Opening your eyes is all that is needing. The heart lies and the head plays tricks with us, but the eyes see true. Look with your eyes. Hear with your ears. Taste with your mouth. Smell with your nose. Feel with your skin. Then comes the thinking, afterward, and in that way knowing the truth.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Meryn: You are quick, for a dancing master. Syrio: You are slow, for a knight.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Syrio says that every hurt is a lesson, and every lesson makes you better.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Look with your eyes, he had said. She saw: Meryn_Trant in his pale armor head to foot, legs, throat, and hands sheathed in metal, eyes hidden behind his high white helm, and in his hand cruel steel. Against that: Syrio, in a leather vest, with a wooden sword in his hand.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: All that Syrio Forel had taught her went racing through her head. Swift as a deer. Quiet as a shadow. Fear cuts deeper than swords. Quick as a snake. Calm as still water. Fear cuts deeper than swords. Strong as a bear. Fierce as a wolverine. Fear cuts deeper than swords. The man who fears losing has already lost. Fear cuts deeper than swords. Fear cuts deeper than swords. Fear cuts deeper than swords.

name: Syrio Forel
quote: Tyrion: I saw the older girl out in the yard with Joffrey_Baratheon. Cersei: Sansa_Stark. I've given it out that I have Arya_Stark as well, but it's a lie. I sent Meryn_Trant to take her in hand when Robert_I_Baratheon died, but her wretched dancing master interfered and the girl fled. No one has seen her since. Likely she's dead. A great many people died that day.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Taena: Orton_Merryweather and I wish only to serve Your Grace and Tommen_Baratheon. Cersei: We must speak again, my lady. Taena, is it? You are most kind. I know that we shall be great friends.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Cersei: I would be very sad if you ever betrayed my trust, Taena. I would have no choice but to give you to Lord Qyburn, but I know that I should weep. Taena: I will never give you cause to weep, Your Grace. If I do, say the word, and I will give myself to Qyburn. I want only to be close to you. To serve you, however you require.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Taena: Would it amuse Your Grace to be a man one night? Cersei: Only if you remained a woman.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Lady Merryweather was all but a stranger. Tyrion wondered if she was blind or bought.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: The Myrish woman was too beautiful by half; long-legged and full-breasted, with smooth olive skin, ripe lips, huge dark eyes, and thick black hair that always looked as if she'd just come from bed. She even smells of sin, like some exotic lotus.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Jaime could not help but notice the way the Myrish woman moved her hips as she walked. Every step is a seduction.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: Jaime: How much do you know about this woman? Cersei: I know she is a mother, with Russell_Merryweather that she wants to rise high in this world. She will do whatever is required to see that he does. Mothers are all the same. Lady Merryweather may be a serpent, but she is far from stupid. She knows I can do more for her than Margaery_Tyrell, so she makes herself useful to me.

name: Taena Merryweather
quote: It was a pity Taena could not serve as Hand. She was thrice the man Orton_Merryweather was, and far more amusing.

name: Talbert Serry
quote: Victarion: You! You of the rose? Be you Osbert_Serry of Southshield? Talbert: His son and heir. Ser Talbert Serry. And who are you, kraken? Victarion: Your death.

name: Talbert Serry
quote: May he feast as he fought, in the Drowned God's watery halls.

name: Talbert Serry
quote: A brave man, thought Victarion. Almost ironborn.

name: Talbert Serry
quote: Serry, that had been his name. A knight, and heir to Southshield. I killed him, but he stabs at me from beyond the grave. From the hot heart of whatever hell I sent him to, he thrusts his steel into my hand and twists.

name: Tallad
quote: Bronn: Who's the boy in the checkered blue surcoat with the three eyes on his shield? Tyrion: Some hedge knight. Tallad, he names himself. Why? Bronn: He's the best of them. But watch him, he falls into a rhythm, delivering the same strokes in the same order each time he attacks. That will be the death of him, the day he faces me.

name: Tallad
quote: Ser Tallad's the worst, Osney_Kettleblack says. That big oaf don't seem to know if it's Elinor_Tyrell or Alla_Tyrell he wants, but he knows he wants her awful bad.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: You have a good heart, my lady. Not every maid would weep so for Joffrey_Baratheon who set her aside and wed her to Tyrion_Lannister.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: The gods are cruel to take Joffrey_Baratheon so young and handsome, at his own wedding feast.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: I won't detain you long, I'm on my way to dine with Lady Tanda. Lamprey pie and roast suckling pig. She has some thought to wed me to Lollys_Stokeworth, so her table is always astonishing. If truth be told, I'd sooner marry the pig, but don't tell her. I do love lamprey pie.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: Lollys_Stokeworth gets herself raped by half of King's Landing, and Tanda thinks to honor the bastard with Tywin_Lannister? I think not.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: Pray all you like, she will still be dead before the moon turns. Women as old as Tanda Stokeworth did not survive a broken hip.

name: Tanda Stokeworth
quote: Tanda dead and Gyles_Rosby dying. It is well that we have Moon_Boy, or the court would be entirely bereft of fools.

name: Tanselle
quote: All men are fools, and all men are knights.

name: Tanselle
quote: Tanselle Too-Tall was her name, but she was not too tall for me.

name: Tansy (innkeep)
quote: There's never been no lack o' beds at the Peach. But you'll all climb in a tub first. Last time you lot stayed under my roof you left your fleas behind.

name: Tattered Prince
quote: Tattered and twisty, what a rogue I am.

name: Tattered Prince
quote: My ragged raiment? A poor thing … yet those tatters fill my foes with fear, and on the battlefield the sight of my rags blowing in the wind emboldens my men more than any banner. And if I want to move unseen, I need only slip it off to become plain and unremarkable.

name: Tattered Prince
quote: In this world, a man must learn to seize whatever gifts the gods chose to send him. That was a lesson I learned at some cost.

name: Tattered Prince
quote: You'll ride to battle with the Tattered Prince and come home richer than a lord.

name: Teora Toland
quote: Teora: It is dragons. Nymella: Dragons? Teora, don't be mad. Teora: I'm not. They're coming. Valena: How could you possibly know that? One of your little dreams? Teora: They were dancing. In my dream. And everywhere the dragons danced the people died.

name: Teora Toland
quote: Nymella: If you did not eat so many creamcakes you would not have such dreams. Rich foods are not for girls your age, when your humors are so unbalanced. Maester Toman says— Teora: I hate Maester Toman.

name: Ternesio Terys
quote: The north has nothing for us. Ice and war and pirates. We saw a dozen pirate ships making north as we rounded Crackclaw Point, and I have no wish to meet them again. From here we bend our oars for home, and I suggest you do the same.

name: Ternesio Terys
quote: Arya: Wait, I have something else. Ternesio: One more silver will make no difference, child. Arya: It's not silver. It's iron. Here. Ternesio: This… how…? Arya: Valar morghulis. Ternesio: Valar dohaeris. Of course you shall have a cabin.

name: Theo Wull
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn_Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo Wull; Ethan_Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark_Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland_Reed; Lord Willam_Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Theo Wull
quote: Meera: Jojen, wasn't there a Wull who rode with Howland_Reed during the war? Jojen: Theo Wull. Buckets, they used to call him.

name: Theomore
quote: If Stannis wonders that my letters say so little, it is because I dare not even trust my maester. Theomore is all head and no heart. You heard him in my hall. Maesters are supposed to put aside old loyalties when they don their chains, but I cannot forget that Theomore was born a Lannister of Lannisport and claims some distant kinship to the Lannisters of Casterly Rock.

name: Theomore Manderly
quote: Alysanne: Theomore is a good man, a wise man, with a kind heart and a good head on his shoulders. His people love him. Viserra: If you like him so much, Mother, you should marry him.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Stiv is a thing of beauty.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: He'd led men in war, hunted with Robert_I_Baratheon, won honor in tourney melees, ridden with Brynden Blackfish and Greatjon Umber, fought in the Whispering Wood, bedded more girls than he could name, and yet Aeron_Greyjoy was treating him as though he were still a child of ten.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Balon: Asha_Greyjoy has taken an axe for a lover. I will not have my son bedeck himself like a whore. It is as I feared. The green lands have made you soft, and the Starks have made you theirs. Theon: You're wrong. Eddard_Stark was my gaoler, but my blood is still salt and iron.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Theon: I will lead the attack myself, if it please you. As my reward I would ask that you grant me Casterly Rock for my own seat, once we have taken it from the Lannisters. Balon: You reward yourself handsomely for a notion and a few lines of scribbling.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Only a fool humbles himself when the world is so full of men eager to do that job for him.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Asha: Ten years a wolf, and you land here and think to prince about the islands, but you know nothing and no one. Why should men fight and die for you? Theon: I am their lawful prince. Asha: By the laws of the green lands, you might be. But we make our own laws here, or have you forgotten?

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Theon: I am a Greyjoy of Pyke. The cloak Balon_Greyjoy swaddled me in bore a kraken, not a direwolf. Rodrik: For ten years you have been a ward of Stark. Theon: Hostage and prisoner, I call it. Rodrik: Then perhaps Lord Eddard_Stark should have kept you chained to a dungeon wall. Instead he raised you among his own sons, the sweet boys you have butchered, and to my undying shame I trained you in the arts of war. Would that I had thrust a sword through your belly instead of placing one in your hand.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: The boar can keep his tusks, and the bear his claws. There's nothing half so mortal as a grey goose feather.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: I'm not him, I'm not the turncloak, he died at Winterfell. My name is Reek. It rhymes with freak.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Theon wondered what that would be like, to have a home.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Please. A sword, that's all I ask. Let me die as Theon, not as Reek.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Theon: Winter is coming ... Rowan: You have no right to mouth Lord Eddard_Stark words. Not you. Not ever.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Robb_Stark, who had been more a brother to Theon than any son born of Balon_Greyjoy’s loins. Murdered at the Red Wedding, butchered by the Freys. I should have been with him. Where was I? I should have died with him.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Asha: Theon? Theon: Theon. My name is Theon. You have to know your name.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: I saved her. I saved Jeyne_Poole. We flew.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: He smiled a lot, as if the world were a secret joke that only he was clever enough to understand.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: She studied Theon Greyjoy's sly smile, wondering what it meant. That young man had a way of looking as though he knew some secret jest that only he was privy to; Catelyn had never liked it.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Your Eddard_Stark did what he could to gentle Theon, but I fear it was too little and too late.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: He had only the vaguest memory of Theon Greyjoy from his time with the Starks. A callow youth, always smiling, skilled with a bow; it was hard to imagine him as Lord of Winterfell.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: If Theon had died in place of Lord Rickard_Karstark's sons, how much ill would have been undone?

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: They can't be dead. Theon would never do that.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: The skin from the little finger of Theon Greyjoy's left hand. Ramsay_Snow is cruel, I confess it. And yet ... what is a little skin, against the lives of Bran_Stark Rickon_Stark? You were their mother, my lady. May I offer you this ... small token of revenge?

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Alannys: Did you bring my baby boy? Asha: Theon could not come. Balon_Greyjoy sent him reaving along the Stony Shore.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: The wolves have made a weakling of him, as I feared. I pray god that they killed him, so he cannot stand in Asha_Greyjoy's way.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Arnolf: Him? Can it be? Eddard_Stark ward. Smiling, always smiling. Ramsay: He smiles less often now. I may have broken some of his pretty white teeth. Hother: You would have done better to slit his throat. A dog who turns against his master is fit for naught but skinning.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: You're Reek. You'll always be Reek, no matter how sweet you smell. Your nose may lie to you. Remember your name. Remember who you are.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: I send you each a piece of prince. Linger in my lands, and share his fate.

name: Theon Greyjoy
quote: Stannis: I am sorry for Alannys_Harlaw, but I do not spare the lives of turncloaks. This one, especially. He slew two sons of Eddard_Stark. Every Northman in my service would abandon me if I showed him any clemency. Your brother must die. Asha: Then do the deed yourself, Your Grace. Take him out across the lake to the islet where the weirwood grows, and strike his head off with that sorcerous sword you bear. That is how Eddard Stark would have done it. Theon slew Lord Eddard's sons. Give him to Lord Eddard's gods. The old gods of the north. Give him to the tree.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: Thoren: Send two hundred wolves against ten thousand sheep, ser, and see what happens. Jarman: There are goats among these sheep, Thoren. Aye, and maybe a few lions. Rattleshirt, Harma, Alfyn_Crowkiller ... Thoren: I know them as well as you do, Buckwell. And I mean to have their heads, every one. These are wildlings. No soldiers. A few hundred heroes, drunk most like, amidst a great horde of women, children, and thralls. We will sweep over them and send them howling back to their hovels.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: This Mance_Rayder will never look for us so far north. And this great host of his is a shambling horde, full of useless mouths who won't know what end of a sword to hold. One blow will take all the fight out of them and send them howling back to their hovels for another fifty years.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: Ottyn: We are the shield that guards the realms of men. You do not throw away your shield for no good purpose. Thoren: In a swordfight, a man's surest defense is the swift stroke that slays his foe, not cringing behind a shield.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: Thoren Smallwood looked more a lord than Jeor_Mormont did, clad in Ser Jaremy_Rykker's gleaming black mail and embossed breastplate. His heavy cloak was richly trimmed with sable, and clasped with the crossed hammers of the Rykkers, wrought in silver. Ser Jaremy's cloak, once ... but Jafer_Flowers had claimed Ser Jaremy, and the Night's Watch wasted nothing.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: Only fools like Thoren Smallwood despise the wildlings. They are as brave as we are, Jon.

name: Thoren Smallwood
quote: Thoren Smallwood charged, his longsword shining all orange and red from the light of the fire. His swing near took the bear's head off. And then the bear took his.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Sandor: Thoros of Myr. You used to shave your head. Thoros: To betoken a humble heart, but in truth my heart was vain. Besides, I lost my razor in the woods. I am less than I was, but more. A year in the wild will melt the flesh off a man. Would that I could find a tailor to take in my skin. I might look young again, and pretty maids would shower me with kisses.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Yet I am not the false priest you knew. The Lord of Light has woken in my heart. Many powers long asleep are waking, and there are forces moving in the land. I have seen them in my flames.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Beric: Thoros, how many times have you brought me back now? Thoros: It is R'hllor who brings you back, my lord. The Lord of Light. I am only his instrument.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Gendry: Tobho_Mott said you were a sot and a fraud, as bad a priest as there ever was. Thoros: That was unkind. True, but unkind.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Brienne: You are the Myrish priest. The red wizard. Thoros: The pink pretender, rather. I am Thoros, late of Myr, aye ... a bad priest and a worse wizard.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Justice. I remember justice. It had a pleasant taste. Justice was what we were about when Beric_Dondarrion led us, or so we told ourselves. We were Robert_I_Baratheon, knights, and heroes ... but some knights are dark and full of terror, my lady. War makes monsters of us all.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: The red wizard. I've heard tell he has strange powers.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Anguy: Thoros herding sheep? Ravella: I grant you it was an odd sight, but Thoros claimed that as a priest he knew how to tend a flock.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: Arya: He isn't very priestly, is he? Gendry: No. Tobho_Mott said Thoros could outdrink even King Robert_I_Baratheon. They were pease in a pod, he told me, both gluttons and sots.

name: Thoros of Myr
quote: A grievous wound, aye, but Thoros healed it. There's never been no better healer.

name: Three-Tooth
quote: Asha: Sybelle_Glover and the children should not want for wood nor warmth. Put them in some tower, not the dungeons. Erena_Glover is sick.Three-Tooth: Babes are often sick. Most die, and folks are sorry. I shall ask Rodrik_Harlaw where to put these wolf folk.Asha: You will do as I say. And if this babe dies, no one will be sorrier than you.

name: Three-Tooth
quote: The woman was so old that a septon had once said she must have nursed the Crone.

name: Three-Tooth
quote: Asha: Three-Tooth seems to have lost two more of her teeth. Do you call her One-Tooth now?Rodrik: I seldom call her at all. The woman frightens me.

name: Tickler
quote: Was there gold hidden in the village? Silver, gems? Was there more food? Where was Lord Beric_Dondarrion? Which of the village folk had aided him? When he rode off, where did he go? How many men were with them? How many knights, how many bowmen, how many men-at-arms? How were they armed? How many were horsed? How many were wounded? What other enemy had they seen? How many? When? What banners did they fly? Where did they go? Was there gold hidden in the village? Silver, gems? Where was Lord Beric Dondarrion? How many men were with him?

name: Tickler
quote: Tickler makes them howl so hard they piss themselves.

name: Tickler
quote: The Tickler was almost too scary to hate. At times she could almost forget he was still with them; when he was not asking questions, he was just another soldier, quieter than most, with a face like a thousand other men.

name: Tickler
quote: He always asked the same questions, but he changed the tickling every day.

name: Tickler
quote: Is there gold hidden in the village? Is there silver? Gems? Is there food? Where is Lord Beric_Dondarrion? Where did he go? How many men were with him? How many knights? How many bowmen? How many, how many, how many, how many, how many, how many? Is there gold in the village?

name: Tigaro Moraqos
quote: When Lysara Rogare protested, “I did not know,” Magister Tigaro Moraqos replied, “You should have,” and the mob roared its approval. Half the city had been ruined.

name: Timeon
quote: You and Tywin_Lannister lost too many battles. We had to trade our lion pelts for wolfskins.

name: Timeon
quote: Brienne: The one I want is with a highborn girl, Sansa_Stark of Eddard_Stark of Winterfell. Timeon: Then it's the Hound you want. He's not here neither, as it happens. Just us. Brienne: Sandor_Clegane? What do you mean? Timeon: He's the one that's got Arya_Stark. The way I hear it, she was making for Riverrun, and he stole her. Damned dog.

name: Timeon
quote: Mother have mercy. Finish it. Send me back to Dorne, you bloody bitch.

name: Timeon
quote: He was better than Pyg, but he had only a short throwing spear, and she had a Valyrian steel blade.

name: Timeon
quote: Timeon was still trying to fight as she pulled her blade from him, its fullers running red with blood. He clawed at his belt and came up with a dagger, so Brienne cut his hand off. That one was for Jaime_Lannister.

name: Timett
quote: The Burned Men fear nothing. Timett son of Timett will ride with the lions.

name: Timett
quote: If a man was mad enough to put out his own eye, he was unlikely to be gentle to his enemies.

name: Tion Frey
quote: Robb: I saw your sons die, that night in the Whispering Wood. Tion Frey did not kill Torrhen_Karstark. Willem_Lannister did not slay Eddard_Karstark. How then can you call this vengeance? This was folly, and bloody murder. Your sons died honorably on a battlefield, with swords in their hands. Rickard: They died. The Jaime_Lannister cut them down. These two were of his ilk. Only blood can pay for blood.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: My work is costly, and I make no apologies for that, my lord. You will not find craftsmanship equal to mine anywhere in the Seven Kingdoms, I promise you. Visit every forge in King's Landing if you like, and compare for yourself. Any village smith can hammer out a shirt of mail; my work is art.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: The direwolf is the sigil of House Stark, is it not? I could fashion a direwolf helm so real that children will run from you in the street.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: Eddard: You know who Gendry is. That is not a question. Tobho: The boy is my apprentice. Who he was before he came to me, that's none of my concern.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: Tywin: You have done good work, Master Mott. My steward will see to your payment. And remember, rubies for the scabbards. Tobho: I shall, my lord. You are most generous. It is an honor to serve the King's Hand.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: He decided that he liked Tobho Mott, master armorer.

name: Tobho Mott
quote: Gendry: My master said you were a sot and a fraud, as bad a priest as there ever was. Thoros: That was unkind. True, but unkind. Who was this master of yours? Did I know you, boy? Gendry: I was 'prenticed to the master armorer Tobho Mott, on the Street of Steel. You used to buy your swords from him. Thoros: Just so. He charged me twice what they were worth, then scolded me for setting them afire.

name: Todder
quote: Todder: You make us look bad. Jon: You looked bad before I ever met you.

name: Todder
quote: I heard of a man who had a razor made of Valyrian steel. He cut his head off trying to shave.

name: Todder
quote: Grenn: We're your brothers now. Todder: They'll cut off your head if they catch you, you know. This is so stupid, it's like something the Aurochs would do. Grenn: I would not. I'm no oathbreaker. I said the words and I meant them.

name: Todder
quote: The Watch has need of every man it can get. Even men like Toad. You won't win any honors killing him.

name: Todder
quote: Toad sometimes sings too, if you call it singing. Drinking songs he learned in his father's winesink. Pypar says his voice is piss poured over a fart.

name: Todder
quote: You're certain to be a ranger, Toad. They'll want you as far from the castle as they can. If Mance_Rayder attacks, lift your visor and show your face, and he'll run off screaming.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: There are worse things than dying with a song on your lips.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: Sometimes a man knows more than he says.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: If a song makes a maid want to slip off her clothes and feel the good warm sun kiss her skin, why, is that the singer's fault?

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: Thoros: We are brothers here. Holy brothers, sworn to the realm, to our god, and to each other. Tom: The brotherhood without banners. The knights of the hollow hill. Sandor: Knights? Beric_Dondarrion a knight, but the rest of you are the sorriest lot of outlaws and broken men I've ever seen.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: Tom: I know better songs than 'The Rains of Castamere.' I could have played you... oh, all sorts o' things. Jaime: Some other time. Do you have a name? Tom: Tom of Sevenstreams, if it please my lord. Most call me Tom o' Sevens, though. Jaime: Sing sweetly, Tom o' Sevens.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: The riverlands are full of maids you've pleased, all drinking tansy tea. You'd think a man as old as you would know to spill his seed on their bellies. Men will be calling you Tom Sevensons before much longer.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: We're outlaws. Outlaws steal. It's in the songs, if you ask nice Tom may sing you one.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
quote: Fifty if he's a day, thought Jaime, a hedge harp, and hard used by life.

name: Tom Turnip
quote: Saera: That must have been so funny, Turnip dancing with the whores. Jaehaerys: Not for Tom. Saera: He is a fool. Fools are meant to be laughed at, where is the harm in that? Turnip loves it when you laugh at him.

name: Tomard
quote: Fat Tom was always easy to fool.

name: Tommard Heddle
quote: Easier to speak of victories than win them.

name: Tommard Heddle
quote: Not all of us have milk running in our veins, your lordship.

name: Tommard Heddle
quote: A nasty bit of business, that one.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Margaery: Look, the flames are dancing. Just as we did, my love. Tommen: They are. Cersei_Lannister, look, they're dancing.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: When I'm king in my own right, I'm going to outlaw beets.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Cersei: Tommen, when you say your prayers before bed, tell the Mother and the Father that you are thankful you are still a child. Being king is hard work. I promise you, you will not like it. They peck at you like a murder of crows. Every one wants a piece of your flesh. Tommen: Yes, Mother. I wouldn't mind them pecking, though. I should go to court with you every day, to listen. Margaery_Tyrell says— Cersei: —a deal too much. For half a groat I'd gladly have her tongue torn out. Tommen: Don't you say that. You leave her tongue alone. Don't you touch her. I'm the king, not you.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Tommen: Ser Pounce caught a mouse, but Lady Whiskers stole it from him. Cersei: Ser Pounce must learn to defend his rights. In this world the weak are always the victims of the strong.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: He was a sweet boy, not like Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: If only Tommen were the elder instead of Joffrey_Baratheon. I wouldn't mind marrying Tommen.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: You mew like a suckling babe. Princes aren't supposed to cry.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Ever think how easy life would be if the other one had been born first? The weepy one, Tommen. Seems like he'd do whatever he was told, as a good king should.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Cersei: I shall rule until my son comes of age. Jaime: I don't know who I pity more. Tommen, or the Seven Kingdoms.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Tommen is no son of mine, no more than Joffrey_Baratheon was.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: The world is full of horrors, Tommen. You can fight them, or laugh at them, or look without seeing ... go away inside.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: He will be a better king than Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: He will never have a wife you don't hate.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: The Cersei_Lannister Margaery_Tyrell are squabbling over Tommen like bitches with a juicy bone.

name: Tommen Baratheon
quote: Tommen has been taught that kingship is his right. Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Rhaegar) knows that kingship is his duty, that a king must put his people first, and live and rule for them.

name: Toregg the Tall
quote: He has taken a liking to Val. Dalla was a queen, why not her? Tormund had once thought to make himself the King-Beyond-the-Wall, before Mance_Rayder had bested him. Toregg the Tall might well be dreaming the same dream. Better him than Gerrick_Kingsblood.

name: Torghen Flint
quote: It's peaceful in my dungeons. Give the Weeping Man to me.

name: Torghen Flint
quote: You want them in the Gift, that's your folly, but see they don't wander off or I'll send you back their heads. Winter is nigh, I want no more mouths to feed.

name: Torghen Flint
quote: Flint, Wull, Norrey, Liddle ... win Old Flint and Hugo_Wull, the rest will follow.

name: Tormund
quote: Tormund: Hold. You gave Styr his style, give me mine. Mance: As you wish. Jon_Snow, before you stands Tormund Giantsbane, Tall-talker, Horn-blower, and Breaker of Ice. And here also Tormund Thunderfist, Husband to Bears, the Mead-king of Ruddy Hall, Speaker to Gods and Father of Hosts. Tormund: That sounds more like me.

name: Tormund
quote: See, lad, that's why he's king and I'm not. I can outdrink, outfight, and outsing him, and my member's thrice the size o' his, but Mance has cunning.

name: Tormund
quote: Tormund Giantsbane has a better ring to it than Tormund Giantsbabe, and that's the honest truth o' it.

name: Tormund
quote: If a man does not use his member it grows smaller and smaller, until one day he wants to piss and cannot find it.

name: Tormund
quote: Tormund: Har! Jon Snow the crow. I feared we'd seen the last o' you. Jon: I never knew you feared anything, Tormund. Tormund: Well said, lad.

name: Tormund
quote: I have killed more o' you black buggers than I can count.

name: Tormund
quote: Jon: You're a good man, Tormund Giantsbabe. For a wildling. Tormund: Better than most, might be. Not so good as some.

name: Tormund
quote: Well spoken, crow. Now bring out the mead! Make them yours and get them drunk, that's how it's done. We'll make a wildling o' you yet, boy. Har!

name: Tormund
quote: Small wonder that the Seven Kingdoms thought the free folk scarcely human. They have no laws, no honor, not even simple decency. They steal endlessly from each other, breed like beasts, prefer rape to marriage, and fill the world with baseborn children. Yet he was growing fond of Tormund Giantsbane, great bag of wind and lies though he was.

name: Tormund
quote: Stannis: And this other man, this Tormund of the many names who eluded us after the battle? Answer me truly. Jon: Tormund Giantsbane seemed to me the sort of man who would make a good friend and a bad enemy, Your Grace.

name: Tormund
quote: Bowen: These are wildlings. Savages, raiders, rapers, more beast than man. Jon: Tormund is none of those things, no more than Mance_Rayder.

name: Torrhen Manderly
quote: Best take no chances. If the foe gains two more dragons, we are lost.

name: Torrhen Manderly
quote: Aye, I'll do it. But I'll need a man who is good with coin if I'm to deal with these Lyseni thieves and their bloody bank.

name: Torrhen Manderly
quote: A king should have a Hand of his own choosing. You have served Aegon_III_Targaryen well, no doubt, as you served Rhaenyra_Targaryen before me, but it was my lords who chose you. You may return to White Harbor.

name: Torrhen Stark
quote: From that day to this day, Torrhen Stark is remembered as the King Who Knelt ... but no northman left his burned bones beside the Trident, and the swords Aegon_I_Targaryen collected from Lord Stark and his vassals were not twisted nor melted nor bent.

name: Torrhen Stark
quote: Brienne: Is this some special place? Cleos: This is the Inn of the Kneeling Man, my lady. It stands upon the very spot where the last King in the North knelt before Aegon_I_Targaryen to offer his submission. That's him on the sign, I suppose. Jaime: Torrhen had brought his power south after the fall of the two kings on the Field of Fire, but when he saw Aegon's dragon and the size of his host, he chose the path of wisdom and bent his frozen knees.

name: Torwynd
quote: And Torwynd ... it was the cold claimed him. Always sickly, that one. He just up and died one night. The worst o' it, before we ever knew he'd died he rose pale with them blue eyes. Had to see to him m'self. That was hard, Jon. He wasn't much of a man, truth be told, but he'd been me little boy once, and I loved him.

name: Tothmure
quote: Do the ravens remember Maester Tothmure? Arya wondered. Are they sad for him? When they quork at him, do they wonder why he doesn't answer? Perhaps the dead could speak to them in some secret tongue the living could not hear.

name: Tregar Ormollen
quote: While I was fighting Braavosi on the Rhoyne, Lynesse_Hightower moved into the manse of a merchant prince named Tregar Ormollen. They say she is his chief concubine now, and even his wife goes in fear of her.

name: Tregar Ormollen
quote: When Eddard_Stark drove me into exile, I fled to Lys with my second wife. Braavos would have suited me better, but Lynesse_Hightower wanted someplace warm. Instead of serving the Braavosi I fought them on the Rhoyne, but for every silver I earned my wife spent ten. By the time I got back to Lys, she had taken a lover, who told me cheerfully that I would be enslaved for debt unless I gave her up and left the city.

name: Tristan Rivers
quote: Which plan? The fat man’s plan? The one that changes every time the moon turns? First Viserys_Targaryen was to join us with fifty thousand Dothraki screamers at his back. Then the Beggar King was dead, and it was to be Daenerys_Targaryen, a pliable young child queen who was on her way to Pentos with three new-hatched dragons. Instead the girl turns up on Slaver's Bay and leaves a string of burning cities in her wake, and the fat man decides we should meet her by Volantis. Now that plan is in ruins as well. I have had enough of Illyrio’s plans. Robert_I_Baratheon won the Iron Throne without the benefit of dragons. We can do the same.

name: Tristifer Botley
quote: Asha: You are the rightful Lord Botley. Once I hold the Seastone Chair, Sawane_Botley lands shall be restored. Tristifer: If you like. It's nought to me.

name: Tristifer Botley
quote: Tristifer: You and I were meant to be, Asha. I have always known you would be my wife, and the mother of my sons. Asha: Take your hand away or you won't live long enough to breed a son. Now. You want a woman, well and good. I'll put one in your bed tonight. Pretend she's me, if that will give you pleasure, but do not presume to grab at me again. I am your queen, not your wife. Remember that.

name: Tristifer Botley
quote: Tristifer Botley had filled out since last she'd seen him, but he had the same unruly hair that she remembered, and eyes as large and trusting as a seal's. Sweet eyes, truly. That was the trouble with poor Tristifer; he was too sweet for the Iron Islands.

name: Tristifer Botley
quote: I don't want to have a dozen sons. I want to have adventures.

name: Tristifer IV Mudd
quote: Old Tristifer don't mind my bony arse. The Hammer of Justice, they called him. Been a long while since he heard any new songs.

name: Triston of Tally Hill
quote: There is no honor in hiding and sneaking.

name: Trystane Martell
quote: The two children could not have looked more different, him with his olive skin and straight black hair, her pale as milk with a mop of golden curls; light and dark, like Queen Cersei_Lannister and King Robert_I_Baratheon. He prayed Myrcella_Baratheon would find more joy in her Dornish boy than her mother had found with her storm lord.

name: Tumberjon
quote: Harma has the van, the poxy bitch. Goady crept up on her camp and saw her plain by the fire. That fool Tumberjon wanted to pick her off with an arrow, but Thoren_Smallwood had better sense.

name: Two female puppeteers
quote: The puppeteers are quite used up.

name: Tybero Istarion
quote: Tyrion: In Westeros, the word of a Lannister is considered good as gold.Tybero: This is not Westeros. On this side of the narrow sea, we put our promises on paper. Debts written on the wind tend to be ... forgotten, shall we say?

name: Tybero Istarion
quote: Tyrion: Tybero? That sounds almost Lannister. Are you some long-lost cousin? Tybero: Perhaps. I always pay my debts as well. It is expected of a paymaster.

name: Tybero Istarion
quote: I keep the books. I guard our gold. I draw up our agreements, collect our wages, make certain that we have sufficient coin to buy provisions. I do not decide who we fight or when.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: Tycho: It would not be proper for me to discuss Lord Stannis_Baratheon indebtedness or lack of same. As to King Robert_I_Baratheon ... it was indeed our pleasure to assist His Grace in his need. For so long as Robert lived, all was well. Now, however, the Iron Throne has ceased all repayment.Jon: You cannot mean to hold Stannis responsible for his brother's debts.Tycho: The debts belong to the Iron Throne, and whosoever sits on that chair must pay them. Since young King Tommen_Baratheon and his counsellors have become so obdurate, we mean to broach the subject with King Stannis. Should he prove himself more worthy of our trust, it would of course be our great pleasure to lend him whatever help he needs.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: We who serve the Iron Bank face death full as often as you who serve the Iron Throne.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: I have the honor to be Tycho Nestoris, a humble servant of the Iron Bank of Braavos.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: A scarf concealed the tall man's features, but atop his head was perched the queerest hat Asha had seen since the last time she had sailed to Tyrosh, a brimless tower of some soft fabric, like three cylinders stacked one atop the other.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: You are a worse pirate than Salladhor_Saan.

name: Tycho Nestoris
quote: Stannis_Baratheon drew his dagger. For an instant Theon thought that he meant to stab the banker. You will never get a drop of blood from that one, my lord, he might have told him.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Doran: Obara_Sand cries to me for war. Nymeria_Sand will be content with murder. And you? Tyene: War, though not my sister's war. Dornishmen fight best at home, so I say let us hone our spears and wait. When the Lannisters and the Tyrells come down on us, we shall bleed them in the passes and bury them beneath the blowing sands, as we have a hundred times before.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Tyene: You think too much, Uncle.Doran: Do I?Tyene: Father said so.Doran: Oberyn_Martell thought too little.Tyene: Some men think because they are afraid to do.Doran: There is a difference between fear and caution.Tyene: Oh, I must pray that I never see you frightened, Uncle. You might forget to breathe.Areo: My lady, you presume. Step from the dais, if it please you. Tyene: I meant no harm, Captain. I love my uncle, as I know he loved my father. I have said all I came to say, Uncle. Forgive me if I gave offense; my heart is broken all to pieces. Do I still have your love?Doran: Always.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Sisters, truly, I know the poison Oberyn_Martell used. If his spear so much as broke the Mountain's skin, Gregor_Clegane is dead, I do not care how big he was. Doubt your little sister if you like, but never doubt our sire.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Obara: If Ser Balon_Swann is allowed to carry tales back to King's Landing, drums will sound and blood will flow. He should not be allowed to leave.Tyene: We could kill him, to be sure, but then we would need to kill the rest of his party too, even those sweet young squires. That would be ... oh, so messy.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Doran: The Swords and the Stars have been re-formed, and this High_Sparrow is not the puppet that the others were. Try and get close to him.Tyene: Why not? White suits my coloring. I look so ... pure.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Lady Tyene's voice was gentle, and she looked as sweet as summer strawberries. Her mother had been a septa, and Tyene had an air of almost otherworldy innocence about her.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: I have never been as fearless as my cousins, for I was made with weaker seed, but Tyene and I are of an age and have been close as sisters since we were little girls. We have no secrets between us. If she can be imprisoned, so can I, and for the same cause ... this of Myrcella_Baratheon.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Her hands are dangerous.

name: Tyene Sand
quote: Hotah studied each of them in turn. Obara_Sand, rusted nails and boiled leather, with her angry, close-set eyes and rat-brown hair. Nymeria_Sand, languid, elegant, olive-skinned, her long black braid bound up in red-gold wire. Tyene, blue-eyed and blond, a child-woman with her soft hands and little giggles.

name: Tygett Lannister
quote: I want Tyrek_Lannister found, alive or dead. He's no more than a boy. Son to my late uncle Tygett. His father was always kind to me.

name: Tygett Lannister
quote: It was hard for all my brothers. That shadow Tywin_Lannister cast was long and black, and each of them had to struggle to find a little sun. Tygett tried to be his own man, but he could never match your father, and that just made him angrier as the years went by.

name: Tyland Lannister
quote: I myself swore no such oath. I was a child at the time.

name: Tyland Lannister
quote: Aegon_III_Targaryen will remain a threat so long as he draws breath. Remove his head, and these traitors will be left with neither queen nor king nor prince. The sooner he is dead, the sooner this rebellion will end.

name: Tyland Lannister
quote: It would be a grave mistake for Westeros to become embroiled in the endless quarrels of the Free Cities.

name: Tyland Lannister
quote: Munkun: We must abide by primogeniture, as the Great Council ruled in 101. The male claim comes before the female.Tyland: And who is this male claimant, my lord? We seem to have killed them all.

name: Tyland Lannister
quote: A monster who hides his twisted face from gods and men.

name: Tymond Lannister
quote: He was overly fond of women, it was said, and even more fond of wine.

name: Tyrek Lannister
quote: Tyrion: I want Tyrek found, alive or dead. He's no more than a boy. Son to my late uncle Tygett_Lannister. His father was always kind to me. Jacelyn: We'll find him.

name: Tyrek Lannister
quote: Bronn: He's feeding worms. Jacelyn_Bywater looked for him, and Varys rattled a nice fat purse. They had no more luck than we did. Give it up, ser. Addam: Lord Tywin_Lannister is stubborn where his blood is concerned. He will have the lad, alive or dead, and I mean to oblige him.

name: Tyrek Lannister
quote: Tyrek had served King Robert_I_Baratheon as a squire, side by side with Lancel_Lannister. Knowledge could be more valuable than gold, more deadly than a dagger.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Tyrion: Let me give you some counsel, bastard. Never forget what you are, for surely the world will not. Make it your strength. Then it can never be your weakness. Armor yourself in it, and it will never be used to hurt you. Jon: What the hell do you know about being a bastard? Tyrion: All dwarfs are bastards in their father's eyes.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: My mind is my weapon. Jaime_Lannister has his sword, King Robert_I_Baratheon has his warhammer, and I have my mind... and a mind needs books as a sword needs a whetstone, if it is to keep its edge. That’s why I read so much, Jon Snow.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Varys: Power resides where men believe it resides. No more and no less. Tyrion: So power is a mummer's trick? Varys: A shadow on the wall, yet shadows can kill. And ofttimes a very small man can cast a very large shadow.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: When you tear out a man’s tongue, you are not proving him a liar, you're only telling the world that you fear what he might say.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Tyrion: Next?Bronn: A lordling down from the Trident, says your father's men burned his keep, raped his wife, and killed all his peasants.Tyrion: I believe they call that war.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: I have never liked you, Cersei, but you were my own sister, so I never did you harm. You've ended that. I will hurt you for this. I don't know how yet, but give me time. A day will come when you think yourself safe and happy, and suddenly your joy will turn to ashes in your mouth, and you'll know the debt is paid.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: It all goes back and back. To our mothers and fathers and theirs before them. We are puppets dancing on the strings of those who came before us, and one day our own children will take up our strings and dance on in our steads.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: I am malformed, scarred, and small, but... abed, when the candles are blown out, I am made no worse than other men. In the dark, I am the Loras_Tyrell. I am generous. Loyal to those who are loyal to me. I’ve proven I’m no craven. And I am cleverer than most, surely wits count for something. I can even be kind. Kindness is not a habit with us Lannisters, I fear, but I know I have some somewhere. I could be... I could be good to you.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: You poor stupid blind crippled fool. Must I spell out every little thing for you? Very well. Cersei_Lannister is a lying whore, she's been fucking Lancel_Lannister and Osmund_Kettleblack and probably Moon_Boy for all I know. And I am the monster they all say I am. Yes, I killed Joffrey_Baratheon.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Tyrion: Someone told me that the night is dark and full of terrors. What do you see in those flames? Moqorro: Dragons. Dragons old and young, true and false, bright and dark. And you. A small man with a big shadow, snarling in the midst of all.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Tyrion Lannister, the youngest of Lord Tywin_Lannister's brood, and by far the ugliest. All that the gods had given to Cersei_Lannister and Jaime_Lannister, they had denied Tyrion. He was a dwarf, half his brother's height, struggling to keep pace on stunted legs. His head was too large for his body, with a brute's squashed-in face beneath a swollen shelf of brow. One green eye and one black one peered out from under a lank fall of hair so blond it seemed white. Jon watched him with fascination.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Bowen: You have great thirst for such a small man. Aemon: Oh, I think Lord Tyrion is quite a large man. I think he is a giant come among us, here at the end of the world.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: He is a bigger man than he seems, I think.

name: Tyrion Lannister
quote: Jaime, sweetling, I have known you since you were a babe at Joanna's breast. You smile like Gerion_Lannister and fight like Tygett_Lannister and there's some of Kevan_Lannister in you, else you would not wear that cloak... but Tyrion is Tywin_Lannister's son, not you. I said so once to your father's face, and he would not speak to me for half a year.

name: Tyrion Tanner
quote: Falyse: Tanda_Stokeworth admired Tywin_Lannister above all other men. Should Lollys_Stokeworth have a little boy, it is her wish that we might name him Tywin, if... if it please you. Cersei: Your lackwit sister gets herself raped by half of King's Landing, and Tanda thinks to honor the bastard with my lord father's name? I think not. Balman: I told Lady Tanda as much. We shall find a more, ah... a more fitting name for Lollys's bastard, you have my word. Cersei: See that you do.

name: Tyrion Tanner
quote: Pycelle : Lady Tanda_Stokeworth sends word that her daughter Lollys_Stokeworth has been delivered of a strong, healthy son. Cersei: And you will never guess what they have named the little bastard, brother. Jaime: They wanted to name him Tywin, I recall. Cersei: Yes, but I forbade it. I told Falyse_Stokeworth that I would not have Tywin_Lannister noble name bestowed upon the ill-gotten spawn of some pig boy and a feeble-witted sow.

name: Tyrion Tanner
quote: Pycelle : Lady Tanda_Stokeworth insists the child's name was not her doing. Lollys_Stokeworth's husband made the choice, she writes. This man Bronn, he... it would seem that he... Jaime: Tyrion_Lannister. He named the child Tyrion.

name: Tyrion Tanner
quote: Jaime: There you are, sweet sister. You have been looking everywhere for Tyrion_Lannister, and all the time he's been hiding in Lollys_Stokeworth womb. Cersei: Droll. You and Bronn are both so droll. No doubt the bastard is sucking on one of Lollys Lackwit's dugs even as we speak, whilst this sellsword looks on, smirking at his little insolence.

name: Tyrion Tanner
quote: Balman: Your Grace, an awkward matter, but ... lest bad feeling fester between us, you should know that neither Falyse_Stokeworth nor Tanda_Stokeworth had any hand in the naming of this bastard child. Lollys_Stokeworth is a simple creature, and Bronn is given to black humors. I told him to choose a more fitting name for the boy. He laughed. Cersei: Tyrion was a king's name before the dragons came. Tyrion_Lannister has despoiled it, but perhaps this child can restore the name to honor.

name: Tysha
quote: I love you, Tyrion_Lannister. I love your lips. I love your voice, and the words you say to me, and how you treat me gentle. I love your face.

name: Tysha
quote: She was scarcely a year older than I was, dark-haired, slender, with a face that would break your heart. It certainly broke mine. Lowborn, half-starved, unwashed ... yet lovely.

name: Tysha
quote: His sweet innocent Tysha had been a lie from start to finish, only a whore his brother Jaime_Lannister had hired to make him a man.

name: Tysha
quote: She was no whore. I never bought her for you. That was a lie that Tywin_Lannister commanded me to tell. Tysha was ... she was what she seemed to be. A crofter's daughter, chance met on the road.

name: Tysha
quote: A girl, she was only a girl, no older than Sansa_Stark.

name: Tysha
quote: Ah yes. Your first whore ... She'd learned her place.

name: Tysha
quote: Sansa_Stark, Shae, all my women ... Tysha was the only one who ever loved me. Where do whores go?

name: Tysha
quote: Jaime_Lannister. Shae. Tysha. My wife, I miss my wife, the wife I hardly knew.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: My hall might lack for food, but never for courtesy.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: Tytos: For honor's sake I must ask about my liege lord. Jaime: Ser Edmure_Tully is on his way to Casterly Rock as my captive. Roslin_Frey will remain at the Twins until their child is born. Then she and the babe will join him. So long as he does not attempt escape or plot rebellion, Edmure will live a long life. Tytos: Long and bitter. A life without honor. Until his dying day, men will say he was afraid to fight. Jaime: The choice was his. Brynden_Tully would have made us bleed. Tytos: We agree on that much.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: Jaime: My lord, let there be no misunderstanding here. Lord Beric_Dondarrion, Thoros_of_Myr, Sandor_Clegane, Brynden_Tully, this woman Stoneheart … all these are outlaws and rebels, enemies to Tommen_Baratheon and all his leal subjects. If I should learn that you or yours are hiding them, protecting them, or assisting them in any way, I will not hesitate to send you Hoster_Blackwood head. I hope you understand that. Understand this as well: I am not Ryman_Frey. Tytos: No. I know who I am dealing with. Kingslayer.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: The plan's a good one. Lord Tytos says so, and Lord Jonos_Bracken as well. When did Blackwood and Bracken agree about anything that was not certain, I ask you?

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: Jaime: I mean to deal with Lord Tytos myself. It won't require a siege tower. Daven: Single combat, coz? Scarce seems fair. Tytos is an old grey man.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: So long as it is Jonos_Bracken at his gates Tytos will never yield, but I know he will bend his knee for you.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: Every Blackwood is a turncloak.

name: Tytos Blackwood
quote: Though some might say that Lord Blackwood has been more honorable.

name: Tytos Lannister
quote: Lord Tytos was an altogether different character [to Tywin_Lannister], amiable but ineffectual, and he allowed himself to be pushed around a good deal, by a number of people.. including Lord Walder_Frey (ever wonder how Genna_Lannister came to marry Emmon_Frey?) and the Roger_Reyne, the richest and most powerful Lannister bannerman, and a formidable soldier/warrior in his own right...

name: Tytos Lannister
quote: His lordship wants only to be loved. So he laughs, and takes no offense, and forgives, and bestows honors and offices and lavish gifts on those who mock him and defy him, thinking thereby to win their loyalty. Yet the more he laughs and gives, the more they despise him.

name: Tytos Lannister
quote: Our own father was gentle and amiable, but so weak his bannermen mocked him in their cups. Some saw fit to defy him openly. Other lords borrowed our gold and never troubled to repay it. At court they japed of toothless lions. Even his Tytos_Lannister's_second_mistress stole from him. A woman scarcely one step above a whore, and she helped herself to Jeyne_Marbrand jewels!

name: Tytos Lannister
quote: Tywin_Lannister mistrusted laughter. He heard too many people laughing at your grandsire.

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: Tytos_Lannister was gentle and amiable, but so weak his bannermen mocked him in their cups. Some saw fit to defy him openly. Other lords borrowed our gold and never troubled to repay it. At court they japed of toothless lions. Even his mistress stole from him. A woman scarcely one step above a whore, and she helped herself to Jeyne_Marbrand jewels!

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: When Lord Tywin's father died he returned to Casterly Rock to find a ... a woman of this sort ... bedecked in his lady mother's jewels, wearing one of her gowns. He stripped them off her, and all else as well. For a fortnight she was paraded naked through the streets of Lannisport, to confess to every man she met that she was a thief and a harlot. That was how Lord Tywin Lannister dealt with whores.

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: Cersei had been a year old when her grandfather died. The first thing Cersei_Lannister had done on his ascension was to expel his own father's grasping, lowborn mistress from Casterly Rock. The silks and velvets Lord Tytos_Lannister had lavished on her and the jewelry she had taken for herself had been stripped from her, and she had been sent forth naked to walk through the streets of Lannisport, so the west could see her for what she was.

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: Vain and proud she was, before ... so haughty you'd think she'd forgot she came from dirt. Once we got her clothes off her, though, she was just another whore.

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: She grew so influential that it was said about Lannisport that any man who wished for his petition to be heard should kneel before her and speak loudly to her lap ... for Tytos_Lannister's ear was between his lady's legs.
