name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
quote: All the self-seekers who had named themselves her friends and cultivated her favor had abandoned her quickly enough when Tywin_Lannister had her stripped naked and paraded through Lannisport to the docks, like a common whore. Though no man laid a hand on her, that walk spelled the end of her power. Surely Tywin would never have dreamed that same fate awaited Cersei_Lannister.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Unleash Ser Gregor_Clegane and send him before us with his reavers. Send forth Vargo_Hoat and his freeriders as well, and Ser Amory_Lorch. Each is to have three hundred horse. Tell them I want to see the riverlands afire from the Gods Eye to the Red Fork.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Tell them they may ride with Vargo Hoat and plunder as they like—goods, stock, women, they may take what they want and burn the rest.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Some battles are won with swords and spears, others with quills and ravens.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: The greatest fools are ofttimes more clever than the men who laugh at them.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: There is a tool for every task, and a task for every tool.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Joffrey, when your enemies defy you, you must serve them steel and fire. When they go to their knees, however, you must help them back to their feet. Elsewise no man will ever bend the knee to you. And any man who must say 'I am the king' is no true king at all. Aerys_II_Targaryen never understood that, but you will. When I've won your war for you, we will restore the king's peace and the king's justice.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Tyrion: Tysha. What did you do with her, after my little lesson? Tywin: I don't recall. Tyrion: Try harder. Did you have her killed? Tywin: There was no reason for that, she'd learned her place ... and had been well paid for her day's work, I seem to recall. I suppose the steward sent her on her way. I never thought to inquire. Tyrion: On her way where? Tywin: Wherever whores go.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Tywin: You ... you are no ... no son of mine. Tyrion: Now that's where you’re wrong, Father. Why, I believe I'm you writ small. Do me a kindness now, and die quickly.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: No man is free. Only children and fools think elsewise.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: I would sooner entrust a child to a pit viper than to Lord Tywin.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Tywin Lannister was as much fox as lion.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: A fool more foolish than most had once jested that even Lord Tywin's shit was flecked with gold. Some said the man was still alive, deep in the bowels of Casterly Rock.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Every once in a very long while, Lord Tywin Lannister would actually threaten to smile; he never did, but the threat alone was terrible to behold.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Oberyn: Lord Tywin had made himself greater than King Aerys_II_Targaryen, I heard one begging brother preach, but only a god is meant to stand above a king. You were his curse, a punishment sent by the gods to teach him that he was no better than any other man. Tyrion: I try, but he refuses to learn.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: I remember the first time Steffon_Baratheon took me to court, Robert_I_Baratheon had to hold my hand. I could not have been older than four, which would have made him five or six. We agreed afterward that the king had been as noble as the dragons were fearsome. Years later, our father told us that Aerys_II_Targaryen had cut himself on the throne that morning, so his Hand had taken his place. It was Tywin Lannister who'd so impressed us.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Kevan: Tywin seems a hard man to you, but he's no harder than he's had to be. Tytos_Lannister was gentle and amiable, but so weak his bannermen mocked him in their cups. Some saw fit to defy him openly. Other lords borrowed his gold and never troubled to repay it. At court they japed of toothless lions. Even Tytos_Lannister's_second_mistress stole from him. A woman scarcely one step above a whore, and she helped herself to Jeyne_Marbrand jewels! It fell to Tywin to restore House Lannister to its proper place. Just as it fell to him to rule this realm, when he was no more than twenty. He bore that heavy burden for twenty years and all it earned him was Aerys_II_Targaryen's envy. Instead of the honor he deserved, he was made to suffer slights beyond count, yet he gave the Seven Kingdoms peace, plenty and justice. He is a just man. Tyrion: You love him. Kevan: He is my brother.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Lord Tywin Lannister did not, in the end, shit gold.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: It is not fitting for Tywin Lannister to die alone. Such a man deserves a retinue to attend his needs in hell.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Father, it was you who told me that tears were a mark of weakness in a man, so you cannot that I should cry for you.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Even in the west, Lord Tywin had been more respected than beloved, and King's Landing still remembered the Sack.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: I have served six kings, but here before us lies the greatest man I ever knew. Lord Tywin wore no crown, yet he was all a king should be.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: Men say Tywin never smiled, but he smiled when he wed Joanna_Lannister, and when Aerys_II_Targaryen made him Hand. When Tarbeck Hall came crashing down on Lady Ellyn, that scheming bitch, Tygett_Lannister claimed he smiled then, and he smiled at your birth, Jaime, I saw with my own eyes.

name: Tywin Lannister
quote: My betrothal was announced at a feast with half the west in attendance. Ellyn Tarbeck laughed and the Roger_Reyne went angry from the hall. The rest sat on their tongues. Only Tywin dared speak against Emmon_Frey. A boy of ten. Tytos_Lannister turned as white as mare's milk, and Walder_Frey was quivering. How could I not love him after that? That is not to say I approved of all he did, or much enjoyed the company of the man he became ... but every little girl needs a big brother to protect her. Tywin was big even when he was little.

name: Ulf
quote: Tywin: Ride with me against my enemies, and you shall have all Tyrion_Lannister promised you, and more. Ulf: Would you pay us with our own coin? Why should we need the father's promise, when we have the son's? Tywin: I said nothing of need. My words were courtesy, nothing more. You need not join us. The men of the winterlands are made of iron and ice, and even my boldest knights fear to face them.

name: Ulf White
quote: Hugh: We are knights now, truly.Ulf: Fie on that, we should be lords.

name: Ulf White
quote: Ser Ulf gave himself entirely over to drunkenness, drowning himself in wine and flesh.

name: Ulmer
quote: Ulmer: You have a good eye and a steady hand, but you'll need a deal more to best a man of the kingswood. Fletcher_Dick it was who showed me how to bend the bow, and no finer archer ever lived. Have I told you about old Dick, now? Donnel: Only three hundred times.

name: Ulmer
quote: Ulmer: If it please m'lord, the lads were wondering. Will it be peace, m'lord? Or blood and iron? Jon: Peace. Three days hence, Tormund Giantsbane will lead his people through the Wall. As friends, not foes.

name: Ulmer
quote: Every man at Castle Black had heard Ulmer's tales of the great outlaw band of yore; of Simon_Toyne and the Smiling_Knight, Oswyn Longneck the Thrice-Hanged, Wenda the White Fawn, Fletcher_Dick, Big Belly Ben, and all the rest.

name: Ulmer
quote: Samwell: I can hit the target more often than not now, but I'm still the worst archer who ever bent a bow. I like Ulmer's stories, though. Someone needs to write them down and put them in a book. Jon: You do it.

name: Umma
quote: She got along well enough with the cook. Umma would slap a knife into her hand and point at an onion, and Arya would chop it. Umma would shove her toward a mound of dough, and Arya would knead it until the cook said stop (stop was the first Braavosi word she learned). Umma would hand her a fish, and Arya would bone it and fillet it and roll it in the nuts the cook was crushing.

name: Umma
quote: She knew the way to the kitchens, but her nose would have led her there even if she hadn't. Hot peppers and fried fish, she decided, sniffing down the hall, and bread fresh from Umma's oven. The smells made her belly rumble.

name: Unella
quote: Only through confession and true repentance may our immortal souls be saved.

name: Urrathon IV Goodbrother
quote: The first thing the new king did was command that all the sons of Urragon_III_Greyiron be put to death, and so they were. After that men called him Badbrother, though in truth they'd been no kin of his.

name: Urron Greyiron
quote: The Drowned God makes men, but it's men who make crowns.

name: Urron Greyiron
quote: I am the Greyjoy, Lord Reaper of Pyke, King of Salt and Rock, Son of the Sea Wind, and no man gives me a crown. I pay the iron price. I will take my crown, as Urron Redhand did five thousand years ago.

name: Urswyck
quote: Jaime: Who commands here? Urswyck: I have that honor, Ser Jaime. Urswyck I am. Called Urswyck the Faithful. Jaime: You know who I am? Urswyck: It takes more than a beard and a shaved head to deceive the Brave Companions.

name: Urswyck
quote: Jaime: Gold. You do like gold? Urswyck: It has its uses, I do confess. Jaime: All the gold in Casterly Rock. Why let Vargo_Hoat enjoy it? Why not take us to King's Landing, and collect my ransom for yourself? Brienne_Tarth as well, if you like. Tarth is called the Sapphire Isle, a maiden told me once. Urswyck: Do you take me for a turncloak? Jaime: Certainly. What else?

name: Urswyck
quote: He's cleverer than he looks.

name: Urswyck
quote: I warned you, Urswyck, and you, Vargo_Hoat. When you bet against the lions, you lose more than your purse.

name: Urzen
quote: Urzen: If Squint had sounded his horn— Theon: Try and imagine it was you up here, Urzen. It's dark and cold. You have been walking sentry for hours, looking forward to the end of your watch. Then you hear a noise and move toward the gate, and suddenly you see eyes at the top of the stair, glowing green and gold in the torchlight. Two shadows come rushing toward you faster than you can believe. You catch a glimpse of teeth, start to level your spear, and they slam into you and open your belly, tearing through leather as if it were cheesecloth. And now you're down on your back, your guts are spilling out, and one of them has his teeth around your neck. Tell me, at what moment during all of this do you stop to blow your fucking horn?

name: Urzen
quote: I am served by fools.

name: Uther Shett
quote: Uther: Ser Ossifer_Lipps speaks truly, you are the most beautiful maid in all the Seven Kingdoms.Alayne: And have you seen all those maids yourself, ser? You are young to be so widely travelled.Uther: No, my lady. I am from Gulltown.

name: Uther Shett
quote: His ginger-colored whiskers only partially served to disguise the angry red pimples that dotted his face.

name: Uther Shett
quote: Ossifer_Lipps is the dullest knight in the Vale, but Uther Shett aspires to his laurels. I am praying they fight a duel for my hand, and kill each other.

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: Can we hope for no help from the south, Lady Stark? This charge of incest … Lord Tywin_Lannister does not suffer such slights lightly. He will seek to wash the stain from his Cersei_Lannister name with the blood of her accuser. Lord Stannis_Baratheon must see that. He has no choice but to make common cause with us.

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: Catelyn: Eddard_Stark?Utherydes: Ser Cleos_Frey brought him from King's Landing, my lady.Catelyn: Take me to him. I would look on him.Utherydes: Only the ones remain, my lady.Catelyn: I would look on him.

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: We share you grief, my lady. All Riverrun mourns with you, but …

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: It was a grave thing you did, my lady, but for naught. Ser Desmond_Grell has sent Ser Robin_Ryger after them, to bring back Jaime_Lannister … or failing that, his head.

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: They have given their lives to Hoster_Tully service, and I have repaid them with disgrace.

name: Utherydes Wayn
quote: I spoke to Utherydes Wayn, my lady. He is quite certain that no woman by the name of Tansy has ever been at Riverrun during his service.

name: Uthor Underleaf
quote: Uthor: I ride where I will and serve no man but myself, true ... but it has been many a year since I last slept beneath a hedge. I find that inns are far more comfortable. I am a tourney knight, the best that you are ever like to meet. Duncan: The best? Lyonel_Baratheon might not agree, ser. Nor Leo_Tyrell_(Longthorn), not the Otho_Bracken. At Ashford Meadow no one spoke of snails. Why is that, if you're such a famous tourney champion? Uthor: Have you heard me name myself a champion? That way lies renown. I would sooner have the pox.

name: Uthor Underleaf
quote: I follow tourneys from afar as faithfully as the maesters follow stars.

name: Uthor Underleaf
quote: The snail may leave a trail of slime behind him, but a little slime will do a man no harm... whilst if you dance with dragons, you must expect to burn.

name: Uthor Underleaf
quote: I see why you have a snail on your shield. You are no true knight.

name: Utt
quote: I am a weak reed. I pray to the Warrior for strength, but the gods made me weak. Have mercy on my weakness. The boys, the sweet boys … I never mean to hurt them …

name: Vaegon Targaryen
quote: I would never marry Daella_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Jaehaerys_I). She can barely read. She should find some lord in need of stupid children, for that’s the only sort he will ever have of her.

name: Vaegon Targaryen
quote: Vaegon has never looked twice at Saera_Targaryen Viserra_Targaryen of them. I am not sure he is aware that they exist. Perhaps if some maester wrote about them in a book...

name: Vaegon Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys: In a few more years maidens will be fluttering around him like butterflies and blushing if he deigns to look their way. Alysanne: I fear for any butterfly that comes fluttering round Vaegon. He is like to squash it flat beneath a book.

name: Vaegon Targaryen
quote: Can you see him instructing some lord’s children how to read and write and do simple sums? Does he keep a raven in his chamber, or any sort of bird? Can you imagine him removing a man’s crushed leg, or delivering a baby? All these are required of a maester. Vaegon is no maester... but he could well have the makings of an archmaester in him. The Citadel is the greatest repository of knowledge in the known world. Send him there. Mayhaps he will find himself in the library. That, or he’ll get so lost amongst the books that you never need to concern yourselves with him again.

name: Vaegon Targaryen
quote: Jaehaerys: The Citadel will take charge of you. It is for you to determine what becomes of you. Vaegon: Yes, Father. Good.

name: Vaella Targaryen (daughter of Daeron)
quote: Instead [Maester Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I)] served at the keep of his eldest brother, another Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I). Well, that one died too, leaving only a feeble-witted daughter as heir.

name: Vaella Targaryen (daughter of Daeron)
quote: Jon: The lords passed over Prince Aerion_Targaryen Maegor_Targaryen_(son_of_Aerion) and Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) daughter and gave the crown to Aegon_V_Targaryen.Jeor: Yes and no. First they offered it, quietly, to Aemon_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I). And quietly he refused. […] Well, no sane man wanted any blood of Aerion's on the throne, and Daeron's girl was a lackwit besides being female, so they had no choice but to turn to Aemon's younger brother—Aegon, the Fifth of His Name.

name: Vaella Targaryen (daughter of Daeron)
quote: Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) sired a daughter, Vaella, in 222 AC, but the girl sadly proved simple.

name: Vaella Targaryen (daughter of Daeron)
quote: With both of Maekar_I_Targaryen elder sons deceased, there were four possible claimants. The Great Council dismissed Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Maekar_I) sweet but simple-minded daughter Vaella immediately.

name: Val
quote: I am no southron lady but a woman of the free folk. I know the forest better than all your black-cloaked rangers. It holds no ghosts for me.

name: Val
quote: You have my thanks, Lord Snow. For the half-blind horse, the salt cod, the free air. For hope.

name: Val
quote: Jon_Snow is welcome to steal into my bed any night he dares. Once he's been gelded, keeping those vows will come much easier for him.

name: Val
quote: King Stannis_Baratheon had plans for Val, he knew; she was the mortar with which he meant to seal the peace between the northmen and the free folk.

name: Val
quote: Val did not need to smile; she would have turned men's heads in any court in the wide world.

name: Val
quote: Lonely and lovely and lethal, Jon Snow reflected, and I might have had her. Her, and Winterfell, and Eddard_Stark. Instead he had chosen a black cloak and a wall of ice. Instead he had chosen honor. A bastard's sort of honor.

name: Val
quote: A nubile girl, I hear, and not hard to look upon. Good hips, good breasts, well made for whelping children.

name: Val
quote: A warrior princess, he decided, not some willowy creature who sits up in a tower, brushing her hair and waiting for some knight to rescue her.

name: Val
quote: You are insolent. I suppose that is only to be expected of a wildling. We must find you a husband who can teach you courtesy.

name: Valaena Velaryon
quote: Aegon_I_Targaryen was the only son, and second child, of Aerion_Targaryen_(son_of_Daemion), Lord of Dragonstone, and Lady Valaena of House Velaryon, herself half Targaryen on her mother's side. Aegon had two trueborn siblings; an elder sister, Visenya_Targaryen, and a younger sister, Rhaenys_Targaryen.

name: Valaena Velaryon
quote: King Aegon_I_Targaryen own mother had been a Velaryon, so the marriage was reckoned one of cousin to cousin.

name: Valarr Targaryen
quote: Baelor_Targaryen_(son_of_Daeron_II) was only nine-and-thirty. He had it in him to be a great king, the greatest since Aegon_I_Targaryen. Why would the gods take him, and leave you? Begone with you, Ser Duncan. Begone.

name: Valarr Targaryen
quote: The Young Prince's horse was black as night, to match the color of his armor, lance, shield, and trappings. Atop his helm was a gleaming three-headed dragon, wings spread, enameled in a rich red; its twin was painted upon the glossy black surface of his shield.

name: Valarr Targaryen
quote: Meanwhile the Young Prince sat outside his black pavilion, drinking from his silver goblet and rising from time to time to mount his horse and vanquish yet another undistinguished foe. He had won nine victories, but it seemed to Dunk that every one was hollow. He is beating old men and upjumped squires, and a few lords of high birth and low skill. The truly dangerous men are riding past his shield as if they do not see it.

name: Valerion Targaryen
quote: ... George had some new ideas for some of the names and the stories of the children who died young, and corrected some issues that came out of his original birth order (we actually got the names of all the kids quite late in the production of TWoIaF—literally a month before we had to finalize the book—so there was not much time to interrogate it). However, the stories of those who live to adulthood, as published in TWoIaF, do remain the same (just, of course, much more detailed).

name: Varamyr
quote: Once a horse is broken to the saddle, any man can mount him. Once a beast’s been joined to a man, any skinchanger can slip inside and ride him. Orell was withering inside his feathers, so I took the eagle for my own. But the joining works both ways, warg. Orell lives inside me now, whispering how much he hates you. And I can soar above the Wall, and see with eagle eyes.

name: Varamyr
quote: Mance_Rayder should have let me take the direwolf. There would be a second life worthy of a king.

name: Varamyr
quote: A vicious little runt.

name: Vardis Egen
quote: Lysa: Ser Vardis Egen, you were ever Jon_Arryn good right hand. You shall be our champion. Vardis: My lady, pray give this burden to another, I have no taste for it. Tyrion_Lannister is no warrior. Look at him. A dwarf, half my size and lame in the legs. It would be shameful to slaughter such a man and call it justice.

name: Vardis Egen
quote: For the Eyrie and the Vale!

name: Vardis Egen
quote: Tyrion remembered him well from the years he had spent at King's Landing as the captain of the Jon_Arryn household guard. A square, plain face, silver hair, a heavy build, and no humor whatsoever.

name: Vardis Egen
quote: Eon: Ser Vardis is a doughty fighter. He will make short work of Bronn. Catelyn: Will he, my lord? I wonder.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Kingthlayer ... You are my captifth.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Jaime: Lord Vargo, you were foolish to leave Tywin_Lannister service, but it is not too late to make amends. He will pay well for me, you know it. Vargo: Oh yeth. Half the gold in Cathterly Rock, I thall have. But firth I mutht thend him a methage.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Thee'th worth a bag of thapphireth!

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: How many monsters does Lord Tywin_Lannister have?

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Shagwell: If Lord Roose_Bolton goat eats the men who fed Lord Tywin_Lannister goat, how many goats are there? Arya: One. Shagwell: Now there's a weasel clever as a goat!

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: I ought to write Robb_Stark a stern letter. I understand his man Roose_Bolton is stabling goats in my high hall, it's really quite unconscionable.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: He will be pleased to see you, I have no doubt, but I would not call him a goat to his face. Lord Vargo grows prickly about his dignity.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Roose: Do you know why Hoat cut off your hand? Jaime: He enjoys cutting off hands. He enjoys cutting off feet as well. He doesn't seem to need a reason. Roose: Nonetheless, he had one. Hoat is more cunning than he appears. No man commands a company such as the Brave Companions for long unless he has some wits about him.

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: Roose: After a war there is always a peace, and with peace there are pardons ... for the Robb_Stark, at least. Not for the likes of Vargo Hoat. Both sides have made use of him, but neither will shed a tear at his passing. The Brave Companions did not fight in the Battle of the Blackwater, yet they died there all the same. Brienne: You'll forgive me if I don't mourn? Roose: You have no pity for our wretched doomed goat?

name: Vargo Hoat
quote: The goat is Lord of Harrenhal, and the Lord of Harrenhal does not haggle.

name: Varys
quote: A eunuch has no honor, and a spider does not enjoy the luxury of scruples, my lord.

name: Varys
quote: Varys: I begin to comprehend why the queen fears you so much. Oh, yes I do. Eddard: You are the one she ought to fear. Varys: No. I am what I am. The king makes use of me, but it shames him. A most puissant warrior is our Robert_I_Baratheon, and such a manly man has little love for sneaks and spies and eunuchs. If a day should come when Cersei_Lannister whispers, 'Kill that man,' Ilyn_Payne will snick my head off in a twinkling, and who will mourn poor Varys then? North or south, they sing no songs for spiders.

name: Varys
quote: Eddard: Tell me, Lord Varys, who do you truly serve? Varys: Why, the realm, my good lord, how ever could you doubt that? I swear it by my lost manhood. I serve the realm, and the realm needs peace.

name: Varys
quote: The High_Septon_(fat_one) once told me that as we sin, so do we suffer. If that's true, Lord Eddard, tell me ... why is it always the innocents who suffer most, when you high lords play your game of thrones??

name: Varys
quote: May I leave you with a bit of a riddle, Lord Tyrion? In a room sit three great men, a king, a priest, and a rich man with his gold. Between them stands a sellsword, a little man of common birth and no great mind. Each of the great ones bids him slay the other two. ‘Do it,’ says the king, ‘for I am your lawful ruler.’ ‘Do it,’ says the priest, ‘for I command you in the names of the gods.’ ‘Do it,’ says the rich man, ‘and all this gold shall be yours.’ So tell me—who lives and who dies?

name: Varys
quote: The storms come and go, the waves crash overhead, the big fish eat the little fish, and I keep on paddling.

name: Varys
quote: Power resides where men believe it resides. No more and no less.

name: Varys
quote: Tyrion: Lord Varys, sometimes I feel as though you are the best friend I have in King's Landing, and sometimes I feel you are my worst enemy. Varys: How odd. I think quite the same of you.

name: Varys
quote: Secrets are worth more than silver or sapphires.

name: Varys
quote: Ser Kevan. Forgive me if you can. I bear you no ill will. This was not done from malice. It was for the realm. For the children ... There are many like you, good men in service to bad causes ...

name: Varys
quote: Nothing happens in this city without Varys knowing. Ofttimes he knows about it before it happens. He has informants everywhere. His little birds, he calls them.

name: Varys
quote: Eddard Stark: You spoke of Varys. Does the eunuch know all of it?" Catelyn: Not from my lips. You did not wed a fool, Eddard Stark. But Varys has ways of learning things that no man could know. He has some dark art, Ned, I swear it.

name: Varys
quote: Leave Lord Varys to me, sweet lady. If you will permit me a small obscenity—and where better for it than here—I hold the man's balls in the palm of my hand. Or would, if he were a man, or had any balls. You see, if the pie is opened, the birds begin to sing, and Varys would not like that. Were I you, I would worry more about the Lannisters and less about the eunuch.

name: Varys
quote: Eddard: I have heard it said that poison is a woman's weapon. Pycelle: It is said. Women, cravens … and eunuchs. The Lord Varys was born a slave in Lys, did you know? Put not your trust in spiders, my lord.

name: Varys
quote: For all his protestations of loyalty, the eunuch knew too much and did too little.

name: Varys
quote: Birds are lost, messages stolen or sold ... there are things I might tell you of that eunuch that would chill your blood ...

name: Varys
quote: Shae: It's still him. Only dressed different. Tyrion: A different look, a different smell, a different way of walking. Most men would be deceived. Shae: And most women, maybe. But not whores.

name: Varys
quote: Cersei: You put too much trust in that eunuch. Tyrion: He serves me well. Cersei: Or so he'd have you believe. You think you're the only one he whispers secrets to? He gives each of us just enough to convince us that we'd be helpless without him. He played the same game with me, when I first wed Robert. For years, I was convinced I had no truer friend at court, but now ...

name: Varys
quote: Ser Barristan_Selmy once told me the rot in King Aerys_II_Targaryen's reign began with Varys. The eunuch should never have been pardoned.

name: Varys
quote: In Myr he was a prince of thieves, until a rival thief informed on him. In Pentos his accent marked him, and once he was known for a eunuch he was despised and beaten. Why he chose me to protect him I may never know, but we came to an arrangement. Varys spied on lesser thieves and took their takings. I offered my help to their victims, promising to recover their valuables for a fee. Soon every man who had suffered a loss knew to come to me, whilst city's footpads and cutpurses sought out Varys ... half to slit his throat, the other half to sell him what they'd stolen. We both grew rich, and richer still when Varys trained his mice.

name: Vayon Poole
quote: Vayon: You sent for me, my lord Hand? Eddard: Hand no longer.

name: Vayon Poole
quote: She knew there had been fighting, but surely no one would harm a steward. Vayon Poole did not even wear a sword.

name: Vickon Greyjoy
quote: Let them preach. We have need of winds to fill our sails.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Words are wind, and the only good wind is that which fills our sails.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: You all know me. If you want sweet words, look elsewhere. I have no singer's tongue. I have an axe, and I have these. I was a loyal brother. When Balon_Greyjoy was wed, it was me he sent to Harlaw to bring him back Alannys_Harlaw. I led his longships into many a battle, and never lost but one. The first time Balon took a crown, it was me sailed into Lannisport to singe the lion's tail. The second time, it was me he sent to skin the Young Wolf should he come howling home. All you'll get from me is more of what you got from Balon. That's all I have to say.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: A wolf is not a kraken. What the kraken grasps it does not lose, be it longship or leviathan.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Wizards may be well and good, but blood and steel win wars.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: There is no wine so sweet as wine taken from a foe. Someone had told him that once. Quellon_Greyjoy, or his brother Balon_Greyjoy. One day I shall drink your wine, Euron_Greyjoy, and take from you all that you hold dear.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Victarion Greyjoy mistrusted laughter. The sound of it always left him with the uneasy feeling that he was the butt of some jape he did not understand.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Moqorro: I have seen you in the nightfires, Victarion Greyjoy. You come striding through the flames stern and fierce, your great axe dripping blood, blind to the tentacles that grasp you at wrist and neck and ankle, the black strings that make you dance. Victarion: Dance? Your nightfires lie. I was not made for dancing, and I am no man's puppet.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Daenerys_Targaryen in the world has urgent need of my axe.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Two gods are with me now. No foe can stand before two gods.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Lord Captain of the Iron Fleet, and a fearsome warrior. I have heard them sing of him in the alehouses.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Victarion is like some great grey bullock, strong and tireless and dutiful, but not like to win any races. No doubt he'll serve me as loyally as he has served Balon_Greyjoy. He has neither the wits nor the ambition to plot betrayal.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: You ought to have no trouble catching our uncles. Aeron_Greyjoy is drunk on seawater, after all, and the other is a great grey bullock so dim he'll probably get lost.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: The king must be Victarion, or the storm will slay us all.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: Victarion_Greyjoy's_third_wife came to me wet and willing. It seems Victarion is big everywhere but where it matters.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
quote: He shall be our king. What man could look on him and doubt it?

name: Victarion Greyjoy's third wife
quote: Victarion: She was only a salt wife. Asha: Balon_Greyjoy refused to speak of her. Victarion: It does no good to speak of things no man can change.

name: Victarion Greyjoy's third wife
quote: Victarion: He put a baby in her belly and made me do the killing. I would have killed him too, but Balon_Greyjoy would have no kinslaying in his hall. He sent Euron_Greyjoy into exile, never to return ... Asha: ... so long as Balon lived? Victarion: She gave me horns. I had no choice.

name: Victarion Greyjoy's third wife
quote: She came to me wet and willing. It seems Victarion is big everywhere but where it matters.

name: Victarion Greyjoy's third wife
quote: I beat her to death with mine own hands, he thought, but the Euron_Greyjoy killed her when he shoved himself inside her. I had no choice.

name: Victor Risley
quote: You always were a bloody fool, Victor.

name: Violet
quote: Vyman: Tansy, did you say? The smallfolk often name their daughters after flowers and herbs. There was a widow, I recall, she used to come to the castle looking for old shoes in need of new soles. Her name was Tansy, now that I think on it. Or was it Pansy? Some such. But she has not come for many years ...Catelyn: Her name was Violet.

name: Visenya Targaryen
quote: Your guards are slow and lazy.

name: Visenya Targaryen
quote: You are a fool and a weakling, nephew. Do you think any man would ever have dared speak so to Aegon_I_Targaryen? You have a dragon. Use him. Fly to Oldtown and make this Starry Sept another Harrenhal. Or give me leave, and let me roast High_Septon_(Aenys_I) for you.

name: Visenya Targaryen
quote: A true king, blood of Aegon the Conqueror, who was my brother, my husband, and my love. If any man questions my son's right to the Iron Throne, let him prove his claim with his body.

name: Visenya Targaryen (daughter of Daemon)
quote: Monster, monster, get out, get out, GET OUT!

name: Visenya Targaryen (daughter of Daemon)
quote: She was my only daughter, and they killed her. They stole my crown and murdered my daughter, and they shall answer for it.

name: Viserra Targaryen
quote: She has no interest in kissing games, nor boys. She plays with them as she used to play with her puppies, but she would no more lie with one than with a dog. She aims much higher, our Viserra. I have seen the way she preens and prances around Baelon. That is the husband she desires, and not for love of him. She wants to be the queen.

name: Viserys Plumm
quote: Egg: Plumm…are you kin to Lord Viserys Plumm, ser? Maynard: Distantly, though I doubt that his lordship would admit to it. One might say that he is of the sweet Plumms, whilst I am of the sour.

name: Viserys Plumm
quote: Ossifer_Plumm was much too dead, but that did not stop him fathering a child, did it?

name: Viserys Plumm
quote: House Plumm is sworn to Casterly Rock, and as it happens I know a bit of its history. Your branch sprouted from a stone spit across the narrow sea, no doubt. A younger son of Viserys Plumm, I'd wager. Daenerys_Targaryen dragons were fond of you, were they not?

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: We go home with an army, sweet sister. With Khal Drogo's army, that is how we go home. And if you must wed him and bed him for that, you will. I'd let his whole khalasar fuck you if need be, sweet sister, all forty thousand men, and their horses too if that was what it took to get my army.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Daenerys: Drogo says you shall have a splendid golden crown that men shall tremble to behold. Viserys: That was all I wanted. What was promised.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: No, you cannot touch me, I am the dragon, the dragon, and I will be crowned!

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Viserys: You were supposed to be my wife, to bear me children with silver hair and purple eyes, to keep the blood of the dragon pure. I took care of you. I taught you who you were. I fed you. I sold Rhaella_Targaryen crown to keep you fed. Daenerys: You hurt me. You frightened me. Viserys: Only when you woke the dragon. I loved you. Daenerys: You sold me. You betrayed me. Viserys: No. You were the betrayer. You turned against me, against your own blood. They cheated me. Your Drogo and his stinking savages. They were cheats and liars. They promised me a golden crown and gave me this. Daenerys: You could have had your crown. My Drogo would have won it for you if only you had waited.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Viserys is less than the shadow of a snake.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Rhaella_Targaryen died giving me birth, and Aerys_II_Targaryen and my brother Rhaegar_Targaryen even before that. I would never have known so much as their names if Viserys had not been there to tell me. He was the only one left. The only one. He is all I have.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: He was no dragon. Fire cannot kill a dragon.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: The Beggar King is dead. Viserys. The last son of Mad King Aerys_II_Targaryen. He's been going about the Free Cities since before I was born, calling himself a king. Well, Cersei_Lannister says the Dothraki finally crowned him. With molten gold.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: The cream-and-gold I call Viserion. Viserys was cruel and weak and frightened, yet he was my brother still. His dragon will do what he could not.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Even as a child, your brother Viserys oft seemed to be Aerys_II_Targaryen's son, in ways Rhaegar_Targaryen never did.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Arianne: Who is it? Who have I been betrothed to, all these years? Doran: It makes no matter. He is dead. Arianne: The old ones are so frail. Was it a broken hip, a chill, the gout? Doran: It was a pot of molten gold. We princes make our careful plans and the gods smash them all awry.

name: Viserys Targaryen
quote: Words are wind, and the wind that blows exiles across the narrow sea seldom blows them back. That boy Viserys Targaryen spoke of return as well. He slipped through my fingers at Dragonstone, only to spend his life wheedling after sellswords. "The Beggar King," they called him in the Free Cities.

name: Viserys I Targaryen
quote: Viserys I Targaryen had a generous, amiable nature, and was well loved by his lords and smallfolk alike. The reign of the Young King, as the commons called him upon his ascent, was peaceful and prosperous.

name: Viserys I Targaryen
quote: Viserys I Targaryen was not the strongest-willed of kings, it must be said; always amiable and anxious to please, he relied greatly on the counsel of the men around him, and did as they bid more oft than not.

name: Viserys I Targaryen
quote: He had ruled for six-and-twenty years, reigning over the most prosperous era in the history of the Seven Kingdoms but seeding within it the disastrous decline of his house and the death of the last dragons.

name: Viserys II Targaryen
quote: Prince Viserys was a lively and likely young lad, possessed of great charm and boundless vitality. Though not as tall, as strong, or as handsome as Aegon_III_Targaryen, he struck all who met him as more clever and more curious than the king.

name: Viserys II Targaryen
quote: Viserys II had within him the capacity to be a new Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen, for no king had ever been shrewder or more capable. Tragically, a sudden illness carried him away in 172 AC.

name: Viserys II Targaryen
quote: Tyrion: It should have been Lives of Five Kings.Oberyn: Viserys hardly reigned a fortnight.Tyrion: He reigned more than a year.Oberyn: A year or a fortnight, what does it matter? He poisoned his own nephew to gain the throne and then did nothing once he had it.Tyrion: Baelor starved himself to death, fasting. His uncle served him loyally as Hand, as he had served the Young Dragon before him. Viserys might have only reigned a year, but he ruled for fifteen, while Daeron warred and Baelor prayed. And if he did remove his nephew, can you blame him? Someone had to save the realm from Baelor's follies.

name: Viserys Targaryen (son of Aenys I)
quote: Maegor: Chain him in a black cell and question him sharply. Ask him where his Alyssa_Velaryon has gone. Owen: He may not know. Maegor: Then let him die. Perhaps the bitch will turn up for his funeral.

name: Viserys Targaryen (son of Aenys I)
quote: Let his mother come and claim him.

name: Viserys Targaryen (son of Aenys I)
quote: When my boy Viserys was tortured and slain, these men stood by silently and spoke no word of protest. Why should we listen to them now?

name: Vulture King (Aenys I)
quote: This Vulture King is half-mad, and his followers are a rabble, undisciplined and unwashed. We can smell them coming fifty leagues away.

name: Vulture King (Jaehaerys I)
quote: He calls himself a vulture but he does not fly. He hides. He should call himself the gopher.

name: Vylarr
quote: Vylarr: How many men should I take?Tyrion: Why, all of them.Pycelle: My lord Hand, that cannot ... your father, Lord Tywin_Lannister himself, he sent these good men to our city to protect Queen Cersei_Lannister and her children ...Tyrion: The Kingsguard and the City Watch protect them well enough. The gods speed you on your way, Vylarr.

name: Vylarr
quote: Vylarr's loyalty is to Casterly Rock.

name: Vyman
quote: Vyman: My lady, is there aught I might do for you? A sleeping draught, perhaps?Thank you, Maester, but no. I will not sleep away my grief. Bran_Stark and Rickon_Stark deserve better from me. Go and join the celebration, I will sit with Hoster_Tully for a time.

name: Vyman
quote: Vyman: It will not be much longer. Hoster_Tully last strength is going, though still he tries to fight.Catelyn: He was ever a fighter. A sweet stubborn man.Vyman: Yes, but this battle he cannot win. It is time he lay down his sword and shield. Time to yield.

name: Vyman
quote: Jaime: I know, there has been a white raven from the Citadel. Winter has come.Vyman: No, my lord. The bird was from King's Landing. I took the liberty ... I did not know ...

name: Lord Vyrwel
quote: Daemon: I want the truth of this. Sunderland, Vyrwel, Smallwood, take your men and go find Ser Glendon_Flowers in the dungeons. Bring him up forthwith, and see that no harm comes to him. If any man should try to hinder you, tell him you are about the king's business. Lord Vyrwel: As you command.

name: Waif
quote: Waif: Who are you? Arya: No one. Waif: You lie. You must lie gooder. Arya: Gooder? You mean better, stupid. Waif: Better stupid. I will show you.

name: Waif
quote: Arya: What part was the lie? Waif: No part. I lied about the lie. Arya: Did you? Or are you lying now?

name: Waif
quote: Arya: How long must I be blind? Waif: Until darkness is as sweet to you as light, or until you ask us for your eyes. Ask and you shall see.

name: Waif
quote: The one you call waif is a woman grown who has spent her life serving Him of Many Faces. She gave Him all she was, all she ever might have been, all the lives that were within her.

name: Walda Frey
quote: I pray for you morn, noon, and night, my sweet lord, and count the days until you share my bed again. Return to me soon, and I will give you many trueborn sons to take the place of your dear Domeric_Bolton and rule the Dreadfort after you.

name: Walda Frey
quote: Walder_Frey offered Roose_Bolton his bride's weight in silver as a dowry, though, so my lord of Bolton picked me. I weigh six stone more than Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Walton), but that was the first time I was glad of it. I'm Lady Bolton now and my cousin's still a maid, and she'll be nineteen soon, poor thing.

name: Walda Frey
quote: Fat Walda was a round pink butterball of a girl with watery blue eyes, limp yellow hair, and a huge bosom, yet her voice was a fluttering squeak. It was hard to picture her in the Dreadfort in her pink lace and cape of vair.

name: Walda Frey
quote: He picked her because she's fat. You think Roose_Bolton gave a mummer's fart that she was your whelp? Think he sat about thinking, 'Heh, Merrett Muttonhead, that's the very man I need for a good-father'? Your Walda's a sow in silk, that's why he picked her, and I'm not like to thank you for it. We'd have had the same alliance at half the price if your little porkling put down her spoon from time to time.

name: Walda Frey
quote: Lady Walda is a Frey, and she has a fertile feel to her. I have become oddly fond of my fat little wife. The two before her never made a sound in bed, but this one squeals and shudders. I find that quite endearing. If she pops out sons the way she pops in tarts, the Dreadfort will soon be overrun with Boltons. Ramsay_Snow will kill them all, of course. That's for the best. I will not live long enough to see new sons to manhood, and boy lords are the bane of any House. Walda will grieve to see them die, though.

name: Walda Rivers
quote: Walder: Heh, are you another Walda? Walda: I'm Ser Aemon_Rivers's Walda, lord great grandfather. Walder: How long have you been talking? Not that you're like to have anything sensible to say, your father never did. He's Walder_Rivers son besides, heh. Go away, I wanted only Freys up here. The King in the North has no interest in base stock.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Big Walder: We're cousins, not brothers. I'm Walder son of Jammos_Frey. My father was Lord Walder_Frey son by his Alyssa_Blackwood. Walder_Frey_(son_of_Merrett) son of Merrett_Frey. His grandmother was Lord Walder's third wife, Amarei_Crakehall. He's ahead of me in the line of succession even though I'm older.Little Walder: Only by fifty-two days. And neither of us will ever hold the Twins, stupid.Big Walder: I will.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Luwin: Ser Stafford_Lannister commanded the enemy host. He was slain in the battle. Walder: Lord Tywin_Lannister is the only one who matters.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Little Walder: You can see to my horse too, Theon_Greyjoy. And to my little cousin's. Big Walder: I can see to my own horse.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Both were squires, both were eight, and both were Walder Frey. Big Walder and Walder_Frey_(son_of_Merrett), yes. Only the big one was Little and the little one was Big, which amused the boys and confused the rest of the world.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Walder_Frey_(son_of_Merrett) had become Lord Ramsay_Snow best boy and grew more like him every day, but the smaller Frey was made of different stuff and seldom took part in his cousin's games and cruelties.

name: Walder Frey
quote: With Ser Stevron_Frey, I might have been able to make amends, but Ser Ryman_Frey is dull-witted as a stone, and Black Walder... that one was not named for the color of his beard, I promise you. He went so far as to say that his sisters would not be loath to wed a widower. I would have killed him for that if Jeyne_Westerling had not begged me to be merciful.

name: Walder Frey
quote: A nasty bit of business.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Black Walder was a man who took what he wanted, even his brother's wife.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Small wonder he refused to marry. Why buy a cow when there were udders all around begging to be milked?

name: Walder Frey
quote: From what Edwyn_Frey tells me, though, I'd best pick one who hasn't flowered yet, or I'm like to find that Black Walder has been there first.

name: Walder Frey
quote: My brother had a hand in this, I'll wager. He allowed the outlaws to escape after they murdered Merrett_Frey and Petyr_Frey, and this is why. With Ryman_Frey dead, there’s only me left between Black Walder and the Twins.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Big Walder: He'll set his wolf on you, cousin.Little Walder: Let him. I always wanted a wolfskin cloak.Bran: Summer would tear your fat head off.Little Walder: Does your wolf have steel teeth, to bite through plate and mail?Luwin: Enough! These threats are unseemly, and I'll hear no more of them. Is this how you behave at the Twins, Walder Frey?Little Walder: If I want to.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Little Walder: Let me come too. I want that wolfskin cloak. I've hunted lots of times before. Red deer and elk, and even boar.Big Walder: He rode on a boar hunt with Merrett_Frey, but they never let him near the boar.

name: Walder Frey
quote: The big one they call little, it comes to me he's well named. Big outside, little inside, and mean down to the bones.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Both were squires, both were eight, and both were Walder Frey. Walder_Frey_(son_of_Jammos) and Little Walder, yes. Only the big one was Little and the little one was Big, which amused the boys and confused the rest of the world.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Little Walder had become Lord Ramsay_Snow best boy and grew more like him every day, but Walder_Frey_(son_of_Jammos) was made of different stuff and seldom took part in his cousin's games and cruelties.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Hosteen: We know the man who did this. Killed this boy and all the rest. Not by his own hand, no. He is too fat and craven to do his own killing. But by his word. Do you deny it?Wyman: I confess ... I confess that I know little of this poor boy. Lord Ramsay_Snow squire, was he not? How old was the lad?Hosteen: Nine, on his last nameday.Wyman: So young. Though mayhaps this was a blessing. Had he lived he would have grown up to be a Frey.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Now my bastards presume to teach me courtesy. I'll speak any way I like, damn you. I've had three kings to guest in my life, and queens as well, do you think I require lessons from the likes of you, Ryger? Your mother was milking goats the first time I gave her my seed.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Catelyn: Where I might have expected to find you, my lord. You are still Hoster_Tully bannerman, are you not? Walder: Heh, I called my swords, yes I did, here they are, you saw them on the walls. It was my intent to march as soon as all my strength was assembled. Well, to send my sons. I am well past marching myself, Lady Catelyn. Tell her, Jared. Tell her that was my intent. Jared: It was, my lady, on my honor. Walder: Is it my fault that Edmure_Tully lost his battle before we could march? I am told the Kingslayer went through him like an axe through ripe cheese. Why should my boys hurry south to die? All those who did go south are running north again.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Catelyn: If you were strong enough to climb your own battlements, Lord Frey, you would see that my son has twenty thousand men outside your walls. Walder: They'll be twenty thousand fresh corpses when Lord Tywin_Lannister gets here, don't you try and frighten me, my lady. Eddard_Stark's in some traitor's cell under the Red Keep, Hoster_Tully's sick, might be dying, and Jaime_Lannister's got Edmure_Tully in chains. What do you have that I should fear? That Robb_Stark? I'll match you son for son, and I'll still have eighteen when yours are all dead.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Do you think I can't tell Lord Stannis_Baratheon from Lord Tywin_Lannister? They're both bungholes who think they're too noble to shit, but never mind about that, I know the difference.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Walder: You will forgive me if I do not kneel, I know. My legs no longer work as they did, though that which hangs between 'em serves well enough, heh. Some would say it's a poor king who crowns himself with bronze, Your Grace. Robb Stark: Bronze and iron are stronger than gold and silver. The old Kings of Winter wore such a sword-crown. Walder: Small good it did them when the dragons came. Heh.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Heh, the King in the North arises. Seems we killed some of your men, Your Grace. Oh, but I'll make you an apology, that will mend them all again, heh.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Lord Walder Frey might be sworn to Riverrun, but he was a cautious man who had lived a long time by making certain he was always on the winning side.

name: Walder Frey
quote: That bore Walder Frey's seal beyond a doubt, Catelyn thought bitterly; hold back, wait, watch, take no risk unless forced to it.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Robett: Do you think he means to betray us to the Lannisters, my lady? Catelyn: He has an old man's caution and a young man's ambition, and has never lacked for cunning.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Hoster_Tully had once said of Walder Frey that he was the only lord in the Seven Kingdoms who could field an army out of his breeches.

name: Walder Frey
quote: There was something of the vulture about Lord Walder, and rather more of the weasel.

name: Walder Frey
quote: A few barbed words and some unseemly gloating. From him that's courtesy. I expected the old weasel to piss in our wine and make us praise the vintage.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Tyrion: So much for guest right. Tywin: The blood is on Walder Frey's hands, not mine. Tyrion: Walder Frey is a peevish old man who lives to fondle Joyeuse_Erenford and brood over all the slights he's suffered. I have no doubt he hatched this ugly chicken, but he would never have dared such a thing without a promise of protection.

name: Walder Frey
quote: Lord Walder must soon face the Father's judgment. He is very old. Let the sparrows spit upon his memory. It has nought to do with us.

name: Walder Rivers
quote: Lothar: Roslin_Frey is Walder_Frey youngest daughter by Lady Bethany_Rosby of House Rosby, his sixth wife. She has a gentle nature and a gift for music. Edmure: Might not it be better if I first met— Walder: You'll meet when you're wed. Unless Lord Tully feels a need to count her teeth first? Edmure: I will take your word so far as her teeth are concerned, but it would be pleasant if I might gaze upon her face before I espoused her. Walder: You must accept her now, my lord. Else my father's offer is withdrawn. Lothar: My brother has a soldier's bluntness, but what he says is true. It is my lord father's wish that this marriage take place at once.

name: Walder Rivers
quote: Edwyn_Frey is no man of the sword ... but I am, Piper. If you have more remarks to make, come outside and make them.

name: Walder Rivers
quote: Lothar_Frey bastard brother Walder Rivers was another matter; a harsh sour man with old Lord Walder_Frey suspicious face, he spoke but seldom and devoted most of his attention to the meat and mead that was set before him.

name: Walder Rivers
quote: Jaime: You were speaking of the Freys you wanted dead. Ryman_Frey, Edwyn_Frey, Emmon_Frey ... Daven: And Walder Rivers, that whoreson. Hates that he is a bastard, and hates everyone who's not.

name: Walder Rivers
quote: That one is more dangerous than any of his trueborn brothers.

name: Walderan Tarbeck
quote: A wallowing walrus of a man. If bellies were brains, he might have been the wisest man in all the west.

name: Wallace Waynwood
quote: Roland: Then how do you explain this hole in my chest, from where you stole my heart?Wallace: He is only t-teasing you, my lady. My n-n-nephew never had a h-h-heart.Rolland: The Waynwood wheel has a broken spoke, and we have my nuncle here. Squires should be quiet when knights are speaking.Wallace: I am no more a s-squire, my lady. My n-nephew knows full well that I was k-k-kni-k-k-kni—Alayne: Dubbed?Wallace: Dubbed.

name: Wallen
quote: Bran: Robb_Stark rode off just a moment ago, and my guard will be here shortly. Wallen: Your guard, is it? And what would they be guarding, my little lord? Is that a silver pin I see there on your cloak?

name: Wallen
quote: Only a Stark would be fool enough to threaten where smarter men would beg.

name: Wallen
quote: Stiv and Wallen flew down off the Wall, not me.

name: Walter Whent
quote: Most took this simply as an attempt by Whent to outdo Tywin_Lannister and demonstrate the wealth and splendor of his house. There were those, however, who believed this no more than a ruse, and Lord Whent no more than a catspaw. His lordship lacked the funds to pay such munificent prizes, they argued; someone else must surely have stood behind him, someone who did not lack for gold but preferred to remain in the shadows whilst allowing the Lord of Harrenhal to claim the glory for hosting this magnificent event.

name: Walter Whent
quote: Lord Whent was as open handed as he was rich. The lavish purses he proclaimed drew hundreds of challengers.

name: Walter Wyl
quote: Your father took my hand. I claim yours as repayment.

name: Steelshanks Walton
quote: Jaime: Unless you take me back to Harrenhal, the song I sing Tywin_Lannister may not be one the Lord of the Dreadfort would wish to hear. I might even say it was Roose_Bolton ordered my hand cut off, and Steelshanks Walton who swung the blade.Walton: That isn't so.Jaime: No, but who will my father believe?

name: Steelshanks Walton
quote: Steelshanks, he is called. A soldier of iron loyalty.

name: Steelshanks Walton
quote: Steelshanks Walton commanded Jaime's escort; blunt, brusque, brutal, at heart a simple soldier. Jaime had served with his sort all his life. Men like Walton would kill at their lord's command, rape when their blood was up after battle, and plunder wherever they could, but once the war was done they would go back to their homes, trade their spears for hoes, wed their neighbors' daughters, and raise a pack of squalling children. Such men obeyed without question, but the deep malignant cruelty of the Brave Companions was not a part of their nature.

name: Walton Stark
quote: Alaric: Walton lies down here in darkness in no small part thanks to you. Stars and Swords, the leavings of your seven gods, what are they to us? And yet you sent them to the Wall in their hundreds and their thousands, so many that the Night's Watch was hard pressed to feed them ... and when the worst of them rose up, the oathbreakers you had sent us, it cost my brother's life to put them down. Jaehaerys: A grievous price, but that was never our intent. You have my regrets, my lord, and my gratitude. Alaric: I would sooner have my brother.

name: Walys Flowers
quote: Once he forged his chain, his secret father and his friends wasted no time dispatching him to Winterfell to fill Lord Rickard_Stark ears with poisoned words as sweet as honey. The Catelyn_Stark was his notion, never doubt it, he—

name: Ward of Gyles Rosby
quote: Mark my word, when Gyles_Rosby dies that ill-born wretch will make off with his gold. He may even try and claim the lands and lordship, though by rights Rosby should come to us when Gyles passes.

name: Ward of Gyles Rosby
quote: Cersei: As to Lord Gyles_Rosby, no doubt our Father Above will judge him justly. He left no children?Pycelle: No children of his body, but there is a ward... Cersei: ...not of his blood.

name: Blue Bard
quote: Cersei: It is easy to see why you are Lady Margaery_Tyrell favorite. Blue Bard: Her Grace is kind. She says I give her pleasure. Cersei: Oh, I'm certain of it.

name: Blue Bard
quote: The singer's boots were supple blue calfskin, his breeches fine blue wool. The tunic he wore was pale blue silk slashed with shiny blue satin. He had even gone so far as to dye his hair blue, in the Tyroshi fashion. Long and curly, it fell to his shoulders and smelled as if it had been washed in rosewater. From blue roses, no doubt. At least his teeth are white. They were good teeth, not the least bit crooked.

name: Blue Bard
quote: The Blue Bard's eyes were the same color as Robert_I_Baratheon. For that alone, she hated him.

name: Wet Wat
quote: Wat: We will get swords and helms and chainmail? Bennis: Why, sure you will, just as soon as you kill one o' Rohanne_Webber's knights and strip his bloody corpse. Make sure you stick your arm up his horse's arse, too, that's where you'll find his silver.

name: Watt of Long Lake
quote: Edd: The gods always smiled on Watt, though. When the wildlings knocked him off the Bridge of Skulls, somehow he landed in a nice deep pool of water. How lucky was that, missing all those rocks? Grenn: Was it a long fall? Did landing in the pool of water save his life? Edd: No, he was dead already, from that axe in his head. Still, it was pretty lucky, missing the rocks.

name: Waymar Royce
quote: I am not going back to Castle Black a failure on my first ranging.

name: Waymar Royce
quote: Dance with me then.

name: Waymar Royce
quote: Ser Waymar had been a Sworn Brother of the Night's Watch for less than half a year, but no one could say he had not prepared for his vocation. At least insofar as his wardrobe was concerned.

name: Waymar Royce
quote: He lifted his sword high over his head, defiant. His hands trembled from the weight of it, or perhaps from the cold. Yet in that moment, Will thought, he was a boy no longer, but a man of the Night's Watch.

name: Waymar Royce
quote: Too proud to sleep under my roof, him in his sable cloak and black steel. My wives give him big cow eyes all the same.

name: Weasel
quote: The girl was no older than two and she cried all the time, a whimpery sound, like something was caught in her throat. Either she couldn't talk yet or she had forgotten how.

name: Weasel
quote: Gendry: Lommy_Greenhands no use to anyone. That crying girl's no use either. Arya: You leave Weasel alone, she's just scared and hungry is all.

name: Weasel
quote: And Arya thought, Run, Weasel, run as far as you can, run and hide and never come back.

name: Weeper
quote: They were armed with spears and fire-hardened lances, all but their leader, a fleshy blond man with watery eyes who bore a great curved scythe of sharpened steel. The Weeper, he knew at once. The black brothers told tales of this one. Like Rattleshirt and Harma Dogshead and Alfyn_Crowkiller, he was a known raider.

name: Weeper
quote: Along with the Tormund and the Ryk rode other sorts of wildlings, though; men like Rattleshirt and the Weeper who would as soon slit you as spit on you.

name: Weeper
quote: Cutting out the eyes, that's the Weeper's work. The best crow's a blind crow, he likes to say. Sometimes I think he'd like to cut out his own eyes, the way they're always watering and itching. Jon_Snow been assuming the free folk would turn to Tormund to lead them, because that's what he would do. He liked Tormund, and the old fraud liked him too. If it's the Weeper, though ... that's not good. Not for him, and not for us.

name: Weeper
quote: Othell: The Weeper will not say the words. He will not wear the cloak. Even other raiders do not trust him. Jon: We need the Weeper, and others like him. Who knows the wild better than a wildling? Who knows our foes better than a man who has fought them? Othell: All the Weeper knows is rape and murder.

name: Weese
quote: My nose never lies. I can smell defiance, I can smell pride, I can smell disobedience. I catch a whiff of any such stinks, you'll answer for it. When I sniff you, all I want to smell is fear.

name: Weese
quote: Realm's got more kings than a castle's got rats.

name: Wenda
quote: No good ever came from dealing with outlaws. That vile little bitch Wenda had burned a fawn into the cheek of his arse while she had him captive.

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: Wendel: There are birds in this grass. Would you fancy a roast quail to break your fast this morning? Catelyn: Oats and bread are sufficient ... for all of us, I think. We have many leagues yet to ride, Ser Wendel. Wendel: As you will, my lady. Oats and bread, and what could be better?

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: Nothing's more like to bring a Lannister running than a threat to his gold.

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: A valiant boy, and jolly.

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: He was one of the fattest men Catelyn had ever known, but howevermuch he loved his food, he loved his honor more.

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: Wendel was always a brave boy. I was not surprised to learn he died a hero.

name: Wendel Manderly
quote: My son Wendel came to the Twins a guest. He ate Lord Walder_Frey bread and salt, and hung his sword upon the wall to feast with friends. And they murdered him. Murdered, I say, and may the Freys choke upon their fables.

name: Wex Pyke
quote: Most squires have loose tongues, but Wex had been born dumb ... which didn't seem to keep him from being clever as any twelve-year-old had a right to be.

name: Wex Pyke
quote: That's for enjoying this so much. And that's for not warning me. Next time, grow a tongue.

name: Wex Pyke
quote: We may never know all that happened at Winterfell, when Ser Rodrik_Cassel tried to take the castle back from Theon_Greyjoy's ironmen. The Ramsay_Snow claims that Greyjoy murdered Ser Rodrik during a parley. Wex says no. Until he learns more letters we will never know half the truth ... but he came to us knowing yes and no, and those can go a long way once you find the right questions.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Keep your silver. I have gold. And spare me your black looks, ser. I am too old to be frightened of a scowl. You are a hard man, I see, and no doubt skilled with that long sword at your side, but this is my realm. Let me crook a finger and you may find yourself traveling to Meereen chained to an oar in the belly of a galley.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Men are beasts, selfish and brutal. However gentle the words, there are always darker motives underneath. I do not trust you, ser. If you want to get to Meereen, swim. I have no help to give you.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Knights defend the weak and protect the innocent, they say. And I am the fairest maid in all Volantis.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Tyrion: Perhaps you would remove these charming iron bracelets as well? This monster has but half a nose, and it itches most abominably. The chains are too short for me to scratch it. I'll make you a gift of them, and gladly. Widow: How generous. But I have worn iron in my time, and now I find that I prefer gold and silver. And sad to say, this is Volantis, where fetters and chains are cheaper than day-old bread and it is forbidden to help a slave escape.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Tyrion: If I were Volantene, and free, and had the blood, you'd have my vote for triarch, my lady. Widow: I am no lady, just Vogarro's whore. You want to be gone from here before the tigers come. Should you reach Daenerys_Targaryen, give her a message from the slaves of Old Volantis. Tell her we are waiting. Tell her to come soon.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Serving girl: The widow will see you next, noble ser. Have you brought a gift for her? Jorah: Yes. Thank you. Tyrion: Whose widow is this? Jorah: The widow of the waterfront. East of the Rhoyne they still call her Vogarro's whore, though never to her face.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: There was something vulpine about the way the woman sat in her corner by the courtyard, something reptilian about her eyes.

name: Widow of the waterfront
quote: Jorah_Mormont, thought Tyrion. It's not coin she wants, it's respect. Haven't you heard a word she's said?

name: Wilbert Osgrey
quote: Come no farther. You are not wanted here. I forbid you to set foot upon the Reach.

name: Wilbert Osgrey
quote: Eustace: They fought for half a day, the gold lion and the chequy. The Lannister was armed with a Valyrian sword that no common steel can match, so the Little Lion was hard pressed, his shield in ruins. In the end, bleeding from a dozen grievous wounds with his own blade broken in his hand, he threw himself headlong at his foe. King Lancel_IV_Lannister cut him near in half, the singers say, but as he died the Little Lion found the gap in the king's armor beneath his arm, and plunged his dagger home. When their king died, the westermen turned back, and the Reach was saved. Bennis: Aye, m'lord, we could use a man like that today.

name: Treb
quote: Well and good, we got us a bloody trebuchet.

name: Treb
quote: Bennis: They can chuck things off the roof. Treb is good at chucking rocks. Duncan: He could chuck a rock or two, I suppose, until one of Rohanne_Webber's crossbowmen puts a bolt through him.

name: Will (squire)
quote: Uthor: I see I still have much to teach you, Will. This coin has been clipped, t'other shaved. And this one? Look at the coins before taking them. Here, tell me what you see. Will: This one's good, m'lord. There's a dragon on the one side and a king on t'other...

name: Fletcher Will
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl_the_Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Will of the Woods
quote: Will of the Woods, well, you’re just filth.

name: Willam Dustin
quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn_Cassel, Jory_Cassel's father; faithful Theo_Wull; Ethan_Glover, who had been Brandon_Stark's squire; Ser Mark_Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland_Reed; Lord Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man's memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.

name: Willam Dustin
quote: When Lord Dustin had beheld her naked, he'd told Eddard_Stark that her breasts were enough to make him wish he'd never been weaned. Poor man, she thought. He had ridden south with Ned, never to return.

name: Willam Dustin
quote: Eddard_Stark returned the horse to me on his way back home to Winterfell. He told me that my lord had died an honorable death, that his body had been laid to rest beneath the red mountains of Dorne. He brought Lyanna_Stark bones back north, though, and there she rests... but I promise you, Lord Eddard's bones will never rest beside hers. I mean to feed them to my dogs.

name: Willam Foxglove
quote: Stannis_Baratheon has seen victory in his fires, a victory that will be sung of for a thousand years in lord's castle and peasant's hut alike.

name: Willam Stark
quote: Wildlings have invaded the realm before. Raymun_Redbeard led them south in the time of my Rickard_Stark grandfather.

name: Willam Wells
quote: Cletus: This will be a tale to tell our grandchildren. Willam: A tale to tell tavern wenches, you mean, in hopes they'll lift their skirts. Cletus: For grandchildren, you need children. For children, you need to lift some skirts.

name: Willam Wells
quote: Men's lives have meaning, not their deaths. I loved Will and Cletus_Yronwood too, but this will not bring them back to us.

name: Willam Wythers
quote: Squirrels run from lions. He does not have it in him to defy the Iron Throne.

name: Willas Tyrell
quote: We were speaking of my grandson Willas. He is a bit old for you, to be sure, but a dear boy for all that. Not the least bit oafish, and heir to Highgarden besides.

name: Willas Tyrell
quote: Willas has a bad leg but a good heart.

name: Willas Tyrell
quote: When I first broached the match to him, Mace_Tyrell seemed well enough disposed. A day later, all was changed. The old woman's work. She hectors her son unmercifully. Varys claims she told him that Cersei_Lannister was too old and too used for this precious one-legged grandson of hers.

name: Willas Tyrell
quote: The Mace_Tyrell thrust him into tourneys at too tender an age, just as he did the other two. He wanted another Leo_Tyrell_(Longthorn), and made himself a cripple.

name: Willas Tyrell
quote: Gentle, pious, good-hearted Willas Tyrell. Be grateful you were spared, he would have bored you spitless.

name: Willem Darry
quote: Daenerys_Targaryen, there you are. Come, come to me, my lady, you're home now, you're safe now.

name: Willem Darry
quote: Eddard: Ser Willem Darry is fled to Dragonstone, with Rhaella_Targaryen and Prince Viserys_Targaryen. I thought you might have sailed with him.Oswell: Ser Willem is a good man and true.Gerold: But not of the Kingsguard. The Kingsguard does not flee.

name: Willem Darry
quote: No one ever kept me safe when I was little. Well, Ser Willem did, but then he died.

name: Willem Lannister
quote: Robb: I saw your sons die, that night in the Whispering Wood. Tion_Frey did not kill Torrhen_Karstark. Willem Lannister did not slay Eddard_Karstark. How then can you call this vengeance? This was folly, and bloody murder. Your sons died honorably on a battlefield, with swords in their hands. Rickard: They died. The Jaime_Lannister cut them down. These two were of his ilk. Only blood can pay for blood.

name: William Mooton
quote: Mooton has the courage of a worm. You will not speak to me of Mooton.

name: Willis Fell
quote: The girl is wild, willful, and wanton, as we feared, and now she has attached herself to Lord Corlys_Velaryon upjumped bastard. A snake for a sire, Marilda_of_Hull for a mother… is this to be our prince consort?

name: Willis Wode
quote: Willis: Lady Stark, I urge you to press on, with all haste. We drove them off for the moment, but they will not have gone far. Catelyn: We must bury our dead, Ser Willis. These were brave men. I will not leave them to the crows and shadowcats. Willis: This soil is too stony for digging.

name: Willis Wode
quote: He was Shella_Whent man, stiff-necked and stolid, and the first to rise to aid Catelyn_Stark back at the inn.

name: Willow Heddle
quote: Gendry was the closest thing to a man grown, but it was Willow shouting all the orders, as if she were a queen in her castle and the other children were no more than servants. If she were highborn, command would come naturally to her, and deference to them.

name: Willow Heddle
quote: One day that little girl will make some man a frightful wife. Gendry, most like.

name: Wine merchant
quote: Sweet reds, I have sweet reds, from Lys and Volantis and the Arbor. Whites from Lys, Tyroshi pear brandy, firewine, pepperwine, the pale green nectars of Myr. Smokeberry browns and Andalish sours, I have them, I have them.

name: Wine merchant
quote: That? Dornish swill. It is not worthy of a princess. I have a dry red from the Arbor, crisp and delectable. Please, let me give you a cask.

name: Wine merchant
quote: I am not worthy of this vintage, my lord. And it's a poor wine merchant who drinks up his own wares.

name: Wine merchant
quote: Daenerys: I need clever men about me if I am to win the Iron Throne.Jorah: That wineseller who tried to poison you was a clever man as well. Clever men hatch ambitious schemes.Daenerys: You will protect me. You, and my bloodriders.

name: Wine merchant
quote: Jorah: Daenerys, it was me who stopped you from drinking the wine.Daenerys: Yes. And how was it you knew the wine was poisoned?Jorah: I... I but suspected... the caravan brought a letter from Varys, he warned me there would be attempts. He wanted you watched, yes, but not harmed. If I had not told them someone else would have. You know that.Daenerys: I know you betrayed me. I know a poisoner tried to kill Rhaego, because of you. That's what I know.

name: Wisewoman's daughter
quote: At the Shadow Tower, I was given a new wool cloak from stores, black and black, and trimmed with black, to go with my black breeches and black boots, my black doublet and black mail. The new cloak had no frays nor rips nor tears... and most of all, no red. The men of the Night's Watch dressed in black, Ser Denys_Mallister reminded me sternly, as if I had forgotten. My old cloak was fit for burning now, he said. I left the next morning... for a place where a kiss was not a crime, and a man could wear any cloak he chose.

name: Wulfe
quote: Wulfe: A ship gone down, and only Moqorro clinging to the wreckage. Where's the crew? Did he call down demons to devour them? What happened to this ship? Victarion: A storm.

name: Wulfe
quote: He was not half the man that Nute the Barber was, but the Euron_Greyjoy had stolen Nute.

name: Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun
quote: Wun Wun: Kneel queen. Little queen. Shireen: He's a giant! A real true giant, like from the stories.

name: Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun
quote: His name is Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun, Leathers tells me. A lot to wrap a tongue around, I know. Leathers calls him Wun Wun, and that seems to serve.

name: Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun
quote: He reminded Jon of Hodor. Hodor twice as big, twice as strong, and half as clever.

name: Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun
quote: I had been given to understand that the Night's Watch defended the realm against such monsters. No one mentioned keeping them as pets.

name: Wun Weg Wun Dar Wun
quote: A giant as protector? Even Dalla could not boast of that.

name: Wyl the Whittler
quote: Tom: Alyn of Winterfell, Joth_Quickbow, Little_Matt and his sister Randa, Anvil_Ryn. Ser Ormond_(knight). Ser Dudley. Pate_of_Mory of Mory, Pate_of_Lancewood of Lancewood, Old_Pate, and Pate_of_Shermer's_Grove of Shermer's Grove. Blind Wyl the Whittler. Maerie_(goodwife). Maerie_the_Whore. Becca the Baker. Ser Raymun_Darry, Lord_Darry_(father_of_Raymun), young Lyman_Darry. The Harry_Rivers. Fletcher_Will. Harsley. Goodwife Nolla—Sandor: Enough. You're making noise. These names mean nothing. Who were they?Beric: People. People great and small, young and old. Good people and bad people, who died on the points of Lannister spears or saw their bellies opened by Lannister swords.

name: Wyl of Wyl
quote: Your father took my hand. I claim yours as repayment.

name: Wylis Manderly
quote: Wendel: If Walder_Frey wants to talk to us, let him open his gates, and we will all share his meat and mead. Wylis: Or let him come out and treat with Robb_Stark here, in plain sight of his men and ours.

name: Wylis Manderly
quote: Ser Wylis was only a few eels short of not being able to mount his own horse; she pitied the poor animal.

name: Wylis Manderly
quote: I know Wylis would not want to sit out the rest of the war. Gallant, that son of mine, and fierce as a mastiff.

name: Wylis Manderly
quote: None had any defiance left; especially not Ser Wylis, a bushy-faced tub of suet with dull eyes and sallow, sagging jowls.

name: Wylis Manderly
quote: The north remembers, Lord Davos. The north remembers, and the mummer's farce is almost done. My son is home.

name: Wylla Manderly
quote: Davos: What does Stannis_Baratheon offer you? Vengeance. Vengeance for my sons and Wendel_Manderly, for your husbands and your fathers and your brothers. Vengeance for Eddard_Stark, Robb_Stark, your butchered princes. Vengeance! Wylla: Yes. They killed Lord Eddard_Stark and Lady Catelyn_Stark and King Robb_Stark. He was our king! He was brave and good and the Freys murdered him. If Lord Stannis will avenge him, we should join Lord Stannis.

name: Wylla Manderly
quote: I know about the promise ... Maester Theomore, tell them! A thousand years before the Conquest, a promise was made, and oaths were sworn in the Wolf's Den before the old gods and the new. When we were sore beset and friendless, hounded from our homes and in peril of our lives, the wolves took us in and nourished us and protected us against our enemies. The city is built upon the land they gave us. In return we swore that we should always be their men. Stark men!

name: Wylla Manderly
quote: Wylla. Did you see how brave she was? Even when I threatened to have her tongue out, she reminded me of the debt White Harbor owes to the Starks of Winterfell, a debt that can never be repaid. Wylla spoke from the heart ... not every woman can be as brave as my Wylla.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: If I had thought to see war again in my lifetime, I should have eaten a few less eels.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: Why, no prince is ever late. "Those who arrive before him have come early, that's all.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: King Robb_Stark has no more loyal servant than Wyman Manderly.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: When treating with liars, even an honest man must lie.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: I am fat, and many think that makes me weak and foolish.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: My son Wendel_Manderly came to the Twins a guest. He ate Lord Walder_Frey's bread and salt, and hung his sword upon the wall to feast with friends. And they murdered him. Murdered, I say, and may the Freys choke upon their fables. I drink with Jared_Frey, jape with Symond_Frey, promise Rhaegar_Frey the hand of Wynafryd_Manderly ... but never think that means I have forgotten. The north remembers, Lord Davos. The north remembers, and the mummer's farce is almost done. Wylis_Manderly is home.

name: Wyman Manderly
quote: The wolf will prove Rickon_Stark is who we say he is, should the Dreadfort attempt to deny him. That is my price, Lord Davos. Smuggle me back my liege lord, and I will take Stannis_Baratheon as my king.

name: Wyman Manderly
